### [261] [Central Limit Theorem for Two-Time-Scale Approximate Distributionally Robust RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08417)
*Shengbo Wang,Zexi Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对分布鲁棒强化学习（DRRL）在小模糊度区域（KL散度）下的计算难题，提出基于一阶近似的鲁棒Bellman方程，并设计MVSA算法实现单样本无模型更新，证明了收敛性与中心极限定理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DRRL中鲁棒Bellman算子对转移核非线性，导致单样本更新有偏且对抗优化计算昂贵，亟需高效的无模型算法。

Method: 利用KL散度小模糊度区域下鲁棒泛函的一阶展开，得到近似鲁棒Bellman方程；提出MVSA算法，通过提升的随机近似动力学和两时间尺度设计实现单样本无模型更新。

Result: 证明MVSA收敛，且主迭代满足n^{-1/2}尺度的中心极限定理，渐近协方差被显式刻画；数值实验验证了理论。

Conclusion: 一阶近似+两时间尺度随机近似能有效解决DRRL的计算障碍，为无模型鲁棒RL提供了理论保证与实用算法。

Abstract: Designing model-free algorithms for distributionally robust reinforcement learning (DRRL) poses fundamental challenges. The robust Bellman operator is nonlinear in the transition kernel, which makes one-sample Bellman updates biased, while the adversarial optimization underlying robustness makes robust evaluation computationally demanding. To address these difficulties, we consider the natural small-ambiguity regime under Kullback--Leibler ambiguity sets and propose an approximate DRRL framework based on a first-order expansion of the relevant robust functional. This yields an approximate robust Bellman equation that removes the adversarial optimization while remaining first-order accurate in the ambiguity radius. To learn the fixed point of this approximate equation, we propose Mean-Variance Stochastic Approximation (MVSA), a model-free algorithm that uses only one-sample updates. This is achieved via a lifted stochastic approximation dynamics and a two-time-scale design. We then prove convergence and a central limit theorem for MVSA: its main iterate satisfies a central limit theorem at the canonical $n^{-1/2}$ scale, with explicitly characterized asymptotic covariances. Finally, we validate our theoretical findings with a numerical experiment.

</details>


### [262] [Retrieval Mechanisms Surpass Long-Context Scaling in Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08217)
*Rishi Ahuja,Kumar Prateek,Simranjit Singh,Vijay Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文挑战了时间序列基础模型（TSFM）中“输入更多历史数据能提升预测质量”的主流假设。实验表明，在ETTh1基准上，随着上下文窗口增长，预测误差反而显著上升（逆缩放定律），3000步窗口导致性能下降超68%。作为替代方案，检索增强预测（RAFT）通过固定720步窗口+选择性检索，以更低计算成本实现了更优性能（MSE=0.379）。结论建议未来基础模型应转向选择性检索架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 质疑TSFM从NLP借用的“长上下文提升预测质量”假设是否适用于随机性强的时序领域，因为远距离历史更多是高频噪声而非有效信号。

Method: 在ETTh1基准上测试连续上下文架构（含PatchTST），对比长上下文配置与RAFT（固定720步窗口+选择性检索）的性能；RAFT将检索到的相关历史片段作为动态外生变量注入模型。

Result: 长上下文导致逆缩放定律（误差随窗口增长而上升，3000步窗口性能下降超68%）；RAFT以MSE=0.379超越长上下文配置及零样本基础模型（Chronos、Moirai），且计算成本更低。

Conclusion: 注意力机制难以忽略无关历史波动；未来基础模型应架构性地转向选择性检索机制。

Abstract: Time Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) have borrowed the long context paradigm from natural language processing under the premise that feeding more history into the model improves forecast quality. But in stochastic domains, distant history is often just high-frequency noise, not signal. Hence, the proposed work tests whether this premise actually holds by running continuous context architectures (PatchTST included) through the ETTh1 benchmark. The obtained results contradict the premise: an inverse scaling law shows up clearly, with forecasting error rising as context gets longer. A 3,000-step window causes performance to drop by over 68%, evidence that attention mechanisms are poor at ignoring irrelevant historical volatility. Retrieval-Augmented Forecasting (RAFT) is evaluated as an alternative. RAFT achieves a mean squared error (MSE) of 0.379 with a fixed 720-step window and selective retrieval, outperforming both long-context configurations and zero-shot foundation models (Chronos, Moirai) despite requiring far less computation. In addition, the retrieval step injects only the most relevant historical segments as dynamic exogenous variables, which gives the model a context-informed inductive bias it cannot build on its own from raw sequences. Therefore, foundation models going forward need to shift architecturally toward selective retrieval.

</details>


### [263] [Sink vs. diagonal patterns as mechanisms for attention switch and oversmoothing prevention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08453)
*Peter Súkeník,Cristina López Amado,Christoph H. Lampert,Marco Mondelli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了注意力机制中sink和diagonal patterns作为注意力开关和抗过平滑机制的作用，分析了sink的几何条件、与硬注意力开关的等价性，并对比了sink与diagonal patterns的表示成本，解释了预训练模型中sink为何被偏好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前对注意力机制中sink（注意力汇聚到特定token）的理解尚不充分，特别是其在防止过平滑（oversmoothing）中的具体作用机制、与硬注意力开关的关系，以及为何预训练模型更倾向于使用sink而非对角模式（diagonal patterns）。

Method: 通过理论分析建立sink的几何表示条件（sink嵌入与其他所有嵌入的对齐必要性）；对比分析密集注意力与稀疏注意力在平滑程度上的差异；证明sink与硬注意力开关的等价性；定量比较sink与diagonal patterns的表示成本。

Result: 1) 建立了sink可表示的几何对齐条件；2) 明确了密集注意力比稀疏注意力更易导致过平滑的条件，并经验验证其普遍性；3) 证明了sink与输出恒为0的硬注意力开关等价；4) 定量比较了sink与对角模式的成本，解释了sink在预训练模型中被偏好。

Conclusion: sink和diagonal patterns作为注意力开关机制，弥合了过平滑预防需求与实际注意力行为之间的差距，并揭示了注意力层在不需要token间通信时如何像MLP一样运作。

Abstract: This paper studies the role of sinks and diagonal patterns as attention switch and anti-oversmoothing mechanisms. We analyze geometric conditions under which sinks can be represented, showing a necessary alignment between the embedding of the sink and all other embeddings. Next, we refine the current understanding of the role of sinks in oversmoothing prevention: we specify the conditions under which dense attention provably smooths more than sparse attention, and empirically verify that such conditions are often satisfied in practice. We further prove an equivalence between sinks and hard attention switch, in which the output of the attention is identically 0. Finally, we relax the hard attention switch by allowing token self-communication: we provide a quantitative comparison of the costs of representing sinks vs.\ diagonal patterns, showing why sinks are favored in pretrained transformers. The introduction and analysis of diagonal patterns and the generalization of the attention switch close the gap between what oversmoothing prevention requires and what sinks provide, while also establishing when and why attention layers act like MLPs if token communication is not necessary.

</details>


### [264] [Generalized Wasserstein Flow Matching: Transport Plans, Everywhere, All at Once](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08424)
*Moritz Piening,Richard Duong,Gabriele Steidl*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Wasserstein-on-Wasserstein (WoW)公式，将流匹配扩展到概率测度空间上的概率测度，通过嵌套Wasserstein几何实现元测度流，并采用切片和线性Wasserstein距离进行可扩展近似。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有流匹配方法局限于单一概率测度空间，难以处理更高阶的结构化生成任务（如点云集合生成）。作者希望将流匹配推广到"测度上的测度"空间，以统一并泛化现有方法。

Method: 1) 提出WoW公式，利用嵌套Wasserstein几何；2) 通过耦合内外传输计划实现元测度流；3) 为解决计算开销，引入切片Wasserstein和线性Wasserstein距离进行可扩展近似，促进近直线轨迹。

Result: 新框架统一并扩展了现有的点云和集合生成方法，实现了WoW空间中的高效生成建模。

Conclusion: WoW流匹配是一种理论上严谨且实践可行的生成建模方法，为处理概率测度空间上的概率测度提供了灵活框架。

Abstract: Flow matching has recently emerged as a flexible and efficient framework for generative modelling by learning deterministic transport dynamics between probability measures. In this work, we extend flow matching to the space of probability measures over probability measures, introducing a Wasserstein-on-Wasserstein (WoW) formulation. Leveraging the nested Wasserstein geometry, we show that measures over transport plans naturally induce velocity fields that realize metameasure flows. This yields a principled generalization of Wasserstein flow matching via coupled outer and inner transport plans. To address the substantial computational cost of WoW transport, we propose scalable approximations based on sliced and linear Wasserstein distances, enabling efficient training while promoting numerically stable, near-straight trajectories. Our framework unifies and extends existing approaches to point cloud and set generation, providing a practical and theoretically grounded method for generative modelling in WoW spaces.

</details>


### [265] [Deep Dreams Are Made of This: Visualizing Monosemantic Features in Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08218)
*Adam Szokalski,Mateusz Modrzejewski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LVO方法，结合稀疏自编码器将潜在扩散模型中的多语义层表征解耦为单语义特征，并通过潜在空间优化、时间步活动分析、噪声注入等技术实现可解释性可视化，在Stable Diffusion 1.5上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将原本用于卷积神经网络的特征可视化优化技术扩展到潜在扩散模型，以解决模型中间层表征的多语义（polysemantic）问题，提升模型可解释性。

Method: 使用稀疏自编码器（SAE）解耦层表征；在潜在空间进行优化；采用时间步活动分析、与调度匹配的噪声注入、基于特征引导的初始化先验以及适当的正则化策略。

Result: 在Style50数据集上微调的Stable Diffusion 1.5上，SAE特征能生成清晰可辨的概念可视化（如对角线构图、人像、玫瑰、电缆、瀑布泡沫），与数据集样本相关；基线方法（无解耦）结果较差；正则化技术可迁移但需调整配置。

Conclusion: LVO能直接揭示特征激活的原因而非下游效应，为特征可视化和模型理解提供了与数据集样例、特征引导等方法互补的新视角。

Abstract: This paper proposes latent visualization by optimization (LVO), a mechanistic interpretability technique that extends feature visualization by optimization - originally developed for convolutional neural networks - to latent diffusion models. LVO employs sparse autoencoders (SAEs) to disentangle polysemantic layer representations into monosemantic features. Key contributions include latent-space optimization, time-step activity analysis, schedule-matched noise injection, prior initialization through feature steering, and suitable regularization strategies. We demonstrate the method on Stable Diffusion 1.5 fine-tuned on the Style50 dataset, showing that SAE features produce clear visualizations of recognizable concepts - including diagonal compositions, human figures, roses, cables, and waterfall foam - that correlate with dataset examples, while the baseline without disentanglement produces less coherent results. We further show that regularization techniques from pixel-space feature visualization transfer to the latent domain, though they require different configurations for the raw-layer and SAE variants. Compared to dataset examples and steering, LVO provides complementary insights by directly revealing what activates a feature rather than its downstream effects.

</details>


### [266] [A Call to Lagrangian Action: Learning Population Mechanics from Temporal Snapshots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08550)
*Vincent Guan,Lazar Atanackovic,Kirill Neklyudov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Wasserstein拉格朗日力学（WLM），一种基于阻尼Wasserstein拉格朗日量的二阶动力学框架，能够学习种群动态并优于现有梯度流和流匹配方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Wasserstein梯度流模型只能最小化自由能，无法捕捉周期性等重要动力学特性。

Method: 从阻尼Wasserstein拉格朗日量出发，推导对应的哈密顿运动方程，形式化Wasserstein拉格朗日力学框架；提出WLM算法，直接从观测的边缘分布学习二阶动力学，无需指定拉格朗日量。

Result: WLM能够预测和插值未见过的边缘分布，在涡旋动力学、胚胎发育和群体行为等动力学场景中优于梯度流和流匹配方法。

Conclusion: WLM为学习种群动力学提供了一种结构化且通用的新范式，弥补了梯度流在周期性动力学等方面的不足。

Abstract: The population dynamics of molecules, cells, and organisms are governed by a number of unknown forces. In the last decade, population dynamics have predominantly been modeled with Wasserstein gradient flows. However, since gradient flows minimize free energy, they fail to capture important dynamical properties, such as periodicity. In this work, we propose a change in perspective by considering dynamics that minimize a population-level action under a damped Wasserstein Lagrangian. By deriving the corresponding Hamiltonian equations of motion, we formalize Wasserstein Lagrangian Mechanics, a structured class of second-order dynamics that encompasses classical mechanics, quantum mechanics, and gradient flows. We then propose WLM as the first algorithm that learns these second-order dynamics from observed marginals, without specifying the Lagrangian. By directly learning the population mechanics, WLM can both forecast and interpolate unseen marginals, and outperforms existing gradient flow and flow matching methods across a wide range of dynamics, including vortex dynamics, embryonic development, and flocking.

</details>


### [267] [Transformers Can Implement Preconditioned Richardson Iteration for In-Context Gaussian Kernel Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08475)
*Mingsong Yan,Dongyang Li,Charles Kulick,Sui Tang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明标准softmax注意力Transformer可通过实现预处理Richardson迭代来近似高斯核的上下文核岭回归（KRR），在有限数据假设下，使用O(log(1/ε))个模块和O(√(N/ε))宽的MLP可达到ε精度。实验表明GPT-2风格Transformer的层预测与预处理Richardson迭代的误差曲线最一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文学习（ICL）机制研究多集中于线性回归等线性任务，对于非线性ICL，虽然已有工作将softmax/核化注意力与函数梯度型动力学联系起来，但标准softmax注意力Transformer能否实现具有端到端预测误差保证的收敛求解器仍不清楚。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 理论方面：构建单头Transformer，通过softmax注意力生成行归一化高斯核算子（处理跨token交互），ReLU MLP层近似标量算术（处理token内更新），实现预处理Richardson迭代求解核线性系统。实验方面：在GP回归任务上训练GPT-2风格Transformer，通过线性探针比较层预测与经典KRR求解器的逐步输出。

Result: 理论构造的Transformer在O(log(1/ε))个模块和O(√(N/ε)) MLP宽度下实现ε精度预测。实验上，GPT-2风格Transformer的层预测误差曲线与预处理Richardson迭代最一致，消融研究进一步支持这一机制解释。

Conclusion: 预处理Richardson迭代是softmax注意力Transformer实现非线性上下文高斯核回归的具体可行机制，揭示了架构中注意力与MLP的功能分解：注意力处理跨token交互，MLP处理token内计算。

Abstract: Mechanistic accounts of in-context learning (ICL) have identified iterative algorithms for linear regression and related linear prediction tasks, often using linear or ReLU attention variants. For nonlinear ICL, prior work has related softmax and kernelized attention to functional-gradient-type dynamics, but it remains unclear whether a standard transformer with softmax attention can implement a convergent solver with an end-to-end prediction-error guarantee. In this paper, we study in-context kernel ridge regression (KRR) with Gaussian kernels and show that a standard softmax-attention transformer can approximate the KRR predictor during its forward pass by implementing preconditioned Richardson iteration on the associated kernel linear system. Under bounded-data assumptions, we construct a single-head transformer with $O(\log(1/ε))$ blocks and MLP width $O(\sqrt{N/ε})$ that achieves $ε$-accurate prediction for prompts of length $N$. Our construction reveals a functional decomposition within the transformer architecture: softmax attention produces a row-normalized Gaussian-kernel operator needed for cross-token interactions, while ReLU MLP layers act locally to approximate the intra-token scalar arithmetic required by the update. Empirically, we train GPT-2-style transformers on Gaussian-process regression tasks to further test the preconditioned Richardson interpretation. Through linear probing, we compare the transformer's layer-wise predictions with the step-wise outputs of classical KRR solvers and find that its error profiles align most consistently with preconditioned Richardson iteration. Ablation studies further support this interpretation. Together, our theory and experiments identify preconditioned Richardson iteration as a concrete mechanism that softmax-attention transformers can realize for nonlinear in-context Gaussian-kernel regression.

</details>


### [268] [NoisyCoconut: Counterfactual Consensus via Latent Space Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08221)
*Michael Jerge,David Evans*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NoisyCoconut是一种推理时方法，通过在潜在轨迹中注入可控噪声生成多样化推理路径，利用路径间一致性作为置信信号，使LLM在不确定时选择弃权，从而在不重新训练的情况下将错误率从40-70%降至15%以下，在数学推理任务上实现超过95%的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有提升LLM可靠性的方法（如微调）需要大量重新训练，而本文旨在提出一种无需重新训练、不修改模型参数、不依赖训练数据的推理时方法，通过操纵内部表征来增强LLM输出的可靠性。

Method: NoisyCoconut方法直接在推理过程中向模型的潜在轨迹注入可控噪声，生成多条多样化的推理路径；然后评估这些路径之间的一致性，若所有路径达成一致则认为结果是可靠的，否则模型选择弃权。

Result: 在多个推理基准上，当噪声扰动路径达到一致同意时，错误率从40-70%降低到15%以下；通过选择性弃权机制，模型在数学推理任务上的准确率可超过95%。

Conclusion: NoisyCoconut提供了一种实用且兼容现有模型的推理时方法，有效平衡了覆盖率和准确率，为提升LLM输出可靠性提供了可行路径，无需访问训练数据或修改模型参数。

Abstract: This paper presents NoisyCoconut, a novel inference-time method that enhances large language model (LLM) reliability by manipulating internal representations. Unlike fine-tuning methods that require extensive retraining, NoisyCoconut operates directly on model representations during inference and requires no retraining. Rather than training models to reason in latent space, we inject controlled noise into latent trajectories to generate diverse reasoning paths. Agreement among these paths provides a confidence signal, enabling models to abstain when uncertain. We demonstrate that this approach achieves effective coverage-accuracy tradeoffs across multiple reasoning benchmarks without requiring access to training data or modification of model parameters. This approach provides a practical pathway to improving the reliability of LLM outputs while maintaining compatibility with existing models. Our experiments show that unanimous agreement among noise-perturbed paths reduces error rates from 40-70% to below 15%, enabling models to exceed 95% accuracy on mathematical reasoning tasks through selective abstention.

</details>


### [269] [A Simulated Federated Analysis of MS-Induced Brain Lesions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08223)
*Evelyn Trautmann,Joël Federer-Gsponer,Markus C. Elze,José-Tomás Prieto*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个模拟真实世界联邦研究项目的仿真框架，用于多发性硬化症（MS）患者数据分析，涵盖图像分割和临床数据分析任务，并构建了高保真合成队列来模拟真实临床数据的异质性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习/分析技术在多中心临床数据研究中具有隐私保护优势，但缺乏能够真实反映临床数据复杂性和异质性的仿真测试平台，难以有效评估和比较联邦方法在MS研究中的表现。

Method: 构建了一个包含图像分割任务和临床数据分析任务（联邦生存分析+联邦PCA）的仿真框架；创建了高保真合成队列以模拟MS临床和人口统计学特征；图像部分使用公开真实数据集；复制了真实联邦工作流的关键要素（分布式数据治理、站点特异性预处理、隔离节点训练、安全聚合）。

Result: 成功构建了一个可模拟真实联邦工作流的仿真测试环境，能够支持联邦学习方法在MS研究中的开发、评估和基准测试。

Conclusion: 该仿真框架为MS领域的联邦学习研究提供了一个现实且可靠的测试平台，有助于推动联邦方法在临床多中心研究中的应用与发展。

Abstract: Federated techniques such as federated learning and federated analysis have emerged as a powerful paradigm for enabling multi-center research on sensitive clinical data while preserving patient privacy. In this study, we introduce a simulation framework that emulates a real-world federated research project focused on the analysis of multiple sclerosis (MS) patient data. The project comprises two components: an image segmentation task and a clinical data analysis task, where federated variants of survival analysis and Principal Component Analysis (PCA) are employed. To capture the complexity and heterogeneity of real clinical datasets, we construct a federation of high-fidelity synthetic cohorts designed to mirror MS-related clinical and demographic characteristics, while the imaging component leverages publicly available real-world datasets. Our simulation replicates key elements of authentic federated workflows, including distributed data governance, site-specific preprocessing, model training across isolated nodes, and the secure aggregation of analytical outputs. This framework provides a realistic testbed for developing, evaluating, and benchmarking federated learning methods in the context of MS research.

</details>


### [270] [The Global Empirical NTK: Self-Referential Bias and Dimensionality of Gradient Descent Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08746)
*James Hazelden,Laura Driscoll,Eli Shlizerman,Eric Shea-Brown*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出全局经验神经正切核(NTK)概念，证明其可分解为K和P两个算子，并证明权重模型(如RNN、Transformer)的NTK具有通用Kronecker核结构，揭示其低秩瓶颈约束，从而解释梯度下降的偏好学习行为和低秩表示涌现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对有限宽度网络的NTK难以精确计算，往往局限于无限宽度极限或仅追踪输出，缺乏对NTK内部结构的深入理解及其对梯度下降学习偏好的解释力。

Method: 将模型状态建模为单一全局隐式约束的解，将NTK分解为参数-状态交互算子K和状态-状态依赖算子P；对RNN、Transformer等权重模型证明通用Kronecker核结构定理，证明K可精确计算为权重位点变量的Gram矩阵；结合随机矩阵自由数值线性代数构建kpflow库。

Result: 发现NTK存在结构性瓶颈从而约束有效秩；揭示自参考偏置——梯度下降优先学习联合隐藏与输入活动的主模态；展示RNN和Transformer的NTK在空间或时间上具有低秩约束特性。

Conclusion: NTK具有可处理的显式结构，能够解释梯度下降的任务解偏好及低秩表示的产生机制；所构建的kpflow库使NTK可作为实用度量工具。

Abstract: In training a neural network with gradient descent (GD), each iteration induces a linear operator that governs first-order updates to a model's internal state variables. We define this operator as the Global Empirical Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK). In finite-width networks, the NTK is typically intractable to form, leading prior work to focus on restrictive settings such as tracking outputs only or taking infinite-width limits. Here, we study the structure of the NTK for a range of models. Formulating the model state as the solution to a single global implicit constraint, we derive the NTK as a product of two operators: K, accounting for immediate parameter-to-state interactions, and P, describing internal state-to-state dependencies. For a broad class of weight-based models, including RNNs and transformers, we prove a universal Kronecker-core theorem showing that K admits an exact, computable form given by the Gram matrix of weight-site variables. This core structure reveals that the NTK is structurally bottlenecked, constraining its effective rank and giving rise to a self-referential bias whereby GD preferentially learns within dominant modes of joint hidden and input activity. For recurrent models, we examine the spectrum of the NTK and show when it is biased and low-rank in space or time under the proposed decomposition. We further demonstrate that model dynamics at initialization bias the NTK, restricting learning and preventing task components from being learned effectively. Finally, we show that the NTK associated with a self-attention transformer is likewise structurally constrained to be low-rank. Overall, we show that the NTK possesses tractable structure that explains GD bias toward task solutions and the emergence of low-rank representations. To enable use of the NTK as a practical metric, we build kpflow, a library relying on randomized matrix-free numerical linear algebra.

</details>


### [271] [Social Determinants of Health and Fentanyl Overdose Mortality Across US Counties: An XGBoost and SHAP Analysis Identifying Silent Risk Counties and Treatment Deserts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08230)
*Kabi Raj Tiruwa,Abhisan Ghimire,Anuj Kumar Shah*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究利用XGBoost和SHAP方法分析2022年美国975个县的数据，发现残疾率、高血压、吸烟和缺乏车辆访问是芬太尼过量死亡的主要预测因素。治疗荒漠县的过量死亡率高出52.6%，并识别出143个沉默风险县。研究强调了社会健康决定因素在预测过量死亡中的重要性，建议优先在治疗荒漠县扩大药物使用障碍治疗，并对沉默风险县进行早期干预。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 美国芬太尼过量死亡人数持续上升，但现有研究未能充分理解哪些县级社会结构性条件会导致更高的过量死亡率。此前尚无研究采用可解释机器学习（SHAP归因）结合2022年CDC WONDER数据，来探讨治疗获取差距和沉默风险县的问题。

Method: 整合了四个政府来源的975个美国县数据，包括CDC WONDER（2022年过量死亡率）、CDC社会脆弱性指数（SVI）、CDC PLACES健康行为数据和地区卫生资源文件。使用XGBoost模型以标准化死亡率比（SMR）预测过量死亡风险，采用五折交叉验证，并使用SHAP值显示各因素的贡献方向。

Result: XGBoost表现最优（Spearman rho=0.67, R²=0.457, MAE=0.409, 高风险召回率=71.1%）。主要预测因子为残疾率、高血压、吸烟和缺乏车辆。治疗荒漠县过量死亡率高出52.6%（SMR 1.786 vs 1.170; p<0.0001）。K-means识别出143个沉默风险县。过量死亡存在空间聚集性（Moran's I=0.505, p=0.001），75个热点和136个冷点。被抑制县占WONDER县的58.2%，其中72%为农村，65%为治疗荒漠。

Conclusion: 县级社会健康决定因素能有效预测过量死亡，尤其是残疾、治疗可及性和行为健康负担。应优先在治疗荒漠县扩展药物使用障碍治疗，沉默风险县需在死亡率恶化前进行早期干预。

Abstract: Background: Fentanyl overdose deaths are still increasing across the U.S. We do not fully understand which county-level social and structural conditions lead to higher overdose death rates. Social determinants of health, including disability, treatment access, and behavioral health issues, may help identify vulnerable counties before deaths become severe. No earlier study has used explainable machine learning with SHAP attribution on 2022 CDC WONDER data to study treatment access gaps and silent risk counties.
  Methods: We combined data from four government sources for 975 U.S. counties, including CDC WONDER (2022) overdose mortality data, CDC Social Vulnerability Index (SVI), CDC PLACES health behavior data, and Area Health Resources Files. An XGBoost model was used to predict overdose mortality risk using Standardized Mortality Ratio (SMR). Five-fold cross-validation was used to test model accuracy, and SHAP values were used to show which factors increase or decrease risk.
  Results: XGBoost outperformed all tested models (Spearman rho=0.67, R2=0.457, MAE=0.409, high-risk recall=71.1%). Top predictors were disability rate, hypertension, smoking, and lack of vehicle access. Treatment desert counties had 52.6% higher overdose mortality (SMR 1.786 vs 1.170; p<0.0001). K-means identified 143 silent risk counties. Overdose deaths were spatially clustered (Moran's I=0.505, p=0.001) with 75 hotspots and 136 coldspots. Suppressed counties were 58.2% of WONDER counties, mostly rural (72%) and treatment deserts (65%).
  Conclusions: County-level SDOH factors predict overdose deaths, especially disability, treatment access, and behavioral health burden. MOUD expansion should prioritize treatment desert counties, and silent risk counties need early intervention before mortality worsens.

</details>


### [272] [CoDistill-GRPO: A Co-Distillation Recipe for Efficient Group Relative Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08873)
*Soo Min Kwon,Ziteng Sun,Ananda Theertha Suresh,Himanshu Jain,Sanjiv Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CoDistill-GRPO，一种协同蒸馏算法，通过同时训练大模型和小模型，让小模型利用大模型分布获得密集奖励，大模型利用小模型生成的rollout减少计算开销，显著提升小模型推理能力并加速大模型训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GRPO在提升小模型推理能力时效果不佳，因为困难任务上的奖励稀疏。现有方法依赖更大的模型提供提示或密集奖励，但训练这样一个大模型成本高昂。

Method: 同时训练一个大模型和一个小模型：小模型通过on-policy KD奖励从大模型分布中学习；大模型使用小模型生成的rollout并引入重要性重加权，减少rollout生成的计算开销。

Result: 在数学基准上，Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B相比基模型提升11.6个百分点，相比GRPO额外提升6.0个百分点；大模型（7B）性能几乎与标准GRPO持平，且获得约18%的加速。

Conclusion: CoDistill-GRPO是一种经济高效的GRPO替代方案，能同时提升小模型性能并加速大模型训练，具有独立的研究价值。

Abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has emerged as a powerful algorithm for improving the reasoning capabilities of language models, but often fails to improve small models due to sparse rewards on difficult tasks. Existing works mitigate this issue by leveraging a larger model, either to provide hints for rollouts or to provide dense reward signals through knowledge distillation (KD). However, this assumes the existence of such an oracle, and training one can significantly increase total training time. In this work, we propose CoDistill-GRPO, a co-distillation algorithm that simultaneously trains a large and a small model by maximizing carefully designed GRPO objectives. The two models learn from each other: the small model uses an on-policy KD reward to learn from the large model's distribution, while the large model is updated using rollouts generated by the small model with importance reweighting, reducing the computational overhead of rollout generation. We show that CoDistill-GRPO substantially improves small model performance over standard GRPO on mathematical benchmarks across both Qwen and Llama models. Specifically, with Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B, we observe an accuracy increase of over 11.6 percentage points over the base model and an additional 6.0 percentage points over GRPO on the Minerva dataset. Interestingly, the larger model (Qwen2.5-Math-7B) trained with CoDistill-GRPO nearly matches standard GRPO performance despite training on small-model rollouts. This highlights CoDistill-GRPO as a cost-effective alternative to GRPO for larger models, yielding an approximate 18% speedup, which may be of independent interest.

</details>


### [273] [TRAM: Training Approximate Multiplier Structures for Low-Power AI Accelerators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08231)
*Chang Meng,Hanyu Wang,Yuyang Ye,Mingfei Yu,Wayne Burleson,Giovanni De Micheli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出TRAM方法，通过联合优化近似乘法器结构和AI模型参数，在保持低精度损失的同时显著降低AI加速器功耗，在CNN和Vision Transformer上分别实现最高25.05%和27.09%的功耗降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI加速器功耗日益重要，近似计算可降低功耗且精度损失小。现有方法将近似乘法器设计与AI模型训练分离，缺乏联合优化。

Method: 提出TRAM，联合优化近似乘法器结构和AI模型参数，而非像先前工作那样分别设计。

Result: 相比最先进的乘法器，在CIFAR-10上的CNN中实现最高25.05%功耗降低，在ImageNet上的Vision Transformer中实现最高27.09%功耗降低。

Conclusion: TRAM通过联合优化策略，在降低功耗方面优于现有分离设计的近似乘法器方法。

Abstract: Reducing power consumption in AI accelerators is increasingly important. Approximate computing can reduce power consumption while keeping the accuracy loss small. Since multipliers are power-hungry components in AI models, this paper focuses on synthesizing low-power approximate multipliers (AxMs). Unlike prior works that design AxMs separately from AI model training, we present TRAM, which jointly optimizes the AxM structure and AI model parameters to lower power with small accuracy loss. Experiments show that compared to state-of-the-art AxMs, TRAM achieves up to 25.05% AxM power reduction on CNNs with CIFAR-10, and reduces power by up to 27.09% on vision transformers with ImageNet.

</details>


### [274] [Muon Does Not Converge on Convex Lipschitz Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08980)
*Tetiana Parshakova,Ahmed Khaled,Michael Crawshaw,Guillaume Garrigos,Robert M. Gower*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文质疑凸Lipschitz函数类是否适合理解Muon优化器，证明Muon在该类函数上不收敛，且误差反馈虽能恢复收敛性但会损害实际性能，结论是Muon的成功更可能来源于平滑性而非凸Lipschitz理论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 凸Lipschitz函数类是理解AdaGrad、Shampoo等深度学习方法的经典理论框架，但作者质疑该框架是否适用于Muon这一在实践中表现优异的优化器。

Method: 通过理论证明（Muon在凸Lipschitz函数类上不收敛）和实验验证（误差反馈修复收敛性但性能下降，在CIFAR-10和nanoGPT上测试）。

Result: Muon在凸Lipschitz函数类上无论采用何种学习率调度均不收敛；误差反馈可恢复理论收敛性，但在图像分类和语言建模任务上会降低Muon的实际性能。

Conclusion: 凸Lipschitz理论不适合解释Muon，Muon的成功更可能源于平滑性等凸Lipschitz模型所不具备的结构。

Abstract: Muon and its variants have shown strong empirical performance in a variety of deep learning tasks. Existing convergence analyses of Muon rely on smoothness assumptions, though arguably the most successful function class for developing deep learning methods (such as AdaGrad, Shampoo, Schedule-Free and more) has been the class of convex and Lipschitz functions. In this paper we question whether the classical convex Lipschitz model is a useful one for understanding Muon.
  Our answer is no. We show that Muon does not converge on the class of convex and Lipschitz functions, regardless of the choice of learning rate schedule. We also show that error feedback restores convergence of Muon and all the non-Euclidean subgradient methods with momentum. However, this theoretical fix using error feedback degrades the performance of Muon in
  two representative settings for image classification (CIFAR-10) and language modeling (nanoGPT on FineWeb-Edu 10B). Our conclusion is that convex Lipschitz theory, despite having a prominent role in the design of practical methods for deep learning, is not the most suited one for Muon. This suggests that Muon's success must come from structure absent from this model, most plausibly related to smoothness.

</details>


### [275] [Hierarchical Multi-Fidelity Learning for Predicting Three-Dimensional Flame Wrinkling and Turbulent Burning Velocity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08232)
*Saghar Zolfaghari,Yu Xie,Junfeng Yang,Safa Jamali*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种层次化多保真神经网络框架（MuFiNNs），通过结合稀疏的高保真实验数据与结构化低保真物理趋势模型，实现对湍流预混火焰的高精度预测，尤其在高压强湍流等数据稀缺场景下表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高保真实验表征湍流预混火焰受限于先进诊断技术的高成本和高复杂度，尤其在高压、强湍流条件下，耦合火焰形态与燃烧动力学的测量数据极为稀疏，传统方法难以有效建模。

Method: 提出层次化多保真神经网络框架（MuFiNNs），结合层次化低保真构建与非线性多保真校正，将稀疏高保真实验数据与结构化低保真表示融合，学习火焰几何与反应耦合行为，并恢复简化模型无法捕捉的偏差。

Result: MuFiNNs在多种燃料、压力和湍流强度下，准确重构火焰褶皱动力学和湍流质量燃烧速度；能够插值未见过工况，并鲁棒外推至训练域之外；在噪声、弱结构化或实验不可达区域仍有效。

Conclusion: 层次化多保真学习为数据受限场景下的燃烧建模提供了可扩展且物理自洽的策略；多保真科学机器学习可作为从稀疏实验中提取物理意义预测模型的实用框架，尤其适用于不稳定性主导和湍流敏感的反应流。

Abstract: High-fidelity experimental characterization of turbulent premixed flames remains limited by the cost and complexity of advanced diagnostics, particularly under elevated pressures and intense turbulence where measurements of coupled flame morphology and burning dynamics are sparse. Here, we develop a hierarchical multi-fidelity neural network framework (MuFiNNs) to address this challenge by integrating sparse high-fidelity experimental data with structured low-fidelity representations encoding dominant physical trends. The framework combines hierarchical low-fidelity construction with nonlinear multi-fidelity correction to learn coupled geometric and reactive flame behavior while recovering discrepancies that simplified models alone cannot capture. The methodology is applied to expanding turbulent premixed flames to predict three-dimensional flame wrinkling dynamics and turbulent mass burning velocity across varying fuels, pressures, and turbulence intensities. Using experimentally informed low-fidelity trend models with sparse high-fidelity measurements, MuFiNNs accurately reconstruct observed flame behavior, enable interpolation across unseen operating conditions, and demonstrate robust extrapolation beyond the training domain. Importantly, the framework remains effective in noisy, weakly structured, or experimentally inaccessible regimes where conventional data-driven approaches often fail. These results show that hierarchical multi-fidelity learning provides a scalable and physically grounded strategy for predictive combustion modeling in data-limited regimes. More broadly, this work establishes multi-fidelity scientific machine learning as a practical framework for extracting physically meaningful predictive models from sparse experiments, particularly for instability-dominated and turbulence-sensitive reactive flows where high-fidelity data acquisition is demanding.

</details>


### [276] [When Does Value-Aware KV Eviction Help? A Fixed-Contract Diagnostic for Non-Monotone Cache Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08234)
*Ruijie Zhang,Haozhe Liang,Da Chang,Li Hu,Fanqi Kong,Huaxiao Yin,Yu Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种固定契约诊断方法，用于分析长上下文LLM推理中KV缓存压缩选择器的失败原因，通过分步诊断证据缺失、评分偏差和关联破坏问题，并实验验证了该方法在多个模型和预算下的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文LLM推理中，KV缓存压缩虽能降低内存和带宽开销，但仅靠任务准确率无法解释选择器成功或失败的原因，因此需要一种细粒度的诊断方法来揭示选择器失败的具体步骤。

Method: 提出固定契约诊断方法，保持选择器设置不变，每次改变一个决策槽位。对于价值排序，使用探针结合块的注意力权重和移除该块后输出变化的估计值。

Result: 在LongBench上，三个模型和两个预算下，探针在正间隔单元上阳性率为72.6%，非正间隔单元上为32.4%。NeedleBench M-RT 32k和RULER 8k验证了分支检索下的闭合性，264单元符号评估分离了支持恢复、输出价值排序和边界附近的杠杆效应。

Conclusion: KV缓存压缩的正确顺序应是：先恢复解码侧证据，再对其输出价值排序，最后在投影过程中保留耦合证据。

Abstract: Long-context LLM inference is bottlenecked by the memory and bandwidth cost of reading large KV caches during decoding. KV compression reduces this cost by keeping only part of the cache, but task accuracy alone does not identify why a selector succeeds or fails. A selector can fail at three steps: it may miss the evidence future decoding needs, give high scores to tokens that do not affect the output, or break related evidence when fitting scores into a small cache. We introduce a fixed-contract diagnostic that holds the selector's setup fixed and changes one decision slot at a time. For value ranking, the probe combines a block's attention mass with the estimated output change from removing it. On LongBench across three models and two budgets, the probe is positive on 72.6% of positive-margin cells and 32.4% of nonpositive-margin cells. NeedleBench M-RT at 32k and a RULER 8k check probe support closure under branched retrieval, and a 264-cell sign evaluation separates support recovery and output-value ranking from leverage effects near the boundary. The resulting order is to recover decode-side evidence, rank its output value, and preserve coupled evidence during projection.

</details>


### [277] [Fast Rates for Offline Contextual Bandits with Forward-KL Regularization under Single-Policy Concentrability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09214)
*Qingyue Zhao,Kaixuan Ji,Heyang Zhao,Quanquan Gu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次在离线上下文赌博机中，对前向KL正则化下的决策问题实现了$\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1})$的快速收敛率，并统一了表格与函数逼近两种设定，同时给出了匹配的下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前向KL正则化的强化学习问题缺乏快速收敛率分析，现有方法只能得到$\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-2})$的慢速率，这与反向KL正则化已实现的$\varepsilon^{-1}$快速率形成对比。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 提出一种基于凸分析的新框架，以新颖方式利用悲观主义原则，完全绕过了以往依赖均值定理的证明思路，统一处理了表格设定和一般函数逼近设定。

Result: 在单策略可集中性假设下，首次证明了前向KL正则化离线上下文赌博机的$\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1})$上界，并给出了率最优的下界，证明上界的紧致性。

Conclusion: 前向KL正则化也能实现与反向KL正则化相当的快速统计率；在低正则化区域，两者均退化为无正则化时的慢速率，表明正则化强度对样本复杂度有根本性影响。

Abstract: \emph{Kullback-Leibler} (KL) regularization is ubiquitous in reinforcement learning algorithms in the form of \emph{reverse} or \emph{forward} KL. Recent studies have demonstrated $ε^{-1}$-type fast rates for decision making under reverse KL regularization, in contrast to the standard $ε^{-2}$-type sample complexity. However, for forward-KL-regularized objectives, existing statistical analyses are either not applicable or result in $\tilde{O}(ε^{-2})$ slow rates. We take the first step towards addressing this problem via a streamlined analysis of forward-KL-regularized offline CBs. We give the first $\tilde{O}(ε^{-1})$ upper bounds in tabular and general function approximation settings, both under notions of \emph{single-policy concentrability}. In particular, our convex-analytical pipeline unifies these settings by exploiting the pessimism principle in a novel way and completely bypasses the proof routines in previous works based on the mean value theorem, which might be of independent interest. Moreover, we provide rate-optimal lower bounds, manifesting the tightness of our upper bounds in terms of statistical rates. Our lower bounds also demonstrate that the forward-KL-regularized sample complexity recovers the unregularized slow rate in the low-regularization regime, similarly to the reverse-KL regularization.

</details>


### [278] [Adversary-Robust Learning from Fully Asynchronous Directional Derivative Estimates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09337)
*Anik Kumar Paul,Nibedita Roy,Nagesh Talagani,Swetha Ganesh,Gugan Thoppe,Alexandre Reiffers-Masson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FAR-SIGN 是一种用于参数服务器系统中对抗鲁棒学习的全异步鲁棒优化算法，通过符号更新和双时间尺度机制实现鲁棒性，支持一阶和零阶实现，在非凸平滑目标上达到接近最优的收敛率，并在 MNIST 上优于基于鲁棒聚合的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对抗鲁棒学习方法通常需要私有参考数据集或同步执行，缺乏全异步且不依赖私有数据的鲁棒优化方案。

Method: 采用基于符号的更新沿着精心设计的方向进行，并通过双时间尺度机制来缓解由此产生的偏差；支持一阶（梯度）和零阶（仅函数值）两种实现方式，无需服务器端私有参考数据集即可实现完全异步执行。

Result: 在理论上证明了几乎必然收敛到非凸平滑目标的驻点集，一阶设置下达到近最优的 O(n^{-1/4+ε}) 收敛率，零阶设置下达到 O(n^{-1/6+ε})。实验上在 MNIST 数据集中准确率和运行时间均优于基于鲁棒聚合的方法。

Conclusion: FAR-SIGN 是一种高效、理论上可证明的完全异步鲁棒优化算法，在理论和实践上均展现出优越性。

Abstract: We propose FAR-SIGN (Fully Asynchronous Robust optimization via SIGNed directional projections) for adversary-resilient learning in parameter-server--worker systems. FAR-SIGN achieves robustness through sign-based updates along carefully designed directions and mitigates the resulting bias via a two-timescale mechanism. It admits both first-order and zeroth-order implementations and enables fully asynchronous execution without requiring a private reference dataset at the server. We establish almost-sure convergence of FAR-SIGN to the set of stationary points for smooth, nonconvex objectives. Moreover, we prove the near-optimal rate of $O(n^{-1/4+ε})$ in the first-order setting and the standard $O(n^{-1/6+ε})$ in the zeroth-order setting, where $n$ is the iteration count and $ε>0$ can be chosen arbitrarily small. Experiments on MNIST show that FAR-SIGN outperforms robust aggregation-based methods in both accuracy and wall-clock time.

</details>


### [279] [On Variance Reduction in Learning Mean Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09235)
*Juanwu Lu,Ziran Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现MeanFlow训练的梯度方差爆炸源于条件速度场在损失函数中双重身份的权重错误，推导出最优系数，并通过实验验证该系数可提升样本质量最多54%，同时揭示了FID与梯度方差存在不一致的最优值选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MeanFlow训练存在损失不下降、梯度方差无界的不稳定问题，缺乏理论解释和系统性的解决方案。

Method: 建立理论分析条件速度场的双重统计角色（无偏回归目标与Monte Carlo控制变量），推导最优系数的闭式解，并通过系统扫描系数在2D基准和潜在DiT上的效果进行验证。

Result: 最优系数在2D基准上样本质量提升最高54%；DiT上呈现单调FID趋势；发现FID与MSE（梯度方差）之间存在最优值的量化不匹配。

Conclusion: 纠正条件速度场的权重系数可稳定MeanFlow训练；但最佳训练指标（梯度方差最小化）与最终生成质量（FID）的最优系数并不一致，优化FID需要更倾向于直接使用条件速度。

Abstract: One-step generative modeling has emerged as a leading approach to amortize the inference cost of diffusion and flow-matching models. Among distillation-free methods, MeanFlow training is notoriously unstable, with non-decreasing loss and unbounded gradient variance. In this work, we establish a theory that attributes this pathology to a misuse of the conditional velocity field: it plays two distinct statistical roles in the loss, both as an unbiased regression target and as a Monte Carlo control variate inside a Jacobi-vector product, with the original loss assigning the wrong coefficient to the latter. We derive the optimal coefficient in closed form, and show that a family of fixes in concurrent works corresponds to different practical realizations of the same optimum. A controlled sweep of this coefficient on two-dimensional benchmarks and on a latent Diffusion Transformer recovers the predicted bias-variance ordering. The optimal coefficient yields up to a %54 improvement in sample quality on two-dimensional benchmarks and a monotone FID trend at every matched-step DiT checkpoint. Crucially, the same DiT measurement also reveals a quantitative FID-MSE landscape mismatch: although gradient variance is minimized at an interior coefficient value, the coefficient that minimizes FID prefers the direct use of conditional velocity.

</details>


### [280] [Learning-Augmented Scalable Linear Assignment Problem Optimization via Neural Dual Warm-Starts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09382)
*Ilay Yavlovich,Jad Agbaria,Muhamed Mhamed,Jose Yallouz,Nir Weinberger*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种学习增强的框架，通过预测对偶变量来热启动经典线性分配求解器（如LAPJV），使用轻量级RowDualNet架构避免O(N²)内存瓶颈，在保持最优性和最坏情况保证的同时，实现了超过2倍的速度提升，并具备零样本泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典精确求解器（如匈牙利算法、LAPJV）时间复杂度为O(N³)，在大规模实例上成为瓶颈；而现有学习求解器往往牺牲最优性或因内存限制难以扩展。

Method: 提出学习增强框架：用RowDualNet（行独立架构）预测对偶变量热启动经典求解器；失败时回退防止渐近退化；基于LP对偶性（Min-Trick）构建可行解，避免迭代投影。

Result: 在N=16,384规模上可行；LAPJV搜索努力显著降低；合成数据上>2倍加速，MOT跟踪数据集>1.25倍，LPT运输数据集>1.5倍加速；严格保持最优性。

Conclusion: 提出了一种兼顾最优性、可扩展性和鲁棒性的学习增强求解框架，实现了对真实世界任务的零样本泛化。

Abstract: The Linear Assignment Problem (LAP) is a fundamental combinatorial optimization task with applications ranging from computer vision to logistics. Classical exact solvers such as the Hungarian and Jonker-Volgenant (LAPJV) algorithms guarantee optimality, but their cubic time complexity $\mathcal{O}(N^{3})$ becomes a bottleneck for large-scale instances. Recent learning-based approaches aim to replace these solvers with neural models, often sacrificing exactness or failing to scale due to memory constraints. We propose a learning-augmented framework that accelerates exact assignment solvers while maintaining optimality and worst-case guarantees. Our method predicts dual variables to warm-start a classical solver, with a fallback that prevents asymptotic runtime degradation when the learned advice is unreliable. We introduce RowDualNet, a lightweight row-independent architecture that avoids the $\mathcal{O}(N^{2})$ memory bottleneck of graph-based models, enabling neural warm-starting at large scale ($N=16{,}384$). Feasibility is ensured via a constructive mechanism based on LP duality (namely, the Min-Trick), eliminating costly iterative projection. Empirically, our approach reduces the search effort of LAPJV and achieves over $2{\times}$ speedups on challenging synthetic distributions, in addition to improving over $1.25{\times}$ and $1.5{\times}$ on real-world tracking (MOT) and transportation (LPT) datasets, respectively, while strictly maintaining full optimality, effectively yielding a robust zero-shot generalization to real-world tasks.

</details>


### [281] [Path-Coupled Bellman Flows for Distributional Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08253)
*Boyang Xu,Qing Zou,Siqin Yang,Hao Yan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Path-Coupled Bellman Flows (PCBF)，一种连续时间分布强化学习方法，通过源一致的Bellman耦合路径学习回报分布，解决了现有方法的边界不匹配和高方差问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的DRL方法存在两个主要问题：基于有限分位数或投影的方法依赖近似投影；基于流的方法在流源处存在边界不匹配，或由于当前噪声与后继噪声独立而导致高方差自举。

Method: PCBF提出路径耦合Bellman流：当前路径从t=0的基先验开始，在t=1达到Bellman目标，中间时刻与后继流保持路径仿射关系（不要求所有t的边际分布满足分布Bellman不动点）。通过共享基噪声耦合当前与后继回报流，并使用λ参数化的控制变量目标（λ=0恢复无偏样本Bellman目标，λ>0以可控偏差换取方差降低）。

Result: 在解析可解MRP、OGBench和D4RL上的实验表明，PCBF在分布保真度和训练稳定性方面有显著改进，并在离线强化学习中取得了有竞争力的性能。

Conclusion: 通过源一致耦合路径和控制变量目标，PCBF有效缓解了边界不匹配和高方差问题，为分布强化学习提供了一种更稳定、更准确的连续时间方法。

Abstract: Distributional reinforcement learning (DRL) models the full return distribution, but existing finite-support or quantile-based methods rely on projections, while recent flow-based approaches can suffer from \emph{boundary mismatch} at the flow source or from \emph{high-variance} bootstrapping when current and successor noises are independent. We propose Path-Coupled Bellman Flows (PCBF), a continuous-time DRL method that learns return distributions with flow matching using \textbf{source-consistent Bellman-coupled paths}: the current path starts from the required base prior at $t{=}0$, reaches the Bellman target at $t{=}1$, and maintains a pathwise affine relation to the successor flow at intermediate times (without requiring time-$t$ marginals to satisfy a distributional Bellman fixed point for all $t$). PCBF couples current and successor return flows through shared base noise and uses a $λ$-parameterized control-variate target: $λ{=}0$ recovers an unbiased sample Bellman target, while $λ{>}0$ trades controlled bias for variance reduction. Experiments on analytically tractable MRPs, OGBench, and D4RL show improved distributional fidelity and training stability, and competitive offline RL performance.

</details>


### [282] [Improving Generalization by Permutation Routing Across Model Copies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09256)
*Shuhei Kashiwamura,Timothee Leleu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于M-覆盖变换的机器学习方法，通过路由消息重连而非参数平均来耦合模型副本，利用结构化混合核Q定义消息传输拓扑，从而提升泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有复制型SGD或弹性SGD通过参数平均或显式吸引力耦合模型副本，存在副本坍缩或参数空间耦合不足的问题，需要一种更灵活的消息共享机制来提升泛化性能。

Method: 将模型复制M份，通过从结构化混合核Q中采样的排列，将不同副本的参数路由到各局部损失中计算消息，然后将学习消息沿路由路径重新分配到各副本，保持原始局部更新规则不变。

Result: 该方法适用于感知机、委员会机器和多层感知机，从离散模型到可微神经网络均有效，通过结构化消息共享而非副本坍缩或参数空间耦合来改善泛化。

Conclusion: M-覆盖变换提供了一种新的模型集成范式，通过定义消息传输拓扑（Q核）来控制提升因子图的长环结构，实现了更灵活有效的学习信息共享机制。

Abstract: We introduce a use of the \(M\)-cover (or \(M\)-layer) transform for machine learning. The method replicates a model \(M\) times, but instead of coupling the copies through parameter averaging or an explicit attractive force, as in replicated SGD or Elastic SGD, it rewires the contexts in which local learning messages are computed. Each local loss is evaluated on a routed model whose parameters are drawn from different copies according to permutations sampled from a structured mixing kernel \(Q\). Training then uses the original local update rule, while the resulting learning messages are redistributed across the copies through these routed computational paths. Thus \(Q\) defines a topology for message transport and controls the long-loop structure of the lifted factor graph. We formulate this construction for perceptrons, committee machines, and multilayer perceptrons, showing that the same principle applies from discrete models to differentiable neural networks. The resulting framework provides a mechanism for improving generalization through structured message sharing rather than replica collapse or parameter-space coupling.

</details>


### [283] [HyperTransport: Amortized Conditioning of T2I Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08254)
*Valentino Maiorca,Eleonora Gualdoni,Xavier Suau,Marco Cuturi,Luca Zappella,Pau Rodríguez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出HyperTransport，一种超网络框架，通过将CLIP嵌入直接映射到干预参数来分摊激活引导的优化成本，实现3600-7000倍的速度提升，并在未见概念上匹配最优基线性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有激活引导方法需要对每个概念进行单独优化，无法高效部署于概念集庞大、动态变化或仅在请求时指定的场景，每次新概念都需数分钟优化。

Method: 提出HyperTransport超网络框架，使用CLIP编码器将概念嵌入映射为干预参数，通过最优传输损失进行端到端训练，一次前向传播即可生成新干预。

Result: 在167个未见过的测试概念上，速度提升3600-7000倍，性能匹配最优逐概念基线；人类和VLM评估者对HyperTransport的偏好约为提示方法的2倍。

Conclusion: HyperTransport首次实现了开放概念集的摊销化引导、连续可解释强度控制和跨模态条件引导这三种能力的组合，兼顾效率与效果。

Abstract: As foundation models grow in capability, the ability to efficiently and reliably control their behavior becomes critical. Fine-tuning these models can be costly, and while prompting can be practical for controllability, it remains fragile due to models' high sensitivity to exact prompt wording and structure. This brittleness has driven interest in activation steering techniques that offer more stable and predictable control over model behavior. However, existing activation steering methods require per-concept optimization, which makes them ill-suited to deployment scenarios where the concept set is large, evolving, or only specified at request time: each new concept incurs at least minutes of optimization on the target model. We propose HyperTransport, a hypernetwork framework that amortizes this cost by mapping embeddings from a pretrained encoder (CLIP in our instantiation) directly to intervention parameters, trained end-to-end using an optimal transport loss. Once trained, HyperTransport produces each new intervention in a single hypernetwork forward pass, 3600-7000x faster than per-concept fitting. On concepts unseen during training, it matches the strongest per-concept baselines at inducing the target concept. By decoupling concept representation from intervention prediction, HyperTransport combines three capabilities that no existing approach offers as a set: amortized steering for open-ended concept sets, continuous interpretable strength control, and cross-modal conditioning where reference images can directly steer text-based generation. We validate HyperTransport on DMD2 and Nitro-1-PixArt across 167 held-out test concepts via CLIP-based metrics, a VLM-as-a-judge evaluation, and a user study. In pairwise comparisons, both human and VLM judges prefer HyperTransport over prompting ~2x as often.

</details>


### [284] [GravityGraphSAGE: Link Prediction in Directed Attributed Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09408)
*Riccardo Porcedda,Francesca Chiaromonte,Fabrizio Lillo,Andrea Vandin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 Gravity-GraphSAGE (GG-SAGE)，一种基于引力启发的解码器的有向图链接预测方法，在多个基准数据集上超越现有 GDL 方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有链接预测工作多聚焦于无向图，未充分利用节点属性，缺乏针对有向图的高效 GDL 方法。

Method: 基于 GraphSAGE 骨干网络，设计引力启发的解码器（gravity-inspired decoder），实现首个用于有向链接预测的 GraphSAGE 模型。

Result: 在 Cora、Citeseer、PubMed 及 16 个真实世界图上超越现有最优 GDL 链接预测方法，且随图复杂度增加表现良好。

Conclusion: GG-SAGE 有效填补了有向图链接预测的空白，具有良好的扩展性和实用性。

Abstract: Link prediction (inferring missing or future connections between nodes in a graph) is a fundamental problem in network science with widespread applications in, e.g., biological systems, recommender systems, finance and cybersecurity. The ability to accurately predict links has significant real-world applications, such as detecting fraudulent financial transactions or identifying drug-target interactions in biomedicine. Despite a rich literature, link prediction is still challenging, especially for graphs enriched with information on edges (direction) and nodes (attributes). In fact, research on link prediction, especially the one based on Graph Deep Learning (GDL), has mostly focused on undirected graphs, without fully leveraging node attributes. Here, we fill this gap by proposing Gravity-GraphSAGE (GG-SAGE), a modified version of GraphSAGE, a GDL model for node embeddings, composed of a gravity-inspired decoder. This implementation is the first example in the literature of a GraphSAGE backbone adopted for directed link prediction. Using the benchmark datasets Cora, Citeseer, PubMed and 16 real-world graphs from the online Netzschleuder repository, we show that our proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art GDL link prediction techniques. Using further experimental evidence, we relate the quality of the output of our model with various characteristics of the graph, suggesting that our framework scales well when applied to data of increasing complexity.

</details>


### [285] [Can LLMs Predict Polymer Physics Just by Reading Synthesis and Processing Prose?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08255)
*Yuchu Liu,Rui Zhu,Jingwei Xiong,Haixu Tang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PolyLM，一个仅基于自然语言、感知过程与条件的框架，通过直接阅读科学文献全文来预测聚合物物理和机械性能。在18.5万篇论文、27.6万+聚合物样本上微调90亿参数语言模型(Qwen3.5-9B)，在68,283个保留样本上达到中位R²=0.74，多项关键性能预测R²超0.80，证明自然语言可作为高性能材料预测的强扩展接口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有聚合物性能预测模型仅依赖化学结构表示（如SMILES或分子图），忽略了合成路线、加工历史、形态和测试条件等关键实验上下文，导致相同名义聚合物可能表现出截然不同的性能。

Method: PolyLM框架：1) 构建大规模语料库（18.5万篇论文、27.6万+样本、22种性能）；2) 基于Qwen3.5-9B大语言模型，采用LoRA低秩适配和任务级不确定性权重进行微调；3) 完全绕过结构输入，直接处理非结构化的自然语言文本。

Result: 在68,283个保留样本上，模型达到中位R²=0.74；热学、力学和物理化学性能预测常超R²=0.80，建立了新的SOTA基准。

Conclusion: 自然语言是一种强大且高度可扩展的接口，能够直接用于现实的聚合物材料性能预测，无需依赖结构化化学表示。

Abstract: Can large language models predict physical and mechanical polymer properties simply by reading unstructured scientific prose? Polymer performance is rarely determined by chemical structure alone; identical nominal polymers can exhibit drastically different behaviors depending on their synthesis route, processing history, morphology, and testing conditions. Yet, state-of-the-art polymer property models typically rely on structure-only representations -- such as SMILES or molecular graphs -- which strip away this vital experimental context. In this work, we introduce \textbf{PolyLM}, a natural-language-only, process- and condition-aware framework that predicts materials performance directly from full-text literature. By circumventing structural inputs entirely, PolyLM preserves the nuanced, unstructured descriptions of synthesis and processing reported by domain scientists. To train this framework, we curated an unprecedented, literature-scale dataset encompassing 185,000 scientific papers and over 276,400 unique polymer samples across 22 physical, mechanical, and thermal properties. We fine-tuned a massive 9-billion-parameter language model (Qwen3.5-9B) using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and task-level uncertainty weighting. Evaluated on 68,283 held-out observations, the model achieves remarkably high predictive accuracy, establishing new state-of-the-art benchmarks for complex properties. Across the 22 diverse targets, the model achieves a median $R^2$ of 0.74, with predictions for key thermal, mechanical, and physicochemical properties frequently surpassing an $R^2$ of 0.80. These results unequivocally demonstrate that natural language is a powerful, highly scalable interface for realistic materials performance prediction.

</details>


### [286] [Inverse Design for Conditional Distribution Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09439)
*Ori Meidler,Shaul Tolkovsky,Or Zuk*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出条件分布匹配（CDM）问题，即寻找输入x*使其诱导的条件分布P(Y|X=x*)匹配目标分布G(Y)，并设计了无需额外训练的即插即用算法MLGD-F来高效求解此问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统逆向设计仅针对单点输出，而实际设计目标往往具有分布性质（包含Y的不确定性），标准方法无法处理此类分布匹配需求。

Method: 提出CDMS和CDMO两种变体问题；设计MLGD-F算法，结合预训练的基于分数的扩散模型与快速条件采样器，利用单步条件采样实现可追踪梯度计算。

Result: 在合成基准、结构化图像变换和生成编辑优化上验证，能可靠恢复条件分布匹配多样用户指定目标（包括离散混合和连续低秩支撑）的输入。

Conclusion: CDM扩展了逆向设计的问题范畴，MLGD-F是一种高效、无需重新训练的求解方案。

Abstract: Generative models are powerful tools for sampling from a learned distribution $\mathcal{P}(Y \mid X)$, and inverse-design methods invert this map to find an input $x$ that produces a desired point output $y^*$. However, many design goals are naturally distributional rather than pointwise, incorporating the inherent uncertainty of $Y$ and targeting a specific form for it, a task not addressed by standard inverse design. To address this issue we introduce Conditional Distribution Matching (CDM), a new inverse-design problem class in generative modeling: given a joint distribution $\mathcal{P}(X, Y)$ and a target distribution $\mathcal{G}(Y)$, find an input $x^*$ whose induced conditional distribution $\mathcal{P}(Y \mid X = x^*)$ matches $\mathcal{G}$. We formally define two variants: Conditional Distribution Matching Sampling (CDMS) and Conditional Distribution Matching Optimization (CDMO). To solve these problems, we propose MLGD-F (Matching-Loss Guided Diffusion with a Fast inner sampler), a plug-and-play inference-time algorithm that combines a pretrained score-based diffusion model with a pretrained fast conditional sampler, requiring no additional training or fine-tuning. By leveraging single-step conditional sampling, MLGD-F enables tractable gradient computation, making the estimation of $\mathcal{P}(Y \mid X)$ both memory-efficient and computationally lightweight. We validate MLGD-F on synthetic benchmarks, structured image transformations, and generative editing optimization, demonstrating reliable recovery of inputs whose conditional distributions match diverse user-specified targets, including discrete mixtures and continuous low-rank supports.

</details>


### [287] [Bayesian Optimization with Structured Measurements: A Vector-Valued RKHS Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09775)
*Wenbin Wang,Colin N. Jones*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究贝叶斯优化在结构化测量（向量值算子）上的扩展，利用向量值RKHS的核岭回归浓度界，提出UCB算法并证明亚线性遗憾界，实验表明结构化测量可提升样本效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统贝叶斯优化仅学习从输入到标量目标的端到端映射，丢弃了结构化系统输出（如轨迹、空间场）中的丰富信息。

Method: 将目标定义为结构化测量的线性泛函；在向量值RKHS中推导KRR估计的浓度界；基于UCB采集函数提出算法。

Result: 在温和假设下获得亚线性遗憾界；实验表明结构化测量通过跨目标信息迁移和时变适应提升了样本效率。

Conclusion: 利用结构化测量可显著提升贝叶斯优化的信息利用效率和样本效率。

Abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is an efficient framework for optimizing expensive black-box functions. However, it is typically formulated as learning an end-to-end mapping from inputs to scalar objectives, thereby discarding the potentially rich information whenever a structured system output is available. In this work, we study Bayesian optimization over a vector-valued operator with structured measurements, where each measurement observes multidimensional or functional outputs, e.g., trajectories or spatial fields, rather than a single scalar value. The objective is then defined as a linear functional of these measurements. This allows each observation to reveal substantially richer information about the underlying system compared to scalar observations. Assuming the unknown operator lies in a vector-valued reproducing kernel Hilbert space (RKHS), we derive high-probability concentration bounds for the kernel ridge regression (KRR) estimator directly in the measurement space, characterizing uncertainty in a general Hilbert space. Building on these results, we propose an algorithm based on the upper confidence bound (UCB) acquisition function with regret guarantees under mild assumptions, recovering sublinear rates for common kernels. Empirically, we demonstrate that leveraging structured measurements leads to improved sample efficiency by enabling efficient transfer of information across objectives and adaptation to time-varying settings.

</details>


### [288] [Efficient Prompt Learning for Traffic Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08273)
*Qianru Zhang,Xinyi Gao,Alexander Zhou,Reynold Cheng,Siu-Ming Yiu,Hongzhi Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SimpleST，一种轻量级、模型无关的提示调优框架，通过高效提示增强时空图神经网络的泛化与迁移能力，在保持模型参数固定的前提下适应新分布，在五个真实数据集上验证了预测精度和计算效率的优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时空图神经网络（GNN）在流量预测中泛化能力不足，难以应对时空动态性带来的分布偏移问题。

Method: 提出SimpleST框架，一种轻量级、模型无关的提示调优方法，在固定预训练模型参数的情况下，通过高效提示机制使模型适应新分布。

Result: 在五个真实世界城市时空数据集上，SimpleST在预测精度和计算效率方面均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: SimpleST通过提示调优有效提升了时空GNN的跨分布泛化能力，降低了迁移开销，为预训练模型的高效利用提供了新思路。

Abstract: Accurate traffic prediction is essential for optimizing transportation systems, enhancing resource allocation, and improving overall urban administration. Spatio-temporal graph neural networks (GNNs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance and have been widely used in various spatio-temporal prediction scenarios. However, these prediction methods often exhibit low generalization ability, struggling with distribution shifts caused by spatio-temporal dynamics. To address this challenge, we propose an approach to enhance the generalization and adaptation of spatio-temporal GNNs through efficient prompting. Specifically, we introduce a lightweight and model-agnostic prompt tuning framework for spatio-temporal GNNs, named SimpleST. It facilitates adapting pre-trained spatio-temporal GNNs to novel distributions while keeping the model parameters fixed. This prompt mechanism reduces the overhead and complexity of adaptation, enabling efficient utilization of pre-trained models for out-of-distribution generalization. Extensive experiments conducted on five real-world urban spatio-temporal datasets demonstrate the superiority of our approach in terms of prediction accuracy and computational efficiency.

</details>


### [289] [SEMASIA: A Large-Scale Dataset of Semantically Structured Latent Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09485)
*Mario Edoardo Pandolfo,Enrico Grimaldi,Lorenzo Marinucci,Leonardo Di Nino,Simone Fiorellino,Sergio Barbarossa,Paolo Di Lorenzo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了SEMASIA，一个包含约1,700个预训练视觉模型潜表征的大规模基准数据集，用于研究潜空间对齐问题，并展示了三个应用方向：分析潜空间概念组织、基准测试对齐映射方法、以及大规模回归分析影响嵌入几何特性的因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不同神经网络学到的潜表征虽然内容相似但几何结构不兼容，而现有研究因缺乏大规模、模型多样、元数据丰富的基准而受限，亟需一个标准化资源来推动潜空间对齐问题的研究。

Method: 从约1,700个预训练视觉模型中提取潜表征，涵盖8个标准图像分类基准，并配以结构化元数据（架构、训练方案、预训练来源、模型规模）。基于该资源进行了三项分析：潜空间概念组织分析、监督对齐映射基准测试、以及大规模回归分析。

Result: 1) 潜空间表现出一致的原型聚类和层次化语义邻域结构；2) 建立了基于重建误差和下游任务性能的监督对齐基准；3) 揭示了预训练数据复杂性、专业化、迁移学习、数据增强和模型规模对嵌入几何与探测属性的影响。

Conclusion: SEMASIA为研究潜空间几何、评估对齐方法以及开发下一代异构可互操作AI系统提供了可复现的基础，推动了潜空间对齐问题的标准化研究。

Abstract: Latent representations learned by neural networks often exhibit semantic structure, where concept similarity is reflected by geometric proximity in embedding space. However, comparing such spaces across models remains difficult: changes in architecture, pretraining data, objective, or random seed can yield embeddings with similar content but incompatible geometry. This latent space alignment problem is central to interpretability, transfer and multimodal learning, federated systems, and semantic communication; however, progress remains limited by the lack of large-scale, model-diverse, and metadata-rich benchmarks. To address this gap, we introduce SEMASIA, a large-scale collection of latent representations extracted from approximately 1,700 pretrained vision models across eight standard image-classification benchmarks. SEMASIA pairs embeddings with structured metadata describing architectures, training regimes, pretraining sources, and model scale. We demonstrate three applications of the resource. First, we analyze the conceptual organization of individual latent spaces, showing consistent prototype-like clustering and hierarchical semantic neighborhoods across models and datasets. Second, we benchmark supervised alignment mappings between latent spaces using reconstruction error and downstream task performance. Third, we perform a large-scale regression analysis of how pretraining-data complexity, specialization, transfer learning, augmentation, and model scale relate to geometric and probing properties of embeddings. By coupling representational scale with standardized metadata, SEMASIA provides a reproducible foundation for studying latent geometry, evaluating alignment methods, and developing next-generation heterogeneous and interoperable AI systems.

</details>


### [290] [Trapping Attacker in Dilemma: Examining Internal Correlations and External Influences of Trigger for Defending GNN Backdoors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08278)
*Fan Yang,Binyan Xu,Di Tang,Kehuan Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PRAETORIAN防御方法，通过分析触发子图内部相关性和量化外部节点影响力来检测GNN后门攻击，将攻击成功率降至0.55%而干净准确率仅下降0.62%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GNN后门防御依赖检测特定子图模式或节点特征，易被自适应攻击者绕过，亟需更鲁棒的防御方法。

Method: 基于关键观察：翻转目标节点预测需要显著影响力。PRAETORIAN采用双重策略：(i)分析潜在触发子图内部相关性以检测异常大的注入结构；(ii)量化外部节点影响力以识别具有不成比例影响的触发器。

Result: 平均攻击成功率降至0.55%，干净准确率仅下降0.62%；对比之下，现有最优防御的平均ASR>20%、CA下降>3%。面对自适应攻击，迫使攻击者在高ASR（>80%但CA下降>10%）与低ASR（18.1%）之间做出不利权衡。

Conclusion: PRAETORIAN通过抓住后门攻击的内在需求（影响力），而非表面线索，实现了对多种攻击的鲁棒防御，迫使攻击者陷入效果与可检测性之间的不利权衡。

Abstract: GNNs have become a standard tool for learning on relational data, yet they remain highly vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Prior defenses often depend on inspecting specific subgraph patterns or node features, and thus can be circumvented by adaptive attackers. We propose PRAETORIAN, a new defense that targets intrinsic requirements of effective GNN backdoors rather than surface-level cues. Our key observation is that flipping a victim node's prediction requires substantial influence on the victim: attackers tend to either inject many trigger nodes or rely on a small set of highly influential ones. Building on this observation, PRAETORIAN (i) analyzes internal correlations within potential trigger subgraphs to detect abnormally large injected structures, and (ii) quantifies external node influence to identify triggers with disproportionate impact. Across our evaluations, PRAETORIAN reduces the average attack success rate (ASR) to 0.55% with only a 0.62% drop in clean accuracy (CA), whereas state-of-the-art defenses still yield an average ASR of >20% and a CA drop of >3% under the same conditions. Moreover, PRAETORIAN remains effective against a range of adaptive attacks, forcing adversaries to either inject many trigger nodes to achieve high ASR (>80%), which incurs a >10% CA drop, or preserve CA at the cost of limiting ASR to 18.1%. Overall, PRAETORIAN constrains attackers to an unfavorable trade-off between efficacy and detectability.

</details>


### [291] [HS-FNO: History-Space Fourier Neural Operator for Non-Markovian Partial Differential Equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09523)
*Lennon J. Shikhman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出历史空间傅里叶神经算子（HS-FNO），用于延迟方程和非马尔可夫动力学的代理建模。通过将历史状态更新分解为学习预测器（预测新暴露的未来切片）和精确的平移-追加传输（处理已知历史窗口部分），HS-FNO在五个基准测试中实现了最低的预测误差，表明施加离散移位结构是一种有效的归纳偏置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准神经算子在自回归使用中假设瞬时场 u(t,·) 是完全状态，但这对于延迟方程、分布式记忆系统等非马尔可夫动力学不成立——两个轨迹可能在同一时刻相同，但因历史不同而未来不同。

Method: 将状态提升到历史空间 u_t(θ,x)=u(t+θ,x), θ∈[-τ,0]；关键创新是将一次历史状态更新分解为：(1) 学习预测器预测新暴露的未来切片；(2) 精确的平移-追加传输处理已知历史窗口部分。这避免了学习确定性历史坐标，降低了学习输出维度，并强制实现了自然的离散历史更新。

Result: 在延迟反应扩散、空间流行病学、非局部神经场动力学、延迟波和分布式记忆闭合五个基准上，HS-FNO在一步预测、历史空间和 rollout 误差上均最低。自回归预测中，聚合 rollout 误差从基线（0.241, 0.188, 0.185）降至0.094，且参数更少。

Conclusion: 强制历史状态演化的离散移位结构是处理非马尔可夫PDE代理建模的有效归纳偏置。

Abstract: Neural operators provide fast surrogate models for time-dependent partial differential equations, but their standard autoregressive use usually assumes that the instantaneous field $u(t,\cdot)$ is a complete state. This assumption fails for delay equations, distributed-memory systems, and other non-Markovian dynamics: two trajectories may agree at time $t$ and nevertheless have different futures because their histories differ. We introduce the History-Space Fourier Neural Operator (HS-FNO), a neural operator for delay and memory-driven PDEs formulated on the lifted state $u_t(θ,x)=u(t+θ,x)$, $θ\in[-τ,0]$. The key computational step is to decompose one history-state update into a learned predictor for the newly exposed future slice and an exact shift-append transport for the portion of the history window already known from the previous state. This avoids learning deterministic history coordinates, reduces the learned output dimension, and enforces the natural discrete history update. We test HS-FNO on five benchmark families covering delayed reaction--diffusion, spatial epidemiology, nonlocal neural-field dynamics, delayed waves, and distributed-memory closures. Across ten random seeds, HS-FNO attains the lowest aggregate one-step, history-space, and rollout errors among the principal baselines. The largest gain occurs in autoregressive prediction, where aggregate rollout error decreases from $0.241$, $0.188$, and $0.185$ for current-state, lag-stack, and unconstrained history-to-history operators, respectively, to $0.094$. The same model uses fewer parameters than unconstrained history prediction. These results indicate that enforcing the discrete shift structure of history-state evolution is an effective inductive bias for non-Markovian PDE surrogate modeling.

</details>


### [292] [Consolidation-Expansion Operator Mechanics:A Unified Framework for Adaptive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09968)
*Debashis Guha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出"巩固-扩展算子力学"(OpMech)框架，通过定义顺序间隙(order-gap)作为实时控制信号，量化自适应学习系统中巩固与扩展操作的交换失败程度。该信号可计算、可追踪收敛进程，并能在无噪声和有界噪声场景下提供有保证的停止规则，适用于多臂老虎机、强化学习、随机优化、持续学习和递归语言模型等多个领域。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自适应学习系统需要在"巩固已有知识"和"扩展新证据"之间交替进行，但目前缺乏精确量化两者之间交互作用的理论框架。作者希望建立一种数学上严格的方法，来判断系统何时该停止交替操作，从而达到稳定的知识状态。

Method: 定义顺序间隙(order-gap)来量化巩固算子Q和扩展算子P_e的不可交换程度；证明该信号沿收敛轨迹衰减；基于此信号设计具有理论保证的停止规则；在五个领域（多臂老虎机、强化学习、随机优化、持续学习、递归语言模型）中验证框架的有效性。

Result: 三个核心结果：1) 顺序间隙沿收敛轨迹衰减；2) 持续较大的顺序间隙表明系统远离稳定状态；3) 基于顺序间隙的停止规则在无噪声和有界噪声场景下均具有可证明的保证。特别是在递归语言模型中，OpMech可以用基于证据的替代方案取代启发式停止规则和固定递归预算。

Conclusion: OpMech框架提供了一种通用的、理论上严谨的方法来动态控制自适应学习系统的收敛过程，在多个学习范式中具有广泛适用性，尤其为递归语言模型中的推理深度控制提供了理论依据。

Abstract: Every adaptive learning system must alternate between two operations: consolidating what it already knows and expanding into new evidence. We propose \emph{Consolidation-Expansion Operator Mechanics} (OpMech), a framework that makes this structure precise. The central object is the \emph{order-gap} $\Ogap(θ; e)$, the degree to which a consolidation operator~$Q$ and an expansion operator~$P_e$ fail to commute at a given knowledge state. Because the order-gap is computable from the system's own trajectory, it serves as a real-time control signal: large values indicate that the system is still sensitive to the ordering of consolidation and expansion; once the order-gap falls and stays small, further processing is unlikely to change the outcome.
  Three results give the signal precise meaning: the order-gap decays along convergent trajectories; a persistently large order-gap implies the system is far from its settled state; and an order-gap-based stopping rule terminates with provable guarantees in both noiseless and bounded-noise settings. The framework applies across five domains: bandits, reinforcement learning, stochastic optimization, continual learning, and recursive language models. We give conditions under which the order-gap reliably tracks convergence in three representative cases. We develop the recursive language model application in detail, showing how OpMech replaces heuristic stopping rules and fixed recursion budgets with principled, evidence-driven alternatives.

</details>


### [293] [LaWM: Least Action World Models for Long-Horizon Physical Consistency from Visual Observations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08279)
*Qixin Xiao,Maani Ghaffari*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Least Action World Models (LaWM)，在潜空间中将最小作用量原理作为过渡规则，而非仅用无约束神经网络预测未来状态，从而在长期视觉预测中保持物理一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有潜在世界模型使用无约束神经过渡函数生成未来状态，长程推演会产生累积误差、能量漂移和物理不一致的未来，这是由于缺乏对真实动力学物理原理的约束。

Method: LaWM的核心是潜变量积分器：将观测编码为广义坐标，学习潜空间中的离散拉格朗日量，构造离散作用量泛函，通过求解离散积分条件推进预测。过渡规则由离散变分原理定义，而非无约束神经网络。

Result: 在物理合成动力学和具身机器人交互基准上，LaWM在物理不变性、背景一致性、运动平滑度、外观和几何预测指标上均优于视频生成和世界模型基线。

Conclusion: 将最小作用量原理直接融入潜空间过渡规则，为长期视觉预测提供了结构保持的物理偏置，实现了更物理一致的未来预测。

Abstract: Learning predictive world models from visual observations is a core problem in embodied AI, with applications to model-based reinforcement learning and robotic planning. Existing latent world models typically generate future states with unconstrained neural transition functions, while modern video generation systems often prioritize perceptual plausibility or introduce physical structure through auxiliary losses, external guidance, or separate dynamics modules. As a result, long-horizon rollouts can remain weakly grounded in the physical principles that govern real dynamics, leading to compounding error, energy drift, and physically inconsistent futures. We propose Least Action World Models (LaWM), a latent world-modeling framework that operationalizes the Principle of Least Action in learned visual latent space: future rollouts are governed by a learned Lagrangian action functional rather than produced only by an unconstrained transition predictor. Our main technical realization is a latent variational integrator: LaWM encodes observations into learned generalized coordinates, learns a latent discrete Lagrangian over consecutive latent states, constructs a discrete action functional, and advances prediction by solving the corresponding discrete integration condition. Thus, physical structure is not merely used to score, regularize, or constrain a completed trajectory; it defines the latent transition rule itself. Because the transition is induced by a discrete variational principle, LaWM provides a structure-preserving bias for long-horizon visual prediction. Across physics-clean synthetic dynamics and embodied robot interaction benchmarks, LaWM improves physical invariance, background consistency, motion smoothness, and appearance and geometric prediction metrics over video-generation and world-model baselines.

</details>


### [294] [Chebyshev Center-Based Direction Selection for Multi-Objective Optimization and Training PINNs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09975)
*Hoyeol Yoon,Seoungbin Bae,Nam Ho-Nguyen,Dabeen Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将PINN训练中的更新方向选择问题建模为对偶锥中的Chebyshev中心问题，通过单一几何准则统一了现有方法追求的多种理想性质，并在非凸设定下提供了收敛保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PINN训练方法通过显式施加多种理想性质（如尺度鲁棒性、同步下降）来构建更新方向，但这种方式导致难以辨别哪些条件是本质的、几何原理是什么，以及不同方法之间的结构关系不清晰。

Method: 将更新方向选择形式化为对偶锥中的Chebyshev中心问题，即选择归一化方向以最大化到锥面的最小距离；该方法可转化为一个低维空间中的高效对偶问题。

Result: 该方法恢复了现有方法追求的关键理想性质（而无需分别施加），在非凸设定下具有收敛保证，并在多个PINN基准上展现出强经验性能。

Conclusion: 通过单一几何准则统一了多种方向选择方法，提供了可解释的几何原则以及系统比较不同方法的统一基础。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are a promising approach for solving partial differential equations (PDEs). Their training, however, is often difficult because multiple loss terms induced by PDE residuals and boundary or initial conditions must be optimized simultaneously. To address this difficulty, existing approaches often construct update directions by explicitly enforcing particular desirable properties, such as scale robustness and simultaneous descent. While effective in many cases, such property-by-property designs can make it unclear which conditions are essential, what geometric principle determines the selected update direction, and how different methods are structurally related. In this work, we formulate update-direction selection for PINN training as a Chebyshev-center problem in the dual cone. The proposed formulation selects a normalized direction that maximizes the minimum distance to the cone facets. The resulting formulation admits an efficient dual problem in a much lower-dimensional space and yields a convergence guarantee in the nonconvex setting. It also recovers the key desirable properties targeted by existing approaches without imposing them separately; rather, they follow from the single geometric criterion underlying the formulation. This makes the selected direction interpretable through a single geometric rule and provides a unified basis for systematically comparing related direction-selection methods. Experiments on several PINN benchmarks further demonstrate strong empirical performance of the proposed method.

</details>


### [295] [Beyond the False Trade-off: Adaptive EWC for Stealthy and Generalizable T2I Backdoors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08280)
*Lu Bowen,Xinyu Tang,Yin Yin Low,Shu-Min Leong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对文本到图像(T2I)后门攻击中的模型保真度问题，提出余弦感知自适应EWC方法，动态调整正则化强度，在保持高攻击成功率的同时维持模型保真度，优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有T2I后门攻击方法（如LwF）使用基于输出的蒸馏来保持模型保真度，但正则化效果有限。需要一种更强的参数级保真度保持方法。

Method: 提出Cosine-Aware Adaptive EWC方法：(1) 使用弹性权重巩固(EWC)作为参数级保真度保持方案；(2) 采用余弦语义效用函数替代均方误差；(3) 引入自适应调度机制动态调整正则化强度。

Result: 实验表明该方法在攻击成功率(ASR)和模型保真度之间取得了更好的平衡，并且在域外(OOD)数据集上具有更强的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 余弦感知自适应EWC将EWC从固定罚项转化为上下文敏感的约束，有效解决了静态EWC在弱触发器上性能下降的问题，实现了保真度与攻击成功率的最优权衡。

Abstract: Preserving model fidelity is essential for stealthy text-to-image (T2I) backdoor attacks. Existing methods such as Learning without Forgetting (LwF) rely on output-based distillation, which provides limited regularization. We introduce Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC) as a parameter-based alternative for preserving fidelity in backdoor learning. While stronger in principle, we show that standard static EWC with a fixed regularization weight lambda and mean-squared utility loss creates an artificial trade-off between attack success rate (ASR) and fidelity, particularly degrading performance on weak triggers. To address this, we propose Cosine-Aware Adaptive EWC, which dynamically adjusts EWC regularization using a cosine-based semantic utility and adaptive scheduling. This approach transforms EWC from a fixed penalty into a context-sensitive constraint, maintaining high ASR while preserving model fidelity. Experiments demonstrate improved ASR-fidelity balance and enhanced robustness on out-of-domain (OOD) datasets compared to existing baselines.

</details>


### [296] [HTPO: Towards Exploration-Exploitation Balanced Policy Optimization via Hierarchical Token-level Objective Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08283)
*Xincheng Yao,Ruoqi Li,Cheng Chen,Daoxin Zhang,Yi Wu,Yao Hu,Chongyang Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出HTPO算法，通过分层划分token为不同功能组（按提示难度、答案正确性、token熵），为每组设计专门优化目标，实现探索-利用平衡，在推理基准上显著超越DAPO基线（AIME'24 +8.6%，AIME'25 +6.7%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL算法对所有token一视同仁，缺乏细粒度指导，无法有效动态平衡推理过程中的探索-利用权衡。

Method: 采用分治思想，从提示难度、答案正确性和token熵三个维度将响应token分层划分为不同功能组，为每组设计专门优化目标以实现探索或利用功能。

Result: 在AIME'24和AIME'25上分别超过DAPO基线8.6%和6.7%；测试时计算扩展时优势持续扩大。

Conclusion: HTPO通过自适应的token级控制方法有效促进探索而不牺牲利用性能，验证了分层token级优化在RLVR中的有效性。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a pivotal technique for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, the de facto practice of mainstream RL algorithms is to treat all tokens of one response equally and assign the same optimization objective to each token, failing to provide granular guidance for the reasoning process. While in Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, different tokens usually play distinct roles. Therefore, the current RL algorithms lack an effective mechanism to dynamically balance the exploration-exploitation trade-off during learning. To this end, we propose Hierarchical Token-level Objective Control Policy Optimization (HTPO), a novel RL algorithm that takes the divide-and-conquer idea to hierarchically partition the response tokens into specific functional groups from three aspects (i.e., prompt difficulty, answer correctness, and token entropy). Within each group, according to the contributions to exploration or exploitation, we design specialized optimization objectives to facilitate the effective execution of each token's expected functionality. In this way, HTPO can achieve a more balanced exploration-exploitation trade-off. Extensive experiments on challenging reasoning benchmarks validate the superiority of our HTPO algorithm, which significantly outperforms the strong DAPO baseline (e.g., +8.6% and +6.7% on AIME'24 and AIME'25, respectively). When scaling test-time compute, the HTPO-trained model maintains a consistent performance advantage over the DAPO baseline, and the gap widens as the sampling budget increases, validating that our adaptive token-level control method fosters effective exploration without sacrificing exploitation performance. Code will be at https://github.com/xcyao00/HTPO.

</details>


### [297] [Exactness Matters for Physical Rule Enforcement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08285)
*Bum Jun Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了自回归科学预测器中物理约束修复（如傅里叶投影、泊松清理）何时有效、何时引发分布偏移，发现当修复算子与目标流形精确对齐（算子精确性）时效果显著提升；但在近似对齐（如非周期边界）时，强约束可能适得其反，需通过算子-数据对齐度来指导约束强度的选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归科学预测模型常通过“修复”预测状态来施加物理/结构约束，但强约束何时可靠、何时引发分布偏移尚不清楚。本文旨在系统研究修复算子的“精确性”（是否与目标流形对齐）对预测性能的影响。

Method: 定义“算子精确性”概念，对比三种策略：原始预测（Raw）、事后修复（Post hoc）、循环内修复（In-loop）。在周期不可压Navier-Stokes（精确傅里叶投影可用）、非周期CFDBench流（仅近似边界清理）及层级预测任务上进行实验，并引入目标畸变MSE等指标衡量对齐度。

Result: 在精确周期场景下，傅里叶投影显著降低滚动误差（NS-128上Raw-FNO MSE从9.390×10⁻⁵降至5.370×10⁻⁷）。但在近似投影场景下，更强的泊松清理虽降低散度却恶化滚动误差；目标畸变MSE比线性残差更能预测该危害。层级预测呈现相同模式。

Conclusion: 精确修复是稳定基线，但近似约束应谨慎使用——最佳操作点可能是原始预测或近恒等修复。约束施加应基于算子-数据对齐度进行基准测试，而非盲目增强。

Abstract: Autoregressive scientific forecasters often enforce physical or structural constraints by repairing each predicted state before feeding it back into the model.
