However, it remains unclear when stronger physical rule enforcement becomes reliable and when it becomes a source of distribution shift. We study this question through operator exactness, meaning whether the repair map is the identity on the target manifold and is aligned with the target geometry. We compare raw forecasting, post hoc repair, and in-loop repair across periodic incompressible Navier--Stokes, non-periodic CFDBench flows, and a hierarchical-forecasting support task. In the exact periodic regime, Fourier projection substantially improves rollout accuracy. On the NS-128 benchmark, a strong Raw-FNO has a final-step rollout MSE at horizon 100 of $(9.390 \pm 6.290)\times 10^{-5}$, and post hoc and in-loop projection reduce it to $(1.130 \pm 0.165)\times 10^{-6}$ and $(5.370 \pm 0.113)\times 10^{-7}$. However, once an exact projection is unavailable and only approximate boundary-preserving cleanup is available, the ordering changes. Across cavity, tube, dam, and cylinder flow, stronger Poisson-based cleanup can reduce divergence while worsening rollout error; target-distortion MSE predicts this harm far better than a linear-system residual. Controlled mismatch, screened cleanup, adaptive gating, and external-backbone checks show that the best approximate-regime operating point can be raw or near-identity. Hierarchical forecasting gives the same broader pattern. Exact forecast reconciliation is a stable baseline, whereas blended top-down repair, a validation-tuned interpolation toward historical-proportion top-down reconciliation, is dataset-dependent. Thus, constraint enforcement should be benchmarked by operator--data alignment before enforcement strength.

</details>


### [298] [On Uniform Error Bounds for Kernel Regression under Non-Gaussian Noise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09757)
*Johannes Teutsch,Oleksii Molodchyk,Marion Leibold,Timm Faulwasser,Armin Lederer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对核回归函数估计，提出了非渐近的概率均匀误差界，适用于非高斯、相关/不相关噪声，并在安全控制任务中验证了其紧致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有核回归的误差界多局限于条件独立的高斯噪声，无法满足安全关键领域对非高斯、相关噪声下不确定性量化的需求。

Method: 推导了非渐近的概率均匀误差界，理论上放宽了对噪声的假设，涵盖次高斯、有界、次指数、方差/矩有界等非高斯分布，且适用于相关与不相关噪声。

Result: 与已有方法相比，所提误差界在不确定性区域宽度和安全控制任务上表现更紧致，验证了理论界的有效性。

Conclusion: 该工作为核回归在安全关键应用中提供了更通用的非保守不确定性量化工具，拓宽了适用范围并保证了界的紧致性。

Abstract: Providing non-conservative uncertainty quantification for function estimates derived from noisy observations remains a fundamental challenge in statistical machine learning, particularly for applications in safety-critical domains. In this work, we propose novel non-asymptotic probabilistic uniform error bounds for kernel-based regression. Compared to related bounds in the literature that are restricted to (conditionally) independent sub-Gaussian noise, our bounds allow to consider a broad class of non-Gaussian distributions, such as sub-Gaussian, bounded, sub-exponential, and variance/moment-bounded noise. Moreover, our results apply to correlated and uncorrelated noise. We compare our proposed error bounds with existing results in terms of the induced uncertainty region and their performance in safe control, demonstrating the tightness of the proposed bounds.

</details>


### [299] [BROS: Bias-Corrected Randomized Subspaces for Memory-Efficient Single-Loop Bilevel Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10288)
*Hengrui Zhang,Boao Kong,Engao Zhang,Kun Yuan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BROS是一种内存高效的单循环随机双层优化方法，通过Rademacher双探针校正实现无偏Hessian作用估计，在保持与精确单循环方法相同收敛率（O(ε⁻²)样本复杂度）的同时，将峰值内存降低高达44.9%，并在多个深度学习任务上验证了效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有精确单循环SBO方法对大规模下层神经网络内存压力大，而内存高效的替代SBO方法缺乏标准假设下的竞争性收敛保证。需要一种既能保持内存高效又能提供强收敛保证的方法。

Method: 提出BROS方法，核心创新包括：1）在随机子空间中进行下层和辅助更新；2）采用Rademacher双探针校正（bi-probe correction）来恢复无偏的Hessian作用估计量；3）单循环结构保持内存高效。

Result: 1）理论上证明BROS在标准假设下达到O(ε⁻²)样本复杂度（与MA-SOBA相同）；2）实验上在超数据清理、数据混合学习、超表示学习和ViT样本重加权任务中，峰值内存降低高达44.9%，同时性能接近全空间基线。

Conclusion: BROS成功弥合了精确单循环SBO方法与内存高效替代方法之间的差距，为大规模深度学习中的双层优化提供了一种既保证收敛性又节省内存的实用方案。

Abstract: Stochastic bilevel optimization (SBO) has become a standard framework for hyperparameter learning, data reweighting, representation learning, and data-mixture optimization in deep learning. Existing exact single-loop SBO methods and memory-efficient surrogate SBO methods either create severe memory pressure for large lower-level neural networks or lack competitive convergence guarantees under standard assumptions. In this paper, we propose BROS, a memory-efficient single-loop SBO method with the same convergence rate order as exact single-loop SBO methods. BROS performs lower and auxiliary updates in randomized subspaces with a Rademacher bi-probe correction that recovers an unbiased Hessian-action estimator. We prove that BROS preserves the $\mathcal O(\varepsilon^{-2})$ sample complexity of MA-SOBA for finding an $\varepsilon$-stationary point under only standard assumptions. Experiments on hyper-data cleaning, data-mixture learning, hyper-representation learning, and ViT sample reweighting show that BROS reduces peak memory by up to 44.9% while closely matching full-space baseline performance.

</details>


### [300] [Diagnosing Spectral Ceilings in Equivariant Neural Force Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08286)
*Hyunmog Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种谱注入诊断方法，通过在等变力场骨干网络后附加轻量级SPN来测量其保留的角频率。实验表明，L=2的NequIP在l=4恢复边界信号但在l=5崩溃（p从0.913降至0.078），且该现象在多骨干网络和多指标下稳健存在。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的等变力场模型（如NequIP）虽然表现出色，但其内部保留了多少角频率信息尚不清楚。作者希望设计一种诊断方法，定量测量预训练模型对不同频率信号的保留能力。

Method: 向分子力场注入可控角频率扰动，在冻结骨干网络后附加轻量级SPN，通过读取哪些频率可恢复来判断模型保留的频率范围。同时提出了有限度跨度定理进行校准，并进行了多种控制实验。

Result: L=2的NequIP在l=4恢复频率但在l=5崩溃（性能从0.913下降到0.078），该边界效应在4个独立训练的骨干网络上稳健存在，R2指标也验证了该现象。

Conclusion: 等变力场模型存在一个明确的角频率保留边界（drL边界），超出该边界的高频信息无法被有效恢复，且这不是由参数数量导致的。

Abstract: We introduce a spectral-injection diagnostic for measuring which angular frequencies a trained equivariant force-field backbone preserves: inject a controlled angular-frequency perturbation into a molecular force field, attach a lightweight Spectral Prediction Network (SPN) to the frozen backbone, and read off which frequencies are recoverable. On aspirin, a quadratic SPN attached to an L = 2 NequIP backbone recovers the boundary signal at l = 4 but collapses at l = 5: a 11.7x cliff at the predicted drL boundary, with p dropping from 0.913 to 0.078. The same boundary-vs-above contrast persists across n = 4 independently trained backbones (raw-gain delta contrast, hierarchical cluster bootstrap) and is corroborated by a denominator-free injected-residual metric (R2_inj(4) = 0.374 versus R2_inj(5) = 0.006). A finite-degree span theorem calibrates the diagnostic: for a single marked direction, degree-d polynomials of degree-L spherical-harmonic features span exactly H less than or equal to dL with multiplicity-one saturation at the boundary (scoped to single-direction degree-bounded probes, not a function-class upper bound on multi-atom MPNNs). A synthetic C5 calibration plus capacity, activation, and cross-architecture controls rule out parameter count alone as the explanation.

</details>


### [301] [Signature Approach for Contextual Bandits with Nonlinear and Path-dependent Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10313)
*Xin Guo,Grace He,Xinyu Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于签名变换的上下文赌博机方法DisSigUCB，用于处理非线性且路径依赖的奖励，通过签名将路径依赖奖励近似为线性泛函，证明了亚线性遗憾界，并在多个实际任务中优于传统基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文赌博机方法多假设奖励是即时且线性的，难以处理奖励依赖于整个历史路径（路径依赖）且非线性的复杂场景。

Method: 利用签名的普适非线性性质，将路径依赖的奖励函数近似为签名空间中的线性泛函，进而设计基于签名的解耦上置信界算法DisSigUCB。

Result: 在高概率下证明了\(\tilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{(d+m)KT})\)量级的次线性遗憾界；在温度监测、睡眠阶段分类、护士排班等实验中一致优于线性UCB和核化UCB基线。

Conclusion: 签名变换有效桥接了路径依赖奖励与线性赌博机方法，DisSigUCB在非线性路径依赖场景下具有理论保证和实际优越性。

Abstract: We study contextual bandits with nonlinear and path-dependent rewards through a novel signature-transform-based approach. Leveraging the universal nonlinearity property of signatures, we approximate continuous path-dependent reward functionals by linear functionals in the signature space. This representation enables the use of efficient linear contextual bandit methods while preserving expressive sequential structure. Building on this framework, we propose \texttt{DisSigUCB}, a signature-based disjoint upper confidence bound (UCB) algorithm. Under boundedness and non-degeneracy assumptions, we prove a high-probability data-dependent sublinear regret bound of order \(\tilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{(d+m)KT})\) where \(d\) is the context dimension and \(m\) is the signature feature dimension. Synthetic experiments and numerical applications on temperature sensor monitoring, sleep-stage classification, and hospital nurse staffing demonstrate that \texttt{DisSigUCB} consistently outperforms classical linear and kernelized contextual bandit baselines in nonlinear and path-dependent settings.

</details>


### [302] [Multi-Armed Bandits With Best-Action Queries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08287)
*Francesco Bacchiocchi,Matteo Castiglioni,Alberto Marchesi,Francesco Emanuele Stradi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在bandit-feedback模型中，带有最佳动作查询的多臂老虎机问题，发现当奖励随机且臂间相关时，无法像full-feedback模型那样显著降低遗憾；但在i.i.d.随机奖励下，可实现与full-feedback模型相似的最优遗憾界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索在更现实、信息受限的bandit-feedback模型中，最佳动作查询是否能像full-feedback模型那样有效降低遗憾，填补了Russo等人[2024]留下的理论空白。

Method: 通过理论推导建立了随机相关奖励下的下界Ω(√(T-k))，并在i.i.d.随机奖励下提出可达到Õ(min{T/k, √(T-k)})的算法，同时给出匹配下界。

Result: 在bandit-feedback模型中：(1) 随机相关奖励下遗憾下界为Ω(√(T-k))，full-feedback的改进不可迁移；(2) i.i.d.随机奖励下可达到Õ(min{T/k, √(T-k)})，与匹配下界紧合。

Conclusion: 完整刻画了bandit-feedback模型下最佳动作查询的价值，揭示了奖励结构对查询效益的关键影响——相关性破坏提升，独立性则保留提升。

Abstract: We study \emph{multi-armed bandits} (MABs) augmented with \emph{best-action queries}, in which the learner may additionally query an oracle that reveals the best arm in the current round. This setting was recently characterized by Russo et al. [2024] in the \emph{full-feedback} model, where the learner observes the rewards of all arms after each round. They show that, in both \emph{stochastic} and \emph{adversarial} environments, $k$ best-action queries reduce the optimal $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{T})$ regret to $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\min\{T/k,\sqrt{T}\})$. Whether this improvement extends to the more realistic \emph{bandit-feedback} model -- where the learner observes only the reward of the played arm -- was left as an open problem. We fully resolve this question. When rewards are stochastic but correlated among arms, we show that the full-feedback result does not carry over: any algorithm must incur regret at least $Ω(\sqrt{T-k})$. This lower bound directly extends to adversarial environments. On the positive side, we show that $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\min\{T/k,\sqrt{T-k}\})$ regret is still achievable when rewards are stochastic and i.i.d., and establish a matching lower bound, up to logarithmic factors. Together, these results provide a complete characterization of the benefits of \emph{best-action queries} in the \emph{bandit-feedback} model.

</details>


### [303] [The two clocks and the innovation window: When and how generative models learn rules](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10019)
*Binxu Wang,Emma Lucia Byrnes Finn,Bingbin Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了生成模型在有限数据训练中的根本矛盾：模型的目标函数收敛于经验训练分布而非真实数据分布。通过规则验证的合成任务，作者发现了两个训练时间尺度——τ_rule（生成首次符合规则）和τ_mem（模型开始复制训练样本），并定义了“创新窗口”[τ_rule, τ_mem]。研究发现该窗口随数据量N增大而变宽，随规则复杂度增加而变窄，且该双时钟结构在扩散模型（DiT）和自回归模型（GPT）中普遍存在。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成模型在有限数据上训练时面临一个根本张力：其目标函数（如分数匹配或下一个token预测）收敛于经验训练分布，而非我们真正想学习的总体分布。现有研究缺乏对模型何时能真正“创新”（生成合理但未见过的样本）的统一理解。

Method: 使用规则验证的合成任务（奇偶性、其他二元规则和组合谜题），定义了两个训练时间尺度τ_rule（首次生成符合规则的样本）和τ_mem（开始记忆训练样本）。系统研究了这两个尺度与规则复杂度、模型容量、数据集大小N的关系。并在扩散模型（DiT）和自回归模型（GPT）中验证了该双时钟结构，同时分析了DiT模型分数函数的优化景观演变。

Result: 1) τ_rule随规则复杂度增加而增大，随模型容量增加而减小；2) τ_mem近似不依赖于规则，与数据集大小N呈近线性关系；3) 创新窗口[τ_rule, τ_mem]随N增大而变宽，随规则复杂度增加而变窄，当τ_rule≥τ_mem时可能消失；4) 双时钟结构在DiT和GPT中均存在，仅有架构相关的偏移；5) DiT分数函数的优化景观中，τ_rule附近规则有效样本的盆地扩大，τ_mem附近训练样本的盆地开始主导。

Conclusion: 该研究为生成模型何时、如何展现真正创新提供了统一且可预测的解释。通过两个时间尺度的框架，揭示了数据量、规则复杂度和模型容量对创新能力的调控机制，为理解和改进生成模型的泛化能力提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Generative models trained on finite data face a fundamental tension: their score-matching or next-token objective converges to the empirical training distribution rather than the population distribution we seek to learn. Using rule-valid synthetic tasks, we trace this tension across two training timescales: $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$, the step at which generations first become rule-valid, and $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$, the step at which models begin reproducing training samples. Focusing on parity and extending to other binary rules and combinatorial puzzles, we characterize how these two clocks, $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$ and $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$, depend on key aspects of the learning setup. Specifically, we show that $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$ increases with rule complexity and decreases with model capacity, while $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$ is approximately invariant to the rule and scales nearly linearly with dataset size $N$. We define the \emph{innovation window} as the interval $[τ_{\mathrm{rule}}, τ_{\mathrm{mem}}]$. This window widens with increasing $N$ and narrows with rule complexity, and may vanish entirely when $τ_{\mathrm{rule}} \geq τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$. The same two-clock structure arises in both diffusion (DiT) and autoregressive (GPT) models, with architecture-dependent offsets. Dissecting the learned score of DiT models reveals a corresponding evolution of the optimization landscapes, where rule-valid samples' basins expand substantially around $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$, while training samples' basins begin to dominate around $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$. Together, these results yield a unified and predictive account of when and how generative models exhibit genuine innovation.

</details>


### [304] [PowerStep: Memory-Efficient Adaptive Optimization via $\ell_p$-Norm Steepest Descent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10335)
*Yao Lu,Dengdong Fan,Shixun Zhang,Yonghong Tian*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PowerStep是一种内存高效的优化器，通过对动量缓冲区的非线性变换实现坐标级自适应性，无需存储二阶矩统计量，在Transformer模型（124M-235B参数）上匹配Adam收敛速度的同时将优化器内存减半，结合int8量化可减少约8倍内存。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Adam等自适应优化器虽已成为训练大规模神经网络的标准，但需维护梯度一阶和二阶矩的运行估计，导致显著的内存开销。作者旨在设计一种在保持坐标级自适应能力的同时大幅降低内存占用的优化器。

Method: 受ℓ_p范数几何下的最速下降启发，直接对动量缓冲区应用非线性变换以获得坐标级自适应性，无需显式存储二阶矩统计量。PowerStep采用这一设计，并在非凸随机优化中证明了O(1/√T)的最优收敛率。

Result: 在124M到235B参数的Transformer模型上，PowerStep匹配了Adam的收敛速度，同时优化器内存减半。结合int8量化时，PowerStep保持数值稳定性，与全精度Adam相比优化器内存减少约8倍。

Conclusion: PowerStep为大规模训练提供了一种有理论依据、可扩展且资源高效的替代方案。

Abstract: Adaptive optimizers, most notably Adam, have become the default standard for training large-scale neural networks such as Transformers. These methods maintain running estimates of gradient first and second moments, incurring substantial memory overhead. We introduce PowerStep, a memory-efficient optimizer that achieves coordinate-wise adaptivity without storing second-moment statistics. Motivated by steepest descent under an $\ell_p$-norm geometry, we show that applying a nonlinear transform directly to a momentum buffer yields coordinate-wise adaptivity. We prove that PowerStep converges at the optimal $O(1/\sqrt{T})$ rate for non-convex stochastic optimization. Extensive experiments on Transformer models ranging from 124M to 235B parameters demonstrate that PowerStep matches Adam's convergence speed while halving optimizer memory. Furthermore, when combined with aggressive \texttt{int8} quantization, PowerStep remains numerically stable and reduces optimizer memory by $\sim\!8\times$ compared to full-precision Adam. PowerStep thus provides a principled, scalable and resource-efficient alternative for large-scale training. Code is available at https://github.com/yaolubrain/PowerStep.

</details>


### [305] [UMEDA: Unified Multi-modal Efficient Data Fusion for Privacy-Preserving Graph Federated Learning via Spectral-Gated Attention and Diffusion-Based Operator Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08288)
*Shih-Yu Lai,Hirozumi Yamaguchi,Shang-Tse Chen,Yu-Lun Liu,Bing-Yu Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出UMEDA框架，通过图联邦学习和谱信号处理，解决异构无线与视觉传感器在设备无关定位中的模态异构、数据漂移和隐私噪声问题，在MM-Fi和RELI11D上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦学习方法在客户端传感器模态和分辨率不同、数据分布漂移以及隐私噪声破坏定位信号结构时表现脆弱，缺乏有效的异构对齐和隐私-效用平衡机制。

Method: 构建全局图联邦学习框架，客户端作为节点共享连续积分算子；使用线性注意力层和低秩滤波对齐模态；服务器通过扩散模型在谱系数上聚合更新；采用各向异性差分隐私机制将噪声投影到信号子空间的零空间。

Result: 在MM-Fi和RELI11D分布外基准测试中，UMEDA在精度、收敛速度和通信效率上均优于最先进联邦基线，尤其在高模态异构和严格隐私预算下优势显著。

Conclusion: 通过将联邦聚合重新定义为谱信号处理问题，UMEDA有效解决了异构传感器联邦学习中的核心挑战，实现了隐私与效用的更好平衡。

Abstract: Device-free localization trains models from heterogeneous wireless and visual sensors (e.g., Wi-Fi, LiDAR) distributed across edge devices. Federated learning offers a privacy-respecting framework, but is brittle when clients differ in sensor modality and resolution, when their data distributions drift, and when privacy noise destroys the structural signal needed for localization. We propose UMEDA, a graph federated learning framework in which clients form nodes of a global graph that share a continuous integral operator, and aggregation is reformulated as spectral signal processing on this operator. Each client encodes its local sensors with a linear-attention layer whose kernel spectrum is low-rank filtered, suppressing modality-specific residuals so clients with different sensors align in a common low-rank subspace. The server then aggregates client updates via a diffusion model over the kernel's spectral coefficients, treating updates as discretizations of a shared operator rather than topology-bound weights -- this absorbs varying graph sizes and missing modalities without node-wise correspondence. To balance privacy and utility, we add an anisotropic differential-privacy mechanism that projects noise preferentially into the null space of the signal subspace, preserving dominant eigendirections while ensuring formal $(ε, δ)$-DP under gradient clipping. On MM-Fi and the RELI11D out-of-distribution benchmark, UMEDA outperforms state-of-the-art federated baselines in accuracy, convergence, and communication efficiency, particularly under high modality heterogeneity and tight privacy budgets.

</details>


### [306] [Hyperparameter Transfer for Dense Associative Memories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10164)
*Roi Holtzman,Dmitry Krotov,Boris Hanin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次为密集联想记忆模型（DenseAM）开发了超参数迁移方法，解决了权重共享和尖峰激活函数带来的挑战，并给出了从小模型到大模型的理论迁移规则，理论与实验高度吻合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的超参数迁移方法主要针对前馈网络设计，而DenseAM这类架构存在独特的权重共享（跨层和层内共享）以及快速尖峰激活函数，导致现有方法无法直接适用。本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 推导了DenseAM中超参数从小模型迁移到大模型的显式公式，考虑了权重共享和尖峰激活函数的特性。

Result: 理论推导的迁移规则与实证结果高度一致，验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 本文开创了DenseAM架构的超参数迁移方法，为这类模型的可扩展训练提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Dense Associative Memory (DenseAM) is a promising family of AI architectures that is represented by a neural network performing temporal dynamics on an energy landscape. While hyperparameter transfer methods are well-studied for feed-forward networks, these methods have not been developed for settings in which weights are shared across layers and within the layer, which is common in DenseAMs. Additionally, DenseAMs utilize rapidly peaking activation functions that are rarely used in feed-forward architectures. The confluence of these aspects makes DenseAM a challenging framework for using existing methods for hyperparameter transfer. Our work initiates the development of hyperparameter transfer methods for this class of models. We derive explicit prescriptions for how the hyperparameters tuned on small models can be transferred to models trained at scale. We demonstrate excellent agreement between these theoretical findings and empirical results.

</details>


### [307] [What If We Let Forecasting Forget? A Sparse Bottleneck for Cross-Variable Dependencies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08289)
*Fan Zhang,Shiming Fan,Hua Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MS-FLOW提出稀疏瓶颈框架，通过容量受限的信息流选择性路由跨变量依赖，减少虚假相关，在12个真实基准上达到SOTA预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通过增强跨通道交互提升预测精度，但在状态依赖且含噪声的真实数据中，密集交互会放大虚假相关并导致表示过平滑，产生不可靠预测。

Method: 提出MS-FLOW稀疏瓶颈框架，用选择性稀疏路由替代全连接通信，在严格通信预算下仅保留关键依赖路径，抑制冗余连接和虚假相关传播。

Result: 在12个真实世界基准数据集上达到SOTA预测精度，同时学习到更少但更可靠的依赖关系。

Conclusion: 多元时间序列预测应从"更多交互"转向"更有效的交互"，稀疏瓶颈机制是提升预测可靠性的有效途径。

Abstract: Multivariate time series forecasting is critical in many real-world systems, and thus modeling cross-channel dependencies is essential. Although existing methods improve overall accuracy by enhancing representations and cross-channel interactions, it remains challenging to reliably capture inter-variable dependencies under specific conditions. We observe that dependencies in real data are often state-dependent and noisy; in such cases, dense interactions can amplify spurious correlations and lead to representation over-smoothing, which may yield unreliable predictions in certain scenarios. Motivated by this, we propose MS-FLOW, a sparse-bottleneck framework that explicitly models inter-variable interaction as capacity-limited information flow. Specifically, MS-FLOW replaces fully connected communication with selective sparse routing, retaining only a few critical dependency paths and injecting cross-variable signals under a strict communication budget, thereby suppressing redundant connections and spurious-correlation propagation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MS-FLOW learns more reliable multivariate correlations, achieving state-of-the-art forecasting accuracy on 12 real-world benchmarks while producing fewer yet more reliable dependencies, shifting multivariate forecasting from "more interaction" to "more effective interaction".

</details>


### [308] [Generalization Error Bounds for Picard-Type Operator Learning in Nonlinear Parabolic PDEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10277)
*Koichi Taniguchi,Sho Sonoda*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于Duhamel-Picard迭代的算子学习框架，用于非线性抛物型PDE的求解算子学习，证明了增加Picard迭代深度可降低截断误差而不会导致估计误差无界增长，并给出了实现无关的泛化误差界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有算子学习方法需要具备离散化不变性和PDE结构编码能力，但如何将PDE特有结构融入模型架构和学习过程中仍缺乏理论指导。本文旨在为基于Picard迭代的算子学习提供理论基础。

Method: 将Picard迭代形式化为抽象状态转移模型，推导出实现无关的泛化误差界，分离实现误差与估计误差；通过滚动使用相同的局部学习模型进行长时间预测；以非线性热方程为例，使用Picard型Fourier神经算子作为具体实现进行验证。

Result: 增加Picard深度可减少截断误差，且不会导致基于熵的估计误差无界增长；该方法可有效推广到长时间预测任务中。

Conclusion: 本文为Picard型算子学习提供了理论分析框架，证明了其可扩展性和稳定性，为将PDE结构融入算子学习提供了理论保障。

Abstract: Operator learning for partial differential equations (PDEs) aims to learn solution operators on infinite-dimensional function spaces from finite-resolution data. In this setting, it is important for the learned model to be discretization-invariant, or resolution-robust, and to reflect PDE-specific structure. It is therefore natural to ask how such structure should be encoded in the model architecture, hypothesis class, or learning procedure. In this paper, we study operator learning for solution operators of nonlinear parabolic PDEs based on Duhamel--Picard iteration. We formulate Picard iteration as an abstract state-transition model and present a theoretical framework for Picard-type operator learning. We derive implementation-agnostic generalization error bounds that separate the implementation error from the estimation error associated with the abstract state-transition model induced by Picard iteration. A key consequence is that increasing the Picard depth reduces the Picard truncation error without causing an unbounded growth of the entropy-based estimation error. We also extend the analysis to long-time prediction by rolling out the same learned local model over successive time blocks. Finally, we illustrate the theory for nonlinear heat equations on the torus using a Picard-type Fourier neural operator as a concrete implementation.

</details>


### [309] [Toward Optimal Regret in Robust Pricing: Decoupling Corruption and Time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08290)
*Kalana Kalupahana,Francesco Emanuele Stradi,Matteo Castiglioni,Alberto Marchesi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对鲁棒动态定价问题，首次实现了腐败C与时间T的依赖解耦，在已知腐败时达到O(C+log T)遗憾界，在未知时达到O(C+log² T)遗憾界，解决了Gupta等人[2025]提出的开放问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在动态定价中，现有鲁棒算法的遗憾界为O(C log log T)，即腐败C与时间T的依赖相互耦合。文章旨在解耦C与T的依赖关系，使C对遗憾的影响从乘法变为加法。

Method: 提出一种鲁棒的二分搜索变体，能够有效对抗最多C轮反馈篡改。算法分为已知C和未知C两种场景，分别设计相应的搜索策略和置信区间管理机制。

Result: 已知腐败C时，遗憾界为O(C + log T)；未知腐败C时，遗憾界为O(C + log² T)。两个结果均实现了C与T的加法解耦。

Conclusion: 该工作彻底解决了鲁棒动态定价中C与T依赖解耦的开放问题，表明腐败对遗憾的影响可以缩小为加法项而非乘法项。

Abstract: We design the first regret guarantees for robust dynamic pricing that decouple the dependence on the corruption $C$ and the time horizon $T$. In dynamic pricing, a seller with unlimited supply of a good interacts with a stream of buyers over \( T \) rounds, with the goal of maximizing revenue. At each round $t$, the seller posts a price $p_t$, and the buyer purchases the good only if their unknown valuation $v^\star$ exceeds this price. The seller observes only the binary feedback $\mathbb{I} \left\{ p_t \leq v^\star \right\}$, indicating whether a sale occurred. In the \emph{robust} pricing setting, a malicious adversary is allowed to corrupt this feedback in at most $C$ rounds. Even if the learner knows the corruption $C$, the best known regret bound is $\mathcal{O}(C\log\log T)$ by Gupta et al. [2025]. This leaves as an open problem to ``decouple'' the dependence on $C$ and $T$. In this work, we resolve this open problem. In particular, we develop a robust variant of binary search that achieves regret $\mathcal{O}(C+\log T)$ when the corruption $C$ is known and $\mathcal{O}(C+\log^2 T)$ when the corruption is unknown.

</details>


### [310] [Sample-Mean Anchored Thompson Sampling for Offline-to-Online Learning with Distribution Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10289)
*Bochao Li,Yao Fu,Wei Chen,Fang Kong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Anchor-TS算法，通过中位数锚定规则解决离线到在线学习中Thompson采样因分布偏移导致的估计偏差问题，理论证明其能安全利用离线数据加速在线学习，实验验证优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离线到在线学习方法多依赖UCB类算法，而Thompson采样（TS）虽在贝叶斯框架下天然适合该场景，但其后验样本不保证对真实臂均值的乐观性，导致离线数据的偏差难以校正。本文旨在解决TS在分布偏移下索引不可比的问题。

Method: 提出Anchor-TS算法，定义臂的索引为在线后验样本中位数、混合后验样本中位数和在线样本均值的中位数，通过中位数锚定规则系统性地校正分布偏移导致的偏差（抑制次优臂高估、最优臂低估），同时在小偏移时有效利用离线信息。

Result: 理论证明了Anchor-TS能安全利用离线数据加速在线学习，量化了分布偏移程度和离线数据大小对遗憾缩减的影响。实验结果表明算法在所有基线方法上均有一致改进。

Conclusion: 中位数锚定规则是解决TS在离线到在线学习中分布偏移问题的有效手段，实现了安全且高效的离线数据利用。

Abstract: Offline-to-online learning aims to improve online decision-making by leveraging offline logged data. A central challenge in this setting is the distribution shift between offline and online environments. While some existing works attempt to leverage shifted offline data, they largely rely on UCB-type algorithms. Thompson sampling (TS) represents another canonical class of bandit algorithms, well known for its strong empirical performance and naturally suited to offline-to-online learning through its Bayesian formulation. However, unlike UCB indices, posterior samples in TS are not guaranteed to be optimistic with respect to the true arm means. This makes indices constructed from purely online and hybrid data difficult to compare and complicates their use. To address this issue, we propose sample-mean anchored TS (Anchor-TS), which introduces a novel median-based anchoring rule that defines the arm index as the median of an online posterior sample, a hybrid posterior sample, and the online sample mean. The median anchoring systematically corrects bias induced by distribution shift by mitigating over-estimation for suboptimal arms and under-estimation for optimal arms, while exploiting offline information to obtain more accurate estimates when the shift is small. We establish theoretical guarantees showing that the proposed algorithm safely leverages offline data to accelerate online learning, and quantifying how the degree of distribution shift and the size of offline data affect the resulting regret reduction. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements of our algorithm over baselines.

</details>


### [311] [A Spectral Framework for Closed-Form Relative Density Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10668)
*Francis Bach*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于谱方法的闭式框架，用于线性参数化概率模型中的相对对数密度估计，将KL散度表示为加权卡方散度的积分，仅依赖一阶和二阶特征矩即可得到闭式解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有相对对数密度估计方法（如逻辑回归等优化变分方法）计算成本高、依赖迭代优化，缺乏闭式解。作者希望提出一种高效、有理论保证的闭式解法。

Method: 将KL散度表示为加权卡方散度的积分，将KL估计转化为一系列最小二乘问题；利用一阶和二阶特征矩导出显式谱公式，得到散度和对数密度势的闭式估计量；可扩展到f-散度类，并支持核化或神经网络特征学习。

Result: 在合成数据上，该方法与基于优化的变分公式（如逻辑回归、softmax回归）相比，具有竞争力且计算更高效，同时证明了估计量的收敛性保证。

Conclusion: 该闭式谱框架为线性参数化概率模型中的相对对数密度估计提供了一种高效、有理论保障的替代方案，可推广至多种f-散度，并兼容核方法和深度学习特征。

Abstract: We propose a closed-form spectral framework for relative log-density estimation in linearly parameterized probabilistic models, including unnormalized and conditional models. This is achieved by representing the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence as an integral of weighted chi-squared divergences, converting KL estimation into a family of least-squares problems. We derive an explicit spectral formula based only on first- and second-order feature moments, yielding closed-form estimators of both divergences and log-density potentials for fixed features. The framework extends to a broad class of f-divergences and can be combined with kernelization or feature learning with neural networks. We prove convergence guarantees for the resulting estimators and empirically compare them on synthetic data with optimization-based variational formulations, including logistic and softmax regression for normalized conditional models.

</details>


### [312] [Graph Computation Meets Circuit Algebra: A Task-Aligned Analysis of Graph Neural Networks for Electronic Design Automation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08291)
*Hyunmog Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了EDA中不同图结构问题（如静态时序分析、布局、布线拥塞、IR压降等）所需的不同GNN计算范式，提出成功的GNN-for-EDA方法应使传播、聚合和监督与目标任务的固有代数结构对齐，并指出了当前方法的失败模式与未来挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管EDA问题是图结构的，但并非所有图结构问题都适用相同的GNN计算范式。现有方法常忽视任务特定的代数结构，导致架构与问题不匹配，限制了GNN在EDA领域的有效性。

Method: 对每个EDA任务（STA、布局、布线拥塞、开关活动传播、IR压降、模拟对称性提取）逐一分析其内在代数结构，并针对性地匹配相应的GNN架构（如异步DAG-GNN、可微布局器、稀疏供需场建模、概率递归、线性系统求解、离散约束预测），同时形式化了电路图与通用图的差异（有向、异构、多尺度、含时序和时钟结构）。

Result: 识别了当前GNN-for-EDA方法的成功与失败之处，揭示了代数-架构不匹配的局限性，并指出了四个关键失败模式：阶段泄露（stage leakage）、代理到签核差距（proxy-to-signoff gap）、校准问题（calibration）以及设计分布漂移（design-distribution shift）。

Conclusion: 作者将本文定位为任务对齐的分析性综述，而非全面的AI-for-chip-design综述。强调连续SE(3)-等变几何GNN通常不适用于曼哈顿数字布局，LLM-for-RTL、HLS以及RL/扩散驱动的拓扑生成不在本文讨论范围内。

Abstract: EDA problems are graph-structured, but not all graph-structured problems call for the same GNN computation. We argue that successful GNN-for-EDA methods are those whose propagation, aggregation, and supervision align with the native algebra of the target task. Concretely: static timing analysis is a max-plus/min-plus recurrence on a topologically ordered DAG, structurally aligned with asynchronous DAG-GNNs; placement is governed by hypergraph wirelength and density penalties and is exploited by differentiable placers rather than by message-passing GNNs alone; routing congestion is a sparse demand-supply field over a layout grid; switching-activity propagation is a probabilistic recurrence on a directed netlist; IR drop is a linear system on the power-delivery network; and analog symmetry extraction is a discrete constraint-prediction problem on schematic graphs. Through these task-by-task alignments we (i) review the GNN architectural toolkit relevant to circuits, (ii) formalize how circuit graphs differ from generic graphs (directed, heterogeneous, multi-scale, with sequential and clock structure), (iii) characterize where current methods succeed and where the algebra-architecture mismatch limits them, and (iv) identify failure modes--stage leakage, proxy-to-signoff gap, calibration, and design-distribution shift--that we believe are likely to dominate the next phase of work. We position the paper as a GNN-for-EDA, task-aligned analysis rather than a comprehensive AI-for-chip-design survey. Continuous SE(3)-equivariant geometric GNNs are usually mismatched to Manhattan digital layout, and LLM-for-RTL, HLS, and RL/diffusion-based topology generation are outside our scope.

</details>


### [313] [Real vs. Semi-Simulated: Rethinking Evaluation for Treatment Effect Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10430)
*George Panagopoulos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过大规模实证研究，系统比较了异质性治疗效应评估中反事实指标与可观测指标、半模拟基准与真实数据集之间的差异，发现两者存在互补性缺口，简单元学习器结合强基模型表现优于专门因果模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学术界和工业界在评估异质性治疗效应模型时采用截然不同的评价体系（反事实指标 vs. 可观测指标），但两者之间的关系从未被系统研究过。

Method: 在多个半模拟基准族和真实数据集上，对元学习器（搭配多种基学习器）和专门因果机器学习模型进行大规模实证比较，同时使用反事实指标和可观测指标进行评估。

Result: 发现两个互补性缺口：(1) 反事实指标无法可靠地识别出可观测指标偏好的模型；(2) 在半模拟基准上的排名无法迁移到真实数据集。简单元学习器+强基模型始终具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 治疗效应估计的进展不应仅依赖反事实指标和半模拟基准，应纳入可观测指标和真实数据验证。

Abstract: Estimating heterogeneous treatment effects with machine learning has attracted substantial attention in both academic research and industrial practice. However, the two communities often evaluate models under markedly different conditions. Methodological work typically relies on semi-simulated benchmarks and metrics that require counterfactual outcomes, whereas real-world applications rely on observable metrics based on ranking or test outcomes. Despite the well-known gap between methodological progress and practical deployment, the relationship between these evaluation regimes has not been examined systematically. We conduct a large-scale empirical study of treatment effect evaluation across standard semi-simulated benchmark families and real-world datasets. Our benchmark covers meta-learners paired with multiple base learners, as well as specialized causal machine learning models. We evaluate these methods using observable metrics common in application-oriented literature, alongside counterfactual metrics commonly used in methods papers. Our results reveal two complementary gaps. First, counterfactual metrics do not reliably recover the estimators preferred by observable metrics, even on the same semi-simulated benchmarks. Second, rankings obtained on semi-simulated benchmarks do not transfer to real datasets. We further find that simple meta-learners with strong base models are consistently competitive, in contrast to specialized causal models. Overall, our findings suggest that progress in treatment effect estimation research should not be assessed solely through counterfactual metrics and semi-simulated benchmarks, but it would benefit from incorporating observable metrics and real-data validation.

</details>


### [314] [Natural Policy Gradient as Doubly Smoothed Policy Iteration: A Bellman-Operator Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10671)
*Phalguni Nanda,Zaiwei Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明了自然策略梯度可以精确表示为策略迭代的平滑与平均化形式，并提出双平滑策略迭代（DSPI）框架，证明了其全局几何收敛性，为自然策略梯度等算法提供了新的收敛保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示自然策略梯度与策略迭代之间的内在联系，为理解自然策略梯度的收敛性质提供理论基础，并给出无需额外正则化或自适应步长的收敛保证。

Method: 提出双平滑策略迭代（DSPI）框架，将策略迭代、对偶平均策略迭代、自然策略梯度等统一为特例；利用平滑Bellman算子的单调性和压缩性证明全局几何收敛。

Result: 自然策略梯度和策略对偶平均算法达到ε-最优策略的迭代复杂度为O((1-γ)^{-1} log((1-γ)^{-1} ε^{-1}))；未正则化贪心情形（对偶平均策略迭代）具有有限终止性；框架可扩展到线性函数逼近和随机最短路问题。

Conclusion: DSPI框架统一了策略迭代与自然策略梯度等算法，提供了简洁的收敛性分析，并推广到更一般的MDP场景，强化了自然策略梯度的理论基础。

Abstract: In this work, we show that natural policy gradient, a core algorithm in reinforcement learning, admits an exact formulation as a smoothed and averaged form of policy iteration. Specifically, we introduce doubly smoothed policy iteration (DSPI), a Bellman-operator framework in which each policy is obtained by applying a regularized greedy step to a weighted average of past $Q$-functions. DSPI includes policy iteration, dual-averaged policy iteration, natural policy gradient, and more general policy dual averaging methods as special cases. Using only monotonicity and contraction of smoothed Bellman operators, we prove distribution-free global geometric convergence of DSPI. Consequently, standard natural policy gradient and policy dual averaging achieve an iteration complexity of $\mathcal{O}((1-γ)^{-1}\log((1-γ)^{-1}ε^{-1}))$ for computing an $ε$-optimal policy, without modifying the MDP, adding regularization beyond the mirror map inherent in the update, or using adaptive, trajectory-dependent stepsizes. For the unregularized greedy case, corresponding to dual-averaged policy iteration, we also prove finite termination. The same Bellman-operator framework further extends to discounted MDPs with linear function approximation and stochastic shortest path problems.

</details>


### [315] [In-Context Fixation: When Demonstrated Labels Override Semantics in Few-Shot Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08295)
*Ming Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现，即使标签语义有效，同质化标签（homogeneous labels）会导致上下文学习（ICL）准确率崩溃至12%以下。原因在于模型将标签位置上的token视为穷尽式答案词表，并出现“词集固定”现象——输出概率集中在演示集内token上，与语义无关。机制上，通过激活修补定位到第7层电路，跨架构验证了“编码-覆盖”处理轨迹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究（Min et al., 2022）认为随机标签对ICL影响不大，但本文发现同质化标签会导致严重性能崩溃，这揭示ICL并非依赖潜在语义推理，而是受限于演示token集合的词表检索过程。亟需理解这一现象的机制与边界条件。

Method: 1) 在6个模型（Pythia、Llama、Qwen，0.8B-8B）和4个任务上比较同质化标签与随机标签的效果；2) 设计“词集固定”实验，使用{foo,bar,vex,nit,orb}等无意义token验证模型输出概率分布；3) 扩展到4-way分类和多token verbalizer场景；4) 使用逐项配对激活修补（Pythia-1B）定位神经回路；5) 跨架构使用logit lens（Llama-3.2-1B）进行因果验证。

Result: 同质化标签导致所有模型准确率降至≤12%；词集固定实验中，模型将42-67%概率分配给演示集内的无意义token，而P(dog)不足0.2%；4-way分类准确率为0%；激活修补定位到第7层回路（rank 2/560，99.8th百分位，4折交叉验证均值103%）；logit lens跨架构验证了编码-覆盖轨迹（top-5层恢复89%）。

Conclusion: ICL的输出本质是受演示token词表约束的词汇检索过程，而非潜在概念推理。验证了与Xie et al. (2022)贝叶斯潜在概念解释的不一致性，并揭示了同质化标签是“词集固定”效应的最大化坍缩情形。多token verbalizer场景下可分解为格式层（模板采纳）与内容层（极性覆盖）两个可解耦成分。

Abstract: While random demonstration labels barely hurt in-context learning (Min et al., 2022), we show that homogeneous labels--even semantically valid ones--collapse accuracy to <=12% across six models (Pythia, Llama, Qwen; 0.8B--8B) and four tasks. The trigger is label-slot content: the model treats tokens occupying the label position as an exhaustive answer vocabulary, with homogeneity as the maximally collapsed case. A novel set-level fixation finding confirms this: when demonstrations carry varied nonsense tokens from {foo,bar,vex,nit,orb}, the model places 42--67% of probability on the demonstrated set while P(dog) remains below 0.2%. This is inconsistent with latent-concept Bayesian accounts (Xie et al., 2022) and reveals that ICL output is constrained vocabulary retrieval--the model binds its output to the demonstrated token inventory regardless of semantic plausibility. The effect generalizes to 4-way classification (0% accuracy across three models, 1B--8B) and multi-token verbalizers ("very positive"), where we decompose fixation into format-level (template adoption) and content-level (polarity override) components that are experimentally dissociable. Mechanistically, per-item paired activation patching on Pythia-1B recovers 98.4% of the gap (95% CI [84%, 112%]), localizing fixation to a layer-7-centered circuit (rank 2/560, 99.8th percentile; 4-fold CV mean 103%). Cross-architecture logit lens on Llama-3.2-1B replicates the encode-then-override trajectory with causal confirmation (top-5 layers: 89% recovery).

</details>


### [316] [A Recursive Decomposition Framework for Causal Structure Learning in the Presence of Latent Variables](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10651)
*Zheng Li,Feng Xie,Shenglan Nie,Xichen Guo,Ruxin Wang,Hao Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出DiCoLa框架，将分治策略推广到存在隐变量的因果发现场景，通过递归分解和重构提升计算效率，并理论证明了其完备性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于约束的因果发现方法在高维场景下因依赖条件独立性检验而计算开销巨大，而现有的分治框架大多假设因果充分性（无隐变量），无法处理存在隐变量的实际场景。

Method: 提出DiCoLa递归分解框架：将全局因果学习任务递归分解为更小的子问题，再通过原则性的重构步骤整合子问题的解，恢复全局因果结构。

Result: 理论证明了框架的可靠性与完备性；在合成数据上显著提升了多种因果发现算法的计算效率；在真实数据上验证了实际有效性。

Conclusion: 分治策略可理论上推广到存在隐变量的因果发现场景，DiCoLa框架在保证理论正确性的同时大幅提升效率。

Abstract: Constraint-based causal discovery is widely used for learning causal structures, but heavy reliance on conditional independence (CI) testing makes it computationally expensive in high-dimensional settings. To mitigate this limitation, many divide-and-conquer frameworks have been proposed, but most assume causal sufficiency, i.e., no latent variables. In this paper, we show that divide-and-conquer strategies can be theoretically generalized beyond causal sufficiency to settings with latent variables. Specifically, we propose a recursive decomposition framework, termed DiCoLa, that enables divide-and-conquer causal discovery in the presence of latent variables. It recursively decomposes the global learning task into smaller subproblems and integrates their solutions through a principled reconstruction step to recover the global structure. We theoretically establish the soundness and completeness of the proposed framework. Extensive experiments on synthetic data demonstrate that our approach significantly improves computational efficiency across a range of causal discovery algorithms, while experiments on a real-world dataset further illustrate its practical effectiveness.

</details>


### [317] [A Qualitative Test-Risk Mechanism for Scaling Behavior in Normalized Residual Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08297)
*Daning Cheng,Zeyu Liu,Jun Sun,Fen Xia,Boyang Zhang,Dongping Liu,Yunquan Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了归一化残差网络中的深度扩展行为，提出一个统一框架，将深度扩展分解为表示增益、优化增益和泛化迁移三个部分，并证明了在特定条件下深度扩展可以带来测试风险的严格降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习中测试性能随模型规模和数据增大而提升的scaling行为是核心经验现象，但其理论基础尚不完整。作者希望从理论角度解释深度扩展（在已训练模型中插入残差块）如何带来测试性能的提升。

Method: 提出了统一的理论框架：(1) 在零初始化附近的一阶下降条件下，证明扩展后的假设类中存在一个辅助跳板模型，其总体风险严格小于原模型；(2) 针对后归一化残差架构，建立了基于范数的Rademacher复杂度界；(3) 提供了两种互补的测试风险保证——一条通过总体风险的路径（当有正总体间隔时更紧），另一条直接作用于训练/测试层面（避免Hoeffding迁移，在退化模式下更鲁棒）。

Result: 证明了在归一化残差网络中，深度扩展可以严格降低测试风险。两种不同路径的测试风险保证为这一结论提供了理论支撑。

Conclusion: 深度扩展创造新的改进方向，宽度增强弱信号在有限样本下的可观测性，数据量决定扩展的统计代价是否可控。扩展行为本质上是深度、宽度和数据三者联合的。

Abstract: The scaling behavior, in which test performance often improves as model size and data increase, is a central empirical phenomenon in modern deep learning, yet its theoretical basis remains incomplete. In this paper, we study depth expansion in normalized residual networks: starting from a trained model in an old hypothesis class, we insert a new residual block at an intermediate layer and ask when such an expansion can yield a provable improvement in test risk. We develop a unified framework that decomposes this question into representational gain, optimization gain, and generalization transfer. First, under a first-order descent condition near zero initialization, we prove that the expanded hypothesis class contains an auxiliary jumpboard model with strictly smaller population risk than the original model. Second, under norm control tailored to post-normalized residual architectures, we establish a norm-based Rademacher complexity bound for the expanded model class. These ingredients lead to two complementary test-risk guarantees: one route passes through population risk and is tighter when a positive population margin is available, while the other works directly at the train/test level, avoids Hoeffding transfer, and is more robust in degenerate regimes. Together, these results provide a theorem-driven mechanism under which residual depth expansion can improve test performance in normalized residual networks. More broadly, they suggest that scaling is inherently joint: depth creates new improving directions, width enhances the finite-sample observability of weak signals, and data determines whether the statistical cost of expansion can be controlled.

</details>


### [318] [What Cohort INRs Encode and Where to Freeze Them](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08298)
*Vasiliki Sideri-Lampretsa,Sophie Starck,Robbie Holland,Julian McGinnis,Daniel Rueckert*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过分析SIREN和傅里叶特征MLP两种隐式神经表示骨干网络，发现共享编码器的最优冻结深度与最高权重稳定秩的层对应；并首次使用稀疏自编码器将INR激活分解为可解释的字典原子，发现SIREN学习局部化原子而FFMLP学习全局化原子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管已知重用协同训练INR的早期层作为初始化可以加速并改进信号拟合，但尚不清楚共享编码器的哪些层学习可迁移表示，以及这些表示编码了什么内容。本文旨在回答这两个问题。

Method: 1) 在测试时对共享编码器进行冻结深度扫描，发现最优冻结深度与最高权重稳定秩的层一致。2) 引入稀疏自编码器（SAE）对INR激活进行字典分解，分析SIREN和FFMLP学习到的字典原子特性。3) 通过单原子消融实验验证字典的因果使用。

Result: 1) 最优冻结深度与最高权重稳定秩层重合，且该冻结策略匹配或优于标准微调方案。2) SIREN和FFMLP的字典原子性质截然不同：SIREN原子局部化、平铺坐标平面；FFMLP原子全局化、追踪记忆信号轮廓。3) 单原子消融实验中，FFMLP一个原子即可使PSNR下降10.6 dB，而SIREN影响仅限于原子激发区域。

Conclusion: 本文首次对协同训练INR中迁移的内容提供了机制性解释，将INR激活转化为可检查的字典原子，为理解INR编码内容以及设计面向泛化而非记忆的架构开辟了道路。

Abstract: Reusing the early layers of cohort-trained INRs as initialization for new signals has been shown to accelerate and improve signal fitting, yet it remains unclear which layers of the shared encoder learn transferable representations and what those representations encode. We address both questions for two standard backbones, SIREN and Fourier-feature MLPs (FFMLP). First, sweeping the freeze depth across the shared encoder at test time, we find that the optimum coincides with the layer of highest weight stable rank. Moreover, freezing at this depth matches or improves on the standard fine-tuning recipe across all our experiments. Second, identifying which layer transfers does not characterize what that layer encodes. To address this we adopt sparse autoencoders (SAEs), the dominant tool in mechanistic interpretability, and present the first SAE decomposition of INR activations into sparse dictionary atoms. Interestingly, SIREN and FFMLP achieve comparable cohort-fitting quality, but learn qualitatively different dictionaries. Cohort SIREN's atoms are localized, tiling the coordinate plane such that each atom fires in a confined region independent of cohort content. Cohort FFMLP's atoms are image-spanning, tracing the contours of memorized cohort signals. Single-atom ablations confirm causal use of these dictionaries: a single FFMLP atom out of 4096 can drop PSNR by up to 10.6 dB across the image, while SIREN ablations remain confined to where the atom fires. Together, these results give the first mechanistic account of what transfers in cohort-trained INRs and turn their activations into inspectable dictionary atoms. These tools open a path towards characterizing what INRs encode and towards architectures designed for generalization rather than memorization.

</details>


### [319] [mHC-SSM: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections for State Space Language Models with Stream-Specialized Adapters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08300)
*Abdulvahap Mutlu,Şengül Doğan,Türker Tuncer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究将受流形约束的多流残差混合机制（mHC）应用于状态空间模型（SSM）语言建模，通过Sinkhorn投影约束残差混合矩阵为双随机矩阵，并引入流专用适配器，实验表明该方法在WikiText-2上显著降低了困惑度（从572.91降至461.88），但带来了适度的吞吐量下降和内存增加。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索mHC这种受稳定性驱动的多流残差混合机制是否能够有效迁移到SSM语言模型中，以提升模型质量。

Method: 在SSM块周围实现静态mHC机制：扩展残差流为多条并行流，通过单纯形约束的预混合聚合流到SSM输入，再通过单纯形约束的后混合将SSM输出散回到各流，并在每层应用Sinkhorn投影的残差流混合。此外引入流专用适配器，通过共享瓶颈和每流缩放增加轻量级特定容量。

Result: 静态mHC将验证损失从6.3507降至6.2448，困惑度从572.91降至515.35；mHC+适配器进一步将验证损失降至6.1353，困惑度降至461.88。吞吐量从1025.52降至964.81和938.90 tokens/s，峰值内存从2365MB增至2568MB和3092MB。

Conclusion: mHC启发的约束多流残差混合能在SSM语言模型中带来可测量的质量提升，流专用适配器可进一步改善性能，但伴随可预测的效率权衡。

Abstract: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC) introduce a stability-motivated variant of multi stream residual mixing by constraining residual stream mixing matrices to the manifold of doubly stochastic matrices via Sinkhorn-Knopp projection. In his work, we study whether mHC-style constrained multi-stream residual topology transfers effectively to state space model (SSM) language modeling. We implement a static mHC mechanism around an SSM block by expanding the residual stream into multiple parallel streams, aggregating streams into a single SSM input through simplex-constrained pre-mixing, scattering the SSM output back to streams through simplex-constrained post-mixing, and applying Sinkhorn-projected residual stream mixing at each layer. We further introduce stream-specialized adapters that add lightweight stream-specific capacity through a shared bottleneck with per-stream scaling, applied both before stream aggregation and after the SSM output prior to scattering. We evaluate baseline single-stream SSM, static mHC SSM, and mHC SSM with adapters on WikiText-2 using identical training settings and report checkpoint-based validation loss, perplexity, throughput, and peak GPU memory. Under the reported fair checkpoint evaluation, static mHC improves validation loss from 6.3507 to 6.2448 and reduces perplexity from 572.91 to 515.35, while mHC with adapters further improves validation loss to 6.1353 and perplexity to 461.88. These gains are accompanied by modest throughput reductions from 1025.52 to 964.81 and 938.90 tokens per second, and increased peak memory from 2365 MB to 2568 MB and 3092 MB. The results suggest that mHC-inspired constrained multi-stream residual mixing can yield measurable quality improvements in SSM language models and that stream-specialized adapter capacity can further enhance performance with predictable efficiency tradeoffs.

</details>


### [320] [What should post-training optimize? A test-time scaling law perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10716)
*Muheng Li,Jian Qian,Wenlong Mou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对大语言模型后训练中训练预算（每提示m次采样）与部署预算（每提示N次采样，m≪N）不匹配的问题，提出Tail-Extrapolated estimators（TEA和Prefix-TEA），通过外推奖励分布上尾统计量来近似best-of-N策略梯度，从而在有限训练样本下优化最佳N选一的部署性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有post-training目标优化的是单次响应的平均奖励，但实际部署中使用的是best-of-N策略（采样N次取最佳），其性能取决于奖励分布的上尾。近期test-time-aware目标虽部分解决此问题，但假设训练与部署使用相同的每提示预算，这在训练需要覆盖大量提示而部署可分配更大预算的场景下不切实际。

Method: 在奖励尾部结构假设下，推导best-of-N目标的策略梯度可从较小的采样组通过外推上尾统计量近似。提出两类估计器：1) Tail-Extrapolated Advantage (TEA)：直接外推估计器；2) Prefix-TEA：基于矩消去的固定阶数无偏估计器。在指令跟随任务上实验，测试不同语言模型、奖励模型和数据集下的训练/部署预算组合。

Result: 实验结果表明，TEA和Prefix-TEA在不同语言模型、奖励模型和数据集上，以及各种训练/测试时预算设置下，均能提升best-of-N部署性能。Prefix-TEA因消除了偏倚，效果通常更优。

Conclusion: 本文有效解决了后训练与部署之间预算不匹配的关键问题，通过外推奖励尾部统计量，实现了在有限训练预算下优化best-of-N部署性能，为实际场景中的大模型后训练提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed with test-time strategies: sample $N$ responses, score them with a reward model or verifier, and return the best. This deployment rule exposes a mismatch in post-training: standard objectives optimize the mean reward of a single response, whereas best-of-$N$ performance is governed by the upper tail of the reward distribution. Recent test-time-aware objectives partly address this mismatch, but typically assume that training can use the same per-prompt rollout budget as deployment, which is impractical when post-training must cover many prompts while deployment can allocate much larger per-prompt test-time compute. We study this budget-mismatch regime, where only $m\ll N$ per-prompt rollouts are available during training but the target objective is best-of-$N$ deployment. Under structural assumptions on the reward tails, we show that the policy gradient of the best-of-$N$ objective can be approximated from a much smaller rollout group by extrapolating upper-tail statistics. This yields a family of Tail-Extrapolated estimators for best-of-$N$-oriented post-training: a simple direct estimator, Tail-Extrapolated Advantage (TEA), and a fixed-order debiased Prefix-TEA estimator based on moment cancellation. Experiments on instruction-following tasks show that TEA and Prefix-TEA improve best-of-$N$ performance across different language models, reward models and datasets under various training and test-time budget settings.

</details>


### [321] [Priming: Hybrid State Space Models From Pre-trained Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08301)
*Aditya Chattopadhyay,Elvis Nunez,Prannay Kaul,Benjamin Bowman,Evan Becker,Luca Zancato,David Thomas,Wei Xia,Stefano Soatto*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Priming方法，利用预训练Transformer知识初始化混合状态空间模型，仅用不到0.5%的预训练token预算即可恢复下游质量，实现混合架构设计从预训练问题到知识迁移问题的转变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索混合状态空间模型的设计空间需要从头预训练，成本高昂，阻碍了大尺度混合架构研究。本文旨在将混合架构设计从预训练问题转化为知识迁移问题，降低探索门槛。

Method: 提出Priming方法：从预训练Transformer初始化混合模型，经过对齐和后训练阶段（不到源模型0.5%的预训练token预算）恢复下游质量。该方法与源Transformer家族、模型类别（稠密/MoE）和规模无关。

Result: 1) 首次在相同条件下对比SSM类型：GKA > GDN > Mamba-2的表达能力层次可直接预测长上下文推理性能。2) Hybrid GKA 32B相比源Qwen3-32B提升+3.8平均推理分，解码吞吐量提升2.3倍。3) 将Priming扩展到8B/32B推理模型，支持原生128K上下文。

Conclusion: Priming方法有效降低了混合架构设计的成本，使大规模混合模型研究更加可行。GKA在混合架构中表现出最优性能，在长上下文推理任务上超越原始Transformer。

Abstract: Hybrid State-Space models combine Attention with recurrent State-Space Model (SSM) layers, balancing eidetic memory from Attention with compressed fading memory from SSMs. This yields smaller Key-Value caches and faster decoding than Transformers, along with a richer architectural design space. Exploring that design space at scale has so far required training from scratch, a barrier that has kept most large-model Hybrid research within a narrow range of architectures. We introduce Priming, a method that turns Hybrid architecture design from a pre-training problem into a knowledge transfer one. Priming initializes a Hybrid model from a pre-trained Transformer and, through short alignment and post-training phases, recovers downstream quality using less than 0.5% of the source model's pre-training token budget. Priming is agnostic to the source Transformer family (e.g., Qwen, Llama, Mistral), model class (dense or Mixture-of-Experts), and model scale. Priming enables us to run the first controlled comparison of SSM layer types at scale under identical conditions. We evaluate, Gated KalmaNet (GKA), Gated DeltaNet (GDN), and Mamba-2, and show that their expressiveness hierarchy, GKA>GDN>Mamba-2, directly predicts downstream performance on long-context reasoning tasks. We scale Priming to 8B/32B reasoning models with native 128K contexts. Our Hybrid GKA 32B improves over its source Qwen3-32B by +3.8 average reasoning points, while staying within 1% of a Transformer post-trained on the same data and enabling up to 2.3x higher decode throughput. To foster research on Hybrid architectures, we release a model zoo of primed Hybrid models for long-context reasoning and instruction following, together with the Priming training and inference code (Sequence Parallelism algorithms for long-context training, optimized GKA kernels, and vLLM serving plugin), all under Apache~2.0 License.

</details>


### [322] [SGC-RML: A reliable and interpretable longitudinal assessment for PD in real-world DNS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08302)
*Wenbin Wei,Ruixiang Gao,Suyuan Yao,Xuanzhen Zhao,Cheng Huang,Hen-Wei Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SGC-RML框架，通过将多模态数据映射到共享的8维症状节点空间（含7个临床症状节点和1个可靠性辅助节点），结合不确定性估计、保形校准和选择性决策路由，实现帕金森病的可靠、可解释的纵向评估。在5个真实数据集上验证，性能优异（PPMI: MAE 4.579/R² 0.772, mPower: AUC 0.953等）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有帕金森病数字评估方法面临多模态异质、跨设备偏差、标记不完整等挑战，且缺乏可靠性感知机制——无法判断模型何时可靠、何时应拒绝评估、何时应重测、预测依据哪些症状维度。

Method: 提出SGC-RML框架：(1) 将语音、步态、可穿戴运动、移动任务和临床变量映射到共享的8维症状节点空间；(2) 引入不确定性估计、保形校准和选择性决策路由；(3) 实现症状预测、评估拒绝或建议重测。

Result: 五个真实数据集上结果：PPMI: MAE 4.579/R² 0.772; mPower: AUC 0.953; PADS: AUC 0.825; UCI: 从非预测性(MAE 8.38, CCC 0.02)提升至校准纵向评估(MAE 3.24, CCC 0.756); Daphnet LOSO: F1 0.803/AUC 0.872。

Conclusion: SGC-RML为多模态不完全标签条件下的帕金森病回顾性纵向评估提供了统一范式，实现了准确、校准、可审计和症状可解释的评估。

Abstract: Real-world digital Parkinson's disease assessment faces challenges such as heterogeneous modalities, cross-device bias, and incomplete labeling. Existing methods often focus on average predictive performance, lacking the reliability mechanisms needed for retrospective reliability-aware assessment - namely, determining when the model is reliable, when to reject an assessment, when to retest, and from which symptom dimensions the predictions are based. This paper proposes SGC-RML, which maps speech, gait, wearable motion, mobility tasks, and clinical variables to a shared 8-dimensional symptom node space (7 clinical symptom nodes and 1 reliability_state auxiliary node), unifying motor and non-motor representations through a symptom atlas. By jointly introducing uncertainty estimation, conformal calibration, and selective decision routing, the model can not only predict symptoms and severity but also reject assessments or suggest retests when evidence is insufficient. We validate this framework on five real-world PD datasets, covering classification, regression, event detection, and longitudinal severity prediction. Experiments show that SGC-RML achieves an MAE of 4.579 / R^2 of 0.772 on PPMI, an AUC of 0.953 on mPower, and an AUC of 0.825 on PADS. Under leak-free temporal anchoring, as few as 5 subject-specific anchors transform UCI from an essentially non-predictive subject-independent setting (motor MAE 8.38, CCC 0.02) into a calibrated longitudinal assessment (motor MAE 3.24, CCC 0.756) with split-conformal coverage held at the 0.80 target. Under the Daphnet LOSO protocol, it achieves an F1 of 0.803 / AUC of 0.872. These results demonstrate that SGC-RML provides a unified paradigm for accurate, calibrated, auditable, and symptom-interpretable retrospective longitudinal assessment of PD under incomplete multimodal conditions.

</details>


### [323] [Revisiting Policy Gradients for Restricted Policy Classes: Escaping Myopic Local Optima with $k$-step Policy Gradients](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10909)
*Alex DeWeese,Guannan Qu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种k步策略梯度方法，通过耦合k步时间窗口内的随机性，能够逃离受限策略类中的次优临界点，并在理论上保证收敛到与最优确定性策略呈指数级接近的解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准策略梯度方法在受限策略类中容易陷入次优临界点，原因是策略梯度本质上是短视的（仅基于一步Q函数改进策略）。作者希望解决这一局限性，使策略优化能够逃离局部最优。

Method: 提出广义k步策略梯度方法，在k步时间窗口内耦合随机性，使得梯度更新时考虑更长时间范围的信号，从而避免短视的局部最优。

Result: 1) 理论上保证收敛到与最优确定性策略性能呈指数级接近（关于k）的解；2) 投影梯度下降和镜像下降可在O(1/T)次迭代内达到该指数级保证；3) 该方法避免了分布失配因子||d_μ^{π*}/d_μ^π||_∞和||d_μ^{π*}/μ||_∞，从而能逃离完全可观测设置中因探索不足导致的次优临界点。

Conclusion: k步策略梯度方法为状态聚合、部分可观测合作多智能体等难以应用标准策略梯度的场景提供了接近最优的解决方案，且理论保证不依赖于分布失配因子，具有更强的鲁棒性。

Abstract: This work revisits standard policy gradient methods used on restricted policy classes, which are known to get stuck in suboptimal critical points. We identify an important cause for this phenomenon to be that the policy gradient is itself fundamentally myopic, i.e. it only improves the policy based on the one-step $Q$-function. In this work, we propose a generalized $k$-step policy gradient method that couples the randomness within a $k$-step time window and can escape the myopic local optima in MDPs with restricted policy classes. We show this new method is theoretically guaranteed to converge to a solution that is exponentially close in performance to the optimal deterministic policy with respect to $k$. Further, we show projected gradient descent and mirror descent with this $k$-step policy gradient can achieve this exponential guarantee in $O(\frac{1}{T})$ iterations, despite only assuming smoothness and differentiability of the value function. This will provide near optimal solutions to previously elusive applications like state aggregation and partially observable cooperative multi-agent settings. Moreover, our bounds avoid the ubiquitous distribution mismatch factors $||d_μ^{π^*} / d_μ^π||_\infty$ and $||d_μ^{π^*} / μ||_\infty$ enabling the $k$-step policy gradient method to escape suboptimal critical points that emerge from poor exploration in fully observable settings.

</details>


### [324] [GNN for Structural Displacement Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08303)
*Hung-Fu Chang,Tzu-Kang Lin,Yung-Li Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于图神经网络(GNN)的框架，将结构系统建模为图（节点=节点，边=结构构件），用于快速准确预测结构位移和转角，相比传统有限元法大幅降低计算成本，且优于常规神经网络。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 有限元法虽精度高但计算成本大，难以用于实时监测；需要一种快速且准确的替代方法来实现结构位移预测。

Method: 将结构系统表示为图，节点对应结构节点，边对应结构构件，同时融入几何与力学属性；利用ANSYS生成合成数据集，训练GNN学习荷载-位移关系，并与传统NN对比。

Result: 在两层框架结构数据集上，GNN在预测位移和转角方面具有高精度，且性能优于传统神经网络模型。

Conclusion: 提出的GNN框架可作为传统有限元分析的快速高效替代方案，适用于结构健康监测和地震安全评估等实时应用场景。

Abstract: Accurate prediction of structural displacements under external loading is fundamental to structural health monitoring and seismic safety assessment. Although the finite element method (FEM) remains the prevailing approach because of its high accuracy, its considerable computational cost restricts its suitability for real-time monitoring applications. To address this limitation, this study proposes a data-driven framework based on Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), in which structural systems are represented as graphs with joints modeled as nodes and structural members as edges. By incorporating both geometric and mechanical properties into the graph representation, the proposed model learns the relationship between applied loads and structural responses directly from simulated data. A synthetic dataset was generated from a two-story frame structure using ANSYS, and both a conventional Neural Network (NN) and a GNN were trained for comparison. The results show that the proposed GNN framework predicts displacements and rotations with high accuracy and outperforms the NN model, demonstrating its potential as a fast and efficient alternative to traditional FEM-based analysis.

</details>


### [325] [Variational Inference for Lévy Process-Driven SDEs via Neural Tilting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10934)
*Yaman Kindap,Manfred Opper,Benjamin Dupuis,Umut Simsekli,Tolga Birdal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种神经指数倾斜框架，用于Lévy驱动随机微分方程中的变分推理，能够捕捉跳跃和重尾现象，克服了高斯假设方法的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的Lévy过程贝叶斯推理方法中，蒙特卡洛方法严谨但缺乏可扩展性，而神经变分推理方法高效但依赖高斯假设，无法捕捉不连续性和跳跃动态。

Method: 通过神经网络对Lévy测度进行指数重加权来构建灵活的变分族，开发了二次神经参数化以实现闭合形式的倾斜测度归一化、稳定过程的条件高斯表示以及对称性感知的蒙特卡洛估计器。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上，该方法准确捕捉了跳跃动态，并在高斯变分方法失效的机制下获得了可靠的贝叶斯后验推理。

Conclusion: 该框架弥合了严谨性与可扩展性之间的鸿沟，为Lévy驱动SDEs的贝叶斯推理提供了高效且准确的方案。

Abstract: Modelling extreme events and heavy-tailed phenomena is central to building reliable predictive systems in domains such as finance, climate science, and safety-critical AI. While Lévy processes provide a natural mathematical framework for capturing jumps and heavy tails, Bayesian inference for Lévy-driven stochastic differential equations (SDEs) remains intractable with existing methods: Monte Carlo approaches are rigorous but lack scalability, whereas neural variational inference methods are efficient but rely on Gaussian assumptions that fail to capture discontinuities. We address this tension by introducing a neural exponential tilting framework for variational inference in Lévy-driven SDEs. Our approach constructs a flexible variational family by exponentially reweighting the Lévy measure using neural networks. This parametrization preserves the jump structure of the underlying process while remaining computationally tractable. To enable efficient inference, we develop a quadratic neural parametrization that yields closed-form normalization of the tilted measure, a conditional Gaussian representation for stable processes that facilitates simulation, and symmetry-aware Monte Carlo estimators for scalable optimization. Empirically, we demonstrate that the method accurately captures jump dynamics and yields reliable posterior inference in regimes where Gaussian-based variational approaches fail, on both synthetic and real-world datasets.

</details>


### [326] [LLMSYS-HPOBench: Hyperparameter Optimization Benchmark Suite for Real-World LLM Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08305)
*Siyu Wu,Yulong Ye,Zezhen Xiang,Pengzhou Chen,Gangda Xiong,Tao Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了LLMSYS-HPOBench，首个针对大语言模型系统的超参数优化实时基准套件，包含364,450个配置、12-23维超参数空间及多维度评估指标，旨在推动AutoML社区在LLM系统上的HPO研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有HPO基准未能充分涵盖LLM系统特有的复合超参数空间（AI与非AI组件）、保真度因子的非线性影响以及多样化的度量成本，亟需一个面向真实LLM系统的基准平台。

Method: 通过实际运行LLM系统采集超参数配置的推理目标值，构建包含12-23维超参数、3-5维保真度因子、3-9个推理目标指标和2-10个成本指标的基准数据集，并提供开源实时更新平台。

Result: 构建了涵盖364,450个超参数配置、932种设置的大规模基准数据集，并生成了完整的LLM系统测量日志。

Conclusion: 该基准不仅可重新验证现有HPO算法在LLM系统上的表现，更为AutoML社区探索新的研究方向提供了持续演化的平台。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) systems have been the frontier of AI in many application domains, leading to new challenges and opportunities for hyperparameter optimization (HPO) for the AutoML community. However, this type of system exhibits an unprecedented compound space of hyperparameter configuration from both the AI and non-AI components; rich and nonlinear implications from the fidelity factors; and diverse costs of measuring hyperparameter configurations, none of which have been fully captured in existing benchmarks. This paper presents the first (live) benchmark suite and datasets for HPO of real-world LLM systems, dubbed LLMSYS-HPOBench, covering data related to the inference objective values of hyperparameter configurations profiled from running the LLM systems. Currently, LLMSYS-HPOBench contains 364,450 hyperparameter configurations with a dimensionality of 12-23, 3-5 dimensions of fidelity factor leading to 932 settings, 3-9 inference objective metrics, and 2-10 cost metrics, together with generated logs from measuring the LLM systems. What we seek to advocate is not only a revalidation of the existing HPO algorithms over the frontier LLM systems, but also to provide an evolving platform for the AutoML community to explore new directions of research in this regard. The benchmark suite has been made available at: https://github.com/ideas-labo/llmsys-hpobench

</details>


### [327] [Practical Wi-Fi-based Motion Recognition Under Variable Traffic Patterns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08308)
*Guolin Yin,Junqing Zhang,Guanxiong Shen,Simon L. Cotton*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于Transformer的采样率自适应神经网络（SRV-NN），通过动态采样率增强技术解决Wi-Fi感知系统中因网络流量变化导致的采样率不匹配问题，在多个数据集上显著提升了变采样率下的动作识别准确率和稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Wi-Fi感知系统通常假设固定输入尺寸和采样率进行训练，忽略了实际无线传输中可变流量导致的采样率与采样间隔变化问题，导致模型在变采样率场景下泛化能力差、性能不稳定。

Method: 提出基于Transformer的采样率自适应神经网络（SRV-NN），可高效处理变尺寸输入信号；同时采用动态采样率增强（Dynamic Sampling Rate Augmentation）策略，模拟可变采样率和采样间隔，提升模型泛化能力。

Result: 在两个自采集数据集（SRV activity、SRV gesture）和两个公开数据集上进行了实验验证。相比无增强的基线模型，所提方法在变采样率下显著提升了平均准确率，并大幅降低了不同采样率之间的准确率方差，增强了稳定性。

Conclusion: 基于Transformer的SRV-NN结合动态采样率增强，能够有效应对Wi-Fi感知中因流量变化引起的采样率波动问题，为实际部署中的变采样率场景提供了鲁棒性更强的解决方案。

Abstract: Wi-Fi sensing detects human motions and activities by analysing the channel state information (CSI) derived from Wi-Fi transmissions. However, the impact of variable transmission traffic, which dictates the effective sampling rate and interval, is often overlooked. Existing Wi-Fi sensing systems are trained with fixed input size and sampling rate, which suffer from poor sampling rate generalisation. This paper proposes a novel Wi-Fi sensing approach for motion recognition applications, e.g., gesture and activity recognition, under variable traffic patterns. A sampling rate versatile neural network (SRV-NN) based on the transformer is proposed to efficiently handle variable input-sized sensing signals. A dynamic sampling rate augmentation is employed for variable sampling rates and intervals. To validate our approach, we have carried out extensive experimental evaluation, using two self-collected datasets, namely SRV activity and SRV gesture, as well as two publicly available datasets. Our method demonstrated exceptional performance and stability under variable sampling rates, with substantial improvements in average accuracy compared to baseline models without augmentation. The proposed approach significantly enhances stability by greatly reducing accuracy variance across different sampling rates.

</details>


### [328] [Revitalizing the Beginning: Avoiding Storage Dependency for Model Merging in Continual Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08311)
*Xi Wang,Cheng Deng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Trajectory Regularized Merging (TRM)框架，通过将模型合并重构为增强轨迹子空间内的优化过程，整合任务对齐、预测一致性和梯度响应性三个协同目标，在持续学习约束下实现多任务模型合并，解决了全局对齐导致错误累积和梯度消失问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模型合并虽然能整合多任务专长，但在持续学习的存储限制下，现有方法存在两个问题：(1) 全局对齐导致任务特定错误在连续数据流中累积放大；(2) 后续任务初始阶段的梯度消失使优化停滞，导致合并模型处于次优状态。

Method: 提出TRM框架，将合并阶段重构为增强轨迹子空间内的优化过程，包含三个协同目标：任务对齐、预测一致性、梯度响应性，以同时保持历史稳定性并重新激活优化动力学。

Result: 在多个基准测试上达到最先进性能，验证了TRM方法的有效性。

Conclusion: TRM通过重新设计合并阶段的优化目标，有效解决了持续学习中模型合并面临的知识冲突与存储限制问题，为多任务学习提供了新思路。

Abstract: Model merging provides a compelling paradigm for integrating specialized expertise into a unified multi-task model, a goal that aligns naturally with the sequential knowledge acquisition in continual learning (CL). However, the requirement for preserving diverse forms of previous knowledge conflicts with the storage limitations inherent to CL. In this paper, we systematically analyze existing model merging methods under the constraints of CL. We find that current methods prioritize global alignment, which often leads to the accumulation and amplification of task-specific errors within the continuous data stream; and the vanishing gradients at the onset of subsequent tasks frequently cause optimization to stagnate. These leave the merged model in a suboptimal state at the beginning of the next training phase. To address these challenges, we propose Trajectory Regularized Merging (TRM), a framework that reformulates the merging phase as an optimization process within an augmented trajectory subspace. Our framework integrates three synergistic objectives including task alignment, prediction consistency, and gradient responsiveness to concurrently preserve merged model's historical stability and re-activate optimization dynamics. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks.

</details>


### [329] [FlashSVD v1.5: Making Low-Rank Transformers Inference Actually Fast](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08314)
*Wenhao Wu,Zishan Shao,Kangning Cui,Jinhee Kim,Yixiao Wang,Hancheng Ye,Danyang Zhuo,Yiran Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FlashSVD v1.5是一个统一推理运行时，通过相位特定内核、密集KV解码、打包MLP执行和逐层CUDA图重播等技术，解决了SVD压缩Transformer在推理时因因子化检查点导致执行路径碎片化、预填充和解码阶段开销不同的问题，在多种解码场景下实现最高2.55倍解码加速和2.39倍端到端加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SVD低秩压缩虽能减少Transformer参量和名义FLOPs，但实际LLM服务中这些节省很难转化为真实加速，主要因为因子化检查点导致执行路径碎片化，且预填充与自回归解码阶段的开销差异显著。

Method: 将多种SVD压缩族映射为统一的因子化表示，结合相位特定内核（区分预填充和解码）、密集KV解码、打包MLP执行以及逐层CUDA图重播技术，将低秩服务路径重组为轻量运行时。

Result: 在解码场景下最高2.55x解码加速、2.39x端到端加速；在多种流行SVD压缩族上平均1.48x解码加速、1.44x端到端加速。

Conclusion: 实现实用的低秩加速需要运行时协同设计，而非仅靠压缩算法本身。

Abstract: SVD-based Low-rank compression reduces transformer parameters and nominal FLOPs, but these savings often translate poorly into real LLM serving speedups. We show that this gap is largely a runtime problem: factorized checkpoints fragment execution paths, and the resulting overhead differs substantially between prefill and autoregressive decode. We present FlashSVD v1.5, a unified inference runtime for serving SVD-compressed transformers. FlashSVD v1.5 maps diverse public SVD compression families to a common factorized representation and combines phase-specific kernels with dense-KV decode, packed MLP execution, and per-layer CUDA-graph replay to reorganize the low-rank serving path into a thin runtime. Across representative decoder-serving settings, FlashSVD v1.5 achieves up to 2.55x decode and 2.39x end-to-end speedup, and it attains 1.48x average decode and 1.44x average end-to-end speedup across multiple popular SVD compression families. These results suggest that practical low-rank acceleration requires runtime co-design, not compression algorithms alone. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Zishan-Shao/FlashSVD.

</details>


### [330] [Reflective Prompted Policy Optimization: Trajectory-Grounded Revision and Salience Bias](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08315)
*Rahaf Abu Hara,Vaibbhav Murarri,Claudio Zito*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出R2PO框架，通过让LLM观察完整轨迹（而非仅标量奖励）来优化策略，在10个环境中取得更好效果，并识别了"显著性偏差"这一主要失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的策略优化器仅使用标量奖励，无法获取轨迹级别的行为证据（如陷入循环、在哪一步失败等），导致优化信息不足。

Method: 两阶段框架：Search-LLM提出候选策略参数，环境执行后Critic-LLM检查完整轨迹并基于观察到的状态、动作和奖励提出针对性修订。

Result: 在10个环境中，使用20B开源模型，R2PO达到了最高平均最优奖励，更早达到近最优性能（如CartPole约500轮），训练稳定性远超深度RL和先前LLM方法。

Conclusion: 将轨迹视为上下文中的一等证据（而非简化为标量回报），改变了LLM搜索策略空间的方式，使其学习更快、诊断更精准、更可靠地改进外部控制器。

Abstract: Existing LLM-based policy optimizers see only scalar rewards: that a policy scored 0.45, but not whether the agent got stuck in a loop, fell into a hole on the third step, or performed well on 19 out of 20 rollouts and failed catastrophically on one. We propose Reflective Prompted Policy Optimization (R2PO), a two-stage LLM framework for policy search over compact policy classes that augments scalar reward feedback with trajectory-level behavioral evidence. A Search-LLM proposes candidate policy parameters; the environment executes them; a Critic-LLM inspects the resulting rollouts and proposes targeted revisions grounded in observed states, actions, and rewards. Across ten environments, ablations show R2PO's gains require separating global search from behavior-grounded revision and using selection to filter high-variance edits. We further identify a dominant failure mode, salience bias: when presented with multiple rollouts, the Critic-LLM fixates on improving a single failure even when most trajectories succeed. In a three-trajectory variant where the Critic-LLM sees the best, worst, and median rollout, this behavior explains 76.6% of regressions on CartPole. R2PO mitigates this by reasoning over aggregate rollout statistics, median-trajectory selection, and a revision rule. Using a 20B open-weight model, R2PO achieves the highest mean best reward across all ten environments, reaches near-optimal performance substantially earlier (e.g., near-maximum CartPole reward within ~500 episodes), and trains far more stably than both deep RL and prior LLM-based methods. These results show that treating trajectories as first-class in-context evidence, rather than artifacts reduced to scalar returns, changes how even comparatively small LLMs search over policy spaces, enabling them to learn faster, diagnose more precisely, and reliably improve external controllers.

</details>


### [331] [RDKV: Rate-Distortion Bit Allocation for Joint Eviction and Quantization of the KV Cache](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08317)
*Junkai Zhang,Hang Guo,Luca Benini,Yawei Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出RDKV方法，将KV缓存压缩视为率失真问题，联合优化驱逐和量化两种策略。通过反向注水法为每个token或channel分配比特宽度，在仅保留2.48%缓存的情况下恢复97.81%的准确率，相比FlashAttention-2实现4.5倍解码加速和1.9倍峰值内存减少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文LLM推理受限于KV缓存随序列长度线性增长导致的显存瓶颈。现有方法将驱逐和量化两种压缩策略孤立对待，缺乏联合优化视角。

Method: 将KV缓存压缩形式化为率失真问题，驱逐和量化为同一比特分配方案的两端。通过计算压缩对注意力计算引入的失真来导出每个token或通道的权重，再基于反向注水法在预填充阶段后一次性分配比特宽度（从全精度到0比特）。

Result: 在LongBench、RULER和InfiniteBench上平均超过最优基线9.1%。LongBench上仅保留2.48%缓存恢复97.81%准确率。128K上下文下相比FlashAttention-2实现4.5倍解码加速和1.9倍峰值内存减少。

Conclusion: 联合优化驱逐和量化可以显著提升KV缓存压缩效果，RDKV方法在极低缓存保留率下仍能保持高精度，并带来实际推理加速和内存节省。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown strong performance across diverse tasks, but their inference with long input contexts is bottlenecked by memory size and bandwidth. The Key-Value (KV) cache size grows linearly with sequence length and needs to be re-read from off-chip high-bandwidth memory (HBM) to on-chip memory at every decoding step, resulting in memory-bound inference. Existing methods reduce the cache by either eviction or quantization, but typically treat the two in isolation. In this paper, we cast KV cache compression as a rate-distortion problem, under which eviction and quantization are two end-points of the same bit allocation scheme. This exposes the need to optimize them jointly, motivating our method, RDKV (Rate-Distortion KV cache compression). RDKV derives the weight of each token or channel from the distortion that compression induces on the attention computation. Based on these weights, it assigns each token or channel a bit-width ranging from full precision down to zero bits guided by reverse water-filling, applied once after the prefilling stage. Experiments on LongBench, RULER, and InfiniteBench show that RDKV outperforms the best evaluated baseline by 9.1% on average. On LongBench it recovers 97.81% of full-cache accuracy with only 2.48% cache retention. Compared with full-cache FlashAttention-2 decoding, it achieves 4.5x decode speedup and 1.9x peak memory reduction with 128K context length, while maintaining comparable performance.

</details>


### [332] [SDG-MoE: Signed Debate Graph Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08322)
*Stepan Kulibaba,Kirill Labzin,Artem Dzhalilov,Roman Pakhomov,Oleg Svidchenko,Alexander Gansnikov,Aleksei Shpilman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SDG-MoE架构，在稀疏MoE中引入带符号的专家间辩论图消息传递机制，通过支持图与批判图实现专家间的结构化交互，相比基线模型在多个数据集上取得了19.8%的困惑度改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有稀疏MoE架构中，被路由的专家独立处理token后直接加权聚合，缺乏专家间的直接交互与沟通。本文旨在探索如何在保持专家专业化前提下，让活跃专家之间进行结构化信息交流以提升性能。

Method: 提出SDG-MoE，包含三个核心组件：(1) 两套可学习交互矩阵（支持图A⁺和批判图A⁻）;(2) 带符号的消息传递步骤，在聚合前更新专家表示;(3) 基于分歧门控的Friedkin-Johnsen锚定机制，控制 deliberation 强度并防止专家漂移。同时提供理论分析证明稳定性条件及低计算开销。

Result: 在三种子预训练实验中，SDG-MoE相比无符号图通信基线和标准MoE均提升验证困惑度，超出最强基线19.8%；在WikiText-103、C4和Paloma上取得最佳外部困惑度。

Conclusion: 专家间的结构化签名交互（支持与批判）能显著提升MoE性能，且通过设计的锚定机制可保持专家专业化；该方法计算开销低，理论稳定。

Abstract: Sparse MoE models achieve a good balance between capacity and compute by routing each token to a small subset of experts. However, in most MoE architectures, once a token is routed, the selected experts process it independently and their outputs are combined via a weighted sum. This leaves open whether enabling communication among them could improve performance. While prior work has raised this question, direct interaction among the active routed experts remains underexplored. In this paper, we propose SDG-MoE (Signed Debate Graph Mixture-of-Experts), a novel architecture that adds a lightweight, iterative deliberation step before final aggregation. SDG-MoE introduces three components: (i) two learned interaction matrices over the active experts, a support graph $A^+$ and a critique graph $A^-$, capturing reinforcing and corrective influences; (ii) a signed message-passing step that updates expert representations before aggregation; and (iii) a disagreement-gated Friedkin-Johnsen-style anchoring that controls deliberation strength while preventing expert drift. Together, these enable a structured deliberation process where interaction strength scales with disagreement and specialization is preserved. We also provide a theoretical analysis establishing stability conditions on expert states and showing that deliberation adds only low-order overhead over the active set. In controlled three-seed pretraining experiments, SDG-MoE improves validation perplexity over both an unsigned graph communication baseline and vanilla MoE, outperforming the strongest baseline by 19.8%, and gives the best external perplexity on WikiText-103, C4, and Paloma among the compared systems.

</details>


### [333] [The Reciprocity Gradient](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08323)
*Yue Lin,Pascal Poupart,Shuhui Zhu,Dan Qiao,Wenhao Li,Yuan Liu,Hongyuan Zha,Baoxiang Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出互惠梯度方法，通过反向传播奖励梯度穿过对手策略的私人估计器，解决了策略互动中学习代理面临的影响力归因问题，该方法联合优化行为和评估信号，无需内在奖励或奖励塑形，实验表明能恢复近最优策略，而基于样本的基线方法会退化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在策略互动中，沟通是维持互惠与合作的基础，但学习代理面临影响力归因问题：任何动作或信号都会通过组合分支路径重塑大量第三方声誉，最终反馈到自身未来奖励，迫使代理在选择每个动作时必须同时考虑所有间接渠道。

Method: 引入互惠梯度，通过从公开观测数据训练的对手策略私人估计器，反向传播奖励梯度。梯度通过声誉链本身进行解析传播，而非从采样回报中估计，联合优化动作和评估信号，无需内在奖励或奖励塑形。

Result: 方法恢复了近最优的上下文敏感策略，而基于样本的基线方法崩溃为常数输出策略。

Conclusion: 互惠梯度有效解决了影响力归因问题，使得学习代理能够在策略互动中学习到更优的沟通与合作行为。

Abstract: Communication is fundamental to sustaining reciprocity and cooperation in strategic interactions.
