Method: LAC框架：发送者将波形分析为非学习的声学描述符，用特征特定间隔词汇量化，输出英文词汇代码；接收者解析词汇-声学约束，通过闭环优化重建波形。定位为有限速率有损量化器，分析词汇大小、速率与保真度的权衡。

Result: 在短声音和符号音乐传输实验中，纯文本保留了可测量的声学结构，同时保持可解释、可编辑、天然适配LLM通信。

Conclusion: 自然语言可作为音频的传输表征，LAC框架实现了可解释、可编辑且与LLM通信兼容的音频传递方式，揭示了文本作为音频编码的潜力。

Abstract: Natural language is widely used to describe, prompt, and control audio systems, but rarely serves as the representation carrying audio itself. We introduce lexical acoustic coding (LAC), a framework in which pre-trained LLM sender and receiver agents transmit sound through natural language. Under fixed system prompts, the agents write their own analysis and synthesis code, communicating only through a lexical sentence, shared vocabulary, and optional symbolic music structure. The sender analyzes an input waveform into interpretable, non-learned acoustic descriptors, quantizes each with a feature-specific interval vocabulary, and verbalizes the lexical code as English. The receiver parses the sentence back into lexical-acoustic constraints and renders a waveform through closed-loop refinement. The transmitted text serves as both a rich caption and as the transport representation itself. We frame LAC as a finite-rate lossy quantizer, exposing trade-offs between vocabulary size, rate, and fidelity. Experiments on short sounds and symbolic music transfer show that plain text preserves measurable acoustic structure while remaining interpretable, editable, and native to LLM-mediated communication.

</details>


### [405] [LAQuant: A Simple Overhead-free Large Reasoning Model Quantization by Layer-wise Lookahead Loss](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08755)
*Euntae Choi,Sumin Song,Sungjoo Yoo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LookAhead Quantization (LAQuant)，通过结合推理域校准和单层前瞻损失，解决了大推理模型在长解码推理中权重量化精度下降的问题，在Qwen3-4B上W3G128量化下AIME25 Pass@1比ParoQuant提升15.11pp，解码速度提升3.42x。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有权重量化方法（包括最先进的端到端QAT）在长解码推理基准上精度损失严重，但困惑度和短解码精度却保持良好。作者通过梯度方向系统性分析，发现两个关键因素：KV-cache保真度在QAT损失下的退化，以及校准数据与部署分布之间的Hessian子空间对齐问题。

Method: 提出LAQuant，一种逐层权重量化方法：1) 使用推理域校准数据替代通用校准数据；2) 采用单层前瞻损失（one-layer lookahead loss），通过隐式跨层共适应来保留下一层残差流，无需在线变换开销。

Result: Qwen3-4B在W3G128量化下：AIME25 Pass@1比ParoQuant提升15.11pp，比ParoQuant++（匹配校准）提升1.93pp；解码速度比FP16提升3.42x，而ParoQuant为3.01x。

Conclusion: LAQuant有效弥补了长解码推理场景下量化精度与速度之间的差距，通过分析QAT损失中的关键因素并设计针对性的校准策略和损失函数，实现了在推理任务上更优的量化性能。

Abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) reach competition-level math and coding accuracy via long autoregressive decoding, making per-token decoding cost a primary deployment concern. Weight quantization is the standard tool for acceleration, but representative recipes -- including state-of-the-art end-to-end (E2E) QAT -- lose accuracy on long-decoding reasoning benchmarks despite preserving perplexity and short-decode accuracy. Through a systematic gradient-direction analysis, we identify two factors driving this gap: (i) KV-cache fidelity preservation under the QAT loss, which E2E supervision attenuates via the softmax Fisher metric; and (ii) Hessian-subspace alignment between calibration data and the deployment distribution. We propose LookAhead Quantization (LAQuant), a layer-wise weight-only QAT method that addresses both factors without online-transform overhead by combining reasoning-domain calibration with a one-layer lookahead loss whose implicit cross-layer co-adaptation preserves the next-layer residual stream. For Qwen3-4B under W3G128 quantization, LAQuant improves AIME25 Pass@1 over ParoQuant by 15.11pp (1.93pp over ParoQuant++ at matched calibration) while achieving a 3.42x decoding speedup over FP16 on RTX A6000, compared with ParoQuant's 3.01x.

</details>


### [406] [MDL-GBG: A Non-parametric and Interpretable Granular-Ball Generation Method for Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08759)
*Zeqiang Xian,Caihui Liu,Yong Zhang,Wenjing Qiu,Duoqian Miao,Witold Pedrycz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MDL-GBG方法，将颗粒球生成重构为基于最小描述长度原则的局部模型选择问题，统一了球的保留、分裂和残差剥离，并通过残差重分配机制全局优化边界样本，在20个UCI数据集上取得优异聚类性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有颗粒球生成方法依赖手工设计的质量度量及启发式分裂/停止准则，导致聚类中局部生成决策的可解释性较差。

Method: 基于最小描述长度（MDL）原则，将颗粒球生成视为局部模型选择问题：对每个颗粒球比较三种候选解释模型（单球模型、双球模型、核心球加残差模型），选择描述长度最短的模型；引入残差重分配机制全局优化边界样本。

Result: 在20个UCI数据集上，MDL-GBG生成的稳定颗粒球为聚类提供了极具竞争力的上游表示，MDL-GBG+AC在ARI、ACC和NMI指标上取得最佳平均排名。

Conclusion: MDL-GBG为传统启发式颗粒球生成策略提供了一种有效且可解释的替代方案。

Abstract: Existing granular-ball generation methods are still mainly driven by handcrafted quality measures and heuristic splitting or stopping criteria, which weakens the transparency of local generation decisions in clustering. To address this issue, this paper proposes Minimum Description Length based Granular-Ball Generation (MDL-GBG), a non-parametric and interpretable granular-ball generation method for clustering. MDL-GBG reformulates granular-ball generation as a local model selection problem under the Minimum Description Length principle. For each granular ball, three candidate explanations are compared, namely a single-ball model, a two-ball model, and a core-ball-plus-residual model, and the model with the shortest description length is selected. In this way, ball retention, splitting, and residual peeling are unified within a common coding-theoretic framework. A residual reassignment mechanism is further introduced to globally re-evaluate peeled-off boundary samples after stable granular-balls are formed. Experiments on 20 UCI datasets show that the stable granular-balls generated by MDL-GBG provide a highly competitive upstream representation for clustering, with MDL-GBG+AC achieving the best overall average ranks in ARI, ACC, and NMI among the compared methods. These results demonstrate that MDL-GBG offers an effective and interpretable alternative to conventional heuristic granular-ball generation strategies.

</details>


### [407] [FedGMI: Generative Model-Driven Federated Learning for Probabilistic Mixture Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08760)
*Qijun Hou,Yuchen Shi,Pingyi Fan,Khaled B. Letaief*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FedGMI利用变分自编码器（VAE）作为生成密度估计器，对每个客户端本地数据分布建模为多个共享固有分布的凸组合，从而在保持联邦协作学习优势的同时实现结构化个性化，有效应对数据异质性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CFL受簇内异质性限制，PFL忽略客户端间的结构相似性，无法同时兼顾协作学习与个性化需求。

Method: 提出FedGMI框架，采用VAE作为生成密度估计器来表征共享的固有分布，并推断每个客户端本地数据分布的混合成分。

Result: 实验表明FedGMI能有效表征和区分固有分布，准确估计混合比例，且在通信成本约束下仍保持稳健性能。

Conclusion: FedGMI通过概率混合建模实现了结构化个性化，在保护数据隐私的同时兼顾了协作学习与个性化，为处理数据异构问题提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) facilitates collaborative model training across decentralized clients while preserving data privacy by avoiding raw data exchange. Despite its potential, FL performance is often compromised by data heterogeneity across clients. To address this, Clustered Federated Learning (CFL) groups clients with similar data distributions to improve model performance, but constrained by intra-cluster heterogeneity. Conversely, Personalized Federated Learning (PFL) tailors models to individual clients, but usually neglects the underlying structural similarities among clients. In this work, we investigate a probabilistic mixture (PM) scenario, where each client's local data distribution is modeled as a convex combination of several shared inherent distributions. To effectively model this structure, we propose FedGMI, a framework that utilizes Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) as generative density estimators to represent these inherent distributions and infer the mixture components of clients' local data distributions. This approach enables structured personalization without sacrificing the benefits of collaborative learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FedGMI effectively characterizes and discriminate the inherent distributions, as well as accurately estimates mixture proportions. Furthermore, FedGMI maintains robust performance even under communication cost constraints.

</details>


### [408] [Anchoring the Eigengap: Cross-Modal Spectral Stabilization for Sample-Efficient Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08764)
*Nikhil J. Dhinagar,Vidhi Chhatbar,Chirag Jagad,Pavithra Senthilkumar,Sophia I. Thomopoulos,Mahir H. Khan,Sook-Lei Liew,the ENIGMA-Stroke Recovery Working Group,Paul M. Thompson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了深度视觉模型在低数据 regime 下降解的根本原因——谱坍塌（spectral collapse），即有限样本噪声破坏嵌入协方差、压缩特征间隙（eigengap），并限制了可恢复信号模态的数量。文章开发了一套有限样本表示学习的谱理论，量化了可恢复维度 K(N)，并指出多模态学习通过谱稳定（低秩约束）来缓解该问题。基于截断 Mahalanobis 能量和 Riemann zeta 函数，作者提出了一种数据效率的诊断与改善方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解释深度视觉模型在低数据场景下性能严重下降的根本机制。作者认为这不仅仅是过拟合问题，而是一种几何失败——有限样本噪声破坏了嵌入协方差的谱结构，导致特征间隙塌陷，限制了可学习的信号模态数量。

Method: (1) 谱理论框架：利用扰动理论和浓度界，推导可恢复维度 K(N)，即从 N 个样本中能稳定估计的特征模态数量；(2) 截断 Mahalanobis 能量：用于量化分类性能；(3) 功率谱模型下，该能量可近似为截断 Riemann zeta 函数，关联特征值衰减与数据效率/AUC；(4) 多模态学习作为谱稳定策略：视觉-语言模型通过低秩约束抑制噪声主导的方向，保持特征间隙，增加 K(N)。

Result: 在 MNIST 和多疾病神经影像数据集上，多模态训练相比单模态能够维持更多稳定模态，并改善类别分离。即使在单模态模型达到相当的小样本准确率时，多模态优势依然明显。

Conclusion: 谱坍塌是低数据学习中的根本瓶颈。截断 Mahalanobis 能量和 K(N) 可作为编码器质量的诊断工具；基于 zeta 的谱滤波可作为提升数据效率的原则性方法。

Abstract: Deep vision models degrade sharply in low-data regimes, particularly in medical imaging where labeled samples are scarce. We show this arises not merely from overfitting but from a geometric failure: finite-sample noise corrupts the embedding covariance, collapsing the eigengap and limiting the number of recoverable signal-bearing modes. We develop a spectral theory of finite-sample representation learning that quantifies the recoverable dimension K(N), the number of eigenmodes that can be stably estimated from N samples. Using perturbation theory and concentration bounds, we show that only modes with eigenvalues above the noise floor $\|\hatΣ - Σ\|_{\mathrm{op}} \sim \sqrt{D/N}$ are reliable, yielding a truncated Mahalanobis energy that governs classification performance. Under a power-law spectral model, this energy can be approximated by a truncated Riemann zeta function, linking eigenvalue decay to data efficiency and AUC. Within this framework, multimodal learning acts as spectral stabilization: vision-language models impose low-rank constraints that suppress noise-dominated directions and preserve the eigengap, increasing K(N) under data scarcity. Across MNIST and multi-disease neuroimaging, we show that multimodal training maintains more stable modes and improves class separation, even when unimodal models achieve comparable few-shot accuracy. These results identify spectral collapse as a fundamental bottleneck in low-data learning. We use truncated Mahalanobis energy and K(N) to diagnose encoder quality, and introduce zeta-based spectral filtering as a principled approach to improve data efficiency.

</details>


### [409] [Unlearners Can Lie: Evaluating and Improving Honesty in LLM Unlearning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08765)
*Renjie Gu,Jiazhen Du,Yihua Zhang,Sijia Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出"遗忘诚实性"概念，指LLM在遗忘有害数据后应诚实承认自身局限。现有9种方法均未达标，作者提出ReVa方法通过对齐表征来提升遗忘诚实性，在问答任务中拒绝率翻倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM遗忘方法存在幻觉、生成异常序列、行为不一致等问题，这些问题本质上是"不诚实"的表现。现有文献缺乏对"遗忘中的诚实性"的形式化定义和系统评估。

Method: 1) 提出遗忘诚实性的形式化定义（保留集上保持效用和诚实 + 遗忘集上诚实承认局限）；2) 设计覆盖效用、诚实性、遗忘有效性、拒绝率、稳定性等多维度评估指标；3) 提出ReVa方法：对特征随机化的遗忘模型进行表征对齐微调。

Result: 在9种方法、3个主流模型家族上的评估显示，现有方法均不达标。ReVa在遗忘集问答任务中拒绝率最高（两轮交互后），效果是第二名方法的近两倍，同时还能提升保留集上的诚实性。

Conclusion: 遗忘诚实性是评估LLM遗忘效果的重要维度，现有方法普遍失败，ReVa通过表征对齐能有效改善这一问题。

Abstract: Unlearning in large language models (LLMs) aims to remove harmful training data while preserving overall utility. However, we find that existing methods often hallucinate, generate abnormal token sequences, or behave inconsistently, raising safety and trust concerns. According to prior literature on LLM honesty, such behaviors are often associated with dishonesty. This motivates us to investigate the notion of honesty in the context of model unlearning. We propose a formal definition of unlearning honesty, which includes: (1) preserving both utility and honesty on retained knowledge, and (2) ensuring effective forgetting while encouraging the model to acknowledge its limitations and respond consistently to questions related to forgotten knowledge. To systematically evaluate the honesty of unlearning, we introduce a suite of metrics that cover utility, honesty on the retained set, effectiveness of forgetting, rejection rate and refusal stability in Q&A and MCQ settings. Evaluating 9 methods across 3 mainstream families shows that all current methods fail to meet these standards. After experimental and theoretical analyses, we present ReVa, a representation-alignment procedure that fine-tunes feature-randomized unlearned models to better acknowledge forgotten knowledge. On Q&A tasks from the forget set, ReVa achieves the highest rejection rate after two rounds of interaction, nearly doubling the performance of the second-best method. Remarkably, It also improves honesty on the retained set. We release our data and code at https://github.com/renjiegu.

</details>


### [410] [PRIM: Meta-Learned Bayesian Root Cause Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08786)
*Christopher Lohse,Anish Dhir,Amadou Ba,Bradley Eck,Marco Ruffini,Jonas Wahl*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PRIM是一种因果元学习方法，通过贝叶斯推理和神经网络过程，实现对复杂系统的零样本根因分析，在17毫秒内可处理多达100个变量的系统，性能优于或接近需要先验因果图的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂系统中的根因分析面临三大挑战：错误在多个变量间传播、需要结构性因果知识、以及测试时推理的计算成本高。现有方法往往需要显式的因果图结构或昂贵的统计测试。

Method: PRIM将根因分析框架化为贝叶斯推理任务，使用合成先验的因果模型。核心组件是Model-Averaged Causal Estimation (MACE) transformer神经网络过程，它联合关注观测样本、异常样本和节点间因果结构，实现零样本推理。

Result: 在合成基准和两个真实基准数据集(PetShop, CausRCA)上，PRIM与已知因果图结构的方法竞争力相当，并在多个任务上优于不了解图结构的方法。轻量级微调可进一步提升性能。推理时间仅17毫秒(100变量)。

Conclusion: PRIM通过隐式学习因果结构并避免测试时模型拟合，有效解决了复杂系统RCA的三大挑战，是一种高效且可扩展的根因分析方法。

Abstract: Root cause analysis (RCA) in complex systems is challenging due to error propagation across multiple variables, the need for structural causal knowledge, and the computational cost of inference at test time. We introduce PRIM (Prior-fitted Root cause Identification with Meta-learning), a causal meta-learning approach that frames RCA as a Bayesian inference task over a synthetic prior of causal models. By marginalising out structural uncertainty, PRIM implicitly identifies changes in the data-generating mechanism between baseline and anomalous periods. In doing so, PRIM infers distributional differences without explicit statistical testing, and implicitly learns causal structure without model fitting at test time. Following the simulation-based meta-learning paradigm of prior-fitted networks, PRIM uses a Model-Averaged Causal Estimation (MACE) transformer neural process that jointly attends over observational and anomalous samples and the causal structure of nodes, enabling zero-shot inference in 17,ms for systems with up to 100 variables. Across synthetic benchmarks and two realistic benchmark datasets, PetShop and CausRCA, PRIM is competitive with methods that are aware of the system's causal graphical structure a priori while outperforming graph-unaware methods on several tasks. Lightweight fine-tuning to specific domains and data dynamics improves performance further.

</details>


### [411] [Deterministic Decomposition of Stochastic Generative Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08794)
*Xingyu Song,Yuan Mei,Naoya Takeishi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种传输-渗透分解方法，将随机生成过程中的确定性速度场分解为传输项和渗透项，并基于此提出Bridge Matching框架，实现了可解释和可控的生成采样。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有确定性传输模型与随机生成模型对漂移和扩散的刻画不清晰，二者常被压缩为单一有效场，混淆了确定性演化与随机波动的不同作用。

Method: 提出传输-渗透分解 \(b_t = u_t + d_t\)，其中 \(u_t\) 控制边际概率传输，\(d_t\) 捕捉由扩散引发的渗透效应（由边际得分决定）；并基于此提出Bridge Matching框架，通过边际和条件两种形式学习分解后的生成动力学。

Result: 在生成建模实验中，将学习到的分量重组为 \(b_t = u_t + \lambda_d d_t\)，通过调整渗透贡献实现了可解释且可控的采样过程。

Conclusion: 所提出的分解方法能够清晰区分确定性传输与随机扩散在生成过程中的不同作用，并支持对采样过程进行灵活的调控与解释。

Abstract: Modern generative models can be understood as probability transport from a simple base distribution to a target data distribution. Deterministic transport models offer tractable velocity-field parameterizations, whereas stochastic generative models capture richer density evolution through drift and diffusion. Yet when stochastic dynamics are described through deterministic velocity fields, the effects of drift and diffusion are often compressed into a single effective field, obscuring the distinct roles of deterministic evolution and stochastic fluctuation. In this work, we show that the deterministic field \(b_t\) of a stochastic generative process admits a natural transport--osmotic decomposition that separates deterministic transport from stochastic, diffusion-induced effects: \(b_t = u_t + d_t\), where \(u_t\) governs marginal probability transport and \(d_t\) captures an osmotic effect induced by diffusion and determined by the marginal score. Based on this decomposition, we propose Bridge Matching, a flow-based framework for learning decomposed generative dynamics through both marginal and conditional formulations. In generative modeling experiments, we recombine the learned components as \(b_t = u_t + λ_d d_t\), showing that the proposed decomposition enables interpretable and controllable sampling by adjusting the osmotic contribution in probability transport.

</details>


### [412] [Data-driven transport modelling without overfit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08801)
*Peter Vanya,Katarína Šimková,Rastislav Farkaš*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于交通计数的数据驱动宏观交通建模协议，具有可解释的模型权重和可控的复杂度提升路径，避免了传统方法依赖昂贵调查数据和易过拟合的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统宏观交通建模依赖昂贵的人口调查数据且易产生偏差，而现有的数值优化框架难以解释且容易过拟合，亟需一种低成本、可解释、可控复杂度的建模方法。

Method: 提出一种数据驱动建模协议，以交通计数（可低成本可靠获取）为目标函数，包含可解释的模型权重，并提供可控的路径逐步增加模型复杂度和精度。

Result: 在多个玩具示例和真实案例上验证了方法的有效性，并提出了向包含公共交通在内的多模式系统推广的思路。

Conclusion: 该数据驱动方法为交通建模提供了一种更经济、可解释且可扩展的替代方案，有望改善基础设施规划中的预测流程。

Abstract: Macroscopic transport modelling aims to predict traffic flows after proposed public policy interventions, such as a new road or railway section or a temporary road closure. As such, it is a vital step in infrastructure planning and development. Traditionally, building a transport model has relied on complex understanding of socio-economic characteristics of the population requiring expensive data collection via surveys, which are prone to biases. Previous numerical frameworks to optimize transport models to fit observed traffic flows are not easily-interpretable and can lead to overfit. We present here an alternative: a data-driven modelling protocol with objective function based on traffic counts, which can be nowadays cheaply and reliably obtained; explainable model weights; and a controlled path to increase model complexity and accuracy. We demonstrate our approach on several toy and realistic examples, and suggest ways to generalize to multimodal systems including public transport.

</details>


### [413] [Compressed Video Aggregator: Content-driven Module for Efficient Micro-Video Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08810)
*Yang Xiao,Huiyuan Chen,Kaiyuan Deng,Chao Jiang,Zinan Ling,Ruimeng Ye,Xiaolong Ma,Bo Hui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CVA是一种轻量级微视频推荐模块，通过解耦视频信息与偏好学习、聚合冻结的VFM嵌入并使用潜在推理（无交叉注意力投影）来生成紧凑的视频嵌入，同时在基准上利用标题重新选择关键帧，显著降低训练时间和GPU内存消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有微视频推荐方法在处理视频特征时存在两大问题：一是原始基准视频帧数冗余且采样过于粗糙，导致计算开销大；二是视频信息与用户偏好学习耦合紧密，缺乏高效解耦的轻量级方案。

Method: 1）提出CVA模块，解耦视频信息与偏好学习；2）聚合冻结的VFM（视觉基础模型）嵌入，通过潜在推理（无需交叉注意力投影）生成紧凑视频嵌入；3）利用标题通过CLIP重新选择关键帧，替代原始粗粒度采样。

Result: 在MicroLens和Short-Video两个数据集上，CVA在保持推荐性能一致提升的同时，训练时间减少数个数量级，GPU内存占用大幅降低；重新选择的关键帧能进一步提升所有方法（包括CVA）的性能。

Conclusion: CVA提供了一种高效、轻量的微视频推荐范式，验证了解耦视频特征与偏好学习的有效性，并讨论了错误标题场景对方法的影响。

Abstract: We propose Compressed Video Aggregator (CVA), a lightweight micro-video recommendation module that decouples video information from preference learning. It aggregates frozen VFM embeddings, and uses latent reasoning without cross-attention projection, producing compact video embeddings for recommenders. Due to the redundancy in the frame count of the original benchmark and its overly coarse sampling, we used titles to re-select key frames based on CLIP. Experiments on MicroLens and Short-Video show consistent gains with orders-of-magnitude reductions in training time and GPU memory, and re-selected frames can further enhance the performance of all methods, including CVA. Furthermore, we also discussed the impact of several scenarios involving erroneous titles on our method. Code will be released soon.

</details>


### [414] [AgentSlimming: Towards Efficient and Cost-Aware Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08813)
*Yulang Chen,Haoxuan Peng,Jinyan Liu,Zichen Wen,Dongrui Liu,Linfeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AgentSlimming是一个针对大语言模型多智能体系统的即插即用压缩框架，通过评估智能体重要性和冗余移除，可在几乎不损失性能的情况下平均减少高达78.9%的token消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 手动设计多智能体系统的通信拓扑结构成本高昂，而自动化扩展方法会导致结构臃肿、智能体冗余和token过度消耗。

Method: 提出AgentSlimming框架：1) 通过混合机制评估每个智能体的重要性分数；2) 移除冗余智能体或用低成本替代；3) 使用基线锚定接受规则验证每个操作，防止性能崩溃。

Result: 平均token成本降低高达78.9%，性能几乎无下降，有时甚至能提升准确率，实现了成本与质量之间的强帕累托最优平衡。

Conclusion: AgentSlimming是一种有效的多智能体系统压缩方法，灵感来自神经网络剪枝和量化，可作为即插即用模块广泛适用。

Abstract: Large Language Model-based Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in complex tasks. However, manually designing optimal communication topologies is labor-intensive, while automated expansion methods often result in bloated structures with redundant agents, leading to excessive token consumption. To address this problem, we introduce \textbf{AgentSlimming}, a plug-and-play compression framework for graph-structured multi-agent workflows. Motivated by pruning and quantization in neural networks, AgentSlimming compresses workflows by first estimating the importance score of each agent with a hybrid mechanism, and then removes redundant agents or replaces them with low-cost ones, where each operation is validated using a baseline-anchored acceptance rule to prevent performance collapse. Experiments show that AgentSlimming reduces average token cost by up to 78.9\% with negligible performance degradation, and sometimes even improves accuracy, achieving a strong Pareto-optimal trade-off between cost and quality. \textit{Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/CitrusYL/AgentSlimming

</details>


### [415] [MicroFuse: Protein-to-Genome Expert Fusion for Microbial Operon Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08815)
*Seungik Cho*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MicroFuse 是一个蛋白-基因组专家融合框架，通过四专家混合专家模块（蛋白、基因组上下文、一致性和冲突专家）整合结构感知的蛋白表示与基因组上下文表示，用于预测微生物操纵子共成员关系，在构建的 OG-Operon100K 基准上达到 SOTA 性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的生物基础模型可以分别提供蛋白尺度（如 ProstT5）和基因组上下文（如 Bacformer）的强大表示，但直接将两种模态拼接（naive concatenation）忽略了它们之间可能一致或冲突的关键生物学特性：当相邻基因构成功能模块时两者一致，而当序列相似性具有误导性但基因组布局表明独立调控时两者冲突。

Method: MicroFuse 采用四专家混合专家（MoE）模块，包含蛋白专家、基因组上下文专家、一致性专家和冲突专家，并配以可学习的软路由（soft router）。训练结合了二元交叉熵损失、对称跨模态 InfoNCE 对齐损失和分歧加权的监督对比整形损失。作者还构建了 OG-Operon100K，一个包含 10 万对序列的支架级别基准数据集。

Result: 在 OG-Operon100K 上，MicroFuse 在 AUROC、AUPRC、mAP 和 mAR 指标上均超越了单独使用 ProstT5、单独使用 Bacformer 以及简单拼接 MLP 的基线方法。消融实验表明跨模态对比对齐是最关键组件，而在硬序列冲突子集上 MicroFuse 的优势最为显著——即当蛋白质身份本身具有误导性的生物学模糊案例中。

Conclusion: MicroFuse 通过显式建模两种模态的一致与冲突关系，有效解决了微生物操纵子预测中蛋白身份与基因组上下文可能不一致的关键难题，特别在序列相似性误导的模糊案例中表现优异。

Abstract: Predicting microbial operon co-membership requires integrating two complementary biological signals: protein-scale molecular identity and genome-context organization. While recent biological foundation models provide powerful representations of each view independently, naive concatenation of these modalities ignores a key biological property -- protein identity and genomic context may agree when adjacent genes form a coherent functional module, or conflict when sequence similarity is misleading but genomic layout indicates independent regulation. We present MicroFuse, a protein-to-genome expert fusion framework that integrates structure-aware protein representations from ProstT5 with genome-context representations from Bacformer through a four-expert Mixture-of-Experts module (protein, genome-context, agreement, and conflict experts) with a learned soft router. Training combines binary cross-entropy with symmetric cross-modal InfoNCE alignment and disagreement-weighted supervised contrastive shaping. We further construct OG-Operon100K, a 100,000-pair scaffold-level benchmark from the OMG metagenomic corpus with biologically grounded positive and negative criteria. On OG-Operon100K, MicroFuse achieves the strongest AUROC, AUPRC, mAP, and mAR among ProstT5-only, Bacformer-only, and Concat MLP baselines. Ablations identify cross-modal contrastive alignment as the dominant component, and a hard sequence-conflict subset reveals MicroFuse's largest gains precisely in biologically ambiguous cases where protein identity alone is misleading.

</details>


### [416] [Inpainting physics: self-supervised learning for context-driven fluid simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08832)
*Jonas Weidner,Yeray Martin-Ruisanchez,Daniel Rückert,Benedikt Wiestler,Julian Suk*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文将稳态CFD推理重新定义为图像修复问题：通过自监督学习速度场的先验，仅在推理时施加边界条件约束，并引入局部邻域标记器处理大规模3D网格，在颅内动脉瘤血流动力学中实现从稀疏边界上下文重构完整速度场，优于传统监督代理模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统神经代理模型作为前向算子训练，与条件变量（如几何和边界条件）紧密耦合，限制了在边界条件变化或局部几何修改下的复用性。

Method: 将稳态CFD推理转化为修复问题；学习自监督速度场先验；推理时仅通过固定已知区域（入口、出口或未变化区域）施加边界约束；引入局部邻域标记器将高分辨率速度场表示为紧凑空间潜变量；在这些潜变量上训练流匹配和掩码自编码器模型。

Result: 在颅内动脉瘤血流动力学中，该方法能从稀疏边界上下文重构完整速度场；在边界条件和数据集偏移下优于监督神经代理模型；支持利用未改变的仿真上下文进行局部几何编辑。

Conclusion: 将CFD推理视为上下文条件的修复问题，可将神经代理模型从任务特定的预测器转变为可复用的流先验。

Abstract: Neural surrogate models for computational fluid dynamics (CFD) are typically trained as forward operators that map explicit problem specifications, such as geometry and boundary conditions, to solution fields. This ties the model to the conditioning variables seen during training and limits reuse under boundary-condition shifts or local geometry changes. We propose to reformulate steady CFD inference as an inpainting problem: instead of training on explicit boundary conditions, we learn a self-supervised prior over velocity fields and impose boundary constraints only during inference by fixing known regions such as inlet, outlet or unchanged regions from previous simulations. To scale this idea to large 3D meshes, we introduce a local neighbourhood tokeniser that represents high-resolution velocity fields as compact spatial latent tokens and train latent flow-matching and masked-autoencoder models on these tokens. On intracranial aneurysm hemodynamics, our method reconstructs full velocity fields from sparse boundary context, outperforms supervised neural surrogates under boundary-condition and dataset shift and enables local geometry editing by reusing unchanged simulation context. These results suggest that viewing CFD inference as context-conditioned inpainting can turn neural surrogates from task-specific predictors into reusable flow priors.

</details>


### [417] [Controlling Transient Amplification Improves Long-horizon Rollouts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08856)
*Adeel Pervez,Francesco Locatello*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现自回归神经模拟器长期 rollout 误差源于轨迹上 Jacobian 的非正态性和非交换性导致的瞬态放大，并提出交换性正则化（降低 Jacobian 非正态性和交换子范数）来缓解该问题，在 1D/2D 数据及 ERA5 气候预测上实现了数千步的稳定 rollout。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归神经模拟器在短时预测上已媲美经典求解器，但在长时间 rollout 时精度急剧下降，现有方法缺乏对误差放大结构机制的理解，因此作者试图从线性化分析角度揭示其根本原因并提出缓解方案。

Method: 通过线性化分析发现 rollout 误差源于 Jacobian 的非正态性和非交换性导致的瞬态放大；据此提出交换性正则化，包含两个惩罚项：减少单个 Jacobian 的非正态缺陷和跨步 Jacobian 的交换子范数，利用 Jacobian-vector 乘积高效估计，推理时无额外开销。

Result: 在 UNet 和 FNO 变体上，交换性正则化使 1D/2D 合成与真实数据实现数千步稳定 rollout；在 ERA5 气候预测中，正则化后的 FourCastNet 在无需新数据的情况下改善了预报效果，尤其在外分布场景下，常规模型发散时正则化模型保持稳定。

Conclusion: 论文从机制上揭示了自回归模型长期 rollout 误差的结构性原因，提出的交换性正则化方法简单有效、推理零开销，显著提升了长程预测稳定性，对物理模拟和气候预测等场景具有重要实用价值。

Abstract: Autoregressive neural simulators now match classical solvers on short-horizon prediction of physical systems, yet their accuracy degrades rapidly when rolled out over long horizons. In this work, we identify transient amplification of perturbations around rollout trajectories as a structural mechanism driving rollout error. Using a linearization analysis we show that when the Jacobians along an autoregressive trajectory are non-normal and non-commuting, the model amplifies errors transiently, resulting in model rollout drift even when the overall system is asymptotically stable. Building on the analysis, we propose commutativity regularization: a combination of two penalties designed to reduce the normality defect of individual Jacobians and the commutator norm of Jacobians across steps. The penalties are estimated with Jacobian-vector products and have no inference-time cost. We show a propagator bound that quantifies rollout error under approximate commutativity and normality. We evaluate UNet and FNO variants with commutativity regularization on 1D and 2D spatio-temporal data in synthetic and real settings, showing successful long-horizon rollouts over thousands of steps. Further, we show that the method improves FourCastNet climate forecasts on ERA5 without using any new data. The gain is most pronounced out-of-distribution: trained on trajectories of a few hundred steps, regularized models remain in-distribution for thousands of rollout steps on initial conditions where baselines diverge.

</details>


### [418] [RareCP: Regime-Aware Retrieval for Efficient Conformal Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08857)
*Manuel Heurich,Maximilian Granz,Tim Landgraf*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RareCP是一种面向时间序列预测的自适应共形预测方法，通过混合余弦注意力专家捕获不同误差状态、超网络跟踪时变漂移、并结合top-k稀疏检索与加权分位数，在GIFT-Eval基准上实现了更高效的预测区间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有共形预测方法在处理时间序列的时间依赖、漂移和异质性误差时效率低下，且未能明确分离两种非平稳性来源：平滑漂移的误差分布与共存的多个误差状态。

Method: RareCP包含三个核心组件：1）混合余弦注意力专家（Mixture of Cosine-Attention Experts），每个专家学习不同的误差状态表示；2）紧凑超网络（Hypernetwork）自适应更新核参数以跟踪时变漂移；3）稀疏检索与加权分位数机制，为新预测上下文检索top-k最相关校准样本并赋予相似度权重，构建非对称预测区间。训练时使用平滑区间分数目标，并通过参数空间锚定轻量教师核以保持稳定的局部表示。

Result: 在GIFT-Eval基准上，RareCP相比现有共形方法和基础模型不确定性估计，在保持经验覆盖的同时提升了区间效率。消融实验验证了状态专家、漂移自适应核、稀疏检索和教师锚定各自对最终性能有贡献。

Conclusion: RareCP通过显式建模不同误差状态与时变漂移，结合检索增强的加权自适应分位数方法，为时间序列共形预测提供了一种更高效、更鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in uncertainty quantification for time series forecasting show that conformal prediction can provide reliable prediction intervals, yet standard conformal methods are often inefficient under temporal dependence, drift, and heterogeneous error behavior. Existing methods typically either update miscoverage rates over time or learn unconstrained calibration weights, without explicitly separating two central sources of nonstationarity: smoothly drifting error distributions and co-existing distinct error regimes. We introduce RareCP, a regime-aware retrieval method for adaptive conformal time series prediction. RareCP learns local calibration representations through a mixture of cosine-attention experts that each capture distinct error regimes, while a compact hypernetwork adapts the kernel parameters to track temporal drift. Given a new forecasting context, RareCP retrieves the top-k most relevant calibration examples, assigns similarity weights, and forms a weighted conformal quantile over their signed residuals, yielding asymmetric prediction intervals. The adaptive kernel is trained using a smooth interval score objective, with a parameter-space anchor to a lightweight teacher kernel to preserve stable local representations. On the GIFT-Eval benchmark, RareCP improves interval efficiency over recent conformal baselines and foundation model uncertainty estimates while maintaining empirical coverage. Ablations confirm that regime-specific experts, drift-adaptive kernels, sparse retrieval, and teacher anchoring each contribute to the final performance.

</details>


### [419] [BubbleSpec: Turning Long-Tail Bubbles into Speculative Rollout Drafts for Synchronous Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08862)
*Yuhang Xu,Kaibin Tian,Yang Tian,Zhice Yang,Yifeng Yu,Yan Li,Shengzhong Liu,Fan Wu,Guihai Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BubbleSpec利用强化学习 rollout 阶段中因数据并行导致的长尾气泡现象，让更快GPU利用空闲窗口预生成后续结果用于投机解码，在不破坏同步性的前提下将解码步骤减少50%、吞吐量提升1.8倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RL训练LLM时，rollout阶段因数据并行中不同GPU速度差异产生长尾气泡，快GPU长时间空闲等待慢GPU，尤其是长上下文场景下效率瓶颈严重。现有方案通过牺牲算法的严格同步性来缓解，缺乏既能保持数学精确性又能加速的方案。

Method: 提出BubbleSpec框架，不试图消除气泡，而是主动利用空闲时间窗口：让速度较快的GPU在空闲时预生成后续rollout结果，这些预生成结果作为投机解码的草稿，从而加速整体解码过程。该方法不需要依赖历史epoch相似性预热，训练一开始即可加速。

Result: 解码步骤减少50%，rollout吞吐量提升最高达1.8倍。

Conclusion: BubbleSpec能在严格保持RL算法同步特性的前提下显著加速rollout阶段，且与各种RL框架和策略无缝兼容。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has become a cornerstone for improving the performance of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, its rollout phase constitutes a significant efficiency bottleneck, mainly arising from the long-tail bubbles across data parallel ranks, particularly in long-context scenarios where faster GPUs remain idle while waiting for stragglers. Existing solutions, such as partial rollout or asynchronous RL, mitigate these bubbles by compromising the algorithm's strict synchronous nature. Instead, we propose BubbleSpec, a novel framework that accelerates RL rollouts while strictly keeping the mathematical exactness. Instead of attempting to eliminate bubbles, BubbleSpec exploits them. We exploit the idle time windows of faster ranks to pre-generate rollout results for subsequent steps, serving as drafts for speculative decoding. Unlike prior speculative methods that rely on historical epoch similarity and warm-ups, BubbleSpec is agnostic to dataset size and provides immediate acceleration from the onset of training. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that BubbleSpec reduces decoding steps by 50% and increases rollout throughput by up to 1.8x. Critically, BubbleSpec is seamlessly compatible with various RL frameworks and strategies as it sustains the strict synchronous property of RL algorithms.

</details>


### [420] [Higher-Order Equilibrium Tracking for EM-Compressible Online Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08864)
*ZhiMing Li,Yue Song*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种在线潜变量模型估计框架，将在线估计问题重构为追踪移动经验均衡。通过将在线估计分解为冻结批均衡与追踪滞后项，证明了当追踪误差为o(T^{-1/2})时，在线估计器继承批处理的中心极限定理和最优一阶风险常数。提出了均衡-jet预测器和冻结校正器实现局部追踪速率O(T^{-ν(m+1)})，并形式化了EM可压缩性和EM-jet^R可压缩性条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线EM和随机逼近分析主要研究向总体参数的收敛性，未能区分有限时间下经验批最优与在线追踪误差。本文旨在建立统一框架，将在线追踪误差与批处理最优性分离，并证明在线估计器在适当条件下可继承批处理的统计性质。

Method: 提出均衡流形视角，将经验最优视为由运行统计量索引的平滑均衡流形上的点。采用m阶均衡-jet预测器结合ν阶冻结校正器实现局部追踪。定义EM可压缩性和EM-jet^R可压缩性作为结构条件，使均衡响应和牛顿校正可从保留的流统计量中评估。

Result: 证明了批到在线迁移定理：当追踪误差L²范数为o(T^{-1/2})时，在线估计器继承批CLT和最优一阶风险常数。局部追踪速率达O(T^{-ν(m+1)})。在潜在线性高斯协方差估计实例中，一阶方案在压缩d×d统计量上实现显式有限样本风险边界和认证重启规则。

Conclusion: 该框架为在线潜变量模型估计提供了理论保证，桥接了批处理最优性与在线追踪性能之间的鸿沟，所提出的可压缩性条件为实际算法设计提供了指导原则。

Abstract: We study online estimation in latent-variable models by recasting the problem as tracking a moving empirical equilibrium. Standard online EM and stochastic approximation analyses primarily study convergence toward the population parameter and typically do not isolate the empirical batch optimum from the online tracking error at finite horizon. Our framework decomposes the online estimate into the frozen batch equilibrium at the current running statistic and a tracking lag that captures the algorithm's delay behind this moving target. We prove a batch-to-online transfer theorem: provided $\lVert e_T \rVert_{L^{2}} = o(T^{-1/2})$, the online estimator inherits the batch central limit theorem and the sharp first-order risk constant. Our key observation is that the empirical optimum evolves on a smooth equilibrium manifold indexed by the running statistic. An $m$-th order equilibrium-jet predictor combined with an order-$ν$ frozen corrector yields localized tracking rates $O(T^{-ν(m+1)})$. We formalize EM-compressibility and EM-jet$^R$-compressibility as the structural conditions that make the equilibrium response and the Newton corrector evaluable from a retained streaming statistic. The theory is instantiated in latent linear Gaussian covariance estimation, where the first-order scheme operates on a compressed $d \times d$ statistic with explicit finite-sample risk envelopes and a certified restart rule.

</details>


### [421] [TopoGeoScore: A Self-Supervised Source-Only Geometric Framework for OOD Checkpoint Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08870)
*Farid Hazratian,Ali Zia,Hien Duy Nguyen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出TopoGeoScore，一种仅使用源域表示进行无标签OOD鲁棒性检查点选择的方法，通过图拓扑与几何特征自监督学习评分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: OOD鲁棒性难以在缺少目标域标签时诊断，现有方法依赖目标样本或标签，限制实际应用。需要一种仅用源域数据即可评估模型鲁棒性的方法。

Method: 构建基于k近邻的类条件互图，提取三类信号：类流形复杂度的扭结约化拉普拉斯对数行列式、局部邻域规则性的Ollivier-Ricci曲率、高阶拓扑摘要。通过自监督目标学习非负线性分数，保持几何保持变换不变性，破坏几何结构变换则分离。

Result: 在CIFAR、ImageNet-C、MNLI→HANS、OGBN-Arxiv等基准上验证，源域表示包含可测量的全局-局部-拓扑鲁棒性证据，支持部署前无标签检查点选择。

Conclusion: 源域表示本身蕴含鲁棒性信号，TopoGeoScore通过几何-拓扑特征实现有效的无标签OOD检查点选择，无需任何目标域数据。

Abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness is difficult to diagnose when target-domain labels are unavailable. We consider a more restrictive source-only variant of unsupervised accuracy estimation: selecting robust checkpoints using only source-domain representations, with no target samples or target labels. We propose \textbf{TopoGeoScore}, a source-only geometric scorer for label-free OOD checkpoint selection. Given a trained checkpoint, we construct class-conditional mutual $k$-nearest-neighbour graphs from source embeddings and extract three interpretable signals: a torsion-inspired reduced Laplacian log-determinant for global class-manifold complexity, Ollivier--Ricci curvature for local neighbourhood regularity, and higher-order topological summaries for fragmented connectivity, loops, and global--local inconsistency. Instead of fixing their weights by hand, TopoGeoScore learns a non-negative linear score through a self-supervised objective that enforces invariance under approximately geometry-preserving embedding views and separation from structure-breaking views. The score remains interpretable and uses no target-domain samples or labels. Results across CIFAR-based corruption and distribution-shift benchmarks, ImageNet-C, MNLI$\to$HANS transfer, and OGBN-Arxiv suggest that source representations contain measurable global--local--topological evidence of robustness, supporting practical checkpoint selection before deployment under distribution shift.

</details>


### [422] [OTora: A Unified Red Teaming Framework for Reasoning-Level Denial-of-Service in LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08876)
*Xinyu Li,Ronghui Mu,Lin Li,Tianjin Huang,Gaojie Jin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出OTora框架，通过两阶段红队测试生成推理层拒绝服务（R-DoS）攻击，使LLM智能体在保持任务正确率的同时，推理token增加10倍、延迟显著上升，揭示了AI安全中一个被忽视的威胁维度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM安全研究主要关注任务正确性（如越狱攻击），忽略了可用性威胁——攻击者可以通过诱导模型过度推理（overthinking）来造成拒绝服务，而无需破坏任务结果。这种"隐形"攻击在实时应用（如客服、机器人流程自动化）中危害极大。

Method: 两阶段框架：(1) 触发优化阶段，通过插入感知评分和动态目标共同进化，生成诱导特定工具调用的对抗触发器（支持黑盒/白盒）；(2) 推理负载生成阶段，利用ICL引导的遗传搜索，在保持正确输出前提下放大模型的推理深度和token消耗。

Result: 在WebShop、Email、OS三个智能体场景及LLaMA-70B、GPT-OSS-120B等骨干模型上，OTora实现推理token最多增加10倍，延迟提升一个数量级，同时任务准确率保持接近基线水平。

Conclusion: R-DoS是LLM智能体部署中的真实安全威胁，需要从检测异常推理模式和约束推理深度两方面构建防御机制。代码已开源。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents that execute tool-augmented, multi-step tasks, where latency is a critical factor for real-world applications. Yet an overlooked threat is Reasoning-Level Denial-of-Service (R-DoS), in which an attacker preserves task correctness but degrades availability by inflating an agent's reasoning depth or tool-use budget. We introduce OTora, the first unified, two-stage red-teaming framework for instantiating R-DoS attacks. Stage I optimizes an adversarial trigger that induces targeted tool invocations using insertion-aware scoring and dynamic target co-evolution, supporting both black-box and white-box settings. Stage II generates agent-aware reasoning payloads via an ICL-guided genetic search that amplifies overthinking while maintaining correct task outcomes. Across WebShop, Email, and OS agents built on multiple backbone models such as LLaMA-70B and GPT-OSS-120B, OTora achieves up to 10 times increases in reasoning tokens and order-of-magnitude latency slowdowns, all while preserving near-baseline task accuracy. Finally, we discuss mitigation strategies for detecting and constraining abnormal reasoning and latency spikes. The code is available at https://github.com/llm2409/OTora.

</details>


### [423] [Discrete Flow Matching: Convergence Guarantees Under Minimal Assumptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08882)
*Le-Tuyet-Nhi Pham,Giovanni Conforti,Zhenjie Ren,Alain Durmus*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了离散流匹配（DFM）模型在 $\mathbb{Z}_m^d$ 上的理论保证，首次建立了KL散度和全变差距离下的非渐近界，放松了先前工作中的得分假设，并改进了对词汇量 $m$ 和维度 $d$ 的依赖关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管离散流匹配（DFM）模型已被提出并扩展至离散分布，但其理论保证仍然稀缺。现有工作缺乏严格的理论分析，亟需建立非渐近收敛性保证。

Method: 研究两种在 $\mathbb{Z}_m^d$ 上通过时间离散化采样的DFM模型，利用早期停止策略和近似误差假设推导非渐近界。

Result: 建立了KL散度下的非渐近界（早期停止版本），以及全变差距离下相对于真实目标分布的显式收敛保证。这些界的依赖关系在 $m$ 和 $d$ 上优于以往工作。

Conclusion: 本文为离散流匹配提供了严格的理论基础，放松了标准得分假设，仅依赖近似误差假设，且获得了更优的维度与词汇量依赖关系。

Abstract: Flow Matching has recently emerged as a popular class of generative models for simulating a target distribution $μ_1$ from samples drawn from a source distribution $μ_0$. This framework relies on a fixed coupling between $μ_0$ and $μ_1$, and on a deterministic or stochastic bridge to define an interpolating process between the two distributions. The time marginals of this process can then be approximately sampled by estimating the transition rates, or more generally the generator, of its Markovian projection. This framework has recently been extended to the case of discrete source and target distributions, under the name Discrete Flow Matching (DFM). However, theoretical guarantees for such models remain scarce. In this paper, we study two DFM models on $\mathbb{Z}_m^d = \{0,\ldots,m-1\}^d$, sampled through time discretization, and derive non-asymptotic associated bounds for both of them. In contrast to previous work, we establish non-asymptotic bounds in Kullback--Leibler divergence for the early-stopped version of the target distribution. We also derive explicit convergence guarantees in total variation distance with respect to the true target distribution. Importantly, these bounds rely only on an approximation error assumption, relaxing standard score assumptions used in earlier works, while also yielding improved dependence on the vocabulary size $m$ and the dimension $d$.

</details>


### [424] [Compact SO(3) Equivariant Atomistic Foundation Models via Structural Pruning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08885)
*Chen Wang,Siyu Hu,Guangming Tan,Weile Jia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种针对SO(3)等变原子基础模型的结构化剪枝方法，沿通道和阶维度以完整不可约表示块为单位进行剪枝，在保持等变性的同时大幅提升推理效率。实验表明，剪枝后的MACE-MP模型在Matbench Discovery排行榜上9项指标中7项优于从头训练的小模型，参数减少1.5-4倍，预训练计算量减少2.5-4倍，下游微调可使能量和力误差分别降低70.1%和34.4%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SO(3)等变图神经网络在原子基础模型中表现优异，但其高阶张量运算的计算成本导致模型精度与推理效率之间存在难以调和的矛盾。现有方法无法在不牺牲等变性的前提下有效降低计算开销。

Method: 提出一种结构化剪枝方法，沿通道维度和阶维度以完整的不可约表示块为单位进行剪枝，保留SO(3)等变性。从大模型检查点出发剪枝，而非从头训练小模型。

Result: 剪枝后的MACE-MP在Matbench Discovery上9项指标中7项优于官方小模型；参数减少1.5-4倍，预训练计算量减少2.5-4倍；下游微调能量和力误差分别降低70.1%和34.4%；方法可推广至SevenNet、eSCN等架构，并可与量化和知识蒸馏结合。

Conclusion: 该方法有效弥合了SO(3)等变模型的精度-效率差距，为构建高效且准确的原子基础模型提供了实用路径，且具有良好的通用性和扩展性。

Abstract: SO(3) equivariant graph neural networks have become the dominant paradigm for atomistic foundation models, achieving high accuracy and data efficiency by building rotational symmetry directly into the architecture. Yet the computational cost of their higher-order tensor operations creates a tough trade-off between model accuracy and inference efficiency. In this paper, we propose a structural pruning method for SO(3) equivariant atomistic foundation models to bridge this accuracy-efficiency gap. The pruning is applied along the channel and order dimensions, with each irreducible representation kept or removed as a complete block, thereby retaining SO(3) equivariance. Starting from a large checkpoint, the pruned model substantially reduces the inference cost while retaining higher accuracy than an independently trained small model. The pruned MACE-MP model outperforms the official from-scratch trained small model on 7 of 9 metrics on the Matbench Discovery leaderboard. In terms of efficiency, compressed MACE-MP and MACE-OFF models contain 1.5$\times$ to 4$\times$ fewer parameters and require 2.5$\times$ to 4$\times$ less pre-training compute than training a small model from scratch. For downstream applications, fine-tuning the pruned model reduces energy and force errors by 70.1% and 34.4% compared to training task-specific models from scratch across eight representative downstream datasets. We demonstrate that the method generalizes to other SO(3) equivariant architectures (SevenNet, eSCN) and can be combined with quantization and knowledge distillation for further gains.

</details>


### [425] [Machine Learning Research Has Outpaced Its Communication Norms and NeurIPS Should Act](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08889)
*Ajay Mandyam Rangarajan,Jeyashree Krishnan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文分析了NeurIPS会议论文的可读性问题，发现其可读性逐年下降、耸人听闻语言增加、首字母缩写密度激增（89%的缩写使用不足10次），而可读性更好的论文往往获得更多引用。作者提出了七项写作标准供NeurIPS 2027试点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习研究呈指数增长，但其写作交流规范并未同步提升。论文指出NeurIPS应采纳明确、可衡量的写作标准，以改善论文的可读性和学术影响力。

Method: 分析了280万篇arXiv论文（1991-2025）、24,772篇NeurIPS论文（1987-2024）和2450万篇PubMed论文（1990-2025），运用经典可读性评分、Hohmann写作风格套件（包括耸人听闻语言）、首字母缩写密度与复用分析、LLM作为裁判的可读性协议，以及OpenAlex和Semantic Scholar的引用数据。

Result: 1) NeurIPS摘要可读性持续下降：Flesch阅读轻松度从1987年的约24降至2024年的13，耸人听闻语言在2015-2024年间增长约50%。2) 标题中缩写密度从1987年每100词0.33升至2024年的3.21，约89%的缩写使用不足十次。3) 可读性更高的论文引用更多，表明可读性与影响力正相关。4) LLM评分与经典指标存在分歧。

Conclusion: 为优化人类读者体验，提出了七项标准：缩写预算与术语列表、人类可读性阈值、更严格的引用标准、独立可视化元素、通俗语言摘要、预注册缩写词汇表、开源审计工具。

Abstract: Machine learning research has grown exponentially while its communication norms have not. We argue NeurIPS should adopt explicit, measurable writing standards. We analyze 2.8 million arXiv papers (1991-2025), 24,772 NeurIPS papers (1987-2024), and 24.5 million PubMed papers (1990-2025), applying classical readability scores, the Hohmann writing style suite (including sensational language), acronym density and reuse, an LLM as judge readability protocol, and citations from OpenAlex and Semantic Scholar. Four patterns emerge. First, NeurIPS abstracts score harder to read on every classical readability metric: Flesch Reading Ease falls from about 24 in 1987 to 13 in 2024, and sensational language rises by about 50 percent in NeurIPS abstracts between 2015 and 2024. Second, acronym density in NeurIPS titles has grown from 0.33 per 100 words in 1987 to 3.21 in 2024, and about 89 percent of NeurIPS acronyms are used fewer than ten times, ten points above the science-wide baseline. Third, more readable NeurIPS papers tend to receive more citations, suggesting readability and impact are correlated and that less readable papers risk remaining fragmented. LLM as judge scores rate NeurIPS abstracts as roughly stable from 1987 to 2022, with early signs of improvement thereafter, a pattern that disagrees with every classical readability metric and raises a design question for enforcement: is the target reader a human or an LLM? Lastly, NeurIPS volume has grown roughly 50-fold between 1987 and 2024. Assuming the goal is to optimise for human readers, we propose seven standards NeurIPS could pilot at NeurIPS 2027: an acronym budget with a venue-approved term list, a human readability threshold, stricter citation standards, standalone visual elements, a plain language summary, a pre-registered acronym glossary, and open source audit tooling.

</details>


### [426] [Bilinear autoencoders find interpretable manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08891)
*Thomas Dooms,Ward Gauderis,Geraint Wiggins,Jose Oramas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出用双线性自编码器（二次潜变量）替代线性稀疏自编码器，以捕捉神经网络中流形结构的概念，在保持数学可解释性的同时显著提升重构性能，并通过可视化工具展示了非线性表示的必要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有线性稀疏自编码器只能捕获线性子空间中的概念，但真实神经网络中的突出概念往往分布在流形上，线性方法无法有效捕捉，需要事后分析才能理解。

Method: 采用双线性自编码器实现二次潜变量，将激活分解为低秩二次形式，在权重空间中保持线性组合，并支持与输入无关的几何分析。

Result: 实验发现多维几何结构普遍存在，复合潜变量能很好捕捉这些结构，显著改善语言模型的重构误差；不同几何先验的自编码器虽字典条目不同，但恢复出相同的输入子空间。

Conclusion: 这是向非线性但数学上可处理的潜在表示迈出的一步，其组合既具表达力又天然可解释，同时挑战了线性表示假说。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoders have become a standard tool for uncovering interpretable latent representations in neural networks. Yet salient concepts often span manifolds that current linear methods cannot capture without post hoc analysis. This paper uses quadratic latents to close this gap: we implement these with bilinear autoencoders, which decompose activations into low-rank quadratic forms, compose linearly in weight space, and admit input-independent geometric analysis. This qualitative difference in what concepts quadratic latents can detect challenges the standard linear representation hypothesis. Our experiments and visualisations show that multi-dimensional geometries are highly prevalent and that composite latents capture them well, systematically improving reconstruction error in language models. Furthermore, we show that autoencoders with varying geometric priors recover the same input subspace despite their dictionary entries being distinct. Practically, these models serve as an unsupervised tool for manifold discovery, which we demonstrate through an interactive online visualizer for Qwen 3.5. This is a step toward nonlinear but mathematically tractable latent representations whose composition is expressive and interpretable by design.

</details>


### [427] [Shapley Regression for Rare Disease Diagnosis Support: a case study on APDS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08897)
*Safa Alsaidi,Tomás Brogueira,Nizar Mahlaoui,Marc Vincent,Guilherme Pelegrina,Nicolas Garcelon,Adrien Coulet,Miguel Couceiro*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Shapley回归模型，通过k-additive合作博弈替代线性预测器，在保持逻辑回归透明性的同时建模症状共现模式，应用于APDS罕见病的诊断，在8个生物医学数据集和222名患者队列中验证了其有效性和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: APDS是一种症状高度异质、诊断常被延迟的罕见遗传免疫疾病。传统线性评分系统无法捕捉复杂症状交互，深度学习模型虽表达力强但缺乏可解释性。需要一种既能建模症状共现、又保持透明度的数据驱动方法，以辅助早期识别。

Method: 提出Shapley回归模型，用k-additive合作博弈替代线性预测器，显式建模症状共现模式，同时保持逻辑回归的凸性和可解释性。采用L2正则化的2-additive模型，在8个公开生物医学数据集和222名APDS患者队列上进行实证研究。

Result: 2-additive模型结合L2正则化在预测能力与抗噪鲁棒性之间达到最优平衡。在222名患者队列中，Shapley回归准确区分APDS病例与匹配对照，验证了已知的APDS相关表型，并发现了临床专家确认的症状间成对交互作用。

Conclusion: Shapley回归通过显式建模症状间的成对交互作用，在保持高可解释性的同时提升了预测性能，为APDS等罕见病的早期识别提供了一种兼具表现力和透明度的有效工具。

Abstract: Activated PI3K8 Syndrome (APDS) is a rare genetic immune disorder caused by variants in PIK3CD or PIK3R1, with highly heterogeneous symptoms that often delay diagnosis. Early recognition is hampered by overlapping clinical presentations and limited clinician awareness, motivating systematic, data-driven approaches to detect APDS-associated phenotypic patterns in routine electronic health records. Traditional linear scoring systems cannot capture complex symptom interactions, while deep learning models, though expressive, often lack interpretability. To bridge this gap, we propose Shapley regression, a novel game-theoretic model replacing the linear predictor with a k-additive cooperative game, explicitly modeling co-occurrence of symptoms while maintaining the transparency and convexity of logistic regression. We carry out an empirical study of our lightweight method on eight public biomedical datasets, showing that a 2-additive model with $l_{2}$ regularization achieves an optimal trade-off between predictive power and noise robustness. We also apply it to a real-world cohort of 222 patients, on which Shapley regression accurately distinguished APDS cases from matched controls, confirming and validating phenotypes known to be associated with APDS, and facilitating the exploration of pairwise interactions between symptoms, validated by clinical experts.

</details>


### [428] [Non-Monotonic Latency in Apple MPS Decoding: KV Cache Interactions and Execution Regimes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08913)
*Willy Fitra Hendria*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现Apple MPS后端在自回归推理中存在非单调的延迟异常，某些解码配置下延迟突增高达21倍，而相邻配置却恢复正常，CPU和NVIDIA T4则表现正常。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示Apple MPS后端在自回归推理中存在的非单调延迟异常现象，提醒研究者注意硬件感知评估的重要性，避免依赖聚合解码预算基准测试带来的误导。

Method: 在多种Transformer模型家族（GPT-2、BLOOM、OPT）上测量Apple MPS后端的延迟，与CPU和NVIDIA T4 (CUDA)进行对比，并通过控制实验排除内存压力和预填充成本的影响。

Result: Apple MPS后端在特定解码预算区间内出现高达21倍的延迟尖峰，相邻配置延迟恢复正常；CPU和NVIDIA T4在相同条件下呈现平滑单调缩放。

Conclusion: 自回归推理的性能可能在后端执行动态的影响下呈现不连续性，强调了硬件感知评估的必要性，警示聚合解码预算基准测试的潜在风险。

Abstract: Autoregressive inference is typically assumed to scale predictably with decoding length, and key-value (KV) caching is widely regarded as a universally beneficial optimization for accelerating decoding. In this work, we identify unexpected non-monotonic latency behavior in the Apple MPS backend, where latency changes abruptly across nearby decoding configurations. Using transformer models from multiple families (GPT-2, BLOOM, and OPT), we observe latency spikes of up to 21x within specific decoding-budget intervals, followed by recovery at neighboring configurations. Controlled experiments show that these anomalies are not explained by memory pressure or prefill cost, but are instead consistent with backend execution dynamics, while CPU and NVIDIA T4 (CUDA) exhibit smooth monotonic scaling under identical conditions. Our findings highlight the importance of hardware-aware evaluation for autoregressive inference and caution against relying on aggregated decoding-budget benchmarks, as performance can vary discontinuously across nearby configurations.

</details>


### [429] [Transformer autoencoder with local attention for sparse and irregular time series with application on risk estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08914)
*Panteleimon Rodis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于局部注意力Transformer自编码器的框架，用于处理稀疏不规则时间序列的风险估计问题，并在希腊电力系统非技术损失（窃电）检测任务中验证了其有效性，相比现有方法取得了更高的召回率和精确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电力系统中的非技术损失（主要是窃电）检测面临数据采集稀疏且不规则的挑战，传统风险估计方法难以有效捕获长距离依赖关系并稳健处理此类数据特性，亟需一种能适应稀疏不规则时间序列的鲁棒风险估计方法。

Method: 提出基于局部注意力机制的Transformer自编码器框架，结合传统数据清洗与归一化方法，利用局部注意力的判别能力从稀疏不规则的序列中高效捕获相关模式，生成高判别性的潜在特征用于风险估计。

Result: 在希腊大规模电力系统真实案例中，该方法相比现有最先进方法生成了更具判别性的潜在特征，在风险估计上表现更一致，实现了高召回率和高精确率。

Conclusion: 该框架为不规则时间序列中的风险检测提供了一种鲁棒且有效的工具，尤其适用于数据稀疏和不规则的场景。

Abstract: This paper introduces a framework specifically designed for sparse and irregular time series {risk estimation}. It is based on a Transformer Autoencoder with local attention, which leverages the powerful pattern identification capabilities of transformers complemented by traditional data cleaning and normalization methods. It efficiently captures relevant patterns within irregular sequences suffering from sparse data collection, benefiting from the discriminative ability of the local attention mechanism. The proposed framework is applied to a real-world case study, on the risk estimation of non-technical losses in electrical power systems in a wide area in Greece. Non-technical losses in electrical power systems, primarily stemming from electricity theft, pose significant economic and operational challenges. Detecting these anomalies is particularly challenging due to the inherent sparse and irregular nature of real-world data collection practices. Traditional risk estimation methods struggle with effectively capturing long-range dependencies and robustly handling such data characteristics. We demonstrate that our approach effectively yields highly discriminative latent features, which results in more consistent risk estimation compared with existing state-of-the-art and widely used methods. It achieves high recall and precision, meeting the critical objectives of the problem. As such, our solution offers a robust and effective tool for risk detection in irregular time series datasets.

</details>


### [430] [Physics-Informed Neural PDE Solvers via Spatio-Temporal MeanFlow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08915)
*Hanru Bai,Yuncheng Zhou,Difan Zou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 Spatio-Temporal MeanFlow，一种受 MeanFlow 启发的连续时间 PDE 求解器，通过将生成速度场替换为物理 PDE 算子，将多步数值积分转化为可控积分长度的单步预测，并在时空域施加积分约束，统一处理时变和稳态 PDE，在精度、推理效率及泛化能力上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度 PDE 求解方法（如 PINNs、神经算子）难以捕捉物理系统的连续积分本质，要么依赖点态残差忽略积分视角，要么依赖预离散的时间网格，缺乏对时间演化的连续建模能力。

Method: 借鉴 MeanFlow 的连续时间积分思想，将生成速度场替换为物理 PDE 算子，将多步数值积分转化为具有自由可控积分长度的单步预测；将约束从单纯的时间域扩展到时空域，耦合时间演化与空间一致性，形成统一框架。

Result: 在基准测试上，该方法在精度和推理效率上均优于代表性基线；提出的积分约束使模型在分布外初始条件和不同空间分辨率下具备出色的泛化能力。

Conclusion: Spatio-Temporal MeanFlow 是一种高效、精确且泛化能力强的 PDE 求解新范式，能够统一处理时变和稳态问题，弥补了现有方法在连续积分建模方面的不足。

Abstract: Deep learning paradigms, such as PINNs and neural operators, have significantly advanced the solving of PDEs. However, they often struggle to capture the continuous integral nature of physical systems, relying either on pointwise residuals that ignore the integral perspective or on pre-discretized temporal grids. Drawing inspiration from MeanFlow, a continuous-time integrator recently developed to efficiently solve generative ODEs, we introduce Spatio-Temporal MeanFlow, which functions as a novel PDE solver learning the finite-interval evolution of physical states. By substituting the generative velocity field with the physical PDE operator, we transform multi-step numerical integration into an efficient prediction with a freely controllable integration length. Crucially, we extend the original MeanFlow constraint from the temporal to the spatio-temporal domain, coupling time evolution with spatial consistency. This yields a unified framework naturally accommodating both time-dependent and stationary PDEs. Comprehensive experiments on benchmarks demonstrate that our approach achieves superior accuracy and inference efficiency over representative baselines. Furthermore, the proposed integral constraint enables excellent generalization to out-of-distribution initial conditions and varying spatial resolutions.

</details>


### [431] [When and Why Grouping Attention Heads Accelerates Muon Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08933)
*Hongtao Zhang,Wenjie Zhou,Wei Chen,Xueqi Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究Muon优化器在多头部注意力中的粒度匹配问题，提出Group Muon方法，通过分组更新在组内白化增益和分组范数代价之间取得平衡，在GPT-2 Small训练中优于全矩阵和单头两种极端方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muon优化器对矩阵进行正交化更新，但多头注意力机制在头部粒度上运作，这种粒度不匹配促使研究者探索Muon应作用于完整注意力投影、单个头还是中间头组。

Method: 通过一步下降比较全矩阵Muon和分组Muon的理论分析，揭示分组白化增益与分组范数代价之间的权衡，据此提出Group Muon，将头组大小和分组规则作为优化器超参数。

Result: 在FineWeb上训练GPT-2 Small时，适当的分组策略在验证损失上优于全QKV Muon和完全头级别的MuonSplit。

Conclusion: 分组Muon通过调节粒度可在两种极端方案之间取得更优性能，表明优化器与模型结构的粒度对齐是值得关注的设计维度。

Abstract: Muon orthogonalizes matrix updates, but multi-head attention naturally operates at the level of heads. This granularity mismatch raises the question of whether Muon should be applied to the full attention projection, to individual heads, or to intermediate head groups. We study this question through a one-step descent comparison between full-matrix Muon and group-wise Muon. Our analysis reveals a trade-off between the \textbf{group-wise whitening gain} from group-wise updates and the \textbf{grouping-induced norm cost}, an additional update-norm cost caused by replacing full-matrix whitening with group-wise whitening. Motivated by this trade-off, we propose \textbf{Group Muon}, which treats head group size and grouping rule as optimizer hyperparameters. On GPT-2 Small trained on FineWeb, appropriate grouping improves validation loss over both full-QKV Muon and fully head-wise MuonSplit.

</details>


### [432] [From Mechanistic to Compositional Interpretability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08934)
*Ward Gauderis,Thomas Dooms,Steven T. Holmer,Kola Ayonrinde,Geraint A. Wiggins*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于范畴论的形式化框架——组合可解释性，将机械可解释性转化为可度量、可优化的约束满足问题，并证明语法压缩可保证更简洁、更符合人类认知的解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的机械可解释性方法缺乏形式化框架，导致解释无法被客观验证、比较和组合。

Method: 引入范畴论，定义语法和语义的交换映射（commuting mappings），将解释质量分解为忠实度（faithfulness）和复杂度（complexity）两个度量，并提出压缩精炼（compressive refinement）来系统性地重构模型为更简单的组成部分。

Result: 证明了简约准则（parsimony criterion），即语法压缩理论上能保证产生更简洁、更符合人类理解的解释；并将现有机械可解释方法定位为精炼的子类。

Conclusion: 该工作为机械解释的自动发现和评估提供了可度量、可优化的形式化基础。

Abstract: Mechanistic interpretability aims to explain neural model behaviour by reverse-engineering learned computational structure into human-understandable components. Without a formal framework, however, mechanistic explanations cannot be objectively verified, compared, or composed. We introduce compositional interpretability, a category-theoretic framework grounded in the principles of compositionality and minimum description length. Compositional interpretations are pairs of syntactic and semantic mappings that must commute to enforce consistency between a model's decomposition and its observed behaviour. We deconstruct explanation quality into measures of faithfulness and complexity to cast interpretability as a constrained optimisation problem, and introduce compressive refinement to systematically restructure models into simpler parts without altering their function. Finally, we prove a parsimony criterion under which syntactic compression theoretically guarantees more concise, human-aligned explanations. Our framework situates prominent mechanistic methods as subclasses of refinement, and clarifies why their compressibility heuristics tend to align with human interpretability. Our work provides a measurable, optimisable foundation for automating the discovery and evaluation of mechanistic explanations.

</details>


### [433] [A Single Deep Preference-Conditioned Policy for Learning Pareto Coverage Sets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08946)
*Akihiro Kubo,Kosuke Nakanishi,Shin Ishii*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了基于偏好条件化的多目标强化学习中，使用光滑Tchebycheff标量化方法时偏好与解之间的唯一性和连续性。证明了每个偏好对应唯一的Pareto最优返回向量且满足Lipschitz连续性，并提出了CMDPI算法及其深度实现，在多个基准任务上取得了最优结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在非线性标量化下，偏好与解之间的唯一性和连续性尚未明确，缺乏理论基础来支持偏好扫描以实现密集Pareto前沿覆盖。

Method: 1. 在表格型MDP中使用光滑Tchebycheff标量化，证明了偏好诱导唯一且Lipschitz连续的Pareto最优返回向量；2. 提出基于占有度量的Concave Mirror Descent Policy Iteration (CMDPI)算法，具有O(1/k)的次优性率；3. 将更新等价于以旧策略为参考的KL正则化MDP，给出策略迭代解释；4. 实现深度actor-critic版本，保留前策略正则化。

Result: 在8个MO-Gymnasium任务中，该方法在平均hypervolume排名上优于近期基线方法，且在期望效用方面表现强劲；在连续控制实验中表现优于离散动作场景。

Conclusion: 为偏好扫描提供理论基础，提出的算法在多目标强化学习任务上表现优异，且理论保障完备。

Abstract: Preference-conditioned multi-objective reinforcement learning aims to learn a single policy that captures trade-offs across preferences, but under nonlinear scalarization the uniqueness and continuity of the preference-to-solution correspondence remain unclear. We study this problem in tabular multi-objective Markov decision processes (MDPs) using smooth Tchebycheff scalarization as a monotone utility. Under mild interior conditions on the preference set, we prove that each preference induces a unique Pareto-optimal return vector and that this vector depends Lipschitz-continuously on the preference, providing a principled foundation for preference sweeping toward dense Pareto-front coverage. To compute these targets, we formulate the problem over occupancy measures and derive Concave Mirror Descent Policy Iteration (CMDPI), which achieves an $O(1/k)$ objective-suboptimality rate. We further show that each update is equivalent to solving a Kullback-Leibler-regularized MDP with the previous policy as reference, yielding a policy-iteration interpretation and finite-iterate policy continuity across preferences. We instantiate the update as a deep actor-critic algorithm preserving previous-policy regularization. On eight MO-Gymnasium tasks, it achieves the best average hypervolume rank among recent baselines and strong expected-utility performance. Continuous-control experiments indicate gains beyond the discrete-action setting.

</details>


### [434] [Muon-OGD: Muon-based Spectral Orthogonal Gradient Projection for LLM Continual Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08949)
*Binghang Lu,Zheyuan Deng,Runyu Zhang,Bing Hu,Yunhan Zhao,Yuan Tian,Changhong Mou,Guang Lin,Xiaomin Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Muon-OGD 是一个基于谱范数的持续学习方法，通过将 Muon 优化器风格的正交化矩阵更新与投影约束结合，解决 LLM 持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，在 TRACE 等基准上优于传统基于 Frobenius 范数的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于投影的持续学习方法大多采用 Euclidean 参数几何（Frobenius 范数）来约束更新方向，但 Muon 优化器的成功表明谱范数几何对矩阵参数可能更有效，因此作者探索将谱范数意识引入持续学习的投影约束中。

Method: 提出 Muon-OGD 框架：将每次更新形式化为谱范数约束下的优化问题，加入线性非干扰约束；通过对偶迭代和 Newton-Schulz 矩阵符号近似高效求解；应用正交化的动量更新，避免与先前任务相关的保护方向。

Result: 在 TRACE 基准和 Coding-Math-Medical 课程上，使用 encoder-decoder 和 decoder-only 两种架构进行评估，Muon-OGD 一致优于顺序微调和竞争性的正交梯度基线，且计算上可扩展。

Conclusion: 谱范数意识的更新几何为 LLM 持续学习提供了一种实用且有效的替代方案，优于传统的 Frobenius 范数投影方法。

Abstract: A central challenge in continual learning for large language models (LLMs) is catastrophic forgetting, where adapting to new tasks can substantially degrade performance on previously learned ones. Existing projection-based methods mitigate such interference by restricting parameter updates to subspaces that are orthogonal to directions associated with past tasks. However, these methods are typically formulated under Euclidean parameter geometry, with update magnitudes and projections governed by the Frobenius norm. The recent empirical success of the Muon optimizer, which applies orthogonalized matrix updates and admits a spectral-norm interpretation, suggests that Frobenius geometry may not be the most effective choice for matrix-valued LLM parameters. Motivated by this observation, we propose Muon-OGD, a spectral-norm-aware continual learning framework that integrates Muon-style operator-norm geometry with orthogonal projection constraints. Our method formulates each update as a spectral-norm-constrained optimization problem with linear non-interference constraints, and solves it efficiently through dual iterations and Newton--Schulz matrix-sign approximations. By applying orthogonalized momentum updates that avoid protected directions associated with prior tasks, Muon-OGD aims to improve the stability--plasticity trade-off in sequential LLM adaptation. We evaluate the proposed method on standard continual learning benchmarks, TRACE, and domain-specific Coding--Math--Medical curricula using both encoder--decoder and decoder-only architectures. Empirically, Muon-OGD consistently improves over sequential fine-tuning and competitive orthogonal-gradient baselines, while remaining computationally scalable. These results suggest that spectral-norm-aware update geometry provides a practical and effective alternative to Frobenius-norm projection for continual learning in LLMs.

</details>


### [435] [MolWorld: Molecule World Models for Actionable Molecular Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08954)
*Yang Qiao,Bo Pan,Hao-Wei Pang,Peter Zhiping Zhang,Liying Zhang,Liang Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MolWorld框架，通过分子转移图的序列扩展来实现可操作（从已知分子可通过局部结构变换到达）的分子优化，在保持高性质得分的同时维持强结构连通性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分子优化方法仅追求高预测得分，忽略了候选分子需要从已知分子通过有效局部变换可达（即"可操作性"），导致优化结果难以在真实药物发现中落地。

Method: 将可操作分子优化形式化为分子转移图的序列扩展；提出MolWorld框架，包含：选择局部锚定上下文、生成候选分子、评估性质、利用学习的世界模型更新分子转移图。

Result: 在性质优化和对接任务上，MolWorld发现高性质分子的同时保持了显著更强的结构连通性。

Conclusion: MolWorld支持可操作的、序列性的分子设计，弥补了现有方法忽视分子可达性的关键缺陷。

Abstract: Molecular optimization in drug discovery aims to discover molecules with improved target properties, but practical lead optimization often requires more than high predicted scores. A useful candidate should also be actionable: it should be reachable from known molecules through valid local structural transformations, so that it can be interpreted as a plausible revision within an evolving chemical series. Existing de novo and single-molecule optimization methods do not explicitly model such reachability, especially when both the target molecules and the intermediate molecules connecting them to known compounds are unknown. In this work, we formulate actionable molecular optimization as sequential expansion of a molecule-transfer graph, where nodes are molecules and edges encode valid local transformations. We propose MolWorld, a molecule world model-guided framework that treats the current molecule-transfer graph as an evolving search state. At each iteration, MolWorld selects local anchor contexts, generates candidate molecules conditioned on these contexts, evaluates their properties, and uses a learned world model to update the evolving molecule world by retaining admissible candidates and inserting them into the molecule-transfer graph. The expanded molecule world then guides subsequent optimization. Experiments on property optimization and docking-based tasks show that MolWorld discovers high-property molecules while maintaining substantially stronger structural connectivity, supporting actionable and sequential molecular design.

</details>


### [436] [Outlier detection for patient monitoring and alerting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08955)
*Miloš Hauskrecht,Iyad Batal,Michal Valko,Shyam Visweswaran,Gregory F. Cooper,Gilles Clermont*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的方法，通过分析电子健康记录（EHR）中既往病例，检测异常的患者管理决策，并基于专家评估验证了该方法在识别潜在错误方面具有较高的真警报率（25%-66%），其中最强异常案例的真警报率达66%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的患者管理错误检测依赖于人为审查或规则系统，效率低且漏报率高。作者假设：与历史病例差异显著的异常决策可能暗示医疗错误，因此值得自动生成警报。

Method: 利用4486名心脏术后患者的EHR数据，通过数据驱动的方式识别异常患者管理决策（离群点），并从中生成222条警报。邀请专家小组对这些警报进行真/假阳性评估。

Result: 专家评估显示，真警报率在25%至66%之间波动，且异常程度最强的决策对应最高的真警报率（66%），验证了离群点警报策略的有效性。

Conclusion: 基于离群点的异常检测方法能够有效识别潜在的患者管理错误，尤其针对强异常病例具有较高的准确率，有望作为临床决策支持的有力工具。

Abstract: We develop and evaluate a data-driven approach for detecting unusual (anomalous) patient-management decisions using past patient cases stored in electronic health records (EHRs). Our hypothesis is that a patient-management decision that is unusual with respect to past patient care may be due to an error and that it is worthwhile to generate an alert if such a decision is encountered. We evaluate this hypothesis using data obtained from EHRs of 4486 post-cardiac surgical patients and a subset of 222 alerts generated from the data. We base the evaluation on the opinions of a panel of experts. The results of the study support our hypothesis that the outlier-based alerting can lead to promising true alert rates. We observed true alert rates that ranged from 25\% to 66\% for a variety of patient-management actions, with 66\% corresponding to the strongest outliers.

</details>


### [437] [Learning predictive models for combinations of heterogeneous proteomic data sources](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08958)
*Michal Valko,Richard Pelikan,Miloš Hauskrecht*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了两种蛋白质表达测量技术（质谱分析和蛋白质芯片）在胰腺癌检测中的单独与联合效用，发现现有分类模型在单一数据集上表现良好但在联合数据集上失效，并提出了专门的模型融合方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着多种蛋白质表达测量技术的发展，研究者需要评估不同技术生成的数据各自以及联合使用的价值，以更好地检测和理解疾病。

Method: 使用胰腺癌研究数据，对两种异质性数据源（质谱分析和蛋白质芯片）分别及联合构建分类模型，分析其性能差异，并提出针对性的模型融合方法。

Result: 在单一数据集上表现良好的分类模型，在联合两种异质性数据集时失效；通过所提出的模型融合方法可以有效利用两者组合的优势。

Conclusion: 不同蛋白质测量技术的数据具有互补价值，但需要专门设计的融合方法才能有效整合，简单拼接模型会导致性能下降。

Abstract: Multiple technologies that measure expression levels of protein mixtures in the human body offer a potential for detection and understanding the disease. The recent increase of these technologies prompts researchers to evaluate the individual and combined utility of data generated by the technologies. In this work, we study two data sources to measure the expression of protein mixtures in the human body: whole-sample MS profiling and multiplexed protein arrays. We investigate the individual and combined utility of these technologies by learning and testing a variety of classification models on the data from a pancreatic cancer study. We show that for the combination of these two (heterogeneous) datasets, classification models that work well on one of them individually fail on the combination of the two datasets. We study and propose a class of model fusion methods that acknowledge the differences and try to reap most of the benefits from their combination.

</details>


### [438] [Trustworthy AI: Ensuring Reliability and Accountability from Models to Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08964)
*Carol Xuan Long*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本论文开发了具有理论保证的算法，用于确保机器学习系统的可靠性和问责性，涵盖传统ML模型的偏差缓解、生成式AI的水印技术，以及LLM驱动的自主智能体评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着ML系统从预测模型演变为生成模型和自主智能体，可信AI的格局发生了变化，需要新的理论工具来确保可靠性和问责性。

Method: 采用基于核的方法实现跨复杂子群体的多准确度；利用最优传输和编码理论推导最优水印策略；构建首个完全LLM驱动的供应链模拟器。

Result: 水印方法在检测质量权衡上表现优越；LLM智能体性能优于人类团队，成本降低高达67%，但存在系统性风险（尾部事件）。

Conclusion: 论文从信息论、优化和统计学习角度为可信AI提供了理论工具，在偏差缓解、内容溯源和自主智能体评估方面取得了进展。

Abstract: In this thesis, we develop algorithms with theoretical guarantees for ensuring reliability and accountability of Machine Learning (ML) systems. As ML systems evolve from predictive models to generative models and autonomous agents, the landscape of trustworthy AI has shifted. This thesis introduces tools grounded in information theory, optimization, and statistical learning to mitigate bias, reduce arbitrary decisions, ensure content provenance, and evaluate LLM-driven agents in autonomous settings. Towards mitigating bias and arbitrariness in traditional ML models, we introduce a kernel-based method to achieve multiaccuracy across complex subpopulations that traditional demographic categories may overlook. We also develop methods to address predictive multiplicity, where equally accurate models yield conflicting individual predictions. We ensure the accountability in generative AI through watermarking large language models (LLMs). We characterize the information-theoretic trade-off between watermark detection and text distortion and derive optimal watermarking strategies by leveraging optimal transport and coding theory. Empirical evaluations show our watermarks achieve a superior detection-quality tradeoff across language generation and coding tasks. Finally, we evaluate autonomous LLM agents in multi-agent environments through the first simulator of a fully LLM-driven supply chain. LLM agents offer significant performance gains, outperforming human teams and reducing costs by up to 67%, but also introduce systemic risks, including costly tail events.

</details>


### [439] [VORT: Adaptive Power-Law Memory for NLP Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08966)
*Nabil Mlaiki*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出VORT，一种基于分数阶Grünwald-Letnikov幂律记忆核的Transformer架构，通过指数和（SOE）分解实现高效递归计算，在长程依赖任务上优于标准Transformer。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准Transformer对远距离token施加近似指数衰减，与自然语言中长程依赖的幂律结构相冲突。作者希望设计一种能匹配自然语言幂律长程依赖的记忆架构。

Method: 为每个输入token分配可学习的分数阶α_i∈[δ,1]，控制Grünwald-Letnikov幂律保留核；利用Gauss-Laguerre求积将非马尔可夫的分数加权和分解为指数和（SOE），每个指数分量支持O(Sd_v)一步马尔可夫递归；检索通过线性注意力累加器实现。

Result: 建立了四个理论结果：SOE逼近定理（几何收敛率）、量化界、L²能量论证（α>1/2时误差发散）、梯度塑性规则的线性收敛。两个合成实验（Zipf分布检索、实体标签复制）验证了架构优势。

Conclusion: VORT通过可学习的分数阶核和SOE分解，在理论上和实验上证明了比标准Transformer更好地建模幂律长程依赖，且非先验匹配效应所致。

Abstract: Standard Transformers impose near-exponential decay on the influence of distant tokens, conflicting with the power-law structure of long-range dependencies in natural language. We introduce the \emph{Variable-Order Retention Transformer} (\VORT{}), a memory architecture in which each ingested token is assigned a learnable fractional order α_i\in[δ,1] that governs a Grünwald--Letnikov power-law retention kernel. Because the fractional weighted sum is non-Markovian, we approximate it through a sum-of-exponentials (SOE) decomposition computed by Gauss--Laguerre quadrature on a Laplace-type integral representation of the kernel weights. Each exponential component admits a one-step Markovian recurrence at O(Sd_v) per step, where S=O(\log(T/\varepsilon)) terms suffice for \varepsilon-uniform accuracy on horizon [1,T]. Retrieval is keyed and associative via a linear-attention accumulator with an exact O(KSd_φd_v) -per-step recurrence. Four results are established: (i) an SOE approximation theorem with geometric convergence rate from the analyticity of the integrand after a log-change of variables; (ii) a quantisation bound valid on [δ,1] with correct analysis near α=0; (iii) a direct L^2 energy argument (Proposition) showing that for α>1/2 any mixture with fixed minimum decay rate Λ>0 incurs L^2([1,T]) error at least N_α(T)-C(Λ)\to\infty, with the Λ-dependence made explicit; and (iv) linear convergence of a gradient plasticity rule under the Polyak--Łojasiewicz condition. Two synthetic experiments confirm the architectural advantage: a Zipf-distributed retrieval benchmark and an entity label-copy task with uniform lag distribution, the latter ruling out prior-matching as an explanation for the power-law kernel's advantage.

</details>


### [440] [PMCTS: Particle Monte Carlo Tree Search for Principled Parallelized Inference Time Scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08982)
*Yaniv Oren,Viliam Vadocz,Joery A. de Vries,Wendelin Böhmer,Matthijs T. J. Spaan,Hendrik Baier*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Particle MCTS (PMCTS)的并行蒙特卡洛树搜索算法，这是首个适用于神经网络评估且能保持形式化策略改进保证的并行MCTS算法。实验表明PMCTS在并行计算下扩展性良好，并在多个领域显著优于基于启发式的基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MCTS由于搜索的顺序性和确定性，在并行计算下的运行时扩展性面临重大挑战，现有方法缺乏原则性且难以与神经网络评估兼容。

Method: 提出Particle MCTS (PMCTS)，一种原则性的并行MCTS算法，设计上兼容神经网络评估，并保持形式化的策略改进保证。

Result: PMCTS在并行计算下具有良好的扩展性，并在多个领域显著优于流行的基于启发式的基线方法。

Conclusion: PMCTS是首个兼顾原则性、神经网络兼容性以及策略改进保证的并行MCTS方法，在实用性和理论保证之间取得了良好平衡。

Abstract: Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is a widely used approach for policy improvement through search with increasing popularity for real world applications. Due to the sequential and deterministic nature of its search, runtime-scaling of MCTS with parallel compute remains a major challenge. We introduce Particle MCTS (PMCTS), to our knowledge the first principled parallel MCTS algorithm which is suited for neural network evaluations and can preserve formal policy improvement guarantees. Empirically, PMCTS scales well with parallel compute and significantly outperforms the popular heuristic-based baselines across domains.

</details>


### [441] [Benchmarking Compositional Generalisation for Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08988)
*Amir Masoud Nourollah,Irtaza Khalid,Stefano Leoni,Steven Schockaert*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个评估机器学习原子间势能模型组合泛化能力的基准，包含四项任务，发现现有最先进模型在组合泛化上表现很差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究机器学习原子间势能模型是否真正学习了化学的组合结构（分子片段及其组合决定性质），还是仅仅在插值训练样本中的模式。现有方法虽能高精度预测原子间力，但泛化到未见分子的能力尚不明确。

Method: 提出了一个由四项任务组成的基准测试，每项任务要求模型在训练时未见过的分子上进行测试，但训练数据选择上保证如果模型真正学到了物理原理，应该能泛化到测试样本。

Result: 最先进的模型在这些任务上表现极差，分布外样本上的误差通常比分布内样本高一个数量级，即使是经过数百万分子预训练的基座模型也是如此。

Conclusion: 当前机器学习原子间势能模型在组合泛化方面存在严重不足，它们可能更多是在插值训练数据而非真正学习化学组合结构，这项工作为推动模型向真正的物理理解方向发展提供了重要基准。

Abstract: Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials play a fundamental role in computational chemistry and materials science, enabling applications from molecular dynamics simulations to drug design and materials discovery. While recent approaches can estimate inter-atomic forces with high precision, it remains unclear to what extent they can generalise to previously unseen molecules. Do they learn the compositional structure of chemistry, capturing how molecular fragments and their combinations determine properties, or do they primarily learn to interpolate patterns that are specific to the training examples? To address this question, we propose a benchmark consisting of four tasks that require some form of compositional generalisation. In each task, models are tested on molecules that were unseen during training, but the training data is chosen such that generalisation to the test examples should be feasible for models that learn the underlying physical principles.
