Our empirical analysis shows that the considered tasks are highly challenging for state-of-the-art models, with errors on out-of-distribution examples often an order of magnitude higher than on in-distribution examples, even when using foundation models that have been pre-trained on millions of molecules.

</details>


### [442] [When More Parameters Hurt: Foundation Model Priors Amplify Worst-Client Disparity Under Extreme Federated Heterogeneity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08992)
*Kiran Naseer,Umar Shoaib*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现联邦学习中，大模型（如DistilBERT+LoRA）在极端异构数据下会加剧客户端性能不公平性（最差客户端准确率差距达50.1%），而小模型（TextCNN）反而表现更公平。这种"大模型公平性悖论"在中等异构程度下消失。简单的聚合重加权无法解决该问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 社区普遍认为大规模预训练在联邦学习中能提升所有客户端性能，但作者质疑这一假设在极端数据异构场景下是否成立，尤其是对最弱势的客户端是否反而有害。

Method: 在联邦文本分类任务上，对比TextCNN（2.7M参数）和DistilBERT+LoRA（66M参数）在四种Non-IID异构程度下的表现，重点考察最差客户端准确率。同时测试逆权重LoRA聚合方法（FedAvgW）的效果。

Result: 极端标签倾斜（alpha=0.1）下，DistilBERT+LoRA的最差客户端准确率差距达50.1%（比TextCNN的32.2%大56%）；中等异构（alpha>=0.5）时差距几乎消失；FedAvgW无法消除该差距。

Conclusion: 大模型在联邦学习极端异构场景下会加剧不公平性，需要设计专门保护少数群体客户端的机制，简单聚合重加权不足以解决该问题。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) is increasingly used to fine-tune foundation models (FMs) on distributed private data. The community largely assumes that large-scale pretraining serves as a 'rising tide that lifts all boats' in federated settings. However, our experiments reveal that these powerful priors can hinder rather than help the most disadvantaged clients under extreme heterogeneity. Through controlled experiments on federated text classification, we compare worst-client accuracy between TextCNN (2.7M parameters) and DistilBERT with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA, 66M parameters) across four Non-IID heterogeneity levels. Under extreme label skew (alpha = 0.1), DistilBERT+LoRA produces a worst-client accuracy gap of 50.1% -- 56% larger than TextCNN's 32.2% gap, despite having 25x more parameters and extensive pretraining. Under moderate heterogeneity (alpha >= 0.5), the pattern reverses: the FM nearly eliminates the gap. We call this the FM Fairness Paradox. We further show that an inverse-weighted LoRA aggregation method (FedAvgW) does not resolve the disparity, suggesting aggregation reweighting alone may be insufficient. Our results highlight the need for mechanisms that explicitly protect minority clients before deploying foundation models in high-stakes federated contexts such as healthcare and education.

</details>


### [443] [Machine Learning-Based Graph Simplification for Symbolic Accelerators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08996)
*Tiffany Yu,Rye Stahle-Smith,Darssan Eswaramoorthi,Rasha Karakchi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AutoSlim是一个基于机器学习的框架，通过随机森林分类器剪枝自动机图中的低影响节点和边，在FPGA上实现最高40%的资源节省，同时提升吞吐量和能效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于图的加速器（如NAPOLY+）存在内存使用过多和冗余图结构导致的效率低下问题，需要一种数据驱动的方法来优化硬件资源利用。

Method: 从历史图执行中提取特征，使用随机森林分类器识别并移除低影响的节点和边，并包含功能等价性验证步骤。

Result: 在NAPOLY+非确定性有限自动机覆盖架构上，FPGA资源使用减少高达40%，吞吐量和能效相应提升。

Conclusion: AutoSlim有效解决了硬件加速器中的冗余图结构问题，为硬件优化和安全领域提供了有前景的方向。

Abstract: Graph-based accelerators have been widely adopted in symbolic data processing applications such as genomics, cybersecurity, and artificial intelligence. However, these systems often suffer from excessive memory usage and inefficiencies stemming from redundant graph structures. We present AutoSlim, a machine learning-based framework that leverages data-driven methods to prune automata graphs for hardware accelerators. Using features extracted from prior graph executions and a Random Forest classifier, AutoSlim identifies and removes low-impact nodes and edges. When applied to a Non-deterministic Finite Automata overlay architecture (NAPOLY+), AutoSlim reduces FPGA resource usage by up to 40%, with corresponding improvements in throughput and power efficiency. The framework includes a verification step to ensure functional equivalence after pruning and suggests promising directions for both hardware optimization and security.

</details>


### [444] [Non-Parametric Rehearsal Learning via Conditional Mean Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08999)
*Wen-Bo Du,Tian-Zuo Wang,Han-Jia Ye,Zhi-Hua Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出首个非参数化排练学习方法，通过核技巧解决"避免不良未来"问题，无需假设线性系统或加性噪声等参数化形式，并在合成与半合成基准上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有排练学习方法依赖线性系统或加性噪声等限制性参数假设，实际应用受限。本文旨在突破这些假设，提出非参数化方法以适用于更广泛的数据生成过程。

Method: 利用核技巧将AUF目标转化为统一表示，解耦合意性建模与动作诱导分布变化；采用光滑Probit代理处理合意性指示器的非连续性并提供近似误差界；通过条件均值嵌入捕捉动作诱导变化，并开发基于核岭回归的嵌套估计器，具有一致性保证。

Result: 在合成数据和基于真实数据的半合成基准上，该方法在非线性系统和非加性噪声场景下表现优于现有方法，展示了有效性和灵活性。

Conclusion: 非参数化排练学习成功克服了参数假设限制，为AUF问题提供了更通用的解决方案，且理论上有近似误差界和一致性保证。

Abstract: In machine learning, a critical class of decision-related problems concerns preventing predicted undesirable outcomes, referred to as the \textit{avoiding undesired future} (AUF) problem. To address this, the \textit{rehearsal learning} framework has been proposed to model influence relations for effective decisions. However, existing rehearsal methods rely on restrictive parametric assumptions such as linear systems or additive noise, limiting their practical applicability. In this paper, we propose the first non-parametric rehearsal learning approach for AUF without assuming specific functional forms of data generation processes. Specifically, we use kernel machinery to reformulate the AUF objective into a unified representation that disentangles desirability modeling from action-induced distributional changes. To handle the discontinuity of desirability indicator, we present a smooth Probit surrogate and provide an approximation error bound. Meanwhile, we capture the action-induced changes via conditional mean embeddings, and develop a kernel ridge regression based nested estimator for AUF objective with consistency guarantees. Such a formulation naturally accommodates nonlinear systems and non-additive noise, and empirical results on synthetic and real-data-derived semi-synthetic benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and flexibility of our approach.

</details>


### [445] [Relative Kinetic Utility for Reasoning-Aware Structural Pruning in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09008)
*Tianhao Qian*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Relative Kinetic Utility (RKU)框架，通过连续动力学积分替代离散剪枝，解决高稀疏度下CoT推理崩溃问题，在40%稀疏度下GSM8K准确率达13.34%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于幅值的结构化剪枝方法存在"幅度陷阱"：过度关注高频率、低信息量的语法标记，导致高稀疏度（如40%）下推理能力崩溃。需要一种能保留高曲率逻辑路由路径的剪枝方法。

Method: 提出Relative Kinetic Utility (RKU)框架：基于交替梯度流(AGF)将离散剪枝提升为模型深度流形上的连续动力学积分，并引入Fisher迹归一化作为轻量级曲率感知正则化，以识别并保留负责高曲率逻辑路由的"动力学尖峰"结构通路。

Result: 在Qwen-2.5-7B和LLaMA-3-8B上验证，40%高稀疏度下RKU在GSM8K上达到13.34%准确率，优于最强基线；在分布外评估下能更好地保留推理相关表征。

Conclusion: RKU通过动力学视角克服了幅度陷阱导致的推理崩溃，为高稀疏度下保持LLM推理能力提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting symbolized a huge improvement of reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, scaling up test-time computation yields extensive CoT sequences, introducing severe inference latency and key-value (KV) cache memory bottlenecks. While structural pruning offers a fundamental, hardware-aware solution to alleviate static parameter burdens, existing magnitude-based methods may cut off the neurons of CoT: by over-indexing on discrete cross-entropy objectives, these heuristics fall into a \textit{magnitude trap}: they prioritize high-frequency, low-information syntactic tokens and trigger a disappointing reasoning collapse at high sparsities (e.g., 40\%). To overcome this topological phase transition, we propose \textsc{Relative Kinetic Utility} (RKU), a novel theoretical framework that elevates discrete pruning to a continuous kinetic integral over the depth manifold of the model based on Alternating Gradient Flow(AGF). By modifying it with Fisher trace normalization, RKU acts as a lightweight curvature-aware normalization to isolate \textit{kinetic spikes} -- the fundamental structural pathways responsible for high-curvature logical routing. Extensive experiments on Qwen-2.5-7B and LLaMA-3-8B improves performance in the high-sparsity regime around 40\%. RKU attains 13.34\% accuracy on GSM8K at 40\% sparsity, outperforming the strongest baseline, and appears to better preserve reasoning-relevant representations under out-of-distribution evaluation.

</details>


### [446] [Large Language Models for Sequential Decision-Making: Improving In-Context Learning via Supervised Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09009)
*Minmin Zhang,Sina Aghaei,Soroush Saghafian*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究通过监督微调使预训练大语言模型具备从离线轨迹数据中进行序列决策的能力，在MDP、POMDP和APOMDP设定下，理论和实验均证明该方法优于纯上下文学习和随机基线，尤其在长 horizon、部分观测和模型模糊环境中优势显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在上下文学习方面表现出色，但其在序列决策（如MDP、POMDP、APOMDP）中的潜力尚未被充分探索。作者希望利用LLM从离线、有标注的轨迹数据中进行少样本决策，以填补这一空白。

Method: 对预训练LLM进行监督微调，使其直接从离线、有标注的轨迹中进行少样本决策。理论上，将微调后的注意力层解释为从上下文数据中隐式估计最优Q函数，并推导了端到端次优性界。实验上，在合成MDP、POMDP、APOMDP设定下评估微调LLM的表现。

Result: 微调后的LLM在各类设定下均取得显著优于纯上下文学习和随机基线的性能，尤其在长 horizon、部分观测和模型模糊的环境中提升更大。

Conclusion: 监督微调是赋予预训练LLM序列决策能力的有效途径，在离线数据丰富的领域（如医疗）具有重要价值。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown remarkable in-context learning (ICL) capabilities, yet their potential for sequential decision-making remains underexplored. In this paper, we study the ICL capabilities of LLMs in sequential decision-making settings, including Markov Decision Processes (MDPs), Partially Observable MDPs (POMDPs), and Ambiguous POMDPs (APOMDPs). We fine-tune pretrained LLMs to perform few-shot decision-making directly from offline, oracle-labeled trajectories. Our framework enables flexible imitation of policies through supervised fine-tuning (SFT). Theoretically, we focus on linear MDPs and interpret a fine-tuned attention layer as implicitly estimating optimal Q-functions from in-context data. Building on this interpretation, we derive an end-to-end suboptimality bound for the induced policy that separates the in-context estimation error from the training-length bias. Empirically, across synthetic MDP, POMDP, and APOMDP settings, we find that fine-tuned LLMs achieve substantially smaller optimality gaps than in-context-only and random baselines, with especially large gains in longer-horizon, partially observed, and model-ambiguous environments. Together, these results show that supervised fine-tuning provides an effective route to endowing pretrained LLMs with sequential decision-making capabilities from offline data, which is an important advantage in domains such as healthcare where offline data are abundant.

</details>


### [447] [A Geometric Perspective on Next-Token Prediction in Large Language Models: Three Emerging Phases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09011)
*Gianfranco Lombardo,Giuseppe Trimigno,Stefano Cagnoni*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文利用表示透镜技术，将LLM各层的预测信息投影到Grassmann流形上，发现预测子空间轨迹呈单峰分布，并识别出三个几何阶段：播种复用（种子候选集）、提升覆盖（候选分布浓缩）和焦点收敛（胜者对齐）。更深模型的能力主要用于候选消歧。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LLM各层之间预测信息的几何结构及其演化规律，而非仅关注模型在每层预测什么。

Method: 将表示透镜（学习到的仿射映射）作为几何诊断工具，在每层定义预测读出子空间（主k维奇异子空间），并在Grassmann流形上追踪其轨迹，形成跨层的相似性剖面。

Result: 预测子空间轨迹呈单峰分布（上升-平台-下降）；在Qwen2.5和OLMo2两个家族的8个模型（1B-32B）中识别出三个几何阶段：Seeding Multiplexing、Hoisting Overriding和Focal Convergence。

Conclusion: LLM深度增加带来的额外容量主要用于候选消歧过程；不同阶段的几何特性揭示了预测信息在深度上的演化规律。

Abstract: We investigate the geometry of predictive information across the layers of large language models (LLMs). We repurpose representation lenses-learned affine maps trained to predict the next token from intermediate residual streams-as geometric diagnostic tools. Rather than asking what the model predicts at each layer, we ask where predictive information resides and how it evolves across depth. We define at each layer a predictive readout subspace as the dominant k-dimensional singular subspace of such a map on the d-dimensional residual stream (where k is a resolution parameter), and track its trajectory on the Grassmann manifold as a similarity profile across layers. The profile is well described by unimodal distributions exhibiting a rise, near-plateau, and descent; varying k from 1% to 50% of d traces a Pareto frontier between visibility and energy retention, yet the same structure emerges at all scales. Across eight models from two families (Qwen2.5 and OLMo2, 1B-32B), we identify three geometric phases. Updates are approximately orthogonal to the residual stream throughout; what distinguishes the phases is their effect on the effective rank, which expands, stabilizes, and concentrates. In the first, Seeding Multiplexing, feed-forward memories and attention layers seed a candidate set in superposition in family-specific proportions, with the final token rising as leading candidate from 20% to 35% of positions across this phase. In the second, Hoisting Overriding, updates override existing subspaces to concentrate the candidate distribution without expanding the rank. In the third, Focal Convergence, high-energy low-rank updates write the winner into a form aligned with the unembedding direction. Phases 1 and 3 grow slowly with model depth, while Phase 2 expands linearly. The additional capacity of deeper LLMs is largely absorbed by candidate disambiguation.

</details>


### [448] [Diagnosing and Mitigating Domain Shift in Permission-Based Android Malware Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09028)
*Md Rafid Islam*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了基于权限的Android恶意软件检测器在跨域条件下的泛化性与可解释性，发现模型在不同数据集间存在严重非对称性能下降，特征重要性不稳定且域间预测特征集不匹配。通过基于共同特征交集的混合训练策略，有效恢复了跨域检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于机器学习的Android恶意软件检测器在实际部署中常因域偏移（domain shift）而失效，即在某一数据源上训练的模型无法泛化到另一来源的应用上。作者旨在系统研究基于权限的检测器在跨域条件下的泛化能力与可解释性问题。

Method: 使用PerMalDroid和NATICUSdroid两个互补数据集，采用五种集成分类器，先建立域内基线，再量化跨域性能下降。通过可解释AI分析特征分布与重要性稳定性，通过消融实验探究域特定伪影与缺失特征的影响，最后验证基于共同特征交集的混合训练策略。

Result: 域内准确率超92%；PerMalDroid→NATICUSdroid达86%，但反向仅73%。特征重要性不稳定，域间预测权限集不匹配。消融实验表明域特定伪影是更大障碍。混合训练策略实现了PerMalDroid上88%和NATICUSdroid上97%的准确率。

Conclusion: 研究强调了构建可解释、跨域鲁棒的恶意软件检测系统的重要性，并提供了基于共同特征交集的混合训练这一实用路径，以提升基于权限的Android恶意软件检测器在实际部署中的表现。

Abstract: Machine learning-based Android malware detectors often fail in real-world deployment due to domain shift, where models trained on one data source perform poorly on applications from another. This paper presents a comprehensive study on the generalizability and interpretability of permission-based detectors under cross-domain conditions. Using two complementary datasets (PerMalDroid and NATICUSdroid) and five ensemble classifiers, we first establish an intra-domain baseline, where models achieve over 92% accuracy, and then quantify a severe asymmetric performance drop. While models trained on PerMalDroid generalize well to NATICUSdroid (86% accuracy), the reverse direction sees a drastic drop to 73% accuracy. Explainable AI analysis reveals bimodal feature distributions and shows that feature importance is highly unstable, with key permissions losing or gaining influence across domains. The predictive feature sets for different domains are fundamentally mismatched, as models rely on different, dataset-specific permissions. Most importantly, an ablation study demonstrates that for most models, training on a noisy feature set leads to poor generalization, confirming that domain-specific artifacts are a greater obstacle than missing features. To mitigate this, we validate a hybrid training strategy based on the intersection of common features and successfully recover cross-domain performance, achieving 88% accuracy on PerMalDroid and maintaining 97% on NATICUSdroid. These findings highlight the importance of explainable, cross-domain-robust malware detection systems and provide a practical pathway toward improving real-world deployment of permission-based Android malware detectors.

</details>


### [449] [Spherical Boltzmann machines: a solvable theory of learning and generation in energy-based models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09031)
*Thomas Tulinski,Simona Cocco,Rémi Monasson,Jorge Fernandez-De-Cossio-Diaz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文在高温极限下分析了球形玻尔兹曼机（SBM）这一可解能量模型，利用随机矩阵理论和动态平均场理论，精确求解了训练动力学、贝叶斯证据，并揭示了训练过程中和超参数空间中的级联相变现象，这些相变与耦合矩阵主模式与数据的逐次对齐和凝聚有关。研究还连接了教师-学生场景中的采样温度调节、双重下降、后验温度效应及非平衡偏差等生成现象，并在标准生成架构中验证了这些现象的普遍性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 能量模型（EBMs）虽源自统计物理且具有灵活的生成能力，但其学习和生成特性尚未被充分理解，亟需一个可精确求解的理论框架来揭示其内在机制。

Method: 结合随机矩阵理论和动态平均场理论，在高维极限下对球形玻尔兹曼机进行解析求解，包括训练动力学方程、贝叶斯证据计算，以及相变分析。

Result: 精确求解了SBM的训练动力学和贝叶斯证据；发现了训练和超参数空间中的级联相变（与模式对齐和凝聚相关）；揭示了采样温度调节、双重下降、后验温度效应和非平衡偏差等生成现象；数值实验证明这些现象在标准生成架构中普遍存在。

Conclusion: 球形玻尔兹曼机为理解能量模型的生成特性提供了一个可解的理论框架，其揭示的相变和生成现象具有超越该模型的普适性。

Abstract: Energy-based models (EBMs) are flexible generative architectures inspired by statistical physics, but their learning and generative properties remain poorly understood. Here, we analyze a solvable EBM in the high-dimensional limit: the spherical Boltzmann machine (SBM). Combining tools from random matrix theory and dynamical mean-field theory, we: solve exact equations describing the training dynamics of the SBM; compute the Bayesian evidence, which acts as a partition function in parameter space and encodes global properties of the trained model; and uncover cascades of phase transitions that occur both during training and as a function of hyperparameters, related to successive alignment and condensation of the top modes of the coupling matrix to the data. We connect these transitions to sampling-time generative phenomena in a teacher-student scenario, including: sampling temperature tuning, double descent as a function of regularization strength, tempered posterior effects, and out-of-equilibrium effects during training that induce biases in the trained model. We provide numerical evidence demonstrating that all these phenomena appear in standard generative architectures, beyond the SBM.

</details>


### [450] [Accelerating Zeroth-Order Spectral Optimization with Partial Orthogonalization from Power Iteration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09034)
*Jiahe Chen,Ziye Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对大语言模型零阶优化中梯度噪声大、完全正交化效果差的问题，提出部分正交化方法ZO-MOPI，通过幂迭代放大优势谱方向并结合子空间约束，在LLM微调中实现1.5-4倍于现有最优ZO-Muon的收敛速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 零阶优化在边缘设备微调LLM中越来越重要，现有方法通过低维子空间搜索减少方差，但子空间限制本身未能充分利用优化几何结构，需要进一步加速。同时发现ZO设置下完全正交化因梯度估计噪声大而效果不佳。

Method: 1) 提出部分正交化策略，用幂迭代方法替换Muon中的Newton-Schulz过程，只放大优势谱方向；2) 采用流式幂迭代变体，利用动量投影的子空间约束来保证梯度低方差。

Result: 在OPT-13B模型上的SuperGlue数据集上，相比ZO-Muon实现1.5-4倍收敛速度提升；在多个模型上相比MeZO、LOZO、ZO-Muon等强基线，大部分情况下以更少时间达到竞争性的最终精度。

Conclusion: 部分正交化能有效应对ZO设置中的梯度噪声问题，结合幂迭代和子空间约束的ZO-MOPI在LLM微调中实现了显著的加速效果。

Abstract: Zeroth-order (ZO) optimization has become increasingly popular and important in fine-tuning large language models (LLMs), especially on edge devices due to its ability to adjust the model to local data without the need for memory-intensive back-propagation. Recent works try to reduce ZO variance through low-dimensional subspace search, but subspace restriction alone leaves key optimization geometry under-exploited, motivating additional acceleration. In this work, we focus on the hidden layer training problem in which spectral optimizers like Muon outperform AdamW due to its ability to exploit weak spectral directions by orthogonalization. However, we have discovered that unlike in the first-order setting, full orthogonalization works poorly in the ZO setting since the gradient estimates are highly noisy and unreliable. To address this issue, we propose a key approach we call partial orthogonalization. To do so, we replace the iconic Newton-Schulz procedure in Muon with the faster, more concentrated power-iteration method so that it only amplifies dominant spectral directions. Furthermore, to improve the efficiency and generalization of the algorithm, we adopted a streaming variant of power-iteration that requires low variance in gradients, which was achieved through constraining our search inside a subspace obtained through the projection of momentum, echoing recent advances. Experiments on LLM fine-tuning show that our method can achieve from 1.5x to 4x the convergence speed of ZO-Muon, the current SOTA algorithm, across SuperGlue datasets in the OPT-13B model. Across different models, we also reach competitive final accuracies with less time in most cases compared with strong ZO baselines such as MeZO, LOZO and ZO-Muon. Code is available at https://github.com/MOFA-LAB/ZO-MOPI.git.

</details>


### [451] [Personalized Alignment Revisited: The Necessity and Sufficiency of User Diversity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09119)
*Enoch Hyunwook Kang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文理论刻画了个性化对齐实现最优统计效率的条件，证明了用户多样性（即用户特定头张成的空间覆盖所有可能改变最优响应的潜在奖励方向）是必要且充分的，并分析了在该条件下简单贪心算法的高效性以及条件不满足时的下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 个性化对齐旨在使大语言模型适应异质用户偏好，但其统计效率的理论条件尚未被严格建立，因此本文试图精确刻画这些条件。

Method: 通过理论分析，定义了用户多样性的条件（用户特定头张成的空间需覆盖可改变最优响应的潜在奖励方向），并证明了该条件是达到O(1)在线遗憾和log(1/epsilon)离线样本复杂度的必要且充分条件。

Result: 当用户多样性条件成立时，简单贪心算法可达到基准效率；当条件不成立时，任何自然可容许类中的学习器都至少面临对数遗憾。

Conclusion: 用户多样性是个性化可识别性的根本驱动因素。

Abstract: Personalized alignment aims to adapt large language models to heterogeneous user preferences, yet the precise theoretical conditions for its statistical efficiency have not been formally established. This paper characterizes the conditions under which personalized alignment achieves O(1) online regret and log(1/epsilon) offline sample complexity. We show that these optimal rates depend on a specific user-diversity condition: the population of user-specific heads must span the latent reward directions that can alter the optimal response. We prove that this condition is both necessary and sufficient. When it holds, simple greedy algorithms achieve benchmark efficiency; when it fails, every learner in a natural admissible class incurs at least logarithmic regret. Our results identify user diversity as the fundamental driver of personalized identifiability.

</details>


### [452] [PACT: Peak-Aware Cross-Attention Graph Transformers for Efficient Storm-Surge Emulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09036)
*Zesheng Liu,Doyup Kwon,Ning Lin,Maryam Rahnemoonfar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PACT，一种峰值感知的交叉注意力图Transformer，用于从大气强迫场高效预测站点级风暴潮，在US Northeast海岸多个潮位站上优于强时空图神经网络基线，计算高效（训练后约3.5秒生成一个冬季季节的风暴潮轨迹），但在再分析到气候模型强迫迁移时性能下降显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高保真水动力模型计算成本过高，难以用于大规模情景集成和异质气候强迫下的快速评估，因此需要一种准确且高效的风暴潮仿真替代模型。

Method: PACT将每个强迫块表示为图，用GraphSAGE编码空间结构，通过可学习的站点查询和交叉注意力聚合节点信息；Transformer编码器建模时间依赖，水平查询解码器生成特定提前期的预测；引入峰值感知学习策略，包含轻量级辅助峰值感知头、尾部聚焦损失和斜率正则化项。

Result: 在美国东北海岸多个潮位站上，PACT在RMSE和MAE上优于强时空图神经网络基线；在再分析和大部分CMIP6数据集上表现出更好的峰值保真度和尾部保持；训练后约3.5秒生成一个完整冬季季节的风暴潮轨迹。

Conclusion: PACT在风暴潮仿真上实现了准确性和效率的良好平衡，但在从再分析迁移到气候模型强迫时存在显著的泛化差距，这揭示了再分析与GCM之间的持续鸿沟。

Abstract: Accurate and efficient storm-surge emulation is essential for coastal hazard assessment, yet high-fidelity hydrodynamic models remain too expensive for large scenario ensembles and rapid evaluation under heterogeneous climate forcings. We present PACT, a peak-aware cross-attention graph transformer for efficient station-level storm-surge prediction from atmospheric forcing fields. PACT represents each forcing patch as a graph, encodes spatial structure with GraphSAGE, and uses a learned station query to aggregate node information through cross-attention rather than uniform pooling. A Transformer encoder models temporal dependence across the forcing history, and a horizon-query decoder generates lead-specific forecasts from a shared temporal memory. To better capture extreme events, we introduce a peak-aware learning strategy that couples a lightweight auxiliary peak-aware head with a tailored training objective, including a tail-focused loss on peak-dominated samples and a horizon-wise slope regularizer to encourage coherent multi-step evolution. Across multiple tide-gauge stations along the US Northeast coast, PACT outperforms a strong spatio-temporal graph neural network baseline in both RMSE and MAE. Diagnostics show improved peak fidelity and tail preservation for reanalysis and most CMIP6 datasets. PACT is also computationally efficient, requiring about 3.5~s to generate a full winter-season surge trajectory for one year after training. Under distribution shift across five CMIP6 forcings, PACT transfers well within the CMIP6 family but degrades markedly when transferring from reanalysis to climate-model forcings, highlighting a persistent reanalysis--GCM gap.

</details>


### [453] [A Communication-Theoretic Framework for LLM Agents: Cost-Aware Adaptive Reliability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09121)
*Hamed Omidvar,Vahideh Akhlaghi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文基于香农通信理论，将LLM以温度T采样视为离散随机信道，统一了重试、多数投票、自一致性等六类可靠性技术，提出一个成本感知的语义最近邻路由器，在69项困难任务上实现了质量-成本帕累托前沿。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM可靠性技术（重试、多数投票、自一致性等）平行发展，缺乏统一的分析框架，难以系统性地比较和优化，且没有理论指导如何在不同任务和预算约束下选择最优技术组合。

Method: 1) 将LLM温度采样建模为离散随机信道p(y|x)；2) 将六类可靠性技术归类为经典通信可靠性算子的特例；3) 给出均匀平均优于加权平均的噪声方差阈值，以及生成器-判别器精炼的压缩性判据；4) 提出成本感知的语义最近邻路由器（单拉格朗日旋钮无需重训练即可遍历质量-成本前沿）。

Result: 在69项困难任务上，没有固定模型-技术-预算组合占优；在300项的MMLU/GSM8K/HumanEval困难子集上，路由器占据完整帕累托前沿：同等质量下归一化成本比最强固定技术低约56%，同等成本下质量提升约7%（相比单次解码提升26%）。

Conclusion: 这些结果支持将多种可靠性技术整合为一个基于信道编码的可调单一层，实现任务级别的自适应可靠性分配。

Abstract: Agents built on large language models (LLMs) rely on a range of reliability techniques, including retry, majority voting, and self-consistency, that have been developed in parallel rather than within a common analytical framework. We observe that an LLM sampled at temperature $T$ is a discrete stochastic channel $p(y \mid x)$ in the sense of Shannon's coding theory, and use this identity as the entry point for such a framework grounded in communication theory. Each of these techniques is a special case of one of six classical reliability operators: diversity combining, hybrid retransmission, iterative generator-critic decoding, rateless sampling, structured redundant verification, and difficulty-adaptive routing. Within the framework we give two closed-form results: a noise-variance threshold above which uniform averaging beats quality-weighted averaging, and a contractivity criterion for generator-critic refinement, consistent with a contractive-to-divergent transition we observe between 3B- and 14B-parameter models. We further introduce a cost-aware semantic-nearest-neighbor router whose single Lagrangian knob traverses the quality-cost frontier without retraining. Across six channel configurations spanning local and cloud models on 69 hard tasks, no fixed model-technique-budget choice dominates, motivating per-task allocation. On a 300-item hard split of MMLU, GSM8K, and HumanEval, our router occupies the full empirical Pareto frontier: at matched quality, its normalized cost is ${\approx}56$\% lower than the strongest fixed technique; at matched normalized cost, it improves quality by ${\approx}7$\% ($26$\% over single-shot decoding). These results argue for consolidating these reliability techniques into a single tunable layer informed by channel coding.

</details>


### [454] [Predicting Plasticity in Deep Continual Learning: A Theoretical Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09044)
*Jiuqi Wang,Jayanth Srinivasa,Claire Chen,Shuze Daniel Liu,Ali Payani,Shangtong Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为"优化就绪度"的新指标，用于预测深度持续学习中的神经网络可训练性（塑性）。研究表明，现有的表示秩和神经正切核秩等诊断指标在某些情况下无法准确预测塑性损失，而优化就绪度通过结合梯度强度和梯度可靠性，在理论和实验上都能更可靠地预测网络的未来优化收益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有塑性损失诊断指标（如表示秩、NTK秩）的预测能力尚不明确，作者希望检验这些指标是否能真正预测神经网络在持续学习中的可训练性。

Method: 首先通过构造反例证明现有诊断指标在回归和分类设置下可能失效；然后提出"优化就绪度"指标，结合梯度强度与梯度可靠性，并在理论上证明其在标准平滑假设下是单步优化收益的下界；最后在Slowly-Changing Regression和Permuted MNIST等持续学习场景中进行实验验证。

Result: 优化就绪度比现有诊断指标（表示秩、NTK秩）更可靠地排序检查点的可训练性，即使在样本量大幅减少的情况下也能保持优势。

Conclusion: 优化就绪度是一个理论上可保证、实践上更有效的塑性/可训练性预测指标，为深度持续学习中评估模型适应能力提供了新工具。

Abstract: Deep continual learning requires models to adapt to new tasks without retraining from scratch. However, neural networks can lose their ability to adapt to new tasks after training on previous ones, a phenomenon known as loss of plasticity. There have been several explanations and diagnostics proposed for plasticity loss. Motivated by the philosophy that "all models are wrong, but some are useful", we ask: can existing diagnostics predict a neural network's plasticity? In this work, we take a practical view to interpret plasticity as trainability, i.e., a neural network's future optimization gain on a target task. We first take a theoretical approach, showing, by constructing a few counterexamples, that some widely adopted diagnostics of plasticity, including representation rank and neural tangent kernel rank, can fail to predict the loss of trainability in both regression and classification settings. We instead propose a novel metric, called optimization readiness, which combines gradient strength and gradient reliability. We prove that optimization readiness lower bounds one-step optimization gain under standard smoothness assumptions, providing a theoretical guarantee for its predictive power. Empirically, we show that across commonly used deep continual learning settings, such as Slowly-Changing Regression and Permuted MNIST, optimization readiness more reliably ranks checkpoints by trainability than prior diagnostics, even with substantially fewer samples.

</details>


### [455] [Sparse Layers are Critical to Scaling Looped Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09165)
*Ryan Lee,Jacob Biloki,Edward J. Hu,Jonathan May*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 循环MoE模型比标准Transformer更易扩展，且能在循环边界实现更优的早退计算-质量权衡，从而节省内存和推理成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 循环语言模型通过重复使用同一组transformer层来降低内存成本，但其扩展性不如标准transformer，作者希望寻找一种既能保持循环优势又能改善扩展性的方案。

Method: 对比标准Transformer、MoE Transformer、循环稠密模型和循环MoE模型（Looped-MoE）的性能，分析路由分歧（不同循环轮次激活不同专家）对表达能力和扩展性的影响。

Result: 1）Looped-MoE扩展性优于标准Transformer，而稠密循环模型扩展性差；2）循环模型在早退点上的计算-质量权衡优于标准模型，因为循环边界与最终输出层一致，输出收敛更快。

Conclusion: Looped-MoE结合早退机制不仅能在大规模上超越标准Transformer，还能显著节省内存和推理开销，为循环模型扩展提供了明确方向。

Abstract: Looped language models repeat a set of transformer layers through depth, reducing memory costs and providing natural early-exit points at loop boundaries. However, looped models do not scale as favorably as standard transformers with unique layers. We compare standard and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) transformers, with and without looping, and find two main results. First, we find Looped-MoE models scale better than the standard baseline while dense looped models do not. We trace this to routing divergence between loops: in Looped-MoE models, different experts are activated on each pass through the same shared layers, recovering expressivity without additional parameters. Our second finding is that looped models have better compute-quality trade-offs with early exits than standard models. Because each loop ends with the same layers that produce the final output, loop boundaries are superior exit points, as confirmed by earlier output convergence at these points. In sum, we provide a clear direction for scaling looped models: a Looped-MoE model with early exits can not only beat standard transformers at scale, but also enable significant memory and inference savings with minimal degradation in quality.

</details>


### [456] [FactoryNet: A Large-Scale Dataset toward Industrial Time-Series Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09081)
*Karim Othman,Jonas Petersen,Matei Ignuta-Ciuncanu,Riccardo Maggioni,Camilla Mazzoleni,Federico Martelli,Philipp Petersen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FactoryNet是首个面向工业时序数据的通用预训练语料库，包含5100万数据点、2.3万次任务执行（涵盖6种实体），通过S-E-F-C（设定点-努力-反馈-上下文）统一模式实现零样本跨实体迁移和高效异常检测。在27种标注异常类型上，模型展现出公平的跨实体迁移能力和competitive的异常检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业时序数据缺乏统一的预训练语料库，现有数据集多局限于单一实体或领域，跨实体迁移能力有限，且缺乏标准化的数据模式来支持工业基础模型的发展。

Method: 提出S-E-F-C（Setpoint, Effort, Feedback, Context）统一数据模式，将任意驱动系统映射到通用表示框架；构建包含真实（1.33万）和合成（0.98万）任务执行数据的大规模语料库，覆盖6种实体、27种异常类型，支持零样本跨实体迁移和参数高效的异常检测。

Result: 在跨实体迁移实验中，模型在偏差感知指标下展现了公平的跨实体迁移能力；使用24个模式对齐的信号即可达到与高维基线相竞争的异常检测性能。

Conclusion: FactoryNet作为首个多实体工业时序预训练语料库，通过S-E-F-C模式有效实现了零样本跨实体迁移和参数高效异常检测，为工业基础模型的发展奠定了基础，并将作为持续增长的数据集开源发布。

Abstract: We introduce the first universal pretraining corpus for industrial time-series data: FactoryNet. 51M datapoints across 23k end-to-end task executions (13.3k real, 9.8k synthetic) on six embodiments, unified by a shared schema that enables robust zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer and highly parameter-efficient anomaly detection. We introduce a novel schema: Setpoint, Effort, Feedback, Context (S-E-F-C) underlying the whole pipeline that maps any actuated system into a common representational frame. The corpus spans 27 annotated anomaly types alongside healthy baselines and counterfactual pairs across robotic manipulation and machining domains. Cross-embodiment transfer experiments yield positive results: under bias-aware metrics our model demonstrates fair cross-embodiment transfer capabilities on the evaluated source-target pair, while 24 schema-aligned signals achieves competitive anomaly detection performance compared to high-dimensional baselines. We release FactoryNet as a growing, multi-embodiment dataset to drive progress toward industrial foundation models.

</details>


### [457] [A Tale of Two Problems: Multi-Task Bilevel Learning Meets Equality Constrained Multi-Objective Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09094)
*Zhiyao Zhang,Myeung Suk Oh,Zhen Qin,Jiaxiang Li,Xin Zhang,Jia Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次将双层优化扩展到多任务场景，在放松下层强凸性假设为一般凸性下，通过转化为等式约束多目标优化问题，提出加权切比雪夫惩罚算法，实现了确定性/随机环境下O(ST^{-1/2})的有限时间收敛率，并能系统探索帕累托前沿。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有双层优化研究局限于单任务场景且依赖下层强凸性假设，无法适应现代机器学习中日益复杂的多任务问题。本文首次尝试在放松的下层一般凸性假设下将双层优化拓展到多任务设置。

Method: 将多任务双层学习问题重构为等式约束多目标优化问题；建立基于KKT条件的帕累托驻点作为收敛准则；提出加权切比雪夫惩罚算法，通过偏好向量遍历S维单纯形来探索帕累托前沿。

Result: 在确定性和随机环境下均实现了O(ST^{-1/2})的有限时间收敛率到KKT-based帕累托驻点，其中S为目标数量，T为总迭代次数。

Conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了等式约束多目标优化这一全新问题，且ECMO问题的解可直接映射回原多任务双层优化问题的解，建立了两个优化框架之间的桥梁。

Abstract: In recent years, bilevel optimization (BLO) has attracted significant attention for its broad applications in machine learning. However, most existing works on BLO remain confined to the single-task setting and rely on the lower-level strong convexity assumption, which significantly restricts their applicability to modern machine learning problems of growing complexity. In this paper, we make the first attempt to extend BLO to the multi-task setting under a relaxed lower-level general convexity (LLGC) assumption. To this end, we reformulate the multi-task bilevel learning (MTBL) problem with LLGC into an equality constrained multi-objective optimization (ECMO) problem. However, ECMO itself is a new problem that has not yet been studied in the literature. To address this gap, we first establish a new Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT)-based Pareto stationarity as the convergence criterion for ECMO algorithm design. Based on this foundation, we propose a weighted Chebyshev (WC)-penalty algorithm that achieves a finite-time convergence rate of $O(ST^{-\frac{1}{2})$ to KKT-based Pareto stationarity in both deterministic and stochastic settings, where $S$ denotes the number of objectives, and $T$ is the total iterations. Moreover, by varying the preference vector over the $S$-dimensional simplex, our WC-penalty method systematically explores the Pareto front. Finally, solutions to the ECMO problem translate directly into solutions for the original MTBL problem, thereby closing the loop between these two foundational optimization frameworks.

</details>


### [458] [Bridging Spectral Operator Learning and U-Net Hierarchies: SpectraNet for Stable Autoregressive PDE Surrogates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09096)
*Enrique Hernández Noguera,Md Meftahul Ferdaus,Elias Ioup,Mahdi Abdelguerfi,Julian Simeonov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SpectraNet是一种结合谱卷积与U-Net层次结构的自回归神经算子，通过残差目标参数化和半群一致性损失解决了时序PDE的指数误差增长问题，在Navier-Stokes等任务上以更少参数实现更低误差，并保持长程稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子存在结构性矛盾：谱架构（FNO）虽分辨率不变但存在指数级 rollout 误差增长；U-Net类算子虽有多尺度细节却丧失分辨率不变性。作者旨在设计一种兼具分辨率不变性、长程稳定性和多尺度建模能力的神经算子。

Method: 1) 在U-Net层次结构中嵌入截断谱卷积；2) 提出残差目标谱块（Residual-Target Spectral Block），将L^T稳定性爆炸转化为线性T*δ漂移；3) 引入半群一致性损失（Semigroup-Consistency Loss）进行训练；4) 谱路径参数量为Θ(L w² M²)，与网格N无关。

Result: 在Navier-Stokes ν=1e-5/64×64上，SpectraNet以2.04M参数达到测试相对L2=0.0822，比标准FNO参数少2.33倍、误差低约20%。跨PDE对比中5/6任务优于FNO。128²原生训练下SpectraNet提升至0.0724（FNO退化为0.3080）。SpectraNet可稳定rollout至T=100，FNO在所有200条轨迹上发散。CPU单样本推理<200ms，远快于全注意力Transformer（~60倍延迟）。

Conclusion: SpectraNet通过创新的残差目标谱块+半群一致性损失，在轻量级模型（≤5M参数、<200ms CPU推理）中占据帕累托前沿，实现了长程稳定性与多尺度建模的统一，为时序PDE神经算子提供了实用高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Neural operators for time-dependent PDEs face a structural tension: spectral architectures (FNO and descendants) inherit exponential rollout-error growth from their one-step Lipschitz constant, while hierarchical U-Net operators trade resolution invariance for multi-scale detail. We introduce SpectraNet, an autoregressive neural operator that composes truncated spectral convolutions inside a U-Net hierarchy with a Residual-Target Spectral Block trained under a Semigroup-Consistency Loss. The residual-target parametrization replaces L^T stability blow-up with linear T*delta drift, and the spectral path's parameter count is Theta(L w^2 M^2), independent of grid N. Under a single unified protocol against 16 published neural-operator baselines on Navier-Stokes nu=1e-5 at 64x64, SpectraNet reaches test relative L2 = 0.0822 at 2.04M parameters -- 2.33x fewer than canonical FNO at ~20% lower error -- and wins five of six rows in a cross-PDE comparison against FNO (NS at nu in {1e-4, 1e-3}, PDEBench Shallow-Water 2D and Diffusion-Reaction, with the Active-Matter row going to FNO inside its seed spread). Trained from scratch at native 128^2 under the same protocol, SpectraNet improves to 0.0724 while FNO regresses to 0.3080. Free rollout stays bounded for T=100 where FNO diverges across all 200 test trajectories. On consumer CPU at B=1, SpectraNet runs sub-200ms while the full-attention Transformer that wins raw L2 pays ~60x latency; we do not claim to beat that Transformer on raw L2, only to dominate the lightweight (<=5M parameter, sub-200ms CPU) Pareto frontier. Source code: https://github.com/Enrikkk/spectranet

</details>


### [459] [Contextual Plackett-Luce: An Efficient Neural Model for Probabilistic Sequence Selection under Ambiguity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09112)
*Noam Mizrachi,Nadav Har-Tuv,Shai Shalev-Shwartz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Contextual Plackett-Luce (CPL)模型，结合并行评分和轻量级自回归选择的优势，解决多模态结构化预测中序列/子集选择问题，在路径预测和代表性子集选择任务上取得优于强并行基线的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在结构化预测中，目标序列或子集的选取面临内在歧义性：每个输入对应多个有效输出，但监督信号仅提供单个样本，导致多模态目标分布与训练信号不匹配。现有方法中，自回归模型能捕捉不确定性但计算效率低，并行方法效率高却难以表达多模态依赖，亟需一种兼顾两者的方法。

Method: 提出Contextual Plackett-Luce (CPL)模型，将经典Plackett-Luce模型扩展到上下文依赖场景，采用Ising式参数化（包含一元项和成对交互项）。具体地，先以全并行方式构建概率选择模型的参数，再通过轻量级自回归选择过程逐步更新上下文logits，实现"并行评分+顺序选择"的解耦设计。

Result: 在多模态路径预测和代表性子集选择两个任务上，CPL相比强并行基线取得了更好的结构一致性和鲁棒性，在模糊监督下表现更优。

Conclusion: CPL通过解耦并行评分与顺序选择，在保持表达力的同时实现了高效计算，为处理多模态结构化预测问题提供了新的有效范式。

Abstract: Selecting a coherent sequence or subset of elements is a fundamental problem in structured prediction, arising in tasks such as detection, trajectory forecasting, and representative subset selection. In many such settings, the target is inherently ambiguous: each input admits multiple valid outputs, while supervision provides only a single sampled instance. This induces a mismatch between the underlying multi-modal target distribution and the observed training signal. We propose Contextual Plackett-Luce (CPL), a structured probabilistic model for sequence selection that extends the classical Plackett-Luce model to a context-dependent setting following an Ising-style parameterization with unary and pairwise interaction terms. CPL can be viewed as a hybrid between fully autoregressive prediction and parallel sequence selection: autoregressive models effectively capture uncertainty but are computationally expensive on modern parallel hardware such as GPUs, while parallel methods are efficient but struggle to represent multi-modal dependencies. CPL combines the strengths of both by constructing the parameters of a probabilistic selection model in a fully parallel manner, followed by a lightweight autoregressive selection process in which each step applies incremental updates to contextual logits. This decoupling of parallel scoring and sequential selection enables efficient computation without sacrificing expressivity. We evaluate CPL on two structured selection tasks: multi-modal path prediction and representative subset selection. CPL achieves improved structural consistency and robustness under ambiguous supervision compared to strong parallel baselines.

</details>


### [460] [Cosine-Gated Adam-Decay: Drop-In Staleness-Aware Outer Optimization for Decoupled DiLoCo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09126)
*Vatsal Shah,Jiahao Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CGAD，一种年龄感知的外层优化器，通过余弦门控指数衰减机制处理异步DiLoCo中的延迟伪梯度，在理论上消除了标准分析中的τ_max²因子，并在Llama风格模型（25M至7B参数）上展示了比Nesterov和Adam Decay更稳定的训练性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 异步DiLoCo系统中可能出现延迟多个外轮计算的伪梯度，而标准Nesterov外层优化器未根据更新年龄显式调整其更新，导致在大规模受控延迟下动量缓冲区变得脆弱。

Method: 提出Cosine Gated Adam Decay (CGAD)，一种即插即用的年龄感知外层优化器。它通过σ(τ)=γ(τ)e^(-ατ)缩放每个传入的伪梯度（指数项建模信息衰减，余弦门控γ(τ)平滑截断超出阈值的贡献），再进入Adam的一阶和二阶矩缓冲区。τ=0时退化为普通Adam，引入两个超参数且默认值可跨规模迁移。还扩展到部分同步调度器(PA-CGAD)。

Result: 在光滑非凸目标上证明了非渐近收敛界，其延迟偏差项仅依赖于α而非最大延迟τ_max（标准分析则有τ_max²因子）。在Llama风格模型（25M、1B、7B参数）预训练中，CGAD在所有受控延迟下稳定训练。余弦截断作为规模保险：Adam Decay在τ=8时的种子间标准差从25M到7B增长27倍，单次风险超过随机损失，而CGAD保持在远低于该水平。Nesterov在完整扫描中最不稳定。

Conclusion: CGAD通过年龄感知的余弦门控衰减机制有效解决了异步优化中的延迟问题，在理论和实证上均优于现有方法，特别是其余弦截断机制提供了跨参数规模的可扩展性和稳定性保障。

Abstract: Asynchronous DiLoCo systems may receive pseudo-gradients computed several outer rounds earlier, yet the standard Nesterov outer optimizer does not explicitly condition its update on per-update age. This can make the outer momentum buffer brittle under large controlled delays. We propose Cosine Gated Adam Decay (CGAD), a simple, drop-in, age-aware outer optimizer that scales each incoming pseudo-gradient by $σ(τ) = γ(τ) e^{-ατ}$ before it enters Adam's first- and second-moment buffers; the exponential models information decay and the cosine gate $γ(τ)$ smoothly zeroes contributions past a chosen cutoff. CGAD reduces to plain Adam at $τ=0$, adds two hyperparameters whose defaults transfer across scales, and extends to partial-sync schedulers via a per-fragment age-aware variant (PA-CGAD). For an idealized gated-adaptive update on smooth non convex objectives, we prove a non-asymptotic convergence bound whose staleness-bias term depends on $α$ alone, rather than on the realized maximum delay $τ_{\max}$; standard analyses of asynchronous momentum-SGD instead carry a $τ_{\max}^2$ factor. Empirically, on Llama style language model pretraining at 25M, 1B, and 7B parameters, CGAD trains stably across the controlled delays we sweep. The cosine cutoff acts as scale insurance: the closest baseline, Adam Decay (CGAD without the cutoff), is competitive at 25M but its seed-to-seed $σ$ at $τ=8$ grows 27x from 25M to 7B, pushing its single-shot risk (mean + $σ$) above the chance-level loss while CGAD's stays well below. The published Nesterov recipe is the least stable method on the full sweep.

</details>


### [461] [Your Simulation Runs but Solves the Wrong Physics: PDE-Grounded Intent Verification for LLM-Generated Multiphysics Simulation Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09360)
*Zhenghan Song,Yulong Liu,Cheng Wan,Chenjun Li,Lingfu Liu,Yunyi Li,Congcong Yuan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出意图保真度评分（IFS）来评估科学模拟中LLM生成代码的物理正确性，而非仅依赖可执行性。基于MOOSE框架，通过PDE重构与对比，实现可证伪的代码迭代修正。实验表明，该方法在MooseBench上显著提升IFS，且发现可执行性与意图保真度是可分离的失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于执行的评估将代码成功运行视为正确性的代理，这在科学模拟中不充分——生成代码可以运行、划分网格并收敛，但编码的控制方程与用户意图不符。作者将此称为"理解-生成鸿沟"，并指出需要更严格的验证指标。

Method: 在MOOSE框架中利用Kernel和BC对象的组合性，从生成代码中确定性重建编码的PDE，与预期契约比较。形式化为意图保真度评分（IFS），覆盖控制项、边界条件、初始条件、系数和时间方案。基于IFS构建PDE接地修正循环，使用确定性违规报告迭代修正代码。

Result: 在220案例的MooseBench上，方法持续提升平均IFS，对直接生成IFS低于0.7的困难子集，修正带来+0.22至+0.41的绝对IFS提升。部署审计中，仅修复可执行性会留下39-40%的案例可运行但求解错误物理。在UFL/FEniCS等四个PDE领域特定语言上的概念验证实验表明该模式可扩展。

Conclusion: 可执行的模拟代码应针对其旨在编码的数学结构进行验证，而非仅凭执行接受。可执行性与意图保真度是相互分离的失败模式，需要分别评估和修复。

Abstract: Execution-based evaluation of LLM-generated code implicitly treats successful execution as a proxy for correctness. In scientific simulation, this proxy is insufficient: a generated input file can run, mesh, and converge while encoding governing equations that differ from the user's intent. We call this mismatch between intended physics and generated code the comprehension-generation gap. We instantiate this in MOOSE, where Kernel and BC objects map compositionally to weak-form residual terms, enabling deterministic reconstruction of the encoded PDE and comparison against an intended contract. We formalize this comparison as the Intent Fidelity Score (IFS), a structural metric covering governing terms, BCs, ICs, coefficients, and time scheme. Building on IFS, we develop a PDE-grounded refinement loop that uses deterministic violation reports to correct generated code iteratively. We evaluate on MooseBench, a 220-case multiphysics benchmark with PDE-level ground truth released with this work. On this benchmark, our method consistently improves mean IFS over direct generation, with gains concentrated on hard cases. On the subset where direct generation falls below IFS 0.7, refinement adds +0.22 to +0.41 absolute IFS. In the deployment audit, execution-only repair improves execution success while leaving 39-40% of all 220 cases runnable but still solving the wrong physics across the three main deployment-audit models, exposing executability and intent fidelity as separable failure modes. Static proof-of-concept experiments on four PDE-oriented DSLs (UFL/FEniCS, FreeFEM, FiPy, and Devito) suggest that the reconstruction-and-comparison pattern extends beyond MOOSE. These findings reinforce that executable simulation code should be verified against the mathematical structure it is intended to encode, not accepted on execution alone.

</details>


### [462] [Evaluating Federated Learning approaches for mammography under breast density heterogeneity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09137)
*Gonzalo Iñaki Quintana,Franco Martin Di Maria,Laurence Vancamberg*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究评估了乳腺密度异质性对联邦学习（FL）在乳腺X光图像分类中的影响。实验在强异质性和基于人群分布两种场景下进行，比较了FedAvg、FedProx、SCAFFOLD等方法。结果表明，FL表现与集中式训练相当，FedAvg尤为鲁棒，无需专门算法即可应对乳腺密度引起的数据不平衡，支持FL在真实临床乳腺摄影工作流中的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 乳腺密度是影响乳腺X光解读的关键因素，也是多中心数据集异质性的主要来源。这种异质性给跨机构的协作机器学习（特别是联邦学习）带来挑战。本研究旨在评估乳腺密度引起的异质性对FL的影响，并检验常见FL算法在真实临床场景中的鲁棒性。

Method: 在两种场景下进行实验：(1) 强异质性场景：各参与站点仅提供低密度或高密度病例（基于BI-RADS评分），分为2客户端（BI-RADS A-B vs C-D）和4客户端（每个站点单一密度）两种配置；(2) 基于人群的场景：模拟白人和亚洲人群的乳腺密度分布。比较三种FL方法（FedAvg、FedProx、SCAFFOLD）与集中式训练、本地训练及朴素聚合方法（集成、权重平均）。

Result: 两种场景下，FL均取得了与集中式训练相当的性能。本地模型和朴素聚合方法在强异质性下表现不佳。值得注意的是，FedAvg的准确率与集中式训练持平或更优，对乳腺密度引起的数据不平衡表现出良好的鲁棒性，无需专门的异质性缓解算法。

Conclusion: FL能够应对乳腺密度相关的异质性，支持其在真实世界乳腺摄影工作流中的可行性。FedAvg展现出的鲁棒性凸显了FL在临床广泛部署的潜力，能够在维护数据隐私的同时实现协作模型开发。

Abstract: Breast density is a key factor that influences mammography interpretation and is a major source of heterogeneity in multicenter datasets. Such heterogeneity poses challenges for collaborative machine learning across institutions, particularly in Federated Learning. This study aims to evaluate the impact of breast density-induced heterogeneity on FL for mammography image classification and to assess the robustness of common FL algorithms in realistic clinical settings. We conducted experiments under two scenarios: (1) a strongly heterogeneous setting where each participating site contributed exclusively low- or high-density cases, based on the BI-RADS density score, and (2) a population-based setting simulating breast density distributions in White and Asian populations. For the strongly heterogeneous setting, we evaluated two configurations: one with 2 clients, where the cases were grouped as BI-RADS A-B and C-D, and one with 4 clients, where each site contained cases of a single BI-RADS density. We compared three FL methods (FedAvg, FedProx, SCAFFOLD) against centralized training, local-only training, and naive aggregation approaches, including ensembling and weight averaging. Across both scenarios, FL achieved performance comparable to centralized training, while local models and naive aggregation approaches underperformed in the presence of strong heterogeneity. Notably, FedAvg achieved accuracy on par with or exceeding centralized training, demonstrating resilience to breast density-induced data imbalance without requiring specialized heterogeneity mitigation algorithms. These findings show that FL can address breast density-related heterogeneity, supporting its feasibility for real-world mammography workflows. The demonstrated robustness of FedAvg underscores the potential for broad clinical deployment of FL, enabling collaborative model development while maintaining data privacy.

</details>


### [463] [FedVSSAM: Mitigating Flatness Incompatibility in Sharpness-Aware Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09144)
*Bingnan Xiao,Yuan Gao,Bingcong Li,Wei Ni,Xin Wang,Tony Q. S. Quek*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现联邦学习中的锐度感知最小化（SAM）存在"平坦性不兼容"问题——数据异构性导致局部平坦区域与全局目标不一致，并提出FedVSSAM方法，通过构建方差抑制的调整方向来缓解该问题，在理论和实验上均取得更优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SAM在联邦学习中存在结构性缺陷：数据异构性下设备端局部平坦区与全局模型偏好的平坦区不兼容，导致仅提升局部平坦性对全局模型的训练和泛化提升有限。

Method: 提出FedVSSAM，构造方差抑制的调整方向，并将其一致地用于局部平坦搜索、局部下降和全局更新，将扰动和更新方向锚定到更稳定的全局方向。

Result: 建立了非凸收敛保证，证明了调整方向与全局梯度之间的均方偏差被有效控制，实验上在多种FL设置中优于基线方法。

Conclusion: FedVSSAM有效缓解了平坦性不兼容问题，提升了联邦学习的泛化性能。

Abstract: Sharpness-aware minimization (SAM) is an effective method for improving the generalization of federated learning (FL) by steering local training toward flat minima. Under data heterogeneity, however, device-side SAM searches for locally flat basins that are incompatible with the flat region preferred by the global objective. We identify this structural failure mode as flatness incompatibility, which explains why improving local flatness alone may provide limited training and generalization improvement for the global model. We reveal that flatness incompatibility arises from data heterogeneity and the friendly adversary phenomenon, and is further amplified by local updates and partial device participation. To mitigate this issue, we propose Federated Learning with variance-suppressed sharpness-aware minimization (FedVSSAM), which constructs a variance-suppressed adjusted direction and uses it consistently in local flatness search, local descent, and global update. FedVSSAM anchors both perturbation and update directions to a more stable global direction, instead of correcting only an isolated local perturbation. We establish non-convex convergence guarantees of FedVSSAM and prove that the mean-square deviation between the adjusted direction and the global gradient is effectively controlled. Experiments demonstrate that FedVSSAM mitigates flatness incompatibility and outperforms the baselines across diverse FL settings.

</details>


### [464] [Let the Target Select for Itself: Data Selection via Target-Aligned Paths](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09404)
*Huitao Yang,Hengzhi He,Guang Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于验证集诱导流的零阶数据选择方法，通过短时容量受限预热计算归一化端点损失下降作为候选样本评分，避免了参考路径偏差，在多项实验中达到与动态归因基线相当的性能，同时显著降低了预热和存储成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于候选池诱导轨迹的归因方法在异构数据池中面临参考路径偏差问题——即候选池的全局轨迹与目标对齐子集的动态不匹配，导致选择效率下降。

Method: 使用目标验证集进行短时容量受限预热，构建验证诱导流作为参考路径，沿此路径计算候选样本的归一化端点损失下降作为评分，无需计算梯度或Hessian近似。

Result: 在逻辑回归、视觉和指令微调实验中，该方法与强动态归因基线效果相当，且预热和存储成本大幅降低；同一预热轨迹可复用于多个候选池。

Conclusion: 验证诱导流替代候选池轨迹有效消除参考路径偏差，零阶选择规则在实用性和效率上具有优势。

Abstract: Targeted data selection aims to identify training samples from a large candidate pool that improve performance on a specific downstream task. Many recent methods estimate candidate utility by aggregating local attribution scores along a trajectory induced by the candidate pool. When the pool is heterogeneous, however, this reference trajectory may be misaligned with the dynamics of a target-aligned selected subset, creating what we call reference path bias. We propose an alternative reference path: a validation-induced flow obtained from a short, capacity-limited warmup on the available target validation proxy. Along this path, candidates are scored by a normalized endpoint loss drop, yielding a simple zero-order selection rule that requires no candidate gradients or Hessian approximations. Across controlled logistic, vision, and instruction-tuning experiments, this score is competitive with strong dynamic attribution baselines while substantially reducing warmup and storage cost. Moreover, since the reference trajectory is decoupled from any specific candidate pool, the same compact warmup can be reused across additional pools without recomputing the trajectory.

</details>


### [465] [AlphaExploitem: Going Beyond the Nash Equilibrium in Poker by Learning to Exploit Suboptimal Play](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09150)
*Vlad Murgoci,Matthijs Spaan,Yaniv Oren*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AlphaExploitem，一个基于层次化Transformer编码器和多样化可剥削对手池训练的强化学习智能体，能够在保持对纳什均衡对手性能的同时有效剥削不完美信息游戏中的次优玩法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在不完美信息博弈中，智能体需要超越纳什均衡策略，通过偏离均衡策略来剥削对手的次优玩法，从而最大化效用。

Method: 在AlphaHoldem基础上引入层次化Transformer编码器，使其能够对历史手牌进行推理；同时通过包含多样化可剥削对手的训练池来改进训练流程。

Result: 在两个标准不完美信息博弈基准测试中，AlphaExploitem成功剥削了分布内和分布外的弱对手，同时保持了对纳什均衡对手的性能不下降。

Conclusion: 层次化Transformer编码器和多样化对手池训练相结合，能够在不牺牲均衡性能的前提下有效学习剥削性策略。

Abstract: Poker is an imperfect information game that has served as a long-standing benchmark for decision-making under uncertainty. To maximize utility beyond the Nash equilibrium, an agent can deviate from Nash-equilibrium policies to exploit suboptimal play. We introduce AlphaExploitem, which extends the competitive RL poker agent AlphaHoldem by using a hierarchical transformer encoder that enables reasoning over previously played hands and modifying the training procedure with the inclusion of a diverse pool of exploitable opponents to facilitate learning to exploit. We train and evaluate AlphaExploitem on two standard benchmarks for imperfect-information games. Empirically, AlphaExploitem successfully exploits weak play by both in- and out-of-distribution opponents, without losing performance against NE opponents.

</details>


### [466] [Learning Multi-Indicator Weights for Data Selection: A Joint Task-Model Adaptation Framework with Efficient Proxies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09665)
*Jingze Song,Zihao Chen,Wenqing Chen,Zibin Zheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种面向指令微调的数据选择框架，通过上下文学习信号为不同下游任务和模型动态学习多指标权重，在仅使用30%训练样本（GSM8K）时达到甚至超越全量微调的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据选择方法大多采用静态、任务无关且模型无关的加权方案，忽略了具体下游任务和模型预训练能力的差异性需求。

Method: 利用紧凑的小型验证集上的上下文学习信号作为高效性能代理，在不进行全量微调的前提下识别最优权重配置，实现数据选择对任务和模型的联合自适应。

Result: 在Mistral、Qwen、Llama等多个模型家族的基准测试上，仅用30%的GSM8K训练样本即可达到或超越全量数据微调的性能。

Conclusion: 推理任务中存在语义多样性与逻辑复杂性的权衡，验证了任务-模型联合适应的必要性。

Abstract: Data selection is a key component of efficient instruction tuning for large language models, as recent work has shown that data quality often matters more than data quantity. Accordingly, prior studies have introduced various multi-dimensional heuristics to evaluate and filter instruction data. However, most existing methods rely on static task-agnostic and model-agnostic weighting schemes, which overlook the varying requirements of specific downstream tasks and the differing pre-existing capabilities of models. In this paper, we propose a framework for learning multi-indicator weights that jointly adapts data selection to both the downstream task and the specific model. Our method identifies optimal weight configurations without full-scale fine-tuning by utilizing in-context learning (ICL) signals on compact tiny-validation sets. These signals serve as efficient performance proxies that ensure high-fidelity evaluation at minimal computational cost. Experiments across multiple benchmarks and model families, including Mistral, Qwen, and Llama, show that the approach achieves performance comparable to or exceeding full-dataset tuning while using only 30\% of the training samples on GSM8K. Furthermore, our analysis reveals a trade-off between semantic diversity and logical complexity in reasoning tasks, highlighting the necessity of joint task-model adaptation.

</details>


### [467] [Predicting Large Model Test Losses with a Noisy Quadratic System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09154)
*Chuning Li,Chris J. Maddison*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种能够根据模型规模(N)、批大小(B)和权重更新次数(K)预测大模型预训练损失的模型，是首个能处理变批大小变化的损失预测模型，在外推计算预算（高达1000倍）时优于Chinchilla的损失模型，并能用于寻找最优配置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的损失预测模型（如Chinchilla）无法处理批大小的变化，且启发式缩放律日益复杂，需要更优的替代方案。

Method: 提出了一种基于模型规模(N)、批大小(B)和权重更新次数(K)的损失预测模型，能够适应批大小变化，并通过实验验证其外推性能。

Result: 该模型在外推计算预算（高达1000倍）时优于Chinchilla的损失模型；模型选择的(N, B, K)配置接近真实最优解。

Conclusion: 损失预测模型是比复杂启发式缩放律更好的替代方案，可用于在时间、内存和计算等资源约束下找到最优配置。

Abstract: We introduce a predictive model that estimates the pre-training loss of large models from model size (N), batch size (B) and number of weight updates (K). This is the first loss prediction model that can handle changing batch size. The model outperforms Chinchilla's loss model, a model of the test loss using the batch size and number of tokens, in terms of projecting the loss at extrapolated compute budgets (up to 1000 folds). A natural use of the model is to find optimal N, B, K configurations under explicit and compound resource constraints like time, memory and compute. In our experiments, the model-selected configurations are close to ground-truth optimal. Our work advocates for loss prediction as a better alternative to heuristic-based laws, which are growing in complexity. The implementation is available on https://github.com/chuningxdy/Noisy-Quadratic-System.

</details>


### [468] [Nectar: Neural Estimation of Cached-Token Attention via Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09778)
*João Monteiro,Michal Klein,Pierre Ablin,Marco Cuturi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Nectar提出用紧凑神经网络替代传统softmax注意力中的KV缓存查找，通过在每层每注意力头训练目标网络和分数网络来预测注意力输出和归一化项，从而将O(n)复杂度降至与上下文长度无关的常数开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统softmax注意力在处理长上下文时需要为每个查询逐一遍历所有缓存的键值对，计算复杂度随上下文长度线性增长（O(n)），这在长文本场景下成为性能瓶颈。

Method: 为每层和每个KV头训练两个小型神经网络：目标网络预测注意力输出，分数网络预测log归一化项。推理时用这两个网络的前向传播代替传统O(n)的注意力计算，复杂度与上下文长度n无关。

Result: 在1.7B到8B参数的模型上对五个长上下文数据集进行实验，近似误差与完整注意力的下一个token准确率差距相关；按层非均匀分配容量可减小该差距；模型生成的文本在语义内容上与使用完整缓存的模型匹配。

Conclusion: Nectar通过轻量级神经网络近似注意力计算，有效降低了长上下文推理的计算开销，且在语义生成质量上保持了与完整注意力的一致性。

Abstract: Evaluating softmax attention over a fixed long context requires reading every cached key-value pair for each new query token. For a given context (a book, a manual, a legal corpus) the attention output is a deterministic function of the query. We propose Nectar, which fits a compact neural network to this function for queries drawn from a task-relevant distribution. Nectar fits two networks per layer and KV-head: a target network that predicts the attention output and a score network that predicts the log-normalizer. The pair plugs into the standard masked self-attention at inference time, replacing the $O(n)$ attention over the cache with a forward pass whose cost does not depend on $n$. Each module carries on the order of $|θ|$ parameters per layer and KV-head, typically much smaller than the $2nd$ KV-cache footprint at the same granularity. We report experiments on models from 1.7B to 8B parameters across five long-context datasets. The approximation error tracks the next-token accuracy gap to full attention, and allocating capacity non-uniformly across layers reduces that gap in our ablation. Beyond this analysis of metrics, we check that the text generations (following a question prompt) of a model equipped with a Nectar module match in semantic content those obtained by giving the same model access to the full cache.

</details>


### [469] [Revisiting Mixture Policies in Entropy-Regularized Actor-Critic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09157)
*Jiamin He,Samuel Neumann,Jincheng Mei,Adam White,Martha White*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了混合策略在连续动作强化学习中的实用价值，提出了一种边缘化重参数化（MRP）估计器来解决混合策略的高方差问题，实验表明MRP混合策略在多个基准上表现优于传统方法，甚至在某些场景下超越高斯策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合策略理论上比单峰策略更具灵活性，但实践中很少被使用。作者想要探究混合策略的表示开销是否真的有用，以及如何让它从理论工具变成实用工具。

Method: 提出了边缘化重参数化（MRP）估计器，相比标准似然比（LR）方法具有更低的方差，有效解决了混合策略缺乏低方差重参数化技巧的问题。

Result: 在Gym MuJoCo、DeepMind Control Suite和MetaWorld上的实验表明，MRP混合策略显著优于LR混合策略，与高斯策略性能相当甚至在某些场景下更好。

Conclusion: MRP混合策略可以作为一种实用的工具，在理论上具有更高的灵活性和熵鲁棒性，实践中通过低方差估计器实现了与高斯策略相当或更优的性能。

Abstract: Mixture policies theoretically offer greater flexibility than unimodal policies in continuous action reinforcement learning, but the practical benefits of this complexity remain elusive. Mixture policies are notably absent from most state-of-the-art algorithms, raising a fundamental question: Is the added representational overhead useful? We show that increased flexibility can theoretically enhance solution quality and entropy robustness. Yet standard algorithms like SAC do not leverage these advantages. A core issue is the lack of a low-variance reparameterization trick for mixtures, a luxury Gaussian policies enjoy. We propose a marginalized reparameterization (MRP) estimator to address this, proving it offers lower variance than the standard likelihood-ratio (LR) approach. Our experiments across Gym MuJoCo, DeepMind Control Suite, and MetaWorld show that MRP mixture policies significantly outperform their LR ones, and reach parity (sometimes better) with Gaussian counterparts. In addition, we do find several cases where MRP mixture policies exhibit clear empirical advantages. In this paper, we provide a clearer understanding of the trade-offs involved, elevating MRP mixture policies from theoretical curiosity to a practical tool.

</details>


### [470] [Objective-Specific Privileged Bases via Full-Prefix Matryoshka Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09160)
*Arghamitra Talukder,Philippe Chlenski,Itsik Pe'er*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了Matryoshka表示学习（MRL）如何生成与任务信号对齐的优先基，在线性情况下可恢复有序主方向，且坐标大小反映信息量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有学习表示通常对旋转变换保持不变，导致单个维度不可识别且可互换。作者希望研究MRL能否打破这种对称性，产生具有任务对齐结构的优先基。

Method: 理论证明：在线性设定下，全前缀MRL可以恢复有序的主方向，且可通过共享统计量高效计算。实验验证：MRL产生一致的逐维度结构，与任务信号对齐，坐标大小反映信息量。

Result: 线性情况下MRL能恢复有序主方向；实验表明MRL的逐维度结构与任务信号一致，坐标幅度表示信息重要性。

Conclusion: MRL能够诱导出与任务对齐的优先基，维度排序有意义且可解释，不同于基于方差或正则化诱导的排序方式。

Abstract: Learned representations are often invariant to rotational transformations, leaving individual dimensions non-identifiable and interchangeable. We study how Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL) induces a task-aligned privileged basis distinct from variance-based or regularizer-induced orderings. In the linear setting, we prove that full-prefix MRL recovers the ordered principal directions, and can be computed efficiently using shared statistics. Empirically, we demonstrate that MRL yields consistent per-dimension structure aligned with task signal, where coordinate magnitude reflects informativeness.

</details>


### [471] [Key-Value Means](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09877)
*Daniel Goldstein,Eugene Cheah*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Key-Value Means (KVM)块级循环注意力机制，支持固定大小或增长状态，实现O(N)复杂度的分块RNN，同时保持Transformer的并行训练优势，并可与线性RNN混合使用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Transformer的二次方注意力和KV缓存开销大，线性RNN在长上下文扩展性上有局限。KVM旨在统一两者的优势：Transformer的可扩展上下文内存和并行训练，以及线性RNN的高效推理。

Method: 提出Key-Value Means (KVM)块级循环注意力机制。支持固定大小（转换为O(N)分块RNN）和可增长状态（次线性状态增长）。无需自定义内核，使用标准操作实现，支持分块并行训练和预填充。

Result: 固定大小KVM的强Transformer基线成为O(N)分块RNN；可增长KVM缓存的长上下文测试表现具竞争力，预填充时间低于二次方，状态增长为次线性；预填充时间复杂度可在O(N)到O(N²)之间连续调节。

Conclusion: KVM在统一框架中同时提供了Transformer（可扩展上下文、并行训练）和线性RNN（高效推理）的优势，可应用于每一层节省KV缓存，也可与LRNN层混合提升长上下文解码能力。

Abstract: We present Key-Value Means ("KVM"), a novel block-recurrence for attention that can accommodate either fixed-size or growing state. Equipping a strong transformer baseline with fixed-size KVM attention layers yields a strong $O(N)$ chunked RNN, while adding only an insignificant number of new parameters. We train a transformer with a growable KVM cache and show it performs competitively on long-context tests with only subquadratic prefill time and sublinear state growth. KVM is implementable with standard operations and without custom kernels, and supports chunk-wise parallelizable training and prefill. It provides many of the benefits of both traditional transformers (expandable context memory, chunk-wise parallelizable training and prefill) and linear RNNs in a single unified package. It can be used on every layer, saving KV-cache memory, and allowing a continuous range of choices of prefill time complexity between $O(N)$ and $O(N^2)$. It can also be implemented in a hybrid solution in tandem with LRNN layers in place of traditional attention, to supplement the LRNN with improved sublinear memory growth context length usage and long context decoding. We release our code at https://github.com/recursal/KVM-paper and trained models at https://huggingface.co/collections/recursal/key-value-means under the Apache 2.0 license.

</details>


### [472] [Delulu: A Verified Multi-Lingual Benchmark for Code Hallucination Detection in Fill-in-the-Middle Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07024)
*Mahdi Erfanian,Nelson Daniel Troncoso,Aashna Garg,Amabel Gale,Xiaoyu Liu,Pareesa Ameneh Golnari,Shengyu Fu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Delulu 是一个多语言 Fill-in-the-Middle 代码补全幻觉基准测试，包含 1,951 个样本、7 种语言和 4 种幻觉类型。通过对抗性流程构建（LLM 生成幻觉 → 多模型评估 → 聚类挖掘难例 → Docker 验证 → 人工审核），评估了 11 个开源模型（0.5B-32B）。最强模型 pass@1 仅 84.5%，Edit Similarity 不超过 0.77，表明该任务的固有难度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码生成模型在 Fill-in-the-Middle 任务中经常产生幻觉（如虚构 API、无效参数、未定义变量、不存在的导入），这些错误看似合理但导致运行时错误。缺乏一个全面、严格验证的多语言基准来量化这一挑战。

Method: 通过对抗性流程构建基准：前沿 LLM 生成看似合理的幻觉 → 四个不同评判模型评估 → 基于嵌入的聚类挖掘更难样本 → 自包含 Docker 容器验证（正确补全能编译，幻觉补全产生预期运行时错误）→ 人工专家审核剔除有偏差样本。覆盖 7 种语言、4 种幻觉类型，共 1,951 个样本。

Result: 评估 11 个开源 FIM 模型（5 个系列，0.5B-32B 参数）。最强模型 pass@1 仅 84.5%，所有模型系列的 Edit Similarity 不超过 0.77，每个系列在非平凡比例的样本上生成与幻觉对齐的补全。

Conclusion: Delulu 揭示的难度是任务固有的而非模型家族特有的；当前最强模型尚未充分解决 FIM 中的幻觉问题。

Abstract: Large Language Models for code generation frequently produce hallucinations in Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) tasks -- plausible but incorrect completions such as invented API methods, invalid parameters, undefined variables, or non-existent imports. These failures pass superficial review yet introduce runtime errors. We introduce Delulu, a verified multi-lingual benchmark of 1,951 FIM samples across 7 languages and 4 hallucination types. Samples are curated through an adversarial pipeline: a frontier LLM generates plausible hallucinations, four diverse judge models evaluate them, embedding-based clustering mines progressively harder examples, self-contained Docker containers verify that golden completions compile while hallucinated variants produce the expected runtime error, and a final human-expert review removes any remaining biased or trivially decidable samples. We evaluate 11 open-weight FIM models from five families spanning 0.5B-32B parameters: a six-point Qwen2.5-Coder scaling slate, plus a cross-family slate (CodeLlama, DeepSeek-Coder-V2, StarCoder2). The strongest model reaches only 84.5% pass@1, no family exceeds 0.77 Edit Similarity, and every family produces hallucination-aligned completions on a non-trivial share of samples, confirming that the difficulty exposed by Delulu is task-intrinsic rather than family-specific. We release the benchmark, containers, and evaluation framework at https://github.com/microsoft/delulu.

</details>


### [473] [Prediction Bottlenecks Don't Discover Causal Structure (But Here's What They Actually Do)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09169)
*Ankit Hemant Lade,Sai Krishna Jasti,Indar Kumar,Aman Chadha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对"Mamba状态空间模型通过简单读取恢复Granger因果结构"这一结论进行了严格的复现和检验，发现该方法层面的主张在标准化基准测试中不成立：线性瓶颈模型表现相当或更好，Lasso在合成数据上优于它，在Lorenz-96上经典方法领先，且声称的干预优势约60%是样本量混淆，剩余效应在标准干预下消失且具方法无关性。论文的主要贡献是构建了一个可复用的基准测试框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证一个具体研究声称——即Mamba状态空间模型只需简单读取即可恢复Granger因果结构——是否可复现、是否具有方法特异性，并为该类因果发现声明建立一个标准化的可重复验证基准。

Method: 构建了包含标准化合成数据生成器（VAR/Lorenz/CauseMe风格）、三种干预语义（do(X=c)、软噪声、随机强制）、三个真实数据集边源卡片，以及规模匹配的控制臂的可复用基准测试框架，通过五个阶段逐步验证原始声明。

Result: 原始方法层面的声明在基准测试中未能成立：(i) 线性瓶颈模型表现相当或更好；(ii) 在合成CauseMe基准和Lorenz-96上，经典方法（Lasso、PCMCI、Granger）优于该模型；(iii) 声称的干预优势约60%源于样本量混淆，剩余效应在标准do(X=c)干预下消失；(iv) 残余效应在经典双变量Granger中也能复现，属于方法无关现象。

Conclusion: 原始方法层面的因果发现声明不成立，论文的主要持久贡献是构建了一个可复用的基准测试框架，每个验证阶段构成该框架的一个控制臂。

Abstract: A Mamba state-space model trained only for next-step prediction appears to recover Granger-causal structure through a simple readout $S = |W_{out} W_{in}|$, with early experiments suggesting the phenomenon generalized across architectures and benefited from interventional data at $p < 10^{-5}$. We package the protocol used to test that claim -- standardized synthetic generators (VAR/Lorenz/CauseMe-style), three intervention semantics ($do(X=c)$, soft-noise, random-forcing), edge-provenance cards on three real datasets, and size-matched control arms -- as a reusable falsification benchmark, and walk the claim through it in five stages. The method-level claim does not survive: (i) a plain linear bottleneck does as well or better; (ii) tuned Lasso beats the bottleneck on synthetic CauseMe-style benchmarks, and on Lorenz-96 (the only real benchmark with unambiguous ground truth) classical PCMCI and Granger lead a tight cluster in which the bottleneck trails; (iii) the headline intervention advantage is roughly 60% a sample-size confound, and the residual disappears under standard $do(X=c)$ interventions, surviving only under a non-standard random-forcing scheme; (iv) even that residual reproduces, with a larger effect, in classical bivariate Granger -- the effect is method-agnostic. What survives is a narrow characterization result; the benchmark is the lasting artifact, and each stage above is one of its control arms.

</details>


### [474] [G-Zero: Self-Play for Open-Ended Generation from Zero Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09959)
*Chengsong Huang,Haolin Liu,Tong Zheng,Runpeng Dai,Langlin Huang,Jinyuan Li,Zongxia Li,Zhepei Wei,Yu Meng,Jiaxin Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出G-Zero框架，通过Hint-δ内在奖励机制实现无验证器的LLM自我进化，在不可验证领域实现持续自我提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自进化LLM在可验证领域表现优异，但在开放任务中依赖代理LLM作为评判者，导致能力瓶颈和奖励欺骗问题，亟需无验证器的自进化框架。

Method: 提出G-Zero框架，核心创新是Hint-δ内在奖励，通过Proposer模型（GRPO训练）生成挑战性查询和提示，Generator模型（DPO训练）内化提示引导的改进，形成协同进化。

Result: 理论上提供了理想标准DPO版本的最佳迭代次优性保证，前提是Proposer提供充分探索覆盖且数据过滤保持伪标签分数低噪声。

Conclusion: 通过完全依赖内部分布动力学推导监督信号，G-Zero绕过了外部评判者的能力上限，为不可验证领域的持续LLM自我进化提供了可扩展、稳健的路径。

Abstract: Self-evolving LLMs excel in verifiable domains but struggle in open-ended tasks, where reliance on proxy LLM judges introduces capability bottlenecks and reward hacking. To overcome this, we introduce G-Zero, a verifier-free, co-evolutionary framework for autonomous self-improvement. Our core innovation is Hint-$δ$, an intrinsic reward that quantifies the predictive shift between a Generator model's unassisted response and its response conditioned on a self-generated hint. Using this signal, a Proposer model is trained via GRPO to continuously target the Generator's blind spots by synthesizing challenging queries and informative hints. The Generator is concurrently optimized via DPO to internalize these hint-guided improvements. Theoretically, we prove a best-iterate suboptimality guarantee for an idealized standard-DPO version of G-Zero, provided that the Proposer induces sufficient exploration coverage and the data filteration keeps pseudo-label score noise low. By deriving supervision entirely from internal distributional dynamics, G-Zero bypasses the capability ceilings of external judges, providing a scalable, robust pathway for continuous LLM self-evolution across unverifiable domains.

</details>


### [475] [WavesFM: Hierarchical Representation Learning for Longitudinal Wearable Sensor Waveforms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09173)
*Peng Cao,Zhijian Yang,Tennison Liu,Jonathan Wang,Jiang Wu,Magdalena Proszewska,Arvind Pillai,Mingwu Gao,Amir Farjadian,Lawrence Cai,Emily Blanchard,Daniel McDuff,Pramod Rudrapatna,Matthew Thompson,Anupam Pathak,Mark Malhotra,Shwetak Patel,Dina Katabi,Paolo Di Achille,Ming-Zher Poh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出WavesFM，一种两阶段自监督学习框架，用于处理可穿戴传感器产生的长时间序列生理数据。第一阶段预训练片段级编码器提取局部波形特征，第二阶段训练时序编码器建模多日尺度的动态变化。该模型在6.8M小时（32.4万人）和5.3M小时（1万人）数据上预训练，在58项下游任务上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自监督学习方法存在两难困境：要么从短波形片段学习丰富的形态学表示但丢失长期动态信息，要么从粗粒度手工特征（如心率、步数）建模行为模式但放弃了原始波形中的细微预测信号。作者希望弥合这一鸿沟，同时捕获局部信号语义与昼夜节律及日间变化。

Method: 提出两阶段SSL框架：第一阶段，预训练片段级编码器（segment-level encoder），从短波形片段中提取局部嵌入特征；第二阶段，训练时序编码器（temporal encoder），对多日时间尺度上的嵌入序列进行建模。这种层次化方法克服了高分辨率长序列数据的计算复杂性。

Result: 第一阶段在680万小时（32.4万人）数据上预训练，第二阶段在530万小时（1万人）数据上预训练。在涵盖人口统计、生活方式、健康状况和药物使用等58项多样化任务中，WavesFM展现出优越性能。

Conclusion: 层次化的两阶段SSL框架能够有效处理自由生活条件下的高分辨率、长时序生理信号，同时捕捉局部波形语义和长期动态变化，为可穿戴健康监测提供了一种强大的基础模型方案。

Abstract: Wearable sensors enable the continuous acquisition of high-resolution physiological waveforms, such as photoplethysmography and accelerometry, under free-living conditions. However, inferring health-related phenotypes from these signals presents significant challenges due to high sampling frequencies, multimodal dependencies, and extreme sequence lengths (e.g., weeks of recordings), compounded by a scarcity of ground-truth labels. To address these challenges, existing self-supervised learning (SSL) methodologies typically follow two paradigms: (1) learning rich morphological representations from short waveform segments while collapsing longitudinal dynamics through simple aggregation, or (2) modeling behavioral patterns from coarse, hand-crafted features (e.g. heart rate, step counts) spanning longer horizons but foregoing subtle, predictive signatures in raw waveforms. To bridge this gap, we propose WavesFM, a foundation model utilizing a two-stage SSL framework for longitudinal physiological data. Specifically, we decompose the learning problem into two stages: first, a segment-level encoder is pretrained to extract local embeddings from short waveforms; subsequently, a temporal encoder is trained to model the sequence of these embeddings across a multi-day horizon. This hierarchical approach overcomes the computational complexity of high-resolution, long-sequence data, allowing the overall model to capture both local signal semantics and the complex circadian and inter-day variations governing physiological dynamics. Pretrained on over 6.8M hours (N=324k individuals) of recordings for the first stage and 5.3M hours (N=10k) for the second stage, WavesFM demonstrates superior performance across 58 diverse tasks spanning demographics, lifestyle, health conditions, and medications.

</details>


### [476] [The Truth Lies Somewhere in the Middle (of the Generated Tokens)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09969)
*Sophie L. Wang,Phillip Isola,Brian Cheung*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现，在自回归生成模型中，对所有生成token的隐藏状态进行平均池化，比使用单个token更能反映模型的语义表示，并且在语言、视觉和蛋白质领域均验证了这一点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索如何从自回归生成模型的隐藏状态中，得到能更好反映模型内部状态的表示，挑战仅使用单个token表示的做法。

Method: 采用平均池化聚合所有生成token的隐藏状态，并通过核对齐方法，在语言、视觉和蛋白质三个领域的参考空间中进行定量评估。

Result: 平均池化比单个token获得更语义化的表示；信息分布在多个生成token上而非集中在某一位置；生成token的表示优于提示token的表示；跨生成过程的对齐揭示了可解释的模型行为动态。

Conclusion: 平均池化是一种简单而有效的表示聚合方法，信息在生成token间分布式编码，这为理解LM内部状态提供了新视角。

Abstract: How should hidden states generated autoregressively be collapsed into a representation that reflects a language model's internal state? Despite tokens being generated under causal masking, we find that mean pooling across their hidden states yields more semantic representations than any individual token alone. We quantify this through kernel alignment to reference spaces in language, vision, and protein domains. The improvement through mean pooling is consistent with information being distributed across generated tokens rather than localized to a single position. Furthermore, representations derived from generated tokens outperform those from prompt tokens, and alignment across generation reveals interpretable dynamics in model behavior.

</details>


### [477] [Navigating LLM Valley: From AdamW to Memory-Efficient and Matrix-Based Optimizers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09176)
*Aditya Ranganath*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统综述了大语言模型优化器的设计，将现有工作分为经典一阶优化器、自适应优化器、低内存变体、二阶与曲率感知方法、符号与发现式优化器、低秩与投影方法、以及矩阵级优化器（如Muon）等类别。论文主张LLM优化器研究正从单一算法的加速宣称，转向严谨的、考虑规模效应的联合评估，综合考量收敛性、稳定性、内存和实现复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型的训练需要优化算法在统计有效性、计算效率和内存效率之间取得平衡。尽管Adam仍是主流优化器，但近期工作已重新审视优化栈的各个组件。本文旨在系统梳理这些进展，为研究者提供全面的优化器设计图景。

Method: 采用系统和优化的双重视角，将文献组织为七个类别：经典一阶优化器、自适应优化器、内存高效变体、二阶与曲率感知方法、符号与发现式优化器、低秩与投影方法、矩阵级优化器（如Muon）。同时讨论基准测试方法论，包括超参数公平性、规模依赖性、墙钟效率、token效率、内存开销和下游评估。

Result: 识别出LLM优化器研究正在经历范式转变：从追求单一算法的速度提升，转向在收敛性、稳定性、内存和实现复杂度等多个维度上进行严谨的、考虑规模效应的联合评估。

Conclusion: LLM优化器研究已进入新阶段，需要建立更严格、更具可比性的评估框架，以推动优化算法在实际大规模训练中的有效应用。

Abstract: Training large language models requires optimization algorithms that are not only statistically effective, but also computationally and memory efficient at extreme scale. Although Adam remains the dominant optimizer for large-scale language-model pretraining and fine-tuning, recent work has revisited nearly every component of the optimization stack: adaptive moment estimation, decoupled weight decay, memory footprint, curvature approximation, sign-based updates, large-batch stability, low-rank gradient structure, and matrix-wise orthogonalized updates. This survey reviews optimizer design for large language models through a systems-and-optimization lens. We organize the literature into classical first-order optimizers, adaptive optimizers, memory-efficient variants, second-order and curvature-aware methods, sign-based and discovered optimizers, low-rank and projection-based methods, and matrix-based optimizers such as Muon. We also discuss benchmarking methodology, including hyperparameter fairness, scale dependence, wall-clock efficiency, token efficiency, memory overhead, and downstream evaluation. We argue that optimizer research for LLMs is entering a new phase: moving from single-algorithm speedup claims toward rigorous, scale-aware comparisons that jointly evaluate convergence, stability, memory, and implementation complexity.

</details>


### [478] [Learning When to Stop: Selective Imitation Learning Under Arbitrary Dynamics Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09183)
*Surbhi Goel,Jonathan Pei,James Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究选择性模仿学习问题，提出SeqRejectron算法，使学习者在测试环境动态变化时能够自主选择停止以避免不可靠行为，提供了与视界无关的样本复杂度保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在模仿学习中，训练环境与测试环境的动态变化会导致标准行为克隆方法失效——学习者必须在每个状态都做出决策，即使演示数据没有提供有效信息，这可能导致性能严重下降。因此需要一种选择性模仿机制，让学习者在无法可靠行动时选择停止。

Method: 提出SeqRejectron算法，利用一组验证器策略构建停止规则（验证器数量与视界或策略类无关）。对于确定性策略，在稀疏成本假设下实现$\tilde{O}(\log|Π|/ε^2)$的与视界无关样本复杂度；对于随机策略，使用累积Hellinger停止时间获得类似保证。

Result: 算法在确定性策略下实现与视界无关的$\tilde{O}(\log|Π|/ε^2)$样本复杂度；在随机策略下通过累积Hellinger停止时间获得类似保证。框架扩展到专家模型误指定以及训练/测试环境使用不同专家策略的情况，结果随误指定程度优雅退化。

Conclusion: 选择性模仿学习是应对训练与测试环境动态变化的有效范式，SeqRejectron算法提供了理论保证，为实际部署中安全可靠的模仿学习奠定了基础。

Abstract: Behavior cloning provides strong imitation learning guarantees when training and test environments share the same dynamics.
