We propose R-GFM, a Riemannian Graph-of-Graphs (GoG) based foundation model, that treats structural scale as a first-class citizen in modeling. R-GFM constructs a multi-scale GoG over-sampled subgraphs at different hop distances and learns geometry-adaptive representations from Riemannian manifolds. Theoretical analysis shows that R-GFM reduces structural domain generalization error compared to fixed-scale GFMs. Experiments on various datasets demonstrate that R-GFM achieves state-of-the-art performance, with up to a 49% relative improvement on downstream tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/USTC-DataDarknessLab/R-GFM.

</details>


### [590] [Continual Harness: Online Adaptation for Self-Improving Foundation Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09998)
*Seth Karten,Joel Zhang,Tersoo Upaa,Ruirong Feng,Wenzhe Li,Chengshuai Shi,Chi Jin,Kiran Vodrahalli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Continual Harness方法，使具身智能体无需人类干预即可在单次运行中自我改进，在宝可梦游戏任务上达到接近手工专家系统的性能，并进一步结合过程奖励学习实现无重置的持续训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有编码框架（如Claude Code）已整合工具、记忆和规划于基础模型，但具身智能体在长时域、部分可观测的决策任务中缺乏类似的自动化自我改进框架。

Method: 从Gemini Plays Pokemon（GPP）的人类在环实验出发，观察到智能体通过长上下文记忆涌现自我改进信号；进而提出Continual Harness：仅需最小环境接口，智能体在执行动作与自我完善提示、子智能体、技能和记忆之间交替，无需重置环境；最后引入在线过程奖励协同学习循环，用前沿模型标注开源智能体轨迹并更新模型。

Result: GPP首次完成宝可梦Blue、Yellow Legacy困难模式及Crystal无败绩；Continual Harness在Pokemon Red和Emerald上大幅降低按键成本，恢复手工专家系统的大部分性能差距；过程奖励协同学习在无环境重置下持续提升里程碑进展。

Conclusion: 通过形式化智能体在任务执行中观察到的自我改进行为，提出无需人类在环、无需重置环境的通用自我改进框架，为具身智能体的持续学习提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Coding harnesses such as Claude Code and OpenHands wrap foundation models with tools, memory, and planning, but no equivalent exists for embodied agents' long-horizon partial-observability decision-making. We first report our Gemini Plays Pokemon (GPP) experiments. With iterative human-in-the-loop harness refinement, GPP became the first AI system to complete Pokemon Blue, Yellow Legacy on hard mode, and Crystal without a lost battle. In the hardest stages, the agent itself began iterating on its strategy through long-context memory, surfacing emergent self-improvement signals alongside human-in-the-loop refinement. Continual Harness removes the human fully from this loop: a reset-free self-improving harness for embodied agents that formalizes and automates what we observed. Starting from only a minimal environment interface, the agent alternates between acting and refining its own prompt, sub-agents, skills, and memory, drawing on any past trajectory data. Prompt-optimization methods require episode resets; Continual Harness adapts online within a single run. On Pokemon Red and Emerald across frontier models, Continual Harness starting from scratch substantially reduces button-press cost relative to the minimalist baseline and recovers a majority of the gap to a hand-engineered expert harness, with capability-dependent gains, despite starting from the same raw interface with no curated knowledge, no hand-crafted tools, and no domain scaffolding. We then close the loop with the model itself: an online process-reward co-learning loop, in which an open-source agent's rollouts through the refining harness are relabeled by a frontier teacher and used to update the model, drives sustained in-game milestone progress on Pokemon Red without resetting the environment between training iterations.

</details>


### [591] [Anchor-guided Hypergraph Condensation with Dual-level Discrimination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10001)
*Fan Li,Xiaoyang Wang,Chen Chen,Wenjie Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出AHGCDD方法，通过锚点引导的超图合成和双级判别机制，解决现有超图压缩方法中结构不对齐和计算开销大的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有超图压缩方法存在两个问题：(1) 结构生成器预训练后不与压缩特征联合优化，导致结构不对齐；(2) 基于轨迹的优化在精炼阶段计算开销大，压缩效率低。

Method: 提出AHGCDD方法，包含三个关键组件：(1) 基于Heat Kernel PageRank (HKPR)的节点初始化模块，将结构知识编码到特征语义中；(2) 锚点引导的超边合成策略，实现压缩特征与结构的联合优化；(3) 理论上可证明的双级判别目标，无需冗余HNN训练即可保持效用。

Result: 大量实验表明AHGCDD在有效性和效率上均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: AHGCDD通过HKPR初始化、锚点引导合成和双级判别，有效解决了超图压缩中的结构不对齐和计算开销问题，实现了高效且有效的超图压缩。

Abstract: The increasing prevalence of large-scale hypergraphs poses significant computational challenges for hypergraph neural network (HNN) training. To address this, hypergraph condensation (HGC) distills large real hypergraphs into compact yet informative synthetic ones, beyond graph condensation (GC) methods limited to pairwise relations. However, existing HGC methods rely on decoupled training architectures, where structure generators are pre-trained on the original hypergraph but not jointly optimized with condensed features during refinement, resulting in misaligned structures that degrade downstream utility. Moreover, trajectory-based optimization incurs substantial computational overhead in refinement, limiting condensation efficiency. To tackle these issues, we propose \textbf{A}nchor-guided \textbf{H}yper\textbf{G}raph \textbf{C}ondensation with \textbf{D}ual-level \textbf{D}iscrimination (\textbf{AHGCDD}), which consists of three key components: (1) a node initialization module based on Heat Kernel PageRank (HKPR) to encode structural knowledge into feature semantics; (2) an anchor-guided hyperedge synthesis strategy for joint optimization of condensed features and structure; (3) a theoretically grounded dual-level discrimination objective for utility-preserving condensation without redundant HNN training. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior effectiveness and efficiency of AHGCDD.

</details>


### [592] [The Value of Mechanistic Priors in Sequential Decision Making](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10018)
*Itai Shufaro,Gal Benor,Shie Mannor*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个理论框架，通过机制信息量（mechanistic information）量化混合机理模型在序贯决策中的样本效率优势，在渐进和初始阶段分别给出了理论边界，并通过5-FU给药模拟验证了机理先验相比LLM先验的安全优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合机理模型（物理先验+残差学习）有望减少决策所需数据量，但缺乏可计算的标准来检验这一优势。本文旨在建立理论框架，量化机理先验在序贯决策中的价值。

Method: 引入机制信息量（mechanistic information）——模型推荐策略π̂与真实最优策略π*之间的互信息，通过占用加权偏差Bμ量化。在渐进大N情形下，证明贝叶斯遗憾与残差熵H_mech匹配，给出理论样本复杂度降低比H(μ)/H_mech；在小N的burn-in区间，给出错误先验的下界。通过5-FU给药模拟验证，并与LLM先验对比。

Result: 在渐进区间，混合模型的理论样本复杂度相比无先验基线降低H(μ)/H_mech倍；在burn-in区间，机理先验能带来显著的样本效率提升；LLM先验在机制信息量上严重不足，不适合安全关键应用。

Conclusion: 机理先验在序贯决策中具有可量化的样本效率优势，尤其在小样本的burn-in阶段效果显著；物理化先验相比LLM先验更安全可靠，适用于安全关键场景。

Abstract: Hybrid mechanistic models, physical priors with learned residuals, promise to reduce the data required for good decisions, but have no computable criterion to test this. We characterize the value of mechanistic priors in sequential decision-making within both asymptotic and burn-in regimes. To formalize this, we introduce the mechanistic information of a model -- the mutual information between the model's recommended policy $\hatπ$ and the true optimal policy $π^*$ -- quantified via an occupancy-weighted bias $B_μ$. In the asymptotic regime (large $N$), matched bounds reveal that Bayesian regret scales with the residual entropy $H_{\mathrm{mech}}$, delivering a theoretical sample complexity reduction of $H(μ)/H_{\mathrm{mech}}$ compared to an uninformed baseline. Furthermore, we provide a model certificate to determine empirical sample efficiency. Complementarily, in the clinically relevant burn-in regime (small $N$), we establish a lower bound on the penalty incurred by confidently wrong priors. We demonstrate both the asymptotic and burn-in bounds across 5-fluorouracil (5-FU) dosing simulations motivated by published FOLFOX pharmacokinetic data, where a hybrid prior yields large sample-efficiency gains in the burn-in regime. Finally, we contrast these grounded models with LLM priors, demonstrating that LLMs can suffer severe losses in mechanistic information, thereby motivating the exclusive use of physically-grounded priors for safety-critical applications.

</details>


### [593] [TrajDLM: Topology-Aware Block Diffusion Language Model for Trajectory Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10020)
*Wilson Wongso,Lihuan Li,Arian Prabowo,Xiachong Lin,Baiyu Chen,Hao Xue,Flora D. Salim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TrajDLM，一种基于块扩散语言模型的拓扑感知轨迹生成框架，在保证拓扑一致性的同时实现高效生成，速度比现有方法快2.8倍，并在多个城市数据集上取得优异性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轨迹生成模型存在效率与拓扑保真度之间的权衡：连续空间方法生成快但忽略路网拓扑，拓扑感知方法依赖搜索式自回归解码导致速度慢。需要一种兼顾效率与拓扑一致性的轨迹生成方法。

Method: TrajDLM将轨迹建模为离散路段序列，结合块扩散骨干网络进行高效去噪、路网编码器提供拓扑感知嵌入、以及拓扑约束采样确保轨迹的连贯性与真实性。

Result: 在三个城市规模数据集上，TrajDLM在细粒度局部相似性指标上表现优异，生成速度比先前工作快2.8倍，并在未见过的交通模式等域外迁移任务中展现出强大的零样本泛化能力。

Conclusion: 块式离散扩散作为可扩展的轨迹生成方法是有效的，能够实现准确且高效的轨迹生成，弥合了效率与拓扑保真度之间的差距。

Abstract: Generating high-fidelity synthetic GPS trajectories is increasingly important for applications in transportation, urban planning, and what-if scenario simulation, especially as privacy concerns limit access to real-world mobility data. Existing trajectory generation models face a trade-off between efficiency and faithfulness to road network topology: continuous-space methods enable fast generation but ignore the road network, while topology-aware approaches rely on search-based autoregressive decoding that limits generation speed. We propose TrajDLM, a topology-aware trajectory generation framework based on block diffusion language models that bridges this gap. TrajDLM models trajectories as sequences of discrete road segments, combining a block diffusion backbone for efficient denoising, topology-aware embeddings from a road network encoder, and topology-constrained sampling to ensure coherent and realistic trajectories. Across three city-scale datasets, TrajDLM achieves strong performance on fine-grained local similarity metrics while being up to $2.8\times$ faster than prior work, and demonstrates strong zero-shot transfer across domains, including unseen transportation modes. These results highlight the effectiveness of block-wise discrete diffusion as a scalable approach to accurate and efficient trajectory generation. Our code is available at https://github.com/cruiseresearchgroup/TrajDLM/

</details>


### [594] [Adaptive Action Chunking via Multi-Chunk Q Value Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10044)
*Yongjae Shin,Jongseong Chae,Seongmin Kim,Jongeui Park,Youngchul Sung*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出自适应动作分块(ACH)算法，通过Transformer架构动态调整动作序列长度，在34个任务中优于固定长度基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习中的动作分块方法使用固定块长度，导致性能瓶颈，因为最优块长度随状态和任务动态变化。

Method: 基于Transformer架构，在一次前向传播中同时估算所有候选块长度的动作价值，动态选择当前状态下的最优块长度，实现离线到在线的强化学习。

Result: 在34个具有挑战性的任务上，ACH持续优于固定长度基线方法，展现更强的泛化能力和学习效率。

Conclusion: 自适应动态调整动作块长度能有效提升强化学习性能，为动作分块技术提供了更灵活、高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Action chunking emerged as a pivotal technique in imitation learning, enabling policies to predict cohesive action sequences rather than single actions. Recently, this approach has expanded to reinforcement learning (RL), enhancing behavioral consistency and reducing bootstrapping errors in value function estimation. However, existing methods rely on a fixed chunk length, creating a performance bottleneck as the optimal length varies across states and tasks. In this paper, we propose Adaptive Action CHunking (ACH), a novel offline-to-online RL algorithm that dynamically modulates chunk length during both training and inference. To find the optimal chunk length for a dynamically varying current state, we simultaneously estimate action-values for all candidate chunk lengths in a single forward pass, using a Transformer-based architecture. Our mechanism allows the agent to select the most effective chunk length adaptively based on the current state. Evaluated on 34 challenging tasks, ACH consistently outperforms fixed-length baselines, demonstrating superior generalization and learning efficiency in complex environments.

</details>


### [595] [Rethinking Loss Reweighting for Imbalance Learning as an Inverse Problem: A Neural Collapse Point of View](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10047)
*Jinping Wang,Zixin Tong,Zhiwu Xie,Zhiqiang Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于神经坍塌（NC）理想几何结构（单纯形等角紧框架）的逆视角重加权策略，将损失重加权视为逆问题，通过动态推断类别权重使各类平均损失相等，有效提升长尾分类性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长尾分类中的损失重加权策略多依赖启发式方法，缺乏明确且合理的目标指引。

Method: 受神经坍塌（NC）中理想单纯形等角紧框架（ETF）终点几何的启发，将各类平均损失相等作为合理目标；将损失重加权建模为逆问题，动态推断类别权重以逼近该理想目标。

Result: NC指标表明该方法能有效降低损失不平衡系数，更贴合NC几何结构；在多个数据集上持续优于强长尾基线方法。

Conclusion: 基于NC理想几何的逆视角重加权是一种有效且理论动机清晰的长尾分类策略。

Abstract: Loss reweighting is a widely used strategy for long-tailed classification, but existing reweighting strategies often rely on heuristics and rarely define a well-specified target. Inspired by Neural Collapse (NC), the ideal simplex Equiangular Tight Frame (ETF) terminal geometry suggests equal per-class average loss as a reasonable target for reweighting. Based on the ideal equal loss objective, we consider loss reweighting as an inverse problem and propose an inverse-view reweighting strategy that infers class weights dynamically to match this ideal objective. Empirically, NC metrics suggest our method can effectively reduce the loss imbalance coefficient and closer alignment with NC geometry while consistently outperforming strong long-tailed baselines on different datasets.

</details>


### [596] [Metis: Learning to Jailbreak LLMs via Self-Evolving Metacognitive Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10067)
*Huilin Zhou,Jian Zhao,Yilu Zhong,Zhen Liang,Xiuyuan Chen,Yuchen Yuan,Tianle Zhang,Chi Zhang,Lan Zhang,Xuelong Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Metis是一个将越狱攻击重新形式化为对抗性POMDP中的推理时策略优化框架，通过自我演化的元认知循环进行因果诊断，在10个模型上平均ASR达89.2%，同时降低8.2倍token成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动化红队方法依赖静态启发式或随机搜索，面对先进的安全对齐时表现脆弱，缺乏可解释性和高效性。

Method: 将越狱攻击建模为对抗性POMDP中的推理时策略优化问题，采用自我演化的元认知循环对目标防御逻辑进行因果诊断，并将结构化反馈作为语义梯度来精细化攻击策略。

Result: 在10个模型上平均ASR达89.2%，对O1和GPT-5-chat分别达76.0%和78.0%，token成本平均降低8.2倍（最高11.4倍）。

Conclusion: 当前防御在面对内部引导的闭环推理轨迹时仍然脆弱，亟需能够动态推理安全性的下一代防御机制。

Abstract: Red teaming is critical for uncovering vulnerabilities in Large Language Models (LLMs). While automated methods have improved scalability, existing approaches often rely on static heuristics or stochastic search, rendering them brittle against advanced safety alignment. To address this, we introduce Metis, a framework that reformulates jailbreaking as inference-time policy optimization within an adversarial Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP). Metis employs a self-evolving metacognitive loop to perform causal diagnosis of a target's defense logic and leverages structured feedback as a semantic gradient to refine its policy, offering enhanced interpretability through transparent reasoning traces. Extensive evaluations across 10 diverse models demonstrate that Metis achieves the strongest average Attack Success Rate (ASR) among compared methods at 89.2%, maintaining high efficacy on resilient frontier models (e.g., 76.0% on O1 and 78.0% on GPT-5-chat) where traditional baselines exhibit substantial performance degradation. By replacing redundant exploration with directed optimization, Metis reduces token costs by an average of 8.2x and up to 11.4x. Our analysis reveals that current defenses remain vulnerable to internally-steered, closed-loop reasoning trajectories under the tested settings, highlighting a critical need for next-generation defenses capable of reasoning about safety dynamically during inference.

</details>


### [597] [Unlocking air traffic flow prediction through microscopic aircraft-state modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10083)
*Bin Wang,Anqi Liu,Jiangtao Zhao,Yanyong Huang,Peilan He,Guiyuan Jiang,Feng Hong,Yanwei Yu,Tianrui Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AeroSense是一种从瞬时空中交通态势（ADS-B轨迹）直接预测未来区域交通流量的"状态到流量"建模框架，无需历史时间窗口，在高密度交通场景下显著优于传统聚合时间序列方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将交通流建模为聚合时间序列，忽略了航空器状态、边界交互和管制意图等细粒度信息，而终端空域短时交通流预测对主动空管至关重要。

Method: 提出AeroSense框架，将瞬时空域态势（航空器状态的动态集合）端到端映射到未来区域交通流量，保留航空器级动力学特征，适应不同交通密度，无需历史回溯窗口。

Result: 在大规模真实数据集上的实验表明，AeroSense在预测精度上持续优于基于聚合的预测方法，特别是在高密度交通时段表现突出。

Conclusion: 瞬时空域态势可作为传统时间序列交通流预测范式的有效替代方案。

Abstract: Short-term air traffic flow prediction in terminal airspace is essential for proactive air traffic management. Existing approaches predominantly model traffic flow as aggregated time series, despite traffic dynamics being governed by aircraft states and interactions in continuous airspace. Such aggregation obscures fine-grained information including aircraft kinematics, boundary interactions, and control intent. Here we present AeroSense, a state-to-flow modeling framework that predicts future traffic flow directly from instantaneous airspace situations represented as dynamic sets of aircraft states derived from ADS-B trajectories. By establishing an end-to-end mapping from microscopic aircraft states to future regional traffic flow, AeroSense preserves aircraft-level dynamics while naturally accommodating varying traffic density without relying on historical look-back windows. Experiments on a large-scale real-world dataset show that AeroSense consistently improves predictive accuracy over aggregation-based forecasting approaches, particularly during high-density traffic periods. These findings suggest that instantaneous airspace situations provide an effective alternative to conventional time-series-based traffic forecasting paradigms.

</details>


### [598] [TopoU-Net: a U-Net architecture for topological domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10091)
*Gaurav Gaurav,Ibrahem ALJabea,Yaroslav Zakomornyy,Eric Frank,Mohamed Elhamdadi,Theodore Papamarkou,Mustafa Hajij*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TopoU-Net，将U-Net架构推广到拓扑域（组合复形），通过秩路径（rank-path）在单元（细胞）之间进行层次化编码-解码，适用于节点、边、面、超边等混合高阶结构数据，在多个任务上取得最优结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经网络常将混合高阶结构数据强制转换为网格、图或序列，丢失了高阶结构信息，且编码器-解码器设计往往是领域特化的，缺乏通用模板。

Method: 将U-Net视为层次化编码-解码原则（表示空间、传输映射、跳跃连接），利用组合复形的单元、关联和秩来自然实现这些要素。TopoU-Net通过秩路径（从输入秩到瓶颈秩再返回）进行编码（沿关联映射上推上链）和解码（下推），并在匹配秩处通过跳跃连接融合特征。瓶颈支持比（瓶颈单元数与输入单元数之比）由复形和路径决定，而非任意池化。

Result: 在节点分类（8个数据集中的6个取得最强平均准确率）、图分类、超图节点分类（5个数据集中的4个）、网格分类和图像重建等任务上，TopoU-Net均优于基线方法，特别是在异配图上提升最大。消融实验表明瓶颈压缩严重时跳跃连接最为关键。

Conclusion: TopoU-Net提供了一个可重用的高阶结构数据编码器-解码器模板，秩替代了空间尺度作为架构设计的核心决策，瓶颈支持比能够解释跳跃连接的必要性。

Abstract: Many modern datasets mix points, edges, regions, groups, objects, events, hyperedges, and relations. Yet neural architectures often force such data into grids, graphs, or sequences, obscuring higher-order structure and making encoder-decoder designs domain-specific. We view U-Net not as a grid-specific architecture, but as a hierarchical encoder-decoder principle: representation spaces, transport maps between levels, and skip connections between matched levels. Combinatorial complexes naturally supply these ingredients through cells, incidences, and ranks. We introduce TopoU-Net, a rank-path U-Net for topological domains. Given a path from an input rank to a bottleneck rank and back, the encoder lifts cochains upward along incidence maps, the decoder transports them downward, and skip connections merge features at matched ranks. Rank replaces spatial scale: choosing paths through nodes, edges, faces, hyperedges, or global cells becomes the central architectural decision. A key quantity is the bottleneck support ratio, the number of cells at the bottleneck relative to the number of cells at the input rank. This ratio is fixed by the complex and chosen path rather than by arbitrary pooling, and it clarifies when skip connections are optional, useful, or structurally important. Across node classification, graph classification, hypergraph node classification, mesh classification, and image reconstruction, TopoU-Net provides a reusable encoder-decoder template for higher-order structured data. Among the evaluated baselines, it achieves the strongest mean accuracy on six of eight node-classification datasets and four of five hypergraph datasets, with the largest gains on heterophilic graphs. Ablations show that removing skip connections is most damaging under severe bottleneck compression.

</details>


### [599] [CFSPMNet: Cross-subject Fourier-guided Spatial-Patch Mamba Network for EEG Motor Imagery Decoding in Stroke Patients](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10111)
*Xiangkai Wang,Yun Zhao,Dongyi He,Qingling Xia,Gen Li,Xinlai Xing,Yuchi Pan,Bin Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CFSPMNet跨患者适应框架，通过傅里叶域令牌状态重组和共享-私有原型匹配，在脑卒中运动想象脑电解码中显著提升跨患者泛化性能，在两个数据集上分别达到68.23%和73.33%的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑卒中患者的病理神经重组导致运动想象脑电解码在跨患者场景下不可靠，因为任务相关的脑电动态、非周期活动、局部兴奋性、跨区域协调和试次级脑状态上下文都发生了改变。

Method: 提出CFSPMNet框架，包含两个核心模块：1) 傅里叶重组织状态Mamba网络(FRSM)，将试次编码为潜在生理令牌序列，在傅里叶域重组令牌状态并引导Mamba状态空间传播；2) 共享-私有原型匹配(SPPM)，结合语义置信度和共享-私有生理一致性来改进目标域伪标签更新。

Result: 在XW-Stroke数据集上准确率68.23%，在2019-Stroke数据集上准确率73.33%，分别比最强基线高出5.63和8.25个百分点。消融实验、敏感性分析、特征对齐、伪标签选择和神经生理可视化验证了方法有效性。

Conclusion: 潜在神经状态建模能够有效改善面向康复的跨患者BCI解码性能，为脑卒中运动想象脑电解码的临床应用提供了新思路。

Abstract: Motor imagery electroencephalography (MI-EEG) decoding offers a non-invasive route for post-stroke rehabilitation, but cross-patient use remains difficult because pathological neural reorganization changes task-related EEG dynamics, aperiodic activity, local excitability, cross-regional coordination, and trial-level brain-state context. This makes source-learned MI representations unreliable for unseen patients. To address this problem, we propose CFSPMNet, a cross-patient adaptation framework that models post-stroke MI-EEG as latent neural-state organization. CFSPMNet combines a Fourier-Reorganized State Mamba Network (FRSM) with Shared-Private Prototype Matching (SPPM). FRSM represents each trial as a latent physiological token sequence, reorganizes token states in the Fourier domain, and uses Fourier-derived trial context to guide Mamba state-space propagation. SPPM improves target pseudo-label updating by combining semantic confidence with shared-private physiological consistency, filtering confident but physiologically inconsistent target predictions. Leave-one-subject-out experiments on two stroke MI-EEG datasets show that CFSPMNet outperforms representative CNN-, Transformer-, Mamba-, and adaptation-based baselines, achieving average accuracies of 68.23% on XW-Stroke and 73.33% on 2019-Stroke, with gains of 5.63 and 8.25 percentage points over the strongest competitors. Ablation, sensitivity, feature-alignment, pseudo-label selection, and neurophysiological visualization analyses further support the roles of Fourier-domain token-state reorganization and calibrated pseudo-label updating. These results suggest that latent neural-state modeling can improve rehabilitation-oriented cross-patient BCI decoding. Code is available at https://github.com/wxk1224/CFSPMNet.

</details>


### [600] [Generating Symmetric Materials using Latent Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10115)
*Anmar Karmush,Cedric Mathieu Brandenburg,Soheil Ershadrad,Johanna Rosén,Michael Felsberg,Filip Ekström Kelvinius*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SymADiT通过引入Wyckoff位置表示的对称性感知变体，改进了All-atom Diffusion Transformer (ADiT)，在材料生成任务中生成更稳定、对称性更真实的材料。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有的ADiT模型在材料生成时缺乏对晶体对称性的显式约束，导致生成的材料对称性不够真实。作者希望引入对称性感知机制来生成更符合物理现实的材料。

Method: 基于Wyckoff位置表示材料的原子位置，在潜在空间中进行生成建模，并通过强制生成输出遵循空间群和Wyckoff位置的对称性约束来实现对称性感知。

Result: 与对称性感知和对称性无关的基线模型相比，SymADiT展现出具有竞争力的性能，能够用简单的Transformer架构生成稳定且对称的材料。

Conclusion: 引入对称性约束可以提升材料生成的质量，生成的材料在稳定性和对称性方面表现更优，且不依赖复杂架构。

Abstract: Tackling the task of materials generation, we aim to enhance the previously proposed All-atom Diffusion Transformer (ADiT) by introducing SymADiT, a symmetry-aware variant. To do so, we use a representation of materials based on Wyckoff positions. We follow ADiT and perform generative modelling in latent space, adapted to our symmetry-aware representation. By forcing the output of the generative model to adhere to the symmetry restrictions imposed by the generated crystal's space group and each atom's Wyckoff-position, the generated materials exhibit more realistic symmetry properties. We benchmark our method against both symmetry-aware and symmetry-agnostic models for materials generation and show competitive performance, generating stable, symmetric materials with a simple Transformer architecture.

</details>


### [601] [Scaling the Memory of Balanced Adam](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10119)
*Alberto Fernández-Hernández,Cristian Pérez-Corral,Jose I. Mestre,Manuel F. Dolz,Enrique S. Quintana-Ortí*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现平衡Adam中的超参数β应被视为统计记忆窗口H_β=(1-β)^{-1}，而非无维度常数。通过刷新计数R_β=(1-β)T_ES，当R_β≈1000时，β值可随训练规模自适应调整，在11个视觉与语言实验中，相比固定最优β=0.94377，最差情况验证损失差距减少33.4%，所有实验均达到验证最优的1%以内。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究表明Adam在动量参数绑定(β₁=β₂)时表现稳健，但该单一参数β的本质意义尚不清楚，亟需理解其在优化过程中的真正作用。

Method: 提出统计记忆窗口H_β=(1-β)^{-1}和刷新计数R_β=(1-β)T_ES的概念，将β与有效学习视界T_ES关联，通过调整β使R_β≈1000实现自适应参数选择。

Result: 在11个视觉和语言实验中，刷新规则相比固定最优β=0.94377，将全局最大验证差距降低33.4%，所有11个实验均达到验证最优值的1%以内。

Conclusion: 平衡Adam的剩余超参数应理解为记忆尺度变量而非固定常数，为优化器缩放提供了预算感知视角，推动将动量视为学习动态的一部分。

Abstract: Recent evidence suggests that Adam performs robustly when its momentum parameters are tied, $β_1=β_2$, reducing the optimizer to a single remaining parameter. However, the value of this parameter is still poorly understood. We argue that, in balanced Adam, $β$ should not be treated as a dimensionless constant: it defines a statistical memory horizon $H_β=(1-β)^{-1}$. In terms of the effective learning horizon $T_{\mathrm{ES}}$, estimated from the validation trajectory, we study the refresh count $R_β=(1-β)T_{\mathrm{ES}}$, which measures how many times Adam renews its internal statistics during the useful phase of training. Across 11 vision and language experiments, we find that choosing $β$ so that $R_β\approx1000$ selects different beta values depending on the training scale, yet improves robustness over the best fixed-beta baseline. Compared with the strongest fixed choice $β=0.94377$, the refresh rule improves worst-case robustness, reducing the global maximum validation gap by $33.4\%$, while bringing all 11 runs within $1\%$ of their validation oracle. These results suggest that the remaining hyperparameter of balanced Adam is better understood as a memory-scale variable than as a fixed constant. This provides a simple budget-aware perspective on optimizer scaling and opens a path toward treating Adam's momentum as part of the learning dynamics rather than as a static default.

</details>


### [602] [Explainability of Recurrent Neural Networks for Enhancing P300-based Brain-Computer Interfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10121)
*Christian Oliva,Vinicio Changoluisa,Francisco B Rodríguez,Luis F Lago-Fernández*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种后递归模块(PRM)，将其集成到RNN架构中用于P300信号分类，在提升性能的同时实现了模型的可解释性，性能提升了9%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: P300脑机接口面临个体间/个体内变异大以及深度学习模型缺乏可解释性的问题，限制了其实际部署。

Method: 提出了Post-Recurrent Module (PRM)，作为额外层集成到RNN架构中，通过全局和局部可解释性技术对时空信号进行双重分析。

Result: 相较于现有方法性能提升了9%，并且揭示了个体间和个体内变异的重要性，与已有神经科学文献结论一致。

Conclusion: 该框架不仅实现了更高效的P300检测，还可推广到广泛的EEG任务中，如运动想象、稳态视觉诱发电位和认知负荷评估等。

Abstract: Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs) based on P300 event-related potentials offer promising applications in health, education, and assistive technologies. However, challenges related to inter- and intra-subject variability and the explainability of Deep Learning (DL) models limit their practical deployment. In this work, we present the Post-Recurrent Module (PRM), an additional layer designed to improve both performance and transparency, incorporated into a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) architecture for classifying P300 signals from EEG data. Our approach enables a dual analysis of spatio-temporal signals through both global and local explainability techniques, allowing us not only to identify the most relevant brain regions and critical time intervals involved in classification, but also to interpret model decisions in terms of spatio-temporal EEG patterns consistent with well-stablished neurophysiological descriptions of the P300. Experimental results show a 9\% improvement in performance over state of the art, while also revealing the importance of inter- and intra-subject variability, in alignment with established neuroscience literature. By making model decisions transparent and efficient, we present a framework for explainable EEG-based models. This framework is not limited to more efficient P300 detection, but can be generalized to a wide range of EEG-based tasks. Its ability to identify key spatial and temporal features makes it suitable for applications such as motor imagery, steady-state visual evoked potentials, and even cognitive workload assessment.

</details>


### [603] [Complex-Valued Phase-Coherent Transformer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10123)
*Leona Hioki*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出相位相干Transformer(PCT)，用实值平滑门控替代softmax注意力，保持复数相位信息，在多项基准上优于标准Transformer和复数Transformer。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复数Transformer继承了实值架构的softmax注意力，但行归一化的token竞争机制与相位保持计算不一致，需要设计能保留相位信息的注意力机制。

Method: 对L2归一化的复数查询-键相似度应用实值、元素独立、平滑的门控函数，用非竞争性注意力替代token竞争的softmax注意力，在整个层间保持相位一致性。

Result: 在长程记忆、层次化长程推理、位置检索、相位记忆与叠加、图像分类等基准上表现优异；参数公平比较下一致优于标准softmax Transformer和复数Transformer；在NIAH和LRA-Text等传统困难任务上与最强实值基线Multiscreen持平；消融实验证实相位保持设计的关键性；未出现深度增加导致的精度崩溃。

Conclusion: 引入多层相位相干结构作为注意力机制的设计原则，是实现复数Transformer泛化能力的有前景的方向。

Abstract: Complex-valued Transformers have largely inherited softmax attention from real-valued architectures. However, row-normalised token competition is not necessarily aligned with phase-preserving computation. In this paper, we introduce the Phase-Coherent Transformer (PCT), which applies a real-valued, element-independent, smooth gate to L2-normalised complex query-key similarities. PCT replaces token competition with token-non-competing attention and is designed to preserve phase information across layers.
  Across mid-scale benchmarks spanning long-range memory, hierarchical long-range reasoning, positional retrieval, phase-based memory and superposition, and image classification, PCT shows strong generalisation across task categories. Under parameter-fair comparison, PCT consistently outperforms both the standard softmax Transformer and its direct complex-valued counterpart. Moreover, even on tasks traditionally considered difficult for complex-valued neural networks, such as NIAH and LRA-Text, PCT remains competitive with Multiscreen, the strongest real-valued NN baseline in our comparison. Experiments introducing gates that deliberately violate the PCT conditions show that the design is not incidental: smooth gates that preserve negatively aligned phase components remain strong, whereas gates that delete such components collapse on long-range retrieval, and gates whose outputs become excessively large suffer clear performance degradation. PCT also shows no depth-related accuracy collapse across the tested depth range. These results support introducing multi-layer phase-coherent structure into attention as a promising design principle for achieving generalisation in complex-valued Transformers.

</details>


### [604] [Per-Loss Adapters for Gradient Conflict in Physics-Informed Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10136)
*Bum Jun Kim,Gnankan Landry Regis N'guessan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现PINN的梯度冲突并非单一模式，而是分为方向冲突、幅度失衡和低冲突三类，并提出一个诊断优先框架：先运行1000步未修改的PINN诊断冲突类型，再选择标量重加权或为每个损失添加低秩适配器(LoRA)来创建独立参数子空间。在60+个PDE配置上验证了该方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PINN训练中梯度冲突的补救方法（标量损失平衡与全参数空间梯度手术）各自为政，不清楚哪种干预最合适。本文发现冲突存在不同类型，需要针对性处理，因此提出诊断优先框架来区分冲突模式并选择相应干预策略。

Method: 1）识别三种梯度冲突模式：持久方向冲突、幅度失衡、低/瞬态冲突；2）提出诊断优先框架：先运行1000步未修改PINN，分析冲突类型；3）若需干预，为每个损失附加一个低秩适配器(LoRA)到共享PINN主干，创建损失索引的显式参数子空间，为每个损失提供直接梯度路径；4）结合标量重加权策略。

Result: 在60+个PDE配置（前向、逆向、多物理、参数变化、高达50D的高维问题）上验证。持久方向冲突主导标准前向K=3基准和K=4热弹性系统，此时适配器+重加权显著提升；K=3逆向问题和K=5/K=6多物理系统以幅度失衡为主，重加权单独更有效；全参数空间梯度手术在异构参数空间上可能失败。

Conclusion: PINN梯度冲突不是单一问题，不同冲突模式需要不同解决方案。诊断优先框架能有效识别冲突类型并选择合适干预，低秩适配器为方向冲突提供有效缓解，而幅度冲突则更适合标量重加权。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) train a single neural approximation by minimizing multiple physics- and data-derived losses, but the gradients of these losses often interfere and can stall optimization. Existing remedies typically treat this pathology either through scalar loss balancing or full-parameter-space gradient surgery, leaving it unclear which intervention is most appropriate. We show that PINN gradient conflict is not a uniform failure mode with one universal remedy. Instead, we identify distinct PINN gradient-conflict regimes, each associated with a different intervention class. Persistent directional conflict may require separate loss-indexed parameter subspaces, magnitude imbalance often favors scalar reweighting, and low or transient conflict may require no extra mitigation. To select between scalar reweighting and a lightweight architectural intervention, we propose a diagnostic-first framework. It profiles a 1000-step unmodified PINN run and, when intervention is warranted, uses one low-rank adapter per loss to create explicit loss-indexed parameter subspaces attached to a shared PINN trunk, providing each loss with a direct gradient pathway. Across more than 60 PDE configurations, including forward, inverse, multi-physics, parameter-varying, and high-dimensional problems up to 50D, persistent directional conflict dominates standard forward $K=3$ benchmarks and a natural $K=4$ thermoelastic system, where adapters combined with reweighting yield significant improvements. In contrast, $K=3$ inverse problems and natural $K=5$ and $K=6$ multi-physics systems are largely magnitude-dominated and often favor reweighting alone, while full-parameter-space gradient surgery can fail on heterogeneous parameter spaces.

</details>


### [605] [Stable Long-Horizon PDE Forecasting via Latent Structured Spectral Propagators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10154)
*Xiaoxiao Lu,Ye Yuan,Jiahao Shi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 SSP 框架，将 PDE 长期预测建模为结构化谱传播器，通过分析-传播-合成三阶段解耦重建保真度与滚动规律性，在多个基准上实现高达 48.9% 的相对 L2 误差降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子方法在长期自回归部署中易产生误差累积和动态漂移，缺乏对长时域物理系统演化的稳定建模能力。

Method: 提出分析-传播-合成三阶段框架：(i) 将物理状态映射到共享的时不变空间表示；(ii) 投影到紧凑传播状态以隔离循环动力学与空间细节；(iii) 使用频率条件化的线性主干加非线性谱闭合项演化保留的谱模态。

Result: 显著优于 SOTA 基线，相对 L2 误差降低高达 48.9%，在监督时域外的外推稳定性也有提升。

Conclusion: 通过在传播器中植入相干模态演化的强归纳偏置，SSP 有效解决了长期 PDE 预测中的误差累积问题。

Abstract: Long-horizon forecasting of time-dependent partial differential equations (PDEs) is critical for characterizing the sustained evolution of physical systems. While neural operators have emerged as efficient surrogates, they typically learn implicit finite-time transitions from discrete observations. When deployed autoregressively, such propagators often suffer from rapid error accumulation and dynamic drift. To address this, we propose a neural forecasting framework that reformulates PDE rollout as learning a Structured Spectral Propagator (SSP) in a propagation-oriented latent space. Following an analysis-propagation-synthesis design, our framework: (i) maps physical states into a shared, time-consistent spatial representation; (ii) projects this space into a compact propagation state to isolate recurrent dynamics from fine-grained spatial details, thereby decoupling reconstruction fidelity from rollout regularity; and (iii) evolves retained spectral modes using a frequency-conditioned linear backbone complemented by a nonlinear spectral closure to account for truncated interactions. This explicit structuring endows the propagator with a strong inductive bias for coherent modal evolution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SSP significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, reducing relative $L_2$ errors by up to 48.9% and exhibiting improved stability in temporal extrapolation beyond the supervised horizon.

</details>


### [606] [Unsupervised Process Reward Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10158)
*Artyom Gadetsky,Maxim Kodryan,Siba Smarak Panigrahi,Hang Guo,Maria Brbic*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需人工标注的无监督过程奖励模型(uPRM)，通过基于LLM下一个令牌概率的评分函数来识别推理步骤中的首个错误，在多个任务上表现优异，甚至可与有监督PRM媲美。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 监督式PRM需要专家对每个推理步骤进行标注，成本高昂且难以规模化扩展，因此需要一种无需人工监督的替代方案。

Method: 提出无监督PRM(uPRM)，核心是定义一个基于LLM下一个令牌概率的评分函数，联合评估一批推理轨迹中候选首个错误步骤的位置，无需步骤级标注或最终答案验证。

Result: (i) 在ProcessBench上识别首个错误步骤比LLM-as-a-Judge提升15%绝对准确率；(ii) 作为测试时验证器，与有监督PRM相当，比多数投票基线提升6.9%；(iii) 作为RL奖励信号时，比有监督PRM实现更稳健的策略优化。

Conclusion: uPRM为复杂推理任务的可扩展奖励建模开辟了新路径，证明了无监督方法在过程监督中的潜力。

Abstract: Process Reward Models (PRMs) are a powerful mechanism for steering large language model reasoning by providing fine-grained, step-level supervision. However, this effectiveness comes at a significant cost: PRMs require expert annotations for every reasoning step, making them costly and difficult to scale. Here, we propose a method for training unsupervised PRMs (uPRM) that requires no human supervision, neither at the level of step-by-step annotations nor through ground-truth verification of final answers. The key idea behind our approach is to define a scoring function, derived from LLM next-token probabilities, that jointly assesses candidate positions of first erroneous steps across a batch of reasoning trajectories. We demonstrate the effectiveness of uPRM across diverse scenarios: (i) uPRM achieves up to 15% absolute accuracy improvements over the LLM-as-a-Judge in identifying first erroneous steps on the ProcessBench dataset; (ii) as a verifier for test-time scaling, uPRM performs comparably to supervised PRMs and outperforms the majority voting baseline by up to 6.9%, and (iii) when used as a reward signal in reinforcement learning, uPRM enables more robust policy optimization throughout training compared to a supervised PRM trained using ground-truth labels. Overall, our results open a path toward scalable reward modeling for complex reasoning tasks.

</details>


### [607] [jNO: A JAX Library for Neural Operator and Foundation Model Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10159)
*Leon Armbruster,Rathan Ramesh,Georg Kruse,Christopher Straub*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: jNO是一个基于JAX的神经算子库，通过统一的追踪系统支持数据驱动和物理信息训练，实现算子回归、残差评估和PDE约束训练的无缝切换，并支持多模型组合、参数级细粒度控制、超参数调优和PDE基础模型家族。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子框架在数据驱动与物理信息训练之间切换需要重构代码，缺乏统一的符号化表达和编译优化管线，亟需一个能无缝融合这两种训练范式的JAX原生库。

Method: 设计了一个核心追踪系统，将域定义、模型调用、残差计算、监督损失和诊断分析统一用符号语言表达，并编译为单一优化管线。支持算子回归、网格感知残差评估和PDE约束训练的无缝切换，提供多模型组合、参数级控制、超参数调优等功能。

Result: 实现了无需重构代码即可在多种训练范式间自由切换的能力，支持细粒度参数控制和超参数调优，并兼容PDE基础模型家族的JAX原生工作流。

Conclusion: jNO提供了一个灵活、统一的神经算子开发框架，显著降低了在数据驱动和物理信息训练之间切换的开发成本，为神经算子领域的研究和应用提供了高效的工具支持。

Abstract: jNO (jax Neural Operators) is a JAX-native library for neural operators and foundation models with unified support for both data-driven and physics-informed training. Its core design is a tracing system in which domains, model calls, residuals, supervised losses, and diagnostics are written in one symbolic language and compiled into one optimization pipeline. This allows users to move between operator regression, mesh-aware residual evaluation, and PDE-constrained training without restructuring the surrounding code. jNO also supports multi-model compositions, fine-grained control at parameter level (model, optimizer, and learning rate), hyperparameter tuning, and JAX-native workflows for translated PDE foundation-model families. The source repository is available at https://github.com/FhG-IISB/jNO.

</details>


### [608] [OUIDecay: Adaptive Layer-wise Weight Decay for CNNs Using Online Activation Patterns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10161)
*Alberto Fernández-Hernández,Jose I. Mestre,Cristian Pérez-Corral,Manuel F. Dolz,Jose Duato,Enrique S. Quintana-Ortí*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出OUIDecay，一种基于过拟合-欠拟合指标（OUI）的自适应逐层权重衰减调度器，通过激活模式动态调整各层衰减系数，无需验证集，在多个CNN模型和数据集上取得优于固定衰减和梯度自适应方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统权重衰减对所有层使用固定系数，忽略了不同层在训练过程中具有不同的结构动态和正则化需求。

Method: 利用轻量级批处理版本的OUI指标在线监测每层的激活行为，据此周期性调整各层的权重衰减系数，实现层间相对缩放。

Result: 在EfficientNet-B0/Stanford Cars、ResNet50/Food101、DenseNet121/CIFAR100、MobileNetV2/CIFAR10共8个设定中，OUIDecay在7个设定下取得了最佳平均最佳验证损失。

Conclusion: 基于激活驱动的权重衰减自适应是一种实用且有效的替代方案，轻量级且适合在线使用。

Abstract: Weight decay remains one of the most widely used regularization mechanisms for training convolutional neural networks, yet it is still commonly applied as a fixed coefficient shared by all layers throughout training. This uniform treatment ignores that different layers may follow different structural dynamics and therefore may require different regularization strengths. In this work, we propose OUIDecay, an adaptive layer-wise and time-dependent weight decay scheduler for CNNs driven by the Overfitting-Underfitting Indicator (OUI), an activation-based metric previously shown to provide early information about regularization quality. OUIDecay uses a lightweight batch-based formulation of OUI to monitor the structural behavior of each layer online and periodically rescales its weight decay relative to the other layers in the network. Unlike gradient-based adaptive decay methods, our approach relies on functional information extracted from activation patterns and does not require validation data. Experiments on EfficientNet-B0 with Stanford Cars, ResNet50 with Food101, DenseNet121 with CIFAR100, and MobileNetV2 with CIFAR10 show that OUIDecay achieves the best mean best-validation-loss in 7 out of 8 evaluated settings. These results indicate that activation-driven weight decay adaptation is a practical and effective alternative to fixed decay and gradient-based adaptive decay, while keeping the method lightweight and suitable for online use.

</details>


### [609] [Balancing Efficiency and Fairness in Traffic Light Control through Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10170)
*Matteo Cederle,Giacomo Scatto,Gian Antonio Susto*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的交通信号控制智能体，通过显式整合车辆与行人的公平性考量，动态平衡两类交通流，在减少拥堵的同时确保对两类道路使用者的公平服务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统交通信号控制系统难以适应动态交通状况，且大多只关注车辆效率，忽视了行人通行需求，导致不公平和低效。

Method: 提出一种新型深度强化学习智能体，将公平性因素显式纳入奖励函数设计，基于实时需求动态平衡车辆流与行人流。

Result: 实验表明该智能体在有效减少交通拥堵的同时，能够为车辆和行人两类道路使用者提供公平的服务。

Conclusion: 该研究为智慧城市框架下的智能交通管理提供了一种实用且自适应的解决方案，有助于实现更高效、更包容的城市交通。

Abstract: Urban traffic congestion presents a significant challenge for modern cities, which impacts mobility and sustainability. Traditional traffic light control systems often fail to adapt to dynamic conditions, leading to inefficiencies. This paper proposes a novel deep reinforcement learning agent for traffic light control that addresses this limitation by explicitly integrating fairness considerations for both vehicular and pedestrian traffic. Unlike prior work, our approach dynamically balances these flows based on real-time demand, moving beyond systems focused solely on vehicles. Experimental results demonstrate that our agent effectively reduces congestion while ensuring equitable service for both the categories of road users. This research contributes to a practical and adaptable solution for intelligent traffic management within the framework of smart cities, paving the way for more efficient and inclusive urban mobility.

</details>


### [610] [One-Step Graph-Structured Neural Flows for Irregular Multivariate Time Series Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10179)
*Mengzhou Gao,Kaiwei Wang,Pengfei Jiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一步图结构神经流（GSNF），通过两种自监督辅助轨迹策略（重初始化诱导轨迹发散 + 反向时间轨迹生成）增强变量间交互建模，在五个真实数据集上达到SOTA分类性能且训练高效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经流方法虽高效，但将变量独立处理，忽视了变量间的交互关系；且一步映射机制无法像迭代数值求解器那样逐步精炼交互信息，导致交互建模困难。

Method: 提出GSNF，引入两种辅助轨迹自监督策略：(i) 通过重初始化生成交互感知轨迹，诱导轨迹发散以暴露图结构交互，并提供理论发散下界；(ii) 利用流的可逆性进行反向时间轨迹生成，强制前向-后向一致性以正则化图学习。

Result: 在五个真实数据集上，GSNF达到最先进的分类性能，同时训练时间和内存使用极具竞争力。

Conclusion: 通过辅助轨迹自监督能有效增强一步神经流中的变量交互建模，兼顾效率与效果。

Abstract: Neural Flows efficiently model irregular multivariate time series by directly learning ODE solution trajectories with neural networks, bypassing step-by-step numerical solvers. Despite their efficiency, many existing approaches treat variables independently, leaving inter-variable interactions underexplored. Moreover, their one-step mapping makes interaction modeling inherently challenging, as it removes the iterative refinement of interactions during learning. To address this challenge, we propose one-step Graph-Structured Neural Flows (GSNF), which introduce two auxiliary-trajectory self-supervision strategies to strengthen interaction learning: (i) interaction-aware trajectory generation via re-initialization, which induces trajectory divergence to expose graph-induced interactions, with a theoretically derived lower bound on divergence; and (ii) reverse-time trajectory generation, which enforces forward-backward consistency to regularize graph learning, enabled by flow invertibility. Experiments on five real-world datasets show that GSNF achieves state-of-the-art classification performance with highly competitive training time and memory usage.

</details>


### [611] [Fix the Loss, Not the Radius: Rethinking the Adversarial Perturbation of Sharpness-Aware Minimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10183)
*Jinping Wang,Qinhan Liu,Zhiwu Xie,Zhiqiang Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LE-SAM，通过将固定参数空间的扰动半径改为固定损失空间的预算，逆转传统SAM机制，使优化从梯度范数主导转向曲率主导，在多项任务中取得SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统SAM及其变体依赖一阶线性化代理来近似最坏情况损失，但平坦最小值本质上是一个二阶（曲率）概念，两者存在不匹配问题。

Method: 提出Loss-Equated SAM (LE-SAM)，将固定参数空间扰动半径改为固定损失空间预算，从而使梯度范数主导的学习信号被移除，优化转向曲率主导项。

Result: 在多种基准和任务上的大量实验表明，LE-SAM的泛化能力始终优于SAM及其变体，达到了最先进的性能。

Conclusion: LE-SAM通过重新审视一阶近似与二阶平坦性之间的不匹配问题，成功逆转了SAM的核心机制，为实现更强泛化能力提供了新思路。

Abstract: Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) improves generalization by minimizing the worst-case loss within a fixed parameter-space radius neighborhood. SAM and its variants mainly rely on a first-order linearized surrogate, while flat minima are inherently a second-order (curvature) notion.We revisit this mismatch and propose Loss-Equated SAM (LE-SAM), which inverts the traditional SAM mechanism that fixed perturbation radius with a fixed loss-space budget,effectively removing gradient-norm-dominated learning signals and shifting optimization toward curvature-dominated terms. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks and tasks demonstrate the strong generalization ability of LESAM that consistently outperforms SAM and even its variants, achieving the state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [612] [ProteinOPD: Towards Effective and Efficient Preference Alignment for Protein Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10189)
*Yulin Zhang,He Cao,Zihao Jiang,Chenyi Zi,Zhipeng Zhou,Zijing Liu,Yu Li,Jia Li,Ziqi Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出ProteinOPD框架，利用在线策略蒸馏（OPD）实现多目标偏好对齐，在保持蛋白质语言模型固有可设计性的同时平衡多个偏好目标，训练速度比RL方法快8倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有蛋白质语言模型（PLMs）在偏好对齐时存在灾难性遗忘（丢失设计能力）以及难以平衡多个竞争目标的问题。

Method: ProteinOPD将预训练PLM适配为多个偏好特定教师，通过token级在线策略蒸馏（OPD）在学生的自身轨迹上蒸馏知识至共享学生模型，利用加权教师的归一化几何共识进行对齐，并在冲突下保证有界优化。

Result: 在目标偏好目标上取得显著提升，且不损害蛋白质的可设计性；训练速度比基于RL的对齐方法快8倍。

Conclusion: ProteinOPD有效解决了多目标偏好对齐中的灾难性遗忘和平衡问题，为蛋白质设计中的偏好对齐提供了高效且稳定的解决方案。

Abstract: Designing proteins with desired functions or properties represents a core goal in synthetic biology and drug discovery. Recent advances in protein language models (PLMs) have enabled the generation of highly designable protein sequences, while preference alignment provides a promising way to steer designs toward desired functions and properties. Nevertheless, they often trigger catastrophic forgetting of pretrained knowledge, degrading basic designability and failing to balance multiple competing objectives. To address these issues, we draw inspiration from On-Policy Distillation (OPD), an advanced post-training method renowned for mitigating catastrophic forgetting through its mode-seeking nature. In this work, we propose ProteinOPD, a multi-objective preference alignment framework that can effectively balance multiple preference objectives while maintaining the inherent designability of PLMs. ProteinOPD adapts a pretrained PLM into preference-specific teachers and distills their knowledge into a shared student via token-level OPD on the student's own trajectories. During this process, the student is aligned to a unique normalized geometric consensus of weighted teachers while ensuring bounded optimization under conflicts. This bridges the gap for OPD in multi-objective/teacher alignment. Extensive experiments show that ProteinOPD achieves substantial gains on target preference objectives without compromising the designability, with an 8x training speedup over RL-based alignment competitors.

</details>


### [613] [Breaking the Reward Barrier: Accelerating Tree-of-Thought Reasoning via Speculative Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10195)
*Shuzhang Zhong,Haochen Huang,Shengxuan Qiu,Pengfei Zuo,Runsheng Wang,Meng Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SPEX系统，通过投机性路径探索、预算分配和自适应早停三种技术，打破Tree-of-Thought推理中的奖励同步瓶颈，实现1.2~3倍加速，并与token级投机解码协同达到最高4.1倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Tree-of-Thought (ToT) 推理虽在复杂任务上表现优异，但其基于奖励引导的顺序探索方式造成了奖励依赖瓶颈（reward dependency barrier），导致并行性受限和大量延迟。现有针对线性Chain-of-Thought (CoT) 的系统优化无法解决ToT的这一问题，ToT的效率优化领域尚属空白。

Method: 提出SPEX系统，包含三项关键技术：(i) 查询内投机性路径选择（intra-query speculative path selection），预测并扩展高潜力分支；(ii) 查询间预算分配（inter-query budget allocation），跨查询动态平衡投机资源；(iii) 自适应早停（adaptive early termination），剪枝深层冗余分支以获得偏斜搜索树。

Result: 在SGLang框架上实现SPEX，并在多种ToT算法和LLM上进行实验。SPEX实现1.2~3倍加速；与token级投机解码协同，累计加速高达4.1倍。消融实验验证了每项技术的贡献。

Conclusion: SPEX是迈向高效可扩展ToT推理的重要一步，解锁了LLM高性能推理时扩展所需的并行性。

Abstract: Tree-of-Thought (ToT) reasoning structures Large Language Model (LLM) inference as a tree-based search, demonstrating strong potential for solving complex mathematical and programming tasks. However, its efficiency is constrained by the reward dependency barrier -- a synchronization bottleneck caused by sequential reward-guided exploration that limits search parallelism and introduces substantial latency. Prior system optimizations, mainly designed for linear Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, cannot address these challenges, leaving the efficiency of ToT underexplored.
  To enhance ToT reasoning efficiency, we observe that the reasoning paths can be explored speculatively to break the reward synchronization barrier. Therefore, in this paper, we propose SPEX and introduce three key techniques: (i) intra-query speculative path selection to predict and expand high-potential branches of ToT, (ii) inter-query budget allocation to balance speculative resource allocation across queries dynamically, and (iii) adaptive early termination to prune deep and redundant branches for a skewed search tree.
  We implement SPEX on top of the SGLang framework and evaluate it across diverse ToT algorithms and LLMs. Extensive experiments show that SPEX achieves $1.2 \sim 3 \times$ speedup for different ToT reasoning algorithms. Moreover, SPEX synergizes with token-level speculative decoding, achieving cumulative speedups of up to $4.1\times$. Ablation studies further confirm the contributions of each technique. Overall, SPEX represents a significant step toward efficient and scalable ToT reasoning, unlocking the parallelism required for high-performance inference-time scaling for LLMs.

</details>


### [614] [Many Needles in a Haystack: Active Hit Discovery for Perturbation Experiments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10196)
*Andrea Rubbi,Arpit Merchant,Samuel Ogden,Amir Akbarnejad,Pietro Liò,Sattar Vakili,Mo Lotfollahi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为Probability-of-Hit的采集函数，用于高通量基因扰动实验中的命中发现（hit discovery），通过直接根据候选扰动成为命中的后验概率进行排序，在合成数据和真实生物免疫学数据集上均取得优异表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高通量基因扰动实验预算有限，现有纯探索策略统计效率低，而贝叶斯优化方法过度关注全局最优而忽略其他高价值区域，需要一种能直接针对阈值超越的命中发现方法。

Method: 将命中发现形式化为序贯实验设计问题，提出Probability-of-Hit采集函数，根据候选扰动成为命中（表型效应超过预定义阈值）的后验概率进行排序和选择。

Result: 在合成基准测试和真实生物免疫学数据集上表现优异，在Schmidt IL-2数据集上相比基线方法提升高达6.4%。

Conclusion: 证明了该方法的渐近最优性，并在实验中验证了其强大的经验性能，为预算有限的高通量基因扰动实验提供了一种更有效的命中发现策略。

Abstract: High-throughput gene perturbation experiments can test several genetic interventions in parallel, yet experimental budgets remain limited. A central goal is hit discovery: identifying as many perturbations as possible whose phenotypic effect exceeds a predefined threshold. Pure exploration strategies are statistically inefficient, wasting budget on low-value regions. Bayesian optimization methods offer a principled alternative but target a single global optimum, over-exploiting dominant modes while neglecting other high-value regions. We formalize hit discovery as a sequential experimental design problem and propose Probability-of-Hit, an acquisition function that directly targets threshold exceedance by ranking candidates according to their posterior probability of being a hit. We prove asymptotic optimality of this approach and demonstrate strong empirical performance on both synthetic benchmarks and real biological immunology datasets, including up to 6.4% improvement over baselines on the Schmidt IL-2 dataset.

</details>


### [615] [Empty SPACE: Cross-Attention Sparsity for Concept Erasure in Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10198)
*Nicola Novello,Andrea M. Tonello*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SPACE是一种基于稀疏交叉注意力的闭式概念擦除方法，通过引入稀疏性在低维子空间集中映射目标概念，在SDXL等大模型上实现高效、鲁棒且内存节约的概念擦除。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有闭式概念擦除方法在小模型（如SD 1.5）上有效，但扩展到更大模型（如SDXL）时效果显著下降，需要一种能在大规模架构中保持擦除有效性的方法。

Method: SPACE通过闭式更新迭代修改模型的交叉注意力参数，联合引入稀疏性并擦除目标概念，将概念映射集中到更低维的子空间中。

Result: SPACE在擦除效果和对对抗性提示的鲁棒性上均优于密集基线方法，实现了80%-90%的交叉注意力稀疏性，将保存修改参数的存储需求降低70%。

Conclusion: SPACE通过稀疏化交叉注意力参数，在大规模扩散模型中实现了高效、鲁棒且内存节约的概念擦除，解决了闭式方法从SD 1.5扩展到SDXL时的有效性下降问题。

Abstract: Erasing specific concepts from text-to-image diffusion models is essential for avoiding the generation of copyrighted and explicit content. Closed-form concept erasure methods offer a fast alternative to backpropagation-based techniques, but they become less effective when scaling from smaller models such as Stable Diffusion 1.5 to larger models like Stable Diffusion XL. To maintain erasure effectiveness in these larger-scale architectures, we propose SParse cross-Attention-based Concept Erasure (SPACE). SPACE iteratively modifies the cross-attention parameters of a model with a closed-form update that jointly induces sparsity and erases target concepts. By concentrating the concept mapping to a lower-dimensional subspace, SPACE achieves superior erasure efficacy compared to dense baselines. Extensive experimental results show improvements in erasure effectiveness and robustness against adversarial prompts. Furthermore, SPACE achieves 80\%-90\% cross-attention sparsity, reducing the storage requirements for saving the modified parameters by 70\%, demonstrating its memory efficiency.

</details>


### [616] [Unveiling High-Probability Generalization in Decentralized SGD](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10205)
*Jiahuan Wang,Ping Luo,Ziqing Wen,Dongsheng Li,Tao Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了分布式SGD的高概率泛化理论，将泛化界从O(1/(δ√(mn)))提升到最优的O(log(1/δ)/√(mn))，填补了SGD与D-SGD在高概率保证上的理论空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有D-SGD的泛化研究主要关注期望结果，其高概率泛化界为O(1/(δ√(mn)))，而传统SGD的最优高概率泛化界为O(log(1/δ)/√(n))，两者存在显著差距。本文旨在弥合这一理论鸿沟，为D-SGD建立最优的高概率泛化理论。

Method: 利用分布式学习中比均匀稳定性更弱的逐点均匀稳定性概念，对凸、强凸和非凸三种设定下的D-SGD进行理论分析。在非凸设定中，针对仅存在局部最小值的情况，给出了基于梯度的度量指标的高概率结果，并推导了优化误差和过风险界。此外，在时变通信框架下分析了本地模型的泛化界。

Result: 将D-SGD的高概率泛化界从O(1/(δ√(mn)))提升到最优的O(log(1/δ)/√(mn))，与SGD的最优高概率保证一致，体现了m个worker带来的线性加速。

Conclusion: 本文成功建立了D-SGD的最优高概率泛化理论，填补了分布式学习在高概率保证方面的理论空白，并为后续分布式学习算法的理论分析提供了新的框架和工具。

Abstract: Decentralized stochastic gradient descent (D-SGD) is an efficient method for large-scale distributed learning. Existing generalization studies mainly address expected results, achieving rates limited to $\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{δ\sqrt{mn}}\right)$, where $δ$ is the confidence parameter, $m$ the number of workers, and $n$ the sample size. When $m=1$, D-SGD reduces to traditional SGD, whose optimal high-probability generalization bound is $\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{n}}\log (1/δ)\right)$. This discrepancy reveals a gap between high-probability guarantees for SGD and those for D-SGD. To close this, we develop a high-probability learning theory for D-SGD, aiming for the optimal $\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{mn}}\log (1/δ)\right)$ rate. We refine bounds for D-SGD using pointwise uniform stability in distributed learning-a weaker notion than uniform stability-and analyze them across convex, strongly convex, and non-convex settings. We also provide high-probability results for gradient-based measures in non-convex cases where only local minima exist, and derive optimization error and excess risk bounds. Finally, accounting for communication overhead, we analyze generalization bounds for local models within time-varying frameworks.

</details>


### [617] [FORGE: Fragment-Oriented Ranking and Generation for Context-Aware Molecular Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10230)
*Qingchuan Zhang,He Cao,Hao Li,Yanjun Shao,Zhiyuan Liu,Shihang Wang,Shufang Xie,Shenghua Gao,Xinwu Ye*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FORGE提出了一种两阶段分子优化框架，利用自动挖掘的编辑对替代人工文本标注，通过上下文感知的局部编辑实现更优的分子优化效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于自然语言的语言模型方法存在数据扩展瓶颈、化学幻觉以及忽视碎片上下文依赖等问题。

Method: 两阶段框架：Stage 1在全分子上下文中对候选碎片按性质贡献排序注入化学先验；Stage 2生成显式碎片替换。基于0.6B小型语言模型，通过上下文演示适应未知黑盒目标。

Result: 在Prompt-MolOpt、PMO-1k和ChemCoTBench上，FORGE一致优于先前方法，包括更大的语言模型和图方法。

Conclusion: 显式碎片级监督比自然语言训练更易获取、可扩展且无幻觉，是分子优化的有效替代方案。

Abstract: Molecular optimization seeks to improve a molecule through small structural edits while preserving similarity to the starting compound. Recent language-model approaches typically treat this task as prompt-conditioned sequence generation. However, relying on natural language introduces an inherent data-scaling bottleneck, often leads to chemical hallucinations, and ignores the strong context dependence of fragment effects. We present FORGE, a two-stage framework that reformulates molecular optimization as context-aware local editing. By utilizing automatically mined, verified low-to-high edit pairs instead of expensive human text annotations, Stage 1 ranks candidate fragments by their property contribution under the full molecular context to inject chemical prior, and Stage 2 generates explicit fragment replacements. Built on a compact 0.6B language model, FORGE further adapts to unseen black-box objectives through in-context demonstrations. Across Prompt-MolOpt, PMO-1k and ChemCoTBench, FORGE consistently outperforms prior methods, including substantially larger language models and graph methods. These results highlight the value of explicit fragment-level supervision as a more easily obtainable, scalable, and hallucination-less alternative to natural language training.

</details>


### [618] [When Does Non-Uniform Replay Matter in Reinforcement Learning?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10236)
*Michal Korniak,Mikołaj Czarnecki,Yarden As,Piotr Miłoś,Pieter Abbeel,Michal Nauman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了非均匀回放采样在离线策略强化学习中的有效性，发现其受回放容量、期望新颖度和采样分布熵三个因素影响，并提出了一种简单高效的截断几何回放策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代离线策略强化学习算法通常依赖简单的均匀回放采样，但非均匀回放何时以及为何优于这一强基线尚不清楚。作者旨在阐明非均匀回放有效的条件，并提供实用的回放设计指导。

Method: 通过系统实验分析三个关键因素（回放容量、期望新颖度、采样分布熵）对非均匀回放效果的影响，并基于发现提出Truncated Geometric回放策略，该策略偏向近期经验同时保持高熵。

Result: 非均匀回放在低回放容量时最有效；高熵采样即使在期望新颖度相近时也很重要；截断几何回放在低容量场景提升样本效率，在高容量场景保持竞争力，在五种基准套件和三种现代算法上得到验证。

Conclusion: 明确了非均匀回放的优势条件（低回放容量），强调了高熵采样的重要性，提出的截断几何回放策略简单有效，为现代离线策略RL的回放设计提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Modern off-policy reinforcement learning algorithms often rely on simple uniform replay sampling and it remains unclear when and why non-uniform replay improves over this strong baseline. Across diverse RL settings, we show that the effectiveness of non-uniform replay is governed by three factors: replay volume, the number of replayed transitions per environment step; expected recency, how recent sampled transitions are; and the entropy of the replay sampling distribution. Our main contribution is clarifying when non-uniform replay is beneficial and providing practical guidance for replay design in modern off-policy RL. Namely, we find that non-uniform replay is most beneficial when replay volume is low, and that high-entropy sampling is important even at comparable expected recency. Motivated by these findings, we adopt a simple Truncated Geometric replay that biases sampling toward recent experience while preserving high entropy and incurring negligible computational overhead. Across large-scale parallel simulation, single-task, and multi-task settings, including three modern algorithms evaluated on five RL benchmark suites, this replay sampling strategy improves sample efficiency in low-volume regimes while remaining competitive when replay volume is high.

</details>


### [619] [The Benefits of Temporal Correlations: SGD Learns k-Juntas from Random Walks Efficiently](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10237)
*Elisabetta Cornacchia,Dan Mikulincer,Elchanan Mossel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究数据时间相关性如何使梯度方法有效学习稀疏布尔k-junta问题。当数据来自超立方体上的懒惰随机游走时，使用双层ReLU网络和时序差分损失的SGD能以近似线性于维度d的样本复杂度学习，而标准凸损失的大批量梯度方法无法获得此优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典稀疏学习问题（布尔k-junta）在独立均匀采样下对梯度方法具有难度，本文探究是否可以利用数据中的时间相关性来突破这一限制。

Method: 采用双层ReLU网络，结合类似时序差分学习的SGD变体（stylized-SGD），利用连续样本之间的增量信息进行学习。

Result: 对于任意固定的k，样本复杂度近乎线性于维度d；相比之下，使用标准凸逐点损失的大批量梯度方法无法从时间相关性中获益。

Conclusion: 数据的时间相关性可以被特定的梯度方法（如时序差分SGD）利用，从而高效解决某些原本困难的稀疏学习问题，但并非所有梯度方法都能同等受益。

Abstract: We study how temporal correlations in the data can make certain sparse learning problems efficiently learnable by gradient-based methods. Our focus is on Boolean k-juntas, a canonical sparse learning problem known to pose barriers for gradient-based methods under independent uniform samples. We show that this picture changes when the samples are generated by a lazy random walk on the hypercube. In this setting, the temporal dependencies can be exploited by a two-layer ReLU network trained using stylized-SGD with a temporal-difference loss, which compares target and predicted increments across consecutive samples. For every fixed k, the resulting sample complexity is essentially linear in the ambient dimension d. By contrast, we show that for large-batch gradient methods using standard convex pointwise losses, temporal correlations do not provide the same advantage.

</details>


### [620] [When Normality Shifts: Risk-Aware Test-Time Adaptation for Unsupervised Tabular Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10242)
*Wei Huang,Hezhe Qiao,Kailai Zhang,Zaisheng Ye,Yu-Ming Shang,Xiangling Fu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对无监督表格异常检测中训练数据不足导致正常模式表征不完全、以及测试时适应忽略训练阶段协同且易受异常污染的问题，提出RTTAD方法，通过训练阶段的协同双任务学习建立稳健正常先验，以及测试阶段基于风险感知的对比学习选择性更新模型，在15个表格数据集上取得SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无监督表格异常检测方法在训练时通常从正常样本中学习特征模式，测试时识别偏离这些模式的样本为异常。但实际场景中训练数据的规模和多样性有限，导致正常模式的表征不完整；虽然测试时适应（test-time adaptation）可作补救，但其孤立地关注测试优化，忽略了与训练阶段学习的协同；此外，对无标签测试数据无差别适应必然引发异常污染，阻碍模型充分发挥对正常和异常样本的判别能力。

Method: 提出RTTAD方法，包含两阶段协同机制：(1) 训练阶段：协同双任务学习（collaborative dual-task learning）捕获多层级表示，建立稳健的正常先验；(2) 测试阶段：测试时对比学习模块（TTCL）显式考虑适应风险，利用高置信度的伪正常样本选择性更新模型，同时约束异常样本；并引入基于k近邻的对比目标优化嵌入分布，增强模型判别能力。

Result: 在15个表格数据集上的大量实验表明，RTTAD取得了整体最优的检测性能。

Conclusion: RTTAD通过风险感知的测试时适应，有效解决了训练数据不足导致的正常模式表征不完全以及异常污染问题，在无监督表格异常检测任务上达到了最先进水平。

Abstract: Unsupervised tabular anomaly detection methods typically learn feature patterns from normal samples during training and subsequently identify samples that deviate from these patterns as anomalies during testing. However, in practical scenarios, the limited scale and diversity of training data often lead to an incomplete characterization of normal patterns. While test-time adaptation offers a remedy, its isolated focus on test-time optimization ignores the critical synergy with training-phase learning. Furthermore, indiscriminate adaptation to unlabeled test data inevitably triggers anomaly contamination, preventing the model from fully realizing its discriminative capability between normal and anomalous samples. To address these issues, we propose RTTAD, a Risk-aware Test-time adaptation method for unsupervised Tabular Anomaly Detection. RTTAD holistically tackles normality shifts via a synergistic two-stage mechanism. During training, collaborative dual-task learning captures multi-level representations to establish a robust normal prior. During testing, a Test-Time Contrastive Learning (TTCL) module explicitly accounts for adaptation risk by selectively updating the model using high-confidence pseudo-normal samples while constraining anomalous ones. Additionally, TTCL incorporates a k-nearest neighbor-based contrastive objective to refine embedding distributions, thereby further enhancing the model's discriminative capacity. Extensive experiments on 15 tabular datasets demonstrate that RTTAD achieves state-of-the-art overall detection performance.

</details>


### [621] [Teaching LLMs to See Graphs: Unifying Text and Structural Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10247)
*Dario Vajda*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GTLM，通过向预训练LLM注入图感知注意力偏置（仅增加0.015%参数），使其原生处理图拓扑而无需GNN压缩编码器，消除语义瓶颈，在1B参数下匹配或超越7B SOTA模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖多阶段流水线，使用GNN编码器将丰富文本属性压缩为单一token，造成严重语义瓶颈，限制了LLM处理图结构数据的能力。

Method: 提出Graph Transformer Language Model (GTLM)，将双向图感知注意力偏置直接注入预训练LLM的注意力模块，仅增加0.015%参数；理论证明该偏置保持节点置换等变性，且与预训练模型精确后向兼容。

Result: 1B参数的GTLM在标准Text-Attributed Graph基准上匹配或超越7B参数SOTA模型；在GraphQA上显著超越基线；注意力头隐式学习模拟消息传递机制。

Conclusion: GTLM实现了LLM内真正的算法推理，为下一代GraphRAG和关系深度学习提供了可扩展的基础，代表了范式转变。

Abstract: Using Large Language Models (LLMs) to process graph-structured data is an active research area, yet current state-of-the-art approaches typically rely on multi-step pipelines with Graph Neural Network (GNN) encoders that compress rich textual attributes into solitary tokens, creating a significant semantic bottleneck. In this paper, we introduce the Graph Transformer Language Model (GTLM), a novel architecture that enables pretrained LLMs to natively process graph topologies while entirely eliminating this compressive bottleneck. GTLM is exceptionally parameter-efficient: by injecting graph-aware attention biases directly into the LLM's attention modules, it introduces only 0.015% additional parameters relative to the base model. We theoretically prove that our bidirectional attention prefix preserves node permutation equivariance while maintaining exact backward compatibility with the pretrained base model. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that a 1B-parameter GTLM matches or exceeds the performance of 7B-parameter state-of-the-art models on standard Text-Attributed Graph benchmarks, while significantly surpassing baselines on GraphQA. Finally, we demonstrate that GTLM attention heads implicitly learn to simulate message passing, explaining its superior performance on algorithmic tasks. This paradigm shift enables true algorithmic reasoning within LLMs and provides a scalable foundation for next-generation GraphRAG and relational deep learning.

</details>


### [622] [DP-LAC: Lightweight Adaptive Clipping for Differentially Private Federated Fine-tuning of Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10272)
*Haaris Mehmood,Jie Xu,Karthikeyan Saravanan,Rogier Van Dalen,Mete Ozay*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DP-LAC方法，通过私有直方图估计初始化裁剪阈值，并在训练中自适应调整，无需额外隐私预算或超参数调优，在联邦学习差分隐私场景下平均准确率提升6.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的差分隐私联邦学习中，自适应裁剪技术需要繁琐的超参数调优，这会消耗隐私预算。作者希望设计一种无需额外隐私开销和超参数调优的自适应裁剪方法。

Method: DP-LAC首先通过私有直方图估计在数量级范围内估计出接近最优的初始裁剪阈值，然后在训练过程中自适应调整该阈值，整个过程不消耗额外的隐私预算，也不引入新的超参数。

Result: DP-LAC在平均准确率上比当前最先进的自适应裁剪方法和普通DP-SGD高出6.6%。

Conclusion: DP-LAC在保护隐私的同时有效提升了模型性能，且无需额外隐私成本或超参数调优，是一种更高效的联邦学习差分隐私方案。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables the collaborative training of large-scale language models (LLMs) across edge devices while keeping user data on-device. However, FL still exposes sensitive information through client-provided gradients. Differentially private stochastic gradient descent (DP-SGD) mitigates this risk by clipping each client's contribution to a threshold $C$ and adding noise proportional to $C$. Existing adaptive clipping techniques dynamically adjust $C$ but demand tedious hyperparameter tuning, which can erode the privacy budget. In this paper, we introduce DP-LAC, a method that first estimates an initial clipping threshold within an order of magnitude of the optimum using private histogram estimation, and then adapts this threshold during training without consuming additional privacy budget or introducing new hyperparameters. Empirical results show that DP-LAC outperforms both state-of-the-art adaptive clipping methods and vanilla DP-SGD, achieving an average accuracy gain of $6.6\%$.

</details>


### [623] [Predictive Radiomics for Evaluation of Cancer Immune SignaturE in Glioblastoma: the PRECISE-GBM study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10278)
*Prajwal Ghimire,Junjie Li,Liu Yaou,Marc Modat,Thomas Booth*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究通过放射基因组学分析，利用MRI影像特征预测IDH野生型胶质母细胞瘤微环境中的免疫细胞特征，成功开发并验证了可预测巨噬细胞M0亚型免疫信号的放射学生物标志物，为免疫治疗患者分层提供了非侵入性工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 胶质母细胞瘤的免疫治疗患者分层需要非侵入性生物标志物。放射基因组学可将影像特征与基因组表型关联，但目前缺乏能捕获肿瘤微环境中免疫细胞信号的可靠影像学生物标志物。

Method: 回顾性多中心研究，从TCGA-GBM等5个公开数据集中获取176例患者的MRI影像与转录组数据。提取坏死核心、增强区域和水肿区域的影像组学特征，通过嵌套交叉验证LASSO进行特征选择，以去卷积转录组数据中的17种免疫和细胞特异性评分作为标签，训练SVM和集成模型，在三个保留数据集上验证。

Result: 经特征选择后的免疫相关放射组学特征包括形状、一阶和高阶特征。预测巨噬细胞亚型免疫信号的模型在三个独立保留数据集上表现稳定，平衡准确率0.67，精确率0.89，集成模型优于SVM模型。

Conclusion: 放射基因组学模型可非侵入性预测IDH野生型胶质母细胞瘤中巨噬细胞M0亚型的免疫信号，这些生物标志物有潜力在未来的前瞻性临床试验中用于胶质母细胞瘤免疫治疗的患者分层。

Abstract: Background: Radiogenomics allows identification of radiological biomarkers for genomic phenotypes. In glioblastoma, these biomarkers could potentially complement patient stratification strategies. We aim to develop and analytically validate radiological biomarkers that capture immune cell signatures within IDH-wildtype glioblastoma microenvironment using radiogenomic analysis.
  Methods: This was a retrospective multicenter study using curated open-access anonymized imaging and genomic data from TCGA-GBM, CPTAC, IvyGAP, REMBRANDT and CGGA datasets. Imaging data consisted of MRI-based radiomic features extracted from necrotic core, enhancing and edema regions of deep learning-based auto-segmented tumors. Radiomic feature selections were performed using nested cross-validated LASSO. Support vector machine and ensemble models were trained using seventeen immune and cell-specific score labels extracted from deconvoluted transcriptomic data using pan-cancer and glioblastoma immune signature matrices as reference standards. Seventeen classifier models trained in three cross-cohort strategies were validated on three held-out datasets assessing stability and generalizability.
  Results: One-hundred-and-seventy-six patients were included in the study. The immune-related radiomic signatures obtained after feature selection were shape, first order and higher order radiomic features. Models predicting macrophage subtype immune signature showed stable mean performance on balanced accuracy (0.67) and precision (0.89) metrics for three independent holdout datasets with ensemble model outperforming support vector machine model.
  Conclusion: Radiogenomic models non-invasively predicted the macrophage subtype M0 immune signature in IDH-wildtype glioblastoma. These biomarkers have the potential to stratify patients for immunotherapy within prospective glioblastoma clinical trials.

</details>


### [624] [DeepLog: A Software Framework for Modular Neurosymbolic AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10279)
*Robin Manhaeve,Stefano Colamonaco,Vincent Derkinderen,Rik Adriaensen,Lucas Van Praet,Luc De Raedt,Giuseppe Marra*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DeepLog是一个在标准PyTorch工作流中统一逻辑和深度学习的神经符号框架，能够将多种神经符号语言自动编译为优化的算术电路，降低使用门槛并提供高性能基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经符号系统各自专注于特定的范式和语义，缺乏一个通用的后端来统一不同系统，机器学习从业者使用门槛高，神经符号开发者缺乏共享的高性能基础来原型化新的集成策略。

Method: DeepLog作为通用后端，将多种神经符号语言视为高层规范，自动将其编译为优化的算术电路，并作为可组合的模块集成到标准PyTorch工作流中。

Result: 能够模拟许多现有的神经符号系统，降低了机器学习从业者的使用门槛，同时为神经符号开发者提供了共享的高性能基础。

Conclusion: DeepLog通过统一后端和自动编译设计，有效弥合了逻辑与深度学习之间的鸿沟，提升了神经符号系统的可访问性和性能。

Abstract: DeepLog is an operational neurosymbolic framework that unifies logic and deep learning within standard PyTorch workflows. While existing neurosymbolic systems focus on a particular paradigm and semantics, DeepLog serves as a universal backend that can emulate many systems in the neurosymbolic alphabet soup. By treating diverse neurosymbolic languages as high-level specifications, the DeepLog software automatically compiles them into optimized arithmetic circuits. This design lowers the barrier for machine learning practitioners by treating logic as composable modules, while providing neurosymbolic developers with a shared, high-performance basis for prototyping new integration strategies. The code is available here: https://github.com/ML-KULeuven/deeplog

</details>


### [625] [LeapTS: Rethinking Time Series Forecasting as Adaptive Multi-Horizon Scheduling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10292)
*Sheng Pan,Ming Jin,Bo Du,Shirui Pan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LeapTS是一个将时间序列预测重构为动态调度过程的框架，通过分层控制器和神经受控微分方程实现多级决策，在提升预测性能7.4%的同时实现2.6-5.3倍推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列预测模型将预测视为从历史到目标区间的固定映射，导致未来时间点之间的时序解耦，模型无法随预测进展适应不断变化的上下文。

Method: 提出LeapTS框架：(1)分层控制器动态选择最优预测尺度和推进步长；(2)基于神经受控微分方程的连续时间状态演化，通过受控更新机制将不规则时序动态与离散调度反馈显式耦合。

Result: 在真实和合成数据集上，预测性能提升至少7.4%，推理速度相比代表性Transformer模型提升2.6倍至5.3倍。

Conclusion: 通过追踪调度轨迹，揭示了模型如何自主调整预测行为以捕获非平稳动态，验证了动态调度范式在时间序列预测中的有效性。

Abstract: Time series forecasting serves as an essential tool for many real-world applications, supporting tasks such as resource optimization and decision-making. Despite significant architectural advancements, most modern models still treat forecasting task as a fixed mapping from history to target horizons. This induces temporal decoupling across future time points and limits the model's ability to adapt to the evolving context as forecasting progresses. In this work, we present LeapTS, a novel framework that reformulates time series forecasting as a dynamic scheduling process over the prediction horizon. Specifically, LeapTS organizes the forecasting process into multi-level decisions using: (1) the hierarchical controller to dynamically select the optimal prediction scale and advancement length at each step, and (2) continuous-time state evolution driven by neural controlled differential equations. Within this process, the controlled update mechanism explicitly couples the irregular temporal dynamics with discrete scheduling feedback. Extensive evaluations on both real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrate that LeapTS improves overall forecasting performance by at least 7.4% while achieving a 2.6$\times$ to 5.3$\times$ inference speedup over representative Transformer-based models. Furthermore, by explicitly tracing the scheduling trajectories, we reveal how the model autonomously adapts its forecasting behavior to capture non-stationary dynamics.

</details>


### [626] [Robust Probabilistic Shielding for Safe Offline Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10293)
*Maris F. L. Galesloot,Thomas Rhemrev,Nils Jansen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将安全策略改进（SPI）与屏蔽（Shielding）技术结合到离线强化学习中，通过仅依赖固定数据集和安全状态知识来保证学习策略的性能与安全性。实验表明，屏蔽后的SPI在低数据场景下显著优于未屏蔽版本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线强化学习面临两大挑战：性能保证与安全保障。SPI提供性能保证但缺乏安全保证，而屏蔽技术提供安全保证但未在离线场景应用。现有方法难以兼顾两者。

Method: 将屏蔽技术扩展到离线RL环境：仅利用已有数据集和安全/不安全状态知识，在策略改进步骤中施加屏蔽，限制动作空间为可证明安全的动作，从而以高概率保证安全策略。

Result: 实验结果显示，屏蔽后的SPI在平均性能和最差性能上均优于未屏蔽版本，尤其在低数据场景下优势明显。

Conclusion: 屏蔽技术可有效提升离线强化学习中SPI的安全性与性能，是一种兼顾性能保证与安全保证的可行方案。

Abstract: In offline reinforcement learning (RL), we learn policies from fixed datasets without environment interaction. The major challenges are to provide guarantees on the (1) performance and (2) safety of the resulting policy. A technique called safe policy improvement (SPI) provides a performance guarantee: with high probability, the new policy outperforms a given baseline policy, which is assumed to be safe. Orthogonally, in the context of safe RL, a shield provides a safety guarantee by restricting the action space to those actions that are provably safe with respect to a given safety-relevant model. We integrate these paradigms by extending shielding to offline RL, relying solely on the available dataset and knowledge of safe and unsafe states. Then, we shield the policy improvement steps, guaranteeing, with high probability, a safe policy. Experimental results demonstrate that shielded SPI outperforms its unshielded counterpart, improving both average and worst-case performance, particularly in low-data regimes.

</details>


### [627] [Set Prediction for Next-Day Active Fire Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10298)
*Yuchen Bai,Georgios Athanasiou,Xin Yu,Diogenis Antonopoulos,Ioannis Papoutsis,Stijn Hantson,Nuno Carvalhais*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出WISP模型，将次日活跃野火预测重新定义为点集预测问题，在375米网格上预测野火簇中心，在全局测试集上达到38.2%平均精度和53.4%的火辐射功率覆盖率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器学习方法通常在公里级网格上预测火灾危险或概率，无法直接表示局部的火灾事件，需要更高分辨率、能直接预测火灾位置的方法。

Method: 提出WISP模型，将次日野火预测转化为点集预测问题。使用48小时的气象、卫星植被、静态土地和火灾历史等多源协变量，通过匈牙利匹配进行端到端训练，采用非对称的分类-定位权重策略解决分类分数在分配、排序和查询激活中的冲突。

Result: 在全局测试集上，最佳WISP变体在排名火灾中心检测上达到38.2%平均精度(AP)，覆盖53.4%的火辐射功率(FRP)加权的火灾簇质量，54.1%的观测簇定位在5公里范围内。

Conclusion: 稀疏集预测可以作为高分辨率野火预测的有效框架，为未来相关研究提供了基准。

Abstract: Accurate next-day active fire forecasts can support early warning, disaster response, forest risk assessment, and downstream estimation of fire-related carbon emissions. Existing machine learning approaches to wildfire forecasting typically predict wildfire danger or fire probability on kilometre-scale daily grids, which is useful for regional warning but does not directly represent localized fire events. We propose Wildfire Ignition Set Predictor (WISP), a query-based model that reformulates next-day active fire forecasting as point-set prediction. From 48 hours of covariates including meteorology, satellite vegetation products, static land, and fire history, WISP predicts a fixed-size ranked set of future active fire cluster centres on a 375 m grid across globally distributed regions. The model is trained end-to-end with Hungarian matching; to address the conflicting roles of the classification score in assignment, ranking, and query activation, we use asymmetric classification-localization weighting in matching and loss. We further construct a globally distributed, hourly, multi-source benchmark for this task. On a held-out test set spanning fire regions worldwide, the best WISP variant achieves 38.2% average precision (AP) for ranked fire-centre detections, covers 53.4% of fire cluster mass weighted by fire radiative power (FRP), and localizes 54.1% of observed clusters within 5 km. These results establish sparse set prediction as a viable formulation for high-resolution wildfire forecasting and provide a benchmark for future work in this regime.

</details>


### [628] [Nearly-Optimal Algorithm for Adversarial Kernelized Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10299)
*Shogo Iwazaki*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究对抗环境下的核化bandit问题，提出指数权重算法可实现$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$的对抗遗憾界，并通过下界证明其在SE和Matérn核下的最优性（至多对数因子差异），同时利用Nyström近似给出了计算高效的变体算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将核化bandit（高斯过程bandit）从传统随机/良性环境拓展到对抗性环境，填补该领域在对抗性设定下的理论空白。

Method: 采用指数权重（Exponential-weight）算法进行在线学习；为提升计算效率，引入Nyström近似对核矩阵进行低秩近似。

Result: 1. 指数权重算法达到$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$的对抗遗憾界；2. 对SE和Matérn核给出算法无关的下界，证明算法最优性；3. 基于Nyström近似的变体在保持近最优遗憾的同时大幅降低计算开销。

Conclusion: 指数权重算法在对抗性核化bandit中是最优的（至多对数因子），且可通过Nyström近似实现高效计算，理论分析完备。
