Abstract: This paper studies kernelized bandits (also known as Gaussian process bandits) in an adversarial environment, where the reward functions in a known reproducing kernel Hilbert space (RKHS) may be adversarially chosen at each round. We show that the exponential-weight algorithm achieves $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$ adversarial regret, where $T$ and $γ_T$ denote the number of total rounds and the maximum information gain, respectively. For squared exponential (SE) and $ν$-Matérn kernels, we also show algorithm-independent lower bounds that guarantee the optimality of our algorithm up to polylogarithmic factors. Furthermore, we present a computationally efficient variant of our algorithm using Nyström approximation while maintaining nearly optimal regret guarantees.

</details>


### [629] [Follow the Mean: Reference-Guided Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10302)
*Pedro M. P. Curvo,Maksim Zhdanov,Floor Eijkelboom,Jan-Willem van de Meent*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现对于确定性插值，流匹配的速度场仅由条件端点均值决定，从而提出通过改变参考集来引导预训练模型生成的新范式，无需微调或额外网络。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可控生成方法依赖微调、辅助网络或测试时搜索，缺乏更简洁的控制接口。本文旨在探索流匹配是否允许通过示例自适应来实现可控生成，摆脱参数更新的束缚。

Method: 提出两种实例化方法：(1) 参考均值引导（训练无关），从参考集中计算闭式端点均值校正并应用于冻结的FLUX模型；(2) 半参数引导，通过显式均值锚点和学习到的残差精炼器来近似同一思想，允许推理时切换参考集。

Result: 参考均值引导无需训练即可控制颜色、身份、风格和结构，且保持提示词、种子和权重不变；半参数引导在AFHQv2上达到与无条件DiT-B/4相当的质量，同时支持推理时切换参考集。

Conclusion: 生成模型可以通过数据（而非参数更新）来适应，指向了一种更广泛的生成模型自适应范式。

Abstract: Existing approaches to controllable generation typically rely on fine-tuning, auxiliary networks, or test-time search. We show that flow matching admits a different control interface: adaptation through examples. For deterministic interpolants, the velocity field is solely governed by a conditional endpoint mean; shifting this mean shifts the flow itself. This yields a simple principle for controllable generation: steer a pretrained model by changing the reference set it follows. We instantiate this idea in two forms. Reference-Mean Guidance is training-free: it computes a closed-form endpoint-mean correction from a reference bank and applies it to a frozen FLUX.2-klein (4B) model, enabling control of color, identity, style, and structure while keeping the prompt, seed, and weights fixed. Semi-Parametric Guidance amortizes the same idea through an explicit mean anchor and learned residual refiner, matching unconditional DiT-B/4 quality on AFHQv2 while allowing the reference set to be swapped at inference time. These results point to a broader direction: generative models that adapt through data, not parameter updates.

</details>


### [630] [Active Tabular Augmentation via Policy-Guided Diffusion Inpainting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10315)
*Zheyu Zhang,Shuo Yang,Bardh Prenkaj,Gjergji Kasneci*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TAP框架，通过条件化生成策略和保守注入机制，解决表格数据增强中分布保真度与下游模型效用之间的差距问题，在数据稀缺场景下显著提升分类和回归性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式表格增强方法过分关注样本的分布真实性，但高保真度的生成样本并不一定能提升下游模型性能，存在"保真度-效用差距"。

Method: TAP框架结合扩散修复（diffusion inpainting）与轻量级、学习者条件化的策略网络，动态决定生成什么样本以及何时注入训练过程，并通过显式门控和保守窗口承诺机制控制安全注入。

Result: 在7个真实数据集上，TAP在严重数据稀缺场景下始终优于强生成基线，分类准确率最高提升15.6个百分点，回归RMSE降低最高达32%。

Conclusion: 生成式表格增强应超越分布保真度的优化，转向以效用为导向的生成与注入策略，TAP为此提供了一种有效的实现方案。

Abstract: Generative tabular augmentation is appealing in data-scarce domains, yet the prevailing focus on distributional fidelity does not reliably translate into better downstream models. We formalize a fidelity-utility gap: common generative objectives prioritize distributional plausibility, whereas augmentation succeeds only when injected samples reduce the current learner's held-out evaluation loss. This gap motivates learning not just how to generate, but what to generate and when to inject as training evolves. We propose TAP (Tabular Augmentation Policy), which couples diffusion inpainting with a lightweight, learner-conditioned policy to steer generation toward high-utility regions and controls safe injection via explicit gating and conservative windowed commitment. Under severe data scarcity, TAP consistently outperforms strong generative baselines on seven real-world datasets, improving classification accuracy by up to 15.6 percentage points and reducing regression RMSE by up to 32%.

</details>


### [631] [Relations Are Channels: Knowledge Graph Embedding via Kraus Decompositions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10317)
*Sayan Kumar Chaki*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于Kraus通道的知识图谱嵌入框架，通过三个结构公理（线性性、迹保持、完全正性）刻画关系算子的本质，并推导出KrausKGE模型，该模型能自然处理多对多关系、支持k跳推理，并给出首个理论上有依据的每关系复杂度度量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入模型缺乏对关系算子应满足的基本结构公理的统一认识，导致模型设计缺乏理论基础，尤其对复杂关系（如1-to-N、N-to-N）处理能力有限。

Method: 通过识别三个结构公理（线性性、迹保持、完全正性），利用Kraus表示定理证明它们刻画了一类Kraus通道结构；进一步引入w-Kraus通道推广到任意度量几何；基于此提出KrausKGE模型。

Result: KrausKGE在多对多关系上持续优于强基线模型，性能增益随关系扇出（fan-out）单调增加，且无需norm约束，支持k跳推理。

Conclusion: 该工作为KGE提供了坚实的理论基础，统一了现有操作符模型，并给出了首个理论驱动的每关系复杂度下界，实验验证与理论预测一致。

Abstract: Knowledge graph embedding (KGE) models typically represent each relation as an operator on entity embeddings. In this work, we identify three structural axioms that any principled relation operator must satisfy, linearity, trace preservation, and complete positivity, and show that they characterize a Kraus channel structure via the Kraus representation theorem. The completeness constraint defining this family is equivalent to these axioms, providing a principled foundation rather than an externally imposed condition. Under this formulation, most existing operator-based KGE models are recoverable as special cases with Kraus rank $κ= 1$ under specific embedding choices. We further generalize this characterization to arbitrary metric geometries by introducing \mbox{w-Kraus} channels, which satisfy completeness by construction within their respective spaces. Building on this theory, we propose \textsc{KrausKGE}, a principled KGE model that naturally handles $1$-to-$N$ and $N$-to-$N$ relations, supports $k$-hop reasoning without requiring explicit path encoders, and eliminates the need for norm constraints on entity embeddings. Additionally, our framework yields the first theoretically grounded per-relation complexity measure in the KGE literature, with a provable lower bound in terms of the empirical relation matrix rank. Empirical evaluation demonstrates that \textsc{KrausKGE} consistently outperforms strong baselines on $N$-to-$N$ relations, with performance gains that increase monotonically with relation fan-out, in alignment with theoretical predictions.

</details>


### [632] [Foundations of Reliable Inference: Reliability-Efficiency Co-Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10351)
*Jiayi Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文探讨在保持可信不确定性量化的同时降低计算开销，从两个视角提出统一框架，核心问题是如何高效实现可靠推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 贝叶斯学习在提供不确定性估计方面取得了进展，但计算开销日益突出，因此需要从单纯追求可靠性转向可靠性与效率的协同设计。

Method: 从两个视角构建统一框架，旨在同时实现高效计算与可信的不确定性量化。

Result: 提出了一种兼顾可靠性与效率的统一框架，能够降低计算开销并保持不确定性量化的可信度。

Conclusion: 高效且可靠的推理是可实现的，通过所提出的统一框架能够有效平衡计算效率与不确定性量化的可靠性。

Abstract: Reliable inference requires that artificial intelligence (AI) models provide trustworthy uncertainty estimates, not merely accurate predictions. Recent advances in Bayesian learning have made significant progress toward this goal, and growing concerns about computational overhead have jointly shifted the design criterion from reliability alone to the co-design of reliability and efficiency, i.e., reducing computational overhead while preserving trustworthy uncertainty quantification. This thesis develops a unified framework from two perspectives to address the central question: can we efficiently perform reliable inference?

</details>


### [633] [DeepLévy: Learning Heavy-Tailed Uncertainty in Highly Volatile Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10364)
*Yang Yang,Du Yin,Hao Xue,Flora Salim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对厚尾时间序列中深度概率预测模型难以捕捉极端事件的问题，提出DeepLévy框架，通过最小化经验与参数特征函数间的差异来学习莱维稳定分布的混合模型，在极端波动场景下显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度概率预测模型在处理厚尾时间序列时，难以捕捉突发的极端事件；莱维稳定分布虽能自然建模非高斯行为，但其概率密度函数难以处理，限制了基于似然的推断方法。

Method: 提出DeepLévy框架，通过最小化经验特征函数与参数特征函数之间的差异来学习莱维稳定分布的混合模型；引入混合机制，自适应学习多个莱维成分的上下文相关权重和参数，实现灵活的多步长不确定性建模。

Result: 在真实和合成数据集上，DeepLévy在尾部风险指标上优于当前最先进的深度概率预测方法，尤其在极端波动场景下表现突出。

Conclusion: DeepLévy通过特征函数匹配有效解决了莱维稳定分布在深度概率预测中的推断难题，为厚尾时间序列的极端事件建模提供了一种高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: Modeling uncertainty in heavy-tailed time series remains a critical challenge for deep probabilistic forecasting models, which often struggle to capture abrupt, extreme events. While Lévy stable distributions offer a natural framework for modeling such non-Gaussian behaviors, the intractability of their probability density functions severely limits conventional likelihood-based inference. To address this, we introduce DeepLévy, a neural framework that learns mixtures of Lévy stable distributions by minimizing the discrepancy between empirical and parametric characteristic functions. DeepLévy incorporates a mixture mechanism that adaptively learns context-dependent weights and parameters over multiple Lévy components, enabling flexible multi-horizon uncertainty modeling. Evaluations on both real and synthetic datasets demonstrate that DeepLévy outperforms state-of-the-art deep probabilistic forecasting approaches in tail risk metrics, especially under extreme volatility.

</details>


### [634] [PC3D: Zero-Shot Cooperation Across Variable Rosters via Personalized Context Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10377)
*Ahmet Onur Akman,Rafał Kucharski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PC3D方法，通过集中式教师将活跃团队压缩为协调令牌并个性化，再蒸馏到分布式策略中，使每个智能体能从局部历史中预测上下文并自适应决策，应对执行时团队规模动态变化的合作多智能体强化学习问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有合作多智能体强化学习通常假设固定执行团队，但实际分散式系统常面临部署时活跃智能体数量变化的问题，需要解决在无通信、无协调器、无在线重训练条件下如何实现有效协作。

Method: 提出PC3D框架：训练时，集合结构的集中式教师将当前活跃团队压缩为协调令牌，再个性化生成每个智能体特有的上下文，并蒸馏到分布式策略中；执行时，每个智能体从局部历史中预测自身上下文，并自适应地调节决策。

Result: 在三个合作MARL基准测试中，PC3D在已见和未见团队规模下均取得比基线更高的回报，消融实验验证了上下文蒸馏和自适应上下文使用均有效。

Conclusion: PC3D通过个性化协调上下文蒸馏，使分布式智能体能在团队规模动态变化下有效协作，且无需通信或在线重训练。

Abstract: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning often assumes a fixed execution team, yet many decentralized systems must operate with varying numbers of active agents during deployment. We study this setting under episodic roster variation: each episode is executed by a set of homogeneous agents, with the team size varying across episodes. Agents act only from local histories, without execution-time communication, privileged coordinators, or online retraining. Therefore, effective cooperation requires each agent to recover relevant context about the active team and adapt its behavior accordingly. To this end, we propose PC3D (Personalized Central Coordination Context Distillation), a method for training decentralized policies to recover and use personalized coordination context from local interaction histories. During training, a set-structured centralized teacher compresses the active team into coordination tokens and personalizes them into agent-specific contexts, which are distilled into decentralized policies. At execution, each agent predicts its own context from local history and adaptively uses it to condition decision-making. Across three cooperative MARL benchmarks, PC3D achieves higher returns than the evaluated baselines with both seen and unseen roster sizes, and ablations attribute these gains to both context distillation and adaptive context use.

</details>


### [635] [The Polynomial Counting Capabilities of Message Passing Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10393)
*Marco Sälzer,Pascal Bergsträßer,Anthony W. Lin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究消息传递神经网络（MPNN）超越线性算术的计数能力，主要利用局部和全局均值聚合，探讨表达带多项式计数约束的分级模态逻辑所需的条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作表明MPNN能表达涉及阈值计数或线性算术约束的逻辑，但超越线性算术的计数能力尚不清楚。本文旨在厘清利用均值聚合的MPNN表达多项式计数约束所需的条件。

Method: 理论分析均值MPNN的计数表达能力。针对节点标记图，分别在全局和局部多项式计数约束下，研究不同条件（如允许sum/max聚合、限制正则图、树状结构等）对表达能力的影响。

Result: 1) 全局多项式计数约束可在温和假设下用均值MPNN检查；2) 局部约束在无嵌套模态符时可行，需额外允许sum/max聚合或限制正则图；3) 嵌套模态符的公式可在树状结构图及类似假设下被捕获。

Conclusion: 揭示了均值MPNN在表达多项式计数约束时的能力边界，为理解神经网络在复杂计数逻辑中的表达能力提供了理论依据。

Abstract: The counting power of Message Passing Neural Networks (MPNN) has been the subject of many recent papers, showing that they can express logic that involves counting up to a threshold or more generally satisfy a linear arithmetic constraint. In this paper, we study the counting capabilities of MPNN beyond linear arithmetic, primarily utilising local and global mean aggregations. In particular, our goal is to tease out conditions required to express extensions of graded modal logic with polynomial counting constraints. We show that global polynomial counting constraints in node-labelled graphs can be checked using mean MPNN under mild assumptions. Checking local constraints is also possible, if we consider formulas with no nested modalities and additionally either (i) permit sum/max aggregations, or (ii) only restrict to regular graphs. We also show how formulas with nested modalities can be captured by mean MPNN over graphs with tree-like structures and similar assumptions.

</details>


### [636] [Causal Explanations from the Geometric Properties of ReLU Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10396)
*Hector Woods,Philippa Ryan,Rob Alexander*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出利用ReLU神经网络的几何结构（分段线性函数与凸多面体划分）直接提取因果解释规则，相比传统蒸馏方法，能更准确地反映原始网络决策过程，避免性能下降问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络作为黑箱模型难以解释，导致自动驾驶等安全关键系统的安全保障极具挑战。现有可解释性方法多采用蒸馏模型，但性能下降严重且无法保证准确反映原始模型决策逻辑。

Method: 利用ReLU网络的几何特性——网络将输入空间划分为由n维凸多面体定义的线性区域，每个输出神经元在每个区域对应一个线性函数。直接从这些几何分区中提取因果解释规则（"为什么"和"为什么不"）。

Result: 该方法生成的因果解释与原始模型行为精确一致，避免了蒸馏方法带来的性能损失和解释不准确问题。

Conclusion: 基于ReLU网络几何结构的解释方法能够在保证解释准确性的同时，为神经网络的安全保障提供可靠依据，优于现有基于蒸馏的解释技术。

Abstract: Neural networks have proved an effective means of learning control policies for autonomous systems, but these learned policies are difficult to understand due to the black-box nature of neural networks. This lack of interpretability makes safety assurance for such autonomous systems challenging. The fields of eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) and eXplainable Reinforcement Learning (XRL) aim to interpret the decision making processes of neural networks and autonomous agents, respectively. In particular, work on causal explanations aims to provide "why" and "why not" explanations for why a model made a given decision. However, most of the work on explainability to date utilises a distilled version of the original model. While this distilled policy is interpretable, it necessarily degrades in performance significantly when compared to the original model, and is not guaranteed to be an accurate reflection of the decision making processes in the original model and as such cannot be used to guarantee its safety. Recent work on understanding the geometry of ReLU neural networks shows that a ReLU network corresponds to a piecewise linear function divided into regions defined by an n-dimensional convex polytope. Through this lens, a neural network can be understood as dividing the input space into distinct regions which apply a single linear function for each output neuron. We show that this geometric representation can be used to generate causal explanations for the network's behaviour similar to previous work, but which extracts rules directly from the geometry of Neural Networks with the ReLU activation function, and is therefore an accurate reflection of the network's behaviour.

</details>


### [637] [Valid Best-Model Identification for LLM Evaluation via Low-Rank Factorization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10405)
*Elad Tolochinsky,Yaniv Tenzer,Yaniv Romano*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合多臂老虎机（MAB）与低秩预测的框架，通过双重稳健估计在保证统计有效性的前提下，显著减少评估大语言模型（LLM）所需的计算量，并准确识别最佳模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在固定基准上选择最佳LLM时，穷举评估所有模型-样本组合成本高昂，需要一种更高效的评估策略来减少不必要的LLM调用。

Method: 结合多臂老虎机算法（MAB）与低秩分解预测，利用双重稳健估计（doubly robust estimators）对模型性能进行无偏估计，并在适应性地选择模型、无放回采样样本的条件下构建有效的有限样本置信区间。

Result: 在真实基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在减少所需评估次数的同时，能够准确识别出性能最佳的模型，显著节省计算与成本。

Conclusion: 提出了一种兼顾统计有效性与效率的LLM评估框架，证明了低秩预测与MAB结合可以在不牺牲选择准确性的前提下大幅降低评估成本。

Abstract: Selecting the best large language model (LLM) for a fixed benchmark is often expensive, since exhaustive evaluation requires running every model on every example. Multi-armed bandit (MAB) algorithms can reduce the number of LLM calls by sequentially selecting the next model-example pair to evaluate, thereby avoiding wasted evaluations on clearly underperforming models. Further savings can be achieved by predicting model scores from the partially observed model-example score matrix using low-rank factorization. However, such predictions are not ground truth: they can be biased and may therefore lead to incorrect identification of the best model. In this work, we propose a principled framework that combines MAB with cheap predicted scores without compromising statistical validity. Specifically, we derive doubly robust estimators of each model's performance that use the low-rank predictions to reduce variance. This enables the construction of valid finite-sample confidence intervals in our setting, where models are selected adaptively and examples are sampled without replacement. Empirical results on real-world benchmarks show that our approach reduces the number of required evaluations, yielding meaningful savings in compute and cost while accurately identifying the best-performing model.

</details>


### [638] [Identified-Set Geometry of Distributional Model Extraction under Top-$K$ Censored API Access](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10407)
*Wenhua Nie,ZiCheng Zhu,Jianan Wu,Binhan Luo,Haoran Zheng,Jyh-Shing Roger Jang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究LLM API仅暴露top-K logit分数时，每个位置分布恢复的理论极限。实验表明top-K截断限制分布保真度，但不阻止能力迁移，生成式提取可恢复96%的私有能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代LLM API通常只暴露top-K logit分数并屏蔽剩余词汇，这种访问模式对分布恢复能力的影响尚不明确，需要理论分析其极限。

Method: 理论分析：给出TV距离的精确直径公式U_K；KL恢复的二元端点下界和小模糊度上界。实验验证：在Qwen3数学推理教师模型上进行top-K蒸馏、全logit蒸馏和生成式提取的对比实验。

Result: top-K蒸馏仅恢复12%私有能力，全logit蒸馏恢复56%（尽管KL闭合度达99%），生成式提取恢复96%。

Conclusion: Top-K截断限制每个位置分布的保真度，但不本身阻止能力提取，将保真度与迁移能力分离开来。

Abstract: Modern LLM APIs often reveal only top-$K$ logit scores and censor the remaining vocabulary. We study the per-position distribution-recovery limits of this access model. For censoring threshold $τ$, the compatible teacher distributions form an identified set whose total-variation diameter is exactly $U_K=(V-K)\exp(τ)/(Z_A+(V-K)\exp(τ))$, where $Z_A$ is the observed partition function. For KL recovery, we give a computable binary-endpoint lower bound and an asymptotically matching small-ambiguity upper bound, with an extension to reference-aware attackers. Experiments on a Qwen3 math-reasoning teacher reveal a layered extraction hierarchy: on-task top-$K$ distillation recovers 12% of private capability, full-logit distillation recovers 56% despite 99% KL closure, and generation-based extraction recovers 96%. Top-$K$ censoring therefore limits per-position distribution recovery but does not by itself prevent capability extraction, separating fidelity from transfer in prompt-only logit distillation.

</details>


### [639] [Equilibrium Residuals Expose Three Regimes of Matrix-Game Strategic Reasoning in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10410)
*Wenhua Nie,Binhan Luo,Zijie Meng,Jyh-Shing Roger Jang,Ching-Wen Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 大型语言模型在命名博弈论基准上表现良好，但去除语义线索后策略计算能力大幅下降。本文通过程序生成的零和矩阵游戏验证了这一差距，并提出监督微调和可利用性残差训练可提升泛化能力，但存在格式限制和方差问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示LLM在去除语义线索后策略计算能力的显著下降，证明现有命名基准无法真实反映模型的策略推理能力，强调程序化评估的必要性。

Method: 程序生成匿名零和矩阵游戏（2×2、3×3、5×5），进行监督微调和可利用性奖励训练，并通过主导动作填充实验提供因果证据。

Result: 语义去除后模型成功率从高水平降至34%（2×2）、18%（3×3）、2%（5×5）；监督微调将未见5×5-7×7成功率从2%提升至61%；可利用性训练平均37%但方差大；证明可利用性残差是2-Lipschitz连续的，而LP均衡选择器不连续。

Conclusion: 程序化评估是衡量策略推理的必要手段；残差奖励提供了一条真实但受格式限制的近似均衡计算路径。

Abstract: Large language models can score well on named game-theory benchmarks while failing on the same strategic computation once semantic cues are removed. We show this gap with procedurally generated zero-sum matrix games: a model that recognizes familiar games drops to 34%, 18%, and 2% success on anonymous $2{\times}2$, $3{\times}3$, and $5{\times}5$ payoff matrices. The benchmark separates semantic recall, learned approximate Nash computation, and an output-interface bottleneck that limits scale. Training only on $2{\times}2$ and $3{\times}3$ games, supervised fine-tuning raises unseen $5{\times}5$--$7{\times}7$ success from 2% to 61%, while exploitability-reward training averages 37% with high seed variance. We prove that the exploitability residual is $2$-Lipschitz in payoff perturbations, unlike discontinuous vertex-returning LP equilibrium selectors, explaining why residual training can transfer under payoff shifts even when formatting instability limits mean performance. A dominated-action padding experiment provides causal evidence: trained models solve $3{\times}3$ games embedded in much larger matrices, while random-padded controls fail and dense $12{\times}12$ games remain near failure. Procedural evaluation is therefore necessary for measuring strategic reasoning, and residual rewards expose a real but format-limited route to approximate equilibrium computation.

</details>


### [640] [Remember to Forget: Gated Adaptive Positional Encoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10414)
*Riccardo Ali,Alessio Borgi,Christopher Irwin,Mario Severino,Pietro Liò*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GAPE（门控自适应位置编码），通过在注意力分数中引入内容感知偏置，在不破坏旋转位置编码几何结构的前提下，解耦距离抑制与token重要性，从而提升长上下文检索能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旋转位置编码（RoPE）在超长序列下会进入分布外区域，导致虚假长程对齐、注意力分散和检索性能下降。现有方法在局部位置分辨率与长上下文稳定性之间存在权衡，无法根本解决这一问题。

Method: GAPE作为RoPE的即插即用增强模块，在注意力logits中引入内容感知偏置。包含两个门控机制：查询相关门（抑制无关上下文）和键相关门（保留有意义的远距离token）。理论证明受保护的token仍然可访问，未保护token的注意力权重随查询门值衰减。

Result: 在合成检索任务和长上下文基准测试中，GAPE相比Rotary基线始终产生更尖锐的注意力分布，并提升长上下文鲁棒性。

Conclusion: GAPE有效解决了RoPE在超长序列下的分布外问题，在不牺牲位置分辨率的前提下提升了长上下文稳定性，且可兼容标准缩放点积注意力机制。

Abstract: Rotary Positional Encoding (RoPE) is widely used in modern large language models. However, when sequences are extended beyond the range seen during training, rotary phases can enter out-of-distribution regimes, leading to spurious long-range alignments, diffuse attention, and degraded retrieval. Existing remedies only partially address these failures, as they often trade local positional resolution for long-context stability. We propose GAPE (Gated Adaptive Positional Encoding), a drop-in augmentation for positional encodings that introduces a content-aware bias directly into the attention logits while preserving the rotary geometry. GAPE decouples distance-based suppression from token importance through a query-dependent gate that contracts irrelevant context and a key-dependent gate that preserves salient distant tokens. We prove that protected tokens remain accessible, while the attention mass assigned to unprotected distant tokens decays as a function of the query gate. We further show that GAPE can be implemented within standard scaled dot-product attention. We validate these properties empirically, finding that GAPE consistently yields sharper attention and improved long-context robustness over rotary baselines across both synthetic retrieval and long-context benchmarks.

</details>


### [641] [Beyond Spatial Compression: Interface-Centric Generative States for Open-World 3D Structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10438)
*Xiang Chen,Alexander Binder*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出C2LT-3D，将3D tokenizer从被动空间压缩转变为接口中心的生成状态表示，显式解耦局部几何、部件归属和连接有效性，在零样本开放世界多部件资产上提升了结构鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D tokenizer将表示视为空间压缩，只关注几何重建，隐式处理部件归属和连接关系，导致在开放世界多部件资产中局部形状、部件身份和装配关系在潜在流中纠缠不清，解码时无法原生寻址。

Method: 提出Component-Conditioned Canonical Local Tokens (C2LT-3D)，将表示分解为三个因子：规范局部几何、分区条件上下文和关系接缝变量，分别对抗姿态泄露、跨部件干扰和无效局部连接三种失败模式。

Result: 在单物体CAD模型上训练，零样本评估开放世界多部件资产，C2LT-3D提升了结构鲁棒性，其潜在变量在对抗性连接设置下保持可操作。

Conclusion: 开放世界3D生成表示不应仅以重建保真度评估，而应评估其离散状态是否对装配级结构推理保持可操作。

Abstract: Current 3D tokenizers largely treat representation as spatial compression: compact codes reconstruct surface geometry, but leave component ownership and attachment validity implicit. In open-world assets with intersecting components, noisy topology, and weak canonical structure, this creates a representation mismatch: local shape, component identity, and assembly relations become entangled in a latent stream and are not natively addressable during decoding. We formulate an alternative view, interface-centric generative states, in which tokenization constructs an operational state rather than a passive compressed code. The state exposes local geometry, component ownership, and attachment validity as variables that can be queried, constrained, and repaired during decoding. We instantiate this formulation with Component-Conditioned Canonical Local Tokens (C2LT-3D), factorizing representation into canonical local geometry, partition-conditioned context, and relational seam variables. Each factor targets a distinct failure mode of compression-centric tokens: pose leakage, cross-component interference, or invalid local attachment. This exposed state supports attachment validation, latent structural repair, targeted intervention, and constrained serialization without a separate post-hoc structure recovery module. Trained on single-object CAD models and evaluated zero-shot on open-world multi-component assets, C2LT-3D improves structural robustness and shows that its latent variables remain actionable under adversarial attachment settings. These results suggest that open-world 3D generative representations should be evaluated not only by reconstruction fidelity, but by whether their discrete states remain operational for assembly-level structural reasoning.

</details>


### [642] [Don't Fix the Basis -- Learn It: Spectral Representation with Adaptive Basis Learning for PDEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10451)
*Xuxiang Zhao,Angelica I. Aviles-Rivero*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ABLE提出了一种自适应基学习方法，通过数据驱动的方式学习谱表示而非依赖固定全局基，从而更好地捕捉空间异构和多尺度动力学，并能作为即插即用模块提升现有神经算子的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的谱神经算子依赖固定的全局基，难以有效表示空间异构和多尺度动力学，限制了其表达能力。

Method: ABLE通过学习数据依赖的谱表示，构建空间自适应的Parseval框架，利用辅助密度函数在提升的谱空间上执行算子，并通过FFT实现保持O(N log N)的计算复杂度。

Result: 在多个基准测试中，ABLE显著提升了准确性，尤其是在梯度尖锐和多尺度行为明显的场景中；同时作为即插即用模块，增强了U-FNO、HPM等现有模型的性能。

Conclusion: 数据驱动的表示选择是神经算子设计中的关键瓶颈，ABLE通过学习基本身，为改进谱方法提供了一种高效且通用的框架。

Abstract: Spectral neural operators achieve strong performance for PDE learning, but rely on fixed global bases that limit their ability to represent spatially heterogeneous and multiscale dynamics. We propose Adaptive Basis Learning (ABLE), a framework that learns data-dependent spectral representations instead of relying on predefined bases. ABLE constructs a spatially adaptive Parseval frame via a learned ancillary density, enabling the operator to act in a lifted spectral space while preserving invertibility and maintaining $O(N\log N)$ complexity through FFT-based implementation. This shifts the source of expressivity from spectral coefficients to the representation itself, allowing the model to capture localized structures and non-translation-invariant interactions more efficiently. ABLE integrates seamlessly into existing neural operator architectures as a drop-in replacement for spectral layers. Across a range of benchmarks ABLE improves accuracy over strong baselines, with the largest gains in regimes characterized by sharp gradients and multiscale behavior. Moreover, augmenting existing models (e.g., U-FNO, HPM) with ABLE further enhances their performance, demonstrating its role as a general and complementary spectral refinement. Our results highlight that the data-driven choice of representation, rather than operator complexity alone, is a key bottleneck in neural operator design. By learning the basis itself, ABLE provides a principled and efficient framework for improving spectral methods in PDE learning.

</details>


### [643] [AxiomOcean: Forecasting the Three-Dimensional Structure of the Upper Ocean](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10455)
*Sensen Wu,Yifan Chen,Guantao Pu,Xiaoyao Sun,Yijun Chen,Jin Qi,Ming Kong,Keyi Yang,Lichen Xu,Wenguan Wang,Xiaofeng Li,Zhenhong Du*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AxiomOcean，一个全球AI海洋预报模型，通过显式建模水体垂直层次和跨层依赖关系，在1/12°分辨率下联合预测上层海洋的温度、盐度和三维流场。相比先进AI对比模型，AxiomOcean在10天预报中RMSE降低20-35%，同时更好地保留了涡动能、温盐方差和上层热含量的三维结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI海洋预报模型常常丢失上层海洋的垂直结构，导致次表层特征过度平滑，在强强迫下物理一致性差。而短期海洋预报技能高度依赖上层海洋的三维结构（层结、次表层热存储等），因此需要一种能显式保持垂直层间依赖的建模方法。

Method: 提出全三维编码器-骨干网络-解码器架构，结合地表大气强迫，在全局1/12°分辨率下联合预测上层海洋（至643 m深度）的温度、盐度和三维流场，显式建模水柱的垂直层级与跨层依赖关系。

Result: 在10天预报中，AxiomOcean相比先进AI对比模型，第1天RMSE降低约20-35%，异常相关性更高；更好地保留了涡动能、温盐方差；优势贯穿整个水柱，在赤道太平洋、黑潮延伸体和南大洋均表现更优，实现对上层海洋热含量的更真实重建。

Conclusion: 显式保持上层海洋三维结构可以同时提升AI海洋预报的准确性和物理保真度。

Abstract: Short-term ocean forecast skill depends strongly on the three-dimensional ocean structure of the upper ocean, which governs stratification, subsurface heat storage, and the response of the ocean to atmospheric forcing. However, AI ocean forecasting models often fail to preserve this vertical structure, resulting in over-smoothed subsurface features and weak physical consistency under strong forcing. Here, we present AxiomOcean, a global AI ocean forecasting model that explicitly represents vertical hierarchy and cross-layer dependence within the water column. By combining a fully three-dimensional encoder-backbone-decoder architecture with surface atmospheric forcing, AxiomOcean jointly predicts upper-ocean temperature, salinity, and three-dimensional currents at global 1/12° resolution down to 643 m depth. In 10-day forecasts, AxiomOcean outperforms an advanced AI comparison model across variables and lead times, reducing day-1 RMSE by approximately 20 to 35% while maintaining higher anomaly correlation. The gain is not achieved through excessive smoothing: AxiomOcean better preserves eddy kinetic energy, temperature and salinity variance. Its advantage also extends through the water column and remains evident across the equatorial Pacific, Kuroshio Extension, and Southern Ocean, yielding a more realistic reconstruction of upper-ocean heat content. These results show that explicitly preserving upper-ocean three-dimensional structure can improve both forecast accuracy and physical fidelity in AI ocean prediction.

</details>


### [644] [QT-Net: Rethinking Evaluation of AI Models in Atomic Chemical Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10458)
*Pablo Martínez Crespo,Stefano Ribes,Martin Rahm,Richard Beckmann,Robert S. Jordan,Marisa Gliege,Santiago Miret,Vijay Kris Narasimhan,Rocío Mercado*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于SOAP描述符的原子级留出评估协议，用于公平比较E(3)-等变与非等变模型在预测原子电荷/多极子上的表现，并提出了QT-Net（旋转增强的非等变图神经网络），其在QM9数据集上不仅能推断原子性质，还能提升下游分子性质预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原子性质（如部分电荷、多极子）对分子性质预测具有化学信息价值，但缺乏原则性的原子级分布外（OOD）评估协议，导致不同模型在预测这些性质时的公平比较存在困难。

Method: 1) 提出基于SOAP描述符聚类原子环境的留出评估协议，仅统计训练中未见过的簇标签。2) 使用5×5交叉验证和Tukey's HSD进行统计严格的模型比较。3) 提出QT-Net，一种旋转增强的非等变图神经网络，用于推断原子性质并作为下游任务的输入特征。

Result: QT-Net能从QM9数据集中推断出训练集之外的原子性质，这些性质作为输入特征可改善下游分子性质预测；从QT-Net输出计算的分子偶极矩与QM9真实值吻合。

Conclusion: 提出的评估协议和QT-Net为将原子级QTA性质用作分子机器学习中的归纳偏置提供了有效框架，已开源代码和数据以支持更广泛应用。

Abstract: Atomic properties such as partial charges or multipoles encode chemically meaningful information that can inform downstream molecular property prediction, but their evaluation as machine learning targets has been complicated by the absence of a principled out-of-distribution evaluation protocol at the atomic level. In this work, we propose a held-out evaluation protocol that clusters atomic environments by SOAP descriptors and computes metrics accounting only for cluster labels unseen during training. Following this procedure, we use 5$\times$5 cross-validation and Tukey's HSD to run a statistically rigorous comparison of E(3)-equivariant against non-equivariant, rotationally augmented models for predicting electron populations and multipoles of H, C, N, and O atoms. Building on our results, we introduce the Quantum Topological Neural Network (QT-Net), a rotationally augmented, non-equivariant graph neural network. We show that QT-Net can be used to infer properties of atoms in molecules from QM9 outside our training set, and that these inferred properties can yield improvement when used as input features for downstream molecular property prediction. To further validate the framework, molecular dipole moments computed from QT-Net's per-atom outputs recover the ground-truth values reported in QM9. We release all code and data, including a JAX implementation of QT-Net, to support the broader use of learned QTA properties as inductive biases for atomic-scale molecular machine learning.

</details>


### [645] [Self-Attention as a Covariance Readout: A Unified View of In-Context Learning and Repetition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10466)
*Haoren Xu,Guanhua Fang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明，在特定输入条件下，softmax注意力机制会收敛到输入协方差矩阵的线性读出，这统一解释了上下文学习和重复生成两种现象，并揭示了它们都是协方差读出原理的不同表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者观察到LLM中两种看似无关的行为——上下文学习(ICL)和重复生成——都表现出模型将上下文总结为总体统计量并丢弃token级细节的特性。他们试图从注意力机制本身推导出这种"总结与遗忘"行为，并探索其理论根源。

Method: 论文从数学上证明了在平稳、遍历且椭圆对称的输入条件下，softmax注意力的输出几乎必然收敛到$\Theta_V\Sigma\Theta_K^{\top}\Theta_Q x_t$的形式，其中$\Sigma$是输入协方差矩阵。在此基础上分析了两种应用场景：(i) 单个softmax头可实现一步群体梯度下降，多个头堆叠可实现多步梯度下降；(ii) 在L层transformer中传播时，该读出机制以$1/t$的参量速率驱动终端隐藏状态。

Result: 证明了：(i) 在上下文线性回归中，单个softmax注意力头可实现一步群体梯度下降，堆叠多头可实现多步迭代；(ii) 自回归生成会渐近坍缩为一阶马尔可夫链，其吸引轨道从结构上解释了重复生成和模式坍缩现象。

Conclusion: 上下文学习和重复生成这两个看似不同的现象，本质上都是协方差读出原理的不同表现，统一在注意力机制对输入二阶统计量的线性读出框架下。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit two striking and ostensibly unrelated behaviours: in-context learning (ICL) and repetitive generation. In both, the model behaves as though it had summarised the context into a population-level statistic and discarded token-level detail. We ask whether this ``summarisation and forgetting'' can be derived from the attention mechanism itself, and answer in the affirmative. Under stationary, ergodic and elliptical inputs, the softmax attention output converges almost surely to $Θ_VΣΘ_K^{\top}Θ_Q x_t$, where $Σ$ is the input covariance; the long-context limit is therefore a linear readout of the input's second-order statistics. Two consequences follow. (i) For in-context linear regression, a single softmax head can implement one step of population gradient descent. Stacking such heads with residual connections iterates this update and implements multiple gradient descent steps. (ii) Propagated across an $L$-layer transformer, this readout drives the terminal hidden state at the parametric $1/t$ rate to a deterministic function of the current token alone, so that autoregressive generation collapses asymptotically to a first-order Markov chain whose attracting orbits furnish a structural account of repetition and mode collapse. The two phenomena thus emerge as facets of a single covariance-readout principle.

</details>


### [646] [Can Muon Fine-tune Adam-Pretrained Models?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10468)
*Xingyu Qu,Peigeng Huang,Samuel Horvath*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Muon在预训练中表现优异，但在微调时因与Adam优化器存在偏差而表现不佳。研究发现这种偏差会破坏预训练知识，且破坏程度与更新强度相关。通过LoRA限制更新可以有效缓解这一问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muon在预训练中表现优异，但在微调场景下未被充分使用。主要障碍在于大部分开源模型使用Adam预训练，直接切换到Muon微调会导致性能下降，因此需要研究这种优化器不匹配的原因及缓解方法。

Method: 通过控制实验研究Adam和Muon的隐式偏差差异；提出更新强度与知识破坏程度相关的假说；使用LoRA（低秩适配）来约束更新强度，缓解优化器不匹配问题。

Result: 在语言和视觉任务上，LoRA显著缩小了Adam与Muon在全参数微调下的性能差距；LoRA秩、灾难性遗忘及LoRA变体的实验进一步证实不匹配严重程度与更新强度相关。

Conclusion: 优化器不匹配会破坏预训练知识，且破坏程度随更新强度增加而加剧；LoRA通过限制更新有效缓解了Adam与Muon之间的不匹配问题，为Muon在微调场景的应用提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Muon has emerged as an efficient alternative to Adam for pretraining, yet remains underused for fine-tuning. A key obstacle is that most open models are pretrained with Adam, and naively switching to Muon for fine-tuning leads to degraded performance due to an optimizer mismatch. We investigate this mismatch through controlled experiments and relate it to the distinct implicit biases of Adam and Muon. We provide evidence that the mismatch disrupts pretrained knowledge, and that this disruption scales with update strength. This leads us to hypothesize that constraining updates should mitigate the mismatch. We validate this with LoRA: across language and vision tasks, LoRA reduces the performance gap between Adam and Muon observed under full fine-tuning. Studies on LoRA rank, catastrophic forgetting, and LoRA variants further confirm that mismatch severity correlates with update strength. These results shed light on how optimizer mismatch affects fine-tuning and how it can be mitigated. Our code is available at https://github.com/XingyuQu/muon-finetune.

</details>


### [647] [Formally Verifying Analog Neural Networks Under Process Variations Using Polynomial Zonotopes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10474)
*Yasmine Abu-Haeyeh,Tobias Ladner,Matthias Althoff,Lars Hedrich*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于多项式模型的模拟神经网络验证方法，利用多项式分区进行可达性分析，将验证时间从数天缩短至数秒，并能覆盖99%的工艺变异样本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模拟神经网络对制造工艺变异高度敏感，传统的蒙特卡洛仿真耗时过长，亟需一种高效的形式化验证方法。

Method: 提出多项式基模型来近似神经元电路在工艺变异下的行为，然后使用多项式分区（polynomial zonotopes）进行可达性分析，实现形式化验证。

Result: 在三个数据集上对全连接和卷积模拟神经网络进行验证，验证时间从数天减少到数秒，同时能够覆盖99%的变异样本。

Conclusion: 该多项式分区可达性分析方法能够高效且准确地验证模拟神经网络在工艺变异下的行为，避免了传统蒙特卡洛仿真的高耗时问题。

Abstract: Analog neural networks are gaining attention due to their efficiency in terms of power consumption and processing speed. However, since analog neural networks are implemented as physical circuits, they are highly sensitive to manufacturing process variations, which can cause large deviations from the nominal model. We present a polynomial-based model that resembles the performance of the neuron circuit under process variations. Then, we formally verify the behavior of the circuit-level model using reachability analysis with polynomial zonotopes, thus, avoiding conventional, time-consuming Monte Carlo simulations. We evaluate our proposed verification approach on three different datasets, verifying both fully-connected and convolutional analog neural networks. Our experimental results confirm the effectiveness of our verification approach by reducing the verification time from days to seconds while enclosing 99% of the variation samples.

</details>


### [648] [CMKL: Modality-Aware Continual Learning for Evolving Biomedical Knowledge Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10510)
*Yousef A. Radwan,Yao Li,Qing Qing,Ziqi Xu,Qixin Zhang,Yongcheng Jing,Renqiang Luo,Xikun Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CMKL框架，通过混合专家路由融合结构、文本和分子多模态信息，结合EWC正则化和K-means多样化回放缓冲区，在持续学习生物医学知识图谱上实现接近零遗忘，实体分类AP提升60%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么假设静态图结构，要么无法在演化数据分布下利用多模态信息，且对所有参数施加统一正则化，忽略了不同模态在知识图谱演化中呈现不同遗忘动态的问题。

Method: 提出CMKL框架：(1) 原生编码结构、文本和分子三种模态；(2) 通过Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)路由器进行多模态融合；(3) 使用EWC正则化保护旧知识；(4) 结合K-means多样化的多模态回放缓冲区缓解灾难性遗忘。

Result: 在129K实体、10个任务的生物医学持续学习基准上：实体分类AP达0.591（最强基线0.370，提升60%），近零遗忘(AF 0.008)；关系预测AP达0.062，冻结文本消融实验达0.136（超过任何联合训练模型两倍）。

Conclusion: 多模态信息对持续学习生物医学知识图谱至关重要；不同模态存在不对称性，贪婪模态处于表示层面而非融合层面，MoE路由能有效管理此不对称性。

Abstract: Biomedical knowledge graphs are increasingly large, dynamic, and multimodal, driven by rapid advances in biotechnology such as high-throughput sequencing. Machine learning models can infer previously unobserved biomedical relationships and characterize biomedical entities in these graphs, but existing knowledge graph embedding methods and their continual learning extensions either assume static graph structure or fail to exploit multimodal information under evolving data distributions. They also apply uniform regularization across all model parameters, ignoring that different modalities may exhibit distinct forgetting dynamics as the graph evolves. We propose the Continual Multimodal Knowledge Graph Learner (CMKL), a CL framework for biomedical KGs that natively encodes structure, text, and molecules, fuses them through a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) router, and protects previously learned knowledge with standard EWC regularization and a K-means-diverse multimodal replay buffer. We evaluate CMKL on a 129K-entity biomedical continual benchmark with 10 tasks. On continual biomedical entity classification, CMKL reaches AP 0.591 versus 0.370 for the strongest structural baseline, a 60% gain that is driven by access to multimodal features and preserved across the sequence with near-zero forgetting (AF 0.008). On continual relationship prediction, CMKL reaches AP $0.062$, matching Naive Sequential and EWC (0.058) within seed noise and outperforming Joint Training (0.047, p=0.045) and LKGE (0.039). A frozen-text ablation reaches AP 0.136, more than double any jointly trained model, yet that signal is unreachable by margin-ranking gradients: the greedy-modality asymmetry lives at the representation level, not the fusion level, and MoE routing manages it by suppressing the unreachable modality without forcing it through a learned bottleneck. Code: github.com/yradwan147/cmkl-neurips2026

</details>


### [649] [ConfoundingSHAP: Quantifying confounding strength in causal inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10533)
*Marie Brockschmidt,Santo M. A. R. Thies,Maresa Schröder,Dennis Frauen,Valentyn Melnychuk,Maximilian Muschalik,Eyke Hüllermeier,Stefan Feuerriegel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ConfoundingSHAP，一种基于Shapley值的方法，用于量化观测协变量在因果推断中的混杂强度，并通过TabPFN实现高效估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在观察性研究中，混杂因素影响治疗分配和结果，但分配机制未知，难以确定哪些协变量是混杂因素。现有SHAP方法不适合此任务，需要专门的方法来识别和量化混杂强度。

Method: 提出一个针对混杂强度推断的Shapley博弈，计算每个协变量的混杂SHAP值；并利用TabPFN进行可扩展的估计，避免对大量调整集进行重复模型拟合。

Result: 在多个数据集上，ConfoundingSHAP提供了关于哪些观测协变量驱动混杂的有信息量的解释，展示了其实用价值。

Conclusion: ConfoundingSHAP能够有效识别和量化混杂因素，为观察性研究中的因果推断提供更深入的见解。

Abstract: In causal inference, confounders are variables that influence both treatment decisions and outcomes. However, unlike as in randomized clinical trials, the treatment assignment mechanism in observational studies is not known, and it is thus unclear which covariates act as confounders. Here, we aim to generate insight for causal inference and answer: which of the observed covariates act as confounders? We introduce ConfoundingSHAP, a Shapley-based method for attributing confounding strength to individual covariates. Our contributions are twofold. First, we propose a Shapley game targeted to infer the confounding strength of the covariates. Our resulting Shapley values differ from the standard applications of SHAP explanations on causal targets, such as understanding treatment effect heterogeneity, which are ill-suited for our task. Second, as our task requires evaluating the value function over many adjustment sets, we provide a scalable TabPFN-based estimation that avoids exhaustive refitting. We demonstrate the practical value across various datasets, where ConfoundingSHAP provides informative explanations of which observed covariates drive confounding and thereby helps to provide more insight for causal inference in practice.

</details>


### [650] [HH-SAE: Discovering and Steering Hierarchical Knowledge of Complex Manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10536)
*Honghan Wu,Tianyan Wang,Jiacong Mi,Zhoyang Jiang,Yunsoo Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出HH-SAE，通过分层稀疏自编码器架构（Contextual/Atomic/Compository三级）解决高维关键领域中罕见语义创新被密集背景掩盖的问题，在跨域零样本欺诈检测达到0.9156 AUC，并通过知识引导合成实现+9.9% AUPRC提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维、关键任务领域中，罕见语义创新常被密集背景上下文所掩盖，现有方法难以有效分离，作者将此挑战定义为"特征密度冲突"（feature density conflict）。

Method: 提出混合分层SAE（HH-SAE），将流形分解为三级嵌套层次：Contextual（L₀）、Atomic（f₁）和Compository（f₂），通过"碎裂"（fracturing）管理性临床标签为生理模式进行特征解耦。

Result: 跨域零样本欺诈检测AUC达0.9156；路径消融实验证明架构必要性，去除Contextual减法后效用下降13.46%；知识引导合成相比SOTA生成器实现+9.9% AUPRC提升。

Conclusion: HH-SAE能够有效优先捕获高阶机制创新而非环境代理特征，从而在高风险场景中实现高精度发现。

Abstract: Rare semantic innovations in high-dimensional, mission-critical domains are often obscured by dense background contexts, a challenge we define as \textit{feature density conflict}. We introduce the \textbf{Hybrid Hierarchical SAE (HH-SAE)} to resolve this by factorizing manifolds into a nested hierarchy of \textbf{Contextual} ($L_0$), \textbf{Atomic} ($f_1$), and \textbf{Compository} ($f_2$) tiers. Evaluating across disparate manifolds, HH-SAE demonstrates superior resolution by \textbf{``fracturing'' administrative clinical labels into physiological modes} and achieving a peak \textbf{cross-domain zero-shot AUC of 0.9156 in fraud detection}. Path ablation confirms the architecture's structural necessity, revealing a 13.46\% utility collapse when contextual subtraction is removed. Finally, knowledge-steered synthesis achieves a +9.9\% AUPRC lift over state-of-the-art generators, proving that HH-SAE effectively prioritizes high-order mechanistic innovation over environmental proxies to enable high-precision discovery in high-stakes environments.

</details>


### [651] [Higher Resolution, Better Generalization: Unlocking Visual Scaling in Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10546)
*Raphael Trumpp,Ömer Veysel Çağatan,Barış Akgün,Marco Caccamo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文挑战了深度强化学习中传统使用低分辨率图像的惯例，发现高分辨率输入能显著提升策略性能与泛化能力。通过提出Impoola架构（用全局平均池化替代空间展平），实现参数量与分辨率解耦，在Procgen基准上相比Impala取得28%的性能提升，并开源了Procgen-HD基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度强化学习智能体通常使用严重降采样的视觉观测（如84×84像素），这一做法源自早期基准的惯例而非基于原理性设计。作者认为观察分辨率是策略学习中一个被忽视的关键变量，值得系统研究。

Method: 分析Impala编码器因空间展平操作导致参数量随分辨率二次增长的缺陷；提出Impoola架构，用全局平均池化（global average pooling）替代空间展平，使参数量与分辨率解耦；在多个分辨率和网络宽度下进行系统性对比实验，并利用梯度显著性分析探索机制。

Result: Impoola架构在各分辨率下均优于Impala；在最优条件下，视觉缩放为Impoola带来28%的性能增益；高分辨率带来的提升在需要精确感知小物体或远处物体的环境中最为显著；梯度显著性分析证实高分辨率使策略的视觉注意力更加空间局部化。

Conclusion: 挑战了深度强化学习中对输入进行激进下采样的普遍做法，提出分辨率无关的架构是实现可扩展视觉深度强化学习的简单有效途径，并开源Procgen-HD基准以推动后续研究。

Abstract: Pixel-based deep reinforcement learning agents are typically trained on heavily downsampled visual observations, a convention inherited from early benchmarks rather than grounded in principled design. In this work, we show that observation resolution is a critical yet overlooked variable for policy learning: higher-resolution inputs can substantially improve both performance and generalization, provided the network architecture can process them effectively. We find that the widely used Impala encoder, which flattens spatial features into a vector, suffers from quadratic parameter growth as resolution increases and fails to leverage the additional visual detail. Replacing this operation with global average pooling, as in the Impoola architecture, decouples parameter count from resolution and yields consistent improvements across resolutions and network widths - at their respective best conditions, visual scaling unlocks a 28 % performance gain for Impoola over Impala. These gains are strongest in environments that require precise perception of small or distant objects, and gradient saliency analysis confirms that the underlying mechanism is a more spatially localized visual attention of the policy at higher resolutions. Our results challenge the prevailing practice of aggressive input downsampling and position resolution-independent architectures as a simple, effective path toward scalable visual deep RL. To facilitate future research on resolution scaling in deep RL, we publicly release the open-source code for the Procgen-HD benchmark: https://github.com/raphajaner/procgen-hd.

</details>


### [652] [PhysEDA: Physics-Aware Learning Framework for Efficient EDA With Manhattan Distance Decay](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10547)
*Zetao Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PhysEDA，将EDA任务中曼哈顿距离指数衰减的物理先验作为归纳偏置整合进注意力机制和训练过程，通过线性注意力（PSLA）实现复杂度O(n)和潜在奖励塑造（PBRS）解决稀疏奖励问题，在电容放置、宏放置和IR-drop预测三个场景中取得零样本跨尺度迁移提升56.8%、14倍加速和98.5%内存节省等显著效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于Transformer和RL的EDA方法面临两个瓶颈：vanilla attention的二次复杂度限制了扩展性，以及数据稀缺导致模型过拟合统计噪声、放大弱长程相关性而违背底层物理规律。作者观察到EDA任务共享一个物理先验——成对电气和布线交互沿曼哈顿距离呈指数衰减，希望将其作为统一归纳偏置整合进架构和训练中。

Method: PhysEDA包含两个核心组件：1) Physics-Structured Linear Attention (PSLA)：将可分离的曼哈顿衰减因子折叠进线性注意力核中作为乘法偏置，将复杂度从O(n²)降至O(n)；2) Potential-Based Reward Shaping (PBRS)：基于同一物理核构建势函数，在稀疏奖励场景下提供密集奖励信号，同时通过策略不变性定理保证最优策略不变。

Result: 在去耦电容放置、宏放置和IR-drop预测三个EDA场景中，PhysEDA零样本跨尺度迁移性能提升56.8%，在100×100网格上实现14倍推理加速和98.5%内存节省；PBRS在稀疏奖励的DPP任务中额外提升10.8%。

Conclusion: 将物理先验作为归纳偏置显式引入深度学习架构，可以同时解决计算效率和数据效率两大EDA核心痛点，验证了物理信息融合的有效性。

Abstract: Electronic design automation (EDA) addresses placement, routing, timing analysis, and power-integrity verification for integrated circuits. Learning methods -- attention (Transformer) and reinforcement learning (RL) -- have recently emerged on EDA tasks, yet face two common bottlenecks: vanilla attention's quadratic complexity limits scaling, and data-scarce models overfit statistical noise and amplify weak long-range correlations against the underlying physics. We observe that EDA tasks share a physical prior -- pairwise electrical and routing interactions decay exponentially along Manhattan distance -- and integrate it as a unified inductive bias into both architecture and training. We propose PhysEDA, comprising two components Physics-Structured Linear Attention (PSLA) folds the separable Manhattan decay into the linear-attention kernel as a multiplicative bias, reducing complexity from quadratic to linear; Potential-Based Reward Shaping (PBRS) constructs a physical potential from the same kernel, providing dense reward signal under sparse RL while preserving the optimal policy via the policy-invariance theorem. Across three EDA scenarios -- decoupling-capacitor placement, macro placement, and IR-drop prediction -- PhysEDA improves zero-shot cross-scale transfer by 56.8% and achieves 14x inference speedup with 98.5% memory savings on 100x100 grids; PBRS adds another 10.8% in sparse-reward DPP.

</details>


### [653] [It's All Connected: Topology-Aware Structural Graph Encoding Improves Performance on Polymer Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10551)
*H. Ibrahim Erdogan,Punith Raviswamy,Nikita Agrawal,Yannik Köster,Stefan Zechel,Ulrich S. Schubert,Ruben Mayer,Christopher Kuenneth*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合链尺度图构建和自监督预训练的聚合物性质预测方法，在381个聚合物数据集上实现了5.1%的误差降低（RMSE 24.76 K vs 26.08 K），验证了大规模图表示和预训练联合使用的必要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GNN方法将聚合物简化为重复单元图，忽略了链尺度形态（如分子量分布）对玻璃化温度等关键性质的影响；同时聚合物标注数据稀缺（通常仅数百个），需要利用无标签数据进行预训练。

Method: 1) 根据Schulz-Zimm分布从分子量分布中采样代表性聚合物链，构建编码链尺度拓扑的大规模图；2) 使用丰富的化学描述符对原子和键进行特征化；3) 在10万条无标签PSMILES上通过掩码图建模预训练GNN编码器（GINE/GATv2），再在381个聚合物数据上微调。

Result: 仅用图构建（无预训练）与重复单元基线性能相当（28.40 K vs 28.36 K RMSE）；结合预训练后达到24.76 K ± 3.30 K，相比预训练的重复单元基线（26.08 K ± 4.20 K）降低5.1%误差（p<0.001，30次实验）；去除化学特征后性能降至36.65 K。

Conclusion: 链尺度图构建和自监督预训练对聚合物性质预测缺一不可，且该方法与具体GNN架构无关，在GINE和GATv2上均有效。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have achieved strong results in molecular property prediction, but polymers present distinct challenges: labeled datasets are scarce and small (typically in the order of hundreds of polymers) due to the need for expensive experimentation, and complex polymer chain distributions influence polymer properties. Established practice in polymer prediction represents polymers solely by graphs of their repeat units, discarding the chain-scale morphology that governs key properties such as the glass transition temperature ($T_g$). In this work, we propose a principled graph construction that addresses this gap. Given a polymer's molecular mass distribution (MMD), we sample representative chains from the Schulz-Zimm distribution and construct representative sets of large graphs encoding chain-scale topology directly, with atoms and bonds featurized using rich chemical descriptors. We further pretrain GNN encoders via masked graph modeling on 100,000 unlabeled PSMILES strings before fine-tuning on labeled data. On a dataset of 381 polymers (180 homopolymers and 201 copolymers), we show that graph construction and self-supervised pretraining are jointly necessary: without pretraining, the large graph method matches the repeat-unit baseline (28.40 K vs. 28.36 K RMSE); with pretraining, it achieves 24.76 K +/- 3.30 K, a 5.1% reduction in mean error over the pretrained repeat-unit baseline (26.08 K +/- 4.20 K, p < 0.001, 30 runs). An ablation removing chemical features degrades performance to 36.65 K, confirming both components are essential. Results are architecture-agnostic, holding for both GINE and GATv2 encoders.

</details>


### [654] [Online Sharp-Calibrated Bayesian Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10572)
*Marshal Arijona Sinaga,Julien Martinelli,Teemu Turpeinen,Samuel Kaski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出OSCBO算法，通过在线学习自适应调整高斯过程超参数，平衡预测的锐度与校准度，在保证亚线性遗憾理论界的同时提升贝叶斯优化的实际性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准贝叶斯优化假设GP核超参数固定已知，但实践中超参数需在线更新，导致不确定性量化不准确（过度保守或误校准），影响优化效率且缺乏理论保障。

Method: 将GP超参数选择建模为带约束的在线学习问题，在线调整核超参数以同时优化预测锐度（信息量）和校准度（可靠性），并利用在线学习算法的理论保证实现亚线性遗憾。

Result: 在合成和真实世界基准测试中表现优异，最终简单遗憾排名靠前，同时保持稳健的累积遗憾行为。

Conclusion: OSCBO有效解决了在线超参数更新导致的不确定性量化问题，在理论和实证层面均达到良好效果。

Abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a widely used framework for optimizing expensive black-box functions, commonly based on Gaussian process (GP) surrogate models. Its effectiveness relies on uncertainty quantification that is both sharp (informative) and well-calibrated along the BO trajectory. In practice, GP kernel hyperparameters are unknown and are refit online from sequentially collected (non-i.i.d.) data, which can yield miscalibrated or overly conservative uncertainty and lies outside the fixed-kernel assumptions of standard BO regret theory. We propose Online Sharp-Calibrated Bayesian Optimization (OSCBO), a BO algorithm that adaptively balances GP sharpness and calibration by casting hyperparameter selection as a constrained online-learning problem. We also show that OSCBO preserves sublinear regret bounds by leveraging the theoretical guarantees of the underlying online learning algorithm. Empirically, OSCBO performs competitively across synthetic and real-world benchmarks, ranking among the strongest methods in final simple regret while maintaining robust cumulative-regret behavior.

</details>


### [655] [Controllability in preference-conditioned multi-objective reinforcement learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10585)
*Pau de las Heras Molins,Beyazit Yalcinkaya,Lasse Peters,David Fridovich-Keil,Georgios Bakirtzis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出多目标强化学习（MORL）中偏好条件智能体可能存在偏好不敏感问题，现有指标无法衡量可控性，提出需要设计专门的可控性补充指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MORL指标无法评估偏好变化是否真正按预期改变了智能体行为（可控性缺失），导致用户意图与智能体行为之间的符号接口断裂。

Method: 批判性分析现有MORL评估指标，指出其无法衡量可控性的缺陷，呼吁提出专门的可控性补充指标。

Result: 发现偏好条件智能体可能在标准MORL指标上表现良好，但对偏好输入不敏感。

Conclusion: 需要设计可控性补充指标来完善MORL评估体系，以推动该领域向更大更复杂的问题发展。

Abstract: Multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL) allows a user to express preference over outcomes in terms of the relative importance of the objectives, but standard metrics cannot capture whether changes in preference reliably change the agent's behavior in the intended way, a property termed controllability. As a result, preference-conditioned agents can score well on standard MORL metrics while being insensitive to the preference input. If the ability to control agents cannot be reliably assessed, the symbolic interface that MORL provides between user intent and agent behavior is broken. Mainstream MORL metrics alone fail to measure the controllability of preference-conditioned agents, motivating a complementary metric specifically designed to that end. We hope the results spur discussion in the community on existing evaluation protocols to consolidate advances in preference adaptation in MORL to larger and more complex problems.

</details>


### [656] [Composing diffusion priors with explicit physical context via generative Gibbs sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10642)
*Weizhou Wang,Jonathan Weare,Aaron R. Dinner*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GG-PA是一个无需重新训练就能将预训练扩散模型（局部先验）与显式物理上下文结合的采样框架，通过增广状态空间上的吉布斯采样实现精确推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在科学采样中，目标分布往往依赖于一个生成模型无法完全表征的物理上下文，需要将先验知识与物理约束结合起来。

Method: 提出GG-PA框架：在增广状态空间上构建联合目标分布，推导吉布斯采样器；证明扩散时间趋于零时渐进精确，二次相互作用下有限时间精确；引入扩散时间上的副本交换加速混合。

Result: 在双阱系统、φ⁴格点模型和原子肽系统实验中，GG-PA仅使用局部先验就恢复了上下文引起的分布偏移和涌现集体行为。

Conclusion: GG-PA是一种将预训练生成先验与显式物理上下文结合的有效实用方法。

Abstract: Pretrained diffusion models provide powerful learned priors, but in scientific sampling the target distribution often depends on physical context that is not fully represented by one generative model. We introduce Generative Gibbs for Physics-Aware Sampling (GG-PA), a training-free framework that formulates the composition of learned partial priors and explicit physical context as inference over a joint target distribution in an augmented state space. We derive a Gibbs sampler for this joint target, show that it is asymptotically exact as the diffusion time approaches zero, and prove that in settings with quadratic interactions it remains exact at finite diffusion times. We further introduce replica exchange over diffusion time to accelerate mixing. Experiments on a double-well system, a $φ^4$ lattice model, and atomistic peptide systems show that GG-PA recovers context-induced distribution shifts and emergent collective behavior in interacting systems using partial priors without retraining. These results demonstrate GG-PA as a practical approach for combining pretrained generative priors with explicit physical context.

</details>


### [657] [A Random-Matrix Criterion for Initializing Gated Recurrent Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10650)
*Tommaso Fioratti,Riccardo Marcaccioli,Francesco Casola*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了循环神经网络（RNN）中权重初始化的临界点问题，提出了一种简单准则来估计门控RNN储备池计算中达到最优性能的临界初始化参数g_c，并证明该准则可作为未来初始化方案的设计原则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 权重初始化是深度学习成功的关键因素之一，在储备池计算（reservoir computing）中尤为重要，因为储备层权重固定且决定动力学特性。在无限宽极限下，存在一个由权重方差g²控制的相变，分隔有序相和混沌相。作者希望找到一种简单方法来估计这个临界点g_c，以指导实际初始化。

Method: 推导了一个简单准则来估计临界g_c，适用于一大类循环架构（包括门控RNN）。通过混沌预测任务，将理论估计的g_c与门控RNN储备池达到峰值性能时的增益进行对比验证。

Result: 提出的准则能够准确跟踪门控RNN在混沌预测任务中达到最佳性能时的临界增益值，理论估计与实际性能峰值高度吻合。

Conclusion: 所提出的g_c估计准则可以作为未来初始化方案的设计原则，帮助研究者更好地设置循环网络的初始权重。

Abstract: Proper weight initialization prior to training has historically been one of the key factors that helped kick off the deep learning revolution. Initialization is even more crucial in "reservoir computing", where the weights of a readout layer are learned linearly while the reservoir weights are fixed and largely determine the richness, stability and memory of the resulting dynamics. In the infinite-width limit it has been shown that meaningful initializations are those sitting at an effective critical point of the randomly initialized model. The phase transition is controlled by the weight variance $g^2$ and separates an ordered phase from a chaotic one where information progressively degrades. Here we derive a simple criterion to estimate the critical $g_c$ for a broad class of recurrent architectures and we show that it closely tracks the gain at which a gated-RNN reservoir achieves peak performance on a chaotic forecasting task. Finally, we argue that our criterion can serve as a design principle for future initialization schemes.

</details>


### [658] [Active Learning for Gaussian Process Regression Under Self-Induced Boltzmann Weights](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10654)
*Jixiang Qing,Henry Moss,Matthias Sachs*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对自诱导玻尔兹曼分布下主动学习问题的高斯过程采集函数方法，无需估计配分函数，并在理论保证和实际任务中表现优越。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在势能面建模和药物发现等任务中，目标函数本身定义了未知的玻尔兹曼分布，导致传统主动学习无法直接应用；同时配分函数难以计算，亟需一种无需配分函数估计的采集函数方法。

Method: 提出AB-SID-iVAR，一种基于高斯过程的采集函数，以封闭形式近似难以处理的贝叶斯目标分布，避免估计配分函数；同时提出TS-SID-iVAR作为高方差蒙特卡洛变体。

Result: 在温和条件下，证明了终端预测误差高概率收敛到零，并给出了更紧的平均情况保证；在合成基准、真实势能面建模及药物发现任务上持续优于现有方法。

Conclusion: AB-SID-iVAR有效解决了自诱导分布下主动学习的核心挑战，理论上有保证，实践上表现优异，适用于离散和连续输入空间。

Abstract: We consider the active learning problem where the goal is to learn an unknown function with low prediction error under an unknown Boltzmann distribution induced by the function itself. This self-induced weighting arises naturally in problems such as potential energy surface (PES) modeling in computational chemistry,
  yet poses unique challenges as the target distribution is unknown and its partition function is intractable. We propose \texttt{AB-SID-iVAR}, a Gaussian Process-based acquisition function that approximates the intractable Bayesian target distribution in closed form while avoiding partition function estimation, and is applicable to both discrete and continuous input domains. We also analyze a Thompson sampling alternative (\texttt{TS-SID-iVAR}) as a higher variance Monte Carlo variant. Despite the unknown target, under mild conditions, we establish that the terminal prediction error vanishes with high probability, and provide a tighter average-case guarantee. We demonstrate consistent improvements over existing approaches in this setting on synthetic benchmarks and real-world PES modeling and drug discovery tasks.

</details>


### [659] [BCJR-QAT: A Differentiable Relaxation of Trellis-Coded Weight Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10655)
*Venugopalan Iyengar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出BCJR-QAT，用可微的BCJR算法替代Viterbi硬解码，实现基于网格的量化感知训练，在2-bit LLM量化中超越QTIP后训练量化方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: QTIP在2-bit后训练量化上达到SOTA，但进一步突破PTQ天花板需要量化感知训练；然而网格上的QAT被非可微的Viterbi argmax所阻碍。

Method: 用BCJR前向后向和积算法（带温度T）替代argmax，产生软码字（等于玻尔兹曼期望），可微且T→0时恢复硬QTIP码；贡献了融合Triton核、漂移预算理论及端到端正向KL蒸馏训练策略。

Result: 单GPU上6.57倍加速；单层BCJR-QAT在Llama-3.2-1B 2bpw下比QTIP-PTQ降低0.084 PPL；多层复合呈超可加性。

Conclusion: BCJR-QAT通过可微松弛有效突破QTIP的PTQ瓶颈，精度增益可随层数复合叠加。

Abstract: Trellis-coded quantization sets the current 2-bit post-training frontier for LLMs (QTIP), but pushing below the PTQ ceiling requires quantization-aware training, and QAT on a trellis is obstructed by the non-differentiable Viterbi argmax. We introduce BCJR-QAT, a relaxation that replaces the argmax with the BCJR forward-backward sum-product algorithm at temperature $T$, producing a soft codeword equal to the Boltzmann expectation over trellis paths, exactly differentiable, recovering the hard QTIP code as $T \to 0$, and mathematically identical to the transfer-matrix computation for a 1D Ising-like spin chain. We contribute (i) a fused Triton kernel making BCJR tractable on a single consumer GPU ($6.57\times$ speedup, fp32 parity); (ii) a quantitative drift-budget theory of when BCJR-QAT can escape the QTIP-PTQ Voronoi basin, verified across four experiments; and (iii) a positive empirical result on Llama-3.2-1B at 2 bpw under end-to-end forward-KL distillation: with the right schedule (skip the high-$T$ phase to avoid an overshoot we diagnose), single-layer BCJR-QAT beats QTIP-PTQ by $\mathbf{-0.084}$ PPL on WikiText-2, and multi-layer compounding is super-additive.

</details>


### [660] [Why Zeroth-Order Adaptation May Forget Less: A Randomized Shaping Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10658)
*Yao Shu,Jian Mu,Zhongxiang Dai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过局部随机梯度整形分析，解释了为什么零阶（ZO）方法在持续学习中比一阶（FO）方法遗忘更少，并提出了RISE算法，将校准后的ZO整形应用于精确FO梯度，以改善稳定性-可塑性权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 持续学习中，零阶方法（ZO）在低查询条件下比一阶方法（FO）遗忘更少，但传统观点将ZO视为有噪FO估计无法解释这一现象。作者希望从梯度整形角度给出理论解释。

Method: 1) 提出局部随机梯度整形分析框架，区分ZO的均值对齐与范数匹配特性；2) 推导保留曲率的精确恒等式，解释ZO如何保留各向同性成分并收缩各向异性成分；3) 提出RISE算法，将ZO整形应用于精确FO梯度，结合块级采样。

Result: 推导出FO与ZO之间的二次遗忘差距公式：当FO方向具有高于平均的保留曲率时，ZO按查询相关的比例改善平均遗忘。RISE算法可通过精确梯度消除有限差分偏差，块级分析揭示了块对角曲率与跨块耦合的影响。

Conclusion: ZO低遗忘优势源于其对保留曲率的选择性收缩机制，而非简单的噪声估计。RISE算法通过将ZO整形迁移到精确梯度，在稳定性-可塑性权衡中取得更好效果。

Abstract: Continual learning requires new-task adaptation without damaging previously acquired capabilities. Recent forward-pass and zeroth-order (ZO) results show that low-query adaptation may retain better than first-order (FO) descent, but the usual view of ZO as noisy FO estimation does not explain why. We give a local randomized gradient-shaping analysis: finite differences expose a raw shape that is mean-aligned with FO, while the norm-matched comparator fixes the expected squared adaptation norm. Under this controlled comparison, forgetting depends on how the adaptation shape exposes retention curvature. For norm-matched ZO, the expected shaped retention curvature obeys an exact identity that preserves the isotropic retention floor while contracting only the anisotropic component. Projecting this identity onto the incoming gradient yields the observable FO--ZO quadratic forgetting gap: ZO improves mean forgetting precisely when the FO direction has above-average retention curvature, by a query-dependent fraction of that curvature excess. A practical finite-query accounting separates the mean mechanism from one-batch sampling and smoothing perturbations. As an algorithmic transfer, RISE applies the calibrated ZO shape to exact FO gradients inside parameter blocks. Its target is a stability--plasticity tradeoff: randomized shaping may reduce the retention exposure paid by FO, exact gradients remove finite-smoothing bias from finite-difference ZO, and blockwise sampling supplies many local shaping directions after one gradient computation. The blockwise analysis separates mean-step damage from centered random exposure, showing how block-diagonal curvature, cross-block coupling, and local shaping diagnostics specify where this exact-gradient transfer is most likely to be visible.

</details>


### [661] [Compander-Aligned Query Geometry for Quantized Zeroth-Order Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10673)
*Yao Shu,Zilin Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CAQ-ZO方法，通过对非均匀量化进行解耦处理（Q = φ⁻¹ ∘ U ∘ φ），将Rademacher查询在φ空间中构建后再映射回原始空间，解决了低精度零阶优化中查询几何与量化网格不匹配导致的残差问题，理论上证明了该方法消除了查询时的残差通道，实验验证了在NF4量化下Qwen/Llama微调中的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低比特前向评估可实现高效零阶优化，但量化查询（量化后的有限差分）存在网格跨度不匹配问题：同一权重空间半径在量化网格中可能坍缩、跨越或方向不一致，传统方法无法准确刻画这种行为。

Method: 将标量非均匀量化建模为Q = φ⁻¹ ∘ U ∘ φ（解耦为均匀量化U与映射φ及其逆），CAQ-ZO在φ空间中构造一步网格对齐的Rademacher模板z ± Δr，通过φ⁻¹映射回原始空间并在φ空间中更新参数。

Result: 理论上证明了通用离网格查询存在Δ²/μ²残差通道，而CAQ-ZO使查询时间残差精确为零；合成实验隔离验证了该残差通道；在NF4量化下Qwen/Llama微调中，CAQ-ZO优于训练后的NF4基线。

Conclusion: CAQ-ZO通过查询几何与量化网格的对齐，消除了零阶优化中由非均匀量化引入的查询残差，提升了低精度下模型微调的效果。

Abstract: Low-bit forward evaluation is an attractive route to memory-efficient zeroth-order (ZO) adaptation: the optimizer needs only scalar losses, and the model can be queried near deployment precision. The obstacle is that a quantized ZO query is not a continuous finite difference followed by harmless storage rounding. The query chooses endpoints, the low-precision engine rounds them, and the loss difference is measured along the rounded chord. For nonuniform companding quantizers, this makes the codebook insufficient to predict ZO behavior: a fixed weight-space radius can collapse in dense cells, over-span sparse cells, or assign a rounded chord to an unrounded update direction. We identify the missing object as query geometry and model scalar nonuniform quantization as $Q = φ^{-1} \circ U \circ φ$. CAQ-ZO (Compander-Aligned Queries for Zeroth-Order Optimization) forms one-grid-step Rademacher stencils $z \pm Δr$ in $z = φ(x)$, maps endpoints back through $φ^{-1}$, and updates in $z$. Our theory proves the grid-span mismatch, decomposes endpoint-rounding estimator residuals, and gives stationarity bounds in which generic off-grid queries retain a $Δ^2/μ^2$ residual channel while CAQ-ZO makes the query-time residual exactly zero. Synthetic experiments isolate this channel, and matched NF4 Qwen/Llama fine-tuning shows that CAQ-ZO improves the trained NF4 baseline under the same quantizer and evaluation budget.

</details>


### [662] [Exact Unlearning from Proxies Induces Closeness Guarantees on Approximate Unlearning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10680)
*Virgile Dine,Teddy Furon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的机器遗忘范式，将遗忘与数据分布结构直接关联，通过精确推断分布并提取遗忘信号，在理论上保证了与理想重训练模型的KL散度有界，实验验证了该方法在三个遗忘场景中均最接近理想模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法主要关注神经网络参数的更新，而非从根本上理解数据分布与遗忘之间的关系。本文旨在建立一种更 principled 的遗忘框架，将遗忘信号与数据分布结构直接联系起来。

Method: 通过精确推断数据分布，从中提取由建模产生的确切遗忘信号；提出可验证的可接受性准则（admissibility criterion），并在理论上推导了与理想重训练模型之间的KL散度上界。

Result: 在三个不同的遗忘场景（如类别遗忘、样本遗忘等）中，本文方法得到的未学习模型在分类器性能上最接近理想重训练模型，优于现有的竞争方法。

Conclusion: 将机器遗忘建模为数据分布层面的问题比参数更新层面更为有效，该框架在理论和实验上均表现出色，为机器遗忘提供了新的理论基础和实践方向。

Abstract: This paper proposes a paradigm shift linking machine unlearning directly to the structure of the data distributions rather than a mere update of the neural network parameters. We show that inferring these distributions with precision enables distilling the exact unlearning signal induced by the modeling. Theoretical bounds on the Kullback-Leibler divergence from the ideal retrained model to our unlearned model, under verifiable admissibility criterion, reveal the soundness of our framework. This method is experimentally validated over three forgetting scenarios as reaching the closest classifier to the ideal retrained model when compared to competitors.

</details>


### [663] [Is Data Shapley Not Better than Random in Data Selection? Ask NASH](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10684)
*Xiao Tian,Jue Fan,Rachael Hwee Ling Sim,Zixuan Wang,Nancy F. Chen,Bryan Kian Hsiang Low*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出NASH框架，通过将效用函数分解为Shapley可信息组件并非线性聚合，有效提升Shapley值/半值法在数据选择中的效果，且额外开销极小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对Data Shapley在数据选择中的有效性存在争议：一方面Shapley值能考虑数据交互，另一方面实践中有时效果甚至不如随机选择。本文试图回答两个问题：(I)是否存在Shapley值始终有效的"Shapley可信息"设定？(II)能否策略性地利用这些设定来一致且高效地选择高质量子集？

Method: 提出NASH框架，包含两步：(I)将目标效用函数（如验证集准确率）分解为更简单的Shapley可信息组件函数；(II)通过非线性聚合这些组件来优化数据选择目标，从而提升基于Shapley/半值的数据选择效果。

Result: NASH显著提升了基于Shapley值/半值的数据选择有效性，且额外运行时开销极小。

Conclusion: 通过分解与非线性聚合的策略，NASH在保持效率的同时大幅改善了Shapley类方法在数据选择中的表现，为Shapley值在数据选择中的实际应用提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Data selection studies the problem of identifying high-quality subsets of training data. While some existing works have considered selecting the subset of data with top-$m$ Data Shapley or other semivalues as they account for the interaction among every subset of data, other works argue that Data Shapley can sometimes perform ineffectively in practice and select subsets that are no better than random. This raises the questions: (I) Are there certain "Shapley-informative" settings where Data Shapley consistently works well? (II) Can we strategically utilize these settings to select high-quality subsets consistently and efficiently? In this paper, we propose a novel data selection framework, NASH (Non-linear Aggregation of SHapley-informative components), which (I) decomposes the target utility function (e.g., validation accuracy) into simpler, Shapley-informative component functions, and selects data by optimizing an objective that (II) aggregates these components non-linearly. We demonstrate that NASH substantially boosts the effectiveness of Shapley/semivalue-based data selection with minimal additional runtime cost.

</details>


### [664] [The finite expression method for turbulent dynamics with high-order moment recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10687)
*Xingjian Xu,Di Qi,Chunmei Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个两阶段数据驱动建模框架，结合符号回归（FEX）与生成模型，用于识别湍流动力系统的确定性动力学并准确预测其高阶统计量（最高五阶矩），通过理论分析和数值实验验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 湍流动力系统具有非线性相互作用和随机效应，生成难以准确捕获的高阶统计量（如非零高阶矩），现有数据驱动方法难以同时识别控制方程并精确预测这些统计量。

Method: 两阶段框架：Stage I 采用有限表达方法（FEX）发现确定性动力学的闭式表达式，无需预定义库；Stage II 引入生成模型学习残差随机分量，作为对 Stage I 模型误差的精细化修正，从而准确刻画高阶统计量。

Result: 理论分析建立了符号估计量的一致性，量化了数据规模和数值离散化带来的估计误差。在随机三体模型多个 regime 的数值实验中，框架成功恢复了相互作用项和强迫项表达式，并准确预测了高达五阶的统计矩。

Conclusion: 该框架展示了将可解释的符号发现与数据驱动随机建模相结合解决复杂湍流系统的潜力。

Abstract: Turbulent dynamical systems are characterized by nonlinear interactions and stochastic effects that generate coupled statistical quantities, such as non-zero higher-order moments, which are difficult to capture from data with accuracy. We propose a two-stage data-driven modeling framework that combines symbolic regression with generative models to jointly identify the governing dynamics and predict their key statistical quantities. In Stage I of the framework, the Finite Expression Method (FEX) is adopted to discover closed-form expressions of the deterministic dynamics, recovering nonlinear interaction terms and external forcing without predefined libraries. In Stage II, generative models are introduced to learn the residual stochastic components as a refined correction to the model error from the Stage I approximation, enabling accurate characterization of higher-order statistics. Theoretical analysis establishes the consistency of the symbolic estimator and quantifies the estimation error in terms of data size and numerical discretization. The model performance is verified through detailed numerical experiments on the stochastic triad models across multiple regimes, demonstrating that the framework successfully recovers interaction terms and forcing expressions, and accurately predicts statistical moments up to order five. These results highlight the potential of integrating interpretable symbolic discovery with data-driven stochastic modeling for complex turbulent systems.

</details>


### [665] [DANCE: Detect and Classify Events in EEG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10688)
*Jarod Lévy,Hubert Banville,Jérémy Rapin,Jean-Remi King,Thomas Moreau,Stéphane d'Ascoli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出DANCE，一种将神经解码视为集合预测问题的深度学习流水线，可直接从原始未对齐信号中联合检测和分类事件，在10个数据集上优于现有方法，在癫痫监测等任务上达到新SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有EEG解码方法依赖已知事件起始点对齐窗口进行分类，但在连续真实世界监测中无法获取事件起始点，因此需要一种无需事件对齐的端到端异步解码方法。

Method: 提出DANCE框架，将神经解码建模为集合预测问题，直接从原始未对齐信号中联合进行事件检测和分类，采用端到端深度学习流水线。

Result: 在10个数据集上（涵盖毫秒到分钟级事件类型）优于现有方法；在癫痫监测任务中达到新SOTA；在BCI任务上匹配了依赖事件起始点的模型的准确率。

Conclusion: DANCE标志着向端到端异步神经解码模型迈出了一步，在无需事件对齐的情况下实现了优秀的解码性能。

Abstract: Event identification in continuous neural recordings is a critical task in neuroscience. Decoding in EEG is dominated by classifying windows aligned to known event onsets. However, while available in controlled experiments, such onsets are absent in continuous real-world monitoring. Here, we introduce DANCE, a deep learning pipeline that frames neural decoding as a set-prediction problem and jointly detects and classifies events directly from raw, unaligned signals. Evaluated separately on ten datasets curated from the literature with a wide variety of event types (ranging from milliseconds to minutes in duration), our model outperforms existing methods on a broad range of cognitive, clinical and BCI tasks. This single architecture establishes a new state of the art in the competitive task of seizure monitoring and matches the accuracy of onset-informed models for BCI tasks. Overall, our method marks a step towards end-to-end asynchronous neural decoding models

</details>


### [666] [RelFlexformer: Efficient Attention 3D-Transformers for Integrable Relative Positional Encodings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10706)
*Byeongchan Kim,Arijit Sehanobish,Avinava Dubey,Min-hwan Oh,Krzysztof Choromanski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出RelFlexformers，一种基于非均匀傅里叶变换（NU-FFT）的高效3D注意力机制，支持任意可积调制函数的3D相对位置编码（RPE），将计算复杂度降至O(L log L)，并在点云等3D任务上取得性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高效RPE注意力方法多局限于结构化场景（如均匀网格），难以处理非结构化3D空间中令牌位置任意分布的情况（如点云）。作者希望提出一种通用的、高效的3D RPE注意力机制，适用于异构非结构化场景。

Method: 利用非均匀傅里叶变换（NU-FFT）的理论，将任意可积调制函数f的3D相对位置编码高效集成到注意力计算中，实现O(L log L)的时间复杂度，并自然统一了多种现有的高效RPE注意力方法。

Result: 在大量3D数据集上的实验表明，基于NU-FFT的注意力调制技术显著提升了RelFlexformers的模型质量。

Conclusion: RelFlexformers成功将高效RPE注意力从结构化场景推广到非结构化3D空间，为点云等3D数据建模提供了新的高效解决方案。

Abstract: We present a new class of efficient attention mechanisms applying universal 3D Relative Positional Encoding (RPE) methods given by arbitrary integrable modulation functions $f$. They lead to the new class of 3D-Transformer models, called \textit{RelFlexformers}, flexibly integrating those RPEs, and characterized by the $O(L \log L)$ time complexity of the attention computation for the $L$-length input sequences. RelFlexformers builds on the theory of the Non-Uniform Fourier Transform (NU-FFT), naturally generalizing several existing efficient RPE-attention methods from structured settings with tokens homogeneously embedded in unweighted grids into general non-structured heterogeneous scenarios, where tokens' positions are arbitrarily distributed in the corresponding 3D spaces. As such, RelFlexformers can be applied in particular to model point clouds. Our extensive empirical evaluation on a large portfolio of 3D datasets confirms quality improvements provided by the NU-FFT-driven attention modulation techniques in the RelFlexformers.

</details>


### [667] [Heteroscedastic Diffusion for Multi-Agent Trajectory Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10717)
*Guillem Capellera,Antonio Rubio,Luis Ferraz,Antonio Agudo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出U2Diffine，一个统一的扩散模型，能够同时完成轨迹补全任务并提供逐状态的异方差不确定性估计，并引入RankNN进行生成场景的错误概率排序，在四个体育数据集上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轨迹建模方法多聚焦于预测，忽视轨迹补全等更通用的任务；缺乏状态级异方差不确定性估计；多模态采样方法无法对生成场景进行错误概率排序，难以在推理时区分预测质量。

Method: 在标准去噪损失中加入预测噪声的负对数似然，利用一阶泰勒近似将潜在空间不确定性传播到真实状态空间；提出快速版本U2Diff避免采样时梯度计算；引入RankNN对每个生成模式进行错误概率估计。

Result: 在NBA、Basketball-U、Football-U、Soccer-U四个体育数据集上，轨迹补全和预测任务均优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 不确定性估计和错误概率排序有效提升了轨迹建模的性能和可信度，证明了该方法在实际应用中的价值。

Abstract: Multi-agent trajectory modeling traditionally focuses on forecasting, often neglecting more general tasks like trajectory completion, which is essential for real-world applications such as correcting tracking data. Existing methods also generally predict agents' states without offering any state-wise measure of heteroscedastic uncertainty. Moreover, popular multi-modal sampling methods lack error probability estimates for each generated scene under the same prior observations, which makes it difficult to rank the predictions at inference time. We introduce U2Diffine, a unified diffusion model built to perform trajectory completion while simultaneously offering state-wise heteroscedastic uncertainty estimates. This is achieved by augmenting the standard denoising loss with the negative log-likelihood of the predicted noise, and then propagating the latent space uncertainty to the real state space using a first-order Taylor approximation. We also propose U2Diff, a faster baseline that avoids gradient computation during sampling. This approach significantly increases inference speed, making it as efficient as a standard generative-only diffusion model. For post-processing, we integrate a Rank Neural Network (RankNN) that enables error probability estimation for each generated mode, demonstrating strong correlation with ground truth errors. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art solutions in both trajectory completion and forecasting across four challenging sports datasets (NBA, Basketball-U, Football-U, Soccer-U), underscoring the effectiveness of our uncertainty and error probability estimation.

</details>


### [668] [On Improving Graph Neural Networks for QSAR by Pre-training on Extended-Connectivity Fingerprints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10722)
*Sam Money-Kyrle,Markus Dablander,Thierry Hanser,Stephane Werner,Charlotte M. Deane,Garrett M. Morris*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出通过预训练分子图神经网络预测ECFP指纹来提升QSAR任务性能，在多数基准测试中表现优于基线，但在复杂任务和OOD场景下效果有限，并探讨了子结构数据泄露的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分子GNN在药物发现中应用日益广泛，但其相比于传统分子特征化方法的优势存在争议，作者希望找到一种通用策略来改进GNN在QSAR研究中的表现。

Method: 通过预训练GNN预测Extended-Connectivity Fingerprints (ECFP)，并在下游QSAR任务中微调；使用统计检验和具有挑战性的OOD数据划分进行评估。

Result: 在Biogen六个基准测试中的五个上，ECFP预训练GNN在标准性能指标上显著优于所有基线；但在更异构的数据集和复杂终点（如结合亲和力预测）的OOD设置中表现不佳。

Conclusion: ECFP预训练能够提升GNN在多样化实际QSAR任务中的OOD性能，但在某些场景下效果有限，并且需注意预训练过程中的子结构级别数据泄露问题。
