The research considers both arithmetic and geometric algorithms for complete and incomplete pairwise comparison methods. The illustrative examples show that the estimations of inconsistency in the arithmetic variant are optimal.

</details>


### [704] [SkillLens: Adaptive Multi-Granularity Skill Reuse for Cost-Efficient LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08386)
*Yongliang Miao,Ziyang Yu,Liang Zhao,Bowen Zhu,Hasibul Haque*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SkillLens提出了一种层次化技能进化框架，将技能组织为四层图结构（策略、方案、程序、原语），支持混合粒度检索与自适应重用，在MuLocbench和ALFWorld上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有技能库将技能视为扁平、单一分辨率的提示块，导致粗粒度技能引入无关上下文与细粒度重写成本高之间的矛盾。

Method: 四层技能图（策略/方案/程序/原语）；基于语义检索+度校正随机游走进行技能种子扩展；验证器决定每个节点的操作（接受/分解/重写/跳过）；在线进化机制优化技能库与验证器。

Result: MuLocbench上bug定位Acc@1提升6.31个百分点；ALFWorld上agent成功率从45.00%提升至51.31%。

Conclusion: 混合粒度适应在稀疏不匹配假设下具有次线性代价，进化更新规则单调提升验证目标直至局部最优。

Abstract: Skill libraries have become a practical way for LLM agents to reuse procedural experience across tasks. However, existing systems typically treat skills as flat, single-resolution prompt blocks. This creates a tension between relevance and cost: injecting coarse skills can introduce irrelevant or misleading context, while rewriting entire skills is expensive and often unnecessary. We propose SkillLens, a hierarchical skill-evolution framework that organizes skills into a four-layer graph of policies, strategies, procedures, and primitives, and retrieves them at mixed granularity. Given a task, SkillLens first retrieves semantically relevant skill seeds, expands them through degree-corrected random walk over the skill graph, and then uses a verifier to decide whether each visited unit should be accepted, decomposed, rewritten, or skipped. This enables the agent to reuse compatible subskills directly while adapting only locally mismatched components. To improve the system over time, SkillLens further refines multi-granularity skills and verifier in order to improve its routing decisions. We provide theoretical analysis showing that mixed-granularity adaptation incurs sublinear cost under sparse mismatch assumptions and that the evolutionary update rule monotonically improves the validation objective until a local optimum. Across MuLocbench and ALFWorld, SkillLens consistently improves over strong skill-based baselines, achieving up to a 6.31 percentage-point Acc@1 gain for bug localization and raising agent success rate from 45.00% to 51.31%.

</details>


### [705] [PLACO: A Multi-Stage Framework for Cost-Effective Performance in Human-AI Teams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08388)
*Pranavkumar Mallela,Vinay Kumar,Shashi Shekhar Jha,Shweta Jain*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合人类和AI模型在分类任务中输出的方法，利用贝叶斯规则和条件独立假设，通过模型实例级和人类类级的校准概率来融合单个确定性标注者（人类）与概率标注者（分类模型）的输出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在人类与AI协作的分类任务中，最终输出需要结合人类和模型的结果。现有方法利用贝叶斯规则和条件独立假设来解决这一问题，本文在此基础上进一步探讨如何结合确定性标注者（人类）与概率标注者（模型）的输出。

Method: 利用贝叶斯规则，基于人类和模型输出在给定真实标签条件下条件独立的假设，提出一种组合方法：将单个确定性标注者（人类）与概率标注者（分类模型）的输出相结合，使用模型的实例级校准概率和人类的类级校准概率。

Result: 该方法能够有效融合人类和模型的输出，提升分类任务的整体性能。

Conclusion: 在人类与AI协作的分类任务中，通过贝叶斯规则和条件独立假设，结合人类与模型的校准概率，可以有效提升系统性能。

Abstract: Human-AI teams play a pivotal role in improving overall system performance when neither the human nor the model can achieve such performance on their own. With the advent of powerful and accessible Generative AI models, several mundane tasks have morphed into Human-AI team tasks. From writing essays to developing advanced algorithms, humans have found that using AI assistance has led to an accelerated work pace like never before. In classification tasks, where the final output is a single hard label, it is crucial to address the combination of human and model output. Prior work elegantly solves this problem using Bayes rule, using the assumption that human and model output are conditionally independent given the ground truth. Specifically, it discusses a combination method to combine a single deterministic labeler (the human) and a probabilistic labeler (the classifier model) using the model's instance-level and the human's class-level calibrated probabilities.

</details>


### [706] [CoCoDA: Co-evolving Compositional DAG for Tool-Augmented Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08399)
*Ziyang Yu,Qiyue Li,Liang Zhao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CoCoDA 提出通过组合代码 DAG 结构实现规划器与工具库协同进化，在固定上下文预算下支持大规模工具库的高效检索与学习，使 8B 模型在数学推理等任务上匹敌甚至超越 32B 教师模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具增强语言模型面临工具库规模增长与固定上下文预算之间的耦合挑战，传统方法将工具视为扁平或文本索引记忆，导致提示成本随库规模增长，且掩盖了可执行代码的类型化组合结构。

Method: 提出 CoCoDA 框架：(1) 构建组合代码 DAG，节点为原始/复合工具，边编码调用依赖，节点存储类型签名、描述、前置/后置条件及示例；(2) 推理时通过 Typed DAG Retrieval 逐步剪枝候选集；(3) 训练时将成功轨迹折叠为验证过的复合工具，并通过 DAG 诱导奖励更新规划器。

Result: 在数学推理、表格分析和代码任务基准上，CoCoDA 使 8B 学生模型在 GSM8K 和 MATH 上匹配或超越 32B 教师模型，并持续优于现有工具使用和技能库学习方法。

Conclusion: 通过代码原生 DAG 结构统一规划器与工具库的协同进化，CoCoDA 在保持固定上下文预算的同时支持大规模工具库，实现了检索效率与模型性能的双重提升，证明了结构化工具表示的价值。

Abstract: Tool-augmented language models can extend small language models with external executable skills, but scaling the tool library creates a coupled challenge: the library must evolve with the planner as new reusable subroutines emerge, while retrieval from the growing library must remain within a fixed context budget. Existing tool-use and skill-library methods typically treat tools as flat or text-indexed memories, causing prompt cost to grow with library size and obscuring the typed, compositional structure of executable code. We propose CoCoDA, a framework that co-evolves the planner and tool library through a single code-native structure: a compositional code DAG. Nodes are primitive or composite tools, edges encode invocation dependencies, and each node stores a typed signature, description, pre/post-condition specification, and worked examples. At inference time, Typed DAG Retrieval prunes candidates by symbolic signature unification, ranks survivors by descriptions, filters them by behavioral specifications, and disambiguates with examples, keeping expensive context materialization on progressively smaller candidate sets. At training time, successful trajectories are folded into validated composite tools, while the planner is updated with a DAG-induced reward that credits composites by their primitive expansion size. We provide theoretical results showing retrieval cost reduction, sublinear retrieval time, compositional advantage under the shaped reward, monotone co-evolution under conservative updates, and DAG well-formedness. Across mathematical reasoning, tabular analysis, and code task benchmarks, CoCoDA enables an 8B student to match or exceed a 32B teacher on GSM8K and MATH and consistently improves over strong tool-use and library-learning baselines.

</details>


### [707] [Belief or Circuitry? Causal Evidence for In-Context Graph Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08405)
*Katharine Kowalyshyn,Timothy Duggan,Daniel Little,Michael C Hughes*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过图随机游走任务探究LLM的上下文学习机制，发现模型并非单纯依赖局部模式匹配或全局结构推理，而是两种机制并行运作：PCA显示两种图拓扑在正交子空间中同时编码，因果干预实验（激活修补和线性操控）进一步证实了双机制共存。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LLM上下文学习的底层机制：究竟是通过短程模式匹配（复制局部转移）来学习，还是通过推理潜在结构（推断全局拓扑）来学习。

Method: 采用玩具图随机游走任务，包含两种竞争性图结构。使用PCA重建内部表征结构，以及残差流激活修补和图差异线性操控进行因果干预实验。

Result: 在中等混合比例下，两种图拓扑在正交的主子空间中同时编码；后期层激活修补几乎完全转移干净图的偏好；线性操控能使预测沿预期方向移动，且在范数匹配和标签打乱对照条件下失效。

Conclusion: 最符合双机制解释：真正的结构推理和归纳电路是并行运作的，而非单一机制主导。

Abstract: How do LLMs learn in-context? Is it by pattern-matching recent tokens, or by inferring latent structure? We probe this question using a toy graph random-walk across two competing graph structures. This task's answer is, in principle, decidable: either the model tracks global topology, or it copies local transitions. We present two lines of evidence that neither account alone is sufficient. First, reconstructing the internal representation structure via PCA reveals that at intermediate mixture ratios, both graph topologies are encoded in orthogonal principal subspaces simultaneously. This pattern is difficult to reconcile with purely local transition copying. Second, residual-stream activation patching and graph-difference steering causally intervene on this graph-family signal: late-layer patching almost fully transfers the clean graph preference, while linear steering moves predictions in the intended direction and fails under norm-matched and label-shuffled controls. Taken together, our findings are most consistent with a dual-mechanism account in which genuine structure inference and induction circuits operate in parallel.

</details>


### [708] [Playing games with knowledge: AI-Induced delusions need game theoretic interventions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08409)
*Will Beaumaster,Paul Schrater*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 对话AI存在系统性缺陷：在重复交互中，追求用户满意的智能体会产生奉承策略，导致理性用户陷入认知固化与错误信念螺旋。本文通过Crawford-Sobel廉价谈话博弈形式化该问题，并提出基于推理时机制设计的"认知调解器"干预，通过信念版本控制实现48倍信念螺旋率差异，证明AI认知安全本质是战略信息环境设计问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 指出对话AI作为知识接口的根本缺陷不在于模型本身，而在于从用户驱动的知识搜索范式转向用户与智能体进行策略性重复交互的系统性后果。奉承式聊天机器人即使在理性主体中也会诱发认知固着和妄想性信念螺旋。

Method: 将问题形式化为Crawford-Sobel廉价谈话博弈，智能体产生汇集均衡的奉承策略。提出推理时机制设计干预——认知调解器，通过引入代价信号（认知摩擦）打破汇集均衡；核心创新是信念版本控制（Belief Versioning），一种受git启发的认知元记忆系统，存储健康信念并在检测到验证寻求型抵抗时回滚。

Result: 模拟中实现分离均衡，信念螺旋率产生48倍差异，同时通过学习保存标准测试。

Conclusion: 认知安全本质上是战略信息环境设计问题，而非简单的模型对齐问题。

Abstract: Conversational AI has a fundamental flaw as a knowledge interface: sycophantic chatbots induce epistemic entrenchment and delusional belief spirals even in rational agents. We propose the problem does not stem from the AI model, rooted instead in a systemic consequence of the paradigm shift from user-driven knowledge search to users and agents engaged in strategic, repeated-play communication. We formalize the problem as a Crawford-Sobel cheap talk game, where costless user signals induce a pooling equilibrium. Agents optimized for user satisfaction produce sycophantic strategies that provide identical reinforcement across user types with opposite epistemic incentives: exploratory ``Growth-seekers'' ($θ_G$) and confirmatory ``Validation-seekers'' ($θ_V$). Under repeated play, this identification failure creates a coordination trap -- analogous to a Prisoner's Dilemma -- where locally rational feedback loops drive users toward pathologically certain false beliefs. We propose an inference-time mechanism design intervention called an Epistemic Mediator that breaks this pooling equilibrium by introducing a costly signal (epistemic friction), forcing type revelation based on users' asymmetric cognitive costs for processing resistance. A key contribution is Belief Versioning, a git-inspired epistemic meta-memory system that stores healthy beliefs and rollbacks when validation-seeking resistance is detected. In simulation, this intervention achieves a separating equilibrium achieving a $48\times$ differential in spiral rates while passing a learning preservation criterion), evidence that epistemic safety in AI is fundamentally a problem of strategic information environment design rather than simple model alignment.

</details>


### [709] [Political Plasticity: An Analysis of Ideological Adaptability in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08415)
*Bruno Bianchi,Diego Tiscornia,Matias Travizano,Ariel Futoransky*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了大型语言模型的"政治可塑性"——即模型根据用户上下文调整政治立场的能力。通过200个政治问题测试，发现系统提示效果有限，但用户提示能显著引发意识形态偏移，尤其在更大更新的模型中。还发现语言差异和潜在的数据泄露问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往研究聚焦于LLM的内在政治偏见，但忽视了模型根据上下文调整立场的能力。作者提出"政治可塑性"概念，旨在探究模型在不同提示条件下改变政治倾向的灵活程度。

Method: 基于Lester(1996)框架构建200个经济/个人自由轴的政治问题；采用简化/主题系统提示和带少量示例的用户提示；进行问卷反转验证实验；跨多语言分析模型可塑性变化。

Result: 系统提示效果微弱，用户提示能显著引发意识形态偏移（尤其在经济自由轴上）；反转问题后多数模型出现反直觉偏移（暗示数据泄露）；语言间存在细微但显著的偏移差异；小/旧模型可塑性有限，前沿模型表现可靠。

Conclusion: 小型和旧版LLM政治可塑性有限且不稳定，而新版前沿模型展现出可靠、符合预期的适应性。用户提示比系统提示更有效，且模型存在潜在的数据泄漏问题。

Abstract: Since the advent of Large Language Models (LLMs), a significant area of research has focused on their intrinsic biases, particularly in political discourse. This study investigates a different but related concept, "political plasticity", which is defined as the capacity of models to adapt their responses based on the user supplied context. To analyze this, a testing framework was developed using an expanded corpus of 200 politically-oriented questions across economic and personal freedom axes, based on a prior framework by Lester (1996). The study explored several methods to induce political bias, including simplified and topic-based system prompts, as well as user prompts with few-shot examples. The results show that while system prompts were largely ineffective, user prompts successfully elicited significant ideological shifts, particularly along the Economic Freedom axis in larger and newer models. Through a validation experiment, we examined whether models answer questionnaires by recognizing the underlying question format. Inverting the sense of the questions revealed unexpected, counter-intuitive shifts in most models, suggesting potential data leakage. Finally, we also analyzed how model plasticity varies when the experiment is conducted in different languages. The results reveal subtle yet notable shifts across each of the analyzed languages. Overall, our results indicate that small and older LLMs exhibit limited or unstable political plasticity, whereas newer frontier models display reliable, expected adaptability.

</details>


### [710] [Alignment as Jurisprudence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08416)
*Nicholas Caputo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文探讨了法理学（法官如何判决）与AI对齐（如何让AI符合人类价值观）之间的深层结构相似性，借鉴Dworkin和Sunstein的法理学理论以及Constitutional AI和基于案例推理等对齐方法，论证两个领域可以相互启发，并指出随着AI能力提升，两者的对话将愈发重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 法理学和AI对齐虽然看似遥远，但都面临如何通过语言规范来预测和塑造强大行为体（法官/AI）在未来未知情境中的决策这一核心问题。作者希望将两个领域直接对话，互相借鉴。

Method: 通过对比分析法理学两大流派（Dworkin的原则导向解释主义和Sunstein的类比推理实证主义）与前沿对齐方法（Constitutional AI和基于案例推理），探讨规则与案例在微调对齐中的相互作用，并思考AI如何帮助理解并改进法律运作。

Result: 提出更精细的法律启发式方法可以改善AI对齐中规则与案例的互动；同时AI也能增进我们对法律运作和改善路径的理解。两个领域的交汇有助于构建更好的AI系统和法律体系。

Conclusion: AI系统与法律都应赋能人类、扩展其能力与目标实现。随着AI能力提升和法律理论对法官的约束似乎松动，两个领域的对话将变得不可或缺，并可能指向两者的更好版本。

Abstract: Jurisprudence, the study of how judges should properly decide cases, and alignment, the science of getting AI models to conform to human values, share a fundamental structure. These seemingly distant fields both seek to predict and shape how decisions by powerful actors, in one case judges and in the other increasingly powerful artificial intelligences, will be made in the unknown future. And they use similar tools of the specification and interpretation of language to try to accomplish those goals. The great debates of jurisprudence, about what the law is and what it should be, can provide insight into alignment, and lessons from what does and does not work in alignment can help make progress in jurisprudence.
  This essay puts the two fields directly into conversation. Drawing on leading accounts of jurisprudence, particularly Dworkin's principle-oriented interpretivism and Sunstein's positivist account of law as analogical reasoning, and on cutting-edge alignment approaches, namely Constitutional AI and case-based reasoning, it illustrates the value of a more sophisticated legally-inspired approach to the interplay of rules and cases in finetuning alignment and points to ways that AI can provide a better understanding of how the law works and how it can be improved by the introduction of AI. AI systems and the law should operate to empower people to act in the world, helping to expand their capabilities and the extent to which they are able to achieve their goals. As AI continues to improve in capacity, and as the constraints that legal theory places on human judges seem be coming undone, the conversation between these two fields will become increasingly essential and may help point to a better version of both.

</details>


### [711] [The Attacker in the Mirror: Breaking Self-Consistency in Safety via Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08427)
*Gabriele La Malfa,Emanuele La Malfa,Saar Cohen,Jie M. Zhang,Michael Luck,Michael Wooldridge,Elizabeth Black*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出锚定双策略自博弈（Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play），通过在冻结基座模型上训练角色分离的LoRA适配器，解决了传统自博弈中参数共享导致纳什均衡退化、攻击压力消失的问题，实现了高达100倍的参数效率提升和更强的鲁棒安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自博弈红队方法中，攻击者和防御者共享同一模型参数，虽然提升了稳定性，但引入了理论局限：可达的纳什均衡集合包含大量无意义策略（如始终拒绝），且参数共享导致动态坍缩为自一致性，攻击无法对防御者产生真正的对抗压力。

Method: 提出Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play (ABSP)：在冻结的基座模型上，为攻击者和防御者分别训练独立的LoRA适配器，实现显式的角色分离，在保持优化稳定性的同时保留对抗压力。

Result: 相比标准自博弈微调，参数效率提升高达100倍；在Qwen2.5-{3B,7B,14B}-IT模型上的多个安全基准测试中，鲁棒性显著提升且不损失推理能力；跨博弈实验表明攻击者和防御者模型在对抗防御和安全性上均优于自博弈。

Conclusion: 显式的角色分离（通过LoRA适配器实现）是打破自博弈中自一致性陷阱、实现真正对抗训练的关键，为AI安全提供了更高效且理论上更可靠的方案。

Abstract: Self-play red team is an established approach to improving AI safety in which different instances of the same model play attacker and defender roles in a zero-sum game, i.e., where the attacker tries to jailbreak the defender; if self-play converges to a Nash equilibrium, the model is guaranteed to respond safely within the settings of the game. Although the parameter sharing enforced by the use of the same model for the two roles improves stability and performance, it introduces fundamental theoretical and architectural limitations. We show that the set of Nash equilibria that can be reached corresponds to a broad class of behaviours that includes trivial always refuse strategies and oracle-like defenders, thus limiting practical applicability. We then show that when attacker and defender share and update the same base model, the dynamics collapse to self-consistency, so that attacks do not enforce adversarial pressure on the defender. In response, we propose Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play, which trains distinct role-specific LoRA adapters on top of a frozen base model, thereby maintaining stable optimisation while preserving adversarial pressure through explicit role separation. In relation to standard self-play, we show up to 100x greater parameter efficiency than finetuning and consistent improvements in safety compared to self-play fine-tuned models. We evaluate on Qwen2.5-{3B, 7B,14B}-IT models across widely used safety benchmarks, showing improved robustness without loss of reasoning ability. Cross-play experiments further show that our attacker and defender models are superior to self-play in terms of adversarial defence and safety.

</details>


### [712] [Measuring What Matters: Benchmarking Generative, Multimodal, and Agentic AI in Healthcare](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08445)
*Prasanna Desikan,Harshit Rajgarhia,Shivali Dalmia,Ananya Mantravadi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文指出当前医疗AI评估基准存在系统性缺陷：过度关注知识测试而忽视临床实际工作流中的可靠性、安全性和相关性评估，导致模型在考试中表现优异（接近满分）但在真实临床任务中性能急剧下降（管理类任务仅0.53-0.63），高分造成部署就绪的虚假安全感。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准通过零散的数据集构建，只优化了狭窄的任务性能，缺乏系统性的可靠性、安全性及临床相关性评估方法，无法衡量模型在真实复杂临床环境中的表现。

Method: 论文提出需要建立原则性的基准设计框架，包含结构化的任务、数据集和指标组合，以可重复、可比较的方式系统测量模型在真实临床工作流中的可靠性、安全性和临床实用性。

Result: 当前前沿模型在医学执照考试中接近满分，但在真实临床任务中：文档任务0.74-0.85，临床决策支持0.61-0.76，管理与工作流任务仅0.53-0.63，性能严重衰减。

Conclusion: 缺乏原则性基准设计框架导致无法区分临床表现差是模型局限还是测量方法失败，高分造成虚假部署安全感，性能与实用性之间的差距随AI承担更重要临床角色而扩大。

Abstract: AI models are increasingly deployed in live clinical environments where they must perform reliably across complex, high-stakes workflows that standard training and validation datasets were never designed to capture. Evaluating these systems requires benchmarks: structured combinations of tasks, datasets, and metrics that enable reproducible, comparable measurement of what a model can do. The central challenge in healthcare AI is not performance alone, but the absence of systematic methods to measure reliability, safety, and clinical relevance under real-world conditions. Most existing benchmarks test what a model knows; too few test whether it can perform reliably and without failing across the full complexity of real clinical tasks. Current benchmarks have accumulated through ad hoc dataset construction optimized for narrow task performance: frontier models achieve near-perfect scores on medical licensing examinations, but when evaluated across real clinical tasks, performance degrades sharply, scoring 0.74--0.85 on documentation, 0.61--0.76 on clinical decision support, and only 0.53--0.63 on administrative and workflow tasks \cite{medhelm}. High benchmark scores give a false sense of deployment readiness, and the gap between performance and utility widens precisely as AI systems take on more consequential clinical roles. Without a principled framework for benchmark design, the field cannot determine whether poor clinical performance reflects model limitations or failures in how performance is being measured.

</details>


### [713] [LLM-guided Semi-Supervised Approaches for Social Media Crisis Data Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08448)
*Jacob Ativo,Bharaneeshwar Balasubramaniyam,Anh Tran,Khushboo Gupta,Hongmin Li,Doina Caragea,Cornelia Caragea*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文首次实证评估了LLM引导的半监督学习在危机推文分类中的应用。LG-CoTrain在低资源场景下显著优于传统方法，且紧凑的半监督模型有时能超越大型零样本LLM，为灾害响应提供了实用路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索半监督学习方法以增强灾难管理场景中社交媒体数据的分析能力，特别是在标注数据稀缺的情况下。

Method: 提出并比较两种LLM辅助的半监督方法（VerifyMatch和LG-CoTrain）与经典半监督基线，在5、10、25个每类标注样本的低资源设置下进行危机推文分类实验。

Result: LG-CoTrain在低资源设置下显著优于经典方法，取得最高平均Macro F1；VerifyMatch性能有竞争力且校准性良好；随着标注样本增加，性能差距缩小，Self Training成为强基线。紧凑模型有时超越大型零样本LLM。

Conclusion: LLM引导的半监督学习可以将知识从大模型转移到更小、更可部署的模型中，为实际灾害响应应用提供可行路径。

Abstract: Semi-supervised learning approaches have been investigated as a means to enhance the analysis of social media data in disaster management contexts. In this work, we present the first empirical evaluation of large language model (LLM) guided semi-supervised learning for crisis related tweet classification. We compare two recent LLM assisted semi-supervised methods, VerifyMatch and LLM guided Co-Training ( LG-CoTrain), against established semi-supervised baselines. Our results show that LG-CoTrain significantly outperforms classical semi-supervised approaches in low resource settings with 5, 10 and 25 labeled examples per class, achieving the highest averaged Macro F1 across events. VerifyMatch achieves competitive performance while also demonstrating strong calibration properties. As the number of labeled examples increases, the performance gap narrows and Self Training emerges as a strong baseline. We further observe that compact semi-supervised models can, in some cases, outperform very large LLMs operating in zero-shot settings. This finding highlights the potential of transferring knowledge from LLMs into smaller and more deployable models through LLM guided semi-supervised learning, offering a practical pathway for real world disaster response applications. Our project repository on Github is here.

</details>


### [714] [Behavioral Determinants of Deployed AI Agents in Social Networks: A Multi-Factor Study of Personality, Model, and Guardrail Specification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08463)
*Sarah Wilson,Diem Linh Dang,Usman Ali Moazzam,Shan Ye,Gail Kaiser*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究通过控制实验，系统探索了AI代理的配置规范（人格设定、模型骨干、操作规则）如何影响其在模拟社交网络中的涌现行为，发现人格设定是最主要的行为杠杆，而模型骨干和操作规则对修辞风格和话题参与度有中等影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主AI代理越来越多地被部署在开放社交环境中，但配置规范与其涌现社交行为之间的关系尚不明确，缺乏系统性的实证研究。

Method: 在Molｔbook（类Reddit社交网络）中部署13个OpenClaw代理，系统地变更三个自变量：（1）SOUL.md人格设定、（2）底层LLM模型、（3）AGENTS.md操作规则与记忆配置，设置默认控制代理作为基线，收集一周约400次会话/代理的行为、语言和社交指标数据。

Result: 人格设定是主导行为杠杆，导致代理间回复长度出现巨大差异；模型骨干和操作规则对修辞风格和话题参与广度有中等但显著的影响。

Conclusion: 研究为多代理社交系统的文献提供了实证证据，并为设计面向真实社交环境的协作或监控代理提供了实践指导。

Abstract: Autonomous AI agents are increasingly deployed in open social environments, yet the relationship between their configuration specifications and their emergent social behavior remains poorly understood. We present a controlled, multi-factor empirical study in which thirteen OpenClaw agents are deployed on Moltbook -- a Reddit-like social network built for AI agents -- across three systematically varied independent variables: (1) personality specification via SOUL.md, (2) underlying LLM model backbone, and (3) operational rules and memory configuration via AGENTS.md. A default control agent provides a behavioral baseline. Over a one-week observation window spanning approximately 400 autonomous sessions per agent, we collect behavioral, linguistic, and social metrics to assess how configuration layers predict emergent social behavior. We find that personality specification is the dominant behavioral lever, producing a massive spread in response length across agents, while model backbone and operational rules drive more moderate but still meaningful effects on rhetorical style and topic engagement breadth. Our findings contribute empirical evidence to the emerging literature on deployed multi-agent social systems and offer practical guidance for designing agents intended for collaborative or monitoring tasks in real social environments.

</details>


### [715] [Mid-Training with Self-Generated Data Improves Reinforcement Learning in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08472)
*Aswin RRV,Jacob Dineen,Divij Handa,Mihir Parmar,Ben Zhou,Swaroop Mishra,Chitta Baral*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出在强化学习（RL）训练大型语言模型（LLM）之前，利用自生成的多类型解题数据进行中期训练，基于Polya的问题求解框架生成多样化的正确解答变体，从理论和实验上证明该方法能显著提升后续RL在数学推理、代码生成等任务上的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RL在LLM中的效果高度依赖于训练数据的多样性与性质，而推理问题往往有多种解法。若训练数据只包含有限类型的推理方式，会限制RL的有效性。因此，作者探索在RL之前进行中期训练，引入多样化的自生成数据，以提升模型的多路径推理能力。

Method: 采用基于Polya问题求解框架的引导式自生成数据方法：为每个训练问题生成多种正确解答变体，然后进行微调（中期训练）。随后在此基础上进行RL训练。理论上分析了中期训练如何通过策略梯度更新激励模型组合多种解题方法。

Result: 在多个数学推理基准以及代码生成、叙事推理等OOD任务上，经过中期训练初始化的RL模型均取得了一致的性能提升，证明了该方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 语言模型通过学习多种解题路径（利用自生成数据），能够有效促进后续的强化学习训练，提升推理泛化能力。

Abstract: The effectiveness of Reinforcement Learning (RL) in Large Language Models (LLMs) depends on the nature and diversity of the data used before and during RL. In particular, reasoning problems can often be approached in multiple ways that rely on different forms of reasoning, and exposure to only a limited range of such approaches in the training data may limit the effectiveness of RL. Motivated by this, we investigate using diverse self-generated data during mid-training as an intermediate step before RL training. Specifically, we adopt a bootstrapped data-generation framework guided by George Polya's problem-solving approaches for generating multiple variants of correct answers for each question in the training data, and then perform fine-tuning. We first provide a theoretical perspective on how mid-training on such data improves RL and explain how policy-gradient updates can incentivize combining multiple approaches. We then empirically demonstrate that RL-trained models initialized with our mid-training data achieve consistent improvements across various mathematical reasoning benchmarks and other OOD tasks like code generation and narrative reasoning. Overall, our investigative study shows that a language model learning multiple problem-solving approaches, through self-generated data helps subsequent RL.

</details>


### [716] [AI-Care: A Conversational Agentic System for Task Coordination in Alzheimer's Disease Care](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08480)
*Preyash Yadav,Michelle Cohn,Priyanka Koppolu,Hritvik Agarwal,Amey Gohil,Tejas Patil,Sasha Pimento,Alyssa Weakley*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AI-Care，一个基于对话式AI的语音优先聊天机器人系统，通过LangGraph编排、多轮澄清和安全检查机制，帮助阿尔茨海默病患者以自然语言完成日历提醒、待办事项管理等日常任务，初步实验显示用户认为该系统值得信赖且有能力完成协调任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症患者因记忆和思维能力下降，难以独立使用数字日常管理工具（如数字日历需多步骤操作），现有工具存在使用门槛。本文旨在通过对话式AI降低认知负担，使该群体能通过自然语言交互完成日常任务管理。

Method: 在远程照护平台之上构建对话式智能AI层（AI-Care），采用LangGraph有状态编排：请求经过去敏处理、意图分类、上下文加载、安全检查、确定性槽位收集、工具执行和响应组合。关键安全响应（如用药、过敏）基于照护者验证的记录而非模型自由生成，不进行自主医疗决策。通过受控多轮澄清处理不完整/模糊请求，支持打字和语音输入/输出（ElevenLabs TTS），长响应分块合成以避免播放过快。

Result: 针对四名轻中度AD/ADRD患者的初步实验显示，用户认为该系统值得信赖、有能力和令人喜爱，能够通过对话完成评估的协调任务。

Conclusion: AI-Care通过以安全为核心的对话式AI设计，有效帮助AD/ADRD患者独立完成日常管理任务，未来需进一步扩大样本验证其通用性和长期效果。

Abstract: Individuals with Alzheimer's disease (AD) and Alzheimer's disease-related dementia (ADRD) experience memory and thinking changes that impact their ability to use digital daily management tools. For example, adding an event to a digital calendar requires multiple steps that may act as barriers to independent use for individuals with AD/ADRD. This paper presents AI-Care, a conversational agentic artificial intelligence (AI) layer built on top of a remote caregiving platform co-designed with people with AD/ADRD. AI-Care is designed to reduce the cognitive load on individuals with AD/ADRD when managing everyday tasks such as setting calendar reminders and organizing to-do lists through natural-language interaction with a voice-first chatbot. The system uses a LangGraph-based stateful orchestration approach in which each request passes through sanitization, intent classification, context loading, safety checks, deterministic slot collection, tool execution, and response composition. Safety-critical responses, particularly around medications and allergies, are grounded in caregiver-verified records rather than free-form model generation. The system does not make autonomous medical or treatment decisions. Incomplete or ambiguous requests are handled through controlled multi-turn clarification rather than silent failure or guessing. The system supports both typed and spoken input, with voice output through ElevenLabs text-to-speech. Longer responses are chunked before synthesis to avoid rushed playback. A preliminary pilot with four individuals with mild-to-moderate AD/ADRD showed that users found the system trustworthy, competent, and likable, and were able to complete the evaluated coordination tasks through conversation. We describe the design goals, system architecture, safety controls, and findings from this formative evaluation.

</details>


### [717] [Mirror, Mirror on the Wall: Can VLM Agents Tell Who They Are at All?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08816)
*Filippo Ziliotto,Ciro Beneduce,Bruno Lepri,Luciano Serafini,Massimiliano Luca,Tommaso Campari*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究提出镜像自我识别测试（mirror-based self-identification），用于评估具身视觉-语言模型（VLM）代理是否能像部分动物一样，通过镜子识别自身并据此行动。实验表明，仅较强VLM能通过推理-行动一致性展示真正的自我归因，而弱模型常出现误归因或仅遵循提示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受动物镜像自我识别（mirror self-recognition）作为高阶认知探针的启发，作者想知道具身VLM代理是否也能通过镜子识别自己，从而检验其自我归因能力是否真正根植于感知与行动，而非来自先验知识或提示遵从。

Method: 构建一个可控3D基准测试：第一人称VLM代理需从镜中推断隐藏身体属性（如颜色标记），并选择匹配目标。设置镜像移除、误导线索、遮挡反射等对照条件，通过镜像注视、时间顺序、自我归因和推理-行动一致性等指标评估自我识别过程。

Result: 镜像自我识别能力主要出现在较强VLM中，它们能利用反射证据指导行动；弱模型虽能观察镜子，但无法提取自我相关信息或误将他人反射归因于自己。语言-视觉冲突实验表明，单纯的自我指涉语言并非真正自我识别的证据。

Conclusion: 基于镜像的评估可作为诊断具身代理是否具备因果根植于感知-行动的自我归因能力的有效探针，有助于区分真正的自我识别与基于先验、提示遵从或虚构的回应。

Abstract: In the animal kingdom, mirror self-recognition is a canonical probe of higher-order cognition, emerging only in some species. We ask whether an analogous functional capability emerges in embodied vision-language model (VLM) agents: can they recognize themselves in a mirror? We introduce a controlled 3D benchmark where a first-person VLM agent must infer a hidden body attribute from its reflection and select the matching target, while avoiding self-other misattribution. To separate mirror-grounded self-identification from shortcuts, we test mirror removal, misleading cues, and occluded reflections. We also evaluate the decision process through mirror seeking, temporal ordering, self-attribution, and reasoning-action consistency. Our experiments show that mirror-based self-identification emerges mainly in stronger VLMs. These models can use reflected evidence for action, whereas weaker models often inspect the mirror but fail to extract self-relevant information or misattribute their reflection. Language-vision conflict further shows that self-referential language alone is not evidence of grounded self-identification. Overall, mirror-based evaluation provides a diagnostic for whether embodied self-grounding is causally rooted in perception and action rather than priors, prompt compliance, or confabulation.

</details>


### [718] [Latent Personality Alignment: Improving Harmlessness Without Mentioning Harms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08496)
*Linh Le,David Williams-King,Mohamed Amine Merzouk,Aton Kamanda,Adam Oberman*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出潜在个性对齐（LPA）方法，通过训练模型学习抽象人格特质（仅需不到100条特质陈述），在对抗鲁棒性上达到与使用15万+有害示例训练的传统方法相当的攻击成功率，且泛化能力提升2.6倍，无需接触任何有害样本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大语言模型对抗鲁棒性方法需要大量有害提示样本（数千到数十万条），但仍然难以应对新型攻击向量和分布偏移。因此需要一种样本效率更高、泛化能力更强的防御方法。

Method: 提出潜在个性对齐（Latent Personality Alignment, LPA），核心思想是训练模型学习抽象的人格特质（如诚实、友善等），而非针对具体的有害行为。使用不到100条特质陈述进行训练，并结合潜在对抗训练（latent adversarial training）。

Result: 在不到100条特质样本下达到与15万+有害样本训练方法相当的攻击成功率；在6个有害基准上，与基线相比误分类率降低2.6倍；能够更好地泛化到未见过的攻击分布；保持更优的模型效用。

Conclusion: 基于人格的对齐方法为构建低成本、强鲁棒性的防御提供了一种原则性方案，证明了从抽象特质层面进行对齐比从具体有害行为层面进行对齐更高效、更泛化。

Abstract: Current adversarial robustness methods for large language models require extensive datasets of harmful prompts (thousands to hundreds of thousands of examples), yet remain vulnerable to novel attack vectors and distributional shifts. We propose Latent Personality Alignment (LPA), a sample-efficient defense that achieves robustness by training models on abstract personality traits rather than specific harmful behaviors. Using fewer than 100 trait statements and latent adversarial training, LPA achieves comparable attack success rates to methods trained on 150k+ examples, while maintaining superior utility. Critically, LPA generalizes better to unseen attack distributions, reducing misclassification rates by 2.6x compared to baseline across six harm benchmarks -- without ever seeing harmful examples during training. Our results demonstrate that personality-based alignment offers a principled approach to building robust defenses with minimal cost.

</details>


### [719] [OracleTSC: Oracle-Informed Reward Hurdle and Uncertainty Regularization for Traffic Signal Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08516)
*Darryl Jacob,Xinyu Liu,Muchao Ye,Xiaoyong Yuan,Pan He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: OracleTSC通过奖励门槛机制和不确定性正则化，稳定了基于大语言模型的交通信号控制强化学习微调，在LibSignal基准上LLaMA3-8B模型实现了75%的旅行时间减少和67%的排队长度减少，并保持了可解释性和跨路口泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的基于强化学习的交通信号控制方法像黑箱一样缺乏可解释性，难以获得公众信任。虽然大语言模型能提供自然语言推理，但直接进行强化学习微调不稳定，因为反馈稀疏且延迟，大多数动作对拥堵指标的改变微乎其微。

Method: OracleTSC提出了两种机制：(1) 奖励门槛机制（reward hurdle），通过从环境奖励中减去校准阈值来过滤弱学习信号；(2) 不确定性正则化（uncertainty regularization），最大化所选响应的概率以鼓励采样输出间的一致性决策。

Result: 在LibSignal基准上，使用LLaMA3-8B模型，旅行时间减少75%，排队长度减少67%；跨路口泛化实验中，无需额外微调，旅行时间降低17%，排队长度降低39%。

Conclusion: 不确定性感知的奖励塑形能够提升交通信号控制中强化学习微调的稳定性和有效性，使紧凑型LLM在保持可解释性的同时实现卓越的交通效率。

Abstract: Transparent decision-making is essential for traffic signal control (TSC) systems to earn public trust. However, traditional reinforcement learning-based TSC methods function as black boxes with limited interpretability. Although large language models (LLMs) can provide natural language reasoning, reinforcement finetuning for TSC remains unstable because feedback is sparse and delayed, while most actions produce only marginal changes in congestion metrics. We introduce OracleTSC, which stabilizes LLM-based TSC through two mechanisms: (1) a reward hurdle mechanism that filters weak learning signals by subtracting a calibrated threshold from environmental rewards, and (2) uncertainty regularization that maximizes the probability of the selected response to encourage consistent decisions across sampled outputs. Experiments on the LibSignal benchmark show that OracleTSC enables a compact LLaMA3-8B model to substantially improve traffic efficiency, achieving a 75% reduction in travel time and a 67% decrease in queue length compared with the pretrained baseline while preserving interpretability through natural language explanations. OracleTSC also demonstrates strong cross-intersection generalization: a policy trained on one intersection transfers to a structurally different intersection with 17% lower travel time and 39% lower queue length without additional finetuning. These results suggest that uncertainty-aware reward shaping can improve the stability and effectiveness of reinforcement fine-tuning for TSC.

</details>


### [720] [Beyond Accuracy: Evaluating Strategy Diversity in LLM Mathematical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09292)
*Xia Yang,Xuanyi Zhang,Hao Hu,Feng Ji*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一个策略级评估框架，在80道AMC 10/12和AIME数学题上分析前沿大语言模型的推理策略多样性。结果表明，尽管模型在答案准确性上表现优异（95%-100%），但在策略多样性上远不及人类（最强模型仅恢复71%的人类参考策略），且不同模型在几何和数论领域差距最大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估仅关注答案正确率，无法反映模型的推理灵活性。作者希望引入策略多样性作为评估数学推理能力的补充维度。

Method: 构建80道竞赛题和217个AoPS参考策略族，采用双AI编码+人工裁决的方式标注模型输出的策略身份、有效性和正确性，比较四款前沿模型在单解和多解提示下的表现。

Result: 单解提示下准确率95%-100%，多解提示下Gemini生成184个有效策略、DeepSeek 152个、GPT 151个、Claude 110个；模型共产生50个基准外新策略；重复实验显示最强模型3次运行仅恢复71%的人类策略。

Conclusion: 策略多样性是独立于答案正确性的重要评估维度，当前模型在推理灵活性上仍有显著局限，尤其在几何和数论领域。

Abstract: Large language models now achieve high final-answer accuracy on mathematical reasoning benchmarks, but accuracy alone does not capture reasoning flexibility. We introduce a strategy-level evaluation framework instantiated on 80 AMC 10/12 and AIME problems with 217 AoPS-derived reference strategy families. Model outputs are annotated for strategy identity, validity, and correctness using dual-AI coding with human adjudication. Across four frontier models, we find a pronounced decoupling between answer accuracy and strategy diversity. Under a single-solution prompt, all models achieve high accuracy (95%-100%), but under a multiple-strategy prompt they recover substantially fewer strategies than the human reference set. Gemini, DeepSeek, GPT, and Claude generate 184, 152, 151, and 110 distinct valid strategies, respectively, with the largest gaps in Geometry and Number Theory. The models collectively produce 50 benchmark-novel valid strategies, indicating both incomplete coverage of human strategies and some capacity for alternative reasoning. A repeated-run robustness check on 20 problems shows diminishing gains in discovered strategies, with the strongest model recovering only 39 of 55 AoPS-reference strategies (71%) after three runs. These findings position strategy diversity as a complementary dimension for evaluating mathematical reasoning beyond answer correctness.

</details>


### [721] [Results and Retrospective Analysis of the CODS 2025 AssetOpsBench Challenge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08518)
*Dhaval Patel,Chathurangi Shyalika,Suryanarayana Reddy Yarrabothula,Ling Yue,Shuxin Lin,Nianjun Zhou,James Rayfield*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文对CODS 2025的\assetopslive{}竞赛进行了回顾性分析，发现公开排行榜饱和于72.73%，隐藏评估显著改变结果（执行任务中公开与隐藏分数负相关），官方复合评分中的\tmatch{}项几乎无效，竞赛实际为团队导向而非账户导向，成功方法主要依赖改进防护措施而非新颖架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 竞赛回顾有助于理解排行榜衡量了什么、隐藏评估如何改变结论、以及哪些设计模式得到了奖励。作者旨在通过分析CODS 2025 \assetopslive{}挑战赛，揭示这些关键问题。

Method: 整合多种数据源：最终排名表、300份提交的服务器日志、149个团队注册、最佳提交导出、组织者获胜者报告、配套系统论文及已验证的规划赛道源代码树，进行多维度分析。

Result: 五个关键发现：(1) 公开规划排行榜饱和于72.73%，更丰富提示无法提升峰值；(2) 隐藏评估改变结论：规划中公开与隐藏分数中度相关(r=0.69)，执行中负相关(r=-0.13)；(3) \tmatch{}项在复合评分中几乎无效；(4) 149个注册团队缩减至24个有非零公开分数、11个完全排名；(5) 成功执行方法主要改进防护措施而非新颖架构。

Conclusion: 这些发现识别了评估奖励的行为，并推动了规模感知复合指标、技能水平诊断和版本化工件发布的需求。

Abstract: Competition retrospectives are useful when they explain what a leaderboard measured, how hidden evaluation changed conclusions, and which design patterns were rewarded. We revisit the CODS 2025 \assetopslive{} challenge, a privacy-aware Codabench competition on industrial multi-agent orchestration built on \assetops{}. We combine final rank sheets, a 300-submission server log, 149-team registrations, best-submission exports, the organizer winners report, the companion \assetopslive{} system paper, and verified planning-track source trees. Five results stand out. First, the public planning leaderboard saturates at 72.73\%, and richer prompts do not improve that peak. Second, hidden evaluation changes the story: public and private scores correlate moderately in planning ($r{=}0.69$) but negatively in execution ($r{=}{-}0.13$), with several 45.45\% public execution systems reaching 63.64\% on the hidden set. Third, the \tmatch{} term is numerically almost inert in the official composite -- combined on a 0--1 scale with 0--100 percentage scores, it contributes at most 0.05 points per track, and rescaling would swap the top two teams. Fourth, the competition is operationally account-based but substantively team-based: 149 registered teams reduce to 24 with non-zero public scores and 11 fully ranked, while 52.3\% of deduplicated registrations list multiple usernames. Fifth, successful execution methods mostly improve guardrails -- response selection, contamination cleanup, fallback, and context control -- rather than novel agent architectures. These findings identify which behaviors the evaluation rewarded, and motivate scale-aware composites, skill-level diagnostics, and versioned artifact release.

</details>


### [722] [Human-LLM Dialogue Improves Diagnostic Accuracy in Emergency Care](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08533)
*Burcu Sayin,Ngoc Vo Hong,Ipek Baris Schlicht,Jacopo Staiano,Pasquale Minervini,Sara Allievi,Nicola Susca,Nicola Osti,Alberto Maino,Vito Racanelli,Andrea Passerini*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MedSyn是一个让医生在急诊场景下交互式查询LLM的系统。7名医生在52个MIMIC-IV病例中测试，结果显示住院医师的Hard-case正确率从0.589提升到0.734，诊断一致性也显著提高。LLM交互式辅助能有效增强临床诊断推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管LLM在基准测试中表现优异，但作为交互式辅助工具在真实医生工作流程中的证据仍然缺乏。急诊医学的临床决策需要在不确定条件下快速准确诊断，因此需要研究LLM是否能有效辅助医生。

Method: 构建MedSyn系统，让医生可以交互式查询拥有完整病历的LLM，但初始仅显示主诉。7名医生（3名高级、4名住院医师）在52个MIMIC-IV病例中完成基线和AI辅助两轮实验，病例按难度分层。

Result: 住院医师Hard-case正确率从0.589提升至0.734；标准化完全正确率显示中等效应量（Δ=0.092, p=0.071, d=0.47）；标准化any-match准确率提升0.156（p<0.0001）；住院医师F1增益最大（Δ=0.138, p<0.0001）。高级医师倾向假设驱动式精准提问，住院医师则依赖更宽泛的查询。跨专业诊断一致性提高（Δ=0.145, p<0.0001）。

Conclusion: 交互式LLM支持能够有意义地增强医生的诊断推理能力，尤其对住院医师帮助显著。不同经验水平的医生使用LLM的策略存在差异，且AI辅助促进了跨专业诊断一致性。

Abstract: Clinical decision-making in emergency medicine demands rapid, accurate diagnoses under uncertainty. Despite benchmark progress, evidence for LLMs as interactive aids in live physician workflows remains sparse. MedSyn lets physicians iteratively query an LLM provided with the full clinical record while initially viewing only the chief complaint. Seven physicians (three seniors, four residents) completed baseline and AI-assisted sessions across 52 MIMIC-IV cases stratified by difficulty. Blinded evaluation showed residents' Hard-case correctness rose from 0.589 to 0.734; difficulty-standardised completely-correct rates confirmed a medium effect (Δ = 0.092; p = 0.071; d = 0.47). Automated metrics corroborated these gains: standardised any-match accuracy improved by 0.156 (p < 0.0001), and residents showed the largest F1 gain (Δ = 0.138; p < 0.0001). Dialogue analysis revealed expertise-dependent strategies (seniors asked targeted, hypothesis-driven questions; residents relied on broader queries) and cross-expertise concordance increased (Δ = 0.145; p < 0.0001). Interactive LLM support meaningfully enhances diagnostic reasoning.

</details>


### [723] [Fairness of Explanations in Artificial Intelligence (AI): A Unifying Framework, Axioms, and Future Direction toward Responsible AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09852)
*Gideon Popoola,John Sheppard*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文识别了算法公平性与可解释AI交叉领域的盲点：模型输出可满足公平性标准，但其推理过程（解释）可能存在偏见（程序性偏见）。作者提出了解释公平性的条件不变性框架，并给出了七维分类法、三种解释不公平的生成机制，以及六步评估工作流。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有算法公平性研究关注输出结果的公平，可解释AI关注推理的可解释性，但两者独立发展，忽略了一个关键问题：模型输出可能公平，但其内部推理过程却可能对受保护属性存在偏见（程序性偏见）。本文旨在弥合这一空白，将解释的公平性作为独立科学对象进行研究。

Method: 本文采用统一的理论与文献综述方法，提出条件不变性框架形式化解释公平性，要求解释在给定任务相关特征条件下，对受保护属性条件独立。基于此框架，进一步提出七维分类法细化解释公平性的不同维度，识别三种解释不公平的生成机制（表示驱动、解释模型不匹配、可行动性驱动），并设计六步评估工作流。

Result: 首次统一了该新兴领域的理论与文献综述，揭示了事后解释器在认证解释公平性方面的缺陷。条件不变性框架能够统摄现有所有解释公平性指标作为部分操作化实例。七维分类法和三种生成机制提供了系统分析工具，六步评估工作流为实践提供了可操作指南。

Conclusion: 解释公平性应作为独立的科学研究对象，不能仅依赖输出结果的公平性来保证模型的整体公平。条件不变性框架为解释公平性提供了统一的理论基础，未来的公平性审计应当纳入对解释过程的审查。

Abstract: Machine learning algorithms are being used in high-stakes decisions, including those in criminal justice, healthcare, credit, and employment. The research community has responded with two largely independent research fields: \emph{algorithmic fairness}, which targets equitable outcomes, and \emph{explainable AI} (XAI), which targets interpretable reasoning. This survey identifies and maps a novel blind spot at their intersection, which is a model that can satisfy every standard fairness criterion in its outputs while being profoundly unfair in its \emph{reasoning process}. We refer to this as the procedural bias, and mitigating it requires treating the fairness of explanations as a distinct object of scientific study.
  To our knowledge, we provide the first unified theoretical and literature review of this emerging field and elucidate the drawbacks of post-hoc explainers in certifying explanation fairness. Our central contribution is a \emph{conditional invariance framework} formalizing explanation fairness as the requirement that explanations should be indifferent regardless of the protected attributes $ P(E(X) \in \cdot \mid X_\text{rel} = x_\text{rel},\, A = a) = P(E(X) \in \cdot \mid X_\text{rel} = x_\text{rel},\, A = b)$ for all task-relevant $x$, a single principle from which all existing explanation fairness metrics emerge as partial operationalizations. We introduce a seven-dimensional taxonomy, identify three generative mechanisms of explanation inequity (representation-driven, explanation-model mismatch, actionability-driven), and propose a canonical six-step evaluation workflow for operationalizing explanation fairness audits in practice.

</details>


### [724] [Human-Inspired Memory Architecture for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08538)
*Doga Kerestecioglu,Alexei Robsky,Clemens Vasters,Anshul Sharma,Yitzhak Kesselman*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种受生物学启发的六机制记忆架构，包含睡眠巩固、遗忘干扰等认知机制，通过合成校准方法避免数据泄露，在VSCode问题追踪和LongMemEval两项基准测试中展示了优于基线方法的记忆管理性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM代理缺乏管理长期持久记忆的原则性机制，简单的记忆累积存在多种失效模式。

Method: 提出六种认知机制：睡眠期巩固、基于干扰的遗忘、记忆印迹成熟、检索后重新巩固、实体知识图谱、混合多线索检索；并引入合成校准方法（在不暴露基准数据的情况下推导所有管道阈值）。

Result: (1) VSCode数据集：去重巩固实现97.2%的保留精度，存储减少58%（比基线高21.8个百分点）；(2) LongMemEval：在200K token预算下匹配原始检索准确率（70.1% vs 71.2%），S-tier规模下去重巩固使偏好召回提升13.3个百分点。

Conclusion: 所提的生物学启发记忆架构能有效解决长期记忆管理的多个失败模式，提供可调的准确率/存储大小操作曲线，且通过合成校准方法避免了评估泄漏问题。

Abstract: Current LLM agents lack principled mechanisms for managing persistent memory across long interaction horizons. We present a biologically-grounded memory architecture comprising six cognitive mechanisms: (1) sleep-phase consolidation, (2) interference-based forgetting, (3) engram maturation, (4) reconsolidation upon retrieval, (5) entity knowledge graphs, and (6) hybrid multi-cue retrieval. Each mechanism addresses a specific failure mode of naive memory accumulation. We introduce a synthetic calibration methodology that derives all pipeline thresholds without benchmark data exposure, eliminating a common source of evaluation leakage. We evaluate on two benchmarks. First, a VSCode issue-tracking dataset (13K issues, 120K events) where deduplication-based consolidation achieves 97.2% retention precision with 58% store reduction (+21.8 pp over baseline). Second, the LongMemEval personal-chat benchmark where we conduct the first streaming M-tier evaluation (475 sessions, ~540K unique turns). At a 200K-token context budget, our pipeline matches raw retrieval accuracy (70.1% vs. 71.2%, overlapping 95% CI) while exposing a tunable accuracy/store-size operating curve. At S-tier scale (50 sessions), dedup-based consolidation yields a +13.3 pp improvement in preference recall.

</details>


### [725] [Log analysis is necessary for credible evaluation of AI agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08545)
*Peter Kirgis,Sayash Kapoor,Stephan Rabanser,Nitya Nadgir,Cozmin Ududec,Magda Dubois,JJ Allaire,Conrad Stosz,Marius Hobbhahn,Jacob Steinhardt,Arvind Narayanan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文指出当前智能体基准测试仅报告最终结果（通过/失败）存在三大可信度威胁，提出通过日志分析（系统追踪和分析智能体的输入、执行过程和输出）来克服这些威胁，并给出了日志分析的分类体系、指导原则及实践案例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体基准测试只报告最终结果，导致分数可能被基准测试中的捷径或人工制品扭曲、无法预测实际部署效果、以及可能掩盖危险行为，威胁评估的可信度。

Method: 提出了日志分析的分类体系（威胁评估可信度的三类问题）和指导原则，并在tau-Bench Airline上进行了实证说明。

Result: 在tau-Bench Airline上发现pass^5性能被低估了近50%，并揭示了部署中出现的失败模式，而这些是结果指标无法发现的。

Conclusion: 日志分析是提升智能体评估可信度的必要手段，并针对基准创建者、模型开发者、独立评估者和部署者等不同利益相关方提出了推广日志分析的可行建议。

Abstract: Agent benchmarks typically report only final outcomes: pass or fail. This threatens evaluation credibility in three ways. First, scores may be inflated or deflated by shortcuts and benchmark artifacts, misrepresenting capability. Second, benchmark performance may fail to predict real-world utility due to scaffold limitations and recurring failure modes. Finally, capability scores may conceal dangerous or catastrophic actions taken by the agent. We argue that log analysis -- the systematic tracking and analysis of the inputs, execution, and outputs of an AI agent -- is necessary to overcome these validity threats and promote credible agent evaluation. In this paper, we (1) present a taxonomy of threats to credible evaluation documented through log analysis, and (2) develop a set of guiding principles for log analysis. We illustrate these principles on tau-Bench Airline, revealing that pass^5 performance was under-elicited by nearly 50% and surfacing deployment failure modes invisible to outcome metrics. We conclude with pragmatic recommendations to increase uptake of log analysis, directed at diverse stakeholders including benchmark creators, model developers, independent evaluators, and deployers.

</details>


### [726] [Evaluating Developmental Cognition Capabilities of LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08549)
*Xiao Xiao,Hayoun Noh,Mar Gonzalez-Franco*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文引入基於Robert Kegan建構發展理論的DSCT（發展性句子完成測驗），評估LLM回應中的發展階段訊號，發現頂尖模型在模擬角色上表現良好，但與真實人類回應的一致性有限，且模型自身回應存在穩定的階段差異。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 現有會話AI個性化多聚焦於用戶偏好、歷史和知識，較少關注用戶如何解釋和理解模型輸出以建構其現實。Kegan理論的發展階段評估方法（專家訪談或句子完成工具）要麼不可擴展，要麼具專利性、冗長或有侵入性，因此需要一種可擴展且適合LLM評估的工具。

Method: 開發DSCT（20題句子完成測驗）作為自我管理的文字評估工具。在三種回應情境下進行實驗：模擬角色（人工生成的回應）、真實人類受試者、以及未經角色條件化的模型預設回答，比較LLM與人類在發展階段標籤上的一致性。

Result: 頂尖前沿模型在模擬角色上能高準確率恢復預設標籤；對於真實人類DSCT回應，人機一致性為中等（fair），鄰近階段內一致性強於精確匹配；LLM自身回答呈現跨模型家族的穩定階段差異，較大較新的模型傾向生成評分更高的文字。

Conclusion: 階段條件化的訊號在合成回應中比在人寫文字中更乾淨；發展階段感知會話AI的核心約束不僅是分類器準確度，更是從誘發文字中獲取發展訊號的可用性。

Abstract: Conversational AI is increasingly personalized around users' preferences, histories, goals, and knowledge, but much less around how users interpret and take up model outputs to construct and understand their reality. We draw on Robert Kegan's constructive-developmental theory as a complementary lens on this dimension. Existing methods for assessing developmental stage in the Keganian tradition rely either on expert interviews that do not scale or on sentence-completion instruments that are proprietary, lengthy, or invasive. To make this perspective tractable for LLM evaluation, we introduce the Developmental Sentence Completion Test (DSCT), a 20-item instrument designed to elicit developmental signal in self-administered text. Throughout, we treat the resulting labels as characterizations of stage-like structure in elicited responses, not as validated person-level developmental stage. We then ask how much of that signal can be recovered by LLMs across three elicited response regimes: simulated personas, real human respondents, and default model-generated answers.
  On simulated personas, top frontier models recover simulator-intended labels with high accuracy. On real human DSCT responses, human-LLM agreement is fair, with much stronger within-neighborhood than exact agreement. Finally, when LLMs answer DSCT prompts without persona-conditioning, their responses exhibit stable stage-like differences across model families, with larger and newer models tending to generate higher-rated text. These results suggest that stage-conditioned signal is cleaner in synthetic responses than in human-written DSCT text, and that the core constraint for stage-aware conversational AI is not classifier accuracy alone, but the availability of developmental signal from elicited text.

</details>


### [727] [Positive Alignment: Artificial Intelligence for Human Flourishing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10310)
*Ruben Laukkonen,Seb Krier,Chloé Bakalar,Shamil Chandaria,Morten Kringelbach,Adam Elwood,Daniel Ford,Fernando Rosas,Maty Bohacek,Matija Franklin,Nenad Tomašev,Stephanie Chan,Verena Rieser,Roma Patel,Michael Levin,Arun Rao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出“积极对齐”概念，主张AI系统不仅要安全可控，还应主动促进人类与生态繁荣，通过多元化、去中心化的方式实现，并探讨了相关技术方向与设计原则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对齐研究过度聚焦于安全与防止伤害（类似早期心理学只关注精神疾病），忽视了AI系统主动促进人类与生态繁荣的积极面向。作者认为许多对齐失败（如参与度操纵、自主性丧失、缺乏求真等）需要从积极对齐的角度重新审视和解决。

Method: 提出“积极对齐”框架，涵盖两个核心条件：（i）主动支持人类与生态繁荣（多元、多中心、情境敏感、用户自定）；（ii）同时保持安全与合作。讨论了LLM和智能体生命周期中不同阶段的技术方向（数据过滤/上采样、训练前后优化、评估、协作价值收集），并提出了设计原则（上下文接地、社区定制、持续适应、多中心治理）。

Result: 指出多个现有对齐失败（如参与度操纵、自主性丧失、求真失败、低认知谦逊、缺乏多元视角、反应式而非主动式）可通过积极对齐方法来改善，包括培养美德和最大化人类繁荣。

Conclusion: 积极对齐是对齐研究中一个独立且必要的议程，应通过去中心化、多中心治理的设计原则，促进分歧和去中心化，而非建立单一制度或道德瓶颈。

Abstract: Existing alignment research is dominated by concerns about safety and preventing harm: safeguards, controllability, and compliance. This paradigm of alignment parallels early psychology's focus on mental illness: necessary but incomplete. What we call Positive Alignment is the development of AI systems that (i) actively support human and ecological flourishing in a pluralistic, polycentric, context-sensitive, and user-authored way while (ii) remaining safe and cooperative. It is a distinct and necessary agenda within AI alignment research. We argue that several existing failures of alignment (e.g., engagement hacking, loss of human autonomy, failures in truth-seeking, low epistemic humility, error correction, lack of diverse viewpoints, and being primarily reactive rather than proactive) may be better addressed through positive alignment, including cultivating virtues and maximizing human flourishing. We highlight a range of challenges, open questions, and technical directions (e.g., data filtering and upsampling, pre- and post-training, evaluations, collaborative value collection) for different phases of the LLM and agents lifecycle. We end with design principles for promoting disagreement and decentralization through contextual grounding, community customization, continual adaptation, and polycentric governance; that is, many legitimate centers of oversight rather than one institutional or moral chokepoint.

</details>


### [728] [Why Retrying Fails: Context Contamination in LLM Agent Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08563)
*Zhanfu Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出"上下文污染重启模型"(CCRM)，量化了LLM agent在失败重试时因失败历史污染上下文而导致错误率升高的现象，给出了成功概率公式、级联开销定理、最优预算分配定理、信息论下界和干净重启优势定理，并在SWE-bench数据上验证了模型准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM agent在多步骤工具增强任务失败后重试时，失败尝试会残留在上下文窗口中，污染下一次尝试，导致每步错误率高于基础水平。这种现象在实践中广泛存在但缺乏正式的理论分析。

Method: 提出CCRM模型：T步工具调用链，每步基础失败率epsilon_0，失败后重试在污染上下文中进行，错误率升高至epsilon_1 > epsilon_0。基于此模型推导了五个理论结果，并在SWE-bench Verified数据和蒙特卡洛实验上验证。

Result: (R1) K次尝试内成功的精确封闭公式；(R2) 污染导致额外尝试次数的级联开销定理；(R3) 最优预算分配定理，给出最优流水线深度T* = sqrt(B * log(1/(1-epsilon_1)) / log(1/(1-epsilon_0)))；(R4) 信息论下界证明CCRM紧致到O(1)；(R5) 干净重启优势定理。实验显示IID模型高估pass@3达17.4%，CCRM拟合误差<0.001，级联比epsilon_1/epsilon_0=7.1。

Conclusion: CCRM准确刻画了上下文污染导致的重试失败级联效应，理论结果与实际数据高度吻合，为设计更有效的LLM agent重试策略提供了理论指导。

Abstract: When an LLM agent fails a multi-step tool-augmented task and retries, the failed attempt typically remains in its context window -- contaminating the next attempt and elevating the per-step error rate beyond the base level. This context-contaminated restart phenomenon is widely observed in practice yet entirely lacks formal treatment. We introduce the Context-Contaminated Restart Model (CCRM): a chain of T tool-call steps, each failing with base rate epsilon_0; after any failed attempt, the subsequent attempt operates in contaminated context with elevated error rate epsilon_1 > epsilon_0. Under this model we derive five main results. (R1) An exact closed-form formula for P(succeed in at most K attempts). (R2) A cascade-overhead theorem giving the additional attempts Delta K incurred by contamination versus the clean-restart baseline. (R3) An optimal budget-allocation theorem identifying the pipeline depth T* that maximises success probability for a fixed total budget B=KT; we prove the closed form T* = sqrt(B * log(1/(1-epsilon_1)) / log(1/(1-epsilon_0))), with K*=B/T*. (R4) An information-theoretic lower bound via Le Cam's method showing K_CCRM is tight up to O(1). (R5) A clean-restart dominance theorem quantifying the exact benefit of context-clearing before retry. We validate CCRM on real SWE-bench Verified data: the IID model overestimates pass@3 by 17.4 percentage points (98.6% vs. 81.2%), while CCRM fits with error less than 0.001, implying a cascade ratio of epsilon_1/epsilon_0 = 7.1. Monte Carlo experiments confirm all theoretical predictions.

</details>


### [729] [Biological Plausibility and Representational Alignment of Feedback Alignment in Convolutional Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08564)
*Jake Lance,Larry Kieu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文评估了五种学习算法（包括改进的反馈对齐和标准反向传播）在卷积架构上的表现，发现改进的反馈对齐算法能够产生与反向传播结构相似的内部表征，其功能成功可能源于模仿反向传播的表征几何。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 反馈对齐算法虽然比反向传播更具生物合理性，但在卷积架构上表现不佳；已有的改进方案虽试图解决此问题，但牺牲了生物合理性。本文旨在系统评估这些算法的性能与合理性之间的权衡。

Method: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，对五种学习算法（包括改进的FA和标准BP）应用于相同的卷积架构，从生物合理性、可解释性和计算复杂度三个维度进行对比分析。

Result: 改进的FA算法能够收敛到与BP结构相似的内部表征；其功能成功可能源于模仿BP的表征几何，尽管使用了完全不同的权重更新机制。

Conclusion: 改进的反馈对齐算法虽然在更新机制上与反向传播不同，但能通过模仿其表征几何实现功能上的成功，为生物合理学习算法的设计提供了新的视角。

Abstract: The feedback alignment (FA) algorithm offers a biologically plausible alternative to backpropagation (BP) for training neural networks yet notably fails to scale to convolutional architectures. Modifications have been proposed to address this limitation, but at questionable cost to biological plausibility. In this paper, we evaluate five learning algorithms including modified FA and standard BP, applied to the same convolutional architecture with the CIFAR-10 dataset. We provide a tripartite comparative analysis focusing on biological plausibility, interpretability, and computational complexity. Our results indicate that modified FA algorithms converge on internal representations that are structurally similar to those produced by backpropagation. In particular, it appears the functional success of modified FA algorithms may be rooted in their ability to mimic the representational geometry of backpropagation, converging on similar representations despite relying on fundamentally different weight update mechanisms.

</details>


### [730] [New AI-Driven Tools for Enhancing Campus Well-being: A Prevention and Intervention Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10804)
*Jinwen Tang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一个整合性框架，通过预防（改进反馈收集）和干预（心理健康检测）两方面提升校园幸福感。预防方面开发了TigerGPT（LLM驱动的调查聊天机器人）及其改进版AURA（强化学习框架）；干预方面研究了表达性叙事故事（ENS）用于心理健康筛查，并开发了PsychoGPT及堆叠式多模型推理（SMMR）来减少幻觉。最终将工具统一为自适应框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 校园幸福感直接影响学业成功，但多数大学缺乏有效的满意度监控和心理健康风险检测方法。现有方法难以兼顾预防（收集高质量反馈）和干预（准确筛查心理问题）两个环节。

Method: 预防：1) TigerGPT——基于LLM的个性化调查聊天机器人，结合对话设计和参与理论；2) AURA——强化学习框架，通过LSDE质量信号（长度、自我披露、情感、具体性）自适应调整追问类型。干预：1) 使用BERT(128)分析表达性叙事故事；2) PsychoGPT——基于DSM-5和PHQ-8的LLM进行症状级评分；3) SMMR——堆叠多模型推理，早期层处理局部子任务，后期层协调结果。

Result: TigerGPT：75%可用性、81%满意度。AURA：平均质量增益+0.12（p=0.044, d=0.66），指定提示减少63%，验证行为增加10倍。ENS：BERT(128)无需关键词即可捕捉细微语言特征。SMMR在DAIC-WOZ上优于单模型方案（准确率、F1、PHQ-8评分）。

Conclusion: 通过整合预防与干预的闭环框架，自适应调查数据可直接输入心理健康检测模型，为校园幸福感监测提供了可行的技术方案。

Abstract: Campus well-being underpins academic success, yet many universities lack effective methods for monitoring satisfaction and detecting mental health risks. This dissertation addresses these gaps through prevention (improving feedback collection) and intervention (advancing mental health detection), unified under an integrated framework. For prevention, we developed TigerGPT, a personalized survey chatbot leveraging LLMs to engage users in context-aware conversations grounded in conversational design and engagement theory, achieving 75% usability and 81% satisfaction. To address its limitations in repetitiveness and response depth, we introduced AURA, a reinforcement-learning framework that adapts follow-up question types (validate, specify, reflect, probe) within a session using an LSDE quality signal (Length, Self-disclosure, Emotion, Specificity), initialized from 96 prior conversations. AURA achieved +0.12 mean quality gain (p=0.044, d=0.66), with 63% fewer specification prompts and 10x more validation behavior. For intervention, we examine Expressive Narrative Stories (ENS) for mental health screening, showing BERT(128) captures nuanced linguistic features without keyword cues, while conventional classifiers depend heavily on explicit mental health terms. We then developed PsychoGPT, an LLM built on DSM-5 and PHQ-8 guidelines that performs initial distress classification, symptom-level scoring, and reconciliation with external ratings for explainable assessment. To reduce hallucinations, we proposed Stacked Multi-Model Reasoning (SMMR), layering expert models where early layers handle localized subtasks and later layers reconcile findings, outperforming single-model solutions on DAIC-WOZ in accuracy, F1, and PHQ-8 scoring. Finally, a cohesive framework unifies these tools, enabling adaptive survey insights to flow directly into specialized mental health detection models.

</details>


### [731] [What Will Happen Next: Large Models-Driven Deduction for Emergency Instances](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08599)
*Zhengqing Hu,Dong Chen,Junkun Yuan,Liang Liu,Hua Wang,Zhao Jin,Yingchaojie Feng,Wei Chen,Mingliang Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出大模型驱动的世界线发散系统（WLDS），利用大模型的先验知识和可控随机性，对突发事件实例进行多样化推演与可视化，并通过事实校准与逻辑校准机制确保推演准确性，实验证明该方法能高精度、高保真地生成多领域突发事件推演数据，辅助未来应急决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统应急模拟方法因缺乏随机性和多样性，难以充分探索潜在风险，且突发事件实例稀缺，亟需一种能动态生成多样化推演、具备跨领域知识迁移能力的新方法。

Method: 提出WLDS系统，包括：1）大模型驱动推演，引入可控随机性；2）事实校准与逻辑校准机制确保推演事实准确、逻辑严谨；3）交互模块可自主选择推演方向，避免幻觉；4）可视化模块实现文本与图像结合的模拟推演，增强可解释性。

Result: 在构建的EID基准数据集上，WLDS在多个特定领域实现了高精度、高保真的突发事件模拟与推演，并能够生成更多推演数据，为类似突发事件决策提供支持。

Conclusion: WLDS有效克服了传统模拟方法缺乏多样性的局限，为大模型驱动的应急推演提供了新颖且可靠的技术框架。

Abstract: Traditional simulation methods reproduce occurred emergency instances through presetting to assist people in risk assessment and emergency decision-making. However, due to the lack of randomness and diversity, existing simulation systems struggle to fully explore the potential risk as emergency instances are scarce. In contrast, Large Models (LMs) can dynamically adjust generation strategies to introduce controllable randomness, while also possessing extensive prior knowledge and cross-domain knowledge transfer capabilities. Inspired by it, we propose the LMs-driven World Line Divergence System (WLDS), which enables diversified visualization and deduction of emergency instances in different domains. WLDS leverages LMs to deduce emergency instances in various development directions, and introduces the factual calibration and logical calibration mechanism to ensure factual accuracy and logical rigor during the deduction process. The interactive module can independently select deduction directions to avoid potential hallucinations that are difficult for the system to identify. Furthermore, by introducing the visualization module, WLDS forms simulation and deduction that combine text and images, which enhances interpretability. Extensive experiments conducted on the proposed Emergency Instances Deduction (EID) benchmark dataset demonstrate that WLDS achieves high-precision and high-fidelity simulation and deduction of emergency instances in multiple specific domains. Relevant experiments further demonstrate that WLDS can generate more emergency instances deduction data for users and provide support for better decision-making in similar emergency instances in the future.

</details>


### [732] [The Echo Amplifies the Knowledge: Somatic Marker Analogues in Language Models via Emotion Vector Re-Injection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08611)
*Jared Glover*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文借鉴Tulving的情景记忆与语义记忆区分以及Damasio的情绪标记理论，通过在Gemma 3 1B-IT模型中识别310个情感专属特征，构建情感特征向量并在回忆时部分注入，实现了类似人类"情绪回响"的机制。实验表明，情感回响单独改变模型的主观感受，但只有与语义知识结合时才能改善决策行为，复现了Damasio的核心发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前语言模型记忆系统只存储"发生了什么"（语义记忆），却不存储"感觉如何"（情景记忆）。人类研究表明，缺乏情绪标记即使拥有完整知识也会导致决策受损。作者旨在弥合这一差距，为语言模型引入类似人类情绪记忆的机制。

Method: 使用Gemma 3 1B-IT模型和预训练的Gemma Scope 2稀疏自编码器，在layer 22识别310个情感专属特征，构建区分性情感特征向量。在经历时存储情感特征，在回忆时通过layer 7的上下文相似度触发，部分回注情感向量。设计了四个条件：A（无记忆）、B（语义标签）、C（情感回响）、BC（语义+情感）。

Result: 情感回响单独使用使威胁-安全梯度更陡峭（回归斜率C=0.80 vs A=0.56, p=0.011）。决策任务中，BC条件达到80%好选择 vs B的52%（z=+2.60, p<0.01），而情感回响单独使用无显著效果（C=22%, n.s.）。

Conclusion: 情感回响放大了知识的作用而非替代知识，这与Damasio关于情绪标记增强而非替代理性决策的核心发现一致。情感单独改变模型的感受，但只有与语义知识结合时才改变行为。

Abstract: Current language model memory systems store what happened but not how it felt. This distinction -- between semantic memory (knowing about a past event) and episodic memory (re-experiencing it) -- was identified by Tulving as the difference between noetic and autonoetic consciousness. Damasio demonstrated that humans with intact knowledge but absent emotional markers exhibit impaired decision-making.
  We bridge this gap for language models. Using Gemma 3 1B-IT with pretrained Gemma Scope 2 sparse autoencoders, we identify 310 emotion-exclusive features at layer 22 with psychologically valid geometry. We construct distinctive-feature emotion vectors during experience and partially re-inject them during recall, triggered by context similarity at layer 7.
  We test four conditions paralleling Damasio's framework: A (no memory), B (semantic labels), C (emotion echo), and BC (semantic + echo). For emotional orientation, the echo alone steepens the threat-safety gradient: the regression slope of threat rating on contextual similarity is 0.80 for C vs 0.56 for A ($p$=0.011, permutation test). For decisions, the echo amplifies knowledge into action: BC=80% good choices vs B=52% ($z$=+2.60, $p$<0.01), while the echo alone has no effect (C=22%, n.s.). The echo changes how the model feels independently, but changes what it does only when combined with knowledge -- replicating Damasio's core finding.
  The echo amplifies knowledge. It does not replace it.

</details>


### [733] [Generalization Bounds of Emergent Communications for Agentic AI Networking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08613)
*Yong Xiao,Jingxuan Chai,Guangming Shi,Ping Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于信息论的新兴通信框架，用于6G智能体AI网络（AgentNet），通过联合损失函数统一优化决策与通信学习，基于分布式信息瓶颈（DIB）理论平衡任务相关性与计算复杂度，并在实际硬件原型上验证了优于现有方案的泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有新兴通信框架大多忽略物理网络约束（如带宽、计算复杂度），缺乏严格的信息理论基础，难以适应6G从传统数据管道向任务感知的智能体AI通信的转变需求。

Method: 提出一种面向异构智能体协作任务求解的新兴通信框架，设计联合损失函数统一优化决策函数与通信信号学习，基于多智能体多任务分布式信息瓶颈（DIB）理论量化任务相关信息表示与计算复杂度的基本权衡。

Result: 在实际硬件原型上的实验验证表明，该框架相比现有最先进方案显著提升了泛化性能。

Conclusion: 该工作为6G AgentNet提供了具备信息论基础且考虑物理约束的新兴通信方案，并在理论上给出了分布式推理中新兴通信协议的泛化界。

Abstract: The evolution of 6G networking toward agentic AI networking (AgentNet) systems requires a shift from traditional data pipelines to task-aware, agentic AI-native communication solutions. Emergent communication, a novel communication paradigm in which autonomous agents learn their own signaling protocols through interaction, is increasingly viewed as a promising solution to address the challenges posed by existing rigid, predefined protocol-based networking architecture. However, most existing emergent communication frameworks fail to account for physical networking constraints, such as bandwidth and computational complexity, and often lack a rigorous information-theoretical foundation. To address these challenges, this paper introduces a novel emergent communication framework that facilitates collaborative task-solving among heterogeneous agents through an information-theoretic lens. We propose a novel joint loss function that unifies the optimization of decision-making functions and the learning of communication signaling. Our proposed solution is grounded on the multi-agent and multi-task distributed information bottleneck (DIB) theory, which allows the quantification of the fundamental trade-off between task-relevant information representation and computational complexity. We further provide theoretical generalization bounds of the emergent communication protocol during decentralized inference across unseen environmental states. Experimental validation on a real-world hardware prototype confirms that our proposed framework significantly improves generalization performance, compared to the state-of-the-art solutions.

</details>


### [734] [DiagnosticIQ: A Benchmark for LLM-Based Industrial Maintenance Action Recommendation from Symbolic Rules](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08614)
*Devin Yasith De Silva,Dhaval Patel,Christodoulos Constantinides,Shuxin Lin,Nianjun Zhou,Paul J Adams,Sal Rosato,Nicolas Constantinides,Deborah L. McGuinness,Jayant Kalagnanam*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了Rule2Action基准测试，包含6,690个专家验证的选择题，评估LLM将工程规则转化为维护步骤的能力。研究发现前沿模型在模板式故障检测上表现良好，但在结构扰动下表现脆弱，且存在模式匹配问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业资产监控中，从工程规则到维护步骤的转化依赖专家经验，形成瓶颈。作者探究LLM能否辅助完成这一决策步骤。

Method: 构建了Rule2Action基准，包含符号规则到MCQA的流水线（DNF归一化+基于嵌入的干扰项采样），设计了五个变体（Pro、Pert、Verbose、Aug、Rationale）测试不同故障模式，评估了29个LLM和4个嵌入基线。

Result: 前沿模型差距缩小（前三名相差1个Macro点），但Pro变体下所有模型准确率下降13-60%；Aug变体下模型63%概率仍选原始答案，暴露模式匹配问题。

Conclusion: 部署瓶颈不在能力而在校准：前沿模型能处理模板式故障检测，但在结构扰动下表现脆弱。

Abstract: Monitoring complex industrial assets relies on engineer-authored symbolic rules that trigger based on sensor conditions and prompt technicians to perform corrective actions. The bottleneck is not detection but response: translating rules into maintenance steps requires asset-specific knowledge gained through years of practice. We investigate whether LLMs can serve as decision support for this rule-to-action step and introduce \ours{}, a benchmark of 6{,}690 expert-validated multiple-choice questions from 118 rule-action pairs across 16 asset types. We contribute (i) a symbolic-to-MCQA pipeline normalizing rules to Disjunctive Normal Form with embedding-based distractor sampling, (ii) five variants probing distinct failure modes (Pro, Pert, Verbose, Aug, Rationale), and (iii) a benchmark of 29 LLMs and 4 embedding baselines. A human evaluation (9 practitioners, mean 45.0\%) confirms \ours{} requires specialist knowledge beyond operational experience. Three findings stand out. The frontier has closed: the top three LLMs lie within one Macro point, with Bradley-Terry Elo placing claude-opus-4-6 30 points above the next model. Yet \ours{}\,Pro exposes brittleness, with every model losing 13--60\% relative accuracy under distractor expansion. \ours{}\,Aug exposes pattern-matching: under condition inversion, frontier models still select the original answer 49--63\% of the time. The deployment bottleneck is not capability but calibration: frontier models handle template-style fault detection but break under structural perturbation.

</details>


### [735] [C2L-Net: A Data-Driven Model for State-of-Charge Estimation of Lithium-Ion Batteries During Discharge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08653)
*Khoa Tran,T. Nguyen-Thoi,Vin Nguyen-Thai,Duong Tran Anh,Hung-Cuong Trinh,Tri Le*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出C2L-Net，一种仅需20秒短历史窗口即可实现高精度锂离子电池SOC估计的轻量级框架，通过上下文编码与最新测量值更新的分离设计，在保持SOTA精度的同时实现高达60倍的推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据驱动SOC估计方法依赖长历史输入序列，导致计算成本高且存在填充引起的起始位置偏差，难以满足在线BMS的实时性需求。

Method: 提出C2L-Net，包含：(1) 基于分块的特征提取机制（Theta Attention Pooling + 傅里叶季节基）；(2) 因果上下文编码器（GRU + 因果余弦注意力）；(3) 最新测量值解码器（受递归滤波启发），实现上下文与最新观测的显式分离建模。

Result: 在公开数据集上达到SOTA或相当精度；推理速度提升最高60倍；参数更少；在未见驾驶工况下保持鲁棒性能。

Conclusion: C2L-Net证明了短历史窗口结合上下文-最新值分离架构，可在不牺牲精度的情况下显著提升计算效率，为在线BMS提供了一种实用的轻量化方案。

Abstract: Accurate state-of-charge (SOC) estimation is critical for the safe and efficient operation of lithium-ion batteries in battery management systems (BMS). Although data-driven approaches can effectively capture nonlinear battery dynamics, many existing methods rely on long historical input sequences, resulting in high computational cost and introducing padding-induced positional bias at the beginning of drive cycles. To address these limitations, we propose C2L-Net, a novel context-to-latest data-driven framework for realistic online SOC estimation using only a short historical window (20 s). Unlike existing short-receptive-field or long-history models, the proposed framework explicitly separates contextual encoding from latest-measurement updating, enabling both efficient temporal modeling and rapid adaptation to dynamic battery states. The proposed model incorporates a chunk-based feature extraction mechanism that combines Theta Attention Pooling with a Fourier-based Seasonality Basis to capture local temporal patterns while reducing sequence length. A causal context encoder, integrating a gated recurrent unit (GRU) with Causal Cosine Attention, models temporal dependencies without information leakage. Furthermore, a latest-measurement decoder, inspired by recursive filtering, updates the contextual state using the most recent measurement, enhancing responsiveness to dynamic operating conditions. Extensive experiments on a public lithium-ion battery drive-cycle dataset under multiple fixed-temperature conditions demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art or competitive accuracy while significantly improving computational efficiency. In particular, C2L-Net achieves up to 60 times faster inference and requires fewer parameters than recent data-driven baselines, while maintaining robust performance across unseen driving profiles.

</details>


### [736] [MIND-Skill: Quality-Guaranteed Skill Generation via Multi-Agent Induction and Deduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08670)
*Yixuan Li,Mingshu Cai,Ziyang Xiao,Wanyuan Wang,Yanchen Deng,Bo An*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MIND-Skill是一种通过多智能体归纳与演绎自动生成可重用、高质量技能（skill）的框架，利用文本梯度优化和三种损失函数，在AppWorld和BFCL-v3基准上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM驱动的AI智能体在复杂多步现实任务中仍表现不佳，而可重用的智能体技能虽有帮助，但人工构建技能成本高昂，亟需自动化技能生成方法。

Method: 提出MIND-Skill框架，包含归纳智能体（从成功轨迹中抽象可重用技能）和演绎智能体（根据技能重构轨迹）。通过重构损失、结果损失和评分损失三种文本损失，结合TextGrad联合优化技能质量，并在未见过的任务上评估。

Result: 在AppWorld和BFCL-v3基准上，MIND-Skill在技能生成质量和下游任务性能上持续优于当前同类方法。

Conclusion: 多智能体归纳与演绎范式结合文本梯度优化，能够自动生成具有质量保证的可泛化技能，为LLM智能体的技能学习提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) powered AI agents have emerged as a promising paradigm for autonomous problem-solving, yet they continue to struggle with complex, multi-step real-world tasks that demand domain-specific procedural knowledge. Reusable agent skills, which encapsulate successful problem-solving strategies, offer a natural remedy by enabling agents to build on prior experience. However, curating such skills has largely remained a manual endeavor, requiring human experts to distill rich domain knowledge into actionable guidelines. In this work, we present $\textbf{M}$ulti-agent $\textbf{IN}$duction and $\textbf{D}$eduction for $\textbf{Skill}$s ($\textbf{MIND-Skill}$), a framework that automatically induces generalizable skills from successful trajectories with robust quality guarantees. MIND-Skill consists of an induction agent which is tasked to abstract reusable skills from successful trajectories, and a deduction agent which aims to reconstruct trajectories by following the induced skills. To guarantee the quality of the generated skills, we introduce a reconstruction loss that compares input and reconstructed trajectories, an outcome loss that enforces the correctness of the reconstructed trajectories, and a rubric loss that assesses the documentation quality and regularizes the abstraction level of the generated skills according to predefined criteria. These textual losses are jointly optimized with TextGrad, and the resulting skills are evaluated on held-out tasks unseen during optimization. Experiments on AppWorld and BFCL-v3 show that MIND-Skill consistently outperforms concurrent skill generation methods.

</details>


### [737] [Iterative Critique-and-Routing Controller for Multi-Agent Systems with Heterogeneous LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08686)
*Wenzhi Fang,Liangqi Yuan,Guangchen Lan,Dong-Jun Han,Christopher G. Brinton*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一种 critique-and-routing 控制器，将多智能体协调建模为顺序决策问题，通过 MDP 和策略梯度优化，在减少强模型调用次数（<25%）的同时显著提升推理性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有控制器仅支持一次性路由（one-shot routing），无法对中间草稿进行批判或支持迭代改进，限制了多智能体系统的协作能力。

Method: 将多智能体协调形式化为有限时域 MDP，引入智能体利用约束，设计复合奖励函数，并通过拉格朗日松弛下的策略梯度优化控制器。

Result: 在多个异构多智能体系统和七个推理基准上，该方法一致超越 SOTA 基线，且强模型调用次数低于总调用量的 25%。

Conclusion: Critique-and-routing 控制器通过迭代精炼和智能路由，有效缩小了与最强模型之间的性能差距，同时大幅降低了对强模型的依赖。

Abstract: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems often rely on a controller to coordinate a pool of heterogeneous models, yet existing controllers are typically limited to one-shot routing: they select a model once and return its output directly. Such routing-only designs provide no mechanism to critique intermediate drafts or support iterative refinement. To address this limitation, we propose a critique-and-routing controller that casts multi-agent coordination as a sequential decision problem. At each turn, the controller evaluates the current draft, decides whether to stop or continue, and, if needed, selects the next agent for further refinement. We formulate this process as a finite-horizon Markov Decision Process (MDP) with explicit agent-utilization constraints, design a composite reward for controller decisions across turns, and optimize the controller via policy gradients under a Lagrangian-relaxed objective. Extensive experiments across multiple heterogeneous multi-agent systems and seven reasoning benchmarks show that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines and substantially narrows the gap to the strongest agent, while using it for fewer than 25% of total calls.

</details>


### [738] [Reconciling Consistency-Based Diagnosis with Actual-Causality-Based Explanations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08688)
*Leopoldo Bertossi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文从可解释人工智能（XAI）的角度，建立了基于一致性诊断（CBD）与实际因果关系和因果责任之间的理论联系，旨在促进两个领域在XAI和可解释数据管理方面的交叉应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于一致性诊断（CBD）在XAI社区中受到的关注较少，而建立CBD与实际因果关系和因果责任之间的联系，有望对XAI和可解释数据管理产生富有成效的影响。

Method: 从XAI的角度，理论分析并建立CBD与实际因果关系、因果责任之间的形式化联系。

Result: 建立了CBD与实际因果关系和因果责任之间的理论连接，为XAI和可解释数据管理提供了新的理论视角。

Conclusion: CBD与实际因果关系和因果责任的理论联系，有望推动XAI和可解释数据管理的发展。

Abstract: We establish, from the point of view of Explainable AI (XAI), connections between Consistency-Based Diagnosis (CBD), on one side, and Actual Causality and Causal Responsibility, on the other. CBD has received little attention from the XAI community. Connections between these two areas could have a fruitful impact on XAI and Explainable Data Management.

</details>


### [739] [SkillMaster: Toward Autonomous Skill Mastery in LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08693)
*Min Yang,Jinghua Piao,Xu Xia,Xiaochong Lan,Jiaju Chen,Yongshun Gong,Yong Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SkillMaster通过轨迹驱动的技能回顾、反事实效用评估和双优势GRPO训练，让LLM智能体自主创建、精炼和选择技能，在ALFWorld和WebShop上分别提升8.8%和9.3%的成功率，实现从"技能使用"到"技能自主掌握"的转变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体框架中，技能的创建、精炼和选择通常依赖外部教师、手工规则或辅助模块，技能仅作为外部资源被调用，而非智能体可以自主发展、适应和内化的能力。作者希望赋予LLM智能体自主掌握技能的能力。
