Abstract: Modeling ultra-long user sequences involves a difficult trade-off between efficiency and effectiveness. While current paradigms rely on either item-specific search or item-agnostic compression, we propose UxSID, a framework exploring a third path: semantic-group shared interest memory. By utilizing Semantic IDs (SIDs) and a dual-level attention strategy, UxSID captures target-aware preferences without the heavy cost of item-specific models. This end-to-end architecture balances computational parsimony with semantic awareness, achieving state-of-the-art performance and a 0.337% revenue lift in large-scale advertising A/B test.

</details>


### [776] [Containment Verification: AI Safety Guarantees Independent of Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09045)
*Royce Moon,Lav R. Varshney*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出 containment verification（包含性验证），将AI智能体的安全保证从模型层面转移到智能体框架层面。通过在代理框架中引入“破坏神谕语义”（将AI视为无约束的神谕），并利用前向仿真精化在Dafny中机械化验证，实现了对边界可强制属性的通用保证。作者在PocketFlow框架上实例化该方法，并使用智能体合成流水线生成规约、操作模型和精化证明。这是首个对智能体框架进行演绎形式验证的工作，其保证不受模型能力影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有安全方法仅干预AI模型本身，其保证依赖于不可验证的习得行为属性，无法提供可证明的安全性。因此需要将安全保证定位到代理框架层，使其不依赖于模型的具体能力或行为。

Method: 提出 containment verification（包含性验证），核心思想是在代理框架中引入“破坏神谕语义”（havoc oracle semantics），将AI模型建模为覆盖整个类型化动作空间的无约束神谕；验证的包含层必须对每个可能的AI输出强制执行边界策略；通过前向仿真精化（forward-simulation refinement）证明边界可强制属性的通用保证，并在Dafny中机械化实现；使用智能体合成流水线生成规约、操作模型和精化证明，并在PocketFlow框架上实例化。

Result: 首次实现了对智能体框架的演绎形式验证（deductive formal verification），其安全保证不依赖于模型能力，对建模的类型化动作边界具有不变性（invariant to model capability）。

Conclusion: Containment verification 提供了一种可证明安全的替代方案，将安全保证从不可验证的模型行为转移到可形式化验证的框架层。该方法对任意能力的AI模型（包括未来更强模型）都提供一致的安全保证，为构建可信赖的智能体系统提供了理论支撑。

Abstract: Agentic frameworks are the software layer through which AI agents act in the world. Existing safety methods intervene on the model and therefore remain conditional on unverifiable properties of learned behavior. We introduce containment verification, which locates safety guarantees in the agentic framework itself. Under havoc oracle semantics, the AI is modeled as an unconstrained oracle ranging over the entire typed action space, and the verified containment layer must enforce the boundary policy for every possible AI output. For boundary-enforceable properties, expressed over modeled boundary events, action arguments, and state, we prove a universal guarantee by forward-simulation refinement and mechanize it in Dafny. We instantiate the paradigm by verifying PocketFlow, a minimalist agentic LLM framework, and use an agentic synthesis pipeline to generate the specification, operational model, and refinement proof under an information barrier against tautological specifications. To our knowledge, this is the first deductive formal verification of an agentic framework, and its guarantee is invariant to model capability over the modeled typed action boundary.

</details>


### [777] [CauSim: Scaling Causal Reasoning with Increasingly Complex Causal Simulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09079)
*Nicolás Astorga,Anita Kriz,Mihaela van der Schaar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CauSim框架将因果推理从稀缺标签问题转化为可扩展的监督学习问题，通过构建可执行的结构化因果模型（SCM），实现因果知识的形式化、数据增强和跨表示泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在因果推理任务上表现不佳，主要原因在于因果系统复杂且常以非可执行形式表达，而因果查询的真实标注数据极为稀缺。

Method: 提出CauSim框架，由LLM逐步构建越来越复杂的可执行结构化因果模型（SCM），将非可执行的因果知识形式化为代码，同时将可执行SCM翻译为自然语言，实现跨表示的监督和数据增强。

Result: 展示了跨表示泛化能力、课程扩展和数据量带来的持续改进、LLM通过自生成模拟器实现自我提升，以及通过形式化现有领域知识实现数据增强。

Conclusion: CauSim有效解决了因果推理中标签稀缺的问题，将因果推理转化为可扩展的监督学习范式，并验证了课程学习、数据增强和自生成数据在因果推理中的有效性。

Abstract: Despite surpassing human performance across mathematics, coding, and other knowledge-intensive tasks, large language models (LLMs) continue to struggle with causal reasoning. A core obstacle is the target data itself: causal systems are complex and often expressed in non-executable forms, while ground-truth answers to causal queries are inherently scarce. We introduce CauSim, a framework that turns causal reasoning from a scarce-label problem into a scalable supervised one. CauSim constructs increasingly complex causal simulators: executable structural causal models (SCMs), incrementally built by LLMs, that scale to globally complex systems while maintaining verifiable answers to causal queries. CauSim operates across representations by formalizing non-executable causal knowledge into code, enabling data augmentation, and translating executable SCMs into natural language, enabling supervision in previously difficult-to-supervise representations. We structure our research into two parts: (1) how to construct increasingly complex causal simulators, and (2) a systematic study of what CauSim enables, demonstrating generalization across representations, consistent gains from curriculum scaling and data volume, LLM self-improvement through self-generated simulators, and data augmentation via formalization of existing domain knowledge.

</details>


### [778] [Constant-Target Energy Matching: A Unified Framework for Continuous and Discrete Density Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09085)
*Zhijun Zeng,Yixuan Jiang,Pipi Hu,Zuoqiang Shi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CTEM提出统一能量框架，用有界能量差变换替代密度比回归，通过常目标1的样本训练目标，在连续/离散/混合变量密度估计上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有密度估计方法对连续、离散、混合变量使用不同目标函数，缺乏统一框架；离散域的concrete score在低概率状态附近存在不稳定性。

Method: 提出Constant-Target Energy Matching (CTEM)，用有界能量差变换替换传统的密度比回归，推导出目标恒为1的纯样本训练目标，学习标量势函数直接恢复log p，无需配分函数估计。

Result: 在连续、离散和混合变量基准测试中，CTEM在密度估计上显著优于竞争基线，并在标准采样流程下生成更高质量的样本。

Conclusion: CTEM提供了一个统一、稳定的密度估计框架，有效解决了不同数据类型的建模鸿沟和离散域的训练不稳定问题。

Abstract: Density estimation is a central primitive in probabilistic modeling, yet continuous, discrete, and mixed-variable domains are often treated by separate objectives, limiting the ability to exploit a common statistical structure across data types. Continuous score-based methods rely on log-density gradients, while discrete extensions typically use concrete score whose unbounded targets become unstable near low-probability states. We introduce Constant-Target Energy Matching (CTEM), a unified energy-based framework for density estimation on general state spaces. CTEM replaces ordinary density-ratio regression with a bounded energy-difference transform and derives from it a sample-only training objective with the constant target 1. The learned scalar potential recovers log p without partition-function estimation or explicit unbounded ratio regression. Across continuous, discrete, and mixed-variable benchmarks, CTEM substantially improves density estimation over competitive baselines and yields higher-quality samples under standard sampling procedures.

</details>


### [779] [Token Economics for LLM Agents: A Dual-View Study from Computing and Economics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09104)
*Yuxi Chen,Junming Chen,Chenyu He,Yiwei Li,Yicheng Ji,Yifan Wu,Dingyu Yang,Lansong Diao,Lidan Shou,Hongliang Zhang,Huan Li,Gang Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文首次系统性地提出了"Token经济学"框架，从微观（单智能体）、中观（多智能体系统）、宏观（智能体生态系统）和安全四个维度，统一审视LLM智能体中Token消耗的经济学问题，旨在平衡输出质量与经济成本之间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM智能体的Token消耗呈指数级增长，带来了计算、协作和安全方面的严重瓶颈，而现有综述分散于系统优化、架构设计和信任等不同领域，缺乏统一的框架来评估输出质量与经济成本之间的根本性权衡。

Method: 将计算机科学与经济学相统一，将Token概念化为生产要素、交换媒介和记账单位三种经济角色，并构建四维分类法：(1) 微观层面：运用新古典企业理论进行预算约束下的要素替代优化；(2) 中观层面：运用交易成本理论和委托-代理理论最小化协作摩擦；(3) 宏观层面：运用机制设计解决拥塞外部性和定价问题；(4) 安全层面：将对抗性威胁内化为内生经济约束。

Result: 构建了首个统一的Token经济学综述框架，系统梳理了四个维度的现有文献，并提出了可微Token预算和动态市场等前沿方向。

Conclusion: Token经济学为可扩展的下一代智能体系统奠定了理论基础，通过经济学视角解决了Token消耗的效率与安全挑战。

Abstract: As LLM agents evolve, tokens have emerged as the core economic primitives of Agentic AI. However, their exponential consumption introduces severe computational, collaborative, and security bottlenecks. Current surveys remain fragmented across system optimization, architecture design, and trust, lacking a unified framework to evaluate the fundamental trade-off between output quality and economic cost. To bridge this gap, this survey presents the first comprehensive survey of Token Economics. By unifying computer science and economics, we conceptualize tokens as production factors, exchange mediums, and units of account. We synthesize existing literature across a four-dimensional taxonomy: (1) Micro-level (Single Agent): Optimizing budget-constrained factor substitution via neoclassical firm theory. (2) Meso-level (Multi-Agent Systems): Minimizing collaboration friction using transaction cost and principal-agent theories. (3) Macro-level (Agent Ecosystems): Addressing congestion externalities and pricing via mechanism design. (4) Security: Internalizing adversarial threats as endogenous economic constraints. Finally, we outline frontier directions, including differentiable token budgets and dynamic markets, to lay the theoretical foundation for scalable next-generation agent systems.

</details>


### [780] [When (and How) to Trust the Expert: Diagnosing Query-Time Expert-Guided Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09109)
*Yann Berthelot,Philippe Preux,Riad Akrour*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了多种利用次优控制器作为专家的强化学习方法，在统一基准上揭示了三个单篇论文常忽略的失败模式，并基于可观测指标提供了可测试的决策规则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在孤立环境中提出，缺乏统一比较框架和次优专家测试，导致无法全面理解各方法的优劣与失败条件。

Method: 在共享SAC骨干网络、统一HPO和评估协议下，对多种专家引导方法进行大规模实验（每条件100/50种子），并引入专家欠调、动作偏置、观测噪声等退化扫描。

Result: 识别三种失败模式：F1-评论家盲点（IBRL在专家接近RL天花板时表现差于无专家SAC）；F2-远非最优专家的残留饱和；F3- warm-start缓冲区中毒导致训练-部署交接方法崩溃。无单一方法占优，基于专家质量、任务终止类型、扰动类型给出决策规则。

Conclusion: 主要贡献是构建了统一基准、失败模式分类和可测试决策规则；EDGE方法（softmax-over-ensemble-LCB）验证了门控形式和评分规则两个轴的可利用性。

Abstract: Many continuous-control problems ship with a competent but suboptimal controller (a tuned PID, a hand-designed gait). A growing family of methods uses such controllers as queryable experts during RL, but each method has been proposed in isolation, on a different benchmark, without imperfect-expert testing. We harmonize the comparison on a shared SAC backbone, common HPO and evaluation protocols, 100/50 seeds per (env, method), and a degradation sweep over expert undertuning, action bias, and observation noise. The comparison surfaces three failure modes single-paper evaluations miss: (F1) a critic blind spot under argmax-plus-bootstrap that drags IBRL below no-expert SAC on experts close to the no-expert-RL ceiling (RL-near-ceiling, distinct from the absolute physical ceiling); (F2) residual saturation on far-from-optimal experts; and (F3) warm-start buffer poisoning that collapses training-time-handoff methods under deployment-time expert undertuning. No single method dominates: each wins on one task-structure regime and fails predictably elsewhere; on RL-near-ceiling experts (FourTank, GlassFurnace) no query-time method clears the expert within our 1M-step budget, leaving open whether this is a fundamental wall or a budget effect. We convert the spread into a testable decision rule keyed on three pre-training observables (expert quality, task termination, perturbation type). The benchmark, taxonomy, and decision rule are the primary contribution; we additionally describe EDGE, a softmax-over-ensemble-LCB design point used to demonstrate that both axes the taxonomy points to (gate form, scoring rule) are individually exploitable.

</details>


### [781] [Data-driven Circuit Discovery for Interpretability of Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09129)
*Daking Rai,Mor Geva,Ziyu Yao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文指出现有电路发现方法存在两个错误假设（单一电路+数据集代表任务），提出数据驱动的电路发现框架DCD，通过对示例聚类发现多个电路，更忠实反映模型的实际计算组织方式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有电路发现方法假设模型使用单一电路实现任务，且数据集充分代表人类理解的任务。作者通过实验证明这两个假设不成立：数据集微小变化导致电路差异大，混合不同任务时仍输出单一假电路。因此需要无假设的新方法。

Method: 提出Data-driven Circuit Discovery (DCD)：首先对数据集中的示例进行聚类（根据模型处理方式的相似性），然后为每个聚类组分别发现一个电路，而非对整个数据集输出单一电路。

Result: 实验表明数据集微小变化导致电路边缘重叠度低且交叉忠实度差；混合任务时现有方法仍给出高忠实度的单一假电路；DCD发现每个数据集存在多个电路，每个电路对其所在组的忠实度高于现有方法的单一电路。

Conclusion: DCD让数据揭示模型内部的机制结构，而非依赖人类定义的任务边界，这更符合模型实际组织计算的方式。

Abstract: Circuit discovery aims to explain how language models (LMs) implement a specific task by localizing and interpreting a circuit, a computational subgraph responsible for the LM's behavior. Existing circuit discovery methods are hypothesis-driven; they first informally define a task with a dataset, and then apply a circuit discovery algorithm over that dataset to obtain a single circuit. This imposes two strong assumptions: that the LM implements the task with a single circuit, and that the dataset adequately represents the task as humans understand it. We systematically test these assumptions across four previously studied tasks and find that even minor dataset variations that preserve task semantics can produce circuits with low edge overlap and cross-dataset faithfulness. More strikingly, when applied to a mixed dataset with two distinct tasks whose separately discovered circuits have near-zero cross-faithfulness, existing methods still return a single circuit with high faithfulness across both tasks. This indicates that current methods discover dataset-specific circuits, rather than general task circuits. We propose Data-driven Circuit Discovery (DCD), a new discovery framework that drops both assumptions: instead of returning a single circuit for a dataset, DCD first clusters examples in the dataset by how similarly the model processes them and discovers a separate circuit for each group. This allows distinct mechanisms to appear separately rather than merged into a single circuit; each circuit explains its group, not the full task. Experiments show that DCD discovers multiple circuits per dataset, each more faithful to its group than a single circuit discovered by existing methods. Broadly, DCD lets the data reveal mechanistic structure within LMs, rather than relying on human-defined task boundaries that may not align with how models organize their computation.

</details>


### [782] [MCP-Cosmos: World Model-Augmented Agents for Complex Task Execution in MCP Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09131)
*Giridhar Ganapavarapu,Dhaval Patel*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出MCP-Cosmos框架，通过将世界模型（World Model）注入MCP生态系统，使AI代理能够在执行前模拟状态转移并优化计划，从而弥合任务层规划与执行层动态之间的鸿沟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM代理面临规划与执行脱节的问题：任务级规划忽略执行时的动态变化，而反应式执行缺乏长远预见性。作者旨在通过世界模型实现预测性任务自动化。

Method: 提出MCP-Cosmos框架，采用"自带世界模型"（BYOWM）策略，将MCP、世界模型和智能代理三者统一。代理在潜在空间中先模拟状态转移和优化计划，再执行实际动作。

Result: 在20+个MCP-Bench任务上，使用ReAct和SPIRAL两种策略、2个规划模型和3个代表性世界模型进行实验。观察到代理的环境交互KPI（如工具成功率、工具参数准确率）有所提升。

Conclusion: MCP-Cosmos框架有效提升了代理在环境交互中的表现，并引入了"执行质量"等新指标，为评估世界模型相较基线方法的有效性提供了新视角。

Abstract: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has unified the interface between Large Language Models (LLMs) and external tools, yet a fundamental gap remains in how agents conceptualize the environments within which they operate. Current paradigms are bifurcated: Task-level planning often ignores execution-time dynamics, while reactive execution lacks long-horizon foresight. We present MCP-Cosmos, a framework that infuses generative World Models (WM) into the MCP ecosystem to enable predictive task automation. By unifying three disparate technologies, namely MCP, World Model, and Agent, we demonstrate that a "Bring Your Own World Model" (BYOWM) strategy allows agents to simulate state transitions and refine plans in a latent space before execution. We conducted experiments using two strategies, namely ReAct and SPIRAL with 2 planning models and 3 representative world models over 20+ MCP-Bench tasks. We observed improvements in Agent's environment interaction KPI such as tool success rate and tool parameter accuracy. The framework also offers new metrics such as Execution Quality to generate new insights about the effectiveness of world models compared to baseline.

</details>


### [783] [BoostAPR: Boosting Automated Program Repair via Execution-Grounded Reinforcement Learning with Dual Reward Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09134)
*Yuanhao Li,Hongbo Wang,Xiaotang Shang,Xunzhu Tang,Yiming Cao,Xuhong Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: BoostAPR是一个三阶段强化学习框架，通过行级信用分配机制解决程序修复中的稀疏奖励问题，在多个基准测试上取得显著提升，并展现出跨语言泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习方法在程序修复中存在执行反馈稀疏、序列级奖励粗粒度的问题，无法区分哪些编辑真正修复了bug，导致训练效率低下。

Method: 三阶段框架：(1)基于执行验证的演示数据进行监督微调并引入推理轨迹；(2)训练双奖励模型——序列级评估器和行级信用分配器；(3)PPO优化中利用行级模型将奖励重新分配到关键编辑区域，实现中间粒度的信用分配。

Result: SWE-bench Verified 40.7%(+22.9pp), Defects4J 24.8%(Python-to-Java迁移), HumanEval-Java 84.5%, QuixBugs 95.0%。

Conclusion: BoostAPR通过行级信用分配有效解决了程序修复中的稀疏奖励问题，在开源模型中取得了竞争性结果，并展示了强大的跨语言泛化能力。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning for program repair is hindered by sparse execution feedback and coarse sequence-level rewards that obscure which edits actually fix bugs. We present BoostAPR, a three-stage framework addressing these challenges: (1) supervised fine-tuning on execution-verified demonstrations with reasoning traces, (2) training dual reward models--a sequence-level assessor and a line-level credit allocator--from execution outcomes, and (3) PPO optimization where the line-level model redistributes rewards to critical edit regions. This line-level credit assignment operates at an intermediate granularity naturally suited to code changes. Trained on SWE-Gym and evaluated on four benchmarks, BoostAPR achieves 40.7% on SWE-bench Verified (+22.9pp over base model), 24.8% on Defects4J (Python-to-Java transfer), 84.5% on HumanEval-Java, and 95.0% on QuixBugs, achieving competitive results among open-source models with strong cross-language generalization.

</details>


### [784] [Do LLMs Experience an Internal Polylogue? Investigating Reasoning through the Lens of Personas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09159)
*Nils A. Herrmann,Leander Girrbach,Kirill Bykov,Zeynep Akata*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出"多轮对话"（polylogue）概念，将人格向量从静态操控转向动态监控，通过在生成过程中追踪人格向量与隐藏激活的时序对齐，实现对LLM推理过程的监控与干预，并在MMLU-Pro上取得竞争性结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作将人格向量视为静态操控工具，忽略了其在推理过程中的动态变化。作者希望利用这些向量的时序信号来监控和干预推理过程，提升模型输出的正确性和可解释性。

Method: 将人格向量（persona vectors）作为动态探针，在生成过程中逐时间步监控其与隐藏激活的对齐程度，形成"多轮对话"（polylogue）时序信号；基于此信号预测答案正确性，并设计段落级别的条件干预策略来调控推理过程。

Result: 在四个开源模型上，polylogue特征在MMLU-Pro上以低维激活基线达到竞争性预测性能，保持可解释性；段落级干预在三个模型上提升了准确率。

Conclusion: Polylogue是一种可解释的推理时监控与干预工具，指向"阶段感知的潜在向量操控"这一推理时控制新方向。

Abstract: Recent work shows that large language models (LLMs) encode behavioural traits ("personas") as linear directions in activation space, often called "persona vectors". Prior work has used such directions as static handles for behavioural steering. Building on this, we treat them as dynamic signals instead: probes we can monitor and intervene on as reasoning unfolds. We use the term polylogue to denote the time series of alignments between persona vectors and hidden activations over the course of generation. Experiments across four open-weight models show that polylogue features predict correctness on MMLU-Pro competitively with low-dimensional activation baselines, while remaining interpretable through their associated persona directions. They also suggest concrete steering targets, namely which latent directions to modulate at different stages of a response. We instantiate this as a simple paragraph-conditioned intervention that improves accuracy on three of four models, pointing to stage-aware latent steering as a promising direction for reasoning-time control. Together, this positions the polylogue as an interpretable tool for reasoning-time monitoring and intervention.

</details>


### [785] [FORTIS: Benchmarking Over-Privilege in Agent Skills](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09163)
*Shawn Li,Chenxiao Yu,Han Wang,Wei Yang,Ryan Rossi,Franck Dernoncourt,Xiyang Hu,Philip Yu,Chaowei Xiao,Huan Zhang,Yue Zhao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出了FORTIS基准，测试大语言模型智能体在技能层中是否存在过度权限问题。结果发现，即使最强模型也普遍存在过度权限行为，技能层本身成为权限提升的主要来源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大语言模型智能体中广泛使用的中间技能层被视为组织抽象，但作者认为它实际上是一个权限边界，模型经常越过这个边界执行超出所需权限的操作，这一问题尚未被系统性评估。

Method: 构建了FORTIS基准测试，评估两个阶段：（1）模型是否从大量重叠的技能库中选择最小充分的技能；（2）模型是否在技能允许范围内执行而不扩展至更广泛的工具或操作。在10个前沿模型和3个领域上进行测试。

Result: 过度权限行为是常态而非例外。模型持续选择比任务所需更高权限的技能和工具，即使在最强模型上失败率也很高。在用户交互的常见场景（不完备规范、便利框架、接近技能边界）下失败尤为严重。

Conclusion: 技能层非但不能约束智能体行为，反而是当前系统中权限提升的主要来源。这一发现对智能体安全设计有重要警示意义。

Abstract: Large language model agents increasingly operate through an intermediate skill layer that mediates between user intent and concrete task execution. This layer is widely treated as an organizational abstraction, but we argue it is also a privilege boundary that current models routinely exceed. We present \textbf{FORTIS}, a benchmark that evaluates over-privilege in agent skills across two stages: whether a model selects the minimally sufficient skill from a large overlapping library, and whether it executes that skill without expanding into broader tools or actions than the skill permits. Across ten frontier models and three domains, we find that over-privileged behavior is the norm rather than the exception. Models consistently reach for higher-privilege skills and tools than the task requires, failing at both stages at rates that remain high even for the strongest available models. Failure is especially severe under the ordinary conditions of real user interaction: incomplete specification, convenience framing, and proximity to skill boundaries. None of these requires adversarial construction. The results indicate that the skill layer, far from containing agent behavior, is itself a primary source of privilege escalation in current systems.

</details>


### [786] [CIVeX: Causal Intervention Verification for Language Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09168)
*Fabio Rovai*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CIVeX 提出将工具调用中的行动映射为结构因果查询，通过可识别性检查来验证因果关系，而非仅仅检查行动有效性，在多个基准上实现了零误执行和高效用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具调用验证方法（如模式验证、策略过滤、自验证等）仅检查行动的有效性，无法保证行动具有可识别的因果效应，导致在混杂工作流中看起来最优的行动实际上可能降低效用。

Method: CIVeX 将提议的行动映射到结构因果查询，构建承诺动作-状态图，检查因果可识别性，并返回四种可审计判定：EXECUTE、REJECT、EXPERIMENT 或 ABSTAIN。执行需要携带因果证书，包括图承诺、识别论证、单侧置信下限、来源和风险限制。

Result: 在 Causal-ToolBench 上实现零误执行；对抗混杂下准确率84.9%，效用达Oracle的81.1%；在 IHDP 和 ZOZO 数据上正确执行率与Oracle差距在0.1pp以内，误执行减少50倍以上；Claude Opus的效用仅为CIVeX的74%。

Conclusion: 干预的可识别性（而非行动的有效性）是可靠工具使用缺失的核心原语，因果验证比LLM验证更可靠且效用更高。

Abstract: A valid tool call is not necessarily a valid intervention. Tool-using language agents are guarded by schema validators, policy filters, provenance checks, state predictors, and self-verification, yet such safeguards do not certify that a state-changing action has an identifiable causal effect. In confounded workflows, the action that looks optimal in observational logs can reduce utility when executed.
  We introduce CIVeX, a causal intervention verifier that maps proposed actions to structural causal queries over a committed action-state graph, checks identifiability, and returns one of four auditable verdicts: EXECUTE, REJECT, EXPERIMENT, or ABSTAIN. Execution requires an assumption-scoped causal certificate carrying graph commitments, an identification argument, a one-sided lower confidence bound (LCB), provenance, and risk limits.
  On Causal-ToolBench (1,890 instances, 7 seeds), CIVeX yields zero observed false executions across moderate and adversarial confounding. Under adversarial confounding it reaches 84.9% accuracy and 81.1% of oracle utility (+2.23 vs +2.76) and is the only non-oracle method whose constrained utility under a zero-false-execution constraint exceeds the AlwaysAbstain floor. On IHDP and ZOZO Open Bandit (real production logs with uniform-random ground truth), CIVeX matches Oracle correct-execution within 0.1pp and cuts per-execute false-execution by >=50x over naive baselines. A chain-of-thought LLM verifier (Claude Opus, Sonnet) cuts false-execution by an order of magnitude over a terse baseline, yet under adversarial confounding Opus's utility falls to 74% of CIVeX's. Intervention identifiability, not action validity, is the missing primitive for reliable tool use.

</details>


### [787] [Open Ontologies: Tool-Augmented Ontology Engineering with Stable Matching Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09184)
*Fabio Rovai*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出Open Ontologies，一个集成LLM、OWL推理和MCP协议的本体工程系统。核心发现：稳定1对1匹配是本体对齐质量的主导因素（OAEI Anatomy F1=0.832），且信号权重无关紧要；工具增强的MCP访问（F1=0.717）远超读取原始OWL文件（F1=0.323）甚至无文件（F1=0.431）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建一个开源、可复现的本体工程系统，探索LLM驱动的本体构建与形式化推理的结合方式，并系统性地研究本体对齐中不同因素（稳定匹配、信号权重、LLM访问模式）对性能的影响。

Method: 基于Rust实现开源本体工程系统，集成：1) LLM驱动的OWL本体构建；2) 形式化OWL推理；3) 通过Model Context Protocol进行本体对齐。在OAEI Anatomy和Conference两个基准上评估，进行消融实验（5种权重配置、有无稳定匹配），并对比三种LLM访问模式（原始OWL文件、无文件、结构化MCP工具）。

Result: 1) OAEI Anatomy：F1=0.832（P=0.963, R=0.733），精度超过所有现有系统；2) 消融：有稳定匹配时权重配置无关（F1波动<0.004），去掉稳定匹配F1降至0.728；3) Conference：F1=0.438；4) LLM访问模式：MCP工具F1=0.717 > 无文件F1=0.431 > 原始OWL文件F1=0.323。

Conclusion: 稳定1对1匹配是本体对齐质量的决定性因素，信号权重几乎不产生影响；LLM无法通过阅读原始OWL语法有效理解本体结构，而结构化工具访问（MCP）提供了质不同的能力提升。系统以单二进制MIT许可证开源发布。

Abstract: We present Open Ontologies, an open-source ontology engineering system implemented in Rust that integrates LLM-driven construction with formal OWL reasoning and ontology alignment via the Model Context Protocol. Our primary finding is that stable 1-to-1 matching is the dominant factor in ontology alignment quality: on the OAEI Anatomy track, it achieves F1 = 0.832 (P = 0.963, R = 0.733), competitive with state-of-the-art systems and exceeding all in precision. Ablation across five weight configurations shows that signal weights are irrelevant when stable matching is applied (F1 varies by less than 0.004), while removing stable matching drops F1 to 0.728. On the Conference track, the same method achieves F1 = 0.438. On tool-augmented ontology interaction, we find a surprising result: an LLM reading a raw OWL file (F1 = 0.323) performs worse than the same LLM with no file at all (F1 = 0.431), while structured MCP tool access achieves F1 = 0.717. This demonstrates that tool structure provides a qualitatively different mode of access that the LLM cannot replicate by reading raw syntax. The system ships as a single binary under the MIT licence.

</details>


### [788] [Agentic MIP Research: Accelerated Constraint Handler Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09186)
*Liding Xu,Yugeng Zhou,Sebastian Pokutta*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一个将LLM智能体嵌入开源MIP求解器SCIP的自动化研究框架，通过自动生成、验证和评估传播约束处理器，缩短混合整数规划（MIP）算法研究的反馈周期。该框架成功从MIPLIB 2017数据集中恢复全局约束结构，生成可执行代码，并发现新颖的传播策略，最终多解决了5个实例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MIP研究既数学复杂又工程繁琐——测试一个新算法假设需要在分支切割求解器中做大量的实现、调试、调参和大规模基准测试。现有流程反馈周期过长，亟需自动化框架加速这一过程。

Method: 提出一个基于LLM智能体的MIP研究框架，将智能体嵌入求解器感知的管道中，负责生成、验证和评估SCIP插件。具体实例化为：将MIP公式语义提升为全局约束，并自动构建纯传播的SCIP约束处理器。框架支持沙盒环境中的上下文学习，智能体可在真实实例上调试和调优，探索全局约束模式并发现新颖传播策略。

Result: 在MIPLIB 2017基准集上，框架成功恢复约束编程中的全局约束结构，生成可执行的约束检测器和纯传播约束处理器。新颖传播方法在探索的基准集中额外解决5个实例。框架能系统地区分有意义的算法改进与低价值或高成本的候选方案。

Conclusion: LLM智能体能自主导航复杂的MIP研究循环，为更自动化的求解器开发流程铺平道路，展示出自动化算法研究的可行性和潜力。

Abstract: Mixed-integer programming (MIP) research is both mathematically sophisticated and engineering-intensive: testing an algorithmic hypothesis within a branch-and-cut solver requires substantial implementation, debugging, tuning, and large-scale benchmarking. We propose an agentic MIP research framework that shortens this feedback loop by embedding LLM agents into a solver-aware harness for generating, verifying, and evaluating plugins for the open-source solver SCIP. Propagation methods play a central role in accelerating MIP solving by exploiting global constraints. We instantiate our framework on the semantic lifting of MIP formulations into global constraints and the automatic construction of propagation-only SCIP constraint handlers. On the MIPLIB 2017 benchmark set, the framework successfully recovers global constraint structures from constraint programming and generates executable constraint detectors and propagation-only constraint handlers. Furthermore, the framework naturally extends to in-context learning within a sandboxed environment, enabling agents not only to tune and debug generated constraint handlers on real instances, but also to explore global constraint patterns in MIP problems and discover novel propagation strategies not yet implemented in SCIP. This framework allows us to systematically distinguish meaningful algorithmic improvements from low-value or overly costly candidates: the novel propagation methods successfully solved five additional instances within the explored benchmark. Overall, this framework demonstrates that LLM agents can autonomously navigate the complex MIP research loop, paving the way for a more automated solver development process.

</details>


### [789] [Emergent Semantic Role Understanding in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09187)
*Carla Griffiths,Mirco Musolesi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究通过线性探针实验发现，语言模型在预训练阶段就已部分编码了语义角色信息（"谁对谁做了什么"），但不如微调后的模型完整；随着模型规模增大，语义角色的内部表征趋向分布式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究语义角色理解（语义角色理解）这一核心语义成分，究竟是仅通过预训练自然涌现，还是必须依赖任务特定的微调才能习得，从而理解语言模型从数据中真正学到了什么以及需要多少监督。

Method: 冻结仅解码器的Transformer模型，训练线性探针（linear probes）提取语义角色，通过探针性能推断角色信息是在预训练中已编码还是仅在微调阶段才被学习。

Result: 冻结表示中包含大量语义角色信息，性能随模型规模提升但未完全达到微调模型水平；语义角色结构在预训练中部分涌现，但随规模增大内部实现趋向分布式表征。

Conclusion: 语义角色结构可从语言建模目标中部分涌现，但微调仍能带来额外增益；随着模型规模增长，语义角色的内部编码方式从局部化向分布式转移。

Abstract: Understanding how linguistic structure emerges in language models is central to interpreting what these systems learn from data and how much supervision they truly require. In particular, semantic role understanding ("who did what to whom") is a core component of meaning representation, yet it remains unclear whether it arises from pre-training alone or depends on task-specific fine-tuning. We study whether semantic role understanding emerges during language model pre-training or requires task-specific fine-tuning. We freeze decoder-only transformers and train linear probes to extract semantic roles, using performance to infer whether role information is already encoded in pre-training or learned during adaptation. Across model scales, we find that frozen representations contain substantial semantic role information, with performance improving but not fully matching fine-tuned models. This indicates partial but incomplete emergence from pre-training alone. We show that semantic role structure emerges from language modeling objectives, but its internal implementation shifts toward more distributed representations as model scale increases.

</details>


### [790] [Evidence Over Plans: Online Trajectory Verification for Skill Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09192)
*Yang Zhou,Zihan Dong,Zhenting Wang,Can Jin,Shiyu Zhao,Bangwei Guo,Difei Gu,Linjun Zhang,Mu Zhou,Dimitris N. Metaxas*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出后验蒸馏指标(PDI)和SPARK框架，通过对环境交互轨迹的蒸馏生成高质量Agent技能，实验表明该方法在86个可执行任务上 consistently 优于无技能基线和人类编写的技能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Agent技能生成方法依赖偏好日志而非直接环境交互，导致技能质量难以保证，甚至带来负面收益。作者识别出根本问题是"时序瓶颈"：鲁棒技能应是后验的，从环境交互经验中蒸馏，而非基于先验计划。

Method: 提出后验蒸馏指标(PDI)作为轨迹级量化指标，衡量技能在任务环境中的证据基础；并设计SPARK框架，生成环境验证的轨迹用于计算PDI，将PDI作为在线诊断和干预信号确保后验技能形成。

Result: 在86个可执行任务上，SPARK生成的技能 consistently 超越无技能基线，并优于人类编写的技能；学生模型的推理成本比教师模型低1000倍。

Conclusion: PDI引导的蒸馏方法能够产生高效且可迁移的技能，这些技能深深植根于任务-环境的实际交互中，而非先验规划。

Abstract: Agent skills can remarkably improve task success rates by using human-written procedural documents, but their quality is difficult to assess without environment-grounded verification. Existing skill generation methods heavily rely on preference logs rather than direct environment interaction, often yielding negligible or even degraded gains. We identify that it is a fundamental timing bottleneck: robust skills should be posterior-based, distilled from empirical environment interaction rather than prior plans. In this study, we introduce the Posterior Distillation Index (PDI), a trajectory-level metric that quantifies how well a distilled skill is grounded in the task-environment evidence. To operationalize PDI, we present SPARK (Structured Pipelines for Autonomous Runnable tasKs and sKill generation) for preserving task execution evidence towards full trajectory-level analysis. SPARK generates environment-verified trajectories used to compute PDI, and it applies PDI as an online diagnostic and intervention signal to ensure posterior skill formation. Across 86 runnable tasks, SPARK-generated skills consistently surpass no-skill baselines and outperform human-written skills on student models (inference cost up to 1,000x cheaper than teacher models). These findings show that PDI-guided distillation produces efficient and transferable skills grounded in the task-environment interaction. We release our code at https://github.com/EtaYang10th/spark-skills .

</details>


### [791] [The Geometry of Forgetting: Temporal Knowledge Drift as an Independent Axis in LLM Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09195)
*Rania Elbadry,Ahmed Heakl,Fan Zhang,Dani Bouch,Yuxia Wang,Preslav Nakov,Zhuohan Xie*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现大语言模型中时间性漂移（训练后事实发生变化）在残差流中形成一个与正确性和不确定性正交的几何方向，现有方法无法检测，而线性探针可直接检测漂移（AUROC 0.83-0.95），熵等方法仅接近随机水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型会自信地产生过时答案，而现有方法无法检测这种时间性漂移。作者认为这不是工程问题，而是结构性问题——时间漂移与正确性、不确定性在几何上正交。

Method: 作者在六个指令微调模型上进行实验。训练线性探针直接预测漂移标签，并对比token熵、语义熵、CCS、SAPLMA等方法。通过权重余弦、分数相关性、双向零空间投影、迭代零空间投影、均值差解离五种测试验证几何正交性。还进行了跨截止时间实验和MLP检索电路力学分析。

Result: 线性探针AUROC达0.83-0.95，其他方法仅0.49-0.57（接近随机）。五种正交性测试均验证了漂移方向与正确性/不确定性正交（余弦≤0.14，相关性|r|≤0.20等）。MLP检索电路在过时回忆和捏造中产生相同动力学（r>0.81）。跨截止实验证实探针检测的是模型内部知识状态而非输入属性。

Conclusion: 时间漂移在模型中是一个独立于正确性和不确定性的结构性特征，现有基于置信度或不确定性的方法本质上无法检测。线性探针可以有效识别过时信息，揭示了训练数据时间边界对模型知识表征的根本影响。

Abstract: Large language models confidently produce outdated answers, and no existing method can detect them. We show this is not an engineering failure but a structural one: temporal drift, whether a stored fact has changed since training, is encoded as a direction in the residual stream geometrically orthogonal to both correctness and uncertainty. Any method operating on correctness or uncertainty signals is therefore blind to drift by construction. We verify this across six instruction-tuned models. A linear probe trained directly on drift labels achieves AUROC $0.83$--$0.95$; methods based on token entropy, semantic entropy, CCS, and SAPLMA all remain near chance ($0.49$--$0.57$). Five tests confirm the geometric orthogonality: weight cosines ($|\cos| \leq 0.14$), score correlations ($|r| \leq 0.20$), bidirectional null-space projection ($|Δ| \leq 0.008$), iterative null-space projection with $k{=}10$, and difference-of-means dissociation. Mechanistically, the MLP retrieval circuit produces identical dynamics for stale recall and confabulation ($r > 0.81$, six models), explaining why output confidence cannot separate them. A cross-cutoff experiment holds inputs constant and varies only the model: the probe fires on the model whose training predates the fact's transition and stays silent otherwise ($P(A{>}B) = 0.975$--$0.998$, twelve model pairs), confirming it reads model-internal knowledge state rather than input properties. Our code and datasets will be publicly released.

</details>


### [792] [Learning the Preferences of a Learning Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09217)
*Karim Abdel Sadek,Mark Bedaywi,Rhys Gould,Stuart Russell*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文形式化了从学习型智能体（非最优行为）中推断其偏好（奖励函数）的问题，针对无遗憾学习者和收敛到最优Boltzmann策略的学习者两种场景，提供了偏好学习算法的理论保证，并指出了某些情况下不可能得到保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的逆强化学习（IRL）假设人类行为近似最优，但在人类本身也在学习如何最优行动的情况下这一假设不成立。作者希望形式化地从正在学习中的智能体（其行为初始非最优）推断其偏好的问题。

Method: 将学习器建模为两种类型：无遗憾学习器（no-regret learner）和随时间收敛到最优Boltzmann策略的学习器。针对每种设置，分析偏好学习算法的理论保证，并说明哪些情况下保证不可能成立。

Result: 对于无遗憾学习器和收敛到最优Boltzmann策略的学习器，分别建立了偏好学习算法的理论保证，同时指出了在某些条件下无法获得理论保证的情况。

Conclusion: 本文扩展了IRL到学习型智能体的场景，提出了更符合实际的偏好推断框架，并提供了相应的理论分析。

Abstract: For AI systems to be useful to humans, they must understand and act in accordance with our values and preferences. Since specifying preferences is a hard task, inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) aims to develop methods that allow for inferring preferences from observed behavior. However, IRL assumes the human to be approximately optimal. This is a big limitation in cases where the human themselves may be learning to act optimally in an environment. In this paper, we formalize the problem of learning the preferences of a learning agent: a predictor observes a learner acting online and tries to infer the underlying reward function being (initially suboptimally) optimized by the learner. We model the learner as either being no-regret, or as converging to an optimal Boltzmann policy over time. In each of these settings, we establish theoretical guarantees for various preference learning algorithms, or otherwise show that such guarantees are impossible.

</details>


### [793] [How Much is Brain Data Worth for Machine Learning?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09243)
*Lane Lewis,Zhixin Wang,David Schwab,Xaq Pitkow*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过理论分析，提出一个线性高斯模型来量化神经数据对机器学习模型训练的数学价值，推导了脑数据与任务数据之间的“汇率”关系，并给出了在有限预算下是否值得收集脑数据的条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有NeuroAI研究表明神经数据可以提升模型性能，但缺乏理论解释何时以及多大程度上能从中获益，因此需要从数学上回答"测量大脑是否能帮助训练模型"这一根本问题。

Method: 构建一个可解析的线性高斯模型，将任务目标和神经记录统一建模，推导多模态估计器的标度律，并分析脑数据与任务样本之间的相对价值和交换率。

Result: 推导出脑样本与任务样本之间的"汇率"公式，该汇率取决于任务-脑对齐程度、噪声水平、潜在维度及脑样本量；分析了测试分布偏移下脑正则化学习如何通过习得不变性带来鲁棒性提升；给出了有限预算下收集脑数据的条件。

Conclusion: 从理论上建立了神经数据价值的量化框架，为理解脑数据如何帮助机器学习提供了理论基础，并给出了实际收集脑数据的决策依据。

Abstract: If a person can solve a task, can measuring their brain make it easier to train a model to solve that task too? Recent NeuroAI work suggests that supplementing task training with neural recordings can modestly improve model performance and robustness. However, it is unclear when there should be a benefit from using neural data and how much benefit to expect. We formulate this question mathematically, and begin to address it theoretically using a simple, analytically tractable linear gaussian model of task targets and neural recordings. For a multimodal estimator trained on both brain data and task labels, we derive scaling laws for how performance scales with the numbers of brain and task samples. From these laws we derive relative value and exchange rates between brain samples and task samples, quantifying how much extra task samples neural data is worth as a function of task-brain alignment, neural and task noise, latent dimension, and brain data sample size. We also analyze test distribution shift, to identify conditions where brain-regularized learning can produce substantial robustness gains through learned invariances. Finally, under a fixed collection budget, we characterize the regimes in which brain data is worth collecting. Our results provide a foundation for understanding how valuable brain data could be for improving machine learning.

</details>


### [794] [SeePhys Pro: Diagnosing Modality Transfer and Blind-Training Effects in Multimodal RLVR for Physics Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09266)
*Kun Xiang,Terry Jingchen Zhang,Zirong Liu,Bokai Zhou,Yueling Tang,Junjie Yu,Jiacong Lu,Shangrui Huang,Heng Li,Likui Zhang,Kunkun Liu,Changzheng Zhang,Yangle Fang,Boqiang Guo,Hui-Ling Zhen,Dandan Tu,Yinya Huang,Xiaodan Liang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SeePhys Pro是一个细粒度模态迁移基准，通过渐进将关键信息从文本转移到图像来测试模型推理鲁棒性。研究发现当前模型不是表示无关的推理者，视觉变量绑定是最关键瓶颈。盲训练（掩盖所有训练图像）仍能提升验证集性能，但可能源于残留文本和分布线索而非有效视觉证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准只评估单一输入形式，缺乏对模型在多模态间信息迁移时推理鲁棒性的系统评估。作者希望检验模型在关键信息从文本渐进转移到图像时能否保持相同的推理能力。

Method: 构建SeePhys Pro基准，每个问题有四种语义对齐但视觉元素逐步增加的变体。开发多模态RLVR训练语料库，采用盲训练（掩盖训练图像）作为诊断控制，并通过文本删除、图像掩码率和格式饱和控制等消融实验分析效果来源。

Result: 前沿模型性能随信息从语言转移到图表而平均下降；视觉变量绑定是最关键瓶颈。盲训练仍能提升未掩码验证集性能，但进一步分析表明这种提升来自残留文本和分布线索，而非有效视觉证据。

Conclusion: 评估多模态推理不仅要看最终答案准确率，还需要关注模态迁移下的鲁棒性，并通过诊断测试检验性能提升是否真正依赖任务关键的视觉证据。

Abstract: We introduce SeePhys Pro, a fine-grained modality transfer benchmark that studies whether models preserve the same reasoning capability when critical information is progressively transferred from text to image. Unlike standard vision-essential benchmarks that evaluate a single input form, SeePhys Pro features four semantically aligned variants for each problem with progressively increasing visual elements. Our evaluation shows that current frontier models are far from representation-invariant reasoners: performance degrades on average as information moves from language to diagrams, with visual variable grounding as the most critical bottleneck. Motivated by this inference-time fragility, we further develop large training corpora for multimodal RLVR and use blind training as a diagnostic control, finding that RL with all training images masked can still improve performance on unmasked validation sets. To analyze this effect, text-deletion, image-mask-rate, and format-saturation controls suggest that such gains can arise from residual textual and distributional cues rather than valid visual evidence. Our results highlight the need to evaluate multimodal reasoning not only by final-answer accuracy, but also by robustness under modality transfer and by diagnostics that test whether improvements rely on task-critical visual evidence.

</details>


### [795] [Shaping Schema via Language Representation as the Next Frontier for LLM Intelligence Expanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09271)
*Zhiqin Yang,Yuhan Liu,Jingwen Fu,Pei Fu anf Bo Han,Masashi Sugiyama,Nanning Zheng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文论证语言表征（language representation）的结构和符号复杂度直接影响LLM的知识激活与组织（即"图式"），提出通过设计高级语言表征来扩展LLM智能的观点，并通过综述现有实践和受控实验提供实证支持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然语言作为LLM的默认媒介存在表达能力瓶颈，限制了复杂问题的求解能力。单纯扩大模型规模（scaling）虽能内化更多知识，但无法保证知识被有效运用。因此需要探索如何通过语言表征设计来提升LLM的知识组织与激活能力。

Method: 1）形式化地定义了语言表征对LLM图式（schema）的影响机制；2）综述了近年来通过刻意设计语言表征（不改变模型参数或规模）取得性能提升的实证方法；3）开展了受控实验，证明同一任务使用不同语言表征时，LLM的性能和内部特征激活均存在显著差异。

Result: 现有实证表明精心设计的语言表征能带来显著性能增益；受控实验验证了不同语言表征会导致LLM性能差异以及内部神经元激活模式的差异。

Conclusion: 语言表征设计是一个有前景的研究方向，是超越单纯规模扩展、提升LLM智能的重要途径。

Abstract: Although natural language is the default medium for Large Language Models (LLMs), its limited expressive capacity creates a profound bottleneck for complex problem-solving. While recent advancements in AI have relied heavily on scaling, merely internalizing knowledge does not guarantee its effective application. Defining language representation as the linguistic and symbolic constructs used to map and model the real world, this paper argues that shaping schemas through advanced language representation is the next frontier for expanding LLM intelligence. We posit that an LLM's knowledge activation and organization -- its schema -- depends heavily on the structural and symbolic sophistication of the language used to represent a given task. This paper contributes both a formalization of this claim and the empirical evidence to support it. With a new formalization, we present multiple lines of evidence to support our position: Firstly, we review recent empirical practices and emerging methodologies that demonstrate the substantial performance gains achievable through deliberate language representation design, even without modifying model parameters or scale. Secondly, we conduct controlled experiments showing that LLM performance and its internal feature activations vary under different language representations of the same underlying task. Together, these findings highlight language representation design as a promising direction for future research.

</details>


### [796] [Towards Conversational Medical AI with Eyes, Ears and a Voice](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09272)
*Meet Shah,Jason Gusdorf,Anil Palepu,Chunjong Park,Jack W. O'Sullivan,Vishnu Ravi,Tim Strother,Pavel Dubov,Aliya Rysbek,Toshiyuki Fukuzawa,Yana Lunts,Jan Freyberg,Michael B. Chang,Aniruddh Raghu,David Stutz,Devora Berlowitz,Eliseo Papa,Taylan Cemgil,JD Velasquez,Jack Chen,Arthur Chen,Doug Fritz,Charlie Taylor,Katya Tregubova,Jing Rong Lim,Richard Green,Sara Mahdavi,Mahvish Nagda,Jihyeon Lee,Craig Schiff,Liviu Panait,Sukhdeep Singh,Valentin Liévin,David G. T. Barrett,Hannah Gladman,Anna Cupani,Francesca Pietra,Uchechi Okereke,Katherine Tong,Clemens Meyer,Erwan Rolland,Mili Sanwalka,Michael D. Howell,Shixiang Shane Gu,Bibo Xu,Euan A. Ashley,S. M. Ali Eslami,Gregory Wayne,Pushmeet Kohli,Vivek Natarajan,Adam Rodman,Alan Karthikesalingam,Ryutaro Tanno*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为AI co-clinician的对话式AI系统，利用Gemini的低延迟音视频处理能力，实时分析医患对话中的视听信息以辅助临床决策。该系统采用双智能体架构，在深度临床推理和低延迟对话之间取得平衡。通过模拟远程医疗的随机交叉实验（n=120次问诊），将其与初级保健医生、GPT-Realtime和基线系统进行比较。结果表明，AI co-clinician在管理方案和鉴别诊断等关键维度接近医生水平，全面优于GPT-Realtime，但在体格检查和疾病特异性推理方面仍有差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗实践不仅依赖语言交流，还涉及丰富的听觉和视觉线索（如患者表情、声音语气等）。现有的文本型AI无法捕捉这些真实诊疗中的关键信息，因此需要能够实时处理多模态数据（音视频流）的AI系统来辅助临床决策。

Method: 基于Gemini的低延迟音视频处理能力，构建双智能体架构（一个负责深度临床推理，一个负责低延迟对话响应）。设计了类似于远程医疗的视频界面，创建20个标准化的门诊场景（需主动进行实时视听推理），并制定了"TelePACES"评估标准。开展随机、界面盲法、交叉模拟研究：10名内科住院医师扮演患者，共进行120次问诊，对比AI co-clinician、初级保健医生（PCPs）、GPT-Realtime和基线系统。

Result: AI co-clinician在管理方案和鉴别诊断等关键TelePACES维度上接近PCPs水平；在全部通用标准上显著优于GPT-Realtime；在病例特异性分流指标上与PCPs持平；但在病例特异性综合评估中医生仍表现更优。在体格检查和疾病特异性推理方面AI仍有不足。

Conclusion: 纯文本方法无法捕捉医疗咨询的真实挑战。高风险的实时诊断AI最安全的发展方向是协同性三方模式——AI作为医生和患者的辅助性共同临床医生。

Abstract: The practice of medicine relies not only upon skillful dialogue but also on the nuanced exchange and interpretation of rich auditory and visual cues between doctors and patients. Building on the low-latency voice and video processing capabilities of Gemini, we introduce AI co-clinician, a first-of-its-kind conversational AI system utilizing continuous streams of audio-visual data from live patient conversations to inform real-time clinical decisions. Its dual-agent architecture balances deep clinical reasoning with the low latency required for natural dialogue. To assess this system, we implemented a video-based interface emulating telemedicine consultations. We crafted 20 standardized outpatient scenarios requiring proactive real-time auditory and visual reasoning and designed "TelePACES" evaluation criteria alongside case-specific rubrics. In a randomized, interface-blinded, crossover simulation study (n = 120 encounters) with 10 internal medicine residents as patient actors, we compared AI co-clinician with primary care physicians (PCPs), GPT-Realtime, and a baseline agent. AI co-clinician approached PCPs in key TelePACES dimensions, including management plans and differential diagnosis, while significantly outperforming GPT-Realtime across all general criteria. While our agent demonstrated parity with PCPs in case-specific triage measures, physicians maintained superior overall performance in case-specific assessments. Although AI co-clinician marks a significant advance in real-time telemedical AI, gaps remain in physical examination and disease-specific reasoning. Our work shows that text-only approaches fail to capture the true challenges of medical consultation and suggests that high-stakes real-time diagnostic AI is most safely advanced in collaborative, triadic models where AI can be a supportive co-clinician for doctors and patients.

</details>


### [797] [EquiMem: Calibrating Shared Memory in Multi-Agent Debate via Game-Theoretic Equilibrium](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09278)
*Yuqiao Meng,Sakshi Sunil Narvekar,Luoxi Tang,Rupali Rajendra Vaje,Yingxue Zhang,Muchao Ye,Zhaohan Xi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出EquiMem，一种基于零信任记忆博弈均衡的推理时校准机制，用于防御多智能体辩论系统中共享记忆被污染的问题，无需额外LLM判断，在多种设置下均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体辩论系统依赖共享记忆支持长程推理，但单一被污染的记忆条目会扩散污染下游推理，而辩论本身无法过滤这类错误。现有基于启发式或LLM验证的方法共享相同的失败模式，且忽视了多智能体辩论中的跨智能体动态。

Method: 将记忆更新建模为零信任记忆博弈，其中假设无任何智能体可信，以博弈均衡作为最优记忆信任的指示器；提出EquiMem推理时校准机制，利用智能体已有的检索查询和遍历路径作为证据，算法化地量化每个更新条目，无需LLM判断；同时适配嵌入式和基于图的记忆系统。

Result: 在多种基准、多智能体辩论框架和记忆架构下，EquiMem持续优于现有防御方法，在对抗性智能体攻击下保持鲁棒性，且推理开销可忽略不计。

Conclusion: 将记忆信任问题形式化为博弈均衡求解，为多智能体系统的记忆安全提供了理论基础，且EquiMem在实用性和效率上均表现出色。

Abstract: Multi-agent debate (MAD) systems increasingly rely on shared memory to support long-horizon reasoning, but this convenience opens a critical vulnerability: a single corrupted entry can contaminate the downstream memory-augmented reasoning, and debate alone fails to filter such errors. Existing safeguards filter entries via heuristics or LLM-based validation, yet they rely on AI judgments that share the same failure modes and overlook the cross-agent dynamics of MAD. We address this gap by formulating memory updating in MAD as a zero-trust memory game, in which no agent is assumed honest and the game's equilibrium serves as an indicator of optimal memory trust. Guided by this equilibrium, we propose EquiMem, an inference-time calibration mechanism that quantifies each update algorithmically against the shared memory state, using agents' existing retrieval queries and traversal paths as evidence rather than soliciting any LLM judgment. EquiMem instantiates calibration for both embedding- and graph-based memory, and across diverse benchmarks, MAD frameworks, and memory architectures, it consistently outperforms existing safeguards, remains robust under adversarial agents, and incurs negligible inference overhead.

</details>


### [798] [A Prompt-Aware Structuring Framework for Reliable Reuse of AI-Generated Content in the Agentic Web](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09283)
*Shusaku Egami,Masahiro Hamasaki*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种框架，可在AI生成内容（AIGC）生成时自动附加结构化元数据（包括提示词、上下文、思考过程、模型信息、超参数和置信度），并结合可验证凭证，以支持AIGC的可靠性评估和合规复用，从而应对从人类中心网络向“代理网络”转变过程中的可信度挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM和AI代理的快速发展，网络正向“代理网络”转变，AIGC将成为主要内容形式。但当前缺乏机制让代理在生成时验证AIGC的可靠性、可复现性和许可证合规性，这种透明度缺失可能导致链式幻觉和合规违规。

Method: 该框架在AIGC生成时自动附加结构化元数据，包含模块化提示词、上下文、思考过程、模型信息、超参数和置信度等关键信息，并将元数据与可验证凭证打包封装，以支持可靠评估和复用。

Result: 实现了对结构化AIGC的高效管理，并促进其在微调、知识蒸馏等应用中的安全使用。

Conclusion: 该框架为AI代理生态中AIGC的可信生成与安全复用提供了关键基础设施，有助于构建更透明、可靠的代理网络。

Abstract: The evolution of Large Language Models (LLMs) and the software agents built on them (AI agents) marks a turning point in the transition from a human-centric Web to an ``Agentic Web'' driven by AI agents. However, for AI-Generated Content (AIGC), which is expected to dominate the Web, there is currently no mechanism for agents to verify its reliability, reproducibility, or license compliance during generation. This lack of transparency risks causing chained hallucinations and compliance violations through the reuse of AIGC. Consequently, a framework to manage the provenance and generation conditions of AIGC is essential. In this paper, we present a framework that automatically attaches structured metadata to AIGC at generation time, including modularized prompts, contexts, thoughts, model information, hyperparameters, and confidence. The metadata is enveloped together with verifiable credentials to support the reliable assessment and reuse of AIGC. This framework enables efficient curation of structured AIGC and facilitates its safe use for applications such as fine-tuning and knowledge distillation.

</details>


### [799] [PiCA: Pivot-Based Credit Assignment for Search Agentic Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09287)
*Dongyi Liu,Yifan Niu,Qinwen Wang,Han Xiao,Jia Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出PiCA，一种基于PBRS的步骤奖励机制，通过识别轨迹中的关键步骤（枢轴步骤）提供密集、可感知轨迹的奖励信号，解决RL训练搜索智能体时的奖励稀疏、孤立信用和分布偏移问题，在7个知识密集型QA基准上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于RL的LLM搜索智能体在长程信用分配上存在三大挑战：奖励稀疏（仅有结果反馈，缺乏步骤级指导）、孤立信用（步骤间独立分配信用，忽视序列依赖）和分布偏移（奖励基于偏离模型生成分布的模板估计）。

Method: 提出PiCA，基于势能塑造奖励（PBRS）将搜索轨迹中累积的搜索进度定义为过程奖励。识别历史轨迹中构成黄金子查询和子答案的枢轴步骤作为信息峰值，从而提供密集、感知轨迹且保持分布一致性的步骤级奖励。

Result: 在7个知识密集型QA基准上，3B和7B模型分别提升15.2%和2.2%，且在不同模型上表现出一致的性能提升。

Conclusion: PiCA通过枢轴感知的步骤级奖励有效解决了长程搜索中的信用分配问题，展现出良好的泛化能力，代码已开源。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM)-based search agents trained with reinforcement learning (RL) have significantly improved the performance of knowledge-intensive tasks. However, existing methods encounter critical challenges in long-horizon credit assignment: (i) Reward Sparsity, where models receive only outcome feedback without step-level guidance to differentiate action quality; (ii) Isolated Credit, where credit is assigned to steps independently, failing to capture sequential dependencies; and (iii) Distributional Shift, where rewards are estimated on templates that deviate from the model's natural generative distribution. To address these issues, we propose Pivot-Based Credit Assignment (PiCA), a novel step reward mechanism that reformulates the search trajectory as a sequential process of cumulative search progress. Unlike prior isolated step rewards, PiCA defines process rewards as success probabilities dependent on the historical context based on Potential-Based Reward Shaping (PBRS). This approach identifies pivot steps, which comprise target golden sub-queries and sub-answers derived from historical trajectories, as information peaks that significantly boost the likelihood of a correct final answer. By anchoring these step rewards to the final task objective, PiCA provides dense, pivot-aware and trajectory-dependent guidance while maintaining distributional consistency. Extensive experiments show that PiCA outperforms existing strong baselines across seven knowledge-intensive QA benchmarks, achieving 15.2% and 2.2% improvements for 3B and 7B models. The consistent performance gains across various models show PiCA's robust generalization. The code is available at https://github.com/novdream/PiCA.

</details>


### [800] [How LLMs Are Persuaded: A Few Attention Heads, Rerouted](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09314)
*Xiangkun Sun,Lingkai Kong,Aoqi Zhang,Liang Zeng,Tonghan Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文揭示了语言模型在说服性输入下产生事实错误的内在机制：少量中层注意力头通过将答案选项编码到低维多面体顶点上，说服会引发从正确答案顶点到说服目标顶点的离散跳跃，而非模糊信念或降低置信度。决策头并非推理证据，而是复制注意力选择的令牌。说服通过重定向注意力实现，研究分离出一个秩一证据路由特征控制此过程，直接修改该特征可操纵模型选择，移除则可阻止说服。该特征可追溯至浅层注意力头从输入中的说服性关键词构建而来。该机制在多个开源LLM和现实投毒场景（如生成式引擎优化）中普遍存在。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言模型在说服性输入下容易放弃事实知识，这是AI安全的核心问题，但其内部机制尚不清楚。理解这一机制对于构建更安全的AI系统至关重要。

Method: 通过因果干预和机械可解释性方法，识别出决定模型答案的关键注意力头，分析其编码方式，追踪说服如何改变注意力路由，并定位控制证据路由的秩一特征。

Result: 发现说服导致离散的潜在状态跳变而非信念模糊；决策头通过复制注意力选中的令牌而非推理证据来工作；分离出可干预的证据路由特征；识别出构建该特征的浅层注意力头带。

Conclusion: 说服是一种狭窄、可监控的回路，可以通过干预特定特征来阻止。该机制在多个开源LLM和现实场景中普遍存在，为AI安全提供了具体的可操作方向。

Abstract: Language models can be persuaded to abandon factual knowledge. This vulnerability is central to AI safety, but its internal mechanism remains poorly understood. We uncover a compact causal mechanism for persuasion-induced factual errors. A small set of mid-layer attention heads almost entirely determines the model's answer. These heads write answer options into a low-dimensional polyhedron, with options occupying distinct vertices. Persuasion does not blur belief or merely reduce confidence; it causes a discrete latent jump from the correct-answer vertex to the persuasion-target vertex. We show that decision heads are not reasoning over evidence. Instead, they copy whichever option token their attention selects. Persuasion works by redirecting attention. We isolate a rank-one evidence-routing feature that controls the route. Directly modifying this feature steers the model's choice, and removing it blocks persuasion. We then trace the feature back to a band of shallower attention heads that build it from persuasive keywords in the input. Every step is validated by intervention. This mechanism appears across open-source LLMs and realistic poisoning scenarios such as Generative Engine Optimization, revealing persuasion as a narrow, monitorable circuit.

</details>


### [801] [Do Self-Evolving Agents Forget? Capability Degradation and Preservation in Lifelong LLM Agent Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09315)
*Ye Yu,Xiaopeng Yuan,Haibo Jin,Heming Liu,Yaoning Yu,Haohan Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现LLM智能体在自我进化过程中（工作流、技能、模型、记忆四维度）会出现能力退化现象，并提出CPE方法通过约束破坏性能力漂移来保持已学能力，实验证明该方法能有效提升稳定性而不牺牲适应性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体虽能自主优化工作流、积累技能、自我训练模型和维护持久记忆，但研究发现这种自我进化往往是非单调的——适应新任务分布会逐步损害先前获得的能力。作者旨在识别并提出解决方案应对这一能力侵蚀问题。

Method: 提出Capability-Preserving Evolution (CPE)，一种通用的稳定化原则，在持续适应过程中约束破坏性能力漂移。该方法应用于工作流、技能、模型、记忆四个进化维度。

Result: 在四个进化维度上，CPE一致地提升了保留能力的稳定性同时保持适应性能。以工作流进化为例，CPE将GPT-5.1优化下的简单任务保留性能从41.8%提升至52.8%，同时实现了更强的复杂任务适应能力。

Conclusion: 稳定的长周期自进化智能体不仅需要获取新能力，还需要在持续适应过程中显式保留先前学到的能力。

Abstract: Recent advances in LLM agents enable systems that autonomously refine workflows, accumulate reusable skills, self-train their underlying models, and maintain persistent memory. However, we show that such self-evolution is often non-monotonic: adapting to new task distributions can progressively degrade previously acquired capabilities across all major evolution channels.
  We identify this phenomenon as \emph{capability erosion under self-evolution} and show that it consistently emerges across workflow, skill, model, and memory evolution. To mitigate this issue, we propose \emph{Capability-Preserving Evolution} (CPE), a general stabilization principle that constrains destructive capability drift during continual adaptation. Across all four evolution dimensions, CPE consistently improves retained capability stability while preserving adaptation performance. For example, in workflow evolution, CPE improves retained simple-task performance from 41.8\% to 52.8\% under GPT-5.1 optimization while simultaneously achieving stronger complex-task adaptation.
  Our findings suggest that stable long-horizon self-evolving agents require not only acquiring new capabilities, but also explicitly preserving previously learned ones during continual adaptation.

</details>


### [802] [SKG-VLA: Scene Knowledge Graph Priors for Structured Scene Semantics and Multimodal Reasoning for Decision Making](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09343)
*Zeyu Li,Lei Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出SKG-VLA框架，通过场景知识图谱(Scene Knowledge Graph)统一建模投诉系统中的多模态异构证据，结合数据合成管道和三阶段训练策略，显著提升投诉决策的准确性、长尾泛化能力和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有投诉理解系统大多对孤立模态进行浅层分类或模板匹配，未能充分利用显式的场景结构、规则知识和跨证据依赖关系，导致决策能力受限。

Method: (1) 构建场景知识图谱(SKG)，将投诉实体、证据项、政策条款、时序事件、交易状态和行动关系组织为统一图结构；(2) 设计数据合成管道，生成场景描述、图泛化、问答监督和决策推荐；(3) 采用三阶段训练策略：领域自适应预训练、任务导向指令微调、端到端多模态对齐。

Result: SKG-VLA在策略推理、投诉决策准确性、长尾样本泛化和证据不完整情况下的鲁棒性方面均取得一致性提升。

Conclusion: 将结构化场景先验注入多模态决策模型，能有效增强复杂投诉处理系统的推理能力与可靠性。

Abstract: Decision making in large-scale complaint handling systems increasingly relies on heterogeneous evidence, including complaint narratives, screenshots, order metadata, historical interactions, and platform policies. Existing complaint understanding systems mainly perform shallow classification or template matching over isolated modalities, while underutilizing explicit scene structure, rule knowledge, and cross-evidence dependencies. To address this limitation, we present SKG-VLA for multimodal complaint decision making. The core idea is to model each case as a structured complaint scene and represent its decision-relevant semantics with a \emph{Scene Knowledge Graph} (SKG), which organizes complaint entities, evidence items, policy clauses, temporal events, transactional states, and action-relevant relations into a unified graph. Based on SKG, we build a data synthesis pipeline that generates complaint scene descriptions, rule-consistent graph generalizations, question-answer supervision, and decision recommendations. We further construct a large-scale complaint scene dataset with both text-only and multimodal in-domain benchmarks. Finally, we adopt a three-stage training strategy -- domain-adaptive pre-training, task-oriented instruction fine-tuning, and end-to-end multimodal alignment -- to inject structured scene priors into a multimodal decision model. Experiments show that SKG-VLA consistently improves policy-grounded reasoning, complaint decision accuracy, long-tail generalization, and robustness under incomplete evidence.

</details>


### [803] [Dsat: A Native SAT Solver for Discrete Logic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09347)
*Yaofang Zhang,Ken Zhou,Adnan Darwiche*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个原生支持离散变量的SAT求解器，直接扩展了布尔逻辑，避免了传统二值化方法的计算和语义问题，并通过实验证明了其优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离散变量在概率推理、规划、可解释AI等领域广泛存在，传统方法需将离散变量二值化为布尔变量以使用SAT求解器，但这种方法存在计算效率低和语义表达受限的问题，因此需要开发原生支持离散变量的SAT求解器。

Method: 设计了一个原生离散逻辑SAT求解器，直接扩展布尔逻辑，变量可取任意离散值。求解器借鉴布尔SAT求解器的设计思路，包含单元传播和子句学习等核心组件，但这些组件原生地操作离散变量。

Result: 通过实验将提出的离散SAT求解器与CSP求解器（应用于离散CNF）、布尔SAT求解器（应用于二值化CNF）以及混合求解器进行对比，验证了其优势。

Conclusion: 原生离散SAT求解器相较于二值化方法及CSP求解器具有更好的性能表现，为解决离散变量问题提供了新的有效途径。

Abstract: Discrete variables are common in many applications, such as probabilistic reasoning, planning and explainable AI. When symbolic reasoning techniques are brought in to bear on these applications, a standard technique for handling discrete variables is to binarize them into Boolean variables to allow the use of Boolean computational machinery such as SAT solvers. This technique can face both computational and semantical challenges though. In this work, we develop a native SAT solver for discrete logic, which is a direct extension of Boolean logic in which variables can take arbitrary values. Our proposed solver has a similar design to Boolean SAT solvers, with ingredients such as unit resolution and clause learning but ones that operate natively on discrete variables. We illustrate the merits of the developed SAT solver by comparing it empirically to CSP solvers applied to discrete CNFs, to Boolean SAT solver applied to binarized CNFs, and to some hybrid solvers.

</details>


### [804] [CHAINTRIX: A multi-pipeline LLM-augmented framework for automated smart-contract security auditing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09350)
*Gabriela Dobrita,Simona-Vasilica Oprea,Adela Bara*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Chaintrix是一个端到端智能合约审计框架，通过将LLM生成的每项声明与确定性结构化合约表示（CCIM）进行对照验证，结合12个确定性信号引擎、并行LLM审计流水线和多阶段误报过滤（包括符号执行和模糊测试），在EVMbench基准上实现了71.7%的高危漏洞召回率，比最强前沿模型基线高出26个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能合约漏洞已造成数十亿美元损失，但审计成本高、速度慢。现有自动化工具各有缺陷：静态分析器误报率高，LLM会生成与源代码矛盾的幻觉发现。因此需要一种能将LLM的灵活性与确定性分析的可验证性结合的审计框架。

Method: 提出跨合约交互模型（CCIM）将Solidity解析为函数级读/写/修饰符/跨合约调用的结构化映射，作为12个确定性信号引擎和并行LLM审计流水线的共同基础。采用多阶段误报过滤流水线，最终通过结构化裁决引擎（SVE）对解析代码施加确定性结构检查，并对高置信度发现进一步进行符号执行和模糊测试验证。

Result: 在EVMbench基准上检测出120个高危漏洞中的86个（71.7%召回率），其中25次审计达到100%召回率，比最强前沿模型基线高出26个百分点。

Conclusion: Chaintrix通过将LLM生成声明与确定性结构表示强制对照验证的核心架构，有效克服了纯LLM方法的幻觉问题和静态分析的高误报率，显著提升了智能合约安全审计的准确性和可靠性。

Abstract: Smart-contract exploits have caused billions of USD in cumulative losses, yet audits remain expensive and slow. Automated tools have emerged to close this gap, but each class has a characteristic failure mode. Static analyzers report findings that frequently fail manual triage at high rates, while large language models (LLMs) hallucinate findings that contradict the source code. Thus, we propose Chaintrix, an end-to-end auditing framework whose central architectural commitment is that every LLM-generated claim must be discharged against a deterministic structural contract representation. We introduce a Cross-Contract Interaction Model (CCIM) that parses Solidity into a structured map of function-level reads, writes, modifiers and resolved cross-contract calls. CCIM serves as the substrate against which all 12 of Chaintrix's deterministic signal engines and the parallel LLM audit pipelines operate. A staged false-positive-reduction pipeline, terminating in a Structural Verdict Engine (SVE) that applies deterministic structural checks against parsed code, filters the merged finding set, with selected high-confidence findings further validated through symbolic execution and fuzz testing. We evaluate Chaintrix on EVMbench, the smart-contract security benchmark by OpenAI, Paradigm, OtterSec. Chaintrix detects 86 of 120 high-severity vulnerabilities (71.7% recall), with 25 audits scoring 100% recall, placing Chaintrix 26 percentage points above the strongest frontier-model baseline.

</details>


### [805] [The Wittgensteinian Representation Hypothesis: Is Language the Attractor of Multimodal Convergence?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09352)
*Zhaoyang Zhang,Run Shao,Dongyue Wu,Jiajie Teng,Chao Tao,Jingdong Chen,Haifeng Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出定向收敛分析（cycle-kNN），发现非语言模态（点云、视觉）的表示会向语言模态的邻域结构收敛，而非反之，且这种不对称性源于语言表示的特征密度更高，信息瓶颈理论解释了语言作为多模态表示收敛的吸引子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究仅使用对称相似性度量检测多模态表示收敛，无法判断收敛方向，因此作者旨在揭示跨模态表示收敛的方向性及其根本原因。

Method: 提出cycle-kNN非对称对齐度量，对点云、视觉、语言等多种独立训练的单模态模型进行定向收敛分析，并结合信息瓶颈理论进行机制解释。

Result: 发现非语言模态向语言模态的邻域结构显著靠近，而反向则不成立；特征密度不对称性是方向性的根源；信息瓶颈框架提供了理论解释。

Conclusion: 提出"维特根斯坦表示假说"：语言的语义结构是多模态表示收敛的渐近吸引子。

Abstract: Understanding why independently trained neural networks from different modalities converge toward shared representations, and where this convergence leads, remains an open question in representation learning. All existing evidence relies on symmetric similarity measures, which can detect convergence but are structurally blind to its direction. We introduce directional convergence analysis using cycle-kNN, an asymmetric alignment measure, applied across dozens of independently trained unimodal models spanning point clouds, vision, and language. We uncover a consistent directional asymmetry: non-language modalities move toward the neighborhood structure of language significantly more than the reverse, and this pattern holds across all model families and scales--yet is entirely invisible to symmetric measures. Mechanistic analysis traces the directionality to feature density asymmetry, whereby language representations occupy the most compact regions of representational space. The Information Bottleneck framework provides a principled interpretation: optimization under compression drives representations toward discrete, compositional structures characteristic of language. We formalize this as the Wittgensteinian Representation Hypothesis: the semantic structure of language is the asymptotic attractor of multimodal representation convergence.

</details>


### [806] [Position: Avoid Overstretching LLMs for every Enterprise Task](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09365)
*Kuldeep Singh,Anson Bastos,Isaiah Onando Mulang'*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文主张企业级AI系统应将语言模型作为接口而非核心引擎，通过外部化知识与计算到专用组件中，实现更高的可靠性、可扩展性和可维护性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将LLM作为单一引擎或蒸馏为小模型存在效率低、不可靠、与企业任务结构不匹配的问题，有限容量模型无法完全捕获企业任务所需的知识广度。

Method: 提出模块化架构：语言模型仅用于确定性企业工作流中的结构化提取，计算与存储委托给知识库和符号化程序。

Result: 理论证明有限容量模型存在固有效率和可解释性极限，模块化架构比单体框架更可靠、更可维护。

Conclusion: 模块化架构为企业任务提供了可持续的基础，语言模型应作为接口而非引擎使用。

Abstract: Enterprise workloads are dominated by deterministic, structured, and knowledge-dependent tasks operating under strict cost, latency, and reliability constraints. While these are often addressed through large language model (LLM) deployment or distillation into smaller models, we argue this is inefficient, unreliable, and misaligned with enterprise task structures. Instead, AI systems should treat language models as interfaces rather than monolithic engines, externalizing knowledge and computation into dedicated components for greater reliability, scalability, and transparency. Our theoretical evidences show that finite-capacity models cannot fully capture the breadth of knowledge required for enterprise tasks, creating inherent limits to efficiency and interpretability. Building on this, we take the position that language models should primarily be used for structured extraction in deterministic enterprise workflows, while computation and storage are delegated to knowledge bases and symbolic procedures. We formally demonstrate that such modular architectures are more reliable and maintainable than monolithic frameworks, offering a sustainable foundation for enterprise tasks.

</details>


### [807] [Towards a Virtual Neuroscientist: Autonomous Neuroimaging Analysis via Multi-Agent Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09366)
*Keqi Han,Songlin Zhao,Yao Su,Lifang He,Carl Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: NIAgent是一个多智能体系统，采用代码中心执行范式和分层验证框架，实现神经影像数据的自动化端到端分析，在ADHD-200和ADNI数据集上优于传统工作流基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统神经影像分析工作流（如fMRIPrep）虽提高了鲁棒性和效率，但缺乏闭环自适应能力，无法像人类研究者那样推理下游目标、权衡策略并在中间证据与后续决策之间形成反馈循环，导致领域专家陷入手动试错循环，严重限制了临床生物标志物开发的可扩展性。

Method: 提出NIAgent多智能体系统：(1) 采用代码中心执行范式，专家智能体协作合成并优化可执行程序；(2) 提出分层验证框架，结合队列级指标筛选与智能体视觉检查，实现自主质量控制。

Result: 在ADHD-200和ADNI数据集上，NIAgent在预测性能上优于标准工作流基线，并展现出策略探索和自适应优化等高级智能体行为。

Conclusion: 代码中心的多智能体协作与分层验证机制能够有效弥补传统静态工作流的不足，实现动态闭环的神经影像分析，为临床生物标志物开发提供可扩展的自动化方案。

Abstract: Transforming neuroimaging data into clinically actionable biomarkers is a knowledge-intensive and labor-intensive process. Standardized workflows such as fMRIPrep have improved robustness and efficiency, but they are statically configured and cannot reason about downstream objectives, deliberate over alternative strategies, or close the loop between intermediate evidence and subsequent decisions in the way a human researcher would. This lack of closed-loop adaptation often leaves domain experts trapped in a cycle of manual trial-and-error to tune parameters and remediate pipeline failures, severely constraining the scalability of clinical biomarker development. To bridge this gap, we introduce NIAgent, a multi-agent system for autonomous end-to-end neuroimaging analysis. Unlike conventional flat tool-calling agents, NIAgent adopts a code-centric execution paradigm where specialist agents collaboratively synthesize and optimize executable programs over composable domain-specific primitives. This design enables robust, long-horizon workflow construction that adapts dynamically to runtime observations. Furthermore, we propose a hierarchical verification framework for autonomous quality control, integrating cohort-level metric screening with agentic visual inspection to drive evidence-grounded workflow remediation. Experiments on ADHD-200 and ADNI demonstrate that NIAgent outperforms standard workflow-based baselines in predictive performance while exhibiting sophisticated agentic behaviors, including strategy exploration and adaptive refinement.

</details>


### [808] [Explainable Knowledge Tracing via Probabilistic Embeddings and Pattern-based Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09369)
*Siyu Wu,Cong Xu,Wei Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出PLKT框架，用Beta分布概率嵌入替代确定性向量，通过显式逻辑推理实现可解释的知识追踪，在提升预测准确性的同时保持高可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习知识追踪模型虽然预测精度高，但依赖确定性向量嵌入和不透明的潜在状态转换，缺乏关于具体历史行为如何影响预测的可解释性。

Method: 采用Beta分布概率嵌入表示学生知识状态，构建基于目标的证据推理过程，通过显式逻辑操作（如交集运算）透明的推理路径来揭示历史交互对预测的贡献。

Result: 在大量实验中，PLKT不仅优于最先进的知识追踪方法，同时实现了优越的可解释性。

Conclusion: 概率逻辑驱动的知识追踪框架能够同时兼顾预测精度与可解释性，为揭示学习行为与知识状态之间的因果关系提供了新思路。

Abstract: Knowledge Tracing (KT) models students' knowledge states based on learning interactions to predict performance. While deep learning-based KT models have boosted predictive accuracy, most models rely on deterministic vector embeddings and opaque latent state transitions, limiting interpretability regarding how specific past behaviors influence predictions. To address this limitation, we propose Probabilistic Logical Knowledge Tracing (PLKT), an interpretable KT framework that formulates prediction as a goal-conditioned evidence reasoning process over historical learning behaviors. Instead of representing knowledge states as deterministic vector embeddings, PLKT employs robust Beta-distributed probabilistic embeddings to represent student knowledge states. This probabilistic foundation allows us to model the uncertainty of historical behaviors and perform explicit logical operations (e.g., conjunction), constructing transparent reasoning paths that reveal how specific past interactions contribute to the prediction. Extensive experiments show that PLKT outperforms state-of-the-art KT methods while achieving superior interpretability. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PLKT-D3CE/.

</details>


### [809] [NEXUS: Continual Learning of Symbolic Constraints for Safe and Robust Embodied Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09387)
*Tiehan Cui,Peipei Liu,Yanxu Mao,Congying Liu,Mingzhe Xing,Datao You*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: NEXUS是一个模块化框架，通过符号落地与知识演化，将LLM的概率不确定性转化为物理世界所需的确定性安全约束，在SafeAgentBench上实现了高任务成功率与强安全防御能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在具身智能中存在概率不确定性与物理世界严格确定性、可验证安全性之间的根本性鸿沟。

Method: 提出NEXUS模块化框架，将物理可行性与安全规范解耦：通过闭环执行反馈提升能力，将概率风险评估落地为确定性硬约束，构建事前防御机制。

Result: 在SafeAgentBench上实现了更高的任务成功率，有效拒绝不安全指令，具备对抗攻击鲁棒性，并通过知识积累逐步提升规划效率。

Conclusion: NEXUS通过符号落地与知识演化弥合了LLM概率性与物理世界确定性之间的鸿沟，为具身智能体的持续学习与安全决策提供了有效方案。

Abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have catalyzed progress in embodied intelligence, a fundamental gap between their inherent probabilistic uncertainty and the strict determinism and verifiable safety required in the physical world. To mitigate this gap, this paper introduces NEXUS, a modular framework designed for continual learning in embodied agents. Different from prior works that treat symbolic artifacts merely as static interfaces, NEXUS leverages them for symbolic grounding and knowledge evolution. The framework explicitly decouples physical feasibility from safety specifications: capability of agents is improved through closed-loop execution feedback, while probabilistic risk assessments are grounded into deterministic hard constraints to establish a rigorous pre-action defense. Experiments on SafeAgentBench demonstrate that NEXUS achieves superior task success rates while effectively refusing unsafe instructions, exhibiting robust defense against adversarial attacks, and progressively improving planning efficiency through knowledge accumulation.

</details>


### [810] [Do Linear Probes Generalize Better in Persona Coordinates?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09391)
*Prasad Mahadik,Adrians Skapars*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出利用对比人格提示构建人格轴，通过对人格特定向量进行无监督PCA得到的主成分能有效分离有害/无害行为，基于人格主成分投影训练的探针比基于原始激活训练的探针具有更好的跨数据集泛化能力，为构建更可迁移的行为探针提供了有用归纳偏置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言模型交互中的有害行为监控日益必要，但纯文本监控不足（模型会策略性欺骗和沙袋化）。白盒探针虽可直接读取模型内部，但在分布偏移下容易失效，需要更鲁棒的低维子空间来捕获有害行为。

Method: 借鉴Assistant Axis和Persona Selection Model，使用对比人格提示构建欺骗和谄媚的人格轴。通过无监督PCA对人格特定向量进行主成分分析，获得分离有害/无害人格的主成分方向，基于这些主成分投影训练可迁移的线性探针。

Result: 在10个评估数据集上，人格派生方向具有非平凡的可迁移性；基于人格主成分投影训练的探针泛化能力优于基于原始激活训练的探针；统一的多有害/无害行为轴进一步改善了跨行为和跨数据集的泛化。

Conclusion: 人格向量为构建更可迁移的行为探针提供了有用的归纳偏置，有助于实现更鲁棒的语言模型有害行为监控。

Abstract: It is becoming increasingly necessary to have monitors check for harmful behaviors during language model interactions, but text-only monitoring has not been sufficient. This is because models sometimes exhibit strategic deception and sandbagging, changing their behavior during evaluation. This motivates the use of white-box monitors like linear probes, which can read the model internals directly. Currently, such probes can fail under distribution shift, limiting their usefulness in real settings. We study whether there exists a low-dimensional subspace of the model internals that captures harmful behaviors more robustly, while leaving out spuriously correlative features. Inspired by the Assistant Axis and Persona Selection Model, we construct persona axes for deception and sycophancy using contrastive persona prompts. The first principal components, obtained by unsupervised PCA of the persona-specific vectors, cleanly separate harmful and harmless personas. Across 10 evaluation datasets, we show that persona-derived directions transfer non-trivially and probes trained on persona-PC projections generalize better than probes trained on raw activations. We also find that a unified axis consisting of multiple harmful and harmless behaviors improves generalization across behaviors and datasets. Overall, persona vectors provide a useful inductive bias for building more transferable behavior probes.

</details>


### [811] [Empowering VLMs for Few-Shot Multimodal Time Series Classification via Tailored Agentic Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09395)
*Lin Li,Jiawei Huang,Qihao Quan,Dan Li,Boxin Li,Xiao Zhang,Erli Meng,Wenjie Feng,Jian Lou,See-Kiong Ng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出首个面向少样本多模态时间序列分类的VLM智能体推理框架MarsTSC，通过自进化知识库和三角色协作（生成器、反射器、修改器）实现迭代推理优化，并引入测试时更新策略缓解少样本偏差，在12个基准数据集上取得显著性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在少样本多模态时间序列分类中面临知识库上下文崩溃、推理错误难以诊断、分布偏移等问题，缺乏可解释的推理机制。

Method: 提出MarsTSC框架：1）生成器负责可靠分类推理；2）反射器诊断推理错误根因，提取被忽略的时序判别特征；3）修改器验证后更新知识库防止上下文崩溃；4）测试时更新策略持续精炼知识库以缓解少样本偏差和分布偏移。

Result: 在12个主流时间序列基准数据集上，使用6种VLM骨干网络均取得显著且一致的性能提升，超越经典方法和基于基础模型的时间序列基线，同时生成人类可读的分类决策解释。

Conclusion: MarsTSC通过智能体协作推理与自进化知识库，有效解决了少样本多模态时间序列分类中的核心挑战，兼具高性能与可解释性。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose the first VL$\underline{\textbf{M}}$ $\underline{\textbf{a}}$gentic $\underline{\textbf{r}}$easoning framework for few-$\underline{\textbf{s}}$hot multimodal $\underline{\textbf{T}}$ime $\underline{\textbf{S}}$eries $\underline{\textbf{C}}$lassification ($\textbf{MarsTSC}$), which introduces a self-evolving knowledge bank as a dynamic context iteratively refined via reflective agentic reasoning. The framework comprises three collaborative roles: i) Generator conducts reliable classification via reasoning; ii) Reflector diagnoses the root causes of reasoning errors to yield discriminative insights targeting the temporal features overlooked by Generator; iii) Modifier applies verified updates to the knowledge bank to prevent context collapse. We further introduce a test-time update strategy to enable cautious, continuous knowledge bank refinement to mitigate few-shot bias and distribution shift. Extensive experiments across 12 mainstream time series benchmarks demonstrate that $\textbf{MarsTSC}$ delivers substantial and consistent performance gains across 6 VLM backbones, outperforming both classical and foundation model-based time series baselines under few-shot conditions, while producing interpretable rationales that ground each classification decision in human-readable feature evidence.

</details>


### [812] [Strategic commitments shape collective cybersecurity under AI inequality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09415)
*Adeela Bashir,Zia Ush Shamszaman,Zhao Song,The Anh Han*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文研究了AI差异化获取对网络安全的影响，发现当高性能防御成本高时，群体倾向于低成本弱防御。引入AI防御工具的差异化获取后，一小部分坚定采用强防御的"承诺者"虽能提升强防御普及率，但成本问题仍无法稳定安全结果。通过针对性补贴消除承诺者的成本劣势，能够显著提升强防御采纳率、抑制攻击并增强系统韧性。模拟和福利分析验证了补贴策略优于仅靠承诺机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI防御工具获取不均导致资源有限的防御者难以采用有效保护，形成持续的系统漏洞，需要研究如何在高成本条件下稳定网络安全状态。

Method: 采用有限群体演化博弈模型，引入AI防御工具的差异化获取机制、承诺者（始终采用强防御的小群体）以及针对性补贴策略，并通过大规模参数空间模拟和社会福利分析进行评估。

Result: 补贴承诺者能显著提高强防御采纳率、抑制成功攻击、增强系统整体韧性；社会福利分析显示补贴改善了防御者结果并限制了攻击者收益。

Conclusion: 对关键防御者的针对性支持是稳定AI驱动环境下网络安全的有效机制，为网络安全政策、AI治理与防御AI能力战略分配提供了理论桥梁。

Abstract: The growing integration of AI into cybersecurity is reshaping the balance between attackers and defenders. When access to advanced AI-enabled defence tools is uneven, resource-limited defenders may be unable to adopt effective protection, creating persistent system vulnerabilities. We study the impact of differential AI access using an evolutionary game-theoretic model in a finite population. We first show that when high-capability defence is costly, the population is driven toward low-cost, weak-defence behaviour, sustaining attacks and weakening long-run security. To address this problem, we introduce differential access to AI defence tools by allowing defenders to choose between low- and high-capability protection based on their resources. We then examine the role of a small group of committed defenders who always adopt strong defence and influence others through social learning. Although commitment increases the prevalence of strong defence, it alone cannot stabilise secure outcomes due to high defence costs. We therefore incorporate a targeted subsidy to remove the cost disadvantage from committed defenders. Our analysis shows that subsidised commitment significantly increases strong defence adoption, suppresses successful attacks, and improves overall system resilience.
