Unlike trace-distillation, the meta-skill refines only after deploying the learnt skill, such that the learning signal comes from failures another agent encounters while using it -- not from exploratory traces alone. Refinement iterations are governed by a fresh-agent overfit audit that catches possible leakage as well as deployed-skill-specific failures, including the silent-bypass mode in which a skill appears valid in content but is never invoked at runtime. On $83$ SkillsBench tasks spanning $15^{+}$ domains, SkillEvolver reaches $56.8\%$ accuracy versus $43.6\%$ for curated human skills and $29.9\%$ for the no-skill baseline; on three GPU kernel optimization tasks from KernelBench, it also raises mean speedup from $1.16$ to $1.51$ on average.

</details>


### [885] [SLASH the Sink: Sharpening Structural Attention Inside LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10503)
*Yiming Liu,Bin Lu,Xinbing Wang,Chenghu Zhou,Meng Jin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现LLM在处理图结构时，内部注意力机制会自发重建图拓扑（呈现"锯齿"模式），但这一理解被注意力汇聚现象稀释。作者提出无需训练的方法Slash，通过注意力重新分配来放大这种内在结构理解，在纯图任务和分子预测上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖外部图适配器或微调，成本高且泛化性差。作者希望探索LLM内部机制，以低成本的训练无关方式提升LLM对图结构的理解能力。

Method: 提出Slash（Structure-aware Attention SHarpening），一种即插即用的注意力重新分配方法，通过锐化注意力分布来放大LLM内部自发形成的结构理解（即注意力图中的"锯齿"模式），无需额外训练。

Result: 在纯图推理任务和分子预测任务上，Slash在多种不同的LLM架构上均取得显著且一致的性能提升，验证了方法的有效性和通用性。

Conclusion: LLM内部已具备一定的图拓扑理解能力（被注意力汇聚稀释），通过训练无关的注意力锐化即可有效释放这一能力，为高效提升LLM的结构推理提供了新思路。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) show remarkable semantic understanding but often struggle with structural understanding when processing graph topologies in a serialized format. Existing solutions rely on training external graph-based adapters or fine-tuning, which incur high costs and lost generalizability. In this work, we investigate the internal mechanisms of LLMs and present a critical finding: LLMs spontaneously reconstruct the graph's topology internally, evidenced by a distinct "sawtooth" pattern in their attention maps that structurally aligns with the "token-level adjacency matrix". However, this intrinsic structural understanding is diluted by the attention sink. We theoretically formalize this dilution as a representation bottleneck, stemming from a fundamental conflict: the model's anisotropic bias, essential for language tasks, suppresses the topology-aware local aggregation required for graph reasoning. To address this, we propose a training-free solution, named StructuraL Attention SHarpening (Slash), which amplifies this internal structural understanding via a plug-and-play attention redistribution. Experiments on pure graph tasks and molecular prediction validate Slash delivers significant and consistent performance gains across diverse LLMs.

</details>


### [886] [Consistency as a Testable Property: Statistical Methods to Evaluate AI Agent Reliability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10516)
*Harsh Raj,Niranjan Orkat,Suvrorup Mukherjee,Aritra Guha,Cheryl Flynn,Subhabrata Majumdar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文建立了一套AI智能体可靠性的严谨度量科学框架，通过U-统计量和基于核的轨迹稳定性指标，量化语义保持扰动下的一致性，并区分了核心能力与执行鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI智能体评估主要依赖pass@1等传统指标，缺乏对语义扰动下行为一致性的系统度量，无法有效诊断智能体在高风险场景下的可靠性问题。

Method: 提出基于U-统计量的输出级可靠性度量与基于核方法的轨迹级稳定性度量，区分核心能力与执行鲁棒性，通过三项agentic基准实验验证。

Result: 轨迹级一致性指标相比传统pass@1率具有更高的诊断灵敏度；微小的任务级变化会导致智能体策略完全崩溃，即使其具备完成任务所需的知识。

Conclusion: 该框架提供了定位智能体行为偏差的数学工具，有助于识别和修复阻碍智能体在现实高风险环境中部署的架构问题。

Abstract: This paper establishes a rigorous measurement science for AI agent reliability, providing a foundational framework for quantifying consistency under semantically preserving perturbations. By leveraging $U$-statistics for output-level reliability and kernel-based metrics for trajectory-level stability, we offer a principled approach to evaluating agents across diverse operating conditions. Our proposal highlights the important distinction between the core capability and execution robustness of an agent, showing that minor task-level variations can induce complete strategy breakdowns despite the agent possessing the requisite knowledge for the task. We validate our framework through extensive experiments on three agentic benchmarks, demonstrating that trajectory-level consistency metrics provide far greater diagnostic sensitivity than traditional pass@1 rates. By providing the mathematical tools to isolate where and why agents deviate, we enable the identification and rectification of architectural concerns that hinder the deployment of agents in high-stakes, real-world environments.

</details>


### [887] [PrimeKG-CL: A Continual Graph Learning Benchmark on Evolving Biomedical Knowledge Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10529)
*Yousef A. Radwan,Yao Li,Qing Qing,Ziqi Xu,Xingtong Yu,Jiaxing Huang,Renqiang Luo,Xikun Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PrimeKG-CL，一个基于真实生物医学知识图谱（9个权威数据库，129K+节点，810万+边）的持续图学习基准，包含两个真实时间快照（2021年6月 vs 2023年7月）、10个实体类型分组任务，系统评估了6种持续学习策略×4种知识图谱嵌入解码器，发现解码器与策略存在强交互作用，现有方法在规模和真实性上存在明显不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有持续图学习研究几乎完全基于静态通用知识图谱的合成随机分割，无法复现真实生物医学知识图谱所经历的异步、结构化演化过程（上游本体独立更新，每次发布增加数百万边、废弃数十万边）。亟需一个能反映真实演化动态的基准。

Method: 构建PrimeKG-CL基准：从9个生物医学数据库采两个真实时间快照（2021.6 vs 2023.7），划分10个实体类型分组任务，提供多模态节点特征和持久/新增/废弃三重测试分层。在关系预测、实体分类、KGQA三个任务上评估6种CL策略×4种KGE解码器，以及LLM-RAG和CMKL等先进方法。

Result: 解码器选择与持续学习策略存在强交互作用，无单一策略通吃所有解码器；仅DistMult在持久知识和废弃知识间有清晰区分，RotatE则无此效应；多模态特征使实体级任务提升高达60%；主流增量方法IncDE在5.67M三元组任务上消耗350GB RAM仍失败。

Conclusion: 真实生物医学KG的持续学习需要专门基准，标准评估指标混淆了知识保留与遗忘失败；解码器-策略匹配至关重要；多模态特征价值显著；现有方法在规模上存在严重可扩展性问题。

Abstract: Biomedical knowledge graphs underwrite drug repurposing and clinical decision support, yet the upstream ontologies they depend on update on independent cycles that add millions of edges and deprecate hundreds of thousands more between releases. Yet existing continual graph learning has been studied almost exclusively on synthetic random splits of static, generic KGs, a regime that cannot reproduce the asynchronous, structured evolution real biomedical KGs undergo. To this end, we introduce PrimeKG-CL, a CGL benchmark built from nine authoritative biomedical databases (129K+ nodes, 8.1M+ edges, 10 node types, 30 relation types) with two genuine temporal snapshots (June 2021, July 2023; 5.83M edges added, 889K removed, 7.21M persistent), 10 entity-type-grouped tasks, multimodal node features, and a per-task persistent/added/removed test stratification. On three tasks (biomedical relationship prediction, entity classification, KGQA), we evaluate six CL strategies across four KGE decoders, plus LKGE, an LLM-RAG agent, and CMKL. We find that decoder choice and continual learning strategy interact strongly: no single strategy performs best across all decoders, and mismatched combinations can significantly degrade performance. Moreover, only DistMult exhibits a clear separation between persistent and deprecated knowledge, indicating that standard metrics conflate retention of still-valid facts with failure to forget outdated ones; this effect is absent under RotatE. In addition, multimodal features improve entity-level tasks by up to 60%, and a recent CKGE framework (IncDE) failed to scale to our 5.67M-triple base task across five attempts up to 350GB RAM. Data, pipeline, baselines, and the stratified split are released openly. Dataset:huggingface.co/datasets/yradwan147/PrimeKGCL|Code:github.com/yradwan147/primekg-cl-neurips2026

</details>


### [888] [A Reflective Storytelling Agent for Older Adults: Integrating Argumentation Schemes and Argument Mining in LLM-Based Personalised Narratives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10531)
*Jayalakshmi Baskar,Vera C. Kaelin,Kaan Kilic,Helena Lindgren*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究开发了一个结合知识图谱、用户建模、论证理论和论证挖掘的反思性讲故事代理，用于为老年人提供健康导向的数字伴侣叙事互动，并通过两阶段评估（11名专家参与设计和55名老年人评估）验证了论证挖掘作为LLM叙事生成中正式依据与人类评价之间反思性检查机制的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究基于知识驱动的大语言模型叙事能否支持老年人与数字伴侣进行有目的的叙事互动，并解决LLM存在的幻觉和透明性有限等问题。

Method: 开发反思性讲故事代理（融合知识图谱、用户建模、论证理论和论证挖掘）；两阶段研究：第一阶段采用参与式设计，11名领域专家进行形成性评估并迭代优化；第二阶段55名老年人评估基于人设的叙事，系统同时计算幻觉风险指标。

Result: 参与者约三分之二的叙事中识别出个人相关目的，其中约一半能识别出基于论证的目的。文化可识别性强烈影响使用意愿，轻微不一致性在叙事易懂且具有个人相关性时被容忍。高幻觉风险指标与感知不一致性正相关，高论证质量指标与高清晰度和有意义性正相关。

Conclusion: 论证挖掘可作为健康导向LLM叙事中连接正式依据信号与人类评价的反思性检查机制。

Abstract: This work investigates whether knowledge-driven large language model (LLM)-based storytelling can support purposeful narrative interaction with a digital companion for older adults. To address known limitations of LLMs, including hallucinations and limited transparency, we present a reflective storytelling agent integrating knowledge graphs, user modelling, argumentation theory, and argument mining to guide and inspect narrative generation.
  The study consisted of two phases. Phase I employed participatory design involving 11 domain experts in a formative evaluation that informed iterative refinement. The resulting system generates narratives grounded in structured user models representing health-promoting activities and motivations. Phase II involved 55 older adults evaluating persona-based narratives across four prompts and two creativity levels. Participants assessed perceived purpose, usefulness, cultural relatability, and inconsistencies. The system additionally computed hallucination-risk indicators to evaluate generated narratives.
  Participants recognised personally relevant purposes in roughly two thirds of narratives, while argument-based purposes were identified in around half of these cases. Cultural recognisability strongly influenced willingness to use the functionality, whereas minor inconsistencies were often tolerated when narratives remained understandable and personally relevant. Narratives with higher hallucination-risk indicators were more often perceived as inconsistent, while higher argument-quality indicators tended to co-occur with higher clarity and meaningfulness ratings.
  Overall, the study positions argument mining as a reflective inspection mechanism for comparing formal grounding signals with human evaluations in health-oriented LLM storytelling for older adults.

</details>


### [889] [Bridging Sequence and Graph Structure for Epigenetic Age Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10541)
*Yao Li,Xikun Zhang,Xiaotao Shen,Sonika Tyagi,Xin Zheng,Jiaxing Huang,Feng Xia*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种统一序列-图融合框架GraphAge-Seq用于表观遗传年龄预测，通过轻量级门控调制机制整合DNA序列统计特征与甲基化共甲基化图结构，在3,707个血液样本上实现MAE 3.149年，比最强图基线提升12.8%，并揭示了CpG密度和局部腺嘌呤频率等与年龄相关的重要特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表观遗传时钟方法（如惩罚线性回归、深度前馈网络、残差网络、图神经网络）均未能在统一框架中联合建模共甲基化图结构特征和位点特异性DNA序列上下文信息，存在方法空白。

Method: 提出GraphAge-Seq框架：（1）提取八维DNA序列统计特征（如CpG密度、局部碱基频率等）；（2）通过轻量级门控调制机制根据序列特征自适应缩放每个位点的甲基化信号；（3）结合图卷积网络建模共甲基化图结构进行年龄预测。

Result: 在3,707个血液甲基化样本上，测试MAE达3.149年，比最强图基线提升12.8%。手工设计的序列统计特征优于基于CNN的端到端序列编码。CpG密度和局部腺嘌呤频率表现出随年龄变化的重要性偏移。

Conclusion: 序列-图融合框架显著提升了表观遗传时钟的预测精度，手工序列特征在该数据规模下比学习型特征更有效，且模型具有良好的可解释性，能揭示与年龄相关甲基化机制一致的生物学特征。

Abstract: Epigenetic clocks based on DNA methylation have emerged as powerful tools for estimating biological age, with broad applications in aging research, age-related disease studies, and longevity science. Despite advances across machine learning approaches to epigenetic age prediction, spanning penalised linear regression, deep feedforward networks, residual architectures, and graph neural networks, no existing method jointly models co-methylation graph structure and site-specific DNA sequence context within a unified framework. We propose a unified sequence--graph integration framework for epigenetic age prediction that addresses this gap, integrating eight-dimensional DNA sequence statistical features through a lightweight gated modulation mechanism that adaptively scales each site's methylation signal according to its sequence-determined biological relevance prior to graph convolution. Evaluated on 3,707 blood methylation samples against a comprehensive set of baselines, our method achieves a test MAE of 3.149 years, a 12.8\% improvement over the strongest graph-based baseline. Biologically informed statistical features outperform CNN-based sequence encoding, demonstrating that handcrafted sequence features are more effective than end-to-end learned representations in this data regime. Post-hoc interpretability analysis identifies CpG density and local adenine frequency as features with age-dependent importance shifts, consistent with known mechanisms of age-related hypermethylation at CpG-dense promoter regions. Our code is at https://github.com/yaoli2022/graphage-seq.

</details>


### [890] [Agent-First Tool API: A Semantic Interface Paradigm for Enterprise AI Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10555)
*Kai Pan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Agent-First Tool API范式，针对传统CRUD API与AI Agent之间的五大架构不匹配问题，设计了六动词语义协议、标准化工具契约和双层治理管线三个机制。在包含85个工具的生产SaaS平台上验证，任务成功率提升37.5%（88% vs 64%），人工干预减少72.7%，错误恢复能力提升5.8倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有API设计基于人类使用的CRUD范式（依赖精确ID、渲染型响应、单次交互等），与AI Agent自主式、探索性、需决策支持的工作模式存在根本性架构不匹配，导致Agent工具调用效率低下、错误率高、人工介入频繁。

Method: 提出Agent-First Tool API范式，包含三个核心机制：(1) Six-Verb Semantic Protocol — 工具交互分解为search/resolve/preview/execute/verify/recover六个语义阶段；(2) Normalized Tool Contract (NTC) — 提供置信度分数、证据链、建议下一步操作等结构化决策支持元数据；(3) 双层治理管线 — 静态能力策略与动态风险升级相结合。

Result: 在包含85个工具、6个业务领域的生产SaaS平台上进行50个真实运营任务对比实验：Agent-First API端到端任务成功率达88%（CRUD基线为64%，+37.5%），人工干预减少72.7%，自主错误恢复能力提升5.8倍。

Conclusion: Agent-First Tool API范式与MCP等传输层标准正交互补，可作为现有工具发现和调用协议之上的语义应用层。该范式有效解决了AI Agent在工具使用中的架构不匹配问题，显著提升了任务成功率、自主性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: As AI agents transition from research prototypes to enterprise production systems, the tool interfaces they consume remain rooted in human-oriented CRUD paradigms. This paper identifies five fundamental architectural mismatches between conventional APIs and autonomous agent requirements: exact-identifier dependence, rendering-oriented responses, single-shot interaction assumptions, user-equivalent authorization, and opaque error semantics. We propose the Agent-First Tool API paradigm, comprising three integrated mechanisms: (1) a Six-Verb Semantic Protocol that decomposes tool interactions into search, resolve, preview, execute, verify, and recover phases; (2) a Normalized Tool Contract (NTC) providing structured decision-support metadata including confidence scores, evidence chains, and suggested next actions; and (3) a dual-layer governance pipeline combining static capability policies with dynamic risk escalation. The paradigm is implemented and validated in a production multi-tenant SaaS platform serving 85 registered tools across 6 business domains. Comparative experiments on 50 real operational tasks demonstrate that Agent-First APIs achieve 88% end-to-end task success rate versus 64% for optimized CRUD baselines (+37.5%), while reducing required human interventions by 72.7% and improving autonomous error recovery by 5.8x. We establish that the paradigm is orthogonal and complementary to transport-layer standards such as MCP, operating as the semantic application layer above existing tool discovery and invocation protocols.

</details>


### [891] [Deep Arguing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10569)
*Adam Gould,Francesca Toni*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Deep Arguing，一种将深度学习与论证构建相结合的神经符号方法，通过端到端训练让神经网络构建论证结构（数据点支持或攻击分类标签），实现可解释分类，在表格和图像数据集上取得与基线模型竞争的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习模型虽性能优越，但因其大量参数、特征提取与任务目标紧密耦合且缺乏显式推理机制，人类难以理解其预测过程，需要提升可解释性。

Method: 提出Deep Arguing框架，让深度神经网络构建论证图结构，其中数据点支持其被分配的标签并攻击其他标签；使用可微分的论证语义进行推理，实现端到端联合学习特征表示与论证交互；通过图结构约束指导学习过程。

Result: 在表格数据和图像数据集上的实验表明，Deep Arguing在性能上与标准基线模型相当，同时能够提供可解释的基于案例的论证推理。

Conclusion: Deep Arguing成功融合了深度学习的表示能力和符号论证的可解释性，在保持预测性能的同时提供了忠实的案例级解释，为可解释AI提供了新范式。

Abstract: Deep learning has become the dominant approach for creating high capacity, scalable models across diverse data modalities. However, because these models rely on a large number of learned parameters, tightly couple feature extraction with task objectives, and often lack explicit reasoning mechanisms, it is difficult for humans to understand how they arrive at their predictions. Understanding what representations emerge and why they arise from the training data remains an open challenge. We introduce Deep Arguing, a novel neurosymbolic approach that integrates deep learning with argumentation construction and reasoning for interpretable classification with different data modalities. In our approach deep neural networks construct an argumentation structure wherein data points support their assigned label and attack different ones. Using differentiable argumentation semantics for reasoning, the model is trained end-to-end to jointly learn feature representation and argumentative interactions. This results in argumentation structures providing faithful case-based explanations for predictions. Structure constraints over the argumentation graph guide learning, improving both interpretability and predictive performance. Experiments with tabular and imaging datasets show that Deep Arguing achieves performance competitive with standard baselines whilst offering interpretable argumentative reasoning.

</details>


### [892] [LLM Jaggedness Unlocks Scientific Creativity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10574)
*Shray Mathur,J. Anibal Boscoboinik,Esther H. R. Tsai,Kevin G. Yager*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过SciAidanBench基准测试评估LLM的科学创造力，发现AI能力增长存在"锯齿状"特征（跨任务/模型内/领域间不均衡），并提出通过推理时计算、知识池化和头脑风暴构建元模型集成来利用这种锯齿状特性以提升科学创造力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI模型的能力并非均匀提升，而是呈现"锯齿状"发展模式——不同任务、领域和模型规模上的能力增长不均衡。现有研究缺乏对这种动态锯齿性在科学创造力方面的系统量化分析，因此作者构建了专门评估LLM科学创造力的基准。

Method: 构建SciAidanBench基准，包含开放式科学问题，要求模型生成尽可能多独特且连贯的想法，以有效回答数量衡量创造力。评估19个基础模型（8个提供商的30个变体），从跨任务、提示级、领域级三个维度分析锯齿性，并探索推理时计算、知识池化和头脑风暴三种集成机制。

Result: 1）跨任务：通用创造力提升不能均匀迁移到科学创造力；2）提示级：强模型表现不稳定，创造力呈爆发式波动；3）领域级：单个模型在不同科学子领域能力不均衡。通过元模型集成可超越任何单一模型。

Conclusion: AI发展的锯齿状并非缺陷，而是可被利用的结构性特征，通过理解并有效组合模型可以放大LLM驱动的科学创造力。

Abstract: As artificial intelligence advances, models are not improving uniformly. Instead, progress unfolds in a jagged fashion, with capabilities growing unevenly across tasks, domains, and model scales. In this work, we examine this dynamic jaggedness through the lens of scientific idea generation. We introduce SciAidanBench, a benchmark of open-ended scientific questions designed to measure the scientific creativity of large language models (LLMs). Given a scientific question, models are asked to generate as many unique and coherent ideas as possible, with the total number of valid responses serving as a proxy for creative potential. Evaluating 19 base models across 8 providers (30 total variants including reasoning versions), we find that jaggedness manifests both across models and within models. First, in a cross-task comparison between general and scientific creativity, improvements in general creativity do not translate uniformly to scientific creativity, revealing divergent capability profiles across models. Second, at the prompt level, stronger models do not improve uniformly; instead, they exhibit high variability, with bursts of creativity on some questions and limited performance on others. Third, at the domain level, individual models display uneven strengths across scientific subfields, reflecting fragmented internal capability profiles. Finally, we show that this jaggedness can be harnessed. We explore mechanisms of inference-time compute, knowledge pooling, and brainstorming to combine models effectively and construct meta-model ensembles that outperform any single model. Our results position jaggedness not as a limitation, but as a resource, a structural feature of AI progress that, when understood and leveraged, can amplify LLM-driven scientific creativity.

</details>


### [893] [A Resilient Solution for Sewer Overflow Monitoring across Cloud and Edge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10592)
*Vipin Singh,Tianheng Ling,Peter Ghaly,Felix Grimmeisen,Gregor Schiele,Felix Biessmann*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个结合云端与边缘端深度学习预测方法的Web演示系统，用于监测下水道溢流池的填充动态，帮助历史城市应对极端降雨引发的合流制下水道溢流问题，并具备网络中断下的弹性运行能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 历史城区老化的合流制下水道系统在极端降雨事件下日益承压，合流制下水道溢流（CSO）会造成严重的环境和公共健康影响，因此需要能够预测溢流池填充动态的方法，以便提前预警并采取预防措施。

Method: 开发了一个基于Web的交互式监测仪表板（https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de），集成了云端与边缘端的深度学习预测方法，用于实时监测溢流池的填充动态，并具备网络中断下的弹性容错能力。

Result: 成功构建了可运行的Web演示系统，并提供了视频展示（https://cloud.bht-berlin.de/index.php/s/b9xt4T3SdiLBiFZ），该系统能够在网络中断时仍保持监测功能，实现了弹性溢流监测。

Conclusion: 该演示系统展示了深度学习与边缘-云协同架构在CSO预测中的可行性与实用性，为历史城市应对极端天气引发的下水道溢流问题提供了技术支撑。

Abstract: Aging combined sewer systems in many historical cities are increasingly stressed by extreme rainfall events, which can trigger combined sewer overflows (CSO) with significant environmental and public health impacts. Forecasting the filling dynamics of overflow basins is critical for anticipating capacity exceedance and enabling timely preventive actions for CSO. We present a web-based demonstrator (https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de) that integrates Deep Learning forecasting methods in both cloud and edge settings into an interactive monitoring dashboard for overflow monitoring, resilient to network outages. A video showcase is available online (https://cloud.bht-berlin.de/index.php/s/b9xt4T3SdiLBiFZ).

</details>


### [894] [LLARS: Enabling Domain Expert & Developer Collaboration for LLM Prompting, Generation and Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10593)
*Philipp Steigerwald,Mara Stieler,Jennifer Burghardt,Eric Rudolph,Jens Albrecht*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: LLARS是一个开源平台，集成了协同提示工程、批量生成和混合评估三大模块，帮助领域专家和开发者共同构建基于LLM的系统，已通过在线咨询领域的专家访谈验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 弥合领域专家与开发者之间在构建LLM系统时的协作鸿沟，提供一个一体化平台降低跨学科协作门槛。

Method: 提出一个端到端开源平台LLARS，包含三个紧密集成的模块：协同提示工程（实时协作、版本控制、即时测试）、批量生成（可配置的多提示×多模型×多数据输出、成本控制）、混合评估（人类与LLM联合评估、一致性指标和溯源分析）。

Result: 通过对在线咨询领域的六位领域专家和三位开发者的访谈，证实LLARS直观易用，能将所有功能集中在一处从而节省大量时间，并使跨学科协作变得无缝流畅。

Conclusion: LLARS作为一个一体化开源平台，有效地促进了领域专家与开发者之间的协作，提高了构建LLM系统的效率。

Abstract: We demonstrate LLARS (LLM Assisted Research System), an open-source platform that bridges the gap between domain experts and developers for building LLM-based systems. It integrates three tightly connected modules into an end-to-end pipeline: Collaborative Prompt Engineering for real-time co-authoring with version control and instant LLM testing, Batch Generation for configurable output production across user-selected prompts $\times$ models $\times$ data with cost control, and Hybrid Evaluation where human and LLM evaluators jointly assess outputs through diverse assessment methods, with live agreement metrics and provenance analysis to identify the best model-prompt combination for a given use case. New prompts and models are automatically available for batch generation and completed batches can be turned into evaluation scenarios with a single click. Interviews with six domain experts and three developers in online counselling confirmed that LLARS feels intuitive, saves considerable time by keeping everything in one place and makes interdisciplinary collaboration seamless.

</details>


### [895] [Budget-Efficient Automatic Algorithm Design via Code Graph](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10598)
*Maxime Bouscary,Manxi Wu,Saurabh Amin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于有向无环图（DAG）的算法表示和搜索框架，通过LLM生成细粒度修正算子（增/删/改代码块），实现预算高效的自动算法设计，在组合优化问题上优于传统全算法搜索方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM驱动的自动算法设计（AAD）方法效率低下：它们以完整算法为粒度，冗余重写重复子结构，并丢弃低适应度候选算法中可能包含的有价值特征。本文希望在有限计算预算下最大化算法的实际适应度。

Method: 将算法表示为有向无环图（DAG），利用LLM生成修正算子（添加、替换或删除代码块）来逐步修改图结构。每个修正都扩展了图，新算法由先前修正的组合构成。基于这种结构进行修正级别的信用分配，指导后续查询。同时提供了搜索深度和广度之间理想平衡的理论分析。

Result: 在三个组合优化问题上，基于图的搜索方法在相同token预算下始终优于全算法搜索方法。实验还发现，丰富的上下文仅在LLM先验知识较浅时有帮助，否则可能反而降低性能。

Conclusion: 将算法分解为修正集合的图表示方法显著提升了AAD的预算效率，为在有限计算资源下利用LLM进行算法自动设计提供了新的有效范式。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful tools for automatic algorithm design (AAD). However, existing pipelines remain inefficient. They operate at the granularity of full algorithms, redundantly rewriting recurring substructures and discarding low-fitness candidates that may contain valuable algorithmic features. We formalize budget-efficient automatic algorithm design, wherein the search policy maximizes realized fitness subject to limited computational cost. We propose a directed acyclic graph representation of algorithms and build a search framework that fully exploits the LLM's output. Instead of querying the LLM for full algorithms, we use it to obtain corrections: compact operators that add, replace, or remove code blocks. Each correction augments the graph, yielding new algorithms that compose with prior corrections. This graph structure decomposes algorithms into sets of corrections, enabling correction-level credit assignment that informs subsequent queries. We complement this framework with theoretical insights into the ideal balance between search depth and breadth at different budget levels. We validate our method empirically on three combinatorial optimization problems, demonstrating consistent superiority of our graph-based search over full-algorithm search at equal token budget. Finally, our experiments suggest that rich contexts help only when the LLM's prior knowledge is shallow, and can hinder performance otherwise.

</details>


### [896] [The Open-Box Fallacy: Why AI Deployment Needs a Calibrated Verification Regime](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10601)
*Phongsakon Mark Konrad,Tim Lukas Adam,Ane Cathrine Holst Merrild,Riccardo Terrenzi,Rebecca De Rosa,Toygar Tanyel,Serkan Ayvaz*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文批判了在敏感领域（如医疗、信贷、就业、刑事司法）部署AI时过度依赖可解释性（mechanistic interpretability）的做法，主张应以“校准验证”（calibrated verification）作为授权标准，而非模型内部机制的解释。作者提出了“验证覆盖率”（Verification Coverage）作为报告标准，包含六个组件和最低组成规则，应作为模型卡、排行榜和监管披露中能力分数的补充指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI在敏感领域的部署常被认为不安全，除非模型内部机制可以被解释。这种做法导致了对机制可解释性的过度依赖，而机制可解释性本不适用于解决部署授权这一挑战。作者认为，授权标准应转向“校准验证”，因为：(1) 模型能力在不同任务间不均衡，授权必须针对特定用途而非整体模型；(2) 社会长期以来对不透明专业知识的治理（如证书、监控、追责、申诉、撤销）并不依赖机制层面的解释。

Method: 作者通过两个实证证据支撑论点：(1) 内部表征与输出修正之间存在53个百分点的差距，表明理解能力未必能转化为行动；(2) 一项范围综述发现，只有9.0%的FDA批准的AI/ML设备文档包含前瞻性的上市后监测研究。基于此，作者提出“验证覆盖率”（Verification Coverage）作为六组件的可报告标准，并附带最低组成规则，作为模型卡、排行榜和监管披露中能力分数旁的补充指标。

Result: 研究指出，理解模型内部机制与获得部署授权之间存在巨大鸿沟：内部表征与输出修正之间53个百分点的差距，以及仅9.0%的FDA批准AI/ML设备包含上市后监测研究，共同表明当前以可解释性为核心的授权范式存在根本性问题。

Conclusion: 作者呼吁从“可解释性作为授权门槛”转向“校准验证作为授权标准”，并提出验证覆盖率作为可操作、可报告的评估框架，以弥补当前AI部署治理中的关键缺口。

Abstract: AI deployment in sensitive domains such as health care, credit, employment, and criminal justice is often treated as unsafe to authorize until model internals can be explained. This often leads to an excessive reliance on mechanistic interpretability to address a deployment challenge beyond its intended scope. We argue that the gate should instead be calibrated verification: authorization should be domain-scoped, independently checkable, monitored after release, accountable, contestable, and revocable. The reason is twofold. First, model capability is uneven across nearby tasks, so authorization must attach to a specific use rather than to a model in general. Second, societies have long governed opaque expertise through credentials, monitoring, liability, appeal, and revocation rather than mechanism-level explanation. Recent evidence reinforces this distinction between mechanistic understanding and deployment authority: a 53-percentage-point gap between internal representations and output correction shows that understanding may not translate into action, while one scoping review found that only 9.0% of FDA-approved AI/ML device documents contained a prospective post-market surveillance study. We propose Verification Coverage, a six-component reportable standard with a minimum-composition rule, as the metric that should sit beside capability scores in model cards, leaderboards, and regulatory disclosures.

</details>


### [897] [PRISM: Generation-Time Detection and Mitigation of Secret Leakage in Multi-Agent LLM Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10614)
*Riya Tapwal,Abhishek Kumar,Carsten Maple*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PRISM，一种针对多智能体LLM系统中凭证泄露的实时防御方法。PRISM在解码每一步组合16种信号（词汇、结构、信息论、行为、上下文特征）进行风险评分，通过绿/黄/红三区实现逐token干预。核心发现在于凭证复现前会出现熵崩溃和logit集中等可测量的生成动态变化。在2000任务基准上，PRISM达到F1=0.832，精确率1.000，召回率0.712，零泄露率，大幅超越基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体LLM系统中存在传播放大现象——一个智能体访问的敏感信息通过共享上下文传播到下游输出，现有防御（基于提示的防护、静态模式匹配、LLM-as-judge过滤）均不适用于此场景，要么在生成后操作，要么依赖表面形式模式，要么增加大量延迟而不建模生成过程本身。

Method: PRISM将凭证泄露视为生成过程中的序列风险累积问题。每个解码步骤组合16种信号（词汇、结构、信息论、行为、上下文特征）计算校准风险评分，划分绿/黄/红三区实现逐token干预。核心洞察：凭证复现前出现熵崩溃和logit集中等可测量生成动态变化，结合文本结构线索（如标识符模式检测）提供早期预警。

Result: 在2000任务对抗基准（13攻击类别、3种压力水平、异构四智能体流水线）上，PRISM达F1=0.832（精确率1.000，召回率0.712），任务级泄露率0.0%，输出效用0.893。大幅优于最强基线Span Tagger（F1=0.719，泄露率15.0%）。

Conclusion: PRISM通过实时逐token风险建模有效解决了多智能体系统中的传播放大问题，在不牺牲输出效用的情况下实现了零泄露率，证明了生成动态特征（熵崩溃、logit集中）作为早期泄漏预警信号的有效性。

Abstract: Multi-agent LLM systems introduce a security risk in which sensitive information accessed by one agent can propagate through shared context and reappear in downstream outputs, even without explicit adversarial intent. We formalise this phenomenon as propagation amplification, where leakage risk increases across agent boundaries as sensitive content is repeatedly exposed to downstream generators. Existing defences, including prompt-based safeguards, static pattern matching, and LLM-as-judge filtering, are not designed for this setting: they either operate after generation, rely primarily on surface-form patterns, or add substantial latency without modelling the generation process itself. To resolve these issues, we propose PRISM, a real-time defence that treats credential leakage as a sequential risk accumulation problem during generation. At each decoding step, PRISM combines 16 signals spanning lexical, structural, information-theoretic, behavioural, and contextual features into a calibrated risk score, enabling per-token intervention through green, yellow, and red risk zones. Our central observation is that credential reproduction is often preceded by a measurable shift in generation dynamics, characterised by entropy collapse and increasing logit concentration. When combined with text-structural cues such as identifier-pattern detection, these temporal signals provide an early warning of leakage before a secret is fully reconstructed. Across a 2,000-task adversarial benchmark covering 13 attack categories and three pressure levels in a heterogeneous four-agent pipeline, PRISM achieves F1 = 0.832 with precision = 1.000 and recall = 0.712, while producing no observed leakage on our benchmark (0.0% task-level leak rate) and preserving output utility of 0.893. It substantially outperforms the strongest baseline, Span Tagger, which achieves F1 = 0.719 with a 15.0% task-level leak rate.

</details>


### [898] [Hierarchical Causal Abduction: A Foundation Framework for Explainable Model Predictive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10624)
*Ramesh Arvind Naagarajan,Zühal Wagner,Stefan Streif*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出分层因果溯因方法，融合物理知识图、KKT乘子和因果发现，为非线性MPC生成可解释控制决策，准确率比LIME提升53%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非线性MPC因动力学复杂、约束严格和数值优化过程不透明，导致操作人员难以理解控制决策，影响信任和实际部署。

Method: HCA方法结合三种证据源：(i)基于领域知识图谱的物理推理；(ii)KKT乘子的优化证据；(iii)PCMCI算法的时间因果发现。采用排序-验证流程生成解释。

Result: 在温室气候、建筑暖通、化工过程三个领域，HCA解释准确率0.478，比LIME(0.311)提升53%；经2-3天KKT阈值标定后准确率达0.88；消融实验显示移除任一组件准确率下降32-37%。

Conclusion: HCA无需领域调参即可跨域泛化，且方法可推广到其他基于预测的决策系统（如学习控制和轨迹规划），显著提升模型可解释性。

Abstract: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is widely used to operate safety-critical infrastructure by predicting future trajectories and optimizing control actions. However, nonlinear dynamics, hard safety constraints, and numerical optimization often render individual control moves opaque to human operators, undermining trust and hindering deployment. This paper presents Hierarchical Causal Abduction (HCA), which combines (i) physics-informed reasoning via domain knowledge graphs, (ii) optimization evidence from Karush--Kuhn--Tucker (KKT) multipliers, and (iii) temporal causal discovery via the PCMCI algorithm to generate faithful, human-interpretable explanations for control actions computed by nonlinear MPC. Across three diverse control applications (greenhouse climate, building HVAC, chemical process engineering) with expert validation, HCA improves explanation accuracy by 53\% over LIME (0.478 vs. 0.311) using a single set of cross-domain parameters without per-domain tuning; domain-specific KKT-threshold calibration over 2--3 days further increases accuracy to 0.88. Ablation studies confirm that each evidence source is essential, with 32--37\% accuracy degradation when any component is removed, and HCA's ranking-and-validation methodology generalizes beyond MPC to other prediction-based decision systems, including learning-based control and trajectory planning.

</details>


### [899] [Teacher-Aware Evolution of Heuristic Programs from Learned Optimization Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10634)
*Minyu Chen,Song Qin,Ling-I Wu,Jianxin Xue,Guoqiang Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一种教师感知的进化框架，利用独立训练的学习优化策略作为行为教师，通过查询其在候选启发式程序访问状态上的动作偏好来指导静态可执行启发式的进化搜索，在调度、路由和图优化任务上优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的自动启发式设计主要依赖延迟的端到端性能反馈，缺乏中间指导信号，导致搜索效率低。

Method: 不直接部署或模仿教师策略，而是查询教师对候选启发式程序所访问状态的动作偏好，将其作为局部行为反馈，结合任务性能共同指导进化搜索。

Result: 在调度、路由和图优化基准测试上，所提方法优于性能驱动的LLM启发式进化基线，且部署时无需神经网络推理。

Conclusion: 学习到的优化策略可以被重新用作行为反馈源，用于自动启发式发现，而无需在部署时保留神经网络。

Abstract: LLM-based automatic heuristic design has shown promise for generating executable heuristics for combinatorial optimization, but existing methods mainly rely on delayed endpoint performance. We propose a \emph{teacher-aware evolutionary framework} that uses independently trained learned optimization policies as behavioral teachers. Instead of deploying or imitating the teacher, our method queries it on states visited by candidate heuristic programs and uses its action preferences as local feedback for evolution. The resulting search discovers static executable heuristics guided by both task performance and teacher-derived behavioral signals. Experiments on scheduling, routing, and graph optimization benchmarks show that our method improves over performance-driven LLM heuristic evolution baselines while requiring no neural inference at deployment. These results suggest that learned optimization policies can be repurposed as behavioral feedback sources for automatic heuristic discovery.

</details>


### [900] [Navigating the Sea of LLM Evaluation: Investigating Bias in Toxicity Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10639)
*Regina Gugg,Selina Niederländer,Andreas Stöckl,Martin Flechl*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文研究了LLM毒性基准测试的评估偏差，发现任务类型、数据域和模型选择都会显著影响基准测试结果，表明当前安全评估框架需要更加稳健和全面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM被广泛部署，但毒性基准测试中存在未被充分认识的评估偏差，可能导致不安全模型被部署到实际应用中。

Method: 通过系统实验，改变评估设置（任务类型从文本补全改为摘要、输入数据域、模型选择等），观察基准测试行为的变化。

Result: 1. 将任务从文本补全改为摘要时，基准测试更倾向标记内容为有害；2. 输入数据域变化时，某些基准测试行为不一致；3. 存在模型特定的不稳定性。

Conclusion: 当前安全评估框架不够稳健，需要更全面、更鲁棒的基准测试方法。

Abstract: The rapid adoption of LLMs in both research and industry highlights the challenges of deploying them safely and reveals a gap in the systematic evaluation of toxicity benchmarks. As organizations increasingly rely on these benchmarks to certify models for customer-facing applications and automated moderation, unrecognized evaluation biases could lead to the deployment of vulnerable or unsafe systems. This work investigates the robustness of established benchmarking setups and examines how to measure currently neglected intrinsic biases, such as those related to model choice, metrics, and task types. Our experiments uncover significant discrepancies in benchmark behaviors when evaluation setups are altered. Specifically, shifting the task from text completion to summarization increases the tendency of benchmarks to flag content as harmful. Additionally, certain benchmarks fail to maintain consistent behavior when the input data domain is changed. Furthermore, we observe model-specific instabilities, demonstrating a clear need for more robust and comprehensive safety evaluation frameworks.

</details>


### [901] [diffGHOST: Diffusion based Generative Hedged Oblivious Synthetic Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10647)
*Florent Guépin,Cheick Tidiani Cisse,Denis Renaud,François Bidet,Arnaud Legendre*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出diffGHOST，一种基于潜在空间分割的条件扩散模型，用于合成移动轨迹数据，在保护隐私的同时保持轨迹的实用性，通过识别和缓解关键样本的记忆化问题来提供隐私保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 轨迹数据具有高度敏感性，现有生成模型往往错误地假设隐式隐私保护，无法在提供隐私保证的同时保持轨迹的实用性。

Method: 提出diffGHOST，一种基于潜在空间分割的条件扩散模型，通过识别和缓解关键样本的记忆化问题，利用可学习潜在空间的条件分割来实现隐私保护。

Result: 论文声称该方法能够有效应对隐私-实用性的权衡挑战，但摘要中未提供具体的量化实验结果。

Conclusion: diffGHOST模型为轨迹数据合成提供了兼顾隐私保护和实用性的解决方案，弥补了现有生成模型在隐私保证方面的不足。

Abstract: Trajectories are nowadays valuable information for a wide range of applications. However they are also inherently sensitive, as they contain highly personal information about individuals. Facing this challenge, synthesizing mobility trajectories has emerged as a promising solution to leverage mobility information while preserving privacy. State-of-the-art models, often rely on the false assumptions of generative models implicit privacy and fails to provide privacy guarantees while preserving trajectories utility. Here, we introduce diffGHOST, a conditional diffusion model based on latent space segmentation, designed to answer this challenge. Thus, this paper propose a methodology that identify and mitigate memorization of critical samples using condition segments of a learn latent space.

</details>


### [902] [Evolving-RL: End-to-End Optimization of Experience-Driven Self-Evolving Capability within Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10663)
*Zhiyuan Fan,Wenwei Jin,Feng Zhang,Bin Li,Yihong Dong,Yao Hu,Jiawei Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出Evolving-RL框架，通过将经验提取与利用作为协同优化的统一过程进行联合强化学习，显著提升LLM在自进化场景下的泛化能力，在ALFWorld和Mind2Web上取得大幅性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自进化智能体研究多聚焦系统层面的经验表示与管理设计，忽视了底层模型本身在抽象、泛化和上下文学习方面的固有能力的优化；即使有工作开始用强化学习优化经验利用阶段，也未将自进化视为一个需要联合优化的统一过程。

Method: 提出Evolving-RL算法框架，以经验提取与评估为中心，利用评估产生的两个监督信号分别优化提取器（extractor）和求解器（solver），实现两者的协同共进化（coordinated co-evolution）。

Result: 在ALFWorld和Mind2Web上，Evolving-RL显著增强LLM提取和复用经验的能力，在分布外任务上相对GRPO基线分别提升98.7%（ALFWorld未见任务）和35.8%（Mind2Web）；仅在经验提取与利用协同共进化时才能完全释放增益；同时作为经验增强的RL算法，即使无测试时经验积累，在可见和未见任务上均优于标准基线。

Conclusion: 经验提取与利用的协同共进化是释放自进化智能体潜力的关键，Evolving-RL通过将可复用经验模式内化到模型参数中，实现了无需测试时经验积累即可获得显著性能提升。

Abstract: Experience-driven self-evolving agents aim to overcome the static nature of large language models by distilling reusable experience from past interactions, thus enabling adaptation to novel tasks at deployment time. This process places substantial demands on the foundation model's capacities for abstraction, generalization, and in-context learning. However, most existing studies focus primarily on system-level design choices, such as how experience is represented and managed, neglecting the inherent capabilities of the underlying model. While some recent works have started to optimize the experience utilization stage via reinforcement learning, they still fail to treat self-evolution as a unified process to be jointly optimized. To this end, we propose Evolving-RL, an efficient algorithmic framework that jointly improves the experience extraction and utilization capabilities required for self-evolution. Specifically, we center the learning process on experience extraction and evaluation, using the two supervisory signals derived from evaluation to optimize the extractor and solver separately and thus enable their coordinated co-evolution. Experiments on ALFWorld and Mind2Web show that Evolving-RL effectively enhances LLMs' ability to extract and reuse experience, leading to strong performance gains on out-of-distribution tasks (up to 98.7% relative improvement over the GRPO baseline on ALFWorld unseen tasks and 35.8% on Mind2Web), and these gains are fully unlocked only through the coordinated co-evolution of experience extraction and utilization. Furthermore, Evolving-RL inherently functions as an experience-augmented RL algorithm. By internalizing reusable experience patterns directly into model parameters, it achieves remarkable performance gains over standard baselines on both seen and unseen tasks, even in the absence of test-time experience accumulation.

</details>


### [903] [GESR: A Genetic Programming-Based Symbolic Regression Method with Gene Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10685)
*Yanjie Li,Liping Zhang,Min Wu,Weijun Li,Lina Yu,Jingyi Liu,Yusong Deng,Mingzhu Wan,Xin Ning*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出基于基因编辑的符号回归方法GESR，使用两个BERT模型分别指导基因突变和交叉，相比传统遗传编程显著提升计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统遗传编程(GP)的突变和交叉操作是完全随机的，会产生有益和有害的变异。如果能像"上帝"一样预见哪些基因编辑会产生更好的结果，就能大幅提升进化效率。

Method: 训练两个BERT模型作为"上帝之手"：一个利用BERT的掩码语言建模能力指导基因（表达式符号）突变；另一个通过预测交叉点来指导个体基因的交叉。

Result: GESR相比传统GP算法显著提升了计算效率，在多个符号回归任务上取得了优异的整体性能。

Conclusion: 基于基因编辑的符号回归方法GESR通过BERT模型指导遗传操作，有效提升了符号回归的效率与性能。

Abstract: Mathematical formulas serve as a language through which humans communicate with nature. Discovering mathematical laws from scientific data to describe natural phenomena has been a long-standing pursuit of humanity for centuries. In the field of artificial intelligence, this challenge is known as the symbolic regression problem. Among existing symbolic regression approaches, Genetic Programming (GP) based on evolutionary algorithms remains one of the most classical and widely adopted methods. GP simulates the evolutionary process across generations through genetic mutation and crossover. However, mutations and crossovers in GP are entirely random. While this randomness effectively mimics natural evolution, it inevitably produces both beneficial and detrimental variations. If there existed a metaphorical `God` capable of foreseeing which genetic mutations or crossovers would yield superior outcomes and performing targeted gene editing accordingly, the efficiency of evolution could be substantially improved. Motivated by this idea, we propose in this paper a symbolic regression approach based on gene editing, termed GESR. In GESR, we trained two "hands of God" (two BERT models). Among them, the first leverages the BERT's masked language modeling capability to guide the mutation of genes (expression symbols). The other BERT model guides the crossover of individual genes by predicting the crossover point. Experimental results demonstrate that GESR significantly improves computational efficiency compared with traditional GP algorithms and achieves strong overall performance across multiple symbolic regression tasks.

</details>


### [904] [The Agent Use of Agent Beings: Agent Cybernetics Is the Missing Science of Foundation Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10754)
*Xinrun Wang,Chang Yang,He Zhao,Zhuoyi Lin,Shuyue Hu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出"Agent控制论"框架，将经典控制论的六条定律映射到基础Agent的六项设计原则，为工程驱动的基础Agent领域建立理论科学基础，解决可靠性、长期运行和自我改进等核心问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于LLM的基础Agent在复杂任务中表现优异，但该领域严重依赖工程试错而非第一性原理，缺乏理论支撑。关键问题如Agent何时能保持任务专注、环境超出表征能力时如何响应、安全自我改进需要什么架构特性等，均未有理论答案。

Method: 将经典控制论（关于复杂系统中控制与通信的科学）的六条定律映射到Agent设计的六条原则，综合为三个工程要义（可靠性、长期运行、自我改进），形成"Agent控制论"框架，并在代码生成、计算机使用和自动化研究三个领域进行应用分析。

Result: 通过控制论视角，识别了现有Agent在三个应用领域中的失败模式，并给出了具体的工程改进建议，展示了理论框架的分析能力。

Conclusion: Agent控制论为基础Agent提供了缺失的科学理论基础，有望开启新的研究方向，推动基础Agent在真实世界中的可靠部署。

Abstract: LLM-based foundation agents that perceive, reason, and act across thousands of reasoning steps are rapidly becoming the dominant paradigm for deploying artificial intelligence in open-ended, long-horizon complex tasks. Despite this significance, the field remains overwhelmingly engineering-driven. Engineering practice has converged on useful primitives (tool loops, memory banks, harnesses, reflection steps), yet these are assembled by empirical trial and error rather than from first principles. Fundamental questions remain open: under what conditions does a long-running agent remain on-task? How should an agent respond when its environment exceeds its representational capacity? What architectural properties are necessary for safe self-improvement? We argue that cybernetics, the mid-twentieth-century science of control and communication in complex systems, provides the missing theoretical scaffold for foundation agents. By mapping six canonical laws of classical cybernetics onto six agent design principles, and synthesizing those principles into three engineering desiderata (reliability, lifelong running, and self-Improvement), we arrive at a framework termed Agent Cybernetics. Three application domains, code generation, computer use and automated research, exemplify the analytical framework of agent cybernetics by identifying failure modes and concrete engineering recommendations. We hope that agent cybernetics opens a new research venue and establishes the scientific foundation that foundation agents need for principled, reliable real-world deployment.

</details>


### [905] [MATRA: Modeling the Attack Surface of Agentic AI Systems -- OpenClaw Case Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10763)
*Tim Van hamme,Thomas Vissers,Javier Carnerero-Cano,Mario Fritz,Emil C. Lupu,Lieven Desmet,Dinil Mon Divakaran*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MATRA是一个针对AI代理系统的威胁建模框架，通过资产影响评估和攻击树分析，量化架构控制措施如何降低风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM部署为自主代理时面临已知威胁，但缺乏系统化方法将这些威胁转化为具体部署场景下的实际风险评估。

Method: 提出MATRA框架，基于资产影响评估，利用攻击树分析架构中威胁发生的可能性，并在OpenClaw个人AI代理上进行实证。

Result: MATRA能够量化网络沙箱、最小权限等架构控制措施对风险降低的效果，通过限制注入攻击的爆炸半径来减少风险。

Conclusion: MATRA为代理式AI系统提供了实用的威胁建模方法，帮助从业者系统评估和缓解部署中的安全风险。

Abstract: LLMs are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents with access to tools, databases, and external services, yet practitioners (across different sectors) lack systematic methods to assess how known threat classes translate into concrete risks within a specific agentic deployment. We present MATRA, a pragmatic threat modeling framework for agentic AI systems that adapts established risk assessment methodology to systematically assess how known LLM threats translate into deployment-specific risks. MATRA begins with an asset-based impact assessment and utilizes attack trees to determine the likelihood of these impacts occurring within the system architecture. We demonstrate MATRA on a personal AI agent deployment using OpenClaw, quantifying how architectural controls such as network sandboxing and least-privilege access reduce risk by limiting the blast radius of successful injections.

</details>


### [906] [TrajPrism: A Multi-Task Benchmark for Language-Grounded Urban Trajectory Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10782)
*Lihuan Li,Wilson Wongso,Baiyu Chen,Hao Xue,Ruiyi Yang,Yifan Duan,Xiachong Lin,Yang Song,Flora Salim*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出TrajPrism，一个统一语言与轨迹对齐的多任务基准，包含轨迹生成、检索和描述三大任务，覆盖三个城市30万条轨迹和210万任务实例，并开发了三个概念验证模型，实验表明纯几何轨迹基线在涉及语言的任务上表现不佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究极少在同一真实轨迹上同时评估轨迹的几何表示与自然语言描述，轨迹建模偏重几何，语言类基准多面向路线规划而非细粒度的文本-轨迹对齐验证。

Method: 构建包含轨迹生成、语义检索、轨迹描述三大任务的基准TrajPrism，采用四维出行意图分类法标注轨迹，并开发TrajAnchor、TrajFuse、TrajRap三个概念验证模型。

Result: 包含波尔图、旧金山、北京三城30万条轨迹，产生210万任务实例；纯几何基线在语言参与的输入输出场景中表现明显不足。

Conclusion: TrajPrism首次统一了轨迹与语言的对齐评估，揭示了纯几何方法的局限性，并提供了可跨城市迁移的标注流程。

Abstract: Urban mobility is naturally expressed both as trajectories in space and as natural-language descriptions of travel intent, constraints, and preferences. However, prior work rarely evaluates these two modalities together on the same real-world trajectories: trajectory modeling often stays geometry-centric, while language-centric mobility benchmarks frequently target route planning and tool use rather than fine-grained, verifiable alignment between text and the underlying route. We introduce TrajPrism, a multi-task benchmark for language-trajectory alignment that unifies (i) instruction-conditioned trajectory generation, (ii) language-driven semantic trajectory retrieval, and (iii) trajectory captioning, together with an evaluation protocol that measures trajectory fidelity, retrieval quality, and language groundedness. We construct TrajPrism by pairing real urban trajectories with judge-filtered language annotations generated under a four-dimensional travel-intent taxonomy. The benchmark contains 300K selected trajectories across Porto, San Francisco, and Beijing, yielding 2.1M task instances from three instruction variants, three retrieval queries, and one caption per trajectory. We further develop proof-of-concept models for each task: TrajAnchor for instruction-conditioned trajectory generation, TrajFuse for semantic trajectory retrieval, and TrajRap for trajectory captioning. These models instantiate the proposed tasks and show that geometry-only trajectory baselines leave a large gap on our protocol, especially where language is part of the input-output interface. We release TrajPrism with code and a reproducible annotation pipeline that is designed to be portable across cities, given compatible trajectory inputs and map resources.

</details>


### [907] [ComplexMCP: Evaluation of LLM Agents in Dynamic, Interdependent, and Large-Scale Tool Sandbox](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10787)
*Yuanyang Li,Xue Yang,Longyue Wang,Weihua Luo,Hongyang Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出ComplexMCP基准，用于评估LLM代理在复杂商业软件自动化中的表现。该基准包含300多个基于MCP协议的工具，模拟真实环境中的动态状态和API故障。实验发现，即使顶级LLM成功率也低于60%，远低于人类的90%。分析揭示了三个关键瓶颈：工具检索饱和、过度自信和战略失败主义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM代理虽能调用独立API，但在真实商业软件自动化中表现不佳，因为真实场景中的工具是原子化、相互依赖且易受环境噪声影响的。现有基准无法充分评估代理在这种"最后一公里"任务中的能力。

Method: 基于Model Context Protocol (MCP)构建ComplexMCP基准，包含7个有状态沙箱环境（办公套件到金融系统）的300多个工具。采用种子驱动(seed-driven)架构模拟动态环境状态和不可预测的API故障，确保评估的确定性和多样性。

Result: 顶级模型成功率不超过60%，人类性能达90%。通过细粒度轨迹分析识别三个瓶颈：(1) 工具检索饱和（动作空间扩展时）；(2) 过度自信（跳过环境验证）；(3) 战略失败主义（合理化失败而非尝试恢复）。

Conclusion: 当前LLM代理在相互依赖的工作流中能力不足，ComplexMCP可作为下一代弹性自主系统的关键测试平台。

Abstract: Current LLM agents are proficient at calling isolated APIs but struggle with the "last mile" of commercial software automation. In real-world scenarios, tools are not independent; they are atomic, interdependent, and prone to environmental noise. We introduce $\textbf{ComplexMCP}$, a benchmark designed to evaluate agents in these rigorous conditions. Built on the Model Context Protocol (MCP), $\textbf{ComplexMCP}$ provides over 300 meticulously tested tools derived from 7 stateful sandboxes, ranging from office suites to financial systems. Unlike existing datasets, our benchmark utilizes a seed-driven architecture to simulate dynamic environment states and unpredictable API failures, ensuring a deterministic yet diverse evaluation.
  We evaluate various LLMs across full-context and RAG paradigms, revealing a stark performance gap: even top-tier models fail to exceed a 60% success rate, far trailing human performance 90%. Granular trajectory analysis identifies three fundamental bottlenecks: (1) $\textbf{tool retrieval saturation}$ as action spaces scale; (2) $\textbf{over-confidence}$, where agents skip essential environment verifications; and (3) $\textbf{strategic defeatism}$, a tendency to rationalize failure rather than pursuing recovery. These findings underscore the insufficiency of current agents for interdependent workflows, positioning $\textbf{ComplexMCP}$ as a critical testbed for the next generation of resilient autonomous systems.

</details>


### [908] [PathISE: Learning Informative Path Supervision for Knowledge Graph Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10791)
*Shengxiang Gao,Chao Lei,Jey Han Lau,Jianzhong Qi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PathISE提出了一种从答案标签中学习高质量中间监督信号的框架，用于知识图谱问答，无需昂贵的人工标注路径或子图，通过轻量级transformer估计关系路径的信息量，并将监督信号蒸馏到LLM路径生成器中，在三个基准上达到竞争性或最先进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有KGQA方法需要高质量中间监督信号（如路径或子图）来训练检索模型，但这些信号获取耗时且资源密集。旨在从更易获得的答案级标签中自动学习高质量的中间监督信号。

Method: 提出PathISE框架，包含：(1) 轻量级transformer-based估计器，从答案标签中估计关系路径的信息量，构建伪路径级监督信号；(2) 将该监督信号蒸馏到LLM路径生成器中；(3) 生成的路径在KG中实施，为归纳式答案推理提供紧凑证据。

Result: 在三个KGQA基准上达到竞争性或最先进性能，提供的可复用监督信号可增强现有KGQA模型，无需依赖昂贵的LLM精炼监督信号。

Conclusion: PathISE成功实现了从答案级标签自动学习路径级监督信号，降低了KGQA对人工标注中间信号的依赖，同时提升了模型性能与可复用性。

Abstract: Knowledge Graph Question Answering (KGQA) aims to answer user questions by reasoning over Knowledge Graphs (KGs). Recent KGQA methods mainly follow the retrieval-augmented generation paradigm to ground Large Language Models~(LLMs) with structured knowledge from KGs. However, training effective models to retrieve question-relevant evidence from KGs typically requires high-quality intermediate supervision signals, such as question-relevant paths or subgraphs, which are time- and resource-intensive to obtain. We propose PathISE, a novel framework for learning high-quality intermediate supervision from answer-level labels. PathISE introduces a lightweight transformer-based estimator that estimates the informativeness of relation paths to construct pseudo path-level supervision. This supervision is then distilled into an LLM path generator, whose generated paths are grounded in the KG to provide compact evidence for inductive answer reasoning. ExtensiveISE experiments on three KGQA benchmarks show that PathISE achieves competitive or state-of-the-art KGQA performance, and provides reusable supervision signals that can enhance existing KGQA models, without relying on costly LLM-refined supervision signals. Our source code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PathISE-2F87.

</details>


### [909] [Interpretable Machine Learning for Football Performance Analysis: Evidence of Limited Transferability from Elite Leagues to University Competition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10796)
*Yu-Fang Tsai,Yu-Jen Chen,Kok-Hua Tan,Sheng-Chieh Huang,You-Ying Ji,Yu-Lun Chen,Chun-Yi Wang,Chien-Ming Hsu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究探讨机器学习模型在足球表现分析中的可解释性是否能在不同竞技水平（精英 vs. 大学）间转移。使用五大欧洲联赛和台湾清华大学数据，发现精英足球的表现决定因素稳定一致，而大学足球的解释稳定性显著下降，表明可解释性具有领域依赖性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大多数足球表现分析研究默认模型学到的表现决定因素及其解释在不同竞争水平间是可转移的，但这一假设尚未被验证。本文旨在检验从精英比赛中学到的表现决定因素是否能结构性地转移到大学水平足球，以及其解释在领域偏移下是否仍稳健。

Method: 使用五大欧洲联赛的大规模事件数据训练模型，并应用于台湾清华大学（NTHU）的大学足球数据，特征空间保持一致。采用随机森林和多层感知器两种模型，分别用SHAP和CIS两种解释方法进行可解释性分析。

Result: 精英足球在联赛、模型和解释方法间表现出稳定一致的表现决定因素层级。而大学足球的关键指标排序发生显著变化，解释稳定性降低，与精英领域的结构一致性减弱，且对解释方法的选择更敏感。

Conclusion: 可解释性的稳健性具有领域依赖性。领域偏移下的解释不稳定并非单纯的方法论局限，而可能作为目标领域结构模糊性的诊断信号。

Abstract: Machine learning has become increasingly prevalent in football performance analysis, yet most studies prioritize predictive accuracy while implicitly assuming that learned performance determinants and their interpretations are transferable across competition levels. Whether interpretability remains reliable under domain shift-from elite to university football remains largely unexplored. This study investigates whether performance determinants learned from elite competitions are structurally transferable to university-level football and whether their interpretations remain robust under domain shift. Models were trained on large-scale event data from the top five European leagues and applied to university football data from National Tsing Hua University (NTHU) using an identical feature space. Random Forest and Multilayer Perceptron models were interpreted using SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) and Counterfactual Impact Score (CIS). Across five experiments, elite football exhibited a stable and consistent hierarchy of performance determinants across leagues, models, and explanation methods. In contrast, NTHU university football showed substantial reordering of key indicators, reduced explanation stability, weaker structural agreement with elite domains, and increased sensitivity to explanation method. These findings suggest that interpretability robustness is domain-dependent. Rather than reflecting methodological limitations alone, instability in explanations under domain shift may serve as a diagnostic signal of structural ambiguity in the target domain.

</details>


### [910] [NanoResearch: Co-Evolving Skills, Memory, and Policy for Personalized Research Automation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10813)
*Jinhang Xu,Qiyuan Zhu,Yujun Wu,Zirui Wang,Dongxu Zhang,Jianxin Tang,Marcia Tian,Yiling Duan,Siyuan Li,Jingxuan Wei,Sirui Han,Yike Guo,Odin Zhang,Conghui He,Cheng Tan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了NanoResearch框架，通过三层共演化（技能库、记忆模块、无标签策略学习）实现多智能体科研系统的个性化，解决了现有系统缺乏可复用过程知识、用户特定经验和隐性偏好内化的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM驱动的多智能体科研自动化系统对所有用户输出统一结果，忽视了研究者之间资源配置、方法论偏好和输出格式的差异，导致系统无法真正服务于每个个体用户。个性化是科研自动化可用的前提条件。

Method: 提出NanoResearch框架，包含三层共演化机制：(1) 技能库——将重复操作蒸馏为可复用的过程性规则；(2) 记忆模块——维护用户和项目特定经验，用于指导规划决策；(3) 无标签策略学习——将自由形式反馈转化为规划器的持续参数更新。三层共同演化，相互增强。

Result: 大量实验表明，NanoResearch相比现有最先进的AI科研系统有显著提升，且在连续循环中能够以更低成本逐步自我优化，产出更好的研究成果。

Conclusion: 个性化是科研自动化真正可用的关键前提，通过三层共演化机制可以实现多智能体系统的持续个性化适应，兼顾效率和效果。

Abstract: LLM-powered multi-agent systems can now automate the full research pipeline from ideation to paper writing, but a fundamental question remains: automation for whom? Researchers operate under different resource configurations, hold different methodological preferences, and target different output formats. A system that produces uniform outputs regardless of these differences will systematically under-serve every individual user, making personalization a precondition for research automation to be genuinely usable. However, achieving it requires three capabilities that current systems lack: accumulating reusable procedural knowledge across projects, retaining user-specific experience across sessions, and internalizing implicit preferences that resist explicit formalization. We propose NanoResearch, a multi-agent framework that addresses these gaps through tri-level co-evolution. A skill bank distills recurring operations into compact procedural rules reusable across projects. A memory module maintains user- and project-specific experience that grounds planning decisions in each user's research history. A label-free policy learning converts free-form feedback into persistent parameter updates of the planner, reshaping subsequent coordination. These three layers co-evolve: reliable skills produce richer memory, richer memory informs better planning, and preference internalization continuously realigns the loop to each user. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NanoResearch delivers substantial gains over state-of-the-art AI research systems, and progressively refines itself to produce better research at lower cost over successive cycles.

</details>


### [911] [Probing Cross-modal Information Hubs in Audio-Visual LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10815)
*Jihoo Jung,Chaeyoung Jung,Ji-Hoon Kim,Joon Son Chung*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文探究音频-视觉大语言模型（AVLLMs）中跨模态信息流动机制，发现跨模态信息主要编码在sink tokens中，并进一步识别出专门存储此类信息的“跨模态sink tokens”子集。基于此，提出一种无需训练的幻觉缓解方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AVLLMs虽已展现出强大的多模态推理能力，但其内部工作机制（尤其是音频与视觉模态间的双向信息交互）尚未被深入探索，与已充分研究的纯文本或视觉语言模型形成对比。

Method: 通过对多个近期AVLLMs进行跨模态信息流分析，定位音频/视觉信息在对方模态token表示中的编码位置，识别出sink tokens及其中专门存储跨模态信息的“跨模态sink tokens”。

Result: 发现两点共性：1) AVLLMs主要在sink tokens中编码集成的音频-视觉信息；2) sink tokens并非均匀持有跨模态信息，而是存在专门存储此类信息的跨模态sink tokens子集。

Conclusion: 基于上述发现提出一种简单且无需训练的幻觉缓解方法，通过鼓励模型依赖跨模态sink tokens中的集成跨模态信息来减少幻觉。

Abstract: Audio-visual large language models (AVLLMs) have recently emerged as a powerful architecture capable of jointly reasoning over audio, visual, and textual modalities. In AVLLMs, the bidirectional interaction between audio and video modalities introduces intricate processing dynamics, necessitating a deeper understanding of their internal mechanisms. However, unlike extensively studied text-only or large vision language models, the internal workings of AVLLMs remain largely unexplored. In this paper, we focus on cross-modal information flow between audio and visual modalities in AVLLMs, investigating where information derived from one modality is encoded within the token representations of the other modality. Through an analysis of multiple recent AVLLMs, we uncover two common findings. First, AVLLMs primarily encode integrated audio-visual information in sink tokens. Second, sink tokens do not uniformly hold cross-modal information. Instead, a distinct subset of sink tokens, which we term cross-modal sink tokens, specializes in storing such information. Based on these findings, we further propose a simple training-free hallucination mitigation method by encouraging reliance on integrated cross-modal information within cross-modal sink tokens. Our code is available at https://github.com/kaistmm/crossmodal-hub.

</details>


### [912] [CLEF: EEG Foundation Model for Learning Clinical Semantics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10817)
*Peng Cao,Ali Mirzazadeh,Jong Woo Lee,Aleksandar Videnovic,Dina Katabi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出CLEF，一种临床导向的长上下文脑电图基础模型，通过3D多窗谱图令牌表示完整脑电图会话，并结合神经科医生报告和结构化电子健康记录进行对比学习。在涵盖234项任务的基准测试中，CLEF在229项任务上优于现有模型，平均AUROC从0.65提升至0.74。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有脑电图基础模型主要设计用于短窗口解码，无法处理完整会话，且缺乏临床上下文的整合，限制了其在真实临床场景中的应用。

Method: 1) 将脑电图会话表示为3D多窗谱图令牌，实现会话级别的Transformer建模；2) 通过对比学习目标，将嵌入与神经科医生报告和结构化EHR数据进行对齐。

Result: 在234项任务基准上，CLEF在229项任务中优于现有模型，平均AUROC从0.65提升至0.74。重建预训练优于先前模型，报告和EHR对齐带来进一步提升。

Conclusion: 会话级、临床导向的表征学习是临床脑电图基础模型的有效范式，且学到的表征可泛化到未观测的目标。

Abstract: Clinical EEG interpretation requires reasoning over full EEG sessions and integrating signal patterns with clinical context. Existing EEG foundation models are largely designed for short-window decoding and do not incorporate clinical context. We introduce CLEF, a clinically grounded long-context EEG foundation model. CLEF represents EEG sessions as 3D multitaper spectrogram tokens, enabling tractable Transformer modeling at session scale, and aligns embeddings with neurologist reports and structured EHR data through contrastive objectives. We evaluate CLEF on a new 234-task benchmark spanning disease phenotypes, medication exposures, and EEG findings, with more than 260k EEG sessions from over 108k patients. CLEF outperforms prior EEG foundation models on 229 of 234 tasks, improving mean AUROC from 0.65 to 0.74. Reconstruction-only pretraining surpasses prior EEG foundation models, while report and EHR alignment yields further gains. Held-out concept and external-cohort experiments suggest that these representations transfer beyond observed alignment targets. These results support session-scale, clinically grounded representation learning as a promising foundation-model paradigm for clinical EEG.

</details>


### [913] [MaD Physics: Evaluating information seeking under constraints in physical environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10820)
*Moksh Jain,Mehdi Bennani,Johannes Bausch,Yuri Chervonyi,Bogdan Georgiev,Simon Osindero,Nenad Tomašev*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出MaD Physics基准，用于评估智能体在物理测量和质量/数量约束下进行科学发现的能力，涵盖三个基于物理定律的环境（含篡改定律），测试智能体从数据推断模型和规划能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准要么基于静态知识推理，要么是无约束的实验设计，无法捕捉在资源约束下进行测量和规划的能力。因此需要一个新的基准来填补这一空白。

Method: 构建三个基于不同物理定律（含篡改版本）的环境，智能体在预算内进行测量，然后推断物理定律并预测系统状态。使用四个Gemini模型进行基准测试。

Result: Gemini模型在结构化探索和数据收集方面存在不足，揭示了科学推理能力的改进方向。

Conclusion: MaD Physics能有效评估智能体在约束下进行科学发现的能力，现有模型在规划与探索方面仍有显著短板。

Abstract: Scientific discovery is fundamentally a resource-constrained process that requires navigating complex trade-offs between the quality and quantity of measurements due to physical and cost constraints. Measurements drive the scientific process by revealing novel phenomena to improve our understanding. Existing benchmarks for evaluating agents for scientific discovery focus on either static knowledge-based reasoning or unconstrained experimental design tasks, and do not capture the ability to make measurements and plan under constraints. To bridge this gap, we propose Measuring and Discovering Physics (MaD Physics), a benchmark to evaluate the ability of agents to make informative measurements and conclusions subject to constraints on the quality and quantity of measurements. The benchmark consists of three environments, each based on a distinct physical law. To mitigate contamination from existing knowledge, MaD Physics includes altered physical laws. In each trial, the agent makes measurements of the system until it exhausts an allotted budget and then the agent has to infer the underlying physical law to make predictions about the state of the system in the future. MaD Physics evaluates two fundamental capabilities of scientific agents: inferring models from data and planning under constraints. We also demonstrate how MaD Physics can be used to evaluate other capabilities such as multimodality and in-context learning. We benchmark agents on MaD Physics using four Gemini models (2.5 Flash Lite, 2.5 Flash, 2.5 Pro, and 3 Flash), identifying shortcomings in their structured exploration and data collection capabilities and highlighting directions to improve their scientific reasoning.

</details>


### [914] [The First Drop of Ink: Nonlinear Impact of Misleading Information in Long-Context Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10828)
*Muhan Gao,Zih-Ching Chen,Kuan-Hao Huang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 大语言模型在长上下文任务中，硬干扰项比例会导致非线性性能下降，少量干扰即可造成显著损害，这种“第一滴墨”效应源于注意力机制对干扰项的低效分配，且过滤性能提升主要来自上下文长度缩减而非干扰去除。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前研究虽表明语义相关但具误导性的文档会损害性能，但尚未定量研究干扰项比例与性能之间的具体关系，因此本文旨在系统性地探索这一关系。

Method: 在固定长度上下文中系统变化硬干扰项的比例，结合注意力机制的理论与实证分析，并设计控制实验区分上下文长度缩减与干扰去除的影响。

Result: 发现性能随硬干扰比例呈非线性下降：少量干扰（第一小部分）即导致性能急剧下降，后续增加干扰则边际影响递减；注意力机制分析表明干扰项即使比例很小也会捕获不成比例的注意力；过滤增益主要来自长度缩减而非干扰去除。

Conclusion: 要显著恢复性能需将硬干扰比例降至接近零，凸显了上游检索精度的重要性。

Abstract: As large language models are increasingly deployed in retrieval-augmented generation and agentic systems that accumulate extensive context, understanding how distracting information affects long-context performance becomes critical. Prior work shows that semantically relevant yet misleading documents degrade performance, but the quantitative relationship between the proportion of distractors and performance remains unstudied. In this work, we systematically vary the hard-distractor proportion in fixed-length contexts, revealing a striking nonlinear pattern: as the proportion of hard distractors increases, performance drops sharply within the first small fraction, while the remainder of the range yields only marginal additional decline. We term this ''The First Drop of Ink'' effect, analogous to how a single drop of ink contaminates water. Our theoretical and empirical analyses grounded in attention mechanics show that hard distractors capture disproportionate attention even at small proportions, with diminishing marginal impact as their proportion grows. Controlled experiments further show that filtering gains mainly come from context-length reduction rather than distractor removal; substantial recovery requires reducing the hard-distractor proportion to near zero, highlighting the importance of upstream retrieval precision.

</details>


### [915] [From Controlled to the Wild: Evaluation of Pentesting Agents for the Real-World](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10834)
*Pedro Conde,Henrique Branquinho,Valerio Mazzone,Bruno Mendes,André Baptista,Nuno Moniz*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向AI渗透测试智能体的新型评估协议，将评估重点从任务完成转向实际漏洞发现，结合结构化真实数据、LLM语义匹配、二分图解析等方法，支持在复杂多攻击面目标上进行更真实、可复现的智能体性能比较。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI渗透测试评估标准过度简化，仅关注CTF、RCE等预设目标，无法反映真实渗透测试中所需的开放性探索和战略决策能力，导致无法有效预测哪些智能体在实际场景中表现更好。

Method: 提出了一套包含六大组件的评估协议：结构化真实数据+LLM语义匹配来识别漏洞、二分图解析处理模糊匹配、持续维护真实数据、重复累积评估随机智能体、效率指标、以及缩减测试集选择策略。

Result: 该协议能够更真实、更具操作指导性地比较AI渗透测试智能体的性能，并发布了专家标注的真实数据与开源代码以支持可复现性。

Conclusion: 通过将评估从任务完成转向漏洞发现，该协议推动了AI渗透测试评估从实验室简化场景迈向真实复杂环境，为后续研究和实际部署提供了更有意义的基准。

Abstract: AI pentesting agents are increasingly credible as offensive security systems, but current benchmarks still provide limited guidance on which will perform best in real-world targets. Existing evaluation protocols assess and optimize for predefined goals such as capture-the-flag, remote code execution, exploit reproduction, or trajectory similarity, in simplified or narrow settings. These tools are valuable for measuring bounded capabilities, yet they do not adequately capture the complexity, open-ended exploration, and strategic decision-making required in realistic pentesting. In this paper, we present a practical evaluation protocol that shifts assessment from task completion to validated vulnerability discovery, allowing evaluation in sufficiently complex targets spanning multiple attack surfaces and vulnerability classes. The protocol combines structured ground-truth with LLM-based semantic matching to identify vulnerabilities, bipartite resolution to score findings under realistic ambiguity, continuous ground-truth maintenance, repeated and cumulative evaluation of stochastic agents, efficiency metrics, and reduced-suite selection for sustainable experimentation. This protocol extends the state of the art by enabling a more realistic, operationally informative comparison of AI pentesting agents. To enable reproducibility, we also release expert-annotated ground truth and code for the proposed evaluation protocol: https://github.com/jd0965199-oss/ethibench.

</details>


### [916] [The Generalized Turing Test: A Foundation for Comparing Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10851)
*Daniel Mitropolsky,Susan S. Hong,Riccardo Neumarker,Emanuele Rimoldi,Tomaso Poggio*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出广义图灵测试（GTT），一种基于不可区分性的通用智能比较框架，通过定义"若B无法区分模仿B的A与真实B"来比较任意智能体，并实验验证其产生有意义的排序。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能评估方法依赖特定数据集和任务，缺乏任务无关、统一的智能比较标准。作者希望建立一个不依赖固定基准的通用智能排序框架。

Method: 定义图灵比较器 A ≥ B（当B作为区分者无法可靠区分模仿B的A与真实B），研究其传递性等结构性质，并定义查询、有限交互、固定区分者等变体。通过数千次实验评估当代模型间的成对不可区分性。

Result: 实验得到的比较结果呈现分层结构，与现有排名一致，表明该框架能产生有意义的经验排序。

Conclusion: 不可区分性可作为推理智能的统一视角，为评估（甚至训练目标）提供独立于固定数据集或基准的基础。

Abstract: We introduce the Generalized Turing Test (GTT), a formal framework for comparing the capabilities of arbitrary agents via indistinguishability. For agents A and B, we define the Turing comparator A $\geq$ B to hold if B, acting as a distinguisher, cannot reliably distinguish between interactions with A (instructed to imitate B) and another instance of B. This yields a dataset- and task-agnostic notion of relative intelligence. We study the comparator's structure, including conditions under which it is transitive and therefore induces an ordering over equivalence classes, and we define and analyze variants with querying, bounded interaction, and fixed distinguishers. To complement the theory, we instantiate the framework on a collection of modern models, empirically evaluating pairwise indistinguishability across thousands of trials. The resulting comparisons exhibit a stratified structure consistent with existing rankings, hinting that the proposed framework yields meaningful empirical orderings. Our results position indistinguishability as a unifying lens for reasoning about intelligence, suggesting a foundation for evaluation and, potentially, training objectives that are inherently independent of fixed datasets or benchmarks.

</details>


### [917] [BenchCAD: A Comprehensive, Industry-Standard Benchmark for Programmatic CAD](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10865)
*Haozhe Zhang,Kaichen Liu,Miaomiao Chen,Lei Li,Shaojie Yang,Cheng Peng,Hanjie Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出 BenchCAD，一个包含 17,900 个可执行 CadQuery 程序的工业 CAD 基准，用于评估多模态大模型在感知、参数抽象和可执行程序合成方面的能力。实验发现现有模型能恢复粗略几何外形，但无法生成准确的参数化 CAD 程序。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管多模态大语言模型在工业 CAD 代码生成方面有潜力，但缺乏统一的基准来评估它们是否同时具备理解 3D 结构、推断工程参数和选择 CAD 操作的能力。

Method: 构建 BenchCAD 基准，包含 106 个工业零件族系的 17,900 个执行验证的 CadQuery 程序，通过视觉问答、代码问答、图像到代码生成和指令引导代码编辑四种任务进行全面评估。

Result: 现有前沿模型在恢复粗略外部几何形状方面表现尚可，但在生成准确的参数化 CAD 程序方面失败率很高；常见错误包括遗漏精细 3D 结构、误解工业设计参数、用简单操作替代关键 CAD 操作等。

Conclusion: BenchCAD 可作为衡量和改进多模态 CAD 自动化工业就绪度的基准，微调和强化学习能改善分布内性能，但对未见零件族系的泛化能力仍然有限。

Abstract: Industrial Computer-Aided Design (CAD) code generation requires models to produce executable parametric programs from visual or textual inputs. Beyond recognizing the outer shape of a part, this task involves understanding its 3D structure, inferring engineering parameters, and choosing CAD operations that reflect how the part would be designed and manufactured. Despite the promise of Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for this task, they are rarely evaluated on whether these capabilities jointly hold in realistic industrial CAD settings. We present BenchCAD, a unified benchmark for industrial CAD reasoning. BenchCAD contains 17,900 execution-verified CadQuery programs across 106 industrial part families, including bevel gears, compression springs, twist drills, and other reusable engineering designs. It evaluates models through visual question answering, code question answering, image-to-code generation, and instruction-guided code editing, enabling fine-grained analysis across perception, parametric abstraction, and executable program synthesis. Across 10+ frontier models, BenchCAD shows that current systems often recover coarse outer geometry but fail to produce faithful parametric CAD programs. Common failures include missing fine 3D structure, misinterpreting industrial design parameters, and replacing essential operations such as sweeps, lofts, and twist-extrudes with simpler sketch-and-extrude patterns. Fine-tuning and reinforcement learning improve in-distribution performance, but generalization to unseen part families remains limited. These results position BenchCAD as a benchmark for measuring and improving the industrial readiness of multimodal CAD automation.

</details>


### [918] [Remember the Decision, Not the Description: A Rate-Distortion Framework for Agent Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10870)
*Mingxi Zou,Zhihan Guo,Langzhang Liang,Zhuo Wang,Qifan Wang,Qingsong Wen,Irwin King,Lizhen Qu,Zenglin Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种以决策为中心的在线记忆学习框架DeMem，将记忆视为有损压缩问题，通过保留对决策至关重要的历史区分来优化有限内存下的智能体性能，在理论和实验上均优于基于描述质量的现有记忆机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语言智能体的记忆机制多基于描述性标准（如相关性、显著性或摘要质量）来组织经验，但作者指出，记忆的价值不在于忠实地描述过去，而在于在固定预算下保留有助于决策的历史区分。因此需要一种以决策为中心的视角来重新定义记忆质量。

Method: 将记忆问题形式化为决策中心的率失真问题，用压缩导致的决策质量损失来衡量记忆质量。提出DeMem——一种在线记忆学习器，仅在数据证明共享状态会导致决策冲突时才细化记忆分区，并证明了近最小最大遗憾保证。

Result: 在受控合成诊断实验和长程对话基准测试中，DeMem在相同运行时预算下取得了持续的性能提升，优于基于描述质量的基线方法。

Conclusion: 记忆应保留对决策至关重要的区分，而非对过去的忠实描述。这一原则为设计长程语言智能体的高效记忆机制提供了新的理论视角和实践方向。

Abstract: Long-horizon language agents must operate under limited runtime memory, yet existing memory mechanisms often organize experience around descriptive criteria such as relevance, salience, or summary quality. For an agent, however, memory is valuable not because it faithfully describes the past, but because it preserves the distinctions between histories that must remain separated under a fixed budget to support good decisions. We cast this as a decision-centric rate-distortion problem, measuring memory quality by the loss in achievable decision quality induced by compression. This yields an exact forgetting boundary for what can be safely forgotten, and a memory-distortion frontier characterizing the optimal tradeoff between memory budget and decision quality. Motivated by this decision-centric view of memory, we propose DeMem, an online memory learner that refines its partition only when data certify that a shared state would induce decision conflict, and prove near-minimax regret guarantees. On both controlled synthetic diagnostics and long-horizon conversational benchmarks, DeMem yields consistent gains under the same runtime budget, supporting the principle that memory should preserve the distinctions that matter for decisions, not descriptions.

</details>


### [919] [Shepherd: A Runtime Substrate Empowering Meta-Agents with a Formalized Execution Trace](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10913)
*Simon Yu,Derek Chong,Ananjan Nandi,Dilara Soylu,Jiuding Sun,Christopher D Manning,Weiyan Shi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Shepherd是一个基于Lean实现的形式化函数式编程模型，用于元代理操作。它通过类Git的执行追踪记录事件，支持快速分支和重放，性能优于Docker 5倍，在三个应用中显著提升效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有元代理操作缺乏形式化基础和高效率的基础设施，难以支持运行时干预、反事实元优化和树形强化学习等复杂场景。

Method: 将元代理对目标代理的操作形式化为函数，在Lean中机械化核心操作；每个代理-环境交互记录为带类型的事件，形成类Git执行追踪；支持分支执行和重放；利用fork实现快速进程和文件系统复制。

Result: 分支速度比Docker快5倍，重放时提示缓存复用率>95%；运行时干预将结对编程通过率从28.8%提升至54.7%；反事实元优化在四个基准上最高提升11个点，时间减少58%；Tree-RL训练将TerminalBench-2性能从34.2%提升至39.4%。

Conclusion: Shepherd为编程元代理提供了高效的基础设施，在多个应用场景中展示了显著效果，已开源。

Abstract: We introduce Shepherd, a functional programming model that formalizes meta-agent operations on target agents as functions, with core operations mechanized in Lean. Shepherd records every agent-environment interaction as a typed event in a Git-like execution trace, enabling any past state to be forked and replayed. The system forks the agent process and its filesystem $5\times$ faster than Docker, achieving $>95\%$ prompt-cache reuse on replay. We demonstrate the model through three applications. First, in runtime intervention, a live supervisor increases pair coding pass rates from 28.8% to 54.7% on CooperBench. Second, in counterfactual meta-optimization, branching exploration outperforms baselines across four benchmarks by up to 11 points while reducing wall-clock time by up to 58%. Third, in Tree-RL training, forking rollouts at selected turns improves TerminalBench-2 performance from 34.2% to 39.4%. These results establish Shepherd as an efficient infrastructure for programming meta-agents. We open-source the system to support future research.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.PM'></div>

# q-fin.PM [[Back]](#toc)

### [920] [The Engineering of Skew: A Path-Dependent Framework for Asymmetric Volatility Management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09123)
*Gregory A. Fanous*

Main category: q-fin.PM

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于路径依赖的非对称波动管理框架，核心是"偏度工程"——通过条件性风险暴露塑造，在降低下行风险的同时保留上行参与能力，并建立了恢复效率协议来量化管理回撤与复苏之间的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的波动率指标无法真正反映机构投资者在现实中面临的回撤、流动性、复苏等路径依赖型风险，需要一种更贴合实际的风险管理框架。

Method: 提出"偏度工程"（Skew Engineering）方法，通过条件性风险暴露塑造减少有害的下行参与、控制"淹没"风险、保留足够的复苏参与；建立"恢复效率协议"（Recovery-Efficiency Protocol），将回撤深度、水下时间、复苏负担减少和反弹参与度联系起来。机器学习/AI用于条件估计、制度映射、稳健性测试和模型风险治理。

Result: 揭示了恢复的非线性算术：回撤D后所需收益R=1/(1-D)-1；低波动通过g≈μ-0.5σ²改善几何复利，但对称降风险可能牺牲上行参与而损害恢复。

Conclusion: 波动管理的关键不是孤立地降低波动率，而是条件性暴露塑造——在不牺牲太多上行参与的前提下减少有害下行风险，从而在不利市场中维持复利能力。

Abstract: Volatility is the language in which finance often describes risk, but it is not the language in which institutions experience risk. Allocators live through drawdowns, liquidity needs, spending rules, rebalance decisions, board oversight, and the interval between a prior high-water mark and full recovery. This paper develops a path-dependent framework for asymmetric volatility management. The arithmetic of recovery is nonlinear: after a drawdown of depth $D$, the required gain is $R=\frac{1}{1-D}-1$. Lower volatility can improve geometric compounding through the familiar small-return approximation $g \approx μ-\frac{1}{2}σ^2$, but symmetric de-risking can also impair recovery if it sacrifices too much upside participation. The relevant design problem is therefore not volatility reduction in isolation; it is conditional exposure shaping. Skew engineering is defined here as the portfolio construction discipline of reducing harmful downside participation more than productive upside participation, controlling submergence, and preserving enough recovery participation to sustain compounding under adverse regimes. The resulting Recovery-Efficiency Protocol links drawdown depth, time underwater, recovery burden reduction, and rebound participation into an allocator-facing reporting discipline.
