Machine learning and AI methods are framed as tools for conditional estimation, regime mapping, robustness testing, and model-risk governance, not as market prediction.

</details>


<div id='math.OC'></div>

# math.OC [[Back]](#toc)

### [921] [Determinant Bounds for $(n-1)$-Locally Positive Semidefinite Matrices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08101)
*Shaun Fallat,Samir Mondal,Hristo Sendov*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了局部半正定矩阵的行列式，推导了其行列式的尖锐下界，量化了局部与全局半正定性之间的差距，并扩展了Fisher和Koteljanskii等经典行列式不等式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在矩阵分析中，局部半正定矩阵（所有真主子矩阵半正定）与全局半正定之间存在差距，作者希望量化这一差距，从而理解该松弛层次结构的紧致性。

Method: 通过分析局部半正定矩阵的行列式结构，推导其下界，并将经典行列式不等式（Fisher、Koteljanskii）推广到这类矩阵上。

Result: 得到了局部半正定矩阵行列式的尖锐下界，以及Fisher和Koteljanskii不等式的类比扩展，每个扩展都给出了紧的下界。

Conclusion: 通过行列式界量化了局部半正定矩阵与真正半正定矩阵之间的偏离程度，揭示了该松弛层次中极端情况的性质。

Abstract: In this framework, the extremal case corresponds to the tightest nontrivial relaxation in this hierarchy, in which every proper principal submatrix is constrained to be positive semidefinite, while the global positive semidefiniteness condition is governed by the determinant. In this paper, we study the determinants of locally positive semidefinite matrices and derive sharp lower bounds on their determinants that quantify the gap between local and global positive semidefiniteness. We further obtain analogous extensions of classical determinant inequalities, including Fisher and Koteljanskii inequalities, providing tight lower bounds in each case. In a sense, these results quantify, via determinant bounds, how far the class of locally positive semidefinite matrices can be from being positive semidefinite.

</details>


### [922] [Transcription-Induced Failure Modes in 6-DOF Rocket Landing Trajectory Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08420)
*Prayag Sharma,Jonathan Y. M. Goh,Behçet Açıkmeşe,Franck Djeumou*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文揭示了最优控制问题中数值转录步骤隐藏的截断误差和不变量漂移缺陷，通过在六自由度火箭着陆问题测试14种方法，发现仅3种通过验证，且四阶隐式GL2方案在精度、速度和鲁棒性上反超六阶显式RK6方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有最优控制问题依赖离散化转录求解，但截断误差和不变性漂移等隐藏缺陷常被忽视，导致求解器生成动态不可行或次优轨迹。需系统揭示这些故障并评估转录方法的可靠性。

Method: 提出一种与问题和转录格式无关的对抗目标函数，利用局部截断误差界的结构放大缺陷；在六自由度火箭着陆问题上测试14种转录方法，结合B级数展开和辛Runge-Kutta定理分析误差来源。

Result: 14种方法中仅3种通过严格验证；四阶隐式GL2在无经典刚性问题时达到六阶显式RK6的精度；在横向偏转场景中，GL2在求解速度和鲁棒性上均优于RK6。

Conclusion: 转录方法存在显著可靠性差距，高阶方法未必优于低阶方法；理论缺陷直接影响实际性能，隐式GL2是更优选择。

Abstract: Solving optimal control problems via large-scale NLP solvers depends on discretizing continuous dynamics. Yet, this transcription step hides critical vulnerabilities-most notably truncation error and invariant drift-that can drive solvers toward dynamically infeasible or suboptimal trajectories. To expose these hidden failures, we introduce a problem- and transcription-agnostic adversarial objective that leverages the structure of local truncation-error bounds to aggressively amplify such defects. When applied to a 6-DOF rocket-landing problem, we reveal a stark reliability gap: of fourteen transcription methods tested, only three satisfy rigorous validation criteria. These results also expose a striking performance inversion: even in the absence of classical stiffness, a fourth-order implicit scheme (GL2) matches the fidelity of a sixth-order explicit method (RK6). Using B-series expansions and symplectic Runge-Kutta theorems, we isolate the specific truncation errors and quaternion-invariant drift responsible for these failures. Crucially, these theoretical vulnerabilities dictate operational performance: in practical lateral-divert scenarios, the implicit GL2 consistently outperforms the explicit RK6 in both end-to-end solve speed and robustness.

</details>


### [923] [Generalized Global Self-Optimizing Control for Chemical Processes: Part II Objective-Guided Controlled Variable Learning Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08438)
*Chenchen Zhou,Hongxin Su,Xinhui Tang,Yi Cao,Shuang-Hua Yang,Lingjian Ye*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种目标导向的控制变量学习（OGCVL）算法，用于广义全局自优化控制（g2SOC），该算法结合了优化方法和回归方法的优势，能够高效设计非线性控制变量，在大规模问题中具有良好的可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的广义全局自优化控制（g2SOC）中，基于优化的方法性能好但难以处理大规模问题，而基于回归的方法可扩展性好但性能较差。因此需要一种兼具两者优点的方法。

Method: 提出目标导向的控制变量学习（OGCVL）算法，该算法无缝结合了符号计算和数值计算技术，用于高效设计非线性控制变量。

Result: 在两个数值示例中验证了OGCVL方法的有效性，结果表明该方法在保持计算效率的同时能取得良好效果，且在大规模问题中具有可行性。

Conclusion: OGCVL算法成功结合了优化方法和回归方法的优点，为大规模自优化控制问题提供了一种高效且可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Self-optimizing control (SOC) aims to maintain near-optimal process operation by judiciously selecting controlled variables (CVs). In this series of work, the generalized global SOC (g2SOC) approach is proposed, which extends the concept of SOC to the whole operation space and uses general nonlinear functions to design CVs instead of linear combinations. In the first part of this series work, two numerical approaches for g2SOC are proposed: the optimization-based approach and the regression-based approach, based on a theoretical analysis of the existence of perfect self-optimizing CVs. The CVs designed by the former perform better, but are usually infeasible for large-scale problems. In this paper, we propose an algorithm called objective-guided controlled variable learning (OGCVL) that combines the advantages of both and has a better scalability. OGCVL is proposed for efficient CV design that seamlessly integrates symbolic and numerical computation techniques. Finally, the effectiveness of the OGCVL method is verified in two numerical examples. Both examples illustrate show that the OGCVL method is able to achieve good results while maintaining computational efficiency and is also feasible in large-scale problems.

</details>


### [924] [Robust Learning Meets Quasar-Convex Optimization: Inexact High-Order Proximal-Point Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08474)
*Alireza Kabgani,Felipe Lara,Masoud Ahookhosh*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对鲁棒学习问题的高阶近似近端方法（HiPPA），证明了鲁棒学习问题可建模为强拟凸优化问题（无鞍点），并通过模型-价值差距控制子问题求解精度，实现了全局收敛和局部线性/超线性收敛速度，在鲁棒特征对齐蒸馏任务中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 鲁棒学习旨在噪声、污染和分布偏移下保持模型性能，但现有优化方法在处理这类问题时收敛性分析不足。作者希望建立鲁棒学习问题的优化理论框架，并提出高效算法。

Method: 首先证明鲁棒学习问题可转化为(强)拟凸优化问题（具有良性景观、无鞍点）；然后提出HiPPA（不精确高阶近端方法），利用模型-价值差距（model-value gap）控制子问题求解的近似精度；理论分析全局收敛性以及正则化阶数和近似控制下的局部线性/超线性收敛速率。

Result: 理论层面证明了HiPPA的全局收敛到全局最小值，并建立了局部线性或超线性收敛率；实验层面在鲁棒特征对齐蒸馏任务中验证了HiPPA的强实证性能，与理论分析一致。

Conclusion: HiPPA方法在理论上具有严格的收敛保证，在实践中表现优异，为鲁棒学习提供了一个兼具理论完备性和实用性的优化框架。

Abstract: Robust learning aims to maintain model performance under noise, corruption, and distributional shifts, which are prevalent in modern machine learning applications. This work shows that examples of robust learning problems can be formulated as (strongly) quasar-convex optimization problems, which admit a benign landscape with no saddle points. We then propose HiPPA, an inexact high-order proximal-point method that employs a model-value gap to control the inexactness of subproblem solutions. Notably, we prove global convergence of HiPPA to global minima and establish that it attains a (local) linear or superlinear convergence rate, depending on the regularization order and inexactness control. Our numerical experiments on robust feature-alignment distillation indicate strong empirical performance of HiPPA and results consistent with our theoretical findings.

</details>


### [925] [A Unified Lyapunov-IQC Framework for Uniform Stability of Smooth Quadratic First-Order Accelerated Optimizers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08488)
*Don Li,Dacian Daescu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个统一的Lyapunov-IQC框架，用于分析一阶加速优化算法在β-光滑和γ-强凸条件下的均匀稳定性，通过将优化器建模为Lur'e型反馈互联系统，并利用LMI可行性问题来认证稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的均匀稳定性分析方法（如Hardt等人的SGD分析）依赖直接耦合论证，难以推广到包含动量项的加速优化方法（如NAG）。作者希望建立一个统一的、可扩展的框架来解决这一问题。

Method: 1. 首先利用Lyapunov函数扩展经典方法，为光滑二次NAG提供均匀稳定性界；2. 将一阶加速优化器建模为Lur'e型反馈互联系统（线性动态系统+非线性梯度算子）；3. 利用β-光滑和γ-强凸特性编码为扇形IQC不等式；4. 稳定性认证转化为求解有限维LMI可行性问题的二次Lyapunov函数。

Result: 成功为NAG提供了均匀稳定性界，并通过SDP求解LMI恢复了经典均匀稳定性界。数值实验验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 该框架揭示了优化动力学与鲁棒控制理论之间的结构联系，提供了一种模块化的方法论，可以通过凸优化工具对一阶方法的均匀稳定性和泛化行为进行可靠且可复现的数值认证，且易于扩展到更复杂的优化算法。

Abstract: We develop a unified Lyapunov-integral quadratic constraint (IQC) framework for establishing uniform stability of first-order accelerated optimization algorithms in the $β$-smooth and $γ$-strongly convex regime. Classical analyses of uniform stability, such as the work of Hardt, Recht, and Singer for stochastic gradient descent (SGD), rely on direct coupling arguments and case-by-case control of iterate differences under random sampling. Extending such arguments to accelerated methods, such as Nesterov Accelerated Gradient (NAG), is complicated by the presence of higher-order state dynamics induced by momentum. We first extend this classical approach with the use of Lyapunov functions to provide a uniform stability bound for smooth quadratic NAG, and supplement this result with small-scale numerical experiments. We then extend this framework by modeling first-order accelerated optimizers as Lur'e-type feedback interconnections between a linear dynamical system and a (non-linear) gradient operator. $β$-Smoothness and $γ$-strong convexity are encoded a sector IQC inequality. Under this representation, uniform stability is certified via the existence of a quadratic Lyapunov function satisfying a finite-dimensional linear matrix inequality (LMI) in the form of a feasibility problem, which can be solved via semi-definite programming (SDP). We instantiate this framework for NAG and show how classical uniform stability bounds can be recovered via this framework. These results underscore a structural connection between optimization dynamics and robust control theory, providing a modular methodology for reliable and reproducible numerical certification of uniform stability and generalization behavior of first-order methods via convex optimization tools that is adaptable to increasingly complex optimization algorithms.

</details>


### [926] [Local Nonconvexity Indices for \(C^{1,1}\) Functions via Generalized Hessians](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08491)
*Marina Palaisti*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文将Clarke型广义Hessian集的谱泛函应用于C^{1,1}函数，定义了区间值局部非凸性指标。该指标在光滑情形退化为经典指标，对凸函数为零，具有正交不变性、次可加性和上半连续性，并与逐点弱凸曲率模建立联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 光滑函数（C²）的局部非凸性已有基于Hessian矩阵核范数距离的指标，但C^{1,1}（一阶Lipschitz连续可微）函数缺少类似的局部度量工具。本文旨在建立C^{1,1}框架下的局部非凸性量化指标。

Method: 用Clarke型广义Hessian集（二阶可微点处极限Hessian的闭凸包）替代经典Hessian，对该集合上的同一谱泛函进行取值，得到区间值指标。上、下端点分别对应最大和最小的二阶非凸性度量。

Result: 新指标在h∈C²时退化为光滑指标；对凸C^{1,1}函数恒为零；具有正交变换不变性；上端点满足次可加不等式；上端点是上半连续的。此外，上端点与逐点弱凸曲率模建立了联系，并给出了C^{1,1}\C²的具体示例。

Conclusion: 本文是局部化的工作，提出了一种从广义Hessian集中提取的标量诊断工具，而非对非光滑凸性二阶变分理论的全面替代。该指标为C^{1,1}函数的局部非凸性提供了有效的量化手段。

Abstract: Davydov, Moldavskaya, and Zitikis introduced local indices for quantifying the lack of convexity of a \(C^2\) function by measuring the nuclear-norm distance of its Hessian from the cone of positive semidefinite matrices. This paper develops a local analogue for functions of class \(C^{1,1}\). At a point \(x\), the classical Hessian is replaced by the Clarke-type generalized Hessian set \(\Hess(h;x)\), defined as the closed convex hull of limiting Hessians at nearby twice differentiability points. Evaluating the same spectral functional over \(\Hess(h;x)\) gives an interval-valued local nonconvexity index whose lower and upper endpoints represent, respectively, the least and greatest visible second-order nonconvexity at \(x\). The construction reduces to the original smooth index when \(h\in C^2\), vanishes for convex \(C^{1,1}\) functions, is invariant under orthogonal changes of variables, satisfies a subadditivity inequality for the upper endpoint under sums, and is upper semicontinuous in its upper endpoint. We also relate the upper endpoint to a pointwise weak-convexity curvature modulus and give explicit \(C^{1,1}\setminus C^2\) examples. The paper is deliberately local in scope: it proposes a scalar diagnostic extracted from generalized Hessian sets, not a replacement for the richer second-order variational theory of nonsmooth convexity.

</details>


### [927] [Optimal Acceleration for Proximal Minimization of the Sum of Convex and Strongly Convex Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08593)
*Govind M. Chari,Uijeong Jang,Ernest K. Ryu,Behçet Açıkmeşe*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出Fast Douglas-Rachford Splitting (FDR)加速方法，在凸+强凸函数求和或单调+强单调算子求零问题上，将收敛常数改进至最优，并证明了O(1/N²)收敛率及其常数的下界最优性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Chambolle-Pock (2010)和Davis-Yin (2015)提出的加速机制达到了O(1/N²)收敛率，但该率的最优性从未被证明，且其常数还可以改进。

Method: 提出Fast Douglas-Rachford Splitting (FDR)加速方法，改进了先前工作中的常数。

Result: FDR方法在平方距离上实现了O(1/N²)收敛率，且该率及其领先常数均达到最优（通过复杂度下界证明）。

Conclusion: FDR方法不仅改进了收敛常数，还首次证明了该问题上的O(1/N²)率及其常数的最优性。

Abstract: When minimizing the sum of a convex and a strongly convex function, or when finding the zero of the sum of a monotone operator and a strongly monotone operator, Chambolle and Pock (2010) and Davis and Yin (2015) proposed accelerated mechanisms that achieve an $\mathcal{O}(1/N^2)$ convergence rate for the squared distance to the solution, but the optimality of this rate was not established. In this work, we present Fast Douglas--Rachford Splitting (FDR), an accelerated method that improves the constants established in the prior works, and provide a complexity lower bound establishing that both the $\mathcal{O}(1/N^2)$ convergence rate and the leading-order constant of FDR's rate are optimal.

</details>


### [928] [On the Stationary Duality of Structural Composite Cardinality Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08684)
*Penghe Zhang,Naihua Xiu,Houduo Qi*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究复合基数优化问题（CCOP），通过平稳对偶将复合计数简化为简单计数，推导出原始问题与对偶问题的全局解存在条件、局部解与驻点的等价性，以及原始-对偶局部解的一一对应关系，为未来开发数值算法奠定理论基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复合基数（复合计数）比简单基数更为复杂，但广泛存在于各类应用中。现有研究缺乏对复合基数优化问题的系统性理论分析，因此需要建立一套理论框架来理解和求解该类问题。

Method: 采用平稳对偶（stationary duality）技术，将复合计数问题转化为简单计数问题，从而推导出CCOP的对偶形式。在此基础上，分别从原始问题和对偶问题出发，研究全局解存在的充分条件，并证明局部解与驻点之间的等价性，进而建立原始-对偶局部解的一一对应关系。

Result: 给出了原始问题和对偶问题全局解存在的充分条件，并在文献中的代表性实例上验证了这些条件。证明了局部解与驻点的等价性，并建立了原始-对偶局部解的一一对应关系。进一步表明，在适当选择对偶加权参数的情况下，该对应关系也适用于全局解对。

Conclusion: 本文构建了复合基数优化问题的对偶理论框架，为后续开发求解CCOP的高效数值算法提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Simple cardinality refers to counting nonzero elements of an independent variable satisfying certain properties. Composite cardinality is a simple counting process composited with an affine mapping, and is therefore more complicated than the simple cardinality. We study the composite cardinality optimization problem (CCOP) with structures covering a wide range of applications. Through the use of the stationary duality, we reduce the composite counting to simple counting, and thereby obtain a dual formulation of CCOP. For both primal and dual problems, we investigate the sufficient conditions for the existence of global solutions. Those conditions are validated on representative examples from existing literature. We then show that local solutions of the primal and dual problems are equivalent to their stationary points. This result further helps us establish a one-to-one correspondences between primal and dual local solutions. We also demonstrate that the correspondence holds for a pair of global solutions to the primal and dual problems, provided that the dual weighted parameters are appropriately selected. The reported theoretical results lay foundation for developing numerical algorithms for CCOP in future.

</details>


### [929] [On Composite Adaptive Continuous Finite-Time Control of a class of Euler-Lagrange systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08751)
*Emmanuel Cruz-Zavala,Jaime A. Moreno,Antonio Loría*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对一类具有不确定势能的欧拉-拉格朗日系统，提出了基于复合自适应控制的有限时间调节方案，采用PD非线性反馈和基于DREM技术的有限时间参数估计律，并通过Lyapunov方法严格分析和仿真验证了其性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有欧拉-拉格朗日系统的有限时间自适应控制研究仍有不足，特别是尚未有工作详细研究不采用Slotine和Li自适应控制结构的复合自适应控制公式化方法。

Method: 提出了基于复合自适应控制的设定点控制方案，包含两个核心组件：(1) PD型非线性反馈项；(2) 基于动态回归器扩展与混合(DREM)技术的有限时间参数估计律，可选择Kreisselmeier或最小二乘动态回归器扩展。

Result: 通过Lyapunov方法对控制器性质进行了严格分析，并通过大量仿真研究全面评估了控制器性能。

Conclusion: 所提出的复合自适应控制方案不依赖于传统的Slotine和Li自适应控制结构，扩展了有限时间自适应控制在欧拉-拉格朗日系统中的应用。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose several set-point control schemes for achieving finite-time regulation in a class of Euler--Lagrange systems with $n$ degrees of freedom and uncertain potential energy. The proposed controllers are based on composite adaptive control approaches. Each control scheme consists of two main components: a Proportional--Derivative (PD)-based nonlinear feedback term and a finite-time parameter estimation law. The estimation laws rely on the Dynamic Regressor Extension and Mixing (DREM) technique, which can be designed using either the Kreisselmeier or the least-squares dynamic regressor extensions. These results extend recent advances in finite-time adaptive control for Euler-Lagrange systems. To the best of the authors' knowledge, the composite adaptive control formulation proposed here, which does not employ well-known Slotine and Li adaptive control structure, has not been studied in detail yet. The properties of the proposed controllers are rigorously analyzed using Lyapunov methods. The performance of the controllers is thoroughly evaluated through extensive simulation studies.

</details>


### [930] [Local LMO: Constrained Gradient Optimization via a Local Linear Minimization Oracle](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08850)
*Peter Richtárik,Kaja Gruntkowska,Hanmin Li*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了 Local LMO，一种新的无投影梯度型方法用于约束优化。核心思想是用局部线性最小化预言（在约束集与当前迭代点附近的小球的交集上）替代 Frank-Wolfe 方法中的全局线性最小化预言。该方法可视为梯度下降的推广，在无约束情形退化为梯度下降，在仿射约束情形退化为限制在仿射子空间上的梯度下降。作者证明了该方法在多个重要场景下能达到投影梯度下降的收敛率，且不要求可行集有界或满足曲率假设，在光滑强凸情形下可获得线性收敛率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Frank-Wolfe 方法虽然避免了投影操作，但存在若干局限：需要可行集有界、依赖曲率假设、收敛率在某些场景下不如投影梯度下降。作者希望设计一种新的投影自由方法，既能保持无投影的优点，又能克服 FW 的上述限制，达到与投影梯度下降相当的收敛性能。

Method: 提出 Local LMO 算法，其迭代为 x_{k+1} ∈ argmin_{z∈𝒳∩ℬ(x_k,t_k)} ⟨∇f(x_k), z⟩，即在当前点的小邻域与约束集的交集上执行线性最小化。半径 t_k 可视为有效步长。该方法在无约束情形退化为梯度下降，在仿射约束情形退化为限制在仿射子空间上的梯度下降。

Result: 1) 在光滑强凸情形下获得线性收敛率；2) 在光滑凸和非凸情形下获得 sharp 次线性率；3) 在 (L0,L1)-光滑凸情形下获得次线性率；4) 在随机和非可微设定下也有结果；5) 不要求可行集有界，不要求曲率假设，对凸函数有界梯度可获得标准次线性率。

Conclusion: Local LMO 是一种简单而有效的投影自由优化方法，将投影梯度下降的收敛率迁移到了无投影框架下，在多个方面超越了 Frank-Wolfe 方法的能力范围，为约束优化提供了新的理论保证更强的算法选择。

Abstract: We design Local LMO - a new projection-free gradient-type method for constrained optimization. The key algorithmic idea is to replace the global linear minimization oracle over the constraint set used by Frank-Wolfe (FW) with a local linear minimization oracle over the intersection of the constraint set and a "small" ball centered at the current iterate. In particular, when minimizing $f:\mathbb{R}^d\to \mathbb{R}$ over a constraint $\emptyset\neq\mathcal{X}\subseteq\mathbb{R}^d$, Local LMO performs the iteration \[x_{k+1}\in \arg\min_{z\in\mathcal{X}\cap\mathcal{B}(x_{k},t_k)}\langle\nabla f(x_{k}), z \rangle,\] where $x_0\in\mathcal{X}$, and $t_k>0$ is a suitably chosen radius which can be interpreted as an effective stepsize. While designed as an alternative to FW, Local LMO is perhaps best viewed as a generalization of Gradient Descent (GD) rather than a modification of FW. Indeed, it is easy to see that Local LMO reduces to GD in the unconstrained setting and, more generally, to GD restricted to an affine subspace if the constraint $\mathcal{X}$ is affine. We prove that this simple algorithmic scheme transfers the known (unaccelerated) convergence rates of Projected Gradient Descent (PGD) to the projection-free world in several important regimes, some of which are beyond the reach of FW. In contrast to FW theory, i) our guarantees hold without requiring the feasible set $\mathcal{X}$ to be bounded, ii) our theory does not require the "curvature" assumption, which allows us to establish a standard sublinear rate for convex functions with bounded gradients, iii) we obtain a linear rate in the smooth strongly convex regime. Furthermore, we obtain sharp sublinear rates in the smooth convex and non-convex regimes, in the $(L_0,L_1)$-smooth convex regime, and in stochastic and non-differentiable settings.

</details>


### [931] [Rennala MVR: Improved Time Complexity for Parallel Stochastic Optimization via Momentum-Based Variance Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08871)
*Zhirayr Tovmasyan,Artavazd Maranjyan,Peter Richtárik*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本论文提出Rennala MVR，一种基于动量方差缩减的分布式优化算法，证明在异质性集群上方差缩减能够改善时间复杂度，并通过理论和实验验证了其相对于Rennala SGD的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在大规模分布式机器学习中，集群中机器性能存在异质性（硬件差异、网络延迟等），此时时间复杂度比迭代复杂度更为关键。已有工作（Rennala SGD）首次给出了并行一阶随机优化的时间复杂度分析，但方差缩减技术能否在异质系统中改善时间复杂度尚未被探索。

Method: 本文提出Rennala MVR算法，在Rennala SGD的基础上引入基于动量的方差缩减技术；在均方平滑假设下进行时间复杂度分析；并建立了相应的时间复杂度下界。

Result: 理论结果表明，在相关参数区间内方差缩减能够改善时间复杂度；实验方面，在随机二次型基准上精确方法支持理论，在神经网络实验中实用化的非精确变体也展现出相比Rennala SGD的实证提升。

Conclusion: 方差缩减在异质分布式系统中可以同时改善时间复杂度和迭代复杂度，Rennala MVR在理论上和时间性上都优于Rennala SGD。

Abstract: Large-scale machine learning models are trained on clusters of machines that exhibit heterogeneous performance due to hardware variability, network delays, and system-level instabilities. In such environments, time complexity rather than iteration complexity becomes the relevant performance metric for optimization algorithms. Recent work by Tyurin and Richtárik (2023) established the first time complexity analysis for parallel first-order stochastic optimization, proposing Rennala SGD as a time-optimal method for smooth nonconvex optimization. However, Rennala SGD is fundamentally a modification of SGD, and variance reduction techniques are known to improve the iteration complexity of SGD. In this work, we investigate whether variance reduction can also improve time complexity in heterogeneous systems. We show that, under a mean-squared smoothness assumption, variance reduction can improve time complexity in relevant parameter regimes. To this end, we propose Rennala MVR, a variance-reduced extension of Rennala SGD based on momentum-based variance reduction, and analyze its oracle and time complexity. We establish lower bounds for time complexity under these assumptions. On a stochastic quadratic benchmark, experiments with the exact method support the theory, while neural-network experiments with a practical inexact variant show similar empirical gains over Rennala SGD.

</details>


### [932] [Efficient sparse GP-MPC with accurate mean and variance propagation applied for quadcopter flight control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08903)
*Giannis Badakis,Mircea Lazar,Roland Toth*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种计算高效的GP-MPC方法，通过LPV结构保持非线性预测的仿射形式，并推导了稀疏GP在不确定输入下的矩匹配封闭解，最终将问题转化为可高效求解的QP序列，在Crazyflie 2.1微型四旋翼上验证了其高效性与准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GP-MPC方法保守性高、计算效率低，难以扩展到大规模数据集，需要一种既能传播均值和方差以降低保守性，又能提高计算效率的方法。

Method: 1) 将非线性GP-MPC重构为精确的线性参数变化(LPV)结构，保持仿射形式的非线性预测动力学；2) 推导稀疏GP在不确定输入下均值和方差传播的矩匹配(MM)封闭解；3) 将GP-MPC问题转化为可高效求解的二次规划(QP)序列。

Result: 仿真和Crazyflie 2.1微型四旋翼实物实验表明，该方法显著提升了运行效率，同时保持了预测精度。

Conclusion: 该方法在计算效率和预测精度之间取得了良好平衡，为GP-MPC的实用化提供了可行方案。

Abstract: This paper presents a computationally efficient approach for Gaussian process model predictive control (GP-MPC), where Gaussian process (GP) regression is used to complement a baseline model of the system dynamics. The proposed method achieves propagation of both the predicted mean and variance, thereby significantly reducing conservativeness compared with existing GP-MPC formulations. The nonlinear GP-MPC problem is reformulated into an exact linear parameter-varying (LPV) structure that preserves the nonlinear prediction dynamics in affine form without introducing further approximation. Moreover, closed-form derivations of moment matching (MM) predictions for sparse GPs are developed, including both mean and variance propagation under uncertain inputs, which improves scalability to larger datasets. This further enables recasting the resulting GP-MPC problem as a sequence of quadratic programs (QPs), which can be solved efficiently. The proposed framework significantly improves runtime efficiency while maintaining prediction accuracy, as demonstrated through simulation and real-world experiments on a Crazyflie 2.1 micro quadcopter.

</details>


### [933] [Learning Generative Dynamics with Soft Law Constraints: A McKean-Vlasov FBSDE Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08928)
*Samer El Boustany,Samy Mekkaoui,Yadh Hafsi,Alexandre Alouadi,Huyên Pham*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于McKean-Vlasov控制问题的生成框架，用于从端点及中间分布观测中学习随机动力学，通过软能量约束施加终端和时间边际律，并采用前向-后向随机微分方程求解器进行训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在学习随机动力学，使其不仅匹配端点分布，还能拟合中间时刻的边际分布，避免硬插值或最优传输映射的局限。

Method: 将生成过程建模为McKean-Vlasov控制问题，终端和中间边际律通过软能量约束实现；最优性系统为FBSDE，后向分量受边际律惩罚诱导的连续漂移驱动；在二次控制成本和恒定扩散假设下推导简化FBSDE，并用神经求解器训练。

Result: 在低维分布基准上恢复光滑的随机路径并匹配边际律；在ALAE隐空间上完成情感迁移（非微笑→微笑）；在AMASS人体运动数据集上生成符合中间分布演化的随机轨迹。

Conclusion: 软边际律约束能够生成连贯的随机轨迹，其中间分布与观测的人体运动演化一致，为分布间随机动力学建模提供了有原则的替代方案。

Abstract: We propose a generative framework for learning stochastic dynamics from endpoint and intermediate distributional observations. The method formulates generation as a McKean-Vlasov control problem in which terminal and time-marginal laws are enforced through soft energy constraints. The associated optimality system is a forward-backward stochastic differential equation (FBSDE) whose backward component receives a continuous drift induced by the marginal law penalties. This provides a principled alternative to hard interpolation or optimal transport maps between observed distributions: the model learns a stochastic path law whose dynamics remain globally coupled through the mean-field objective. We derive the reduced FBSDE system for quadratic control cost and constant diffusion, connecting terminal and marginal law flat derivatives to score-like training signals. The resulting neural solver is evaluated on low-dimensional distributional benchmarks, where it recovers smooth stochastic paths matching prescribed marginal laws. In a higher-dimensional ALAE latent space, endpoint supervision is used as a qualitative stress test for transporting non-smiling faces toward smiling ones in a pretrained representation. We then use articulated human motion as a structured high-dimensional case study on a curated AMASS low-to-high position dataset, using SMPL-H pose sequences and reduced pose representations. The experiments show that soft marginal law constraints can produce coherent stochastic trajectories whose intermediate distributions follow the observed evolution of human motion. The code is available at https://github.com/murex/deep-mkv-gen/tree/main.

</details>


### [934] [Riemannian optimal reduction for linear systems with quadratic outputs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09035)
*Xiaolong Wang,Chenglong Liu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于黎曼优化的线性系统二次输出H2最优模型降阶方法，通过直接优化降阶模型的系数矩阵（而非投影矩阵）并利用乘积流形施加稳定性约束，采用有限记忆黎曼BFGS算法迭代求解，显著减少了变量数量，数值实验验证了该方法在H2误差方面的优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统H2最优模型降阶方法通常选择投影矩阵作为优化变量，导致变量数量庞大且优化效率低。本文旨在通过直接优化降阶模型的系数矩阵来减少变量数量，提高优化效率，同时保证降阶模型的稳定性和精度。

Method: 将H2最优模型降阶问题构建为黎曼流形上的优化问题，直接以降阶模型系数矩阵为优化变量；定义乘积流形施加稳定性约束；推导目标函数黎曼梯度的显式公式；采用有限记忆黎曼BFGS方法迭代求解。

Result: 数值仿真结果表明，所提出的方法降阶模型能够准确逼近原系统，在H2误差指标上表现优越，验证了算法的有效性。

Conclusion: 直接优化系数矩阵结合黎曼优化的策略能有效减少变量数量，同时保证降阶模型的稳定性和高精度，是一种高效的H2最优模型降阶方法。

Abstract: This paper presents an H2-optimal model order reduction (MOR) method for linear systems with quadratic outputs based on Riemannian optimization. The H2-optimal MOR is formulated as an optimization problem in which the optimization variables are selected directly as the coefficient matrices of reduced models. The product manifold is defined properly to impose the stability condition for reduced models. By exploiting the geometric properties of the product manifold, we derive an explicit formula for Riemannian gradient of the objective function, and then a limited-memory Riemannian BFGS method is adopted to solve the resulting optimization problem iteratively. In contrast to selecting projection matrices, optimizing coefficient matrices of reduced models reduces the amount of variables dramatically. Numerical simulation results demonstrate that reduced models accurately approximate the original system and exhibit superior performance in terms of H2 error, which confirms the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm.

</details>


### [935] [Approximation of Degenerate Hyperbolic Equations with Interior Degeneracy and Applications to Controllability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09069)
*Dong-Hui Yang,Bao-Zhu Guo*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文建立了一类退化双曲方程解的存在性，通过一致双曲方程序列逼近，并首次利用该框架推导出高维退化双曲方程的可控性结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献中尚未探索特定退化双曲方程的逼近方法，且高维退化双曲方程的可控性研究尚属空白。

Method: 先证明退化双曲方程解的存在性，再用一致双曲方程序列逼近退化方程，最后利用该逼近框架研究可控性。

Result: 成功建立了解的存在性，并首次获得了高维退化双曲方程的可控性结果。

Conclusion: 该逼近框架有效，且为高维退化双曲方程的可控性研究开辟了新的方向。

Abstract: In this paper, we establish the existence of solutions for a particular class of degenerate hyperbolic equations. Following this, we approximate these degenerate equations by employing a sequence of uniformly hyperbolic equations. Notably, this specific approximation result has remained unexplored in the existing body of literature. Ultimately, we utilize this approximation framework to derive controllability results for the original degenerate hyperbolic equations, marking what could potentially be the inaugural investigation into higher-dimensional degenerate hyperbolic equations.

</details>


### [936] [A Certificate of Unboundedness for Polynomial Optimization Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09162)
*Rohan Rele,Angelia Nedich*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种预处理算法，用于检测任意多项式优化问题是否无下界，从而在求解前提供问题的渐近几何信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有全局多项式优化方法依赖可行域的紧致性，计算成本高，且大多数求解器在全局搜索前不验证解是否存在。

Method: 提出一种简单的预处理算法，在求解前判断多项式优化问题是否无下界。

Result: 该算法能够提供问题渐近几何的先验信息，避免不必要的全局搜索。

Conclusion: 预处理算法可降低全局优化的计算开销，提高求解效率。

Abstract: Global polynomial optimization methods typically rely on compactness of the feasible region in order to find solutions. These methods can incur considerable computational expense and most commercially available solvers do not verify the existence of a solution prior to undergoing global search. In this manuscript we propose a simple pre-processing algorithm to determine if an arbitrary polynomial optimization problem is unbounded from below thereby providing information about the problem's asymptotic geometry prior to solving the problem if a solution can be found.

</details>


### [937] [An optimal control problem for Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard-Oono equations with regular potential](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09207)
*Arghya Kundu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了两相不可压缩流体相场模型（耦合Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard-Oono方程）的最优控制问题，建立了最优解的存在性，并推导了伴随系统的最优性条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对两相不可压缩流体流动问题，考虑表面张力效应，建立具有L²成本泛函的最优控制问题，为相场模型提供严格的数学理论支撑。

Method: 以Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard-Oono耦合方程组为约束条件，定义L²成本泛函；通过变分法分析最优解存在性，并利用伴随方法推导最优性条件。

Result: 证明了该耦合最优控制问题存在最优解；推导出了对应于伴随系统的最优性条件。

Conclusion: 为两相不可压缩流体相场模型的最优控制问题提供了数学理论基础，建立了存在性和最优性条件的形式化结果。

Abstract: This article discusses an optimal control problem for a phase field model of two immiscible incompressible fluid flow, incorporating surface tension effects. The optimal control problem is defined with a $L^2$-cost functional and subject to the constraints governed by a system of coupled Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard-Oono equations. In this model, fluids are separated by a dynamic diffuse interface of finite width. We investigate the optimality condition of a given control. Initially, we establish the existence of an optimal solution for the coupled optimal control problem. Subsequently, we derive the optimality condition with respect to the corresponding adjoint system.

</details>


### [938] [Select-then-differentiate: Solving Bilevel Optimization with Manifold Lower-level Solution Sets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09209)
*Saeed Masiha,Zebang Shen,Negar Kiyavash,Niao He*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究下层问题具有非孤立极小值流形时的乐观双层优化，证明在局部PŁ条件下乐观选择的唯一性足以保证超目标可微，并提出基于伪逆的超梯度公式；受此启发，设计了"先选择后微分"方法HG-MS，其收敛复杂度取决于解流形的内在维度而非环境维度，在LLM源重加权任务上取得最优结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有双层优化理论通常假设下层问题有唯一极小值点，但实际中下层问题常存在非孤立的极小值流形（多个解），导致超目标可能不可微。作者希望理解在这种设定下超目标何时可微、具有何种正则性，并据此设计高效的优化算法。

Method: 1) 理论分析：在局部PŁ条件下，证明乐观选择的唯一性足以保证超目标可微，给出伪逆形式的超梯度公式；2) 算法设计：提出HG-MS，先显式求解乐观选择（在下层解流形上选择对上层最优的解），再利用伪逆高效计算超梯度；3) 理论保证：证明HG-MS收敛到乐观目标的驻点，复杂度由解流形的内在维度决定；4) 实验验证：在LLM源重加权任务上测试HG-MS的实用变体。

Result: 1) 超目标可微性不要求下层解集是单点集，乐观选择的唯一性就足够了；2) 若选择出的极小值点沿流形非退化则局部光滑，否则可能完全丧失所有正Hölder正则性；3) HG-MS在LLM源重加权任务上取得最佳GSM8K/MATH分数，MT-Bench指令跟随结果达到竞争或最优水平。

Conclusion: 本文为下层解集为流形的乐观双层优化提供了完整的理论刻画（可微性、正则性、算法收敛性），并验证了"先选择后微分"这一原则在实际问题中的有效性。

Abstract: We study optimistic bilevel optimization when the lower-level problem has a non-isolated manifold of minimizers. In this setting, the hyper-objective may be non-differentiable because the upper-level criterion must choose among multiple lower-level solutions. Under a local Polyak--Łojasiewicz (PŁ) condition, we show that differentiability does not require the lower-level solution set to be a singleton: uniqueness of the optimistic selection is sufficient. This yields an explicit pseudoinverse-based hyper-gradient formula extending the classical singleton-minimizer result. We further characterize the regularity of the hyper-objective: non-degeneracy of the selected minimizer along the solution manifold yields local smoothness, while failure of uniqueness can create many non-differentiable points and failure of non-degeneracy can destroy all positive Hölder regularity of the hyper-gradient. Motivated by this theory, we propose HG-MS, a select-then-differentiate method combining explicit optimistic selection with efficient pseudoinverse-based hyper-gradient computation. Despite the nonconvex nature of optimistic selection over the lower-level solution manifold, we show that HG-MS converges to a stationary point of the optimistic objective with complexity governed by the intrinsic dimension of the solution manifold rather than its ambient dimension. Empirically, we test a practical variant of HG-MS for matched-budget LLM source reweighting. This variant preserves the select-then-differentiate principle and obtains the best GSM8K/MATH scores across the tested backbones, along with competitive or best MT-Bench instruction-following results.

</details>


### [939] [Localization for nonlocal gradient-based optimal control problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09220)
*Javier Cueto,Joshua M. Siktar*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文在Bellido-2023的非局部函数空间框架下研究最优控制问题，涉及两个参数（horizon参数δ和分数参数s），分析了凸能量（非局部p-Laplacian）和更一般的多/拟凸能量两种情况，并通过两种方式（s→1或δ→0）研究对局部问题的逼近。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在非局部函数空间框架下研究最优控制问题，探索不同参数（δ和s）对问题适定性及逼近局部问题的影响。

Method: 在Bellido-2023框架下建立最优控制问题，分别处理凸能量（非局部p-Laplacian）和更一般的多/拟凸能量两类约束，并通过s→1或δ→0两种路径分析对局部问题的逼近。

Result: 凸能量情形问题适定（well-posed）；多/拟凸能量情形解存在但不一定唯一；两种逼近路径（s→1或δ→0）均可实现向局部问题的近似。

Conclusion: 本文建立的非局部最优控制框架在凸情形下具有良好适定性，在更一般情形下仍有解存在，且可通过不同参数路径逼近经典局部问题。

Abstract: In this paper we consider optimal control problems in the nonlocal function space framework of Bellido-2023, where there are two different parameters: a horizon parameter $δ> 0$; and a fractional parameter $s \in (0, 1)$. The constraints are given in the form of minimizing an energy density, and we will focus on two particular cases: the well-posed case where the underlying energy density is convex and is given by the nonlocal $p$-Laplacian; and a more general poly/quasiconvex energy for which minimizers exist but may not be unique. The study is concluded by analyzing the approximation to local problems in two parallel ways, either taking the fractional parameter $s$ to $1$ or the horizon parameter $δ$ to $0$.

</details>


### [940] [Mutual Information Optimal Density Control of Linear Systems and Generalized Schrödinger Bridges with Reference Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09349)
*Shoju Enami,Kenji Kashima*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对离散时间线性系统，提出了一种互信息正则化下的最优密度控制方法，通过交替优化算法求解带有高斯密度约束的控制问题，并揭示了该方法与广义薛定谔桥问题的等价性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 互信息最优控制虽能通过随机性输入在控制性能与收益间取得权衡，但其引入的随机性在安全关键场景中存在隐患，因此需要直接控制状态不确定性。

Method: 在指定时刻施加高斯密度约束以直接控制状态不确定性，并提出交替优化算法，且推导了每一步的闭式解。

Result: 所提出的交替优化算法在互信息最优密度控制问题上与离散时间线性系统对应的广义薛定谔桥问题的交替优化是一致的。

Conclusion: 该方法能够在保持互信息正则化优势的同时，通过密度约束有效控制状态不确定性，且具备与薛定谔桥问题的理论联系。

Abstract: We consider a mutual information (MI) regularized version of optimal density control of a discrete-time linear system. MI optimal control has been proposed as an extension of maximum entropy optimal control to trade off between control performance and benefits provided by stochastic inputs. MI regularization induces stochasticity in the policy, which poses challenges for applications of MI optimal control in safety-critical scenarios. To remedy this situation, we impose Gaussian density constraints at specified times to directly control state uncertainty. For this MI optimal density control problem, we propose an alternating optimization algorithm and derive the closed form of each step in the algorithm. In addition, we reveal that the alternating optimization of the MI optimal density control problem coincides with that of the so-called generalized Schrödinger bridge problem associated with the discrete-time linear system.

</details>


### [941] [Newton Method for Soft Quadratic Surface Support Vector Machine with 0-1 Loss Function](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09361)
*Guoping Li,Wen Song*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于0-1损失函数的无核软二次曲面支持向量机模型（L0/1-SQSSVM），建立了其一阶和二阶最优性条件，设计了基于驻点方程的牛顿法求解算法，并证明了该算法在二阶充分条件下的局部二次收敛性。实验表明该方法在分类精度和计算效率上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的支持向量机方法多采用凸松弛损失函数（如hinge损失），但0-1损失函数更能直接度量分类错误；同时传统SVM使用线性或核方法，而二次曲面决策边界在某些问题上更具表达力。作者希望结合0-1损失的无偏性与二次曲面的几何灵活性，提出一个非凸非连续但更准确的分类模型。

Method: 1) 提出L0/1-SQSSVM模型，结合0-1损失函数与无核软二次曲面SVM；2) 利用0-1损失函数的近端算子性质建立驻点方程，推导一阶和二阶最优性条件；3) 设计基于驻点方程的牛顿法求解算法；4) 证明算法在二阶充分条件下具有局部二次收敛性。

Result: 在人工数据集和基准数据集上的数值实验表明，所提出的牛顿法在分类准确率上优于其他主流方法，同时CPU时间成本更低。

Conclusion: L0/1-SQSSVM模型结合牛顿法能有效解决二分类问题，在精度和效率两方面均具有竞争优势，为处理非凸非连续优化问题提供了一个理论扎实且实用的求解框架。

Abstract: A nonlinear kernel-free soft quadratic surface support vector machine model with 0-1 loss function ($L_{0/1}$-SQSSVM) is proposed for binary classification problems, which is non-convex discontinuous. We are devoted to establishing the first and the second-order optimality conditions for the $L_{0/1}$-SQSSVM. We establish a stationary equation using the properties of proximal operator of 0-1 loss function. We design a Newton method based on the stationary equation to solve $L_{0/1}$-SQSSVM model and prove that the Newton method has local quadratic convergence under the second-order sufficient condition. Numerical experience on artificial datasets and benchmark datasets demonstrate that the Newton method for $L_{0/1}$-SQSSVM achieves higher classification accuracy with less CPU time cost than other state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [942] [Extended MF-FBSDEs with nonlinear domination-monotonicity conditions and stochastic optimal controls of Linear System with quadruple controls](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09374)
*Hao Wu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文将支配-单调性条件从线性框架扩展到非线性框架，结合非线性伴随函数，证明了扩展平均场正倒向随机微分方程（MF-FBSDEs）的适定性。基于此结果，研究了两类随机四重最优控制问题（线性凸问题和带随机时变输入约束的线性二次问题），建立了最优控制的存在唯一性并给出了显式闭式解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将支配-单调性条件从线性情形推广到非线性情形，以解决更一般的平均场正倒向随机微分方程的适定性问题，并为受约束的随机最优控制问题提供理论工具。

Method: 通过引入非线性伴随函数，将线性框架下的支配-单调性条件扩展至非线性情景；结合推广后的适定性结果与其他精细分析技术，处理两类随机四重最优控制问题。

Result: 对于线性凸问题和带随机时变输入约束的线性二次问题，分别证明了最优控制的存在唯一性，并推导出显式的闭式解表达式。

Conclusion: 成功将支配-单调性条件推广至非线性框架，并为两类重要的随机最优控制问题提供了完整的理论保证和解析解。

Abstract: This paper extends the domination-monotonicity conditions, which guarantee the well-posedness of extended mean-filed forward-backward stochastic differential equations (extended MF-FBSDEs), from the previously studied linear framework to a nonlinear setting by incorporating nonlinear adjoint functions. Utilizing this generalized well-posedness result for extended MF-FBSDEs in conjunction with other refined analytical techniques, we address two classes of stochastic quadruple optimal controlled problems: a linear-convex problem and a linear-quadratic problem with input constraints that are permitted to be time-dependent and random. For each problem, we establish the existence and uniqueness of optimal controls and derive their explicit closed-form representations.

</details>


### [943] [Barrier Certificates for Uncertain Temporal Specifications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09445)
*Mohammad H. Mamduhi,Sadegh Soudjani*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对随机谓词时态逻辑规范，提出了一种基于证书的框架，通过将随机谓词转化为确定性谓词并利用增广空间的障碍证书，以优化条件界定概率满足程度，避免动态规划的计算负担。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法主要关注确定性谓词的时态逻辑验证，但实际系统中谓词可能因不确定环境或外部随机过程而随机演化，传统验证框架无法处理这种双重不确定性。

Method: 1) 将带有随机谓词的时态逻辑规范转化为增广空间上的确定性谓词规范；2) 在增广空间上使用障碍证书提供可计算的优化条件；3) 针对线性动力学和安全规范，推导了障碍证书保证违规概率边界的解析条件。

Result: 通过数值案例验证了所提方法在随机谓词下对时态逻辑规范概率界定的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出了一种可计算的证书框架，能够有效处理随机谓词的时态逻辑验证问题，避免动态规划的高计算成本，为随机动力系统在不确定环境下的形式化验证提供了新途径。

Abstract: This paper studies satisfying temporal logic specifications on stochastic dynamical systems, where the predicates evolve randomly over time. Such randomness may arise from uncertain environment models or external stochastic processes causing the sets associated with predicate satisfaction to vary in a non-deterministic manner. As a result, verifying whether a stochastic dynamical system satisfies a temporal specification depends also on the uncertainty in the predicates. We develop a certificate-based framework to bound the probability of satisfying temporal logic specifications with randomly evolving predicates. We first show that temporal logic specifications with stochastic predicates can be transformed to specifications with deterministic predicates on an augmented space which is extended to include the stochastic space of predicate's uncertainty. We then utilize barrier certificates on an augmented space to provide tractable optimization-based conditions and to avoid the computational burden of dynamic programming. Focusing on linear dynamics and safety-type specifications, we derive analytical conditions under which barrier certificates guarantee bounds on the probability of violating the stochastic safety predicates. The approach is demonstrated on numerical case studies.

</details>


### [944] [Controllability of quasilinear parabolic equations under multiplicative mobile controls](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09447)
*Lingyang Liu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了一类由移动支撑乘性控制驱动的拟线性抛物型方程的可控性问题，通过构建光滑过渡，证明了存在乘性控制使系统在有限时间T内精确静止。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 由于主算子的非线性带来了显著挑战，线性热方程的方法不再适用，因此需要新的理论框架来解决拟线性抛物型方程的乘性控制问题。

Method: 首先建立无控系统的衰减性质，然后通过精心构造的光滑过渡，在经典解框架下求解可控性问题。

Result: 证明了存在一种乘性控制，能够使系统在时间T处精确达到静止状态。

Conclusion: 成功将乘性控制的可控性理论从线性情形拓展到拟线性情形，为更广泛的非线性偏微分方程控制问题提供了新思路。

Abstract: This paper addresses the controllability of a class of quasi-linear parabolic equations governed by multiplicative controls with mobile support. To prove the existence of such a control forcing the solution to rest at time $T>0$, we first establish the decay property of solutions for the uncontrolled system. Unlike the case of the linear heat equation, the nonlinearity in the principal part of the operator introduces significant challenges. These difficulties necessitate a novel approach, ultimately leading us to solve the controllability problem within the framework of classical solutions. Through a carefully constructed smooth transition, we demonstrate that there exists a multiplicative control driving the state exactly to rest at time $t=T$.

</details>


### [945] [Diagnostic Certificates of Data Quality and Regression Identifiability for Koopman Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09545)
*Yue Wu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种诊断证书框架，用于定位Koopman/EDMDc框架中数据质量失败的原因，将状态空间覆盖、提升特征非退化性和回归谱分离为不同层次，并提供理论保证和实验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典的持续激励准则通常只关注输入或回归信号是否足够丰富，但在Koopman和EDMDc中，数据质量由提升后的状态特征与控制输入的串联决定。输入丰富的数据可能只访问狭窄的状态区域，分布良好的状态样本可能产生退化的提升特征，两者都可能导致最终回归问题的条件不良。现有方法缺乏能够定位这些失败原因的框架。

Method: 提出诊断证书框架，将数据质量问题分解为三个层次：(1) 状态空间覆盖与聚类证书；(2) 提升特征非退化性证书；(3) 回归谱证书。回归谱证书具有直接的理论保证，控制标准化设计的最小奇异值，具有Fisher信息和一步EDMDc稳定性解释，并在种群谱间隙下提供有限样本下界。同时给出结构示例和Schur补条件，证明各层证书不可相互替代。

Result: 在Duffing、Van der Pol和Lorenz系统上的实验表明：证书层次是可分离的，预算和权重会改变瓶颈位置，下游预测或控制性能在任何一个单一证书上都不是单调的。

Conclusion: 该框架旨在作为可解释的诊断和数据收集指南，而非通用的最优性声明。IGPE-DOPT作为采样示例，利用这些证书对候选轨迹片段进行评分。

Abstract: Classical persistent excitation criteria usually assess whether an input or regressor signal is sufficiently rich. In Koopman and EDMD with control (EDMDc), however, data quality is determined by the concatenation of lifted state features and control inputs. Input-rich data can still visit a narrow state region, well-spread state samples can still produce degenerate lifted features, and both can fail to condition the final regression problem.
  This paper develops a diagnostic certificate framework for locating these failures. The certificates separate state-space coverage and clustering, lifted-feature nondegeneracy, and the final regression spectrum. The regression-spectrum certificate is the layer with direct theoretical guarantees: it controls the active standardized design's smallest singular value, has Fisher-information and one-step EDMDc stability interpretations, and admits a finite-sample lower bound under a population spectral gap. We also give structural examples and a Schur-complement condition showing why state, lifted, input, and regression diagnostics cannot be substituted for one another.
  As a sampling example, IGPE-DOPT uses these certificates to score candidate trajectory segments. Experiments on Duffing, Van der Pol, and Lorenz systems compare input-, state-, lifted-, and regression-oriented baselines. The results show that certificate layers separate, budget and weights shift bottlenecks, and downstream prediction or control performance is not monotone in any single certificate. The framework is therefore intended as an interpretable diagnostic and data-collection guide, not as a universal optimality claim.

</details>


### [946] [Phases of Muon: When Muon Eclipses SignSGD](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09552)
*Elliot Paquette,Noah Marshall,Lucas Benigni,Guangyuan Wang,Atish Agarwala,Courtney Paquette*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 这篇论文分析了Muon等谱优化器（特别是SignSVD和SignSGD）在高维矩阵最小二乘问题上的表现。研究发现，SignSVD在大批量时对数据协方差谱进行平方根预处理，小批量时小特征模式退化为SGD；而SignSGD不做预处理。两者在数据各向同性时性能一致，各向异性时表现不同。通过幂律协方差模型（指数α和β），论文揭示了三个性能相区。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muon和相关谱优化器在实际应用中表现优异（常超越Adam），但其理论行为尚不明确。作者希望从理论上理解这些优化器的工作原理，特别是SignSVD与SignSGD（作为Adam代理）之间的差异。

Method: 在高维矩阵最小二乘问题上推导了确定性的动力学方程，通过分析（随机）SignSVD和（随机）SignSGD的收敛行为，并引入幂律协方差模型（数据指数α和目标指数β）进行相图分析。

Result: SignSVD在大批量时进行平方根预处理，小批量时小特征模式退化为SGD；SignSGD不做预处理。两者在各向同性数据下仅相差常数因子，各向异性时行为不同。幂律模型下存在三个相区：SignSGD占优区、SignSVD占优区以及两者性能权衡区。

Conclusion: 谱优化器（如Muon/SignSVD）与Adam类方法（SignSGD）在非各向同性数据上存在本质差异，选择哪种优化器取决于数据协方差和目标函数的谱特性（α和β指数）。

Abstract: Recently, Muon and related spectral optimizers have demonstrated strong empirical performance as scalable stochastic methods, often outperforming Adam. Yet their behaviour remains poorly understood. We analyze stochastic spectral optimizers, including Muon, on a high-dimensional matrix-valued least squares problem. We derive explicit deterministic dynamics that provide a tractable framework for studying learning behaviour with a focus on (stochastic) SignSVD, which Muon approximates, and (stochastic) SignSGD, the latter serving as a proxy for Adam. Our analysis shows that for large batch size, SignSVD performs a square-root preconditioning with respect to the data covariance spectrum, while for small batch size smaller eigenmodes behave like SGD, slowing down convergence. We contrast with SignSGD which for generic covariance performs no preconditioning and has no transition, leading to different optimal learning rates and convergence characteristics. The two methods match up to a constant factor with isotropic data, but behave differently with anisotropic data. An analysis of a power law covariance model with data exponent $α$ and target exponent $β$ shows there are three phases in the $(α,β)$ plane: one where SignSGD is uniformly favored, one where SignSVD is uniformly favored, and a third where the two methods exhibit a trade-off in performance.

</details>


### [947] [Stabilization for a Cascaded ODE-Wave Equation with Boundary Nonlinear Disturbances](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10037)
*Zhan-Dong Mei,Lan-Xi Tang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究由ODE和波动PDE组成的级联系统在边界控制下的指数镇定问题，提出了状态反馈控制器和基于观测器的抗扰控制方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决ODE-波动PDE级联系统在边界控制下的指数镇定问题，并处理内部不确定性和外部扰动。

Method: 引入新颖变换将PDE边界控制输入融入ODE子系统；设计状态反馈控制器；构建扰动估计器和Luenberger型状态观测器，实现基于观测器的抗扰控制。

Result: 所提控制器实现了ODE和PDE组件的指数稳定；闭环系统有界性得到严格证明；数值仿真验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 所提出的观测器控制方案能有效抑制匹配扰动，实现级联系统的指数镇定。

Abstract: In this article, we investigate the problem of exponential stabilization via output feedback for a cascaded system composed of an ordinary differential equation (ODE) and a wave partial differential equation (PDE) under boundary control. Four types of boundary interconnections are considered. In the absence of disturbances, a novel transformation is introduced to incorporate the PDE boundary control input into the ODE subsystem. Based on this transformation, a state feedback controller is designed to achieve exponential stability for both the ODE and PDE components. When internal uncertainties and external disturbances that match the control structure are present, a disturbance estimator is constructed. Utilizing this estimator, a Luenberger-type state observer is developed to reject the disturbances and exponentially stabilize the original system via an observer-based control scheme. Furthermore, the boundedness of the entire closed-loop system is rigorously established. Numerical simulations are provided to illustrate the theoretical results.

</details>


### [948] [Parameterized Complexity of Stationarity Testing for Piecewise-Affine Functions and Shallow CNN Losses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10219)
*Yuhan Ye*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了连续分段仿射(PA)函数在给定点处近似一阶平稳性检验的参数化复杂度，以维数d为参数，给出了固定维数下的XP算法，证明了互补侧问题的W[1]-困难性，并在指数时间假设下给出了下界。结果还扩展到了浅层ReLU CNN训练损失的平稳性检验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Tian和So (SODA 2025) 指出的开放问题：PA函数近似平稳性检验在最坏情况下计算不可行，但在固定维度下是否可处理？本文旨在从参数化复杂度角度回答这一开放方向。

Method: 以环境维度d为参数，采用参数化复杂度分析框架：一方面设计固定维数下的XP算法；另一方面通过归约证明W[1]-困难性，并利用指数时间假设(ETH)推导出运行时间下界（ρ(d)size^{o(d)}）。

Result: 1) 给出了可处理侧问题的固定维数XP算法；2) 证明了互补侧问题的W[1]-困难性；3) ETH下证明了不存在运行时间为ρ(d)size^{o(d)}的算法；4) 将相关性结论推广到PA函数局部极小性检验；5) 将硬度结果扩展到浅层ReLU CNN训练损失。

Conclusion: PA函数近似平稳性检验的参数化复杂度图景得以完整刻画：维数d作为参数时，可处理侧为XP，不可处理侧为W[1]-困难且ETH难解。这一图景同样适用于局部极小性检验和简单CNN训练损失，表明参数化复杂度理论在非光滑优化中具有深刻解释力。

Abstract: We study the parameterized complexity of testing approximate first-order stationarity at a prescribed point for continuous piecewise-affine (PA) functions, a basic task in nonsmooth optimization. PA functions form a canonical model for nonsmooth stationarity testing and capture the local polyhedral geometry that appears in ReLU-type training losses. Recent work by Tian and So (SODA 2025) shows that testing approximate stationarity notions for PA functions is computationally intractable in the worst case, and identifies fixed-dimensional tractability as an open direction.
  We address this direction from the viewpoint of parameterized complexity, with the ambient dimension $d$ as the parameter. In this paper, we give XP algorithms in fixed dimension for the tractable sides, and prove W[1]-hardness for the complementary sides. Moreover, lower bounds under the Exponential Time Hypothesis rule out algorithms running in time $ρ(d)\size^{o(d)}$ for any computable function $ρ$, where $\size$ denotes the total binary encoding length of the stationarity-testing instance. As a further consequence, our results yield the corresponding parameterized complexity picture for testing local minimality of continuous PA functions. We further extend our hardness results to a family of shallow ReLU CNN training losses, with stationarity tested in the trainable weight space. Thus, the same parameterized-complexity picture also appears for simple CNN training losses.

</details>


### [949] [A PAC-Bayes Approach for Controlling Unknown Linear Discrete-time Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10493)
*Yujia Luo,Ye Pu,Jonathan H. Manton,Jingge Zhu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对未知随机线性离散时间系统的PAC-Bayes控制框架，在学习控制器上给出了数据依赖的高概率性能保证，并提出了适用于有限和无限控制器空间的高效学习算法。与先前工作相比，该方法的理论界适用于无界二次成本，且在LQG最优情况下，所学控制器性能与LQG相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 控制理论中，系统模型往往未知或存在不确定性，传统方法（如LQG）需要精确的系统参数。本文希望从数据驱动的角度，为未知随机线性系统设计具有理论保证的控制器，并解决之前工作在成本函数有界性方面的限制。

Method: 采用PAC-Bayes理论框架，对系统参数服从固定但未知分布的情况进行分析；通过数据驱动的机制，推导出所学（随机）控制器性能的高概率上界；针对有限和无限控制器空间分别提出高效的学习算法。

Result: 推导出的性能界适用于无界二次成本，这是区别于先前工作的关键改进。在LQG为最优控制的特殊情形下，数值实验表明所学控制器的性能可与LQG相媲美。

Conclusion: 本文论证了PAC-Bayes框架在随机线性系统控制中的有效性，为数据驱动控制提供了理论保障。该方法在理论上放松了对成本函数有界性的要求，实验上也验证了其在实际应用中的竞争力。

Abstract: This paper presents a PAC-Bayes framework for learning controllers for unknown stochastic linear discrete-time systems, where the system parameters are drawn from a fixed but unknown distribution. We derive a data-dependent high probability bound on the performance of any learned (stochastic) controller, and propose novel efficient learning algorithms with theoretical guarantees, which can be implemented for both finite and infinite controller spaces. Compared to prior work, our bound holds for unbounded quadratic cost. In the special case where LQG is optimal, our numerical results suggest that the learned controllers achieve comparable performance to LQG.

</details>


### [950] [Observer Design for a Class of ODE -- Continuum-PDE Cascade Systems Inspired by a Control-Theoretic Model of Large-Scale Arterial Networks of Blood Flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10524)
*Jukka-Pekka Humaloja,Nikolaos Bekiaris-Liberis*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对ODE-连续统PDE级联系统（可视为大量ODE-2×2双曲系统的极限）提出基于反步法的观测器设计，利用平均边界测量实现指数稳定的状态估计，并应用于外周动脉网络中的中心血流/压力估计问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受外周动脉网络动态模型启发，其中大量ODE-2×2双曲系统的集合描述了主动脉血流/压力进入外周动脉网络的过程。实际中只能获取非侵入式的周边血流/压力平均测量值，因此需要设计一种能够利用这些有限测量信息来估计系统状态的观测器。

Method: 采用反步法（backstepping）设计观测器，将大尺度系统视为连续统极限；证明核方程适定性与构造Lyapunov泛函以证明估计误差系统指数稳定；部分反步核被证明与Sylvester方程的解一致；引入连续统近似的最优构造方法，并采用基于谱的方法计算观测器动力学。

Result: 在学术数值模拟中验证了所提方法的有效性，并在真实参数和血流/压力波形下展示了中心血流/压力估计的实用性。

Conclusion: 提出的反步观测器能够有效利用平均边界测量值实现大尺度级联系统的状态估计，特别适用于外周动脉网络中的中心血流/压力估计，为无创血流动力学监测提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We develop a backstepping-based observer design for a class of ODE - continuum-PDE cascade systems, which can be viewed as the limit, of a finite collection of ODE - $2 \times 2$ hyperbolic systems, as the number of individual PDE system components tends to infinity. The large-scale collection of ODE - $2 \times 2$ hyperbolic systems is motivated by a dynamic model that we present, of a network of peripheral arteries, to which central (aortic) blood flow/pressure enters. We address a case in which average (boundary) measurements, over the ensemble dimension, are available, which is motivated by the availability of non-invasive, peripheral flow/pressure measurements. Exponential stability of the estimation error system is shown by proving well-posedness of the kernel equations and constructing a Lyapunov functional. We also establish that part of the backstepping kernels derived coincide with the solution of a Sylvester equation. We then apply the continuum-based observer for state estimation of the large-scale counterpart and, in particular, of the blood flow system, introducing an approach for optimal construction of continuum approximations. We also introduce an implementation method, adopting a spectral-based approach for computing the observer dynamics, which we illustrate in an academic, numerical simulation example. Furthermore, we illustrate the design in the problem of central flow/pressure estimation using realistic parameters and flow/pressure waveforms.

</details>


### [951] [Randomized Max-Vertex-Cover Interdiction with Matroid Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10526)
*Changjun Wang,Chenhao Wang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了一类新的双层优化问题——拟阵约束下的随机最大顶点覆盖阻断问题（RMVCI），将其建模为网络上的零和Stackelberg博弈。领导者随机选择受保护顶点（满足拟阵约束），跟随者观测到保护概率分布后选择攻击顶点（也满足拟阵约束），以最大化被攻击且未保护顶点关联边的期望权重。作者提出一个概念性近似框架，结合整数规划松弛和概率分布转换，最终设计了多项式时间的8/3-近似算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究网络攻防场景下，领导者在拟阵约束下如何通过随机化保护策略最小化跟随者的攻击收益，解决该双层规划因跟随者子问题NP-hard带来的计算挑战。

Method: 1. 提出处理一般双层阻断问题的概念性近似框架；2. 将跟随者问题形式化为整数线性规划，并证明其线性松弛的紧积分间隙为4/3；3. 在框架中用LP松弛替代跟随者问题；4. 将集合上的分布转化为顶点上的分布，设计多项式时间2-近似算法求解松弛后的双层问题；5. 组合各成分得到8/3-近似算法。

Result: 证明了跟随者问题线性松弛的积分间隙为4/3；设计了松弛双层问题的2-近似算法；最终给出RMVCI问题的8/3-近似算法。

Conclusion: 成功在拟阵约束下为RMVCI问题设计了多项式时间常数近似算法，为一般双层阻断问题的近似求解提供了可迁移的框架。

Abstract: We study a new bilevel optimization problem, termed the Randomized Max-Vertex-Cover Interdiction (RMVCI) problem under matroid constraints, which can be modeled as a zero-sum Stackelberg game on a network between a leader and a follower. The leader randomly selects a subset of vertices to protect, subject to a matroid constraint, while the follower-after inferring the leader's protection probability distribution-chooses a subset of vertices (also matroid-constrained) to attack, aiming to maximize the expected total weight of edges incident to the set of vertices that are both attacked and unprotected. The leader's objective is to determine an optimal randomized interdiction strategy that minimizes the follower's expected payoff.
  Since the follower's response problem is NP-hard, the resulting bilevel program is computationally challenging. We develop a conceptual approximation framework for tackling general bilevel interdiction problems. For the RMVCI problem under matroid constraints, we first formulate the follower's problem as an integer linear program and show that its linear relaxation admits a tight integrality gap of $\tfrac{4}{3}$. Within the approximation framework, we replace the follower's problem by its LP relaxation, and then study the resulting bilevel program. By shifting from distributions over sets to distributions over vertices and applying our approximation framework, we manage to design a polynomial-time 2-approximation algorithm for this relaxed bilevel problem. Combining these ingredients within our framework yields a polynomial-time $\tfrac{8}{3}$-approximation algorithm for RMVCI under matroid constraints.

</details>


### [952] [A Riemannian quasi-Newton algorithm for optimization with Euclidean bounds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10573)
*Mateusz Baran,Ronny Bergmann,Patryk Przybysz*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出了一种黎曼流形上的有限内存BFGS方法，用于处理带欧几里得约束的优化问题。该方法将L-BFGS-B的广义柯西点策略适配到黎曼流形上，在保持几何结构的同时高效处理边界约束。实验表明，该方法在欧几里得问题上略逊于经典L-BFGS-B，但优于内点法；在混合流形与有界欧几里得问题上，性能超越现有方法数个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多实际应用（如协方差矩阵估计、神经影像、EEG信号分类等）需要同时优化流形变量和带边界约束的欧几里得参数，现有方法或不能充分利用几何结构，或处理边界约束效率低。

Method: 在切空间中执行有限内存拟牛顿更新，结合黎曼版本的广义柯西点策略（源于L-BFGS-B），将欧几里得边界约束适配到黎曼流形优化框架中，并在Manopt.jl库中实现。

Result: 在纯欧几里得问题上性能略低于经典L-BFGS-B但优于内点法；在幅值受限盲源分离和带界方差最大似然共同主成分分析两个混合问题上，该方法比现有方法快数个数量级。

Conclusion: 提出的黎曼L-BFGS-B方法能有效处理带欧几里得边界约束的流形优化问题，在混合问题上展现出显著优势，为相关应用提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: We propose a Riemannian limited-memory BFGS method for optimization problems with Euclidean bounds. The method combines a limited-memory quasi-Newton update in the tangent space with a Riemannian adaptation of the generalized Cauchy point strategy from classical L-BFGS-B, enabling efficient handling of Euclidean bounds while exploiting the geometric structure of the optimization domain. This setting is important in several applications, including covariance matrix estimation with bounded variance, neuroimaging, EEG signal classification, and other signal processing or computer-vision tasks that couple manifold variables with constrained Euclidean parameters.
  We provide a generic algorithmic framework and an implementation of the algorithm in the Manopt.jl library. Numerical experiments on benchmark problems indicate only minor reduction in performance on Euclidean problems compared to the classical L-BFGS-B method, while outperforming interior-point methods. Furthermore, the algorithm was tested on two mixed manifold and bounded Euclidean problems: amplitude-limited blind source separation with Gaussianity penalization and bounded-variance maximum likelihood common principal components analysis. The proposed method outperforms existing methods by several orders of magnitude.

</details>


### [953] [Curvature-Dependent Lower Bounds for Frank-Wolfe](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10595)
*Jannis Halbey,Christophe Roux,Sebastian Pokutta*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对Frank-Wolfe算法在p-一致凸可行集（p≥3）上的收敛速度，建立了匹配的下界Ω(T^{-p/(p-1)})，并推广到满足Hölderian误差界的目标函数，通过分析简单实例上的迭代动力学完成证明。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究已证明Frank-Wolfe算法在p-一致凸可行集上具有O(T^{-p/(p-1)})的上界收敛率，但该速率是否为最优（即是否存在匹配的下界）尚不明确。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 通过分析Frank-Wolfe算法在简单实例上的迭代动力学（而非高维信息论下界），对p≥3的p-一致凸可行集建立匹配的下界，并进一步将下界推广到满足Hölderian误差界的目标函数。

Result: 建立了匹配的Ω(T^{-p/(p-1)})下界（p≥3），适用于精确线搜索或短步长策略，并推广至Hölderian误差界目标函数。

Conclusion: Frank-Wolfe算法在p-一致凸可行集上的收敛率O(T^{-p/(p-1)})是最优的（精确到常数因子），且该下界在更广泛的目标函数假设下依然成立。

Abstract: The Frank-Wolfe algorithm achieves a convergence rate of $\mathcal{O}(1/T)$ for smooth convex optimization over compact convex domains, accelerating to $\mathcal{O}(1/T^2)$ when both the objective and the feasible set are strongly convex. This acceleration extends beyond strong convexity: Kerdreux et al. (2021a) proved rates of $\mathcal{O}(T^{-p/(p-1)})$ over $p$-uniformly convex feasible sets, a class that interpolates between strongly convex sets and more general curved domains such as $\ell_p$ balls. In this work, we establish a matching $Ω(T^{-p/(p-1)})$ lower bound for every $p\ge 3$ under exact line search or short steps, and extend the lower bound to objectives satisfying a Hölderian error bound. The proofs analyze the dynamics of Frank-Wolfe iterates on simple instances and hence are not limited to the high-dimensional setting, unlike information-theoretic lower bounds.

</details>


### [954] [Novel neighborhood structures for incomplete round robin sports tournaments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10599)
*Karel Devriesere,David Van Bulck,Dries Goossens*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对非完整循环赛（每队比赛场次相同但只对阵部分对手）的赛程安排问题，提出了两种基于图论的新型邻域结构，并嵌入自适应迟接受爬山算法，获得了高质量解和多个新最优解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非完整循环赛制日益流行（青少年和职业比赛），但针对此类赛程安排的邻域结构研究几乎空白，现有方法难以有效求解。

Method: 1) 提出两种邻域结构：一种通过引入单一场次后接最小修复链；另一种可引入多场次但仅影响单轮，后者被证明能完全连接解空间。2) 将邻域嵌入自适应迟接受爬山算法（Adaptive Late Acceptance Hill Climbing）。

Result: 在多个标准实例集上获得高质量解，并取得了若干新的最优解，实证了所提邻域结构的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的邻域结构填补了非完整循环赛调度领域的空白，结合自适应算法能有效求解该问题，具有理论和实践双重价值。

Abstract: The incomplete round robin sports tournament format, where each team plays the same number of games but faces only a subset of the other teams, is becoming increasingly popular in both youth and professional competitions. In contrast to conventional round robin tournaments, however, neighborhood structures for scheduling incomplete round robin tournaments have largely remained unexplored. We fill this gap by proposing two novel neighborhood structures and describe them in graph theory terms. One of them introduces a single new game followed by a minimal repair chain, while the other introduces possibly many new games but only affects a single round. The latter is shown to fully connect the solution space. We embed the neighborhoods in an adaptive late acceptance hill climbing algorithm and show that the proposed algorithm obtains high quality and new best solutions for several sets of instances from the literature, thereby empirically confirming the effectiveness of the proposed neighborhoods.

</details>


### [955] [Handicap reduction for linear complementarity problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10701)
*Marianna E. -Nagy,László A. Végh*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了充分矩阵线性互补问题(LCPs)的求解复杂度。首先给出了充分矩阵的 handicap 数 $\hatκ(M)$ 的指数上界，解决了公开问题；其次提出了一种新算法，通过行重缩放优化 $\hatκ^\star(M)$，将运行时间多项式绑定于输入规模和优化后的 handicap 数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 充分矩阵LCP是否可在多项式时间内求解是重要的开放问题。现有IPA算法的运行时间依赖于 handicap 数 $\hatκ(M)$，但该值可能指数级大，且其上限未知，限制了算法效率的理论保证。

Method: 1) 通过充分矩阵的新刻画，证明 $\hatκ(M)$ 在M的位复杂度下呈指数上界；2) 利用行/列重缩放优化 handicap 数，定义 $\hatκ^\star(M)$；3) 将椭球法与IPA结合：若IPA在规定时间内失败，则提供分离超平面给椭球法寻找更好的重缩放。

Result: 首次给出 $\hatκ(M)$ 的指数上界，并设计出运行时间多项式依赖于 $\hatκ^\star(M)$ 的算法。

Conclusion: 解决了充分矩阵LCP求解复杂性的一个核心开放问题，并为该类问题提供了新的理论支撑和实用算法框架。

Abstract: Linear Complementarity Problems (LCPs) with sufficient matrices form an important subclass of LCPs, and it remains a significant open question whether problems in this class can be solved in polynomial time. Kojima, Megiddo, Noma, and Yoshise gave an Interior Point Algorithm (IPA) in 1991, that can solve LCPs with sufficient matrices in time bounded polynomially in the input size and the so-called handicap number $\hatκ(M)$ of the coefficient matrix $M$. However, this value can be exponentially large in the bit encoding length. In fact, no upper bounds were previously known on $\hatκ(M)$. Settling an open question raised in de Klerk and E.-Nagy (Math Programming, 2011), we give an exponential upper bound on $\hatκ(M)$ in the bit-complexity of $M$. This is based on a new characterization of sufficient matrices. The new characterization also leads to a simple new proof of Väliaho's theorem on the equivalence of sufficient and $\mathcal{P}^*$-matrices (Linear Algebra and its Applications, 1996).
  Noting that one can obtain an equivalent LCP by rescaling the rows and columns by a positive diagonal matrix, we define $\hatκ^\star(M)$ as the best possible handicap number achievable under such rescalings. Our second main result is an algorithm for LCPs with sufficient matrices, where the running time is polynomially bounded in the input size and in the optimized value $\hatκ^\star(M)$. This algorithm is based on the observation that the set of near-optimal row-rescalings forms a convex set. Our algorithm combines the Ellipsoid Method over the set of row rescalings, and an IPA with running time dependent on the handicap number of the matrix. If the IPA fails to solve the LCP in the desired running time, it provides a separation oracle to the Ellipsoid Method to find a better rescaling.

</details>


### [956] [Decentralized Contingency MPC based on Safe Sets for Nonlinear Multi-agent Collision Avoidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10738)
*Max Studt,Georg Schildbach*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种去中心化 contingency MPC 框架，在无通信（仅状态信息）条件下实现多智能体系统的防碰撞运动，保证了递归可行性和 Lyapunov 型收敛性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 去中心化防碰撞在无通信场景下仍具挑战，现有方法要么过于保守，要么无法保证递归可行性和收敛性。

Method: 每个智能体求解局部优化问题，将名义轨迹与应急证书（contingency certificate）耦合，确保障碍时存在可行的备用机动；并引入几何去中心化安全集更新机制防止相邻时间步间的可行性丢失。

Result: 在稀疏和密集多智能体环境（包括瓶颈场景和即插即用操作）中验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提方案保证了递归可行性（含防碰撞）和 Lyapunov 型收敛到可接受的安全平衡点。

Abstract: Decentralized collision avoidance remains challenging, particularly when agents do not communicate any information related to planned trajectories. Most existing approaches either rely on conservative coordination mechanisms or provide limited guarantees on recursive feasibility and convergence. This paper develops a decentralized contingency MPC framework for multi-agent systems with nonlinear dynamics that achieves collision-free motion under a state-only information pattern. Each agent follows the same consensual rule set, enabling safe decentralized planning without communication. Each agent solves a local optimization problem that couples a nominal trajectory with a contingency certificate ensuring a feasible backup maneuver under receding-horizon operation. A novel geometric and decentralized safe-set update mechanism prevents feasibility loss between consecutive time steps. The resulting scheme guarantees recursive feasibility, including collision avoidance, and establishes a Lyapunov-type convergence result to an admissible safe equilibrium. Simulation results demonstrate performance in both sparse and dense multi-agent environments, including cluttered bottleneck scenarios and under plug-and-play operation.

</details>


### [957] [On the global convergence of gradient descent for wide shallow models with bounded nonlinearities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10775)
*Romain Petit,Clarice Poon,Gabriel Peyré*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究梯度下降在非凸神经网络训练中仍能找到全局最小化器的现象，证明对于宽浅层网络（包括多头注意力层和双层sigmoid网络），所有非全局最小化器在梯度下降动力学下都是不稳定的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解梯度下降在非凸神经网络训练中为何能够找到全局最小化器，特别是针对宽浅层网络这一理论空白进行补充。

Method: 基于[Chizat and Bach, 2018]的工作，通过构建"逃逸活动集"（escaping active set）来证明非全局最小化器的不稳定性，并将此构造扩展到向量输出权重的模型。

Result: 在参数初始分布具有全支撑（如高斯分布）且隐藏神经元或注意力头数量趋于无穷时，连续时间梯度下降只能收敛到全局最小化器。证明了有界非线性标量输出权重模型下"逃逸活动集"的完整构造，并扩展到向量输出权重新情形。

Conclusion: 非全局最小化器在梯度下降动力学下不稳定，这解释了宽神经网络训练中梯度下降为何能避开局部极小值而收敛到全局最优。同时，证明了亚高斯初始化下均值场训练动力学的适定性和离散化稳定性。

Abstract: A surprising phenomenon in the training of neural networks is the ability of gradient descent to find global minimizers of the training loss despite its non-convexity. Following earlier works, we investigate this behavior for wide shallow networks. Existing results essentially cover the case of ReLU activations and the case of sigmoid activations with scalar output weights. We study a large class of models that includes multi-head attention layers and two-layer sigmoid networks with vector output weights. Building upon [Chizat and Bach, 2018], we prove that all non-global minimizers of the training loss are unstable under gradient descent dynamics. Thus, when the initial distribution of the parameters has full support (which includes the popular Gaussian case), and in the many hidden neurons or attention heads limit, continuous-time gradient descent can only converge to global minimizers. Establishing the instability of non-global minimizers corresponds to the construction of an ``escaping active set'' -- we complete the proof of [Chizat and Bach, 2018] to construct this set for models with bounded nonlinearities and scalar output weights. We also extend this construction to new cases for models with vector output weights. Finally, we show the well-posedness and the stability with respect to discretization of the mean field training dynamic for sub-Gaussian initializations.

</details>


### [958] [Fixed-Point Neural Optimal Transport without Implicit Differentiation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10792)
*Yesom Park,Eric Gelphman,Stanley Osher,Samy Wu Fung*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于隐式神经公式的最优运输方法，通过单网络参数化Kantorovich对偶势能，将c-变换转化为近端不动点问题，消除了对抗性最小-最大优化和多网络架构，实现了稳定高效的训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有最优运输方法依赖对抗性最小-最大优化和多网络架构，训练不稳定且计算效率低，亟需一种更稳定、高效且可扩展的替代方案。

Method: 参数化单个Kantorovich对偶势能，将c-变换重构为近端不动点问题；通过近端最优性条件强制对偶可行性，避免对抗训练；梯度计算无需通过不动点迭代进行微分，无需隐式微分；建立了随机梯度下降的收敛性。

Result: 在高维高斯基准、物理数据集和图像翻译任务上，该方法展现出优越的运输精度、训练稳定性以及计算和内存效率。

Conclusion: 提出的单网络隐式框架是高效、可扩展且广泛适用的，能同时恢复前向和后向运输映射，并能自然扩展到类条件设置，是对抗性方法的有力替代。

Abstract: We propose an implicit neural formulation of optimal transport that eliminates adversarial min--max optimization and multi-network architectures commonly used in existing approaches. Our key idea is to parameterize a single potential in the Kantorovich dual and reformulate the associated c-transform as a proximal fixed-point problem. This yields a stable single-network framework in which dual feasibility is enforced exactly through proximal optimality conditions rather than adversarial training. Despite the inner fixed-point computation, gradients can be computed without differentiating through the fixed-point iterations, enabling efficient training without requiring implicit differentiation. We further establish convergence of stochastic gradient descent. The resulting framework is efficient, scalable, and broadly applicable: it simultaneously recovers forward and backward transport maps and naturally extends to class-conditional settings. Experiments on high-dimensional Gaussian benchmarks, physical datasets, and image translation tasks demonstrate strong transport accuracy together with improved training stability and favorable computational and memory efficiency.

</details>


### [959] [Switching-Geometry Analysis of Deflated Q-Value Iteration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10811)
*Donghwan Lee*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文开发了联合谱半径（JSR）框架来分析折扣马尔可夫决策过程中的秩一缩减Q值迭代算法，证明其收敛率可能比标准折扣因子γ更紧，并揭示了该算法本质上等价于标准Q值迭代的标量重定中心。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准Q值迭代的收敛率通常由折扣因子γ界定，但这一界可能不够紧。作者希望利用JSR框架更精确地刻画缩减Q值迭代的收敛几何，从而得到更紧的收敛率表征。

Method: 将Q值迭代建模为切换系统，利用JSR分析；通过商空间去除全一向量这一不变方向，得到投影切换系统模型，其JSR可能严格小于γ。

Result: 标准Q值迭代切换系统的JSR恰好等于γ；缩减后的投影切换系统JSR可能更小；缩减Q值迭代等价于标准Q值迭代的标量重定中心，策略序列不变。

Conclusion: 缩减操作的好处不在于改变决策问题本身，而在于去除冗余的全一分量后，能通过JSR更精确地描述收敛几何。

Abstract: This paper develops a joint spectral radius (JSR) framework for analyzing rank-one deflated Q-value iteration (Q-VI) in discounted Markov decision process control. Focusing on an all-ones residual correction, we interpret the resulting algorithm through the geometry of switching systems and, to the best of our knowledge, give the first JSR-based convergence analysis of deflated Q-VI for policy optimization problems. Our analysis reveals that the standard Q-VI switching system model has JSR exactly the discount factor $γ\in (0,1)$, since all admissible subsystems share the all-ones vector as an invariant direction. By passing to the quotient space that removes this direction, we obtain a projected switching system model whose JSR governs the relevant error dynamics and may be strictly smaller than $γ$. Therefore, the deflated Q-VI admits a potentially sharper convergence-rate characterization than the ambient-space $γ$-bound. Finally, we prove that the correction is equivalent to a scalar recentering of standard Q-VI. Hence, the projected trajectory, and therefore the greedy-policy sequence, is unchanged relative to standard Q-VI initialized from the same point. The benefit of deflation is not a change in the induced decision-making problem, but a more precise JSR-based description of the convergence geometry after the redundant all-ones component is removed.

</details>


<div id='stat.ML'></div>

# stat.ML [[Back]](#toc)

### [960] [Decentralized Conformal Novelty Detection via Quantized Model Exchange](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08263)
*Kyle Loh,Yu Xiang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于量化替代模型交换的去中心化异常检测框架，在无需共享原始数据的情况下实现全局错误发现率（FDR）控制，并显著降低通信成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在去中心化场景中，各独立代理拥有异构复合零分布数据，出于隐私和带宽考虑无法共享原始数据，现有方法难以在保护隐私的同时有效控制全局FDR。

Method: 提出了基于量化替代模型交换的框架，各代理本地学习非一致性得分函数后进行低精度量化表示并交换，利用这些量化复合得分评估数据，证明其保留了条件可交换性。

Result: 在合成数据集上验证了理论结果，该方法在保持有竞争力的统计功效的同时，大幅降低了通信开销。

Conclusion: 该方法为去中心化异常检测提供了严格的有限样本全局FDR控制保证，兼顾了隐私、通信效率和统计性能。

Abstract: This work studies decentralized novelty detection with global false discovery rate (FDR) control across heterogeneous composite null distributions, without sharing the raw data due to privacy and bandwidth considerations. We propose a framework based on the exchange of quantized surrogate models, allowing independent agents to share low-precision representations of locally learned non-conformity score functions. We prove that evaluating data against these quantized composite scores preserves conditional exchangeability, providing rigorous finite-sample guarantees for global FDR control. Empirical studies on synthetic datasets confirm our theoretical results, demonstrating that the proposed approach maintains competitive statistical power while drastically reducing the communication cost.

</details>


### [961] [Active Multiple-Prediction-Powered Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08429)
*Nicholas Brawand,Nima Leclerc,Anhthy Ngo,Matthew Peterson,Sriram Vishwanath,Laith Alhussein,Ben Wellner*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出AM-PPI方法，通过自适应实例路由、不确定性加权标定和预测重加权，在部署预算下利用多个不同成本和精度的AI预测器，实现比单预测器方法更窄的置信区间（10-40%提升）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PPI和ASI方法局限于单一预测器，无法适应临床部署中多预测器并存（成本与精度各异）的实际场景，亟需一种能在预算约束下有效整合多预测器的标签高效统计推断方法。

Method: AM-PPI包含三个核心决策：1）实例级自适应路由，将每个实例分配给成本合适的预测器子集；2）根据所选子集的残差不确定性比例采样金标准标签；3）重加权预测以最小化估计量方差。通过KKT条件推导闭式解，利用双凸性和强对偶性证明全局最优性。

Result: 在合成数据和三个医疗监测任务上，AM-PPI在路由发挥作用的预算区间内，置信区间宽度比单预测器ASI窄10-40%，在其他区间与最优基线持平。

Conclusion: AM-PPI通过多预测器协同和实例级自适应路由，显著提升了预算受限下医疗AI部署后监控的统计效率，扩展了预测驱动推断的理论框架。

Abstract: Post-deployment monitoring of healthcare AI requires statistically valid, label-efficient methods, but gold-standard labels from clinician chart review are expensive. Prediction-powered inference (PPI) and active statistical inference (ASI) reduce label cost by combining a small labeled sample with abundant model predictions, but both are restricted to a single predictor, a poor fit for modern clinical pipelines that have multiple predictors of differing cost and accuracy available at inference time. We propose Active Multiple-Prediction-Powered Inference (AM-PPI), which routes each instance to a cost-appropriate predictor subset, samples gold-standard labels in proportion to the chosen subset's residual uncertainty, and reweights predictions to minimize estimator variance, all under a single deployment-time budget. AM-PPI generalizes ASI to leverage multiple predictors and extends Multiple-PPI from global per-predictor allocation to per-instance adaptive routing. We derive closed-form Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) conditions for all three decisions and prove, via biconvexity and strong duality, that the resulting fixed point is a global optimum despite the joint problem being non-jointly-convex. We establish asymptotic normality with valid coverage, minimum-variance unbiasedness within the linear-prediction augmented inverse propensity weighted (AIPW) class, and a closed-form criterion identifying when multiple predictors help. On synthetic data and three healthcare monitoring tasks, AM-PPI produces 10 to 40 percent narrower confidence intervals (CIs) than single-predictor ASI in the budget regime where routing matters, and matches the better baseline elsewhere.

</details>


### [962] [Sinkhorn Treatment Effects: A Causal Optimal Transport Measure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08485)
*Medha Agarwal,Alex Luedtke*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了Sinkhorn处理效应，一种基于熵最优输运的分布差异度量，用于比较反事实分布。通过将统计泛函表示为核均值嵌入的光滑变换，构建了去偏估计量并提出了假设检验方法，实验验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统平均处理效应只能捕捉均值差异，无法反映整个分布的变化。研究者希望提出一种能刻画反事实分布间整体差异的度量方法。

Method: 利用熵最优输运定义Sinkhorn处理效应，将其转化为核均值嵌入的光滑变换，建立一阶和二阶路径wise可微性，构造去偏估计量，并设计聚合检验方法。

Result: 理论上证明了该统计量的一阶和二阶可微性质，构建了渐近有效的检验，模拟和图像数据实验展示了实际优势。

Conclusion: Sinkhorn处理效应为分布级处理效应检验提供了新框架，聚合检验解决了正则化参数选择问题，具有良好的理论和实证表现。

Abstract: We introduce the Sinkhorn treatment effect, an entropic optimal transport measure of divergence between counterfactual distributions. Unlike classical quantities such as the average treatment effect, this measure captures differences across entire distributions. We analyze this divergence as a statistical functional and show it can be written as a smooth transformation of counterfactual mean embeddings with an appropriate kernel. This characterization allows us to establish first-order pathwise differentiability in general, and second-order pathwise differentiability under the null hypothesis of equal counterfactual distributions.
