Leveraging this smoothness, we construct debiased estimators and use them to obtain asymptotically valid tests for distributional treatment effects with a fixed entropic regularization parameter. Because the power of the test depends on this unknown parameter, we further propose an aggregated test that combines evidence across a grid of regularization choices. Experiments on simulated and image data demonstrate the practical advantages of our estimator and testing procedure.

</details>


### [963] [Sliced Inner Product Gromov-Wasserstein Distances](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08546)
*Xiaoyun Gong,Gabriel Rioux,Ziv Goldfeld*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文针对Gromov-Wasserstein问题的高维计算瓶颈，提出了一种基于内积成本的切片IGW距离，该距离具有旋转不变性，并系统研究了其结构与计算性质。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GW问题在处理高维异质数据对齐时存在统计和计算扩展性问题，而切片方法虽能提升可扩展性，但GW在一维情况下通常无闭式解，需解决这一根本障碍。

Method: 针对内积成本下的GW问题(IGW)，提出切片IGW距离，利用旋转不变性设计可计算的切片方案，并对其结构和计算性质进行理论分析。

Result: 通过数值实验验证了理论结果，并在文本数据异质聚类和语言模型表示对比等应用中展示了有效性。

Conclusion: 切片IGW距离有效解决了GW在高维场景下的可扩展性问题，为异质数据对齐提供了实用且具有旋转不变性的新工具。

Abstract: The Gromov-Wasserstein (GW) problem provides a framework for aligning heterogeneous datasets by matching their intrinsic geometry, but its statistical and computational scaling remains an issue for high-dimensional problems. Slicing techniques offer an appealing route to scalability, but, unlike Wasserstein distances, GW problems do not generally admit closed-form solutions in one-dimension. We resolve this problem for the GW problem with inner product cost (IGW), propose a sliced IGW distance that enjoys a natural rotational invariance property, and comprehensively study its structural and computational properties. Numerical experiments validating our theory are presented, followed by applications to heterogeneous clustering of text data and language model representation comparison.

</details>


### [964] [Learnability and Competition in High-Dimensional Multi-Component ICA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08552)
*Eser Ilke Genc,Samet Demir,Zafer Dogan*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文为多分量在线ICA开发了精确的均值场理论，推导出重叠矩阵的封闭ODE系统，揭示了初始化驱动的解耦与竞争两阶段结构，给出了可学习性边界和竞争条件，并在合成数据和真实高光谱数据上验证了理论预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的ICA高维理论主要局限于单分量恢复，无法刻画多个分量同时学习与正交化过程中的耦合效应，亟需一个能够描述多分量在线ICA联合动力学的理论框架。

Method: 在高维极限下，将学习估计与真实分量的联合经验分布收敛为确定性过程，推导出重叠矩阵的封闭常微分方程组，并通过稳态分析给出可学习性边界和竞争条件。

Result: 发现了两个阶段：解耦阶段（分量独立演化）和竞争阶段（初始化重叠导致正交冲突、缓慢转向和延迟收敛）。揭示了更大的高阶矩和竞争会缩小稳定学习率窗口、增加收敛时间，并预测了阶梯现象——可恢复分量数随学习率离散变化。

Conclusion: 本文建立了多分量在线ICA的精确均值场理论，为理解分量间的竞争动力学提供了理论工具，实验结果验证了理论预测的轨迹和相行为。

Abstract: Independent Component Analysis (ICA) is a foundational tool for unsupervised representation learning, yet its high-dimensional theory remains largely limited to single-component recovery. We develop an asymptotically exact mean-field theory for multi-component online ICA, capturing the coupling induced by simultaneous learning and orthogonalization. In the high-dimensional limit, the joint empirical distribution of learned estimates and ground-truth components converges to a deterministic process, yielding a closed ODE system for the overlap matrix between learned directions and true components. This characterization reveals a genuinely multi-component, initialization-driven phase structure: a decoupled regime, where estimates align with distinct components and evolve nearly independently, and a competition regime, where overlapping initializations induce orthogonality-driven conflicts, slow reorientation, and delayed convergence. Our steady-state analysis gives explicit learnability boundaries and competition conditions linking step size, data moments, and initialization. These conditions show that larger higher-order moments and competition shrink the stable learning-rate window, increase convergence times, and predict a staircase phenomenon in which the number of recoverable components changes discretely with the learning rate. Experiments on synthetic data and hyperspectral remote sensing data validate the predicted trajectories and phase behavior.

</details>


### [965] [CONTRA: Conformal Prediction Region via Normalizing Flow Transformation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08561)
*Zhenhan Fang,Aixin Tan,Jian Huang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出CONTRA，利用归一化流的潜空间定义非一致性分数，从而为多维度输出生成具有覆盖保证的精确预测区域，并扩展至增强任意预测模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统共形预测方法在处理多维度输出时存在局限，因为它依赖于一维的非一致性分数，难以生成精确的预测区域。

Method: CONTRA通过归一化流的潜空间，基于到中心的距离定义非一致性分数，将潜空间中的高密度区域映射到输出空间的尖锐预测区域。扩展版本则对任意预测模型的残差训练一个简单的归一化流来增强其可靠预测区域。

Result: CONTRA及其扩展方法在多个数据集上保持了保证的覆盖概率，并在生成精确预测区域方面优于现有方法。

Conclusion: CONTRA是一种有效的（条件）密度估计工具，解决了多维预测区域生成的未充分探索挑战。

Abstract: Density estimation and reliable prediction regions for outputs are crucial in supervised and unsupervised learning. While conformal prediction effectively generates coverage-guaranteed regions, it struggles with multi-dimensional outputs due to reliance on one-dimensional nonconformity scores. To address this, we introduce CONTRA: CONformal prediction region via normalizing flow TRAnsformation. CONTRA utilizes the latent spaces of normalizing flows to define nonconformity scores based on distances from the center. This allows for the mapping of high-density regions in latent space to sharp prediction regions in the output space, surpassing traditional hyperrectangular or elliptical conformal regions. Further, for scenarios where other predictive models are favored over flow-based models, we extend CONTRA to enhance any such model with a reliable prediction region by training a simple normalizing flow on the residuals. We demonstrate that both CONTRA and its extension maintain guaranteed coverage probability and outperform existing methods in generating accurate prediction regions across various datasets. We conclude that CONTRA is an effective tool for (conditional) density estimation, addressing the under-explored challenge of delivering multi-dimensional prediction regions.

</details>


### [966] [Core-Halo Decomposition: Decentralizing Large-Scale Fixed-Point Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08681)
*Haixiang,Yang Xu,Jiefu Zhang,Xudong Wu,Zihan Zhou,Jun He,Jiayu Chen*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出Core-Halo分解方法来解决大规模不动点方程分解计算中因严格分解带来的结构偏差问题。Core-Halo允许各智能体更新自己的核心块（写所有权）并从重叠的Halo区域读取（读上下文），从而忠实实现原不动点问题，且实验表明该方法在保持并行性的同时达到接近中心化的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 严格分解（Strict Decomposition）在将大规模不动点方程分解到多智能体系统时，会截断块间的变量依赖关系，改变原算子结构，形成无法通过增大样本量、减小步长或增加共识来消除的结构性偏差。因此，需要一种新的分解方式，既能保留分解的并行优势，又能忠实实现原不动点问题。

Method: 提出Core-Halo分解方法：每个智能体拥有自己的核心块（Core，写所有权），同时可从一个重叠的Halo区域（Halo，只读）读取上下文信息。将Core-Halo分解与\bar F的块依赖结构对齐，使得每个智能体的更新能够访问所有必要的变量，从而忠实实现原不动点算子。

Result: 通过Bellman闭包条件和块级偏差下界，刻画了严格分解面临的根本障碍——局部仅更新会改变原不动点算子。广泛实验表明，Core-Halo能达到接近中心化（near-centralized）的性能，同时保留去中心化系统的并行性优势。

Conclusion: 严格分解因截断跨块依赖会产生不可消除的结构偏差；Core-Halo分解通过分离写所有权与读上下文，忠实保留了原不动点问题结构，是更优的大规模分布式分解方案。

Abstract: We study solving large-scale fixed-point equation \(x^\star=\bar F(x^\star)\) with decomposition. Standard strict decomposition assigns each agent a disjoint block and evaluates updates using only owned coordinates. For most operators, however, a block update may depend on variables outside the block. Truncating these dependencies by strict decomposition changes the mean operator and creates structural bias that cannot be removed by more samples, smaller stepsizes, or additional consensus. We therefore propose Core-Halo decomposition, which separates write ownership from read-only evaluation context: each agent updates its own core and reads from an overlapping halo. By aligning the Core-Halo decomposition with the block-dependence structure of $\bar F$, the original fixed-point problem can be implemented faithfully in a decentralized multi-agent system. We further characterize the fundamental obstruction faced by strict decomposition through a Bellman closure condition and a blockwise bias lower bound, showing that local-only updates can alter the original fixed-point operator. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments across a range of application settings, and demonstrate that Core-Halo achieves near-centralized performance while retaining the parallelism benefits of decentralization.

</details>


### [967] [Measuring and Decomposing Mode Separation via the Canonical Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08777)
*Shaul Tolkovsky,Ori Meidler,Or Zuk*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于可逆扩散过程的自协方差矩阵来量化高维密度模式分离程度的方法，通过SSA（平方自相关和）和DA（主导自相关方向）两个指标分别捕捉势垒敏感的结构和亚稳态方向，在合成数据、文本生成图像和分子动力学三个场景中验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模式分离（密度分布碎片化为势垒分隔的簇）是密度的一个基本几何特性，在高维中难以量化。现有方法（如微分熵、PCA、互信息）要么无法区分碎片化与散布，要么需要预先知道混合分解。需要一个无需先验分解、可扩展至高位的方法来直接测量模式分离。

Method: 利用密度$f$作为平稳分布的独特可逆扩散过程，从其自协方差矩阵中提取两个指标：SSA（平方自相关和）作为标量势垒敏感度量；DA（主导自相关方向）作为按亚稳态性（而非方差）排序的线性投影。在各项同性高斯零假设下推导出经验自协方差矩阵的闭式谱（推广了Marchenko-Pastur分布），其解析上界用于选择DA的读取滞后。通过Tweedie恒等式利用预训练的基于分数的生成模型来估计得分函数，实现高维扩展。

Result: 在合成高斯混合数据中，SSA能够跟踪互信息；在SDXL文本生成图像中，SSA和DA捕捉到了熵和PCA遗漏的结构；在丙氨酸二肽的分子动力学中，DA仅从静态样本就恢复了已知的慢速骨架二面角。

Conclusion: 提出的框架通过扩散过程的自协方差结构有效量化了高维密度的模式分离特性，SSA和DA分别提供了互补的标量和方向信息，在多个场景中优于熵和PCA等传统方法，且可通过预训练生成模型扩展到高维应用。

Abstract: Mode separation, namely how sharply a distribution fragments into barrier-separated clusters, is a fundamental geometric property of densities, difficult to quantify in high dimensions. It is structurally distinct from dispersion, yet existing tools fall short: differential entropy rises with spread regardless of fragmentation, PCA orders directions by variance regardless of barriers, and mutual information requires a mixture decomposition one usually does not have. We measure mode separation through a single stochastic process intrinsic to the density: a unique reversible diffusion with $f$ as its stationary distribution and constant scalar diffusion coefficient. We extract two readouts from its autocovariance matrix: SSA (Sum of Squared Autocorrelations), a scalar barrier-sensitive measure; and DA (Dominant Autocorrelation directions), linear projections ordered by metastability rather than variance. Under an isotropic-Gaussian null, we derive a closed-form spectrum for the empirical autocovariance that generalizes Marchenko--Pastur, with an analytic upper edge that selects the lag at which DA is read off. Both readouts use only samples and a score function, scaling to high dimensions through pretrained score-based generative models via Tweedie's identity. We apply our framework to three settings: (i) synthetic Gaussian mixtures, where SSA tracks mutual information; (ii) SDXL text-to-image generations, where SSA and DA capture structure that entropy and PCA miss; and (iii) molecular dynamics of alanine dipeptide, where DA recovers the known slow backbone dihedrals from static samples alone.

</details>


### [968] [Learning Theory of Transformers: Local-to-Global Approximation via Softmax Partition of Unity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08811)
*Zhongjie Shi,Wenjing Liao*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了Transformer网络在紧致欧几里得域和黎曼流形上进行回归任务的学习理论，提出了一种基于局部近似和softmax单位分割的构造性逼近框架，证明了仅含两个编码器块和单隐藏层前馈网络的密集Transformer能以$\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-d/\alpha})$个参数实现对$\alpha$-Hölder连续函数的均匀$\varepsilon$-逼近，并建立了接近极小极大最优的泛化误差界$\mathcal{O}(n^{-\frac{2\alpha}{2\alpha+d}}\log n)$。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为Transformer网络在回归任务中建立严格的学习理论，包括逼近能力和泛化保证，弥合实践经验与理论理解之间的差距。

Method: 提出了一种构造性逼近框架，利用注意力机制通过输入仿射变换实现空间定位，构建目标函数的局部近似，并通过softmax单位分割将其聚合为全局近似。

Result: 证明了密集Transformer（两个编码器块+单隐藏层FFN）能以$\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-d/\alpha})$参数实现$\alpha$-Hölder连续函数的$\varepsilon$-逼近，经验风险最小化器的泛化误差界为$\mathcal{O}(n^{-\frac{2\alpha}{2\alpha+d}}\log n)$，达到近极小极大最优。

Conclusion: 该工作为Transformer在回归任务中的逼近能力和泛化性能提供了严格的理论保证，所研究的架构（密集、浅宽、含softmax和正弦位置编码）贴近实际实现，具有重要的理论指导意义。

Abstract: This paper investigates the learning theory of Transformer networks for regression tasks on the compact Euclidean domain $[0,1]^d$ and $d$-dimensional compact Riemannian manifolds. We propose a novel constructive approximation framework for Transformers that builds local approximations of the target function and aggregates them into a global approximation via softmax partition of unity. This approach leverages the attention mechanism to achieve spatial localization through affine transformations of the input. The softmax activation plays a crucial role in aggregating local approximations to a global output. From an approximation perspective, we prove that a dense Transformer equipped with only two encoder blocks and standard single-hidden-layer point-wise feed-forward networks can achieve a uniform $\varepsilon$-approximation error for $α$-Hölder continuous functions with $α\in (0,1]$ using $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-d/α})$ total parameters. Building upon this approximation guarantee, we establish a near minimax-optimal generalization error bound of order $\mathcal{O}\big(n^{-\frac{2α}{2α+d}} \log n\big)$ for the empirical risk minimizer, where $n$ is the training data size. The Transformer architecture studied in this paper is dense, shallow and wide, and employs softmax activation and sinusoidal positional encodings, closely reflecting practical implementations.

</details>


### [969] [Tight Generalization Bounds for Noiseless Inverse Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08866)
*Pouria Fatemi,Hoomaan Maskan,Suvrit Sra,Peyman Mohajerin Esfahani*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了无噪声逆向优化问题，证明了动作集的泛化界为 $O(d/T)$，并在唯一动作条件下将保证提升至与bandit最优臂识别一致，同时证明了该界的紧性以及与对抗性设置下界匹配的遗憾结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 逆向优化旨在从观测到的上下文-动作数据中推断决策者目标函数的参数，但现有工作在理论保证上不够完善，特别是在样本复杂度、泛化界和遗憾分析方面。

Method: 采用无噪声IO设定（演示由真实目标生成），推导出高概率 $O(d/T)$ 泛化界；在动作唯一性条件下进一步强化保证；通过下界分析证明率的最优性；提出参数无关的低复杂度算法。

Result: 证明了 $O(d/T)$ 泛化率在一致估计量下紧；遗憾下界与对抗性设置的上界匹配，表明随机IO在该类估计器下实质上是"对抗性"的；实验验证了理论速率和界的紧性。

Conclusion: 该工作为无噪声逆向优化提供了第一个严格的泛化与遗憾理论分析，建立了与bandit最优臂识别和对抗性学习的联系，并给出了实用的高效算法。

Abstract: Inverse optimization (IO) seeks to infer the parameters of a decision-maker's objective from observed context--action data. We study noiseless IO, where demonstrations are generated by a ground-truth objective. We provide a high-probability ${O}(\frac{d}{T})$ generalization bound for the induced action set, where $d$ is the number of unknown parameters and $T$ is the size of the training dataset. We strengthen these guarantees under additional conditions that ensure uniqueness of the chosen action, bringing our IO guarantees in line with best-arm identification results in the bandit literature. We further show that the ${O}(\frac{d}{T})$ rate is tight over all consistent estimators considered here, and extend the result to both instantaneous and cumulative regret. Notably, the resulting regret lower bound matches the corresponding upper bounds in the adversarial setting, indicating that the stochastic IO setting is effectively adversarial for the class of estimators studied here. Finally, we propose a parameter-free algorithm with lower per-iteration complexity than generic solvers. Experiments validate the predicted rates and illustrate the tightness of our bounds.

</details>


### [970] [Survey-aware Machine Learning: A Guideline for Valid Population Health Inference based on Scoping Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08963)
*YongKyung Oh,Henry W. Zheng,Jeffrey Feng,Alex A. T. Bui*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出Survey-aware Machine Learning (SaML)，一个九步骤指南，用于在机器学习生命周期中整合调查设计元数据（如抽样权重、分层变量等），解决忽略复杂调查设计导致的偏差、不确定性低估和公平性评估失真问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ML模型在使用NHANES等复杂健康调查数据时，常忽略原始抽样单元、分层变量和抽样权重，违反标准评估方法的独立性假设，导致估计有偏、不确定性被低估、公平性评估无法反映真实人群差异。

Method: 通过范围综述16篇方法论论文，总结加权模型训练、基于设计的交叉验证和调查调整的性能评估等现有工作，识别超参数调优和部署阶段的空白，提出涵盖ML全生命周期的九步SaML指南，并提供任务特异性指导。

Result: 形成了SaML九步指南框架，明确了不同分析目标下各步骤的必要性，并识别出超参数调优和模型部署环节中调查设计整合的空白。

Conclusion: SaML为从调查数据中进行有效的人群推断提供了可操作的核查清单，弥补了现有ML方法忽视调查设计的系统性缺陷。

Abstract: Machine Learning (ML) models trained on complex health surveys such as the National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (NHANES) often ignore primary sampling units, stratification variables, and sampling weights. This practice violates the independence assumptions of standard evaluation methods. As a result, estimates become biased, uncertainty is underestimated, and fairness assessments fail to reflect population-level disparities. We propose Survey-aware Machine Learning (SaML), a nine-step guideline that incorporates survey design metadata across the ML lifecycle. Through a scoping review of 16 methodological papers, we summarize existing work on weighted model training, design-based cross-validation, and survey-adjusted performance evaluation. We also identify gaps in hyperparameter tuning and deployment. We provide task-specific guidance that clarifies which steps are required for different analytical objectives. SaML provides a checklist for valid population inference from survey data.

</details>


### [971] [Optimality of Sub-network Laplace Approximations: New Results and Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09075)
*Swarnali Raha,Kshitij Khare,Rohit K Patra*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文对子网络拉普拉斯近似方法进行了严格理论分析，证明了所有子网络拉普拉斯方法都会系统地低估全拉普拉斯后验的预测方差，并提出两种具有理论保障的新方法：Gradient-Laplace和Greedy-Laplace，用于更优的子网络参数选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有子网络拉普拉斯方法通常依赖对角线、层级等架构启发式策略进行参数子集选择，忽略了参数间的交叉相互作用，且缺乏形式化的最优性保证，因此需要更严谨的理论分析与更优的选择方法。

Method: 1) 理论证明所有子网络拉普拉斯方法都会系统性地低估全拉普拉斯后验的预测方差，且该偏差随保留子矩阵增大而单调递减。2) 提出Gradient-Laplace：基于模型输出对参数的平均平方梯度大小选择参数。3) 提出Greedy-Laplace：通过迭代考虑精度矩阵中的非对角交互来优化参数选择。

Result: 理论结果：Gradient-Laplace被证明在最优性上优于现有启发式方法。实验验证：在多种不同设置下的广泛数值研究表明，所提方法相比现有基准方法表现优异。

Conclusion: 本文从理论上揭示了子网络拉普拉斯近似的系统性偏差特性，基于此提出的两种新方法提供了有理论保障的改进方案，为深度神经网络不确定性量化中高效且可信的子网络选择提供了新途径。

Abstract: Although the Laplace approximation offers a simple route to uncertainty quantification in deep neural networks, its reliance on inverting large Hessian matrices has motivated a range of computationally feasible low-dimensional or sparse approximations. A prominent class of such methods - sub-network Laplace approximations, constructs surrogates by restricting attention to a small subset of parameters. Existing approaches in this family typically rely on diagonal, layer-wise, or other architectural heuristics for subset selection, which ignore cross-parameter interactions and lack formal optimality guarantees. In this paper, we provide a rigorous theoretical analysis of the sub-network Laplace paradigm. We prove that all sub-network Laplace methods systematically underestimate the predictive variance of the full Laplace posterior, and that this bias decreases monotonically as the retained sub-matrix expands. Leveraging this insight, we propose two principled, analytically grounded sub-network Hessian approximations: \textit{Gradient-Laplace} selects parameters with the largest average squared gradients of the model output with respect to the parameters over a reference dataset; while \textit{Greedy-Laplace} iteratively refines this selection by accounting for off-diagonal interactions in the precision matrix. We establish theoretical guarantees characterizing their optimality properties and show that Gradient-Laplace provably outperforms existing heuristic approaches. Extensive numerical studies across diverse settings indicate that these methods perform strongly relative to existing benchmarks.

</details>


### [972] [Optimal Regret for Single Index Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09454)
*Devdan Dey,Sujoy Bhore,Avishek Ghosh*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出 ZoomSIB-UCB 算法，通过两阶段方法（先估计投影方向，再降维为一维bandit）解决单指标bandit问题，取得了 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{2/3})$ 的最优遗憾界，并证明了匹配的 minimax 下界 $\tilde{\Omega}(T^{2/3})$，填补了非单调奖励函数情形下的理论空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单指标bandit问题中，非单调奖励函数的遗憾界此前仅为 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{3/4})$，最优性未知。本文旨在建立该问题的严格最优遗憾界。

Method: 两阶段算法 ZoomSIB-UCB：第一阶段用归一化 Stein 估计量估计投影方向；第二阶段将问题离散化降为一维 bandit，使用 UCB 策略进行决策。

Result: 遗憾上界 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{2/3})$，匹配的 minimax 下界 $\tilde{\Omega}(T^{2/3})$，理论最优；实验验证了算法的有效性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该工作完整刻画了单指标 bandit 问题的遗憾特征，在无额外假设下显著改进了现有结果，理论和实证均证实了算法的优越性。

Abstract: We study the $\textit{single-index bandit}$ problem, where rewards depend on an unknown one-dimensional projection of high-dimensional contexts through an unknown reward function. This model extends linear and generalized linear bandits to a nonparametric setting, and is particularly relevant when the reward function is not known in advance. While optimal regret guarantees are known for monotone reward functions, the general non-monotone case remains poorly understood, with the best known bound being $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{3/4})$ (under standard boundedness and Lipschitz assumptions on the reward function [Kang et al., 2025]).
  We close this gap by establishing the optimal regret for general single-index bandits. We propose a simple two-phase algorithm, namely, Zoomed Single Index Bandit with Upper Confidence Bound ($\texttt{ZoomSIB-UCB}$), that first estimates the projection direction via a normalized Stein estimator, and then reduces the problem to a one-dimensional bandit using discretization and finally use UCB. This approach achieves a regret of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{2/3})$, and improves significantly upon prior work without any additional assumptions. We also prove a matching minimax lower bound of $\tildeΩ(T^{2/3})$, showing that the upper bound is essentially tight. Our upper and lower bounds together provide a sharp characterization of the regret in single-index bandits. Moreover, the empirical results further demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our approach.

</details>


### [973] [Quantitative Local Convergence of Mean-Field Stein Variational Gradient Flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09456)
*Lénaïc Chizat,Maria Colombo,Roberto Colombo,Xavier Fernández-Real*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文证明了SVGD方法在Riesz核相互作用下的局部定量收敛率，得到了显式的多项式收敛速度，并在某些情形下证明这些速率是紧的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SVGD是一种确定性粒子采样方法，但其在平均场连续时间极限下的定量收敛率尚未被建立，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 在d维环面上考虑Riesz型相互作用核，假设初始密度和目标密度光滑且在L²范数下接近，通过Wasserstein梯度流和核均值差异的分析工具，推导出显式的多项式收敛速率。

Result: 建立了依赖于维数、核正则性参数、初始化及目标正则性的显式多项式L²收敛率，证明了在某些情形下这些速率是紧的，并通过数值实验验证理论结果。

Conclusion: 该工作为SVGD的局部收敛性提供了定量刻画，在库仑奇异核的边缘情形下恢复了过去工作中的全局指数收敛结果，为理解SVGD的动力学行为提供了更深入的理论基础。

Abstract: Stein Variational Gradient Descent (SVGD) is a deterministic interacting-particle method for sampling from a target probability measure given access to its score function. In the mean-field and continuous-time limit, it is known that the flow converges weakly toward the target, but no quantitative rate is known for the last iterate. In this paper, we establish quantitative local convergence in strong norms for this dynamics, when the interaction kernel is of Riesz type on the $d$-dimensional torus. Specifically, assuming that the initial density and the target are smooth and close in $L^2$-norm, we obtain explicit polynomial convergence rates in $L^2$-norm that depend on the dimension and on the regularity parameters of the kernel, the initialization and the target. We further show that these rates are sharp in certain regimes, and support the theory with numerical experiments. In the edge case of kernels with a Coulomb singularity, we recover the global exponential convergence result established in prior work. Our analysis is inspired by recent results on Wasserstein gradient flows of kernel mean discrepancies.

</details>


### [974] [Empirical Bayes 1-bit matrix completion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09509)
*Takeru Matsuda*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于经验贝叶斯的1比特矩阵补全方法，受Efron-Morris估计器启发，通过收缩奇异值实现低秩结构利用，在预测精度、校准可靠性和计算效率上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决二值矩阵中未观测条目的预测问题（1比特矩阵补全），现有方法在预测精度、不确定性量化和计算效率之间难以取得良好平衡。

Method: 提出经验贝叶斯方法，受Efron-Morris估计器（James-Stein估计的矩阵推广）启发，通过收缩奇异值来利用二值矩阵的潜在低秩结构，并与多维项目反应理论建立联系。

Result: 仿真实验和真实数据应用表明，所提方法在预测精度、校准可靠性（不确定性量化）和计算效率方面均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 该经验贝叶斯方法能有效平衡1比特矩阵补全任务的多个关键性能指标，兼具理论优雅性和实用价值。

Abstract: The problem of predicting unobserved entries in a binary matrix, known as 1-bit matrix completion, has found diverse applications in fields such as recommendation systems. In this study, we develop an empirical Bayes method for 1-bit matrix completion motivated by the Efron--Morris estimator, a matrix generalization of the James--Stein estimator that shrinks singular values toward zero. The proposed method exploits the underlying low-rank structure of binary matrices, drawing parallels with multidimensional item response theory. Simulation studies and real-data applications demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a superior balance of predictive accuracy, calibration reliability (uncertainty quantification), and computational efficiency compared to existing methods.

</details>


### [975] [Metropolis-Adjusted Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09654)
*Kevin H. Lam,Tyler Farghly,Christopher Williams,Jun Yang,Yee Whye Teh,Arnaud Doucet*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出基于Metropolis-Hastings和Barker接受-拒绝步骤的调整Langevin校正器，以消除扩散模型采样中的偏差，并通过两硬币伯努利工厂算法实现精确校正，以及基于辛普森法则的高效近似方法，在合成和图像数据集上均提升了样本质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型采样存在时间离散化和分数函数近似带来的偏差，常用的ULA校正器本身也是有偏的，需要更精确的校正方法。

Method: 提出两种校正方法：(1) 基于两硬币伯努利工厂算法的精确调整Langevin校正器；(2) 基于辛普森法则的高效近似方法，步长精度达到O(ε^(5/2))且边际成本近乎为零。

Result: 在合成数据和图像数据集上均提升了样本质量，FID分数持续改善。

Conclusion: 调整的Langevin校正器能够有效消除扩散模型采样偏差，且所提方法在精度和效率之间取得了良好平衡。

Abstract: Sampling from score-based diffusion models incurs bias due to both time discretisation and the approximation of the score function. A common strategy for reducing this bias is to apply corrector steps based on the unadjusted Langevin algorithm (ULA) at each noise level within a predictor-corrector framework. However, ULA is itself a biased sampler, as it discretises a continuous diffusion process. In this work, we consider adjusted Langevin correctors that employ Metropolis--Hastings (MH) or Barker's accept-reject steps to correct for this bias. Since the target density ratio typically required by MH-based algorithms is unavailable, we propose methods that instead utilise the score function to compute the correct acceptance probability. We introduce the first exact method for adjusting Langevin corrections in diffusion models, based on a two-coin Bernoulli factory algorithm. We also propose an efficient approximation based on Simpson's rule that achieves accuracy of order $5/2$ in the step size at near-zero marginal cost. We demonstrate that these procedures improve sample quality on both synthetic and image datasets, yielding consistent gains in Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) on the latter.

</details>


### [976] [Learning stochastic multiscale models through normalizing flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09718)
*Anan Saha,Arnab Ganguly*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种从单条慢变量轨迹中学习多尺度随机动力学的数据驱动框架，利用归一化流参数化快过程的平稳分布，并结合随机平均原理实现模型降阶，同时通过贝叶斯变分推断量化认知不确定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（如基于PDE的Fokker-Planck方法）需要密集时空数据或网格求解器，而实际中常常只能观测到单条慢变量轨迹，快动力学不可观测，导致统计学习困难。作者希望从轨迹视角出发，仅用单条观测路径学习有效的随机动力学。

Method: 1) 用耦合多尺度SDE建模系统；2) 通过随机平均实现原则性的模型降阶，保留慢-快尺度交互结构；3) 用归一化流参数化快过程的平稳分布（解决未知PDE难题）；4) 端到端训练，优化由降阶随机动力学导出的惩罚似然目标；5) 用第二个归一化流进行贝叶斯变分推断，量化模型参数的不确定性。

Result: 提出了一种可扩展的、能同时实现模型降阶和不确定性量化的学习框架，在仅有一条慢变量轨迹的条件下有效学习多尺度随机动力学。

Conclusion: 该方法相比PCA等通用降维技术更能保留系统的动力学结构，并通过归一化流灵活建模快过程平稳分布，为多尺度随机系统的数据驱动建模提供了新思路。

Abstract: Many systems in physics, engineering, and biology exhibit multiscale stochastic dynamics, where low-dimensional slow variables evolve under the influence of high-dimensional fast processes. In practice, observations are often limited to a single trajectory of the slow component, while the fast dynamics remain unobserved, making statistical learning challenging. Approaches based on partial differential equations (PDE), such as Fokker-Planck formulations, aim to characterize the evolution of probability densities, typically requiring dense space-time data or grid-based solvers. In contrast, we adopt a trajectory-based perspective and develop a data-driven framework for learning effective stochastic dynamics from a single observed path. We model the dynamics by coupled multiscale stochastic differential equations (SDEs) and first obtain a principled model reduction through stochastic averaging. Unlike generic model reduction techniques such as PCA, this respects the dynamical structure of the original system and explicitly incorporates the interaction between slow and fast scales. A central challenge, however, is that the reduced model depends on the invariant distribution of the fast process, which is a solution to an intractable and often unknown PDE. We introduce a novel learning framework that parameterizes the invariant distribution using normalizing flows, enabling expressive density modeling in the latent fast-variable space. The flow is trained end-to-end by optimizing a penalized likelihood objective induced by the reduced stochastic dynamics. Furthermore, we develop a Bayesian variational inference procedure for uncertainty quantification, employing a second normalizing flow to approximate the posterior distribution over model parameters. This yields a scalable approach to capturing epistemic uncertainty in multiscale systems.

</details>


### [977] [Supercharging Bayesian Inference with Reliable AI-Informed Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09834)
*Jongwoo Choi,Sean O'Hagan*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个AI引导的先验构建框架，通过修正AI生成合成数据的数据生成律，在利用AI先验信息的同时减少偏差，提高贝叶斯推断的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代预测系统的编码信念可作为统计推断的先验信息，但直接使用AI构建的先验存在偏差传播风险。本文旨在缓解信息先验的利用与误差传播之间的权衡问题。

Method: 提出修正AI诱导数据生成律的方法，将修正后的律嵌入合成数据驱动的先验构建技术中，包括作为狄利克雷过程先验的基测度。建立了非零先验强度下的高斯渐近理论并推导了中心化偏差的一阶表达式。

Result: 修正后的AI先验显著减少了偏差，提高了可信区间的覆盖率，使AI驱动的先验信息更加可靠。在真实皮肤疾病分类任务中有效提升了预测性能。

Conclusion: 本文提出的修正AI先验框架能够有效缓解利用AI先验信息与传播模型误差之间的张力，为数据有限场景下可靠使用AI先验提供了理论依据和实用方法。

Abstract: Modern predictive systems encode beliefs that can act as useful prior information for statistical inference in data-limited settings. Using them for prior construction introduces a tradeoff: an informative prior built from a predictive model can sharpen inference from limited data, but also risks propagating error from the model into the posterior. We propose a framework for AI-informed prior elicitation that mitigates this tension by rectifying the AI-induced law that generates synthetic data before using it to inform a prior. The rectified law can be embedded into synthetic data-driven prior elicitation techniques, including as a base measure in a Dirichlet process (DP) prior on the data-generating process. We refer to the resulting prior and corresponding posterior as the rectified AI prior and rectified AI posterior. We establish Gaussian asymptotics for the rectified AI posterior under non-vanishing prior strength and derive a first-order expression for its centering bias. Our rectified AI priors substantially reduce bias compared to standard approaches, improve the coverage of credible intervals, and make AI-powered prior information more reliable. We additionally apply the rectified AI prior to a real skin disease classification task and show that it can meaningfully boost predictive performance.

</details>


### [978] [Unified Approach for Weakly Supervised Multicalibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09857)
*Futoshi Futami,Takashi Ishida*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文针对弱监督学习（包括正-无标签、无标签-无标签、正-置信度学习）中无干净标签对的情况，提出了多校准误差的估计方法与后处理校正框架，通过污染矩阵风险重写与见证者约束推导出具有有限样本保证的校准矩，并设计了弱标签多校准提升算法（WLMC），实验验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多校准方法依赖干净输入-标签对，但在弱监督学习场景中干净标签昂贵或不可得，而可靠的置信度估计又至关重要，因此需要在无干净标签的条件下估计和校正多校准误差。

Method: 提出统一框架，结合污染矩阵风险重写（contamination-matrix risk rewrites）与基于见证者的校准约束（witness-based calibration constraints），推导出具有有限样本保证的校正多校准矩；并设计了弱标签多校准提升算法（WLMC）进行后处理校正。

Result: 在多种弱监督设置（正-无标签、无标签-无标签、正-置信度学习）下的实验，验证了所提方法在多校准行为评估与不确定性估计方面的有效性。

Conclusion: 本研究填补了弱监督学习中多校准估计与校正的空白，提供了理论基础与实用算法，为弱监督场景下的可靠不确定性估计开辟了新路径。

Abstract: Multicalibration requires predicted scores to agree with label probabilities across rich families of subgroups and score-dependent tests, but existing methods require clean input-label pairs for evaluation and post-processing. This assumption fails in weakly supervised learning (WSL) regimes -- including positive-unlabeled, unlabeled-unlabeled, and positive-confidence learning -- where clean labels are costly or unavailable even though reliable uncertainty estimates may be crucial. We address this gap by developing estimators of multicalibration error and post-hoc correction methods for WSL settings in which clean input-label pairs are unavailable. We propose a unified framework for estimating and correcting multicalibration under weak supervision by combining contamination-matrix risk rewrites with witness-based calibration constraints, yielding corrected multicalibration moments with finite-sample guarantees. We further propose weak-label multicalibration boost (WLMC), a generic post-hoc recalibration algorithm under weak supervision. Finally, we conduct experiments across multiple weak-supervision settings to evaluate multicalibration behavior and offer empirical insight into uncertainty estimation under weak supervision.

</details>


### [979] [Federated Language Models Under Bandwidth Budgets: Distillation Rates and Conformal Coverage](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09986)
*Prasanjit Dubey,Xiaoming Huo*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文分析了分布式语言模型训练与推理的统计保证，提出了两个协议（FPLD和FC-RAG），分别给出了训练阶段的一致性速率和推理阶段的覆盖界，将带宽作为一阶统计参数纳入理论分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分布式学习理论要么只关注训练时的一致性，要么只关注推理时的校准，且均未将带宽作为一阶统计参数。然而在临床网络、企业知识库和科学联盟等场景中，数据分散在带宽受限的节点上且无法集中，因此需要理论刻画在显式带宽预算下可实现的统计保证。

Method: 提出两个协议：(1) 联邦探针-对数蒸馏（FPLD）用于训练，分析其KL一致性速率与节点数K、每节点样本量n、量化预算B、探针集大小m和词汇量V的关系；(2) 联邦共形RAG（FC-RAG）用于推理，给出分布自由的边际覆盖界，引入检索带宽松弛项Δ_RAG，使每节点检索带宽成为一阶统计参数。利用Pinsker不等式将两个界的组合推导为端到端覆盖保证。

Result: (1) FPLD的KL一致性速率中带宽仅通过指数级衰减的量化项进入；(2) FC-RAG的覆盖界中，检索带宽松弛项在每节点均匀场景下以K^{-1/2}速率收缩；(3) 合成实验验证了理论缩放规律；(4) GPT-2小规模实验表明定性带宽-精度权衡在真实模型中成立。

Conclusion: 本文从理论上首次将带宽作为一阶统计参数纳入分布式语言模型的统计保证分析，证明了在带宽受限的联邦场景下，训练和推理阶段分别可达到显式的一致性速率和覆盖保证。该工作提供了理论可行性表征，而非部署就绪系统。

Abstract: Training a language model on data scattered across bandwidth-limited nodes that cannot be centralized is a setting that arises in clinical networks, enterprise knowledge bases, and scientific consortia. We study the regime in which data must remain distributed across nodes, and ask what statistical guarantees are in principle achievable under explicit bandwidth budgets; we aim to characterize what is provably possible, not to demonstrate a deployment-ready system. Existing theory treats either training-time consistency or inference-time calibration in isolation, and none makes bandwidth a first-class statistical parameter. We analyze two protocols, Federated Probe-Logit Distillation (FPLD) for training and Federated Conformal RAG (FC-RAG) for inference, as the analytical vehicles for our results. Our first main result is an explicit high-probability KL-consistency rate for FPLD with simultaneous dependence on node count $K$, per-node sample size $n$, quantization budget $B$, probe-set size $m$, and vocabulary size $V$; bandwidth enters only through an exponentially vanishing quantization term. Our second main result is a distribution-free marginal-coverage bound for FC-RAG, whose novel retrieval-bandwidth slack $Δ_{\mathrm{RAG}} = f_{\max}\sqrt{K^{-2}\sum_i v(B_i)}$ makes per-node retrieval bandwidth a first-class statistical parameter, with arithmetic aggregation across $K$ nodes shrinking the slack as $K^{-1/2}$ in the per-node-uniform regime. A Pinsker-type corollary composes the two bounds into an end-to-end coverage guarantee. Synthetic experiments verify the predicted scaling along the bounds' parameters; small-scale experiments on a GPT-2 testbed illustrate that the qualitative bandwidth-accuracy tradeoff survives on a real language model. A deployment-scale empirical evaluation is out of scope.

</details>


### [980] [Differentially Private Sampling from Distributions via Wasserstein Projection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10015)
*Shokichi Takakura,Seng Pei Liew,Satoshi Hasegawa*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究差分隐私约束下的采样问题，提出以Wasserstein距离作为效用度量的新框架，并设计了基于Wasserstein投影的极小极大最优机制WPM，同时给出了高效近似算法及其收敛性保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于KL散度的DP采样效用度量存在两个关键局限：1）无法捕捉支撑集的几何结构；2）当分布支撑集不同时无法适用。为了克服这些问题，需要一种更能反映几何特性的距离度量。

Method: 提出Wasserstein投影机制（WPM），以Wasserstein距离作为效用度量，设计了一种极小极大最优的机制，并开发了高效近似算法。

Result: WPM机制在Wasserstein距离下达到极小极大最优性，并且所提出的近似算法具有收敛性保证。

Conclusion: 以Wasserstein距离替代KL散度能更好地处理差分隐私采样中的几何结构和支撑集差异问题，WPM机制在理论上是最优的，且计算上可行。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of sampling from a distribution under the constraint of differential privacy (DP). Prior works measure the utility of DP sampling with density ratio-based measures such as KL divergence. However, such formulations suffer from two key limitations: 1) they fail to capture the geometric structure of the support, and 2) they are not applicable when the supports of the distributions differ. To deal with these issues, we develop a novel framework for DP sampling with Wasserstein distance as the utility measure. In this formulation, we propose Wasserstein Projection Mechanism (WPM), a minimax optimal mechanism based on Wasserstein projection. Furthermore, we develop efficient algorithms for computing the proposed mechanisms approximately and provide convergence guarantees.

</details>


### [981] [PFN-TS: Thompson Sampling for Contextual Bandits via Prior-Data Fitted Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10137)
*Yan Shuo Tan,Kenyon Ng,Ruizhe Deng,Sumetha Loganathan,Qiong Zhang,Bibhas Chakraborty*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出PFN-TS算法，利用TabICL等PFNs的近似贝叶斯后验预测能力，通过子采样预测中心极限定理将噪声预测转化为均值奖励采样，实现高效汤普森采样，理论上有贝叶斯遗憾界保证，实验表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PFNs（如TabPFN、TabICL）能近似贝叶斯后验预测分布，但其预测的是含噪声的未来奖励，而汤普森采样需要的是潜在均值奖励函数的不确定性。现有方法需要完整O(n)预测序列，计算成本高。

Method: 提出PFN-TS算法：利用子采样预测中心极限定理，从O(log n)个几何网格数据集前缀估计后验方差，将PFN的后验预测分布转换为均值奖励样本；复用TabICL的缓存表示以降低计算开销。

Result: 在非线性合成数据和OpenML分类转bandit基准中取得最佳平均排名；在线性及BART生成奖励上表现有竞争力；在离线移动健康评估中获得最高估计策略价值。

Conclusion: 提出了一种高效且理论上可证明的PFN-based汤普森采样框架，将PFNs的预测能力与bandit决策有效结合，遗憾界表明其与精确后验采样的差距可控。

Abstract: Thompson sampling is a widely used strategy for contextual bandits: at each round, it samples a reward function from a Bayesian posterior and acts greedily under that sample. Prior-data fitted networks (PFNs), such as TabPFN v2+ and TabICL v2, are attractive candidates for this purpose because they approximate Bayesian posterior predictive distributions in a single forward pass. However, PFNs predict noisy future rewards, while Thompson sampling requires uncertainty over the latent mean reward function. We propose PFN-TS, a Thompson sampling algorithm that converts PFN posterior predictives into mean-reward samples using a subsampled predictive central limit theorem. The method estimates posterior variance from a geometric grid of $O(\log n)$ dataset prefixes rather than the full $O(n)$ predictive sequence used in previous predictive-sequence approaches, and reuses TabICL's cached representations across rounds. We prove consistency of the subsampled variance estimator and give a Bayesian regret bound that decomposes PFN-TS regret into exact posterior-sampling regret under the PFN prior plus approximation terms. Empirically, PFN-TS achieves the best average rank across nonlinear synthetic and OpenML classification-to-bandit benchmarks, remains competitive on linear and BART-generated rewards, and attains the highest estimated policy value in an offline mobile-health evaluation. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PFN_TS-36ED/.

</details>


### [982] [Coarsening Linear Non-Gaussian Causal Models with Cycles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10163)
*Francisco Madaleno,Francisco C Pereira,Alex Markham*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出在线性非高斯（LiNG）设定下，即使高维因果结构存在环，仍可恢复一个低维有向无环图（DAG）作为因果摘要，该低维DAG在所有观测等价类中保持不变，且学习算法在最坏情况下为立方时间复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果抽象方法假设高维和低维结构均为无环（acyclic），这排除了许多存在环的高维模型，限制了方法的适用性。作者希望放宽高维无环假设，同时仍能恢复低维DAG作为因果摘要。

Method: 在LiNG（线性非高斯）设定下，证明即使高维因果结构包含环，低维因果DAG仍可识别；将低维DAG的识别与现有观测等价类理论联系，证明低维DAG在等价类中保持不变；提出一种最坏情况立方时间复杂度的学习算法，并给出样本复杂度界。

Result: 理论结果：低维DAG在存在环的LiNG模型中仍可识别，且是观测等价类的自然代表；算法复杂度：最坏情况为O(n³)时间（指数复杂度降为多项式）；实验验证：通过合成数据实验支持理论结果。

Conclusion: 本文成功放宽了因果抽象中的高维无环假设，在LiNG设定下证明了低维DAG的可识别性，并提供了高效的学习算法与理论保证，显著扩大了因果抽象方法的适用范围。

Abstract: Recent work on causal abstraction, in particular graphical approaches focusing on causal structure between clusters of variables, aims to summarize a high-dimensional causal structure in terms of a low-dimensional one. Existing methods for learning such summaries from data assume that both the high- and low-dimensional structures are acyclic, which is helpful for causal effect identification and reasoning but excludes many high-dimensional models and thus limits applicability. We show that in the linear non-Gaussian (LiNG) setting, the high-dimensional acyclicity assumption can be relaxed while still allowing recovery of a low-dimensional causal directed acyclic graph (DAG). We further connect identifiability of this low-dimensional DAG to existing results: LiNG models with cycles are observationally identifiable only up to an equivalence class whose members differ by reversals of directed cycles; our low-dimensional DAG, which is invariant across all members of a given equivalence class, thus forms a natural representative of the class. While existing approaches for learning this observational equivalence class over high-dimensional variables have exponential time complexity, our low-dimensional summary is learned in worst-case cubic time and comes with explicit bounds on the sample complexity. We provide open source code and experiments on synthetic data to corroborate our theoretical results.

</details>


### [983] [Scalable Gaussian process inference via neural feature maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10285)
*Anthony Stephenson*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于高斯过程的理论框架，利用神经特征映射构建可表达核函数，实现了快速、可扩展且精确的GP推断，在回归和分类任务上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高斯过程方法在核函数设计上缺乏灵活性，且在大规模数据和复杂结构（如图像）上计算效率低，需要一种既能保持GP理论优势又能利用神经网络表达能力的方法。

Method: 提出基于神经特征映射的GP框架：将学习到的特征映射解释为对隐含RKHS中Gram矩阵的最优低秩近似；分析诱导核的谱特性；引入乘积特征映射核来缓解过平滑问题。

Result: 建立了GP后验的一致性保证；在回归和分类基准数据集上的精度、训练效率和预测效率均超越了已有方法；适用于表格数据和图像等结构化领域。

Conclusion: 该框架理论上严谨，实践上简单高效，为GP核设计提供了灵活且可扩展的新范式，有望推动GP在更广泛数据模态上的应用。

Abstract: We present a theoretically grounded Gaussian process framework that leverages neural feature maps to construct expressive kernels. We show that the learned feature map can be interpreted as an optimal low-rank approximation to a Gram matrix derived from an implied RKHS, from which we establish consistency of the GP posterior. We further analyse the spectral properties of the induced kernels and introduce product feature-map kernels to address oversmoothing. This simple yet powerful approach enables fast, scalable, and accurate exact GP inference with minimal upfront work. The flexibility of kernel design supports seamless application to both regression and classification tasks across diverse data modalities, including tabular inputs and structured domains such as images. On benchmark datasets, this approach surpasses pre-existing methods in terms of accuracy and training and prediction efficiency.

</details>


### [984] [Characterizing the Generalization Error of Random Feature Regression with Arbitrary Data-Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10290)
*Lucas Morisset,Alain Durmus,Adrien Hardy*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文在比例增长机制下（协变量数量与样本量同比例增长），严格刻画了数据增强对监督回归方法的正则化效应，给出了测试误差（均方误差）的精确表征，适用于特征映射未正确指定及仅训练最后一层读出层的网络架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管数据增强在实践中被广泛使用并被视为一种隐式正则化手段，但其对回归方法在比例增长机制下的正则化效应的理论理解尚不充分，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 在比例增长机制下，利用随机矩阵理论等工具，从总体数据量和增强方案的一阶、二阶统计量出发，严格刻画测试均方误差；结果适用于未正确指定的特征映射以及仅训练最后一层、其余层冻结或随机初始化的任意网络架构。

Result: 给出了测试误差仅依赖于真实数据总体量及增强方案一阶、二阶统计量的精确表征；在高斯数据设定下，该渐近刻画是紧的。

Conclusion: 本文从理论上严格证明了数据增强在比例增长机制下对监督回归的正则化效应，为理解数据增强的作用机制提供了理论支撑。

Abstract: This paper aims at analyzing the regularization effect that data augmentation induces on supervised regression methods in the proportional regime, where the number of covariates grows proportionally to the number of samples. We provide a tight characterization of the test error, measured in mean squared error, in terms only of the population quantities of the true data, as well as first and second order statistics of the augmentation scheme. Our results are valid under misspecified feature maps, and for any network architecture where only the last readout layer is trained, and the rest of the network is either frozen or randomly initialized. We specify our results in the case of Gaussian data, and show that our asymptotic characterization is tight in this setting.

</details>


### [985] [Fast Training of Mixture-of-Experts for Time Series Forecasting via Expert Loss Integration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10330)
*Btissame El Mahtout,Florian Ziel*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种自适应混合专家（MoE）框架，通过引入专家特定损失和部分在线学习策略，提升了时间序列预测的准确性和计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MoE框架中专家缺乏个性化监督信号，且模型需要频繁全量重训练，计算成本高。本文旨在通过专家级损失感知和在线优化来解决这些问题。

Method: 1) 在整体预测损失之外，引入专家特定损失，使每个专家的预测误差直接参与训练；2) 结合部分在线学习策略，增量更新门控机制和专家参数，避免全模型重训练。

Result: 在经济、旅游和能源等多个数据集上，该方法在预测精度和计算效率上普遍优于统计方法及Transformer、WaveNet等先进神经网络模型。消融实验验证了专家特定损失策略的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提出的基于专家级损失感知与部分在线学习的MoE框架，在保持强预测性能的同时显著提升了学习效率，是一种高效且有效的时间序列预测方案。

Abstract: We propose a novel adaptive Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework for time series forecasting that enhances expert specialization by incorporating expert-specific loss information directly into the training process. Notably, the overall objective comprises the base forecasting loss and expert-specific losses, allowing expert-level prediction errors to jointly shape training alongside the global forecasting loss. This framework is further combined with a partial online learning strategy, enabling incremental updates of both the gating mechanism and expert parameters. This approach significantly reduces computational cost by eliminating the need for repeated full model retraining. By integrating expert-level loss awareness with efficient online optimization, the proposed method achieves improved learning efficiency while maintaining strong predictive performance. Empirical results across economic, tourism, and energy datasets with varying frequencies demonstrate that the proposed approach generally outperforms both statistical methods and state-of-the-art neural network models, such as Transformers and WaveNet, in forecasting accuracy and computational efficiency. Furthermore, ablation studies confirm the effectiveness of the expert-specific loss integration strategy, highlighting its contribution to enhancing predictive performance.

</details>


### [986] [Uncertainty in Physics and AI: Taxonomy, Quantification, and Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10378)
*Manuel Haußmann,Ramon Winterhalder,Maria Ubiali*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文系统梳理了机器学习在物理学应用中的不确定性量化方法，提出了统一的分类体系，并讨论了覆盖度、校准、偏差检验和适当评分规则等验证工具，通过回归和分类示例加以说明。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理学中的科学发现依赖于经过验证的概率性陈述，而可靠的不确定性量化是机器学习在物理领域应用的关键。现有方法缺乏统一的分类体系和清晰的解释框架。

Method: 提出统一的不确定性分类法，区分频率学派和贝叶斯框架下的预测不确定性与推断不确定性，并介绍覆盖度、校准、偏差检验和适当评分规则等验证工具。

Result: 通过简单的回归和分类示例，演示了所提出的不确定性量化框架和验证工具的实际应用。

Conclusion: 为物理领域的机器学习不确定性量化提供了结构化的理论框架和实用的验证工具集，有助于推动该领域科学发现的可靠性。

Abstract: Reliable uncertainty quantification is essential for the use of machine learning in physics, where scientific discoveries depend on validated probabilistic statements. We provide a structured overview of uncertainty quantification in ML for physics, introducing a unified taxonomy of uncertainty and clarifying the interpretation of predictive and inference uncertainties across frequentist and Bayesian frameworks. We discuss principled validation tools, including coverage, calibration, bias tests, and proper scoring rules, and illustrate them with simple regression and classification examples.

</details>


### [987] [Multifidelity Gaussian process regression for solving nonlinear partial differential equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10383)
*Fatima-Zahrae El-Boukkouri,Josselin Garnier,Olivier Roustant*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于cokriging的多保真核学习方法，用于求解非线性偏微分方程。通过低保真模拟拟合非平稳核，再利用多保真框架构建高保真核与均值，最终在Burgers方程上验证了性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统核方法求解PDE的性能严重依赖核函数的选择，而现有信息本质上是多保真的，因此需要一种能有效利用多保真仿真信息的核学习策略。

Method: 第一步，用低保真模拟数据拟合可微的非平稳核（经验核）；第二步，利用多保真框架（cokriging）推导高保真核并估计超参数，同时构建高保真均值，最终在GP框架中求解PDE。

Result: 在Burgers方程上验证了所提出的物理信息方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 多保真核学习能有效提升核方法求解PDE的性能，为非线性PDE的求解提供了一种新思路。

Abstract: Solving nonlinear partial differential equations (PDEs) using kernel methods offers a compelling alternative to traditional numerical solvers. However, the performance of these methods strongly depends on the choice of kernel. In this work, as the available information is inherently multifidelity, we propose a kernel learning approach based on cokriging, leveraging empirical information from multifidelity simulations. In the first step, we fit a differentiable non-stationary kernel to an empirical kernel obtained from low-fidelity simulations. In the second step, we derive a high-fidelity kernel with estimated hyperparameters, and construct a corresponding high-fidelity mean using the multifidelity framework. These components can then be used within a Gaussian process framework for solving PDEs. Finally, we demonstrate the performance of the proposed physics-informed method on the Burgers' equation.

</details>


### [988] [Regret Analysis of Guided Diffusion for Black-Box Optimization over Structured Inputs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10385)
*Masaki Adachi,Anita Yang,Yakun Wang,Song Liu*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文首次为引导扩散黑箱优化建立了基于证书的期望简单遗憾分析框架，提出了"质量提升"这一核心概念，并给出了有限预算下的收敛速度诊断方法和完全认证的采样器构造。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有黑箱优化遗憾分析依赖最大信息增益、非预训练代理模型或精确采集函数最大化等假设，这些假设在扩散模型+黑箱优化的现代流程中不成立，因此需要新的理论框架。

Method: 提出"质量提升"（mass lift）作为核心分析量，即预训练生成器赋予近最优设计的概率质量增加量；基于此建立期望简单遗憾框架，避免RKHS假设和精确采集最大化；给出有限候选池的搜索指数诊断方法和提案校正重采样构造。

Result: 证明了指数形式的有限预算收敛和多项式加速可以从同一机制（质量提升）导出；提供了实用的搜索指数诊断方法和完全认证的采样器实例。

Conclusion: 该框架为理解引导扩散黑箱优化的遗憾行为提供了新的理论视角，弥补了现有理论与实际应用之间的鸿沟，同时给出了可实际部署的诊断和认证工具。

Abstract: Guided-diffusion black-box optimization (BO) has shown strong empirical performance on structured design problems such as molecules and crystals, but its regret behavior remains poorly understood. Existing BO regret analyses typically rely on maximum information gain, non-pretrained surrogate models, or exact acquisition maximization -- assumptions that break down in modern diffusion -- BO pipelines, where pretrained diffusion models serve as powerful priors over valid structures and acquisition maximization is replaced by approximate sampling over astronomically large discrete spaces. We develop a first certificate-based expected simple-regret framework for guided-diffusion BO that avoids maximum-information-gain bounds, RKHS assumptions, and exact acquisition maximization. The central quantity in our analysis is mass lift: the increase in probability mass assigned to near-optimal designs relative to the pretrained generator. This view explains how exponential-looking finite-budget convergence and polynomial acceleration can all arise from the same mechanism. We also give practical diagnostics for estimating search exponents from finite candidate pools and a proposal-corrected resampling construction that provides a fully certified sampler instance.

</details>


### [989] [Sharp feature-learning transitions and Bayes-optimal neural scaling laws in extensive-width networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10395)
*Minh-Toan Nguyen,Jean Barbier*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文信息论地分析了从带噪声查询中学习具有层次特征的教师网络的极限，推导出贝叶斯最优泛化误差的渐近精确刻画，揭示了特征学习中的序贯相变现象，并定义了有效宽度概念统一了两种不同的标度律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解知识迁移中学生模型从教师网络学习层次特征的信息论极限，特别是在高维（教师宽度与输入维度线性增长）这一更贴近实际有限宽度网络的设定下。

Method: 采用启发式留一解耦论证（leave-one-out decoupling argument），推导出关于贝叶斯最优泛化误差和特征重叠的闭式不动点方程组，并结合数值验证。

Result: 发现特征可学习性由一系列尖锐的相变控制：随数据量增加，教师特征序贯可恢复，每次通过不连续跳跃实现；定义了有效宽度，统一了两种标度律：特征学习区误差标度为 n^{1/(2β)-1}，精炼区标度为 n^{-1}，两者统一为 ε^{BO}=Θ(k_c d/n)。

Conclusion: Adam 训练的学生在有效宽度附近能达到最优标度律（仅存在小的算法差距），为模型规模标度提供了信息论解释。

Abstract: We study the information-theoretic limits of learning a one-hidden-layer teacher network with hierarchical features from noisy queries, in the context of knowledge transfer to a smaller student model. We work in the high-dimensional regime where the teacher width $k$ scales linearly with the input dimension $d$ -- a setting that captures large-but-finite-width networks and has only recently become analytically tractable. Using a heuristic leave-one-out decoupling argument, validated numerically throughout, we derive asymptotically sharp characterizations of the Bayes-optimal generalization error and individual feature overlaps via a system of closed fixed-point equations. These equations reveal that feature learnability is governed by a sequence of sharp phase transitions: as data grows, teacher features become recoverable sequentially, each through a discontinuous jump in overlap. This sequential acquisition underlies a precise notion of \textit{effective width} $k_c$ -- the number of learnable features at a given data budget $n$ -- which unifies two distinct scaling regimes: a feature-learning regime in which the Bayes-optimal generalization error $\varepsilon^{\rm BO}$ scales as $ n^{1/(2β)-1}$, and a refinement regime in which it scales as $n^{-1}$, where $β>1/2$ is the exponent of the power-law feature hierarchy. Both laws collapse to the single relation $\varepsilon^{\rm BO}=Θ(k_c d/n)$. We further show empirically that a student trained with \textsc{Adam} near the effective width $k_c$ achieves these optimal scaling laws (up to a small algorithmic gap), and provide an information-theoretic account of the associated scaling in model size.

</details>


### [990] [Affine Tracing: A New Paradigm for Probabilistic Linear Solvers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10566)
*Disha Hegde,Marvin Pförtner,Jon Cockayne*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文揭示了贝叶斯概率线性求解器（PLS）与非平稳仿射概率迭代方法（PIM）之间的等价关系，证明贝叶斯PLS是后者的特例，并引入“仿射追踪”框架，能自动从标准迭代方法实现中构建PIM，显著降低其实际应用门槛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往文献将贝叶斯PLS和PIM视为两类不同的方法，但这一二分法是否正确尚待验证。此外，仿射PIM虽然理论上优越，但其实现需要大量手动工作，限制了实际应用。

Method: 首先理论证明贝叶斯PLS是非平稳仿射PIM的特例；然后证明所有现实仿射PIM都是校准的；最后提出仿射追踪框架，通过符号追踪器从仿射迭代方法的标准实现中自动构建仿射计算图，并利用等式饱和进行代数简化以计算后验协方差。

Result: 成功自动生成了一个概率多重网格求解器，并在高斯过程近似任务中验证了其性能。

Conclusion: 仿射PIM是统一且实用的概率线性求解器框架，仿射追踪大幅降低了实现门槛，有望推动该类方法的广泛采用。

Abstract: Probabilistic linear solvers (PLSs) return probability distributions that quantify uncertainty due to limited computation in the solution of linear systems. The literature has traditionally distinguished between Bayesian PLSs, which condition a prior on information obtained from projections of the linear system, and probabilistic iterative methods (PIMs), which lift classical iterative solvers to probability space. In this work we show this dichotomy to be false: Bayesian PLSs are a special case of non-stationary affine PIMs. In addition, we prove that any realistic affine PIM is calibrated. These results motivate a focus on (non-stationary) affine PIMs, but their practical adoption has been limited by the significant manual effort required to implement them. To address this, we introduce affine tracing, an algorithmic framework that automatically constructs a PIM from a standard implementation of an affine iterative method by passing symbolic tracers through the computation to build an affine computational graph. We show how this graph can be transformed to compute posterior covariances, and how equality saturation can be used to perform algebraic simplifications required for computation under specific prior choices. We demonstrate the framework by automatically generating a probabilistic multigrid solver and evaluate its performance in the context of Gaussian process approximation.

</details>


### [991] [Amortizing Causal Sensitivity Analysis via Prior Data-Fitted Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10590)
*Emil Javurek,Dennis Frauen,Marie Brockschmidt,Jonas Schweisthal,Stefan Feuerriegel*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于上下文学习的因果敏感性分析方法，通过先验数据拟合网络实现摊销计算，避免了对每个实例重新计算，显著提升了测试时的计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果敏感性分析方法都是每实例（per-instance）的，数据集、因果查询、敏感度水平或处理变量的变化都需要重新计算，缺乏高效且通用的解决方案。

Method: 提出一种摊销化的上下文学习方法，基于先验数据拟合网络；通过拉格朗日标量化目标函数生成训练标签，在因果效应最优化与敏感度模型违反之间进行权衡，避免了模型特定的解析推导。

Result: 在多种数据集、因果查询和敏感度水平上，该方法比传统每实例方法快数个数量级，并且首次实现了因果敏感性分析的基础模型。

Conclusion: 本文是第一个用于因果敏感性分析上下文学习的基础模型，展示了摊销方法在因果推断中的巨大潜力。

Abstract: Causal sensitivity analysis aims to provide bounds for causal effect estimates in the presence of unobserved confounding. However, existing methods for causal sensitivity analysis are per-instance procedures, meaning that changes to the dataset, causal query, sensitivity level, or treatment require new computation. Here, we instead present an in-context learning approach. Specifically, we propose an amortized approach to causal sensitivity analysis based on prior-data fitted networks. A key challenge is that the sensitivity bounds are not directly available when sampling training data. To address this, we develop a general prior-data construction that is applicable across the class of generalized treatment sensitivity models. Our construction involves a Lagrangian scalarization of the objective to generate training labels for the bounds through a tradeoff between causal effect min/max-imization and sensitivity model violation, which avoids model-specific analytical derivations. We further show that, under standard convexity and linearity conditions, our objective recovers the full Pareto frontier of solutions. Empirically, we demonstrate our amortized approach across various datasets, causal queries, and sensitivity levels, where our approach achieves a test-time computation that is orders of magnitude faster than per-instance methods. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first foundation model for in-context learning for causal sensitivity analysis.

</details>


### [992] [Price of Quality: Sufficient Conditions for Sparse Recovery using Mixed-Quality Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10713)
*Youssef Chaabouni,David Gamarnik*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究混合质量观测下的稀疏恢复问题，分别从信息论和算法两个角度分析了异质噪声场景下的样本条件，揭示了信息论阈值与算法阈值对数据质量变化的不同适应方式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际应用中观测数据常来自不同质量来源（少量高质量、大量低质量），现有稀疏恢复理论多假设同质噪声，缺乏对混合质量数据场景的理论分析。

Method: 从信息论角度建立样本量线性权衡条件（"质量代价"）；从算法角度分析LASSO在不可知（agnostic）和知情（informed）两种设置下的恢复表现。

Result: 信息论上，不可知设置中一个高质量样本最多等价于两个低质量样本；知情设置中质量代价可任意大。算法上，LASSO的恢复阈值仅取决于平均噪声水平，与同质噪声情况一致。

Conclusion: 首次给出混合质量数据稀疏恢复的条件，揭示了信息论恢复阈值与算法恢复阈值对数据质量变化具有根本不同的敏感性。

Abstract: We study sparse recovery when observations come from mixed-quality sources: a small collection of high-quality measurements with small noise variance and a larger collection of lower-quality measurements with higher variance. For this heterogeneous-noise setting, we establish sample-size conditions for information-theoretic and algorithmic recovery. On the information-theoretic side, we show that it is sufficient for $(n_1, n_2)$ to satisfy a linear trade-off defining the Price of Quality: the number of low-quality samples needed to replace one high-quality sample. In the agnostic setting, where the decoder is completely agnostic to the quality of the data, it is uniformly bounded, and in particular one high-quality sample is never worth more than two low-quality samples for this sufficient condition to hold. In the informed setting, where the decoder is informed of per-sample variances, the price of quality can grow arbitrarily large. On the algorithmic side, we analyze the LASSO in the agnostic setting and show that the recovery threshold matches the homogeneous-noise case and only depends on the average noise level, revealing a striking robustness of computational recovery to data heterogeneity. Together, these results give the first conditions for sparse recovery with mixed-quality data and expose a fundamental difference between how the information-theoretic and algorithmic thresholds adapt to changes in data quality.

</details>


### [993] [Factual recall in linear associative memories: sharp asymptotics and mechanistic insights](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10795)
*Alessio Giorlandino,Sebastian Goldt,Antoine Maillard*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文在线性联想记忆的极限设定下，利用统计物理方法精确刻画了存储容量：解耦模型可存储至多 p_c 个关联，满足 p_c log p_c / d^2 = 1/2，并揭示了最优解超越Hebbian学习规则的机制——不是放大输入-输出对齐的宽泛波动，而是将正确得分刚好提升到竞争输出的极值阈值之上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解神经网络存储和检索输入-输出关联的根本极限，尽管大语言模型在事实回忆上表现优异，但这一基本问题在理论上仍不清楚。

Method: 首先将原始模型简化为解耦模型（每个输入有独立竞争输出集），通过数值和解析证据证明二者等价；然后利用统计物理工具推导存储容量，并推广到两层线性网络架构。

Result: 解耦模型可存储关联满足 p_c log p_c / d^2 = 1/2；最优解通过将正确得分提升至竞争输出的极值阈值以上来超越Hebbian规则。

Conclusion: 给出了线性网络中事实存储的精确统计物理刻画，为理解更现实神经架构的记忆能力提供了基准。

Abstract: Large language models demonstrate remarkable ability in factual recall, yet the fundamental limits of storing and retrieving input--output associations with neural networks remain unclear. We study these limits in a minimal setting: a linear associative memory that maps $p$ input embeddings in $\mathbb{R}^d$ to their corresponding~$d$-dimensional targets via a single layer, requiring each mapped input to be well separated from all other targets. Unlike in supervised classification, this strict separation induces~$p$ constraints per association and produces strong correlations between constraints that make a direct characterisation of the storage capacity difficult. Here, we provide a precise characterisation of this capacity in the following way. We first introduce a decoupled model in which each input has its own independent set of competing outputs, and provide numerical and analytical evidence that this decoupled model is equivalent to the original model in terms of storage capacity, spectra of the learnt weights, and storage mechanism. Using tools from statistical physics, we show that the decoupled model can store up to $p_c \log p_c / d^2 = 1 / 2$ associations, and generalise the computation of $p_c$ to linear two-layer architectures. Our analysis also gives mechanistic insight into how the optimal solution improves over a naïve Hebbian learning rule: rather than boosting input-output alignments with broad fluctuations, the optimal solution raises the correct scores just above the extreme-value threshold set by the competing outputs. These findings give a sharp statistical-physics characterisation of factual storage in linear networks and provide a baseline for understanding the memory capacity of more realistic neural architectures.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [994] [Solar Cars: A Comprehensive Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09086)
*Afsaneh Mollasalehi,Armin Farhadi*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文综述了太阳能电动汽车的关键因素，包括车型与尺寸、电源配置、领先国家及面临的挑战，旨在探讨其应对能源危机与交通污染的潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 能源危机与交通行业气体排放导致空气污染，亟需开发使用可再生能源的车辆，太阳能电动车作为零碳排的可持续方案受到关注。

Method: 基于已有大量研究，采用综合性文献综述方法，系统梳理太阳能汽车的类型与尺寸、电源配置方案、领先发展国家以及技术挑战等四大方面。

Result: 文章指出太阳能电动车对缓解全球气候变化有显著影响，但具体结果需待综述各因素后呈现。

Conclusion: 太阳能电动车是应对能源危机和交通污染的可行方案，但其发展仍需克服技术、经济等多方面挑战。

Abstract: Energy crisis has forced many countries to think of a replacement for energy supply. Renewable energy sources as firendly environment sources play a pivotal role in producing clean energy for various sectors in industry. Gas emissions originating from the transportation industry is another contributing factor to air pollution. Hence, designing and utilizing vehicles that run on renewable energy is crucial, as it provides a dependable energy source that is naturally abundant, leaves nearly no carbon footprint, and is sustainable. Solar powered electric cars make a significant impact on global climate change. To better understand this impact and building upon the plenty of research done on this topic, this paper aims to provide a comprehensive review of the various factors related to solar cars. Specifically, this review will examine the following key factors: Types and sizing of solar cars, solar vehicle power source configurations, leading solar car nations, and solar car challenges.

</details>


### [995] [Transfer Learning of Multiobjective Indirect Low-Thrust Trajectories Using Diffusion Models and Markov Chain Monte Carlo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09125)
*Jannik Graebner,Ryne Beeson*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出一种结合同伦映射与马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）的迁移学习框架，用于高效生成低推力航天器轨道设计的训练数据，并利用扩散模型学习全局解分布，在环月多圈转移问题上相比现有方法多生成40%可行解并获得更优帕累托前沿。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低推力航天器初步任务设计面临复杂解空间、多目标和大量局部极小值，传统方法生成训练数据成本高，且未能充分利用已有数据。本文旨在通过迁移学习框架更高效地生成高质量训练样本，加速间接法最优控制中的代价状态初始值搜索。

Method: 提出一种迁移学习框架：1) 将多目标优化问题重述为从代价状态空间中的非归一化目标分布进行采样；2) 结合同伦映射（在系统质量参数上）与MCMC算法（对比三种变体）生成训练数据；3) 使用MCMC生成的样本微调条件扩散模型（以质量参数为条件），使其学习全局解分布并高效生成新解。

Result: 在平面多圈转移（圆型限制性三体问题）中，基于梯度的MCMC变体在样本质量与计算成本之间取得最佳权衡。与基于伴随控制变换和梯度优化的最先进间接法相比，该框架生成40%更多可行解，并获得更高质量的帕累托前沿。

Conclusion: 该迁移学习框架能够高效求解带参数变化的间接轨迹优化问题，扩散模型经微调后可学习解分布的全局表示，为低推力任务初步设计提供了一种实用且高效的新方法。

Abstract: Preliminary low-thrust spacecraft mission design is a global search problem characterized by a complex solution landscape, multiple objectives, and numerous local minima. During this phase, mission parameters are often not yet fully defined, requiring new solutions to be generated at a high cadence across varying parameter values. When combined with the indirect approach to optimal control, diffusion models can accelerate this search by learning distributions that represent high-quality initial costates. However, generating training data remains expensive, and opportunities exist to better exploit past data. We propose a transfer-learning framework that combines homotopy in a mission parameter with Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) to generate training data more efficiently. The approach reformulates a multiobjective optimization problem as sampling from an unnormalized target distribution in costate space. We compare three MCMC algorithms on a planar multi-revolution transfer in the circular restricted three-body problem, with homotopy in the system mass parameter. The results show that gradient-based MCMC variants achieve the best trade-off between sample quality and computational cost. For the test transfer, the proposed framework generates 40 % more feasible solutions and achieves a higher-quality Pareto front than a state-of-the-art indirect approach based on adjoint control transformations and gradient-based optimization. Finally, the MCMC-generated samples are used to fine-tune a diffusion model conditioned on the mass parameter, enabling it to learn a global representation of the underlying solution distribution and efficiently generate new solutions. These findings establish the transfer-learning framework as a practical method for efficiently solving indirect trajectory optimization problems with varying parameters.

</details>


### [996] [Fault-Aware MPC for Robotic Fleet Communications Scheduling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09158)
*Carlo Schreiber,Duncan Eddy,Mykel J. Kochenderfer*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出IMM-MPC框架，通过概率信念和主动信息获取，在间断通信条件下调度远程机器人舰队，解决观测歧义问题。在卫星发射和早期轨道通信调度中，与基线方法相比，致命故障卫星的恢复率从2-9%提升至59.8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有调度方法无法区分观测上等价的故障模式（如硬件故障 vs 通信故障），导致在有限通信机会下做出错误优先级决策，造成不可逆的资产损失。

Method: 提出交互多模型模型预测控制（IMM-MPC），维护离散故障模式的概率信念，优化获取价值与信息增益的双目标函数，并刻画观测混淆的可解与不可解情况。

Result: 在200次随机试验中，IMM-MPC恢复59.8%的致命故障卫星，而binary-MPC仅9.0%，基于二分图匹配的方法仅2.0%，同时健康卫星获取率与计算时间相近。

Conclusion: 通过主动信息获取策略，IMM-MPC能有效解决观测歧义下的调度问题，显著提升故障资产的挽救率，且不影响正常任务执行效率。

Abstract: Operating a fleet of remote robotic systems with intermittent communications requires scheduling limited contact opportunities to maintain fleet health awareness, complete mission objectives, and intervene on faulted assets before their permanent loss. This scheduling problem is complicated by observational ambiguity: when an asset fails to check in, the operator cannot distinguish between a lethal hardware fault and a benign communications failure. If the system's failure modes are structured through a fault model, a scheduler can exploit mode-specific lethality, timing, and recoverability properties to prioritize correctly - but only if it can distinguish between modes that produce identical observations under standard actions. We present Interacting Multiple Model Model Predictive Control (IMM-MPC), a receding-horizon framework that maintains a probabilistic belief over discrete fault modes with time-inhomogeneous dynamics and optimizes a two-term objective coupling acquisition value with information gain. We characterize when observationally aliased fault modes can be disambiguated through scheduled actions and when aliasing is permanently unresolvable. Applied to satellite launch and early orbit communications scheduling, IMM-MPC recovers 59.8% of spacecraft experiencing lethal-faults versus 9.0% for binary-MPC and 2.0% for a bipartite graph-based formulation solved through matching. These results hold across 200 randomized trials, while maintaining identical acquisition of healthy satellites and near-identical solve times.

</details>


### [997] [Data-Driven Inverse Reinforcement Learning of Linear Systems with Model Uncertainty: A Convex Optimization View](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09164)
*Duc Cuong Nguyen,Phuong Nam Dao*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文针对离散时间线性系统，提出了一种基于凸优化的数据驱动逆强化学习框架，能够从专家轨迹中恢复成本函数并得到稳定控制器，同时通过广义LQR成本设计解决了模型不确定性问题，在电力系统仿真中验证了方法的准确性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散时间线性系统的数据驱动逆强化学习方法大多依赖迭代策略/价值更新、重复矩阵求逆以及初始稳定控制器，这限制了数值鲁棒性和实际适用性。本文旨在开发一种凸优化框架来克服这些局限性。

Method: 对名义系统推导了逆最优性的半定规划刻画和松弛形式；通过将未知系统矩阵替换为从局部输入-状态数据中回归得到的核矩阵，实现了无模型、离策略的逆强化学习；针对不确定局部系统引入带状态-输入交叉项的广义LQR成本，并利用可微半定规划和随机近似实现鲁棒成本设计。

Result: 在离散时间电力系统算例中，所提方法能够准确恢复专家行为，对增益估计误差和模型失配具有更好的鲁棒性，且计算流程比经典迭代逆强化学习方法更简单。

Conclusion: 本文提出的凸优化数据驱动逆强化学习框架有效克服了传统方法的数值鲁棒性缺陷，通过广义LQR成本设计解决了模型不确定性问题，为实际应用提供了更可靠、更高效的逆强化学习方案。

Abstract: Inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) for linear systems seeks a cost function whose optimal controller reproduces an expert policy from data. Existing data-driven methods for discrete-time linear systems are largely built on iterative policy/value updates, repeated matrix inversions, and, in some cases, an initial stabilizing controller, which can limit numerical robustness and practical applicability. This paper develops a convex-optimization framework for data-driven inverse reinforcement learning of discrete-time linear systems with model uncertainty. For nominal systems, we derive a semidefinite characterization of inverse optimality and a relaxed formulation that recovers an equivalent state-cost matrix together with a stabilizing controller from expert trajectories. We then obtain a model-free, off-policy reformulation by replacing the unknown system matrices with a regressed kernel matrix identified from local input--state data. For uncertain local systems, we show that a standard LQR cost is generally insufficient to represent every stabilizing target gain and therefore introduce a generalized LQR cost with a state--input cross term. Based on this model, we develop a convex data-driven inverse-RL method and extend it to robust cost design over a population of perturbations via differentiable semidefinite programming and stochastic approximation. Simulations on a discrete-time power-system example show accurate recovery of expert behavior, improved robustness to gain-estimation error and model mismatch, and a simpler computational pipeline than classical iterative inverse-RL schemes.

</details>


### [998] [Price Distortions in Korea's Electricity Market: Barriers to Renewable Integration and Reform Pathways](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09318)
*Ryungyeong Lee,Minhan Yoon,Hunyoung Shin*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 韩国电力市场因成本型集中库（CBP）和统一定价机制导致价格信号扭曲，阻碍能源转型。本文提出四项联动改革（引入节点边际电价、建立实时市场、整合市场与系统运营、转向价格型竞价），强调必须协同实施以重构市场设计，使价格信号符合国家能源政策目标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 韩国当前电力市场设计（CBP+统一定价）无法反映输电约束、实时供需及机组成本差异，导致资源错配并抑制可再生能源和电网灵活性投资，亟需改革以支持能源转型。

Method: 提出四方面系统性改革方案：(1)引入节点边际定价(LMP)管理输电约束；(2)建立实时市场反映时间价值；(3)整合市场与系统运营消除不一致；(4)从CBP转向价格型竞价体制。

Result: 各改革方案分别针对特定低效来源，但核心发现是：在现行韩国市场设计下，市场本身无法有效提供价格信号，因此四项改革必须协同实施。

Conclusion: 通过联合实施四项改革，可建立与韩国能源政策目标一致的价格信号体系，实现市场设计的整体连贯性。

Abstract: Structural distortions in price signals within the Korean electricity market, governed by a cost-based pool (CBP) and a uniform pricing mechanism, fundamentally undermine the nation's energy transition goals. The current market design fails to reflect transmission constraints, real-time supply and demand dynamics, and generator-specific costs, leading to inefficient resource allocation and hindering long-term investments in renewable energy and grid flexibility. This paper identifies the key drivers of these distortions and proposes a holistic reform package to enhance market efficiency. The package includes four key reforms: \stepcounter{excep}(\roman{excep}) introducing a locational marginal pricing system to manage transmission constraints; \stepcounter{excep}(\roman{excep}) establishing a real-time market to reflect temporal value; \stepcounter{excep}(\roman{excep}) integrating market and system operations to resolve inconsistencies; and \stepcounter{excep}(\roman{excep}) transitioning from CBP to a price-based bidding system. Each reform targets a distinct source of inefficiency. The broader contribution of this study, however, lies in showing that, under the current Korean market design, the market cannot readily provide effective price signals. These reforms therefore need to be implemented jointly to establish a coherent market design in which price signals are aligned with Korea's energy policy objectives.

</details>


### [999] [Transceiver-Integrated BD-RIS: Wave-Domain Signal Processing for Sustainable and Inclusive 6G](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09358)
*Mahmoud Raeisi,Ayoub Ammar Boudjelal,Henk Wymeersch,Ertugrul Basar,Huseyin Arslan*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出将超对角可重构智能表面（BD-RIS）作为嵌入收发孔径的波域模拟处理单元，通过将线性信号处理从数字基带迁移到波域，显著降低计算负载和能耗，为6G无线通信提供可扩展、可持续的收发架构方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 6G通信需同时支持高速数据通信、泛在感知和亚米级定位，但传统数字基带处理在大阵列和高频段下成本、功耗和计算复杂度急剧上升，难以满足可持续性和包容性等长期社会目标。

Method: 将BD-RIS作为嵌入收发孔径的波域模拟处理单元，将线性信号处理功能从数字基带迁移到波域，利用BD-RIS对电磁波的直接操控能力实现模拟域处理。

Result: BD-RIS显著降低了计算负载和能耗，支持超大规模天线阵列的可扩展和可持续运行，同时提供高操作灵活性、模块化和能效。

Conclusion: 收发器集成的BD-RIS在架构权衡上具有竞争力，成为下一代无线收发器的有力候选方案。

Abstract: The shift toward sixth-generation (6G) wireless communications demands transceiver architectures that simultaneously support high-data-rate communications, pervasive sensing, and sub-meter-level localization. Beyond these performance targets, 6G systems are also expected to align with long-term societal goals, including sustainability and inclusiveness. Conventional radio designs, however, remain heavily reliant on digital baseband processing, whose cost, power consumption, and computational complexity scale unfavorably with increasing array size and carrier frequency, making them poorly aligned with these emerging requirements. Beyond-diagonal reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (BD-RISs) introduce a new paradigm by enabling direct manipulation of electromagnetic waves in the analog domain. This article presents BD-RIS as a wave-domain analog processing unit embedded within the transceiver aperture. By migrating linear signal processing functions from the digital baseband to the wave domain, BD-RISs significantly reduce computational load and energy consumption, enabling scalable and sustainable operation for extra-large antenna array systems. Owing to their ability to jointly provide high operational flexibility, modularity, and energy-efficient analog processing, transceiver-integrated BD-RISs offer a compelling architectural trade-off and emerge as a strong candidate for next-generation wireless transceivers.

</details>


### [1000] [A Stochastic Hybrid Automaton for Smartphone Battery Dynamics: Electro-Thermal Coupling and First-Passage Time-to-Empty Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09367)
*Xiaoyang Li,Runni Zhou*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种随机混合自动机模型，用于预测智能手机的电池耗尽时间。该模型结合了等效电路模型、热模型和用户行为随机过程，能够捕捉因温度、老化和高功率负载导致的电压崩溃现象。通过蒙特卡洛模拟生成完整的TTE分布，并识别出环境温度、内阻等关键风险因素，进而提出基于电阻感知的功率限制策略来延长电池可用寿命。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的库仑计数或线性放电模型无法准确预测智能手机的电池耗尽时间，因为它们忽略了温度、老化和负载依赖的电压降导致的关机机制。实际中，即使剩余电量充足，低温或电池老化导致的内阻增加也可能使高功率突发需求引发电压骤降，触发关机。

Method: 开发了一个随机混合自动机模型，耦合了一阶Thevenin等效电路模型、集总热模型和随机用户活动过程。用户行为被建模为分段确定性马尔可夫过程，在空闲、社交/网页、视频、游戏和弱信号模式之间切换。关机被定义为终端电压低于截止阈值或请求功率超过瞬时可行包络的首达事件。

Result: 蒙特卡洛模拟生成完整的TTE分布（而非单一点估计），可通过第5百分位量化尾部风险。敏感性分析识别出环境温度、内阻、弱信号无线电功耗和屏幕亮度是导致提前关机的主要风险因素。

Conclusion: 基于这些发现，提出了实用的用户指导建议和操作系统级别的电阻感知节流策略，在功率受限状态下限制峰值功率。该框架为解释和延长智能手机在实际不确定性下的可用电池寿命提供了物理基础扎实、具有风险意识的方法。

Abstract: Smartphone time-to-empty (TTE) is difficult to predict because shutdown is governed not only by remaining charge, but also by instantaneous power capability under temperature-, aging-, and load-dependent voltage sag. We develop a stochastic hybrid automaton for smartphone battery dynamics that couples a first-order Thevenin equivalent-circuit model with a lumped thermal model and a stochastic user-activity process. The continuous state includes state of charge, polarization voltage, and battery temperature; user behavior is represented as a piecewise deterministic Markov process switching among idle, social/web, video, gaming, and weak-signal modes. Shutdown is formulated as a first-passage event when terminal voltage crosses a cutoff threshold or when requested power exceeds the instantaneous feasibility envelope.
  The model captures a voltage-collapse mechanism that simple Coulomb-counting or linear discharge models miss: cold temperature or battery aging increases internal resistance, so high-power bursts can drive terminal voltage below cutoff even when substantial charge remains. Monte Carlo simulation yields a full TTE distribution rather than a single countdown, allowing lower-tail risk to be quantified by the 5th percentile. Sensitivity analysis identifies ambient temperature, internal resistance, weak-signal radio penalty, and screen brightness as major drivers of premature shutdown risk. These results motivate practical user guidance and an operating-system-level resistance-aware throttling policy that limits peak power in the power-limited regime. The framework provides a physically grounded, risk-aware approach for explaining and extending usable smartphone battery life under real-world uncertainty.

</details>


### [1001] [Risk-Aware Safe Throughput Forecasting for Starlink Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09508)
*Hongjun Xie,Chao Zhang,Pengcheng Luo,Zenghui Zhang,Genke Yang,Xiaojuan Zhang,Boon-Hee Soong*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出BG-CFQS框架，用于Starlink吞吐量的风险预算安全预测，在控制过估计风险的同时保持预测精度，实验证明其能有效降低有害正向误差并减少会话中断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Starlink吞吐量高度波动，现有预测方法优化对称指标（如MAE、RMSE），无法控制过估计带来的过度准入、带宽超订和服务违规等不对称风险。

Method: 提出Budget-Guided Coarse-to-Fine Quantile Selection (BG-CFQS)框架：训练一族低分位数预测器，定位满足风险预算的分位数边界，并细化边界区域以选择最准确且可行的预测器。

Result: 在三个真实Starlink数据集上，BG-CFQS均满足风险预算，且达到预算可行方法中最低的平均MAE、平均正向误差和尾部正向误差；在高风险和严重风险低吞吐量场景中，有害正向误差分别降低11.0%和12.6%。

Conclusion: 风险感知的吞吐量预测能够将预测安全性转化为应用层面的收益（如减少会话中断），为LEO宽带网络的资源管理提供了有效的安全预测方案。

Abstract: As a representative low Earth orbit (LEO) broadband system, Starlink exhibits highly variable access throughput, making short-term forecasting essential for network resource management.
