Existing forecasting methods mainly optimize symmetric point-prediction metrics such as MAE and RMSE, but they do not explicitly control the asymmetric risk of overestimating future throughput, which can cause over-admission, bandwidth overbooking, and service violations. This paper formulates Starlink throughput prediction as a risk-budgeted safe forecasting problem, where the predictor must satisfy a prescribed overestimation budget while maintaining competitive accuracy. We propose Budget-Guided Coarse-to-Fine Quantile Selection (BG-CFQS), a data-driven framework that trains a family of lower-quantile predictors, locates the quantile boundary satisfying the risk budget, and refines the boundary region to select the most accurate feasible predictor. Experiments on three real-world Starlink throughput datasets show that BG-CFQS satisfies the risk budget on all datasets and achieves the lowest average MAE, mean positive error, and tail positive error among budget-feasible methods. In high-risk and severe-risk low-throughput regimes, BG-CFQS reduces harmful positive errors by 11.0% and 12.6%, respectively. An admission-control evaluation further shows that the proposed safe forecasts reduce dropped sessions, demonstrating that risk-aware forecasting can translate prediction safety into application-level benefits.

</details>


### [1002] [PolarNet: Single-Minima Neural Network for Modeling Lyapunov Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09546)
*Yuan Zhong,Jiaxin Cheng,Hefu Ye,Yicong Zhou*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出PolarNet网络架构，通过结构保证单一临界点，解决了现有神经Lyapunov控制方法在训练中的稳定性问题，可作为即插即用模块提升稳定控制器合成效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经Lyapunov控制方法在特定条件下表现出训练时的行为问题，阻碍了可证明稳定控制器的合成，其根本原因是缺乏对学习得到的Lyapunov函数的网络架构保证。

Method: 提出PolarNet网络架构，通过在结构上保证仅有一个临界点，从而解决现有方法缺乏架构保证的问题。理论证明了PolarNet在建模Lyapunov函数时的适定性和普适性。

Result: 数值实验验证了PolarNet能够始终维持单一临界点，作为即插即用模块替换现有神经Lyapunov控制方法后，成功避免了因缺乏架构保证导致的训练失败。

Conclusion: PolarNet通过结构保证解决了神经Lyapunov控制中的关键训练难题，为可证明稳定的控制策略学习提供了有效的架构解决方案。

Abstract: Learning control strategies with provable stability guarantees continues to be a challenging problem. In this work, we examine a family of training-time behaviors exhibited by existing neural Lyapunov control methods under specific conditions, which can hinder the synthesis of a provably stable controller. We identify the root cause as the lack of neural network architectural guarantees on the learned Lyapunov function, and propose PolarNet, a network architecture that provably addresses these issues by structurally guarantee to have a single critical point. We provide theoretical guarantee regarding the properness and universality of PolarNet for modeling Lyapunov functions, and show that using it as a drop-in replacement in existing neural Lyapunov control methods can effectively circumvent particular difficulties in training. We conduct a set of numerical experiments to verify that PolarNet consistently maintains a single critical point and, when used as a drop-in replacement in existing neural Lyapunov control methods, successfully avoids training failures caused by the lack of architectural guarantees. The code of this paper is available at https://github.com/23-zy/PolarNet.

</details>


### [1003] [Nullspace-based Fault Diagnosis for Closed-Loop Mechatronic Systems with Application to Semiconductor Equipment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09689)
*Koen Classens,Jeroen van de Wijdeven,Maurice Heemels,Tom Oomen*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文针对线性系统的闭环特性，将基于零空间的故障检测与隔离（FDI）综合条件应用于受执行器和传感器故障影响的机电系统，并通过大型原型晶圆台的实验验证了该方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代机电生产设备依赖FDI系统实现连续运行，但现有基于零空间的FDI综合条件在闭环线性系统中的应用存在挑战，本文旨在解决这一差距。

Method: 针对线性系统的闭环方面，定制基于零空间的FDI综合条件，使其适用于受执行器和传感器故障影响的机电系统。

Result: 在大型原型晶圆台上进行了真实实验，成功展示了所提方法，验证了综合条件的实用性和有效性。

Conclusion: 所推导的FDI综合条件可用于广泛的机电生产设备和科学仪器，具有重要的工程应用价值。

Abstract: Fault detection and isolation (FDI) systems are critical for modern mechatronic production equipment, as their continuous operation is heavily dependent on the ability to detect and isolate faults in a timely and efficient manner. The aim of this paper is to address closed-loop aspects for linear systems and enable the application of well-known nullspace-based FDI synthesis conditions to mechatronic systems subject to actuator and sensor faults. These tailored FDI synthesis conditions are applied to a large-scale prototype wafer stage, showcasing the proposed approach through real experiments, thereby underlining the usefulness of the derived synthesis conditions for a wide range of production machines and scientific instruments.

</details>


### [1004] [Safe Exploration for Nonlinear Processes Using Online Gaussian Process Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09772)
*Stefano Tonini,Soroush Rastegarpour,Hamid Reza Feyzmahdavian,Nicola Bastianello,Karl Henrik Johansson*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向部分已知动力学非线性系统的安全数据驱动控制框架。该方法利用高斯过程实时学习未建模非线性动力学，通过基于李雅普诺夫理论的概率控制不变集保证安全，并通过凸二次规划在安全约束下最大化信息获取。数值实验表明安全集扩展约30%，高斯过程均方根误差从1.11降至0.03。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据驱动控制方法在在线学习过程中往往难以同时保证系统稳定性和约束满足，尤其当系统动力学部分未知时，安全控制成为挑战。作者希望在不依赖全局精确模型的前提下，实现安全且高效的在线探索与控制。

Method: 1) 利用高斯过程对未建模非线性残差进行实时学习；2) 基于李雅普诺夫理论构造概率控制不变集以保证高概率稳定性；3) 将控制求解转化为凸二次规划问题，在最大化信息增益的同时满足概率安全约束；4) 设计自适应机制，随不确定性降低动态扩展不变集。

Result: 数值实验验证了所提方法的有效性：在模型不确定性条件下实现了安全且信息丰富的探索，安全集扩展约30%，高斯过程均方根误差从1.11下降至0.03。

Conclusion: 该框架为部分已知动力学非线性系统提供了有限样本安全保证，能够在在线学习过程中同时保证稳定性和约束满足，并支持安全集随不确定性降低而自适应扩展。

Abstract: This paper proposes a safe data-driven control framework for nonlinear systems with partially known dynamics. The method ensures stability and constraint satisfaction during online learning, assuming only a stabilizable linear approximation of the process is available. Unmodeled nonlinear dynamics are captured by a Gaussian process residual learned in real time. Safety is enforced through a probabilistic control-invariant set derived from Lyapunov theory, guaranteeing high-probability stability. A convex quadratic program computes control inputs that maximize information gain while respecting probabilistic safety constraints. The framework provides finite-sample safety guarantees and allows adaptive expansion of the invariant set as uncertainty decreases. Numerical results validate the approach, demonstrating safe and informative exploration under model uncertainty: the safe set expands by about 30% while the Gaussian process root-mean-square error drops from 1.11 to 0.03.

</details>


### [1005] [Action Recommendations for Sequentially Rational Strategic Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09785)
*Renyan Sun,Ashutosh Nayyar*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文研究有限时域离散时间动态系统中，系统设计者在两个战略智能体面前的行动推荐策略优化问题。设计者通过后向归纳求解一系列线性规划，找到既能最大化自身奖励、又能确保智能体服从推荐具有序贯理性的最优策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实中系统设计者常无法直接控制智能体行为，只能通过推荐间接影响。如何设计推荐策略，使智能体有动力服从推荐（即服从是序贯理性的），同时最大化设计者自身目标，是一个核心挑战。

Method: 将问题建模为有限时域离散时间动态系统，设计者与智能体共享状态和历史信息。设计者每时间步发送行动推荐，智能体自行决策。通过后向归纳法求解一族线性规划，得到最优推荐策略。

Result: 提出了一种算法，通过后向归纳求解一系列线性规划，找到了设计者的最优行动推荐策略，该策略能确保智能体服从推荐是序贯理性的。

Conclusion: 本文的方法为存在多个独立决策智能体时，系统设计者通过推荐机制间接控制系统的优化问题提供了一种可行的计算方案。

Abstract: We consider a finite-horizon discrete-time dynamic system that is jointly controlled by two strategic agents. There is a system designer that has its own reward function but does not have direct control over the agents' actions. We consider an information structure where the current state and all past history are equally accessible by the designer and the agents. The designer sends action recommendations to the agents at each time step. Each agent can use the received recommendation and the available information to choose its action. We are interested in the setting where the designer would like to send recommendations in a way that incentivizes the agents to adopt obedient strategies, i.e., to take the action recommended by the designer. Our goal is to find an optimal action recommendation strategy for the designer that maximizes the designer's objective while ensuring that obedient strategies are \emph{sequentially rational} for the agents. We provide an algorithm for the designer's problem that involves solving a family of linear programs in a backward inductive manner.

</details>


### [1006] [Dynamic Scheduling of a Parallel-Server Queueing System: A Computational Method for High-Dimensional Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09799)
*Baris Ata,Ebru Kasikaralar*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文针对大规模呼叫中心中技能路由的实时决策难题，利用Halfin-Whitt重流量极限推导扩散控制问题，并基于深度神经网络开发了可扩展至100+客户类别的高维计算求解方法，在真实银行数据上表现优于现有基准策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 呼叫中心面临大规模多客户类别场景下实时技能路由决策的计算难解问题，传统动态规划方法在高维系统中计算量呈指数级增长，亟需可扩展的计算方法。

Method: 在Halfin-Whitt重流量极限框架下推导扩散控制问题作为近似，采用基于深度神经网络的仿真方法求解该问题，并将所得策略应用于原始呼叫中心调度问题。

Result: 在美国大型银行真实数据校准的测试实例中，所提策略在各项测试问题上的表现不劣于甚至优于最优基准策略，且在维度高达100（即100+客户类别）时仍保持计算可行性。

Conclusion: 提出的深度学习驱动的扩散控制求解方法为大规模呼叫中心的高维技能路由问题提供了可扩展且性能优异的高效解决方案。

Abstract: A key operational challenge for call centers is to decide, in real time, which waiting customer should be served by which available agent. This is known as skill-based routing, and the decision becomes especially difficult in large systems with many customer classes, where standard dynamic programming methods can be computationally intractable. Focusing on the Halfin-Whitt heavy-traffic regime and an infinite-horizon discounted cost criterion, we develop a computational method that scales to high-dimensional settings with many customer classes. Our approach begins by deriving an approximating diffusion control problem in the heavy traffic limiting regime. Building on earlier work by Han et al. (2018), we develop a simulation-based method to solve this problem, relying heavily on deep neural network techniques. Using this framework, we construct a policy for the original (prelimit) call center scheduling problem. To evaluate performance, we adopt a data-driven approach. Using call center data from a large U.S. bank, we calibrate the model and construct realistic test instances. We then compare the resulting policy with benchmark policies drawn from the literature. Across all test problems considered so far, our policy performs at least as well as or better than the best benchmark identified. Moreover, the method remains computationally feasible in dimensions up to 100, corresponding to call centers with 100 or more distinct customer classes.

</details>


### [1007] [Geometric Pareto Control: Riemannian Gradient Flow of Energy Function via Lie Group Homotopy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09824)
*Tong Wu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出Geometric Pareto Control (GPC)框架，通过两阶段几何方法解决强化学习在物理已知的网络安全关键系统中的样本效率、重训练、安全恢复和经济调度等问题。离线阶段将Pareto最优解嵌入为Lie群子流形，在线阶段通过Riemannian梯度流实现闭式近端导航。在非凸控制任务和实时多目标最优潮流中验证，实现了100%可行性、0.30%最优性差距和12.3毫秒决策速度，且无需重训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习在网络安全关键物理系统中面临样本复杂度高、目标或条件变化需重训练、安全恢复与经济调度需脆弱切换逻辑、以及约束RL下的不安全探索等障碍。

Method: 两阶段几何方法：离线阶段将支持的Pareto最优解集嵌入为Lie群子流形，利用指数映射闭包和漂移-重置假设保持在线隐状态在邻域内；在线阶段通过奇异摄动势场驱动的Riemannian梯度流实现闭式近端导航，优先恢复约束再优化性能。

Result: 在非凸控制任务和实时多目标最优潮流中，GPC达到100%可行性、0.30% oracle最优性差距、12.3毫秒决策时间。在支路导纳不确定下仍100%可行，而模型无关基线无法产生可行调度。

Conclusion: GPC通过几何方法有效解决了RL在物理系统中的应用障碍，实现了无需重训练的高可行性、低最优性差距和快速决策，特别适用于未知条件下的鲁棒控制。

Abstract: We propose Geometric Pareto Control (GPC), a framework overcoming barriers of reinforcement learning in cyber-physical systems where governing physics is known. Reinforcement learning confronts barriers in safety-critical applications: sample complexity grows with action-space dimension, retraining is required when objectives or conditions shift, goals such as safety recovery and economic dispatch demand brittle switching logic, and unsafe exploration persists under constrained RL formulations. GPC resolves these barriers through a two-stage geometric approach. Offline, the supported family of Pareto-optimal solutions (i.e., solutions recoverable by weighted scalarization) is embedded as a submanifold within a Lie group. Exponential map closure preserves membership in the ambient Lie group; drift and reset assumptions keep online latent states within a bounded neighbourhood of the Pareto submanifold, and a training-time feasibility margin guarantees decoded actions remain feasible without post-hoc projection, constructing a "map" of the solution landscape. Online, a closed-form proximal navigator traverses this submanifold via a unified Riemannian gradient flow driven by a singular perturbation potential field, inducing dual-timescale dynamics that prioritize constraint restoration over performance optimization. The homeomorphic structure of the submanifold guarantees that varying system parameters and objective weights produce continuous control actions, enabling deployment under unseen conditions without retraining. Validated on a nonconvex control task and real-time multi-objective optimal power flow, GPC achieves 100% feasibility, 0.30% oracle suboptimality, and 12.3 ms decisions while shifting from constraint recovery to economic dispatch. Under branch-admittance uncertainty, it remains 100% feasible without retraining, whereas model-free baselines produce no feasible dispatches.

</details>


### [1008] [Harnessing Floating Car Data, Traffic Camera Observations, and Network Flow Analysis for Traffic Volume Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09891)
*Antonina Kosikova,Mehmet Kerem Turkcan,Ahmed Darrat,Andrew Smyth*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种混合建模与校准框架，融合车辆轨迹数据（局部、有偏）与监控摄像头数据（稀疏但高保真），结合CTM（细胞传输模型）与GNN（图神经网络）实现网络级交通量的物理一致估计与短时预测，并通过EnSRF（集合平方根卡尔曼滤波）进行渐进式数据同化，在纽约市曼哈顿的实验中验证了该方法相比纯轨迹方法具有更高的准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有车辆轨迹数据只能提供部分、空间异质的网络动态视图且存在系统性偏差，而监控摄像头虽能提供高保真信息但仅覆盖有限稀疏位置。两类数据各有优劣，因此需要一种融合框架来互补利用，实现网络级交通状态的准确估计与预测。

Method: 1) 基于CTM的物理约束：利用细胞传输模型保证流量守恒、容量限制和回堵动力学；2) GNN学习时空演化：图神经网络捕捉全路网交通状态的时空演变；3) EnSRF渐进式数据同化：以集合平方根卡尔曼滤波融合摄像头观测；4) 拓扑感知流加权过渡矩阵：将摄像头校正传播到未观测路段，实现实时网络级估计。

Result: 在纽约市曼哈顿的实验中，该方法相比纯轨迹数据估计方法显著提升了准确性，同时保持物理合理性和网络一致性，并能适应不同传感器可用性，提供带有不确定性估计的校准交通量。

Conclusion: 该混合框架有效融合了轨迹数据与摄像头数据，实现了物理一致、网络完整的交通量估计与预测，可支持数据受限城市环境下的交通运营监控与政策评估。

Abstract: Cities increasingly rely on vehicle trajectory data to monitor traffic conditions; however, such data offer only a partial and spatially heterogeneous view of network dynamics and exhibit systematic biases across corridors and time periods. In contrast, surveillance cameras can provide high-fidelity traffic information, but only at a limited set of locations, typically sparsely distributed across the road network. We present a hybrid modeling and calibration framework that fuses these complementary data sources to produce physically consistent, network-wide estimates and short-horizon forecasts of traffic volumes. The framework leverages kinematic features derived from the Cell Transmission Model (CTM) formulation within a graph neural network (GNN). By enforcing traffic-flow conservation, capacity limits, and spillback dynamics, the CTM provides a physically grounded representation of traffic flow, while the GNN learns the spatiotemporal evolution of traffic states over the entire road network. To calibrate the model predictions on traffic camera observations, we use a progressive data-assimilation scheme based on an Ensemble Square-Root Kalman filter (EnSRF). A topology-informed flow-weighted transition matrix is further employed to propagate camera-driven corrections to unobserved road segments, enabling real-time, network-wide traffic state and volume estimation. The approach is demonstrated using probe-vehicle trajectory data and municipal traffic cameras in Manhattan, New York City, where it achieves improved accuracy relative to trajectory-based estimates while maintaining physically plausible and network-consistent traffic flows. The proposed framework accommodates varying sensor availability and produces calibrated traffic volumes with uncertainty estimates, supporting operational monitoring and evaluation of transportation policies in data-constrained urban environments.

</details>


### [1009] [Optimal Loss Reduction in Distribution Networks Using Conservation Voltage Reduction and Network Topology Reconfiguration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09912)
*Rida Fatima,Hassan Zahid Butt,Xingpeng Li*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种协调优化框架，将电压降低（CVR）与网络拓扑重构（NTR）相结合，用于配电网日前运行规划，显著降低有功损耗（最高20.6%），并提升电压质量和支路负载均衡性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究大多将CVR和NTR独立处理，忽视了二者在负荷需求、电压分布和潮流分布上的耦合影响，限制了整体优化效果。

Method: 构建混合整数锥规划模型，集成交流潮流约束、电压相关负荷表示和辐射状约束，协调优化CVR的电压控制与NTR的开关切换。

Result: 在IEEE 33和123节点系统上验证，协调策略相比独立策略有功损耗最高降低20.6%，同时保持电压合规并改善支路负载均匀性。

Conclusion: 协调优化为现代配电网提供了一种有效且可扩展的效率提升方案。

Abstract: Conservation voltage reduction (CVR) and network topology reconfiguration (NTR) are widely employed to improve distribution system performance; however, existing approaches largely treat them independently, overlooking their coupled impact on load demand, voltage profiles, and power flow distribution, thereby limiting their overall effectiveness. This paper proposes a coordinated optimization framework for day-ahead operational planning of distribution networks, integrating CVR and NTR to enhance overall network efficiency and reduce active power losses in radial distribution networks. The problem is formulated as a mixed-integer conic programming model incorporating AC power flow constraints, voltage-dependent load representation, and radiality constraints. CVR is implemented to achieve load reduction through coordinated voltage control, while NTR redistributes line loading via optimal switching of controllable branches. The proposed framework is validated on the IEEE 33 and 123-bus distribution systems under varying load conditions. Results demonstrate that the coordinated approach consistently outperforms independent strategies, achieving up to 20.6% reduction in active power losses while maintaining voltage compliance and improving branch loading uniformity. These findings confirm that coordinated optimization provides an effective and scalable solution for enhancing efficiency in modern distribution networks.

</details>


### [1010] [Scalable Design of Attack-Resilient Controllers for Positive Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10078)
*Alba Gurpegui,Sribalaji C. Anand,André M. H. Teixeira*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文针对受到网络攻击的正系统，提出了一种安全且具有弹性的控制器设计框架。通过极小极大公式分析攻击者注入虚假数据导致的最坏性能损失，证明最优攻击策略是线性的，并探讨了输出具有不稳定零点时可能引发的无界性能退化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网络控制系统易受虚假数据注入攻击，导致控制成本上升。现有研究缺乏针对正系统（状态始终非负的系统）在攻击下的安全控制器设计方法，且需要量化攻击导致的最坏性能损失。

Method: 采用极小极大（minimax）优化框架建模攻击者与控制器之间的博弈；通过差分方程（有限时域）和代数方程（无限时域）求解最坏性能损失；将框架扩展至存在模型不确定性的系统。

Result: 最优攻击策略在可能的非线性策略中是线性的；当测量输出的不稳定零点不是性能指标的不稳定零点时，攻击可导致无界性能退化；数值实验验证了利用正系统和线性调节器理论可低计算量地缓解攻击。

Conclusion: 正系统框架结合线性调节器理论能有效设计抵御网络攻击的控制器，且计算开销低。未来可进一步研究隐式隐蔽性约束下的攻击检测与防御。

Abstract: This paper proposes a framework for secure and resilient controller design for positive systems against cyber-attacks. In particular, we consider a network-controlled system where an adversary injects false data into the actuator channels to increase the control cost (performance measure) while penalizing the attack effort and subject to state-dependent constraints. Using a minimax formulation, we analyze the worst-case performance loss caused by such adversaries, which is given by the solution of a difference equation, and an algebraic equation when the time horizon is infinite. We show that the optimal attack policy, among possible nonlinear policies, is linear. Despite the lack of explicit stealthiness constraints, we also show that when the measured output has an unstable zero which is not an unstable zero of the performance measure, the attacks can induce unbounded performance degradation. The proposed framework is also extended to systems with model uncertainty. Numerical examples illustrate the results and demonstrate how tools from positive systems and linear regulator theory can be used to mitigate cyber-attacks with low computational effort.

</details>


### [1011] [Delay-Robust Secondary Frequency Control via Passive Interconnection and Randomized Block Updates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10080)
*Yiwei Liu,Luwei Yang,Shunbo Lei*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文研究通信延迟下传输网络的二次频率控制，提出基于被动性的增强投影原始-对偶控制框架，结合随机块坐标实现降低计算负担，并通过波动域接口滤波器改善阻尼，仿真验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有二次频率控制方法在处理通信延迟和有限计算资源时存在局限性，需要一种同时兼顾延迟鲁棒性和计算效率的控制方案。

Method: 1) 将频率控制问题建模为带约束的经济调度问题；2) 设计增强投影原始-对偶控制器实现被动性控制；3) 使用基于散射的被动通道建模双向通信延迟；4) 提出随机块坐标实现降低计算负担；5) 引入波动域接口滤波器改善阻尼。

Result: 所提出的数字实现能够精确复现延迟闭环行为，同时显著降低每次更新的计算成本。

Conclusion: 在通信延迟和有限计算资源条件下，所提出的控制框架能恢复额定频率并求解约束经济调度问题，并在IEEE 14节点系统上得到验证。

Abstract: This paper studies secondary frequency control in transmission networks subject to communication delays at the cyber-physical interface and limited per-update computation at the control center. The regulation objective is formulated as a constrained economic dispatch problem incorporating generation capacity constraints, nodal power balance, transmission-flow limits, and scheduled tie-line power exchanges. Based on this formulation, we develop a passivity-based control framework in which an augmented projected primal-dual controller restores nominal frequency and drives the closed-loop system to the solution set of the constrained economic dispatch problem. Two-way communication delays between the physical network and the control center are modeled as scattering-based passive channels for the measurement uplink and the control-command downlink. This construction preserves the target equilibrium and enables a delay-robust passivity analysis of the delayed closed loop. To reduce the computational burden at the control center, we develop a randomized block-coordinate implementation of the augmented projected primal-dual controller. The resulting sampled-data closed loop preserves the target solution set and achieves local mean-square geometric convergence under suitable step-size and regularity conditions. Finally, a multivariable wave-domain interface filter is introduced to inject additional dissipation and improve the damping of the delayed interface without altering the steady-state interconnection. Simulations on the IEEE 14-bus system indicate that the proposed digital implementation accurately reproduces the delayed closed-loop behavior while reducing the per-update computational cost.

</details>


### [1012] [Lure-and-Reveal: An Exposure Framework for Stealthy Deception Attack in Multi-sensor Uncertain Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10098)
*Meiqi Tian,Yihan Liu,Bingzhuo Zhong*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种主动暴露框架，通过在控制输入中注入随机抖动，迫使隐蔽欺骗攻击在有限时间内暴露，同时保证不降低闭环系统性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多传感器融合系统易受隐蔽欺骗攻击，传统检测方法难以发现此类攻击，亟需一种主动暴露机制。

Method: 在误差状态卡尔曼滤波框架下引入"嫌疑模式"，向标称控制输入注入随机暴露抖动，使防御者的真实状态估计与攻击者操纵的状态估计产生偏差，从而迫使攻击失效。

Result: 推导了有限时间内暴露所需的最小抖动幅值条件，以及不降低闭环性能的可补偿条件；基于GNSS/INS集成无人机系统的仿真验证了框架有效性。

Conclusion: 该框架能有效主动暴露隐蔽欺骗攻击，且无需修改传感器接口，具有良好的实用价值。

Abstract: Multi-sensor integration via error-state Kalman filter (KF) is widely employed for precise state estimation in cyber-physical systems (CPSs). However, this integration exposes the system to stealthy deception attacks that render conventional detection mechanisms ineffective. We propose an exposure framework to actively reveal such stealthy attacks without modifying sensor interfaces. The framework introduces a suspect mode in which the defender injects random exposure shakes into the nominal control inputs, thus creating a discrepancy between the defender's true state estimates and the attacker's manipulated state estimates, preventing the attack from remaining stealthy. We further derive an explicit exposure condition that characterizes the minimum shake magnitude to guarantee the finite-time exposure and a compensable condition that ensures the shakes do not degrade closed-loop performance. Simulation results based on a GNSS/INS-integrated UAV system verify the effectiveness of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [1013] [Transmission Topology Optimization using accelerated MapElites](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10128)
*Nico Westerbeck,Leonard Hilfrich,Dirk Witthaut*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于GPU加速的遗传算法（MapElites变体）进行输电拓扑优化，结合全GPU原生直流负载流求解器，在15分钟内完成端到端优化，已在两家欧洲TSO评估中，代码已开源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 输电拓扑优化能通过低成本开关操作提升电网运行效率与灵活性，但现有方法在运行速度和可扩展性上存在瓶颈。

Method: 采用GPU加速的遗传算法框架，随机变异拓扑并并行评估多目标；结合全GPU原生DC负载流求解器，避免CPU-GPU数据传输；使用MapElites照度算法变体高效生成帕累托前沿多样化解集；最后导入AC验证，形成端到端解决方案。

Result: 端到端优化可在15分钟内完成；代码已开源（github.com/eliagroup/ToOp）；正在两家欧洲TSO的运营规划人员中评估。

Conclusion: GPU加速可显著提升输电拓扑优化的计算效率与可扩展性，MapElites变体能有效生成帕累托前沿的多样化解，实际部署验证正在进行中。

Abstract: Transmission Topology Optimization has great potential to improve efficiency and flexibility of grid operations through non-costly switching actions, but previous approaches struggle with runtime performance and scalability. In this work, we present an optimization approach that leverages GPU acceleration to speed up computations. In a genetic algorithm setting, topologies are randomly mutated and evaluated in parallel for multiple optimization criteria. Combined with a fully GPU-native DC loadflow solver, there is no CPU-GPU data transfer required in the DC optimization loop. Using a variant of the illumination algorithm MapElites, we efficiently generate a set of diverse candidate solutions on the pareto front. Together with an importing and AC validation step, we present an end-to-end optimization solution that runs in under 15 minutes. The approach is currently under evaluation by operational planning operators in two European TSOs. We furthermore open-source our code at github.com/eliagroup/ToOp.

</details>


### [1014] [Online Learning-Based Control with Guaranteed Error Bounds for a Class of Nonlinear Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10152)
*Ricus Husmann,Sven Weishaupt,Malin Lotta Husmann,Harald Aschemann*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于高斯过程子模型在线学习(GPSOL)和扰动误差率限制(DERL)的自适应控制方法，通过线性矩阵不等式推导稳定性条件与峰值增益，实现对一类非线性系统的指数稳定性和有界输出误差保证，并在仿真与气动实验台上成功验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 如何在保证非线性系统指数稳定性的同时，实现对输出误差的显式有界控制，是本文要解决的核心问题。

Method: 采用GPSOL算法在线学习高斯过程子模型，结合DERL算法限制预测误差率；通过线性矩阵不等式(LMI)推导稳定性条件和系统峰值增益，利用峰值增益为DERL算法设定期望预测误差率，以实现用户定义的输出误差界。

Result: 仿真模型成功验证了峰值增益与相关误差界；在气动实验台上进行了实验验证，控制结构与误差界均得到实验证实。

Conclusion: 所提控制方案和误差界目前仅适用于一阶单输入单输出系统，但预计可扩展至某些高阶和多输入多输出系统。

Abstract: In this paper, we present a learning-based control for a class of nonlinear systems that guarantees exponential stability as well as bounded output errors. The control is based on the Gaussian Process Submodel Online Learning (GPSOL) algorithm and the Disturbance Error Rate Limiting (DERL) algorithm, both of which were developed in previous work. The GPSOL algorithm provides a method to learn Gaussian Process (GP) models for subsystems online, whereas the DERL algorithm allows to limit the rate of the prediction error of these GP models. The focus of this paper is the utilization of the GP model within an adaptive controller and the derivation of corresponding stability conditions and system peak-to-peak gains by means of linear matrix inequalities (LMIs). These peak-to-peak gains are then used to prescribe a desired prediction error rate for the DERL algorithm to achieve user-defined output error bounds. The gains and the related bounds were successfully verified using a simulation model. Furthermore, results form a successful experimental validation of the bounds and the overall control structure on a pneumatic test rig are presented. While the control scheme and error bounds proposed in this paper are limited to first-order single-input-single-output systems, an extension to certain classes of higher-order and multiple-input-multiple-output systems is expected to be forthcoming.

</details>


### [1015] [Hierarchical 2-degree-of-freedom control combining Youla-Kucera parameterization and model predictive control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10431)
*Zhiheng Zhao,Hans Henrik Niemann,John Bagterp Jørgensen*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合Youla-Kucera参数化与模型预测控制的层级化2自由度控制结构，利用前馈通道实现级联MPC优化，并通过控制器参数化通道设计H2最优控制器实现无偏移MPC。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MPC在系统优化与无偏移控制方面存在局限性，本文旨在通过YK参数化构建2自由度结构，分别处理系统优化与控制器参数化问题，以提升控制性能。

Method: 采用YK参数化基于名义系统的互质分解，引入辅助前馈通道用于系统优化（实现级联MPC），以及控制器参数化通道用于设计YK参数（通过H2最优控制器设计实现无偏移MPC）。

Result: 通过前馈通道实现级联MPC优化系统性能，通过控制器参数化通道设计的H2最优YK参数实现无偏移MPC。

Conclusion: 该层级化2自由度结构有效结合了YK参数化与MPC的优势，分别解决了系统优化与无偏移控制问题。

Abstract: A hierarchical 2DOF (2-degree-of-freedom) structure combining Youla-Kucera (YK) parameterization and model predictive control (MPC) is presented in this paper. The YK parameterization employs the coprime factorization of the nominal system and controller, thereby introducing an auxiliary feedforward channel dedicated to system optimization and a controller parameterization channel. The feedforward channel is utilized to implement cascaded MPC for system optimization. The controller parameterization channel is utilized to achieve offset-free MPC by designing an appropriate YK parameter through the H2 optimal controller design.

</details>


### [1016] [Priority-Driven Control and Communication in Decentralized Multi-Agent Systems via Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10482)
*Qingyun Guo,Junyi Shi,Tomasz Piotr Kucner,Dominik Baumann*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种无模型、优先级驱动的强化学习算法，用于多智能体系统中的事件触发控制，通过联合学习通信优先级和控制策略，避免了传统方法对精确系统模型的依赖，并在基准任务上优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有事件触发控制方法大多依赖精确的系统模型，这在实际应用中往往难以获得；同时，事件触发控制中的二元通信决策导致混合动作空间，增加了学习难度。

Method: 提出一种无模型、优先级驱动的强化学习算法，在去中心化多智能体系统中联合学习通信优先级和控制策略，通过学习通信优先级来规避混合动作空间问题。

Result: 在基准任务上，所提出的算法优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 该工作为无模型场景下的多智能体事件触发控制提供了一种有效方案，通过优先级学习简化了决策空间，性能优于现有基线。

Abstract: Event-triggered control provides a mechanism for avoiding excessive use of constrained communication bandwidth in networked multi-agent systems. However, most existing methods rely on accurate system models, which may be unavailable in practice. In this work, we propose a model-free, priority-driven reinforcement learning algorithm that learns communication priorities and control policies jointly from data in decentralized multi-agent systems. By learning communication priorities, we circumvent the hybrid action space typical in event-triggered control with binary communication decisions. We evaluate our algorithm on benchmark tasks and demonstrate that it outperforms the baseline method.

</details>


### [1017] [Observing the state of networks with directed higher-order interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10489)
*Roberto Rizzello,Davide Salzano,Stefano Boccaletti,Pietro De Lellis*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文针对带有高阶有向交互的非线性动态网络，提出了一种同时选择测量节点和观测器增益的算法设计流程，并基于收敛性分析验证了其性能与鲁棒性，最终应用于群体意见的完整重构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有网络状态重构方法大多未考虑高阶有向交互，且测量节点选择和观测器增益设计缺乏系统性联合优化，难以在实际非线性网络中保证收敛性。

Method: 基于解析收敛性分析结果，提出同时选择测量节点和观测器增益的算法观测器设计流程，在理论上保证收敛性，并进行大规模数值实验验证。

Result: 通过全面数值仿真，验证了所设计观测器在网络状态重构中的良好性能和鲁棒性，并成功将其应用于群体意见的完整重构。

Conclusion: 该算法能够有效处理带有高阶有向交互的非线性网络状态重构问题，在理论与实际应用中均展现出优异的性能与鲁棒性。

Abstract: We consider the problem of reconstructing the state of a network of nonlinear dynamical systems in the presence of directed higher-order interactions. Grounded on analytical convergence results, we propose an algorithmic observer design procedure that simultaneously selects the nodes to be measured and the observer gains. We complement the theoretical analysis with an exhaustive numerical investigation campaign that showcases the performance and robustness of the designed observer. Finally, the algorithmic procedure is used to fully reconstruct the opinions of a group of agents.

</details>


### [1018] [Glycemic Safety Tube: A Provably Safe Control Framework for Artificial Pancreas Systems under Parametric Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10490)
*Pukhrambam Akash Singh,Ratnangshu Das,Ahan Basu,Pushpak Jagtap*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种模型无关、计算高效的血糖安全管控制方法（GSTC），用于1型糖尿病的自动化胰岛素输注，相比现有方法在安全性、鲁棒性和计算效率上均表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有闭环控制方法要么依赖精确的患者个体模型，要么无法提供正式的安全保证，且计算负担大，不适合可穿戴设备。因此需要一种模型无关、计算高效且具备安全保障的胰岛素输注控制方法。

Method: 提出Glycemic Safety Tube Control（GSTC），一种模型无关、计算高效的控制框架。通过设计使得血糖水平在临床上安全的范围内，并推导出在有界膳食扰动和估计误差下保证安全与输入约束满足的可行性条件。

Result: 与线性/非线性模型预测控制及滑模控制等先进方法相比，GSTC能在不同膳食模式和患者条件下维持安全性，展现出鲁棒性和计算效率的优势。

Conclusion: GSTC提供了一种安全、高效且不依赖患者个体特征的下一代人工胰腺系统方案。

Abstract: Type 1 diabetes eliminates the body's ability to produce insulin, making glucose regulation entirely dependent on external insulin delivery and the control algorithm. Existing closed-loop methods either rely on accurate patient-specific models or do not provide formal safety guarantees, and are often computationally demanding for wearable devices. This paper proposes Glycemic Safety Tube Control (GSTC), a model-free and computationally efficient control framework for automated insulin delivery. The method enforces clinically relevant safety bounds on glucose levels by design, ensuring that glucose remains within a prescribed safe range. We also derive feasibility conditions that guarantee safety and input constraint satisfaction under bounded meal disturbances and estimation errors. The performance of GSTC is evaluated against state-of-the-art methods, including linear and nonlinear model predictive control and sliding mode control. The results demonstrate that GSTC maintains safety under varying meal patterns and patient conditions, highlighting its robustness and computational efficiency. Overall, GSTC provides a safe, efficient, and patient-independent approach for next-generation artificial pancreas systems.

</details>


### [1019] [Equivariant Observer Design on SL(3) for Image Intensity-Based Homography Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10520)
*Tarek Bouazza,Pieter van Goor,Robert Mahony,Tarek Hamel*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于SL(3)李群非线性观测器的单应性估计方法，通过直接图像配准利用全图像信息，无需特征提取与匹配，并证明了局部指数收敛性，同时引入二阶观测器变体改善收敛性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于特征的单应性估计方法依赖大量的特征提取与匹配，计算成本高且易受特征质量影响，因此需要一种更直接、鲁棒的方法来利用完整图像信息进行估计。

Method: 在SL(3)李群上设计非线性观测器，直接以像素强度定义代价函数进行图像配准；推导代价函数非退化条件并分析不可观图像配置；引入Hessian矩阵的二阶观测器变体以改善局部收敛。

Result: 理论证明观测器具有局部指数收敛性，通过真实图像上的仿真验证了所提方案的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提出的直接图像配准方法避免了特征提取步骤，在理论上保证了收敛性，且二阶变体进一步提升了局部收敛性能，为单应性估计提供了一种新的有效途径。

Abstract: This paper addresses the problem of homography estimation using a nonlinear observer designed on the Lie group $\mathbf{SL}(3)$ that exploits the full image information through direct image registration. Unlike traditional feature-based methods, which rely on extensive feature extraction and matching, the proposed approach formulates an observer that minimises a cost function defined directly in terms of image pixel intensities. Explicit conditions ensuring the non-degeneracy of the cost function are derived, and a comprehensive analysis is conducted to characterise and generate degenerate (unobservable) image configurations. Theoretical results demonstrate local exponential convergence of the observer. To improve local convergence properties, a second-order observer variant is introduced by incorporating the Hessian of the cost function into the correction term. Simulation results demonstrate the performance of the proposed solutions on real images.

</details>
